local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛkʋyɩ nɛ ɛpɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ sɔɔndʋ kpaɣ-mɩ ḿbʋ́? Mi-lidaʋ wɛ kpaagbaa ñɩɩɩ!» Ɛlɛ́, eholini heɣlim nɛ lɩm nɛ pɩhɛɛ pɩtɩŋa niɣ niɣ.

eng: Dont you know that everything that goes into the mouth enters the stomach and goes out into the sewer?.
local: Ɩtanɩɩ se mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛyʋ tɔkɩ yɔ, pitiki ɛ-taa nɛ pʋwayɩ lɛ, ewolo ɛlɩɩ awayɩ yaa we?.

eng: This is why I speak to the crowds in parables: although they see, they dont really see; and although they hear, they dont really hear or understand.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mɔyɔɔdʋʋnɩ-wɛ nɛ aduwa se pɔcɔna, ɛlɛ́, pataana, nɛ pewelesi, ɛlɛ́, pataanɩɩ pʋ-tɔbʋʋ.

eng: But if your eye is bad, your whole body will be full of darkness. If then the light in you is darkness, how terrible that darkness will be!.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee aanaɣ camɩyɛ yɔ, ñatɩŋa payɩ ŋwɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa. Yee ñalɩmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ŋwɛna yɔ, ɖɩpɩsɩ cɩkpɛndʋʋ yɔ, ŋtɛzɩɣ wɛʋ cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa kpem.».

eng: Let the person who has ears, hear.
local: Weyi ɛwɛnɩ nɩŋgbaaŋ lɛ, ɛnɩɩ!.

eng: But the gate that leads to life is narrow and the road difficult, so few people find it.
local: Đɛɛmɛnɖɛɛ nɛ nʋmɔsɔka patɩŋnaʋ wɛ kaɖɛ, ɛlɛ́, yee ɩtɩŋnɩ-wɛ yɔ, ihikiɣ wezuu. Ɛlɛ́, mbá panaɣ-wɛ yɔ, pɔtɔɖɔɔ.».

eng: You are the light of the world. A city on top of a hill cant be hidden.
local: «Mɩ ɖɔɖɔ lɛ kedeŋa ñalɩmɩyɛ. Đɩsɩ nzɩ́ sɩwɛ piyaɣ ñʋʋ taa yɔ, panaɣ-sɩ paa le.

eng: The Pharisees went out and met in order to find a way to destroy Jesus.
local: Pɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, Farɩsɩ ñɩma lɩɩ se pala lɩmaɣza nɛ pana ɛzɩma mbʋ́ paala nɛ pakʋ Yesu yɔ.

eng: He said, Bring them here to me. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu cosi-wɛ se: «Ɩkɔnɩ-m kpakpasɩ ńzɩ́ nɛ tindine hɔɔlasɩ ńzɩ́.».

eng: Then the disciples realized he was telling them about John the Baptist.
local: Peeɖe ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa ɖiɣzinaa se Lɩm Sɔʋ Sɔnzɩ Laɖʋ Yohanɛɛsɩ tɔm eheyaɣ-wɛ.

eng: They will haul you in front of governors and even kings because of me so that you may give your testimony to them and to the Gentiles.
local: Pɔkɔŋ-mɩ yaʋ ajɛya ñʋndɩnaa nɛ awiya sɔsɔna pɛ-tɛ mɔ-yɔɔ se ɩkɛ aseɣɖe tɩnaa pa nɛ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ pɔ-cɔlɔ.

eng: The people were amazed and said, What kind of person is this? Even the winds and the lake obey him.
local: Peeɖe ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa ḿbá payɩɣyɩ-ɩ siŋŋ nɛ pɔpɔzʋʋ pa-tɩ se: «Ɛbɛ ɛnɛ ɛkɛnaa kpem nɛ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ heɣlim nɛ lɩm nɛ pañaŋ-ɩ?».

eng: But what goes out of the mouth comes from the heart. And thats what contaminates a person in Gods sight.
local: Ɛlɛ́, tɔm ndʋ́ ɛyʋ yɔɔdʋʋ yɔ, tɩlɩɣnɩ ɛ-taa, ńdʋ́ pisiɣni-i Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa.

eng: What Isaiah prophesied has become completely true for them: You will hear, to be sure, but never understand; and you will certainly see but never recognize what you are seeing .
local: Ḿbʋ́ pɩlakɩ ɛzɩ náyʋ Ezaayii maʋ ɛ-takayaɣ taa yɔ. Ɛmawa se: «Ɛsɔ yɔɔdaa se: ‹Ɩkɔŋ welesuu camɩyɛ, Ɛlɛ́, ɩɩnɩɣ pʋ-tɔbʋʋ. Ɩkɔŋ cɔnaʋ camɩyɛ, Ɛlɛ́, ɩɩnaɣ.

eng: No one can serve two masters. Either you will hate the one and love the other, or you will be loyal to the one and have contempt for the other. You cannot serve God and wealth.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Nɔɔyʋ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛla caanaa naalɛ tʋma. Yee ɛlakɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɛpaɖɩɣ lɛlʋ nɛ ɛsɔɔlɩ lɛlʋ. Yaa pʋtɔma, ɛnɩɣnɩ lɛlʋ nɛ eyele lɛlʋ. Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pʋwɛɛ: ɩɩpɩzɩɣ ɩsa Ɛsɔ nɛ ɩtɛ ɩwɛnɩ liidiye laɣzaɣ.».

eng: To what will I compare this generation? It is like a child sitting in the marketplaces calling out to others.
local: «Ɛbɛ mɛnkɛdɩɣnɩ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɛyáa panɛ lee? Pɛwɛ ɛzɩ piya nzɩ́ sɩcaɣ mʋzʋʋ taa ɛyáa samaɣ ɖikpeɣliye nɛ sikou ɖama yɔɔ se:.

eng: Watch out for false prophets. They come to you dressed like sheep, but inside they are vicious wolves.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ nɛ mbá pɛcɛtɩɣ se pɛkɛ náyaa yɔ. Pɔkɔŋ mɩ-cɔlɔ lɛ, pɛwɛ ɛzɩ heŋ, naze lɛ, pɛkɛ kpemtɔɔyɩsɩ kañadɩnaa.

eng: Neither do people light a lamp and put it under a basket. Instead, they put it on top of a lampstand, and it shines on all who are in the house.
local: Nɔɔyʋ fɛyɩ se ɛsɔkɩ kanɖʋ nɛ ɛpam-kʋ ɖaakuɖe tɛɛ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛsɩɣ-kʋ ɖenɖe pʋkʋyɩ camɩyɛ ñaba yɔ nɛ pɩnaɣ mbá patɩŋa payɩ pɛwɛ ɖɩɣa taa yɔ.

eng: Jesus knew what they intended to do, so he went away from there. Large crowds followed him, and he healed them all.
local: Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, Yesu nɩɩ se pacaɣ pakʋ-ɩ. Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛkʋyɩ peeɖe nɛ etuzi ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛyáa sakɩyɛ tɩŋ ɛ-wayɩ nɛ ɛla nɛ kʋdɔndɩnaa tɩŋa yɔɔ cɛ.

eng: He ordered the crowds to sit down on the grass. He took the five loaves of bread and the two fish, looked up to heaven, blessed them and broke the loaves apart and gave them to his disciples. Then the disciples gave them to the crowds.
local: Powonaa lɛ, eheyi ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ se pacaɣ ñɩtʋ yɔɔ. Peeɖe ɛkpaɣ tindine hɔɔlasɩ kagbaanzɩ ńzɩ́ nɛ kpakpasɩ ńzɩ́ sɩ-naalɛ nɛ ɛkpazɩ ɛ-ɛsɛ ɛsɔdaa nɛ ɛsɛɛ pʋ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛcɛdɛlɩ nɛ ɛcɛlɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa nɛ patayɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ.

eng: When they came to the crowd, a man met Jesus. He knelt before him.
local: Yesu nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa petibini pʋʋ yɔɔ lɛ, pamaɣnɩ ɛyáa samaɣ. Peeɖe abalʋ nɔɔyʋ woba ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ eluŋ ɛ-tɛɛ.

eng: Whenever they hand you over, dont worry about how to speak or what you will say, because what you can say will be given to you at that moment.
local: Yee pakpa-mɩ powoni tɔm ɖɩhʋyɛ lɛ, ɩtaanɩɣzɩ tɔm ndʋ́ ɩɩyɔɔdɩ yɔ yaa ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩɩyɔɔdɩ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ. Yee pɩtalaa lɛ, ɩyɔɔdɩ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋʋ mɩ-nɔsɩ taa yɔ.

eng: When Jesus arrived on the other side of the lake in the country of the Gadarenes, two men who were demon-possessed came from among the tombs to meet him. They were so violent that nobody could travel on that road.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, patalɩnɩ pa-kpɩyʋʋ Gadaraa ɛjaɖɛ taa kidiiliŋ lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ nɛ petii. Peeɖe ɛyáa naalɛ nabɛyɛ lɩnɩ pɩlaŋ taa nɛ pakatɩɣ Yesu. Pekem aleewaa. Nɔɔyʋ takatɩɣ se ɛtɩŋnɩ pɔ-cɔlɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, paawɛ kañatʋ siŋŋ.

eng: Out of the heart come evil thoughts, murders, adultery, sexual sins, thefts, false testimonies, and insults.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, lɩmaɣza kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ wena awɛ ɛyʋ taa yɔ, ana yekina se ɛkʋ ɛyʋ yaa ɛla acɛyɛ yaa ɛla acɛyɛ yaa ɛmɩlɩ yaa ɛcɛtɩnɩ lɛlaa taa yaa ɛwɛɛkɩ pa-hɩla.

eng: For this peoples senses have become calloused, and theyve become hard of hearing, and theyve shut their eyes so that they wont see with their eyes or hear with their ears or understand with their minds, and change their hearts and lives that I may heal them .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ ɛjaɖɛ ńɖɩ́, Ɖɩ-taa ñɩma laŋa wɛ kpɩzɩŋ. Pɔtɔ pa-nɩŋgbaaŋ se pataanɩɩ, nɛ Pohuuzi pɛ-ɛsɛ yɔɔ se pataana. Pataasɔɔlɩ se pana nɛ pɛ-ɛsɛ, Nɛ panɩɩ nɛ pa-nɩŋgbaaŋ, Nɛ pɛlɛɣzɩ pa-laŋa. Pataasɔɔlɩ se pɛlɛɣzɩ pa-lakasɩ pe-wezuu caɣʋ taa, Pʋyɔɔ mantapɩzɩ mala nɛ pɔ-yɔɔ cɛ.›.

eng: Therefore, I say to you, dont worry about your life, what youll eat or what youll drink, or about your body, what youll wear. Isnt life more than food and the body more than clothes?.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ɩtaanɩɣzɩ mbʋ́ ɩɩtɔɔ nɛ ɩñɔɔ nɛ wondu ndʋ́ iisuu mi-wezuu caɣʋ taa yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, wezuu kɩlɩ tɔɔnaɣ wazaɣ nɛ tomnaɣ ñakɩlɩ wondu wazaɣ.

eng: We played the flute for you and you didnt dance. We sang a funeral song and you didnt mourn.
local: ‹Đɩhʋlɩ-mɩ hɩsɩ se ɩpaa nɛ ikizi. Đitee kʋñɔŋ hendu nɛ itewii.›.

eng: You will know them by their fruit. Do people get bunches of grapes from thorny weeds, or do they get figs from thistles?.
local: Ɩkɔŋ-wɛ sɩm nɛ pa-lakasɩ ɛzɩ pasɩŋʋʋ tɩʋ nɛ ki-pee yɔ. Paakoyuu leemuu ŋgone yɔɔ yaa hiyikajásɩ sɔɔ tɩʋ yɔɔ.

eng: In the same way, let your light shine before people, so they can see the good things you do and praise your Father who is in heaven.
local: Ḿbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa se mɩ-ñalɩmɩyɛ ɛñalɩ ɛyáa ɛsɩndaa nɛ pana mɩ-camɩyɛ lakasɩ nɛ pasa mɩ-Caa weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ.».

eng: But he ordered them not to spread the word about him.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛka pa-ñʋŋ taa se pataaheyi nɔɔyʋ mbʋ́ ɛlaba yɔ nɛ.

eng: Everyone ate until they were full, and they filled twelve baskets with the leftovers.
local: nɛ pɔtɔɔ pahaɣ. Ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa kpeɣli hɔɔlasɩ nzɩ́ sɩkazaa yɔ lɛ, pusu ɖɔkɩŋ hiu nɛ naalɛ.

eng: saying, Lord, show mercy to my son. He is epileptic and suffers terribly, for he often falls into the fire or the water.
local: nɛ etendi-i se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ! Na man-pɩyalʋ pʋtɔdɩyɛ. Abom kpa-ɩ nɛ pɩcɛyɩɣ-ɩ alɩwaatʋ tɩŋa. Ɛɛlaɣzɩɣ tɔlʋʋ lɩm nɛ miŋ pa-taa.

eng: You arent doing the talking, but the Spirit of my Father is doing the talking through you.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩtɛkɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ pɩlɩɣna, ɛlɛ́, mɩ-Caa Ɛsɔ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ɖʋʋnɩ-tʋ mɩ-taa.».

eng: They cried out, What are you going to do with us, Son of God? Have you come to torture us before the time of judgment.
local: Pakatɩ-ɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pamakɩ kubusi se: «Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ! Đa nɛ ŋ se we? Ŋkɔm se ŋɖʋ-ɖʋ kʋñɔŋ nɛ pʋcɔ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋwa se ɛhʋʋnɩ-ɖʋ yɔ tɩtalɩ yaa we?».

eng: These contaminate a person in Gods sight. But eating without washing hands doesnt contaminate in Gods sight. .
local: Ɩnaɣ, ḿbʋ́ pisiɣni ɛyʋ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa. Ɛlɛ́, yee ɛyʋ ɛtasaŋ e-nesi ɛzɩ paɖʋʋ sɔnzɩ taa yɔ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛtɔɔ tɔɔnaɣ yɔ, piipisiɣ-i.».

eng: Happy are your eyes because they see. Happy are your ears because they hear.
local: Mɩ mɔn-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa lɛ, ihiɣ mɩ-tɩ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩnaɣnɩ mɩ-ɛsɛ nɛ ɩnɩɣnɩ mɩ-nɩŋgbaaŋ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ tɔm tɔbʋʋ.

eng: Look at the birds in the sky. They dont sow seed or harvest grain or gather crops into barns. Yet your heavenly Father feeds them. Arent you worth much more than they are?.
local: Ɩcɔnɩ sumasɩ ɛsɔdaa nɛ ɩna: siiɖuu, sɩɩkʋŋ. Sɩfɛyɩnɩ kpoŋ. Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, mɩ-Caa weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ, ɛcalɩɣ-sɩ. Mɩ mɩtakɩlɩ-sɩ wazaɣ tam sakɩyɛ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa yaa we?.

eng: For John came neither eating nor drinking, and they say, He has a demon.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Yohanɛɛsɩ kɔma, ɛɛtɔkɩ tɔɔnaɣ, ɛɛñɔʋ sʋlʋm. Ɛlɛ́, ɩtɔŋ se ekem aleewaa.

eng: In the same way, every good tree produces good fruit, and every rotten tree produces bad fruit.
local: Tɩʋ kɩbaŋgʋ lʋlʋʋ pee kɩbana nɛ tɩʋ kɩdɛkɛdʋʋ ñalʋlɩ pee kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ.

eng: Dont even begin to think that I have come to do away with the Law and the Prophets. I havent come to do away with them but to fulfill them.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ɩtaamaɣzɩ se mɔnkɔm se menɖezi Mooyiizi paɣtʋ nɛ tɔm ndʋ́ náyaa wɩlaa yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, mɔnkɔm se tɔm ndʋ́ pɔyɔɔdaa yɔ tɩla.

eng: so that what was spoken through Isaiah the prophet might be fulfilled:.
local: pɩla ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ yɔɔdʋʋ nɛ náyʋ Ezaayii ma ɛ-takayaɣ taa yɔ. Ɛmawa se:.

eng: About five thousand men plus women and children had eaten.
local: Mbá pɔtɔɔ tɔɔnaɣ ŋ́gá yɔ, pa-taa abalaa ɖeke kɛkpɛndɩ ɛzɩ kutokiŋ kagbaanzɩ yɔ. Patakalɩnɩ halaa nɛ piya.

eng: I brought him to your disciples, but they couldnt heal him.
local: Mowoni-i ñɔ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa cɔlɔ nɛ patapɩzɩ pala nɛ ɛ-yɔɔ cɛ.».

eng: Brothers and sisters will hand each other over to be executed. A father will turn his child in. Children will defy their parents and have them executed.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ lɛ, ɛyáa kʋyʋʋ nɛ pawɩlɩ pa-ɖalaa yaa pe-newaa maɣmaɣ se pakʋ-wɛ. Caanaa ñalakɩ pe-piya ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ. Piya ńzɩ́, sɩsɩ kʋyɩ sɩ-ñɩma yɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ nɛ sɩla nɛ pakʋ-wɛ.

eng: Far off in the distance a large herd of pigs was feeding.
local: Afanaa tikaɣ sɔsɔɔ nakɛyɛ kɛwɛ peeɖe alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ nɛ kacazɩɣ tɔɔnaɣ. Kaaposini-wɛ pazɩ.

eng: From there, Jesus went to the regions of Tyre and Sidon.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu wolo ɛjaɖɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩñɔtɩnɩ Tiiri nɛ Sidɔɔ yɔ ɖɩ-taa.

eng: I assure you that many prophets and righteous people wanted to see what you see and hear what you hear, but they didnt.
local: Toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se náyaa sakɩyɛ nɛ ɛyáa kʋtʋʋzaa sakɩyɛ pañɩnaa se pana mbʋ́ ɩnaɣ yɔ, ɛlɛ́, patana-pʋ. Pañɩnaa ɖɔɖɔ se panɩɩ ndʋ́ ɩnɩwa yɔ, ɛlɛ́, patanɩɩ-tʋ.».

eng: Who among you by worrying can add a single moment to your life?.
local: Mɩ-taa weyi ɛyɔkʋʋ ɛ-ñʋʋ nɛ ɛpɩzɩ etuzi ɛ-sɩm kɩyakʋ?.

eng: Yet the Human One came eating and drinking, and they say, Look, a glutton and a drunk, a friend of tax collectors and sinners. But wisdom is proved to be right by her works. .
local: Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ ñɔkɔma nɛ ɛtɔkɩ nɛ ɛñɔʋ lɛ, ɩɖaɣnɩɣ yɔɔdʋʋ se: ‹Ɩnaɣʋ ɛyʋ ɛnɛ yɔ, tɔkɩyɛ nɛ ñɔtʋ pɔ-yɔɔ ɖeke ɛmaɣzɩɣ. Ɛkɛ ɖɔɖɔ tikee mʋyaa nɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖaa lɛlaa pa-taabalʋ.› Ɛlɛ́, pasɩŋ Ɛsɔ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ nɛ ɛ-lakasɩ kɩbanzɩ.».

eng: A good tree cant produce bad fruit. And a rotten tree cant produce good fruit.
local: Tɩʋ kɩbaŋgʋ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ kʋlʋlɩ pee kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ nɛ tɩʋ kɩdɛkɛdʋʋ ñaapɩzɩɣ kʋlʋlɩ pee kɩbana.

eng: I say to you very seriously that as long as heaven and earth exist, neither the smallest letter nor even the smallest stroke of a pen will be erased from the Law until everything there becomes a reality.
local: Toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛsɔdaa nɛ tɛtʋ pɛwɛɣ yɔ, mayaɣ nakɛyɛ yaa cacayaɣ nakɛyɛ fɛyɩ se kalɩɣ paɣtʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-taa nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩlaba yɔ.

eng: Look, my Servant whom I chose, the one I love, in whom I find great pleasure . Ill put my Spirit upon him, and hell announce judgment to the Gentiles.
local: «Ɩna man-tʋmlaɖʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ. Ɛnʋ malɩzaa. Maahʋʋ ɛ-yɔɔ kaʋ. Mɔnkɔŋ-ɩ haʋ men-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu nɛ esusi ajɛya lɛɛna taa ɛyáa ɛzɩma mbʋ́ mɔnkɔŋ-wɛ labʋ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ.

eng: Right then, Jesus made the disciples get into the boat and go ahead to the other side of the lake while he dismissed the crowds.
local: Pɛtɛm tɔɔʋ lɛ, Yesu heyi ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se: «Ɩsʋʋ kpɩyʋʋ taa nɛ ɩɖɛ-m nɔɔ nɛ ɩtɛzɩ kidiiliŋ lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ nɛ meheyi ɛyáa samaɣ se kekpe nɛ mɔnkɔɔ.».

eng: Jesus answered, You faithless and crooked generation, how long will I be with you? How long will I put up with you? Bring the boy here to me. .
local: Peeɖe Yesu pɩsɩnɩ-wɛ se: «Ɛyáa azaɣ́a lidaʋ fɛyɩ tɩnaa mɩ! Alɩwaatʋ ɛzɩma mantasɩɣ mɩ-cɔlɔ caɣʋ nɛ pʋwɛɛ se mɔnɖɔkɩ mɔ-hɔyɛ ɖɔɖɔ? Ɩkɔnɩ-m pɩɣa ŋ́gá cɩnɛ!».

eng: Everyone will hate you on account of my name. But whoever stands firm until the end will be saved.
local: «Ɛyáa tɩŋa kɔŋ-mɩ paɖʋʋ mɔ-yɔɔ. Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛɖɔkʋʋ ɛ-tɩ camɩyɛ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩtalɩ kɛtɛzaɣ kɩyakʋ wiye yɔ, Ɛsɔ yakɩ ɛ-ñʋʋ.

eng: The demons pleaded with him, If you throw us out, send us into the herd of pigs.
local: Peeɖe aleewaa ḿbá petendi-i se: «Yee ŋɖɔɔnʋʋ-ɖʋ ɛyáa panɛ pa-wayɩ lɛ, ŋha-ɖʋ nʋmɔʋ nɛ ɖiwolo ɖɩsʋʋ afanaa tikaɣ ŋ́gá yɔ ka-taa.».

eng: A Canaanite woman from those territories came out and shouted, Show me mercy, Son of David. My daughter is suffering terribly from demon possession.
local: Kanaanɩ tɛtʋ taa halʋ nɔɔyʋ kɛwɛ peeɖe. Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, ewolo Yesu cɔlɔ nɛ ɛmakɩ kubusi se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ, Daaviidi Sayɩ! Na man-pʋtɔdɩyɛ nɛ ŋɖɔɔnɩ eleeu weyi ɛwɛ mɛn-pɛlɛ wayɩ nɛ ɛpɩsɩɣ-ɩ kpɛndɛlɩsɩ pɩŋŋ yɔ!».

eng: Consider then the parable of the farmer.
local: Peeɖe Yesu heyi-wɛ se: «Ɩɩnaɣ ɖomaɣ eduuye ńɖɩ́ ɖɩ-tɔbʋʋ:.

eng: And why do you worry about clothes? Notice how the lilies in the field grow. They dont wear themselves out with work, and they dont spin cloth.
local: Nɛ pɩla ɛzɩma ɩyɔkʋʋ mɩ-ñʋŋ wondu yɔɔ yɔ? Ɩcɔnɩ tɛyɛ ñɩtʋ lɩzɩɣ hɛtʋ ndʋ́ yɔ nɛ ɩna. Ñɩtʋ ńdʋ́ tɩɩlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ, tɩɩlʋʋ wondu.

eng: Then he began to scold the cities where he had done his greatest miracles because they didnt change their hearts and lives.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu pazɩ kalʋʋ tɛtʋ ndɩ ndɩ ndʋ́ tɩ-taa ɛɛkɩlɩ labʋ hama lakasɩ yɔ tɩ-taa ñɩma. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɛtɛlɛɣzɩ wɛtʋ, ɛkalɩ-wɛ se:.

eng: Every tree that doesnt produce good fruit is chopped down and thrown into the fire.
local: Tɩʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩɩlʋlʋʋ pee kɩbana yɔ, pɛsɛtɩɣ-kʋ nɛ paɖʋ-kʋ miŋ taa.

eng: Therefore, whoever ignores one of the least of these commands and teaches others to do the same will be called the lowest in the kingdom of heaven. But whoever keeps these commands and teaches people to keep them will be called great in the kingdom of heaven.
local: Weyi eyeki paɣtʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-taa ndʋ́ tɩwɛ kpaagbaa ñɩɩɩ yɔ se tɩfɛyɩ wazaɣ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ lɛlaa se pataaɖɔ tɩ-yɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ yɔ, ɛkɔŋ kɛʋ tɔyaɣ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa. Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛɖɔŋ tɩtɩŋa payɩ tɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛwɩlɩɣ-tʋ lɛlaa ɖɔɖɔ yɔ, pʋdʋ kɔŋ kɛʋ sɔsɔ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa.

eng: He wont argue or shout, and nobody will hear his voice in the streets.
local: Ɛ nɛ nɔɔyʋ paahɔŋnɩ ɖama tɔm, eeholuu ɖɔɖɔ. Paanɩɣ ɛ-taŋ habɛɛ yɔɔ.

eng: When he sent them away, he went up onto a mountain by himself to pray. Evening came and he was alone.
local: Ɛyáa kpem patɩŋa lɛ, ɛkʋyɩ ɛkpa pʋʋ yɔɔ se ɛsɛɣ Ɛsɔ. Ɛɛwɛɛ peeɖe ḿbʋ́ e-ɖeke nɛ ɖoó yu-i.

eng: Then Jesus spoke harshly to the demon. And it came out of the child, who was healed from that time on.
local: Powoni-kɛ lɛ, ɛna se eleeu nɔɔyʋ wɛ ka-wayɩ. Peeɖe eholini ɛ́lɛ́ nɛ ese ka-wayɩ nɛ kɔ-yɔɔ tɩcɛbʋ.

eng: Whenever they harass you in one city, escape to the next, because I assure that you will not go through all the cities of Israel before the Human One comes.
local: Yee pɛwɛ mɩ-wayɩ kaŋ kaŋ tɛtʋ natʋyʋ taa lɛ, ise nɛ iwolo lɛɛtʋ taa. Toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se ɩɩtɛŋ cɔʋ Izrɛɛlɩ tɛtʋ tɩŋa payɩ nɛ pʋcɔ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ kɔɔ.

eng: Then he said to the demons, Go away, and they came out and went into the pigs. The whole herd rushed down the cliff into the lake and drowned.
local: Ɛlɛ́, eheyi-wɛ se: «Ise ɩɖɛɛ!» Peeɖe pesewa nɛ powolo pasʋʋ afanaa ḿbá pa-taa nɛ paba kpaɣ seya nɛ pʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ pɛkpɛndɩnɩ-wɛ petii pafalɩ teŋgu taa nɛ pɔñɔɔ lɩm nɛ pasɩ patɩŋa payɩ.

eng: But he didnt respond to her at all. His disciples came and urged him, Send her away; she keeps shouting out after us.
local: Yesu tatɩɩcosuu-i. Peeɖe ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa woba ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ petendi-i se: «Nɩɩnɩ halʋ ɛnʋ nɛ ɛɖɛɛ. Ɛwɛɛ ɛtɩŋɩɣ ɖa-wayɩ nɛ ɛmakɩ kubusi.».

eng: Whenever people hear the word about the kingdom and dont understand it, the evil one comes and carries off what was planted in their hearts. This is the seed that was sown on the path.
local: mbá panɩɣ pɔyɔɔdʋʋ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ tɔm yem nɛ paanɩɣ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ yɔ, pɛwɛ ɛzɩ nʋmɔʋ nɔɔ ɖenɖe pee tɔlaa yɔ. Satanɩ kɔŋ ɛhɔɔzɩ-tʋ pa-taa.

eng: But I say to you that even Solomon in all of his splendor wasnt dressed like one of these.
local: Ɛlɛ́, meheyiɣ-mɩ se halɩ wiyaʋ sɔsɔ Salomɔɔ nɛ ɛ-ñɩm tɩŋa yɔ, ɛtaawɛnɩ wonuu nakʋyʋ nɛ kɩtalɩ hɛtʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-taa nakʋyʋ ɖeu.

eng: How terrible it will be for you, Chorazin! How terrible it will be for you, Bethsaida! For if the miracles done among you had been done in Tyre and Sidon, they would have changed their hearts and lives and put on funeral clothes and ashes a long time ago.
local: «Koraazɛɛ nɛ Bɛtsayɩda ñɩma mɩ! Pʋtɔɔ-mɩ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, palabɩ Ɛsɔ hama lakasɩ nzɩ́ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ, yee paalabɩ-sɩ Tiiri nɛ Sidɔɔ ñɩma pɔ-cɔlɔ yɔ, paatɛm caɣʋ tɔlɩma taa nɛ posuu kutokiŋ nɛ pɩwɩlɩ se pɛlɛɣzɩ wɛtʋ.

eng: Therefore, you will know them by their fruit.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ ɩkɔŋ sɩm mbá pɛcɛtɩɣ se pɛkɛ náyaa yɔ nɛ pa-lakasɩ.».

eng: I say to you that unless your righteousness is greater than the righteousness of the legal experts and the Pharisees, you will never enter the kingdom of heaven.
local: Mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se yee ɩtala mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa nɛ Farɩsɩ ñɩma yɔ, ɩɩsʋʋ e-Kewiyaɣ taa wiɖiyi kaʋ.».

eng: He wont break a bent stalk, and he wont snuff out a smoldering wick, until he makes justice win.
local: Ɛɛtɛzɩɣ pɛlʋʋ ñɩyʋʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩpɛlaa nɛ kɩcaɣ yɔ. Ɛɛtɛzɩɣ ɖezuu kanɖʋ ŋgʋ́ kʋɖɔŋ ɖem yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ ɛwɛɣ labʋ yɔɔ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ pɩwabɩ pɩtɩŋa.

eng: Meanwhile, the boat, fighting a strong headwind, was being battered by the waves and was already far away from land.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-taa lɛ, kpɩyʋʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩtɛm talʋʋ poliŋ nɛ lɩm cɔzʋʋ-kʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, heɣlim makaɣ tuluŋa.

eng: Disciples arent greater than their teacher, and slaves arent greater than their master.
local: «Tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyʋ nɔɔyʋ ɛɛkɩlɩɣ ɛ-wɩlɩyʋ, ɖɔɖɔ lɛ tʋmlaɖʋ nɔɔyʋ ñaakɩlɩɣ ɛ́lɛ́ caa.

eng: Then the disciples came to Jesus in private and said, Why couldnt we throw the demon out.
local: Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa wolo ɛ-cɔlɔ pe-ɖeke nɛ pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ ɖɩtapɩzɩ ɖɩɖɔɔnɩ eleeu ɛnʋ pɩɣa ŋ́gá ka-wayɩ?».

eng: Those who tended the pigs ran into the city and told everything that had happened to the demon-possessed men.
local: Mbá pɔcɔŋaɣnɩ afanaa ḿbá pɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, paba se nɛ powolo tɛtʋ taa nɛ pɛkɛdɩ ɛyáa mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩlaba yɔ.

eng: Jesus replied, Ive been sent only to the lost sheep, the people of Israel. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu cosi-wɛ se: «Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma mbá pɛwɛ ɛzɩ heŋ kilebiŋ weyi ɩfɛyɩnɩ ninɖiɣyu yɔ, pɔ-cɔlɔ petiyi-m.».

eng: As for the seed that was spread on rocky ground, this refers to people who hear the word and immediately receive it joyfully.
local: Lɛlaa ñɛwɛ ɛzɩ ɛwaɣ yɔɔ ɖenɖe pee tɔlaa yɔ. Paba nɩ Ɛsɔtɔm lɛ, petisi-tʋ kpaagbaa nɛ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ.

eng: If God dresses grass in the field so beautifully, even though its alive today and tomorrow its thrown into the furnace, wont God do much more for you, you people of weak faith?.
local: Lidaʋ pazɩ tɩnaa mɩ! Ɛsɔ tekizi haʋ ñɩtʋ ndʋ́ tɩwɛ hayɩm taa sɔnɔ nɛ cee pɔkɔŋ-tʋ ɖʋʋ miŋ taa yɔ ɖeu nɛ pɩcandɩnɩ mɩ na?.

eng: But I say to you that Tyre and Sidon will be better off on Judgment Day than you.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se Tiiri nɛ Sidɔɔ pɛ-tɛtʋ taa ñɩma kʋñɔŋ ɛɛtalɩɣ mɩ-ñɩŋgʋ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ hʋʋnɩ ɛyáa yɔ.

eng: Not everybody who says to me, Lord, Lord, will get into the kingdom of heaven. Only those who do the will of my Father who is in heaven will enter.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Mbá payaɣ-m se: ‹Kɩpaɣlʋ! Kɩpaɣlʋ!› yɔ, pɩtɛkɛ patɩŋa pɔkɔŋnɩ sʋʋ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa. Ɛlɛ́, mbá palakɩ mbʋ́ man-Caa weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ e-liu wɛɛ yɔ, pe-ɖeke pasʋʋnɩ ka-taa.

eng: You have heard that it was said to those who lived long ago, Dont commit murder, and all who commit murder will be in danger of judgment.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ɩnɩwa se paaheyi ɖɔ-cɔzɔnaa se: ‹Taakʋ ɛyʋ. Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛkʋ ɛyʋ yɔ, payaɣ-ɩ wiyaʋ tɛ.›.

eng: And the Gentiles will put their hope in his name.
local: nɛ ajɛya kpeekpe taa ɛyáa taa-ɩ liu yɔ.».

eng: Very early in the morning he came to his disciples, walking on the lake.
local: Pʋkɔma ɛzɩ kalɩmaŋ kou yɔ lɛ, Yesu kʋyɩ se ewoki ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa cɔlɔ, ɛlɛ́, lɩm yɔɔ ɛɖɔŋaɣ.

eng: Its enough for disciples to be like their teacher and slaves like their master. If they have called the head of the house Beelzebul, its certain that they will call the members of his household by even worse names.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyʋ ɛñɩtaa ɛtalɩ ɛ-wɩlɩyʋ nɛ tʋmlaɖʋ ñatalɩ ɛ́lɛ́ caa yɔ, pɩmaɣaɣ. Petekizi weyi ma mɛnkɛ mɩ-caa yɔ yaʋ se Belzeebuuli nɛ pɩcandɩnɩ mbá mɩ ɩkɛ men-piya yɔ?».

eng: Because you have little faith, he said. I assure you that if you have faith the size of a mustard seed, you could say to this mountain, Go from here to there, and it will go. There will be nothing that you cant do. .
local: Yesu cosi-wɛ se: «Mi-lidaʋ tatalɩ pʋyʋ yɔɔ ɩtapɩzɩ. Toovenim lɛ, mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se: yee ɩɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛzɩ piye nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɩlɩ kɔzʋʋ yɔ yɔ, ɩpɩzaɣ se iheyi pʋʋ kʋnɛ se: ‹Kpɛzɩ cɩnɛ nɛ ŋwolo ŋsɩŋ peeɖe yɔ!› Nɛ kɩla ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ. Halɩ nabʋyʋ fɛyɩ se ɩɩpɩzɩɣ ɩlabɩ-pʋ. .

eng: Then the whole city came out and met Jesus. When they saw him, they pleaded with him to leave their region.
local: Peeɖe tɛtʋ taa ɛyáa kpɛzaa nɛ powolo Yesu cɔlɔ nɛ petendiɣ-i se ɛkʋyɩ pɛ-ɛjaɖɛ taa nɛ ɛɖɛɛ.

eng: But she knelt before him and said, Lord, help me.
local: Ɛlɛ́, halʋ ɛnʋ ewolo eluŋ ɛ-tɛɛ nɛ etendi-i se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ! Sɩnɩ-m!».

eng: Because they have no roots, they last for only a little while. When they experience distress or abuse because of the word, they immediately fall away.
local: Ɛlɛ́, paayeki se tɩlabɩ-wɛ tʋmɩyɛ camɩyɛ. Pɔɖɔkʋʋ-tʋ nɛ kʋñɔŋ nakʋyʋ talɩ-wɛ yaa pɛwɛɛ pa-wayɩ kaŋ kaŋ tɩ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɔtɔlɩ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa.

eng: Therefore, dont worry and say, What are we going to eat? or What are we going to drink? or What are we going to wear.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtaayɔkɩ mɩ-ñʋŋ mbʋ́ ɩɩtɔɔ nɛ ɩñɔɔ nɛ isuu yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: And you, Capernaum, will you be honored by being raised up to heaven? No, you will be thrown down to the place of the dead. After all, if the miracles that were done among you had been done in Sodom, it would still be here today.
local: Mɩ Kapɛrnayum ñɩma lɛ, ɩmaɣzɩɣ se ɩkpaɣ ɛsɔdaa yaa we? Meheyiɣ-mɩ se ɩɩkpaɣ kaʋ. Ɛlɛ́, itiki tɛtɛɛ ɖenɖe kʋñɔŋ maatɛŋ wɛɛ yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, yee Ɛsɔ hama lakasɩ nzɩ́ palabɩ mɩ-tɛ yɔ, paalabɩ-sɩ Sodom yɔ, tɛtʋ ńdʋ́ tɩɩwɛ halɩ nɛ sɔnɔ.

eng: On the Judgment Day, many people will say to me, Lord, Lord, didnt we prophesy in your name and expel demons in your name and do lots of miracles in your name.
local: Kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ hʋʋnɩ ɛyáa yɔ, ɛyáa sakɩyɛ kɔŋ-m pɔzʋʋ se: ‹Kɩpaɣlʋ! Kɩpaɣlʋ! Pɩtɛkɛ ɖa lɛ náyaa mbá posusi tɔm nɛ ñɔ-nɔɔ nɛ pɔɖɔɔnɩ aleewaa nɛ pala hama lakasɩ sakɩyɛ yɔ yaa we?›.

eng: But I say to you that everyone who is angry with their brother or sister will be in danger of judgment. If they say to their brother or sister, You idiot, they will be in danger of being condemned by the governing council. And if they say, You fool, they will be in danger of fiery hell.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ma meheyiɣ-mɩ se weyi ɛ-pana kpaɣnɩ lɛlʋ yɔ, pahʋʋnɩ-ɩ. Weyi ɛtʋʋ lɛlʋ se: ‹Kɩmɛlɛŋ ña!› Yɔ, powokini-i tɔm hʋyaa sɔsaa cɔlɔ. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ tʋʋ lɛlʋ se: ‹Kpanzɩyʋ ña!› Yɔ, pɔkɔŋ-ɩ ɖʋʋ ɖenɖe kʋñɔŋ maatɛŋ wɛɛ yɔ.

eng: They brought to Jesus a demon-possessed man who was blind and unable to speak. Jesus healed him so that he could both speak and see.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, powoni abalʋ nɔɔyʋ Yesu cɔlɔ se ɛla nɛ ɛ-yɔɔ cɛ. Abalʋ ɛnʋ, ekem aleewaa nɛ pɔyɔkɩ ɛ-ɛsɛ nɛ papɩsɩ-ɩ kaayɔɔdaɣ. Ɛlɛ́, Yesu la nɛ ɛ-yɔɔ cɛ nɛ ɛnaɣ nɛ ɛyɔɔdʋʋ.

eng: When the disciples saw him walking on the lake, they were terrified and said, Its a ghost! They were so frightened they screamed.
local: Pana-ɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɩɖɩɣzɩ-wɛ yem ɖɩɣ ɖɩɣ nɛ peheyiɣ ɖama se ñazɩñazʋʋ nakʋyʋ! Peeɖe sɔɔndʋ kpa-wɛ siŋŋ nɛ pamakɩ kubusi.

eng: Therefore, dont be afraid of those people because nothing is hidden that wont be revealed, and nothing secret that wont be brought out into the open.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, sɔɔndʋ ɛɛtaakpa-mɩ nɛ ɛyáa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ yɔ, pɔkɔŋ pʋ-yɔɔ kuluu nɛ paa weyi ɛna.

eng: When the disciples came together in Galilee, Jesus said to them, The Human One is about to be delivered over into human hands.
local: Nakʋyʋ wiye Yesu tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa kpeɣli patɩŋa Galilee egeetiye taa. Peeɖe eheyi-wɛ se: «Pɔkɔŋ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ kpaʋ nɛ paɖʋzɩ ɛyáa nesi taa.

eng: He replied, It is not good to take the childrens bread and toss it to dogs. .
local: Peeɖe ecosi-i se: «Pɩfɛyɩ ɖeu se pakpaɣ piya tɔɔnaɣ nɛ pɛpɛɖɩ hasɩ.».

eng: But I say to you that it will be better for the land of Sodom on the Judgment Day than it will be for you. .
local: Ḿbʋ́ mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ hʋʋnɩ ɛyáa tɔm yɔ, Sodom ñɩma kʋñɔŋ ɛɛtalɩɣ mɩ-ñɩŋgʋ.».

eng: All the crowds were amazed and said, This man couldnt be the Son of David, could he.
local: Peeɖe pɩɖɩɣzɩ ɛyáa samaɣ tɩŋa nɛ pɔtɔŋ se: «Yaa ɛnʋ lɛ wiyaʋ sɔsɔ Daaviidi Sayɩ?».

eng: As for the seed that was spread among thorny plants, this refers to those who hear the word, but the worries of this life and the false appeal of wealth choke the word, and it bears no fruit.
local: Lɛlaa wɛ ɛzɩ kpaŋsɔɔ taa ɖenɖe pee tɔlaa yɔ. Pɛtɛŋ Ɛsɔtɔm nɩʋ lɛ, kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ lɩmaɣza wena akʋʋ ɛyáa yɔ nɛ ñɩm mbʋ́ pɩkɛdɩɣnɩ ɛyáa yɔ, pɩ-lɩmaɣza sʋʋ pa-taa nɛ paɖɩɣ-tʋ nʋmɔʋ nɛ paawɛɣnɩ kɛzɛɣa.

eng: Then Ill tell them, Ive never known you. Get away from me, you people who do wrong.
local: Ɛlɛ́, mɔnkɔŋ-wɛ cosuu kpayɩ se: ‹Mantasɩm-mɩ ɖoli kaʋ. Kɩdɛkɛdɩŋ mɩ! Ɩkʋyɩ mɔn-cɔlɔ cɩnɛ nɛ ɩɖɛɛ poliŋ.› ».

eng: Just then Jesus spoke to them, Be encouraged! Its me. Dont be afraid. .
local: Kpaagbaa ḿbʋ́ lɛ, eheyi-wɛ se: «Ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ kpam, sɔɔndʋ ɛtaakpa-mɩ, ma.».

eng: Therefore, if you bring your gift to the altar and there remember that your brother or sister has something against you.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, yee nɔɔyʋ ewobi Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa taa kɩlaŋ ɖɩlayɛ se ɛhaɣ Ɛsɔ haɖɛ nɛ ɛtɔzɩ se nɔɔyʋ taa wɛnɩ-ɩ yɔ.

eng: Gentiles long for all these things. Your heavenly Father knows that you need them.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mbá paañaŋ Ɛsɔ yɔ, palakɩnɩ ḿbʋ́ paa ɖooye. Ŋgʋ́, mɩ-Caa weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ, ɛsɩm mbʋ́ pɩtɛɖɩɣ-mɩ yɔ.

eng: What I say to you in the darkness, tell in the light; and what you hear whispered, announce from the rooftops.
local: Tɔm ndʋ́ meheyiɣ-mɩ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ yɔ, isusi-tʋ ɛyáa tɩŋa nɛ ndʋ́ mɛwɛɛtɩɣ-mɩ yɔ, isusi tʋtʋ paa le nɛ paa weyi ɛnɩɩ.

eng: They will kill him. But he will be raised on the third day. And they were heartbroken.
local: nɛ pakʋ-ɩ nɛ kɩyakɩŋ naadozo wiye lɛ, Ɛsɔ fezi-i nɛ sɩm taa.» Ɛyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa laŋa wɛɛkɩ pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ.

eng: She said, Yes, Lord. But even the dogs eat the crumbs that fall off their masters table.
local: Halʋ ɛnʋ ɛtɔ se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ! Pɩkɛ toovenim. Ɛlɛ́, yee hasɩ tʋ ɛtɔkɩ nɛ hɔɔlasɩ tɔlʋʋ tataa, sɩɩtɔzʋʋ yaa we?».

eng: At that time Jesus said, I praise you, Father, Lord of heaven and earth, because youve hidden these things from the wise and intelligent and have shown them to babies.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-taa Yesu tɔm se: «Man-Caa! Ɛsɔdaa nɛ tataa Kɩpaɣlʋ! Mansaŋ-ŋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ŋkuli tɔm ndʋ́ ŋmɛsɩ lɔŋsɩnɖaa nɛ lɛɣsɩnɖaa yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ nɛ piya ajamaa nɩɩ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ.

eng: When the Pharisees heard, they said, This man throws out demons only by the authority of Beelzebul, the ruler of the demons.
local: Farɩsɩ ñɩma nɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɔyɔɔdɩ se: «Abalʋ ɛnɛ, aleewaa caa Belzeebuuli hanɩ-ɩ ɖoŋ nɛ ɛɖɔɔnʋʋnɩ aleewaa.».

eng: As for what was planted on good soil, this refers to those who hear and understand, and bear fruit and produce—in one case a yield of one hundred to one, in another case a yield of sixty to one, and in another case a yield of thirty to one. .
local: Piyele lɛlaa ñɛwɛ ɛzɩ tɛtʋ kɩbandʋ ndʋ́ tɩ-taa pee tɔlaa yɔ. Pewelesiɣ Ɛsɔtɔm nɛ panɩɣ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ. Ḿbá wɛnɩ ɛzɩ tɩŋ weyi ɩlʋlɩ pee yɔ: lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ mɩnʋʋ nɛ lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ nɩɩnʋwa nɛ hiu nɛ lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ niidozo.».

eng: Everybody who hears these words of mine and puts them into practice is like a wise builder who built a house on bedrock.
local: Yesu tɛm-wɛ yɔɔdɩnaʋ lɛ, eheyi-wɛ se: «Weyi ewelesiɣ tɔm tʋnɛ tɩtɩŋa nɛ ɛɖɔŋ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɛwɛ ɛzɩ lɔŋsɩnɖʋ weyi ɛma ɛ-ɖɩɣa ɛwaɣ yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: Peter replied, Lord, if its you, order me to come to you on the water.
local: Peeɖe Pɩyɛ cosi-i se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ! Yee pɩkɛ ña toovenim yɔ, ŋyele nɛ mɔnɖɔ lɩm yɔɔ nɛ mankatɩ-ŋ.».

eng: leave your gift at the altar and go. First make things right with your brother or sister and then come back and offer your gift.
local: pʋwɛɛ se eyele haɖɛ ńɖɩ́ peeɖe nɛ ewolo pʋdʋ cɔlɔ nɛ ɛ nɛ ɩ pɔñɔɔzɩ tɔm ńdʋ́ nɛ pʋcɔ.

eng: Instead, desire first and foremost Gods kingdom and Gods righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well.
local: Ɩcalɩnɩ ñɩnʋʋ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ nɛ mbʋ́ e-liu wɛɛ yɔ nɛ ɛtɛzɩ-mɩ haʋ mbʋ́ pɩtɛɖɩɣ-mɩ yɔ pɩtɩŋa payɩ.

eng: Dont be afraid of those who kill the body but cant kill the soul. Instead, be afraid of the one who can destroy both body and soul in hell.
local: Ɩtaasɔɔndɩ mbá pakʋʋ tomnaɣ nɛ paapɩzɩɣ pakʋ kalɩzaɣ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɩsɔɔndɩ Ɛsɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛkʋ ɛyʋ nɛ ɛtɛ ɛɖʋ e-tomnaɣ nɛ ɛ-kalɩzaɣ ɖenɖe kʋñɔŋ maatɛŋ wɛɛ yɔ.

eng: When they came to Capernaum, the people who collected the half-shekel temple tax came to Peter and said, Doesnt your teacher pay the temple tax.
local: Yesu nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa patalɩ Kapɛrnayum lɛ, Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa taa lambuu mʋyaa wolo Pɩyɛ cɔlɔ nɛ pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Mɩ-caa hɛyɩɣ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa lambuu yaa ɛɛhɛyɩɣ?».

eng: Jesus answered, Woman, you have great faith. It will be just as you wish. And right then her daughter was healed.
local: Peeɖe Yesu cosi-i se: «Halʋ ña! Ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ mɔ-yɔɔ siŋŋ. Pɩla ɛzɩ ŋsɔɔlʋʋ yɔ.» Kpaagbaa ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛ-pɛlɛ yɔɔ cɛ.

eng: Indeed, Father, this brings you happiness.
local: Man-Caa! Ñɔsɔɔlɩna se pɩla ḿbʋ́ nɛ pɩla ɖɔɖɔ.».

eng: Because Jesus knew what they were thinking, he replied, Every kingdom involved in civil war becomes a wasteland. Every city or house torn apart by divisions will collapse.
local: Yesu na pa-lɩmaɣza ḿbʋ́ nɛ eheyi-wɛ se: «Yee kewiyaɣ nakɛyɛ ɛwɛɛ nɛ ka-taa ɛyáa eyouni ɖama yɔ, kaalaɣzɩɣ yɔkʋʋ. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, yee tɛtʋ natʋyʋ yaa hɔʋ nakʋyʋ taa ɛyáa eyouni ɖama yɔ, pamɩzɩɣ ɖama.

eng: Jesus told them another parable: The kingdom of heaven is like someone who planted good seed in his field.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ tuuu eduuye se: «Ɩna ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ wɛɛ yɔ: abalʋ nɔɔyʋ ɖuni ɖomaɣ kɩbaŋga ɛ-hayɩm taa.

eng: The rain fell, the floods came, and the wind blew and beat against that house. It didnt fall because it was firmly set on bedrock.
local: Tɛʋ nɩwa nɛ pɔsɩ su nɛ heɣlim ma ɖoŋ. Ɛlɛ́, pɩtalabɩ-kɛ pʋyʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pasɩ ke-kiɖe ɛwaɣ yɔɔ.

eng: And Jesus said, Come. Then Peter got out of the boat and was walking on the water toward Jesus.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu heyi-i se: «Kɔɔ!» Peeɖe Pɩyɛ lɩwa nɛ ɛɖɔŋ lɩm yɔɔ se ɛkatɩ-ɩ.

eng: Be sure to make friends quickly with your opponents while you are with them on the way to court. Otherwise, they will haul you before the judge, the judge will turn you over to the officer of the court, and you will be thrown into prison.
local: «Yee ŋyʋsɩnɩ nɔɔyʋ nɛ ewokini-ŋ tɔm hʋyʋ tɛ yɔ, yele nɛ ña nɛ ɩ ɩñɔɔzɩ-tʋ lɔŋ nʋmɔʋ taa nɛ ɛtaatanɩ-ŋ peeɖe. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɛ́lɛ́ cɛlɩɣ-ŋ sɔɔjanaa nɛ paba ɖʋ-ŋ salaka.

eng: Therefore, stop worrying about tomorrow, because tomorrow will worry about itself. Each day has enough trouble of its own.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtaayɔkɩ mɩ-ñʋŋ cee tɔm yɔɔ sɔnɔ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, paa kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ nɛ kʋ-tɔm.».

eng: Arent two sparrows sold for a small coin? But not one of them will fall to the ground without your Father knowing about it already.
local: Paapɛdɩɣ sumasɩ cɩʋcɩʋwaa naalɛ koba yaa we? Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, sɩ-taa nakɛyɛ ɛɛsɩkɩ yem nɛ pɩtalɩɩnɩ mɩ-Caa Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ.

eng: Yes, he said. But when they came into the house, Jesus spoke to Peter first. What do you think, Simon? From whom do earthly kings collect taxes, from their children or from strangers? .
local: Pɩyɛ cosi-wɛ se: «Ɛhɛyɩɣ.» Ɛpɩsɩ Yesu cɔlɔ ɖɩɣa lɛ, ɛ́lɛ́ lɛyɩ-ɩ pɔzʋʋ se: «Siimɔɔ! Ŋmaɣzɩɣ se we? Tɛtʋ ñɩma naa agɔmaa pʋwɛɛ se pɛhɛyɩ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ awiya sɔsɔna lambuu?».

eng: Jesus moved on from there along the shore of the Galilee Sea. He went up a mountain and sat down.
local: Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, Yesu kʋyɩ peeɖe nɛ ewolo Galilee teŋgu nɔɔ nɛ ɛkpa piyaɣ nakɛyɛ yɔɔ nɛ ɛcaɣ.

eng: My Father has handed all things over to me. No one knows the Son except the Father. And nobody knows the Father except the Son and anyone to whom the Son wants to reveal him.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu heyi ɛyáa se: «Pɩtɩŋa payɩ lɛ, man-Caa cɛlɩnɩ-m. Nɔɔyʋ tasɩ mbʋ́ mɛnkɛnaa yɔ nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ man-Caa. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, nɔɔyʋ tasɩm-ɩ nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ ma nɛ mbá mɔnsɔɔlaa nɛ mawɩlɩ-ɩ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: If Satan throws out Satan, he is at war with himself. How then can his kingdom endure?.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ yee Satanɩ ɛɖɔɔnʋʋ aleewaa yɔ, pʋbʋ ɛlakɩ you nɛ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ. E-kewiyaɣ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ katasɩ wɛʋ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: While people were sleeping, an enemy came and planted weeds among the wheat and went away.
local: Đoo naayɛ taa lɛ, e-koyindu wolo alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ ɖou yɔ nɛ eɖuu ñɩyʋʋ ɛzaɣ́ʋ tɔɔnaɣ taa nɛ ɛcaŋ ɛɖɛɛ.

eng: But everybody who hears these words of mine and doesnt put them into practice will be like a fool who built a house on sand.
local: Piyele weyi ɛ́lɛ́ welesiɣ tɔm tʋnɛ tɩtɩŋa nɛ ɛɛɖɔŋ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɛwɛ ɛzɩ kɩmɛlɛŋ ŋgʋ́ kɩma kɩ-ɖɩɣa kañɩŋa taa yem yɔ.

eng: But when Peter saw the strong wind, he became frightened. As he began to sink, he shouted, Lord, rescue me.
local: Ɛɖɔŋaɣ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛna se heɣlim sɔsɔm makɩ nɛ sɔɔndʋ kpa-ɩ nɛ pɩcaɣ se pʋsʋzɩ-ɩ lɩm tɛɛ. Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛmabɩ kubuka se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ! Ya ma-ñʋʋ!».

eng: I say to you in all seriousness that you wont get out of there until youve paid the very last penny.
local: Toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-ŋ se: paɖʋ-ŋ-kɛ yɔ, ŋwɛɣ peeɖe ḿbʋ́ ka ka nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ŋhɛyɩ ña-kɩmɩyɛ tɩŋa payɩ nɛ pɩtakazɩ paa koba yɔ.».

eng: Even the hairs of your head are all counted.
local: Halɩ mɩ-ñʋŋ taa ñɔsɩ wɛʋ yɔ, Ɛsɔ kalɩ sɩtɩŋa payɩ.

eng: Large crowds came to him, including those who were paralyzed, blind, injured, and unable to speak, and many others. They laid them at his feet, and he healed them.
local: Peeɖe ɛyáa samaɣ kpaɣ taladɩnaa nɛ yʋlʋmaa nɛ mbá pe-nesi camaa yɔ nɛ ndamaa kaayɔɔdasɩ nɛ kʋdɔndɩnaa lɛlaa sakɩyɛ nɛ powoni-wɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛla nɛ pɔ-yɔɔ cɛ.

eng: The rain fell, the floods came, and the wind blew and beat against that house. It fell and was completely destroyed. .
local: Tɛʋ nɩwa nɛ pɔsɩ su nɛ heɣlim sɔsɔm ma ɖoŋ nɛ kɔtɔlɩ nɛ kɔyɔkɩ katɩŋa naŋa naŋa.».

eng: And if I throw out demons by the authority of Beelzebul, then by whose authority do your followers throw them out? Therefore, they will be your judges.
local: Yee ma mɔnɖɔɔnʋʋ aleewaa nɛ Belzeebuuli ɖoŋ lɛ, anɩ ñaha mi-piya ɖoŋ nɛ sɩɖɔɔnʋʋnɩ-wɛ yɔ? Mi-piya ńzɩ́, sɩ-maɣmaɣ sɩkɔŋna wɩlʋʋ se mɩ-tɔm sɩba.

eng: From strangers, he said. Jesus said to him, Then the children dont have to pay.
local: Pɩyɛ cosi-i se: «Agɔmaa.» Peeɖe Yesu tɔm se: «Yee ḿbʋ́, pʋtɔpɔzɩ se tɛtʋ ñɩma ɛhɛyɩ-kʋ.

eng: When the stalks sprouted and bore grain, then the weeds also appeared.
local: Tɔɔnaɣ ñɔ nɛ kakpa camɩyɛ fɛlɛ fɛlɛ nɛ katʋlɩ. Ɛlɛ́, pana ñɩyʋʋ ɛzaɣ́ʋ ŋ́gʋ́, kʋñɔwa nɛ kɩkpa ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Jesus immediately reached out and grabbed him, saying, You man of weak faith! Why did you begin to have doubts? .
local: Peeɖe Yesu tisezaa ɛkpa e-nesi taa nɛ ɛpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Lidaʋ ñɩɩɩ tʋ ña! Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ ŋpʋtʋʋ ña-taa ḿbʋ́?».

eng: You have heard that it was said, Dont commit adultery.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ɩnɩwa ɖɔɖɔ se peheyi ɖɔ-cɔzɔnaa se: ‹Taala acɛyɛ.›.

eng: Come to me, all you who are struggling hard and carrying heavy loads, and I will give you rest.
local: «Mbá mɩ mɩtɩŋa payɩ pasʋʋ-mɩ sʋʋtʋ nɛ pɩnɩɩ-mɩ yɔ, ɩkɔɔ mɔn-cɔlɔ nɛ mansʋʋ-mɩ nɛ ɩhɛzɩ.

eng: Dont be afraid. You are worth more than many sparrows.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtaasɔɔndɩ. Ɩkɩlɩ sumasɩ cɩʋcɩʋwaa sakɩyɛ wazaɣ.».

eng: So the crowd was amazed when they saw those who had been unable to speak talking, and the paralyzed cured, and the injured walking, and the blind seeing. And they praised the God of Israel.
local: Ɛyáa na ndamaa kaayɔɔdasɩ yɔɔdaɣ nɛ mbá pe-nesi camaa yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ cɛ nɛ taladɩnaa ɖɔŋ camɩyɛ nɛ yʋlʋmaa ñanaɣ lɛ, payɩɣyɩɣ-ɩ pɩŋŋ nɛ pasaŋ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma Ɛsɔ.

eng: When Jesus finished these words, the crowds were amazed at his teaching.
local: Yesu tɛm ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa sakɩyɛ yɔɔdɩnaʋ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɩlabɩ-wɛ piti pɩŋŋ nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛwɩlaɣ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: But if I throw out demons by the power of Gods Spirit, then Gods kingdom has already overtaken you.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ɖoŋ mɔnɖɔɔnʋʋnɩ aleewaa. Ḿbʋ́ wɩlɩɣna se Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ tɛm talʋʋ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa.

eng: But just so we dont offend them, go to the lake, throw out a fishing line and hook, and take the first fish you catch. When you open its mouth, you will find a shekel coin. Take it and pay the tax for both of us. .
local: Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɖɩtaakpazɩ pa-pana. Kpaɣ ño-kolaɣ nɛ ŋwolo teŋgu taa nɛ ŋlɔ-kɛ. Kpakpayaɣ ŋgá ŋcalɩɣ kpaʋ yɔ, haa kɔ-nɔɔ, ŋmakɩnɩ liidiye nɖɩ́ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ. Lɩzɩ-ɖɩ nɛ ŋkɔnɩ ŋhɛyɩ-wɛ ɖa-naalɛ ɖɔ-yɔɔ.».

eng: The servants of the landowner came and said to him, Master, didnt you plant good seed in your field? Then how is it that it has weeds.
local: Peeɖe hayɩm tʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-tʋmlaɖaa woba pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se: ‹Caa! Ŋɖu ɖomaɣ kɩbaŋga ña-hayɩm taa lɛ, le ñɩyʋʋ ɛzaɣ́ʋ lɩnaa?›.

eng: When they got into the boat, the wind settled down.
local: Peeɖe pakpa kpɩyʋʋ taa pa-naalɛ nɛ heɣlim yele mabʋ.

eng: But I say to you that every man who looks at a woman lustfully has already committed adultery in his heart.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ma meheyiɣ-mɩ se: yee abalʋ nɔɔyʋ ɛna lɛlʋ halʋ nɛ e-liu tɛɛ kɔtɩ yɔ, ɛtɛm labʋ acɛyɛ kpem ɛ-lɩmaɣza taa.

eng: Put on my yoke, and learn from me. Im gentle and humble. And you will find rest for yourselves.
local: Peeɖe ɩkpakɩɣ mbʋ́ mawɩlɩɣ-mɩ yɔ se pɩkɛ mɩ-sʋʋtʋ nɛ ɩhɛzɩnɩ-pʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mɛwɛ leleŋ, mɔn-tɔm fɛyɩ kaɖɛ.

eng: Therefore, everyone who acknowledges me before people, I also will acknowledge before my Father who is in heaven.
local: Đɔɖɔ lɛ, Yesu yɔɔdaa se: «Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛkaɖɩ ɛyáa taa se mantɩnɩ-ɩ yɔ, mankaɖɩɣ man-Caa weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ ɛ-ɛsɩndaa ɖɔɖɔ se mantɩnɩ-ɩ.

eng: Now Jesus called his disciples and said, I feel sorry for the crowd because they have been with me for three days and have nothing to eat. I dont want to send them away hungry for fear they wont have enough strength to travel. .
local: Yesu tɛm labʋ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛ́yáa ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa nɛ eheyi-wɛ se: «Ɛyáa panɛ, pɛwɛ-m pʋtɔdɩyɛ. Ɩcɔnɩ ɩna, kɩyakɩŋ naadozo yɔ pɛwɛ mɔn-cɔlɔ cɩnɛ. Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, pɛfɛyɩnɩ nabʋyʋ se pɔtɔɔ. Mɔntɔsɔɔlɩ se meheyi-wɛ se pekpe ñɔɔsɩ, pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, pɔtɔlʋʋ nʋmɔʋ taa.».

eng: because he was teaching them like someone with authority and not like their legal experts.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛtawɩlɩɣ-wɛ ɛzɩ pa-paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛwɩlaɣ-wɛ nɛ abalɩtʋ.

eng: Can people go into a house that belongs to a strong man and steal his possessions, unless they first tie up the strong man? Then they can rob his house.
local: «Nɔɔyʋ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ewolo ɖoŋ tʋ nɔɔyʋ tɛ nɛ ɛmɩlɩ ɛ-ñɩm alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛtakpa-ɩ nɛ ɛhɔkɩ-ɩ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, yee ɛkpa-ɩ nɛ ɛhɔkɩ-ɩ yɔ, ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛmɩlɩ ɛ-ɖɩɣa taa ñɩm tɩŋa payɩ.

eng: And if your right eye causes you to fall into sin, tear it out and throw it away. Its better that you lose a part of your body than that your whole body be thrown into hell.
local: Yee ñɛ-ɛsɩyɛ eyekina se ŋla kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, hɔɔzɩ-ɖɩ nɛ ŋlɔ poliŋ. Ɛyʋ hɔɔlʋʋ kʋɖʋmʋʋ lesuu kɩlɩ wee wee ɛzɩ ɛɛwɛɛ ɛtɩŋa pilim nɛ pɛpɛɖɩ-ɩ ɖenɖe kʋñɔŋ maatɛŋ wɛɛ yɔ.

eng: But everyone who denies me before people, I also will deny before my Father who is in heaven.
local: Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛkpɛzɩɣ ɛyáa ɛsɩndaa se pɩtɛkɛ mantɩnɩ-ɩ yɔ, mɛnkpɛzɩɣ man-Caa weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ ɛ-ɛsɩndaa ɖɔɖɔ se pɩtɛkɛ mantɩnɩ-ɩ.».

eng: An enemy has done this, he answered. The servants said to him, Do you want us to go and gather them.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ecosi-wɛ se: ‹Mon-koyindu nɔɔyʋ wobina nɛ ɛla ḿbʋ́.› Peeɖe ɛ-tʋmlaɖaa tasɩ-ɩ pɔzʋʋ se: ‹Ŋsɔɔlaa se ɖiwolo ɖɩkpɛzɩ-kʋ yaa we?›.

eng: Whoever isnt with me is against me, and whoever doesnt gather with me scatters.
local: «Weyi ɛɛtɩnɩɣ mɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɛkʋyʋʋ mɔ-yɔɔ. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ ɛɛsɩŋnɩ-m ɛyáa kpeɣluu yɔ, ɛmɩzɩɣ-wɛ.

eng: His disciples replied, Where are we going to get enough food in this wilderness to satisfy such a big crowd.
local: Peeɖe ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa pɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Le ɖɩlɩɣ tɔɔnaɣ yɔɔ ñɩtʋ taa cɩnɛ nɛ ɖɩcalɩ ɛyáa samaɣ kanɛ katɩŋa?».

eng: My yoke is easy to bear, and my burden is light. .
local: Sʋʋtʋ ndʋ́ mansʋkɩ-mɩ yɔ, tɩ-sɩɣlʋʋ fɛyɩ kaɖɛ, tɩfɛyɩ yuŋ.».

eng: Then those in the boat worshipped Jesus and said, You must be Gods Son.
local: nɛ Yesu tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa mbá paawɛ kɩ-taa yɔ, powolo poluŋ ɛ-tɛɛ nɛ pɔtɔŋ se: «Toovenim lɛ, ña lɛ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ!».

eng: And if your right hand causes you to fall into sin, chop it off and throw it away. Its better that you lose a part of your body than that your whole body go into hell.
local: Yee ñe-nesi kɩbanzɩ eyekina se ŋla kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, sɛtɩ-sɩ nɛ ŋlɔ poliŋ. Pɩkɩlɩ wee wee se ŋlesi ñe-nesi kʋɖʋmsɩ ɛzɩ ŋŋwɛɛ ñatɩŋa pilim nɛ pɛpɛɖɩ-ŋ ɖenɖe kʋñɔŋ maatɛŋ wɛɛ yɔ.».

eng: But the landowner said, No, because if you gather the weeds, youll pull up the wheat along with them.
local: Ecosi-wɛ se: ‹Aayɩ! Yee ɩkpɛzɩɣ ñɩyʋʋ ŋ́gʋ́ yɔ, pɩkpɛndɩɣnɩ tɔɔnaɣ.

eng: Dont think that Ive come to bring peace to the earth. I havent come to bring peace but a sword.
local: Ɛtasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ɩtaamaɣzɩ se laŋhɛzɩyɛ mɔnkɔnɩ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ. Ɛlɛ́, you mɔnkɔnaa.

eng: Jesus said, How much bread do you have? They responded, Seven loaves and a few fish.
local: Ekitini-wɛ se: «Tindine hɔɔlasɩ ɛzɩma wɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ?» Pocosi-i se: «Lʋbɛ nɛ kpakpasɩ cikpesi nasɩyɩ.».

eng: Therefore, I tell you that people will be forgiven for every sin and insult to God. But insulting the Holy Spirit wont be forgiven.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se paa ɛyáa ɛlabɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm mbʋ́ yaa pɛwɛɛkɩ Ɛsɔ hɩɖɛ ɛzɩma yɔ, Ɛsɔ pɩzɩɣ ekpeɣ-wɛ. Ɛlɛ́, yee ɛyʋ ɛwɛɛkɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu hɩɖɛ yɔ, Ɛsɔ eekpeɣiɣ-i kaʋ.

eng: When they had crossed the lake, they landed at Gennesaret.
local: Pɛtɛzɩ teŋgu nɛ patalɩ Jeneezaarɛɛtɩ ɛjaɖɛ taa lɛ.

eng: It was said, Whoever divorces his wife must give her a divorce certificate.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ɩnɩwa ɖɔɖɔ se peheyi ɖɔ-cɔzɔnaa se: ‹Weyi ɛɖɔɔnʋʋ ɛ-halʋ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se pʋdʋ ɛcɛlɩ-ɩ takayaɣ ŋgá kawɩlɩɣ se pɛfɛyɩ ɖama taa yɔ.›.

eng: Let both grow side by side until the harvest. And at harvesttime Ill say to the harvesters, First gather the weeds and tie them together in bundles to be burned. But bring the wheat into my barn. .
local: Iyele ḿbʋ́ nɛ tɔɔnaɣ ɛkɔm kapɩɩ lɛ, meheyi kʋnɖaa nɛ pacalɩ ñɩyʋʋ ɛzaɣ́ʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kpɛzʋʋ nɛ pekpeɣli nɛ pɔsɔbɩ-kʋ miŋ nɛ piyele pakʋ tɔɔnaɣ nɛ powoni-kɛ mɛn-tɛ nɛ posuu kpou taa.› ».

eng: He told the crowd to sit on the ground.
local: Ɛlɛ́, eheyi ɛyáa se pacaɣ tataa.

eng: And whoever speaks a word against the Human One will be forgiven. But whoever speaks against the Holy Spirit wont be forgiven, not in this age or in the age that is coming.
local: Weyi ɛyɔɔdʋʋ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ ma tɔm ɛzaɣ́tʋ yɔ, Ɛsɔ kpeɣiɣ-i. Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛyɔɔdʋʋ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu tɔm ɛzaɣ́tʋ yɔ, Ɛsɔ eekpeɣiɣ pʋdʋ sɔnɔ nɛ cee.».

eng: When the people who lived in that place recognized him, they sent word throughout that whole region, and they brought to him everyone who was sick.
local: ɖɩ-taa ñɩma sɩm-ɩ nɛ petiyi ɛyáa paa le nɛ peheyi se ewobi hɔɔlʋʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩ-taa. Peeɖe pakpaɣ kʋdɔndɩnaa tɩŋa nɛ powoni-wɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ.

eng: Ive come to turn a man against his father, a daughter against her mother, and a daughter-in-law against her mother-in-law .
local: Mɔnkɔm se moyozi caja nɛ ɛ-pɩyalʋ, nɛ pɛlɛ nɛ e-ɖoo, nɛ wolu nɛ ɛ-waŋ.

eng: But I say to you that whoever divorces his wife except for sexual unfaithfulness forces her to commit adultery. And whoever marries a divorced woman commits adultery.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ma meheyiɣ-mɩ se: yee nɔɔyʋ halʋ ɛtala acɛyɛ nɛ ɛɖɔɔnɩ-ɩ yɔ, ɛwɩlɩ-ɩ acɛyɛ nʋmɔʋ. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ kpakɩɣ-ɩ yɔ, ɛlabɩ acɛyɛ ɖɔɖɔ.».

eng: He told another parable to them: The kingdom of heaven is like a mustard seed that someone took and planted in his field.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ tuuu eduuye se: «Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ wɛ ɛzɩ piye nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɩlɩ kɔzʋʋ pee tɩŋa taa nɛ ɛyʋ kpaɣ-ɖɩ nɛ eɖuu ɛ-hayɩm taa yɔ.

eng: He took the seven loaves of bread and the fish. After he gave thanks, he broke them into pieces and gave them to the disciples, and the disciples gave them to the crowds.
local: Pacaɣaɣ lɛ, ɛkpaɣ tindine hɔɔlasɩ lʋbɛ ńzɩ́ nɛ kpakpasɩ cikpesi ńzɩ́ nɛ ɛsɛɛ Ɛsɔ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛcɩyɩ nɛ ɛcɛlɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa nɛ patayɩ-wɛ.

eng: Either consider the tree good and its fruit good, or consider the tree rotten and its fruit rotten. A tree is known by its fruit.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Yee tɩʋ ɛkɛ kɩbaŋgʋ yɔ, kʋlʋlʋʋ pee kɩbana. Yee kɩkɛ ɛzaɣ́ʋ yɔ, kʋlʋlʋʋ pee azaɣ́a: pasɩŋ paa tɩʋ ŋgʋ́ nɛ ki-pee.

eng: Then they begged him that they might just touch the edge of his clothes. Everyone who touched him was cured.
local: nɛ petendiɣ-i se eyele nɛ potukuni e-toko ndomiye maɣmaɣ. Mbá patɩŋa payɩ potukaɣnɩ-ɩ yɔ, pɔ-yɔɔ cɛkaɣ.

eng: Peoples enemies are members of their own households .
local: nɛ ɛyʋ hɔʋ taa ñɩma maɣmaɣ pɩsɩ e-koyindinaa.

eng: Again you have heard that it was said to those who lived long ago: Dont make a false solemn pledge, but you should follow through on what you have pledged to the Lord.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ɩnɩwa ɖɔɖɔ se peheyi ɖɔ-cɔzɔnaa se: ‹Taayele mbʋ́ ŋɖuwaa se ŋlakɩ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, la mbʋ́ ŋɖuuni Kɩpaɣlʋ se ŋlakɩ yɔ.›.

eng: Its the smallest of all seeds. But when its grown, its the largest of all vegetable plants. It becomes a tree so that the birds in the sky come and nest in its branches. .
local: Ńɖɩ́ kaakɩlɩnɩ kɔzʋʋ pee tɩŋa taa. Ɛlɛ́, ɖɩñɔwa lɛ, ɖɩpaɣlɩ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ tɩŋ tɩŋa nɛ ɖɩpɩɩ tɩʋ sɔsɔʋ nɛ sumasɩ woki sɩɖʋʋ sɩ-ɖandʋ kʋ-hɔtʋ taa.».

eng: Everyone ate until they were full. The disciples collected seven baskets full of leftovers.
local: Peeɖe patɩŋa payɩ pɔtɔwaa pahaɣ nɛ pɩkazɩ nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa kpeɣli hɔɔlasɩ nzɩ́ sɩkazaa yɔ nɛ pusu ɖɔkɩŋ lʋbɛ.

eng: Children of snakes! How can you speak good things while you are evil? What fills the heart comes out of the mouth.
local: Đʋmaa mɩ! Ɩtɛm kɛʋ ɛyáa azaɣ́a lɛ, ɛzɩma ɩpɩzɩɣ ɩyɔɔdɩ tɔm kɩbandʋ yɔ? Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, tɔm ndʋ́ tɩhaɣ ɛyʋ taa yɔ, ńdʋ́ lɩɣnɩ ɛ-nɔɔ taa.

eng: Those who love father or mother more than me arent worthy of me. Those who love son or daughter more than me arent worthy of me.
local: «Weyi ɛsɔɔlʋʋ e-ɖoo yaa ɛ-caa nɛ pɩkɩlɩ-m yɔ, ɛtamʋna se ɛkɛ mɔn-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyʋ. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ sɔɔlʋʋ ɛ-pɩyalʋ yaa ɛ-pɛlɛ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ-m yɔ, ɛtamʋna se ɛkɛ mɔn-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyʋ.

eng: He told them another parable: The kingdom of heaven is like yeast, which a woman took and hid in a bushel of wheat flour until the yeast had worked its way through all the dough. .
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ tuuu eduuye se: «Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ wɛ ɛzɩ sɔsɔɔna wena halʋ cozuu nɛ ɛɖʋ sona mʋlʋm kiiloonaa nɩɩlɛ nɛ kagbaanzɩ taa nɛ ehuudi nɛ pʋkɔɔ puhuu yɔ.».

eng: But I say to you that you must not pledge at all. You must not pledge by heaven, because its Gods throne.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ma meheyiɣ-mɩ se: ɩtaaɖuuni Ɛsɔ kpem: ɩtaaɖuuni ɛsɔdaa, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ŋ́gʋ́ lɛ Ɛsɔ kewiyaɣ kpelaɣ.

eng: Four thousand men ate, plus women and children.
local: Mbá pɔtɔɔ tɔɔnaɣ ŋ́gá yɔ, pa-taa abalaa ɖeke wɛ kutokiŋ naanza. Patakalɩnɩ halaa nɛ piya.

eng: Good people bring out good things from their good treasure. But evil people bring out evil things from their evil treasure.
local: Ɛyʋ kɩbanʋ yɔɔdʋʋ tɔm kɩbandʋ ndʋ́ tɩhaɣ ɛ-taa yɔ. Piyele ɛzaɣ́ʋ ñɔyɔɔdʋʋ tɔm ɛzaɣ́tʋ ndʋ́ tɩhaɣ ɛ́lɛ́ taa yɔ.

eng: Those who dont pick up their crosses and follow me arent worthy of me.
local: Weyi etetisi nɛ ɛtɔɔ kʋñɔŋ siŋŋ ɛzɩ ma yɔ yɔ, ɛtamʋna se ɛkɛ mɔn-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyʋ.

eng: Jesus said all these things to the crowds in parables, and he spoke to them only in parables.
local: Yesu heyaɣ ɛyáa samaɣ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩtɩŋa payɩ nɛ aduwa taa. Ɛtaayɔɔdʋʋnɩ-wɛ natʋyʋ yem nɛ pɩtɛkɛnɩ aduwa taa.

eng: You must not pledge by the earth, because its Gods footstool. You must not pledge by Jerusalem, because its the city of the great king.
local: Ɩtaaɖuuni ɖɔɖɔ tɛtʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ńdʋ́ lɛ kpeɖe nɖɩ́ Ɛsɔ tɩnɩɣ ɛ-naŋgbanzɩ ɖɩ-yɔɔ yɔ. Ɩtaaɖuuni ɖɔɖɔ Yeruusalɛm yem yem, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ŋ́gʋ́ lɛ Wiyaʋ sɔsɔ tɛtʋ.

eng: After dismissing the crowds, Jesus got into the boat and came to the region of Magadan.
local: Pɛtɛma lɛ, Yesu heyi-wɛ se pekpe. Ɛlɛ́, ɛkpa kpɩyʋʋ taa nɛ ewolo Magaadaɣ egeetiye taa.

eng: I tell you that people will have to answer on Judgment Day for every useless word they speak.
local: Mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ hʋʋnɩ ɛyáa yɔ, ɛyáa kɔŋ heyuu Ɛsɔ nɛ pa-maɣmaɣ pɔ-nɔsɩ mbʋ́ piyeba nɛ pɔyɔɔdɩ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩfɛyɩ wazaɣ yɔ.

eng: Those who find their lives will lose them, and those who lose their lives because of me will find them.
local: Weyi ɛñɩnɩɣ se ɛcaɣ wezuu tam yɔ, ɛtɛŋnɩ-kʋ lesuu. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ sɩkɩ mɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɛcakɩ wezuu tam.».

eng: This was to fulfill what the prophet spoke: Ill speak in parables; Ill declare what has been hidden since the beginning of the world.
local: Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩ náyʋ maʋ ɛ-takayaɣ taa se: «Mɔnkɔŋ-wɛ yɔɔdɩnaʋ nɛ aduwa taa nɛ monsusi-wɛ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩwɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ ɖooo ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ labʋ kedeŋa yɔ.».

eng: And you must not pledge by your head, because you cant turn one hair white or black.
local: Ɩtaaɖuuni mɩ-ñʋŋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, nɔɔyʋ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛla nɛ ɛ-ñɔyaɣ nakɛyɛ hʋlʋmɩ yaa kepiyi.

eng: By your words you will be either judged innocent or condemned as guilty. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ñɔ-tɔm Ɛsɔ cɔŋna nɛ eɖezi-ŋ yaa ɛkʋ-tʋ.».

eng: Jesus left the crowds and went into the house. His disciples came to him and said, Explain to us the parable of the weeds in the field.
local: Yesu tɛm tuuu aduwa lɛ, ɛkʋyɩ ɛyáa samaɣ cɔlɔ nɛ ekpe ɖɩɣa nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa wolo ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Lɩzɩ-ɖʋ ñɩyʋʋ ɛzaɣ́ʋ ŋgʋ́ kʋñɔ hayɩm taa yɔ ki-eduuye tɔbʋʋ.».

eng: Those who receive you are also receiving me, and those who receive me are receiving the one who sent me.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Weyi ɛmʋʋ-mɩ yɔ, ɛmʋʋ-m. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ mʋ́ʋ-m yɔ, ɛmʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ weyi etiyi-m yɔ.

eng: Let your yes mean yes, and your no mean no. Anything more than this comes from the evil one.
local: Yee nabʋyʋ ɛkɛ toovenim yɔ, ɩtɔ yem se: ‹Ɛɛɛ!› Yee pɩtɛkɛ toovenim yɔ, ɩtɔ yem se: ‹Aayɩ!› Yee ɩtasɩ natʋyʋ sɔzʋʋ yɔ, tʋtʋ kɛnɩ Satanɩ ñɩndʋ.».

eng: At that time some of the legal experts and the Pharisees requested of Jesus, Teacher, we would like to see a sign from you.
local: Yesu tɛm yɔɔdʋʋ lɛ, paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa taa nabɛyɛ nɛ Farɩsɩ ñɩma nabɛyɛ pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Wɩlɩyʋ! Đe-liu wɛɛ se ŋla ɛsɔdaa hama lakasɩ nasɩyɩ nɛ ɖɩna.».

eng: Jesus replied, The one who plants the good seed is the Human One.
local: Peeɖe ecosi-wɛ se: «Weyi eɖu ɖomaɣ kɩbaŋga yɔ, ɛnʋ lɛ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ ma.

eng: Those who receive a prophet as a prophet will receive a prophets reward. Those who receive a righteous person as a righteous person will receive a righteous persons reward.
local: Weyi ɛmʋʋ náyʋ mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ ɛkɛ náyʋ yɔ, Ɛsɔ kɔŋ pʋdʋ hɛyʋʋ ɛzɩ náyaa yɔ. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, weyi ɛmʋʋ kʋtʋʋzʋ se ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzɩ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa yɔ, Ɛsɔ kɔŋ-ɩ hɛyʋʋ ɛzɩ weyi ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ.

eng: You have heard that it was said, An eye for an eye and a tooth for a tooth .
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ɩnɩwa ɖɔɖɔ se peheyi ɖɔ-cɔzɔnaa se: ‹Nɔɔyʋ ɛyɔkɩ lɛlʋ ɛsɩyɛ yɔ, pɔyɔkʋʋ ɛ-ñɩnɖɛ. Nɔɔyʋ eholi lɛlʋ keɖe yɔ, poholuu ɖɔɖɔ ɛ-ñɩnɖɛ.›.

eng: But he replied, An evil and unfaithful generation searches for a sign, but it wont receive any sign except Jonahs sign.
local: Peeɖe ecosi-wɛ se: «Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɛyáa kɛ azaɣ́a, paanɩɣnɩ Ɛsɔ. Pañɩnɩɣ se pala ɛsɔdaa hama lakasɩ nasɩyɩ nɛ pana. Ɛlɛ́, paakaɣ yʋsaɣ nakɛyɛ naʋ nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ náyʋ Yoonaasɩ ñɩŋga.

eng: The field is the world. And the good seeds are the followers of the kingdom. But the weeds are the followers of the evil one.
local: Hayɩm lɛ kedeŋa. Đomaɣ kɩbaŋga lɛ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa ñɩma. Piyele ñɩyʋʋ ɛzaɣ́ʋ lɛ mbá patɩŋɩɣ Satanɩ wayɩ yɔ.

eng: I assure you that everybody who gives even a cup of cold water to these little ones because they are my disciples will certainly be rewarded. .
local: Mɩ mɔn-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa lɛ, patakpaɣ-mɩ payaa pʋyʋ. Ɛlɛ́, meheyiɣ-mɩ se yee nɔɔyʋ ɛha mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ lɩkpadaɣ maɣmaɣ mɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, paa pɩɩla ɛzɩma, Ɛsɔ kɔŋ pʋdʋ hɛyʋʋ.».

eng: But I say to you that you must not oppose those who want to hurt you. If people slap you on your right cheek, you must turn the left cheek to them as well.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ma meheyiɣ-mɩ se: ɩtaakpa mi-koyindinaa kɩma. Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛcɛbɩ ñe-nesi kɩbanzɩ laɣzaɣ kadaŋa yɔ, kɛzɩ lɛɛka nɛ ɛtɛzɩ-kɛ cɛbʋ.

eng: Just as Jonah was in the whales belly for three days and three nights , so the Human One will be in the heart of the earth for three days and three nights.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Yoonaasɩ caɣ kɩyakɩŋ naadozo wɩsɩ nɛ ɖoó kpakpayaɣ sɔsɔɔ taa yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ kɔŋ caɣʋ tɛtɛɛ kɩyakɩŋ naadozo wɩsɩ nɛ ɖoó.

eng: The enemy who planted them is the devil. The harvest is the end of the present age. The harvesters are the angels.
local: Koyindu weyi ɛ́lɛ́ ɖu ñɩyʋʋ ɛzaɣ́ʋ ŋ́gʋ́ yɔ, ɛnʋ lɛ Satanɩ. Kʋmtʋ lɛ kedeŋa tɛm nɛ kʋnɖaa lɛ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa.

eng: When they wish to haul you to court and take your shirt, let them have your coat too.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛcaɣ se ewoni-ŋ tɔm hʋyʋ cɔlɔ nɛ ɛmʋ ño-toko cikpeluu yɔ, tɛzɩ hɔzʋʋ sɔsɔʋ nɛ ŋcɛlɩ-ɩ.

eng: The citizens of Nineveh will stand up at the judgment with this generation and condemn it as guilty, because they changed their hearts and lives in response to Jonahs preaching. And look, someone greater than Jonah is here.
local: Kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ hʋʋnɩ ɛyáa tɔm yɔ, Niniivi ñɩma kʋyʋʋ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɛyáa ḿbá pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ pakʋ pɔ-tɔm. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Niniivi ñɩma lɛɣzɩ wɛtʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ panɩ Yoonaasɩ susi Ɛsɔtɔm yɔ. Ŋgʋ́, nɔɔyʋ ñɛwɛ cɩnɛ, ɛ́lɛ́ kɩlɩ Yoonaasɩ!.

eng: When they force you to go one mile, go with them two.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛkpa-ŋ nɛ ɛsʋʋ-ŋ wondu se ŋtuzi-i nʋmɔʋ ɛzɩ kiloomɛta yɔ, tuzi-i pʋ-tam naalɛ.

eng: Just as people gather weeds and burn them in the fire, so it will be at the end of the present age.
local: Ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pɛkpɛzɩɣ ñɩyʋʋ ɛzaɣ́ʋ nɛ paɖʋ-kʋ miŋ taa yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pɔkɔŋ labʋ kedeŋa tɛm wiye.

eng: The queen of the South will be raised up by God at the judgment with this generation and condemn it because she came from a distant land to hear Solomons wisdom. And look, someone greater than Solomon is here.
local: Kɩyakʋ ŋ́gʋ́ lɛ, abiɖe nɖɩ́ ɖɩɩcɔnɩ Seba ɛjaɖɛ yɔɔ ɖooo lɔŋ yɔ, ɖɩkʋyʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɛyáa ḿbá pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɖɩkʋ pɔ-tɔm. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩɩlɩnɩ ɖooo poliŋ nɛ ɖɩkɔɔ ɖɩnɩɩ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ tɔm ndʋ́ Salomɔɔ kɔyɔɔdaɣ yɔ. Ŋgʋ́, nɔɔyʋ ñɛwɛ cɩnɛ, ɛ́lɛ́ kɩlɩ Salomɔɔ!».

eng: Give to those who ask, and dont refuse those who wish to borrow from you.
local: Ɩha mbá pasʋlʋmʋʋ-mɩ yɔ nɛ ɩkɩndɩ mbá pɔkɔŋ se ɩkɩndɩ-wɛ yɔ.».

eng: The Human One will send his angels, and they will gather out of his kingdom all things that cause people to fall away and all people who sin.
local: Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ ma, mɔnkɔŋ tiyuu men-tiyiyaa men-Kewiyaɣ taa nɛ palɩzɩ mbá patɩŋa payɩ peyeki nɛ lɛlaa lakɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ nɛ ɛzaɣ́tʋ laɖaa.

eng: When an unclean spirit leaves a person, it wanders through dry places looking for a place to rest. But it doesnt find any.
local: Yesu yɔɔdaa ɖɔɖɔ se: «Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ eleeu seɣ ɛyʋ wayɩ yɔ, eleeu ɛnʋ ɛwɛɣ ɛcɔʋ lakʋ taa se ɛñɩnɩ ɖɩhɛzɩyɛ. Eehikiɣ lɛ.

eng: You have heard that it was said, You must love your neighbor and hate your enemy.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ɩnɩwa ɖɔɖɔ se peheyi ɖɔ-cɔzɔnaa se: ‹Sɔɔlɩ ña-taabalʋ nɛ ŋpaɖɩ ño-koyindu.›.

eng: He will throw them into a burning furnace. People there will be weeping and grinding their teeth.
local: Palɩzɩɣ-wɛ lɛ, pɔlɔ-wɛ kʋñɔŋ sɔsɔʋ taa. Peeɖe pewiliɣ nɛ pasalɩ pe-kela.

eng: Then it says, Ill go back to the house I left. When it arrives, it finds the place vacant, cleaned up, and decorated.
local: ɛtɔŋ se: ‹Mɛntɛzɩɣ pɩsʋʋ ɖɩɣa ŋgá ka-taa maawɛɛ yɔ.› Ɛpɩsɩɣ ka-taa lɛ, ɛmaɣnɩ pahazaa nɛ pɔñɔɔzɩ camɩyɛ.

eng: But I say to you, love your enemies and pray for those who harass you.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ma meheyiɣ-mɩ se: ɩsɔɔlɩ mi-koyindinaa nɛ ɩsɛɛ Ɛsɔ mbá pɛwɛ mɩ-wayɩ kaŋ kaŋ yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: Then the righteous will shine like the sun in their Fathers kingdom. Those who have ears should hear. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, mbá paba tʋʋzaa yɔ, pɔkɔŋ ñɩlɩsʋʋ pa-Caa Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa ɛzɩ wɩsɩ yɔ. Weyi ɛwɛnɩ nɩŋgbaaŋ lɛ, ɛnɩɩ!».

eng: Then it goes and brings with it seven other spirits more evil than itself. They go in and make their home there. That person is worse off at the end than at the beginning. This is the way it will be also for this evil generation. .
local: Peeɖe ewoki ɛ́yáa ɛ-taabalaa lɛlaa mbá pakɩlɩ-ɩ kañatʋ yɔ lʋbɛ nɛ ɛ nɛ wɛ papɩsɩ pacaɣ ɖɩɣa ŋ́gá ka-taa. Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ ɛyʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-wɛtʋ kɩbɩndʋ pɩsɩ tɩkɩlɩ wee wee lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ñɩndʋ. Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pʋkɔŋ tɛmnaʋ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɛyáa azaɣ́a.».

eng: so that you will be acting as children of your Father who is in heaven. He makes the sun rise on both the evil and the good and sends rain on both the righteous and the unrighteous.
local: nɛ ɩpɩsɩ mɩ-Caa Ɛsɔ weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ e-piya. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, eyeki nɛ wɩsɩ lɩɣ ɛyáa kɩbama nɛ azaɣ́a pɔ-yɔɔ. Eyeki ɖɔɖɔ nɛ tɛʋ nɩɣ kɩbama nɛ kɩdɛkɛdaa pɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: The kingdom of heaven is like a treasure that somebody hid in a field, which someone else found and covered up. Full of joy, the finder sold everything and bought that field.
local: Yesu tasɩ tuuu ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa eduuye se: «Ɩɩnaɣ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ nɩɣzɩnaa yɔ: abalʋ nɔɔyʋ kepimni ñɩm sɔsɔm hayɩm taa ɖooo lɔŋ. Nakʋyʋ wiye lɛ, lɛlʋ lɩɩ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛ́lɛ́ ɖaɣnɩ-pʋ pim. Peeɖe ɛ-taa hʋlʋmaa nɛ ewolo ɛpɛdɩ ɛ-ñɩm tɩŋa payɩ nɛ ewolo ɛya hayɩm ḿbʋ́.».

eng: While Jesus was speaking to the crowds, his mother and brothers stood outside trying to speak with him.
local: Yesu yɔɔdaɣnɩ ɛyáa samaɣ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, e-ɖoo nɛ e-newaa powolo pasɩŋ awayɩ nɛ pañɩnɩɣ se pɔyɔɔdɩnɩ-ɩ.

eng: If you love only those who love you, what reward do you have? Dont even the tax collectors do the same?.
local: Yee mbá pɔsɔɔlɩ-mɩ yɔ pe-ɖeke ɩsɔɔlʋʋ lɛ, kɩhɛyʋʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩɖaŋɩɣ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ yɔ? Halɩ tikee mʋyaa maɣmaɣ ñɔsɔɔlʋʋ mbá pɔsɔɔlɩ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: Again, the kingdom of heaven is like a merchant in search of fine pearls.
local: «Ɩɩnaɣ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ nɩɣzɩnaa ɖɔɖɔ yɔ: tadɩyɛ laɖʋ nɔɔyʋ ñɩnaɣnɩ lɩtʋ kɩbandʋ.

eng: Someone said to him, Look, your mother and brothers are outside wanting to speak with you.
local: Peeɖe nɔɔyʋ heyi-i se: «Ño-ɖoo nɛ ñe-newaa pɛwɛ awayɩ nɛ pañɩnɩɣ se pɔyɔɔdɩnɩ-ŋ.».

eng: And if you greet only your brothers and sisters, what more are you doing? Dont even the Gentiles do the same?.
local: Yee mɩ-ñɩma ɖeke ɩsɛɣ lɛ, ɛbɛ ɩlaba nɛ pɩkɩlɩ mbá paañaŋ Ɛsɔ yɔ?.

eng: When he found one very precious pearl, he went and sold all that he owned and bought it.
local: Ɛkɔm ɛna lɩyʋʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩkɩlɩ ɖeu yɔ lɛ, ewolo ɛpɛdɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛwɛna yɔ nɛ ewolo ɛyabɩ-kʋ.».

eng: Jesus replied, Who is my mother? Who are my brothers? .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu pɩsɩnɩ weyi eheyi-i yɔ se: «Toovenim taa lɛ, anɩ lɛ mon-ɖoo nɛ mbá lɛ me-newaa?».

eng: Therefore, just as your heavenly Father is complete in showing love to everyone, so also you must be complete.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtɛzɩ pɩʋ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa nɛ ɩwɛɛ ɛzɩ mɩ-Caa weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ.».

eng: Again, the kingdom of heaven is like a net that people threw into the lake and gathered all kinds of fish.
local: «Ɩɩnaɣ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ nɩɣzɩnaa ɖɔɖɔ yɔ: pɔlɔ piyuu teŋgu taa nɛ kɩkpaɣ kpakpasɩ ndɩ ndɩ.

eng: He stretched out his hand toward his disciples and said, Look, here are my mother and my brothers.
local: Peeɖe ɛwɩlɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa nesi nɛ ɛtɔ se: «Na! Mon-ɖoo nɛ me-newaa pɛwɛnɩ cɩnɛ.

eng: When it was full, they pulled it to the shore, where they sat down and put the good fish together into containers. But the bad fish they threw away.
local: Kɩ-taa suwa lɛ, kʋ-lɔyaa hɔm-kʋ nɛ palɩzɩ-kʋ kidiiliŋ yɔɔ nɛ pacaɣ nɛ palɩzɩɣ kpakpasɩ. Paɖʋʋ nzɩ́ sɩwɛ ɖeu yɔ ɖɔkɩŋ taa nɛ pɔlɔ nzɩ́ sɩsɩ fɛyɩ ɖeu yɔ.

eng: Whoever does the will of my Father who is in heaven is my brother, sister, and mother. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, weyi ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ man-Caa weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ e-liu wɛɛ yɔ, ɛnʋ lɛ me-neu yaa mon-ɖoo.».

eng: Thats the way it will be at the end of the present age. The angels will go out and separate the evil people from the righteous people.
local: Ḿbʋ́ pɔkɔŋ labʋ kedeŋa tɛm wiye. Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa kaɣ kɔm nɛ palɩzɩ ɛyáa azaɣ́a kɩbama hɛkʋ taa.

eng: and will throw the evil ones into a burning furnace. People there will be weeping and grinding their teeth.
local: nɛ pɔlɔ-wɛ kʋñɔŋ sɔsɔʋ taa. Peeɖe pewiliɣ nɛ pasalɩ pe-kela.».

eng: Have you understood all these things? Jesus asked. They said to him, Yes.
local: Yesu tɛm-wɛ yɔɔdɩnaʋ lɛ, ɛpɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Ɩnɩ aduwa ana atɩŋa payɩ a-tɔbʋʋ naa we?» Pocosi-i se: «Ɛɛɛ! Đɩnɩwa.».

eng: Then he said to them, Therefore, every legal expert who has been trained as a disciple for the kingdom of heaven is like the head of a household who brings old and new things out of their treasure chest. .
local: Peeɖe eheyi-wɛ se: «Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, paɣtʋ wɩlɩyʋ weyi ɛpɩsɩ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa tʋmlaɖʋ yɔ, ɛwɛ ɛzɩ ñɩm tʋ weyi ɛlɩzɩɣ ɛ-ñɩm taa wondu kɩfatʋ nɛ kɩbɩndʋ yɔ.».

eng: When Jesus finished these parables, he departed.
local: Yesu tɛm tuuu aduwa ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛkʋyɩ peeɖe.

eng: When he came to his hometown, he taught the people in their synagogue. They were surprised and said, Where did he get this wisdom? Where did he get the power to work miracles?.
local: nɛ ewolo tɛtʋ ndʋ́ tɩ-taa ɛɛcaɣaɣ nɛ ɛpaɣlɩ yɔ nɛ ɛwɩlɩɣ ɛyáa Ɛsɔtɔm Ɛsɔ ɖɩsɛyɛ taa. Peeɖe pɩɖɩɣzɩ mbá patɩŋa pɛwɛ peeɖe yɔ nɛ pɔtɔŋ se: «Le ɛnɛ ɛlɩ lɔŋ ɛnʋ ɛ-yɔɔ? Ɛzɩma ɛlakɩ hama lakasɩ sɩnɛ ḿbʋ́?.

eng: Isnt he the carpenters son? Isnt his mother named Mary? Arent James, Joseph, Simon, and Judas his brothers?.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ ɛnʋ lɛ weyi ɛkaŋ kuduyiŋ yɔ ɛ-pɩyalʋ? Pɩtɛkɛ e-ɖoo lɛ Maarɩɩ? Pɩtɛkɛ e-newaa lɛ Yakubu nɛ Yozɛɛfʋ nɛ Siimɔɔ nɛ Yuudi yaa we?.

eng: And his sisters, arent they here with us? Where did this man get all this.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ e-newaa halaa ñɩma tɩŋa payɩ wɛnɩ ɖɛ-hɛkʋ taa cɩnɛ yaa we? Ɛzɩ le ɛlɩ ɖoŋ ɛnʋ ɛ-yɔɔ kpem?».

eng: They were repulsed by him and fell into sin. But Jesus said to them, Prophets are honored everywhere except in their own hometowns and in their own households. .
local: Pa-lɩmaɣza ana ayebina nɛ pa-laŋa wɛɛ kpɩzɩŋ nɛ pɩcɛyɩɣ-wɛ nɛ Yesu tɔm siŋŋ. Peeɖe eheyi-wɛ se: «Pañaŋ náyʋ paa le. Ɛlɛ́, ɛ-tɛtʋ nɛ ɛ-hɔʋ pa-taa paañaŋ-ɩ.».

eng: He was unable to do many miracles there because of their disbelief.
local: Peeɖe ñɩma taawɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ, pʋ-yɔɔ ɛtala hama lakasɩ sakɩyɛ pɛ-tɛ.

eng: At that time the disciples came to Jesus and asked, Who is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ʋ́ Yesu tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa woba ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Anɩ lɛ weyi ɛkɛ sɔsɔ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa yɔ?».

eng: Then he called a little child over to sit among the disciples.
local: Peeɖe Yesu ya pɩɣa cikpelaɣ nakɛyɛ nɛ ɛsɩɩ-kɛ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa.

eng: and said, I assure you that if you dont turn your lives around and become like this little child, you will definitely not enter the kingdom of heaven.
local: nɛ ɛtɔ se: «Toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se: yee ɩtɛlɛɣzɩ nɛ ɩwɛɛ ɛzɩ piya cikpesi yɔ yɔ, ɩɩsʋʋ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa kaʋ.

eng: Those who humble themselves like this little child will be the greatest in the kingdom of heaven.
local: Weyi etisiɣ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛwɛɛ ɛzɩ pɩɣa kanɛ yɔ, ɛnʋ kɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ kewiyaɣ taa.

eng: Whoever welcomes one such child in my name welcomes me.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛmʋ pɩɣa nakɛyɛ ɛzɩ kanɛ yɔ mɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, man-tɩ tɩŋa pʋdʋ mʋwa.».

eng: As for whoever causes these little ones who believe in me to trip and fall into sin, it would be better for them to have a huge stone hung around their necks and be drowned in the bottom of the lake.
local: Yesu tasɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa heyuu se: «Yee nɔɔyʋ eyeba nɛ mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ mɔ-yɔɔ nɛ patakpaɣ-wɛ payaa pʋyʋ yɔ pa-taa nɔɔyʋ la kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, pɩkɩlɩ wee wee se pɛlɛɛ e-liu tɛɛ pɩyɛ sɔsɔɖɛ nɛ powoni-i pɛpɛɖɩ teŋgu taa nɛ pitisi-i lɩm tɛɛ.

eng: How terrible it is for the world because of the things that cause people to trip and fall into sin! Such things have to happen, but how terrible it is for the person who causes those things to happen!.
local: Pʋtɔɔ ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mbʋ́ piyeki se ɛyáa ɛla kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, pʋwɛɣ kedeŋa yɔɔ tam. Ɛlɛ́, pʋtɔɔ weyi pɩtɩŋɩɣnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ kpem!.

eng: If your hand or your foot causes you to fall into sin, chop it off and throw it away. Its better to enter into life crippled or lame than to be thrown into the eternal fire with two hands or two feet.
local: «Yee ñe-nesi yaa ña-naŋgbaŋaɣ eyekini se ŋla kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, sɛtɩ nɛ ŋlɔ poliŋ. Pɩkɩlɩ ɖeu se ŋwɛnɩ nesi kʋɖʋmsɩ yaa naŋgbaŋaɣ kʋɖʋmaɣ nɛ ŋhiɣ wezuu ɛzɩ ŋŋwɛnɩ ñe-nesi naalɛ yaa ña-naŋgbanzɩ naalɛ nɛ Ɛsɔ pɛɖɩ-ŋ miŋ weyi eeɖeŋ kaʋ yɔ ɛ-taa yɔ.

eng: If your eye causes you to fall into sin, tear it out and throw it away. Its better to enter into life with one eye than to be cast into a burning hell with two eyes.
local: Yee ñɛ-ɛsɩyɛ eyekini se ŋla kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, hɔɔzɩ-ɖɩ nɛ ŋlɔ poliŋ. Pɩkɩlɩ ɖeu se ŋwɛnɩ ɛsɩyɛ kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ nɛ ŋhiɣ wezuu ɛzɩ ŋŋwɛnɩ ɛsɛ naalɛ nɛ Ɛsɔ pɛɖɩ-ŋ kʋñɔŋ maatɛŋ taa ɖenɖe miŋ eeɖeŋ kaʋ yɔ.».

eng: Be careful that you dont look down on one of these little ones. I say to you that their angels in heaven are always looking into the face of my Father who is in heaven.
local: Yesu tasɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa paɣ́ʋ se: «Ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ nɛ ɩtaapɛŋ mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ mɔ-yɔɔ nɛ patakpaɣ-wɛ payaa pʋyʋ yɔ pa-taa nɔɔyʋ tɛtɛ. Toovenim lɛ, mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se: man-Caa weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ, e-tiyiyaa mbá pɔcɔŋnɩ pɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, pɛwɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ tam. .

eng: What do you think? If someone had one hundred sheep and one of them wandered off, wouldnt he leave the ninety-nine on the hillsides and go in search for the one that wandered off?.
local: «Ɩmaɣzɩɣ se yee nɔɔyʋ ɛwɛnɩ heŋ mɩnʋʋ nɛ ɩ-taa kʋɖʋm le, ɛlakɩ ɛzɩma? Eeyeki kʋɖʋm fɛyɩ mɩnʋʋ weyi ɩkazaa yɔ pʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛɖɛɛ weyi eleba yɔ ɛ-ñɩnʋʋ naa we?.

eng: If he finds it, I assure you that he is happier about having that one sheep than about the ninety-nine who didnt wander off.
local: Toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se: yee ɛna-ɩ yɔ, ɛ-taa hʋlʋmʋʋnɩ-ɩ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ kʋɖʋm fɛyɩ mɩnʋʋ weyi ɩkazaa yɔ.

eng: In the same way, my Father who is in heaven doesnt want to lose one of these little ones.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ mɩ-Caa Ɛsɔ weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ, ɛɛcaɣ se mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ patakpaɣ-wɛ payaa pʋyʋ yɔ, pa-taa nɔɔyʋ ele.».

eng: If your brother or sister sins against you, go and correct them when you are alone together. If they listen to you, then youve won over your brother or sister.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Yee ña-taabalʋ nɔɔyʋ ɛyʋsaa yɔ, wolo ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ ña nɛ ɩ ɩcaɣ mi-ɖeke nɛ ŋheyi-i mbʋ́ ɛyʋsaa yɔ. Yee etisaa yɔ, pʋbʋ ña nɛ ɩ ɩɖaɣnɩ pɩsʋʋ kʋɖʋm.

eng: But if they wont listen, take with you one or two others so that every word may be established by the mouth of two or three witnesses .
local: Yee etetisi lɛ, ŋwolo ŋyaa ɛyʋ nɔɔyʋ yaa ɛyáa naalɛ nabɛyɛ nɛ ña nɛ wɛ iwolo nɛ panɩɩ ndʋ́ ɛyɔɔdʋʋ yɔ. Yee ŋlabɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pɩlakɩ ɛzɩ paɖʋʋ paɣtʋ taa se: ‹Yee ña nɛ nɔɔyʋ ɛwɛ tɔm yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɛyáa naalɛ yaa naadozo ɛnɩɩ-tʋ nɛ pɛkɛ aseɣɖe tɩnaa› yɔ.

eng: But if they still wont pay attention, report it to the church. If they wont pay attention even to the church, treat them as you would a Gentile and tax collector.
local: Yee etetisi ɖɔɖɔ lɛ, ŋwolo ŋheyi ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma nɛ pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ. Yee ɛtanɩɩnɩ paba lɛ, pʋbʋ, ŋkpaɣ-ɩ ɛzɩ weyi ɛɛñaŋ Ɛsɔ yɔ yaa kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖʋ nɔɔyʋ yɔ.

eng: I assure you that whatever you fasten on earth will be fastened in heaven. And whatever you loosen on earth will be loosened in heaven.
local: «Toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se: mbʋ́ ikiziɣ se pataala tataa cɩnɛ yɔ, Ɛsɔ kiziɣ se pataalabɩ-pʋ ɖɔɖɔ, nɛ mbʋ́ itisiɣ se pala tataa cɩnɛ yɔ, etisiɣ se palabɩ-pʋ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Again I assure you that if two of you agree on earth about anything you ask, then my Father who is in heaven will do it for you.
local: «Meheyiɣ-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ se: yee mɩ-taa ɛyáa naalɛ ɛnɩnɩ ɖama tataa cɩnɛ nɛ pasʋlʋmɩ man-Caa weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ paa ɛbɛ yɔ, ɛhaɣ-wɛ-pʋ.

eng: For where two or three are gathered in my name, Im there with them. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖenɖe ɛyáa naalɛ yaa naadozo kpeɣliɣ ma-hɩɖɛ yɔɔ se pɛsɛɣ Ɛsɔ yɔ, mɛwɛɣ pɔ-cɔlɔ.».

eng: Then Peter said to Jesus, Lord, how many times should I forgive my brother or sister who sins against me? Should I forgive as many as seven times.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Pɩyɛ wolo Yesu cɔlɔ nɛ ɛpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ! Tam ɛzɩma pʋwɛɛ se menkpeɣ man-taabalʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛwɛɛ ɛyʋsʋʋnɩ-m yɔ? Pɩsɩɩnɩ tam lʋbɛ yaa we?».

eng: Jesus said, Not just seven times, but rather as many as seventy-seven times.
local: Peeɖe ecosi-i se: «Aayɩ! Maapɩzɩɣ meheyiɣ-ŋ se pɩsɩɩnɩ tam lʋbɛ, ɛlɛ́, wɛɛ-ɩ kpeɣu yɔɔ .

eng: Therefore, the kingdom of heaven is like a king who wanted to settle accounts with his servants.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩna mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ nɩɣzɩnaa yɔ: wiyaʋ sɔsɔ nɔɔyʋ kekpeɣlini ɛ-tʋmlaɖaa se pɛhɛyɩ-ɩ ɛ-kɩma.

eng: When he began to settle accounts, they brought to him a servant who owed him ten thousand bags of gold.
local: «Ɛkalaɣ e-liidiye lɛ, pakpa lɛlʋ nɛ powoni ɛ-cɔlɔ. Ɛ́lɛ́ tɔɔ-ɩ kɩmɩyɛ liidiye kutokiŋ ɛgbaŋ ɛgbaŋ.

eng: Because the servant didnt have enough to pay it back, the master ordered that he should be sold, along with his wife and children and everything he had, and that the proceeds should be used as payment.
local: Ɛɛnaɣ se ɛla ɛzɩma nɛ ɛhɛyɩ-ɖɩ lɛ, ɛ-caa weyi ɛlakɩ-ɩ tʋmɩyɛ yɔ, ɛha nɔɔ se pokuu ɛ nɛ ɛ-halʋ nɛ e-piya nɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛwɛna yɔ nɛ pɛpɛdɩ-wɛ ɛzɩ yomaa yɔ nɛ papɩzɩ pɛhɛyɩ kɩmɩyɛ ńɖɩ́.

eng: But the servant fell down, kneeled before him, and said, Please, be patient with me, and Ill pay you back.
local: Ɛlɛ́, tʋmlaɖʋ ɛnʋ eluŋ ɛ-caa ɛsɩndaa nɛ etendi-i se: ‹Hayɩ man-caa! Na man-pʋtɔdɩyɛ nɛ ŋyebi-m. Mehiɣa lɛ, maahɛyɩ-ŋ!›.

eng: The master had compassion on that servant, released him, and forgave the loan.
local: Peeɖe pɩlabɩ ɛ-caa ɛnʋ pʋtɔdɩyɛ nɛ ekpeɣ-i ɛ-kɩmɩyɛ ńɖɩ́ nɛ eheyi-i se ɛɖɛɛ.

eng: When that servant went out, he found one of his fellow servants who owed him one hundred coins. He grabbed him around the throat and said, Pay me back what you owe me.
local: «Tʋmlaɖʋ ɛnʋ ɛlɩ nʋmɔʋ taa lɛ, esuluni ɛ-taabalʋ tʋmlaɖʋ lɛlʋ. Ɛ́lɛ́ kɛwɛnɩ-ɩ kɩmɩyɛ liidiye pazɩ yem. Ɛlɛ́, ɛta e-liu tɛɛ nɛ eheyi-i se: ‹Hɛyɩ-m man-kɩmɩyɛ lɔŋ!›.

eng: Then his fellow servant fell down and begged him, Be patient with me, and Ill pay you back.
local: Peeɖe taabalʋ ɛnʋ eluŋ ɛ-tɛɛ nɛ etendi-i se: ‹Hayɩ man-caa! Na man-pʋtɔdɩyɛ nɛ ŋyebi-m. Mehiɣa lɛ, maahɛyɩ-ŋ!›.

eng: But he refused. Instead, he threw him into prison until he paid back his debt.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ekizi e-tenduu ḿbʋ́ nɛ ɛkpa-ɩ nɛ ewona ɛɖʋ-ɩ salaka se ɛwɛɛ peeɖe nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛhɛyɩ ɛ-kɩmɩyɛ ńɖɩ́ yɔ.

eng: When his fellow servants saw what happened, they were deeply offended. They came and told their master all that happened.
local: «Tʋmlaɖaa lɛlaa nɩ mbʋ́ pa-taabalʋ laba yɔ lɛ, pɔ-hɔ pɩsɩ pɩŋŋ nɛ powolo pɛkɛdɩ pa-caa pɩtɩŋa payɩ.

eng: His master called the first servant and said, You wicked servant! I forgave you all that debt because you appealed to me.
local: Peeɖe ɛ́lɛ́ tiyaa se payaa-ɩ. Ewoba lɛ, eheyi-i se: ‹Tʋmlaɖʋ kañadʋ ña! Mankpaɣ ña-kɩmɩyɛ sɔsɔɖɛ nɛ menkpeɣ-ŋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ŋtendi-m se menkpeɣ-ŋ.

eng: Shouldnt you also have mercy on your fellow servant, just as I had mercy on you.
local: Pɩtaamʋna se ŋna ña-taabalʋ pʋtɔdɩyɛ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ manaʋ ña-ñɩnɖɛ yɔ yaa we?›.

eng: His master was furious and handed him over to the guard responsible for punishing prisoners, until he had paid the whole debt.
local: Peeɖe pa-caa ɛnʋ, ɛ-pana kpa pɩŋŋ nɛ eyele nɛ pakpa-ɩ paɖʋzɩ salaka nɔnɔɔ ɖaŋɩyaa nesi taa se panazɩ-ɩ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛhɛyɩ ɛ-kɩmɩyɛ tɩŋa payɩ ɖɔɖɔ yɔ.».

eng: My heavenly Father will also do the same to you if you dont forgive your brother or sister from your heart. .
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pʋwɛɛ. Yee mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ etekpeɣ ɛ-taabalʋ nɛ ɛ-laŋɩyɛ tɩŋa yɔ, ḿbʋ́ man-Caa weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ, ɛkɔŋ-ɩ labʋ.».

eng: When Jesus finished saying these things, he left Galilee and came to the area of Judea on the east side of the Jordan.
local: Yesu tɛm yɔɔdʋʋ lɛ, ɛkʋyɩ Galilee egeetiye taa nɛ ewolo Yudee hɔɔlʋʋ ŋgʋ́ kʋwɛ Yɔɔrdaŋ pɔɔ wayɩ yɔ kɩ-taa.

eng: Large crowds followed him, and he healed them.
local: Ɛyáa samaɣ tɩŋ-ɩ peeɖe nɛ ɛla nɛ pa-taa kʋdɔndɩnaa yɔɔ cɛ.

eng: Some Pharisees came to him. In order to test him, they said, Does the Law allow a man to divorce his wife for just any reason.
local: Peeɖe Farɩsɩ ñɩma nabɛyɛ woba pañɩ ɛ-nɔɔ cɔlɔ tɔm. Pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Đa-paɣtʋ taa lɛ, pɩha nʋmɔʋ se ɛyʋ pɩzɩɣ ɛɖɔɔnɩ ɛ-halʋ paa mbʋ́ pʋ-yɔɔ yaa we?».

eng: Jesus answered, Havent you read that at the beginning the creator made them male and female?.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu pɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Ɩtakalɩ tɔm ndʋ́ pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa yɔ yaa we? Ńdʋ́ lɛ se: ‹Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ lakaɣ kedeŋa yɔ ɛlabɩ abalʋ nɛ halʋ.

eng: And God said, Because of this a man should leave his father and mother and be joined together with his wife, and the two will be one flesh .
local: nɛ ɛtɔ se: pʋ-yɔɔ abalʋ yeki ɛ-caa nɛ e-ɖoo nɛ ɛnɩɩnɩ ɛ-halʋ nɛ pa-naalɛ papɩsɩ ɛyʋ kʋɖʋm.›.

eng: So they are no longer two but one flesh. Therefore, humans must not pull apart what God has put together. .
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, patatasɩ kɛʋ ɛyáa naalɛ. Ɛlɛ́, papɩsɩ ɛyʋ kʋɖʋm. Yee ḿbʋ́, pɩtamʋna se ɛyʋ ɛyasɩ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ kpɛndaa yɔ.».

eng: The Pharisees said to him, Then why did Moses command us to give a divorce certificate and divorce her? .
local: Peeɖe Farɩsɩ ñɩma ḿbá pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Yee pɩkɛ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ Mooyiizi ñaɖʋ se abalʋ ɛcɛlɩ ɛ-halʋ kizuu takayaɣ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛɖɔɔnɩ-ɩ yɔ?».

eng: Jesus replied, Moses allowed you to divorce your wives because your hearts are unyielding. But it wasnt that way from the beginning.
local: Yesu cosi-wɛ se: «Mɩ-laŋa kpɩzɩŋ yɔɔ Mooyiizi ha-mɩ nʋmɔʋ se ɩɖɔɔnɩ mɩ-halaa. Piyele pɩtaawɛɛ ḿbʋ́ ɖooo kiɖe tɛɛ.

eng: I say to you that whoever divorces his wife, except for sexual unfaithfulness, and marries another woman commits adultery. .
local: Mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se: yee nɔɔyʋ halʋ ɛtala acɛyɛ nɛ ɛɖɔɔnɩ-ɩ nɛ ewolo ɛkpaɣ lɛlʋ yɔ, ɛlabɩ acɛyɛ.».

eng: His disciples said to him, If thats the way things are between a man and his wife, then its better not to marry.
local: Peeɖe ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa heyi-i se: «Yee ḿbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ yɔ, pɩkɩlɩ wee wee se abalʋ ɛtaacazɩ kpaɣʋ halʋ.».

eng: He replied, Not everybody can accept this teaching, but only those who have received the ability to accept it.
local: Ecosi-wɛ se: «Pɩtɛkɛ ɛyáa tɩŋa pɩzɩɣna petisi tɔm tʋnɛ. Ɛlɛ́, mbá Ɛsɔ yeba se petisi yɔ, pe-ɖeke petisiɣni-tʋ.

eng: For there are eunuchs who have been eunuchs from birth. And there are eunuchs who have been made eunuchs by other people. And there are eunuchs who have made themselves eunuchs because of the kingdom of heaven. Those who can accept it should accept it. .
local: Nabɛyɛ wɛɛ, paapɩzɩɣ se palʋlɩ piya: pa-taa lɛ, palʋlɩ nabɛyɛ ḿbʋ́. Lɛlaa lɛ, ɛyáa yebina nɛ papɩsɩ kaalʋlɩsɩ, pɩsɛɣ lɛlaa lɛ, Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ yɔɔ patakpaɣ halaa. Weyi etisiɣ tɔm ńdʋ́ lɛ, etisi.».

eng: Some people brought children to Jesus so that he would place his hands on them and pray. But the disciples scolded them.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛyáa wokini piya Yesu cɔlɔ se ɛtɩnɩ sɩ-yɔɔ nesi nɛ ɛsɛɛ Ɛsɔ sɩ-yɔɔ. Peeɖe ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa ɖaŋ-wɛ.

eng: Allow the children to come to me, Jesus said. Dont forbid them, because the kingdom of heaven belongs to people like these children. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, eheyi-wɛ se: «Iyele piya nɛ sɩkɔɔ mɔn-cɔlɔ, ɩtaaɖaŋ-sɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mbá pɛwɛ ɛzɩ piya ńzɩ́ yɔ, ḿbá lɛ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa ñɩma.».

eng: Then he blessed the children and went away from there.
local: Peeɖe Yesu tɩnɩ e-nesi piya ńzɩ́ sɩ-yɔɔ. Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛkʋyɩ peeɖe nɛ ɛɖɛɛ.

eng: A man approached him and said, Teacher, what good thing must I do to have eternal life.
local: Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, evebu nɔɔyʋ wolo Yesu cɔlɔ nɛ ɛpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Wɩlɩyʋ! Pʋyʋ kɩbanʋ weyi pʋwɛɛ se mala nɛ mehiɣ wezuu maatɛŋ?».

eng: Jesus said, Why do you ask me about what is good? Theres only one who is good. If you want to enter eternal life, keep the commandments. .
local: Peeɖe ɛpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ ŋpɔzʋʋ-m pʋyʋ kɩbanʋ tɔm? Ɛsɔ ɖeke kɛnɩ kɩbanʋ. Yee ŋcaɣ se ŋsʋʋ ɛsɔdaa koboyaɣ taa yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ŋɖɔ paɣtʋ ndɩ ndɩ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋwa yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ.».

eng: The man said, Which ones? Then Jesus said, Dont commit murder. Dont commit adultery. Dont steal. Dont give false testimony .
local: Evebu ɛnʋ ɛpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Tʋtʋ lɛ ndʋ́?» Yesu cosi-i se: «Taakʋ ɛyʋ, taala acɛyɛ, taamɩlɩ, taacɛtɩnɩ lɛlʋ taa.

eng: Honor your father and mother, and love your neighbor as you love yourself . .
local: ña ña-caa nɛ ño-ɖoo nɛ ŋsɔɔlɩ ña-taabalʋ ɛzɩ ŋsɔɔlʋʋ ña-maɣmaɣ ña-tɩ yɔ.».

eng: The young man replied, Ive kept all these. What am I still missing.
local: Peeɖe evebu ɛnʋ eheyi-i se: «Mɔnɖɔm paɣtʋ ńdʋ́ tɩtɩŋa payɩ tɩ-yɔɔ. Ɛbɛ pʋwɛɛ se mantasɩ labʋ yɔ?».

eng: Jesus said, If you want to be complete, go, sell what you own, and give the money to the poor. Then you will have treasure in heaven. And come follow me. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu heyi-i se: «Yee ŋcaɣ se ŋtɛzɩ labʋ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ yɔ, wolo ŋpɛdɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ŋwɛna yɔ nɛ ŋtayɩ kʋñɔndɩnaa pi-liidiye nɛ ŋwɛnɩ ñɩm ɛsɔdaa. Yee ŋlabɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ŋkɔɔ ŋtɩŋ-m.».

eng: But when the young man heard this, he went away saddened, because he had many possessions.
local: Evebu ɛnʋ ɛnɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛ-laŋɩyɛ wɛɛkɩ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛwɛnɩ ñɩm pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ.

eng: Then Jesus said to his disciples, I assure you that it will be very hard for a rich person to enter the kingdom of heaven.
local: Peeɖe Yesu heyi ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se: «Toovenim lɛ, mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se: pʋwɛ kaɖɛ kpem se ñɩm tʋ ɛsʋʋ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa.

eng: In fact, its easier for a camel to squeeze through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to enter Gods kingdom. .
local: Pʋcɔ ñɩm tʋ nɔɔyʋ sʋʋ ka-taa lɛ, pʋwɛ kaɖɛ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ ɛzɩ kpaŋnɔ siɣá naalɛ tʋ sʋʋnɩ ɛjɔʋ pɔʋ taa yɔ.».

eng: When his disciples heard this, they were stunned. Then who can be saved? they asked.
local: Panɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɩɖɩɣzɩ-wɛ pɩŋŋ nɛ pɔtɔŋ se: «Yee ḿbʋ́ apɩzɩɣ ehiɣ ñʋʋ yabʋ yɔ?».
