eng: He was unable to do any miracles there, except that he placed his hands on a few sick people and healed them.
local: Ḿbʋ́ labɩna nɛ ɛtapɩzɩ se ɛla Ɛsɔ hama lakasɩ sakɩyɛ. Ɛlɛ́, kʋdɔndɩnaa pazɩ yɔɔ ɛtɩnɩ nesi nɛ pɔ-yɔɔ cɛ.

eng: Jesus entered a house. A crowd gathered again so that it was impossible for him and his followers even to eat.
local: Yesu nɛ e-tiyiyaa petibini pʋʋ yɔɔ lɛ, ewolo ɖɩɣa nɛ ɛyáa samaɣ tasɩ ɛ-wayɩ tɩŋʋʋ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛ nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa petehiɣ alɩwaatʋ se pɔtɔɔ tɔɔnaɣ.

eng: Now hurry, go and tell his disciples, Hes been raised from the dead. Hes going on ahead of you to Galilee. You will see him there. Ive given the message to you.
local: nɛ iwolo lɔŋ iheyi ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se efema nɛ ɛlɩɩnɩ sɩɖaa taa. Ewoki Galilee nɛ ɛɖaŋ-wɛ, peeɖe pakaɣ-ɩ naʋ. Ńdʋ́ maawɛna se meheyiɣ-mɩ.».

eng: Listen to this! A farmer went out to scatter seed.
local: «Iwelesi camɩyɛ nɛ ɩnɩɩ: abalʋ nɔɔyʋ wɛnɩ ḿbʋ́ nɛ ewolo tɔɔnaɣ pee mɩzʋʋ ɛ-hayɩm taa.

eng: You always have the poor with you, but you wont always have me.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mɩ nɛ kʋñɔndɩnaa ɩwɛna tam. Ɛlɛ́, ma maawɛɣ mɩ-cɔlɔ ḿbʋ́.

eng: Now immediately after the suffering of that time the sun will become dark, and the moon wont give its light. The stars will fall from the sky and the planets and other heavenly bodies will be shaken.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Kʋñɔŋ kɩyakɩŋ ɩnʋ ɩtɩɖɛɣ lɛ, wɩsɩ ɛɛtasɩɣ ñaɣʋ, fenaɣ ɛɛtasɩɣ ñaɣʋ ɖɔɖɔ. Tɩɩnzɩ kpɛzɩɣnɩ ɛsɔdaa nɛ sɩtɔlɩ nɛ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ, pɩñamsɩ.

eng: But the days will come when the groom will be taken away from them, and then they will fast.
local: Ɛlɛ́, pɔkɔŋ lɩzʋʋ walʋ ɛnʋ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa alɩwaatʋ natʋyʋ. Tɩ-taa pɔkɔŋ nɔɔ hɔkʋʋ.».

eng: and I gave them for the potters field, as the Lord commanded me .
local: nɛ payabɩnɩ tɛtʋ pɛŋ mayʋ cɔlɔ. Ḿbʋ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ kaɖʋwa se meheyi-wɛ.».

eng: Come, follow me, he said, and Ill show you how to fish for people. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛ́yáa-wɛ nɛ eheyi-wɛ se: «Ɩkɔɔ ɩtɩŋ-m nɛ manpɩsɩ-mɩ ɛyáa kpayaa ɛzɩ ɩkpaʋ kpakpasɩ yɔ.».

eng: He was appalled by their disbelief. Then Jesus traveled through the surrounding villages teaching.
local: Peeɖe pɩɖɩɣzɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pɛfɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ. Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu cɔɔ tɛtʋ cikpetu ndɩ ndɩ ndʋ́ tɩwɛ Nazarɛɛtɩ cɔlɔ yɔ tɩ-taa nɛ ɛwɩlɩ nɛ eheyi ɛyáa Ɛsɔtɔm.

eng: When his family heard what was happening, they came to take control of him. They were saying, Hes out of his mind.
local: Ɛ-ñɩma nɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pakʋyɩ powolo se pakpaɣ-ɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pamaɣzaɣ se: «Ɛsʋ kpaaŋ.».

eng: With great fear and excitement, they hurried away from the tomb and ran to tell his disciples.
local: Peeɖe patɩkʋyɩ pɩlaʋ yɔɔ nɛ sɔɔndʋ nɛ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ siŋŋ nɛ peseɣ se powoki peheyi ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa.

eng: As he was scattering seed, some fell on the path; and the birds came and ate it.
local: Ɛmɩzaɣ lɛ, lɛɛna tɔlɩ nʋmɔʋ nɔɔ nɛ sumasɩ tii sɩtɔɔ-yɛ.

eng: By pouring this perfume over my body shes prepared me to be buried.
local: Ɛpɩyɩ tɩlaaɖɩ ŋ́gʋ́ mon-tomnaɣ yɔɔ se ɛñɔɔzɩ-kɛ nɛ pʋcɔ pepim-m.

eng: Then the sign of the Human One will appear in the sky. At that time all the tribes of the earth will be full of sadness, and they will see the Human One coming in the heavenly clouds with power and great splendor.
local: Peeɖe pɩwɩlɩɣ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ kawɩlɩsɩ ɛsɔdaa nɛ ajɛya kpeekpe ɛyáa pazɩ tɩmʋʋ nɛ pana Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ nɛ e-ɖoŋ sɔsɔŋ nɛ e-koboyaɣ ɛsɔmɩndʋ yɔɔ, ɛɖɔŋ kɔm.

eng: No one sews a piece of new, unshrunk cloth on old clothes; otherwise, the patch tears away from it, the new from the old, and makes a worse tear.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Paakpakɩɣ pɩsaʋ kɩfalʋʋ hɔɔlaɣ nɛ pɔtɔnɩ wonuu kɩbɩnʋʋ. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, pɔcɔtʋʋ-kʋ lɛ, hɔɔlaɣ ŋ́gá kasʋʋ nɛ kɔhɔm-kʋ nɛ kɩtɛzɩ cɩyʋʋ.».

eng: Jesus was brought before the governor. The governor said, Are you the king of the Jews? Jesus replied, Thats what you say. .
local: Powoni Yesu Room wiyaʋ Pilaatɩ cɔlɔ lɛ, ɛpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Ña lɛ Yuda ñɩma wiyaʋ sɔsɔ naa we?» Yesu cosi-i se: «Ñɔyɔɔdʋʋnɩ ḿbʋ́.».

eng: Right away, they left their nets and followed him.
local: Peeɖe peyebi pe-piyiŋ kpaagbaa nɛ patɩŋ-ɩ.

eng: He called for the Twelve and sent them out in pairs. He gave them authority over unclean spirits.
local: Peeɖe ɛya ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa hiu nɛ naalɛ nɛ ɛha-wɛ ɖoŋ se papɩzɩ pɔɖɔɔnɩ aleewaa nɛ etiyi-wɛ naalɛ naalɛ.

eng: The legal experts came down from Jerusalem. Over and over they charged, Hes possessed by Beelzebul. He throws out demons with the authority of the ruler of demons.
local: Yuda ñɩma paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa mbá palɩnɩ Yeruusalɛm nɛ powolo Yesu cɔlɔ yɔ, pɔyɔɔdaɣnɩ ɖama se: «Aleewaa caa Belzeebuuli wɛ ɛ-wayɩ.» Lɛlaa se: «Aleewaa ḿbá pa-caa ɖoŋ ɛɖɔɔnʋʋnɩ aleewaa.».

eng: But Jesus met them and greeted them. They came and grabbed his feet and worshipped him.
local: Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, Yesu katɩ-wɛ nɛ ɛtɔ se: «Mɛnsɛ-mɩ!» Peeɖe powobi poluŋ ɛ-tɛɛ nɛ pakpa ɛ-naŋgbanzɩ nɛ paɖʋ-ɩ hɩɖɛ.

eng: Other seed fell on rocky ground where the soil was shallow. They sprouted immediately because the soil wasnt deep.
local: Pee lɛɛna ñɔtɔlɩ ɛwaɣ yɔɔ nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ tɛtʋ telim lɛ, atɩñɔʋ.

eng: I tell you the truth that wherever in the whole world this good news is announced, what shes done will also be told in memory of her. .
local: Toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se: paa le posusuu Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔ, pɔkɔŋ kɛdʋʋ mbʋ́ halʋ ɛnɛ ɛlabɩ mɔ-yɔɔ yɔ pʋ-tɔm nɛ ɛyáa ɛtaasɔɔ ɛ-yɔɔ kaʋ.».

eng: He will send his angels with the sound of a great trumpet, and they will gather his chosen ones from the four corners of the earth, from one end of the sky to the other.
local: Pɔkɔŋ yaʋ ɛgandɩyɛ sɔsɔɖɛ nɛ etiyi e-tiyiyaa kedeŋa kpeekpe yɔɔ nɛ pekpeɣli mbá patɩŋa payɩ Ɛsɔ lɩzaa se pɛkɛ ɛ-ñɩma yɔ.».

eng: No one pours new wine into old leather wineskins; otherwise, the wine would burst the wineskins and the wine would be lost and the wineskins destroyed. But new wine is for new wineskins. .
local: Ɛtasɩ-wɛ heyuu ɖɔɖɔ se: «Paasuu sʋlʋm pɛŋ weyi ɩtɔwaa yɔ ɩ-taa. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, pʋkɔŋ se pɩpɩɣ lɛ, pɩyasɩɣ-ɩ nɛ sʋlʋm wɛɛkɩ pikpe tataa yem nɛ pɛŋ ñala asayʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ. Ɛlɛ́, pɛŋ weyi ɩtɔtɔɔ yɔ, ɩ-taa posuu.».

eng: But he didnt answer when the chief priests and elders accused him.
local: Cɔjɔnaa sɔsaa nɛ pɛ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa sɔsaa pakʋyɩ ɛ-yɔɔ, ɛlɛ́, etocosi-wɛ natʋyʋ.

eng: After going a little farther, he saw James and John, Zebedees sons, in their boat repairing the fishing nets.
local: Ɛtasɩ wobu ɛsɩndaa pazɩ lɛ, ɛna Zebedee nɛ ɛ-pɩyalaa: Yakubu nɛ e-neu Yohanɛɛsɩ, pɛwɛ pa-kpɩyʋʋ taa nɛ paɖaɣnɩɣ pe-piyiŋ.

eng: He instructed them to take nothing for the journey except a walking stick—no bread, no bags, and no money in their belts.
local: Etiyaɣ-wɛ lɛ, eheyi-wɛ se: «Ɩɖɛɣ lɛ, ɩɖɔkɩ ɖaʋ nɛ ɩlɛɛ naataŋgbala nɛ isuu wonuu kʋɖʋmʋʋ kʋɖʋmʋʋ. Ɩtaakpaɣ nabʋyʋ nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ-pʋ. Ɩtaakpaɣ tɔɔnaɣ yaa huyuu yaa liidiye.».

eng: When Jesus called them together he spoke to them in a parable: How can Satan throw Satan out?.
local: Peeɖe Yesu ya-wɛ nɛ etuu-wɛ aduwa se: «Ɛzɩma Satanɩ pɩzɩɣ ɛɖɔɔnɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ?.

eng: Then Jesus said to them, Dont be afraid. Go and tell my brothers that I am going into Galilee. They will see me there. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu heyi-wɛ se: «Sɔɔndʋ ɛtaakpa-mɩ. Iwolo iheyi man-taabalaa se powolo Galilee, peeɖe pakaɣ-m naʋ.».

eng: When the sun came up, it scorched the plants; and they dried up because they had no roots.
local: Wɩsɩ kɔm sɩñaɣ lɛ, awɩlɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, hosi tetii tɛtɛɛ.

eng: Then one of the Twelve, who was called Judas Iscariot, went to the chief priests.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa hiu nɛ naalɛ taa weyi payaɣ se Yudaasɩ Iskarɩyɔɔtɩ yɔ, ewolo ɛna Yuda ñɩma cɔjɔnaa sɔsaa.

eng: Learn this parable from the fig tree. After its branch becomes tender and it sprouts new leaves, you know that summer is near.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Iwelesi camɩyɛ nɛ ɩnɩɩ mbʋ́ hiyuú wɩlɩɣ-mɩ yɔ: alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ kɩnɛɣdɩɣ yɔ, ɩsɩm kpaagbaa se tɛsoŋiye wɩzaa.

eng: Jesus went through the wheat fields on the Sabbath. As the disciples made their way, they were picking the heads of wheat.
local: Kɩyakʋ kɩhɛzʋʋ nakʋyʋ wiye Yesu nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa pɔɖɔŋaɣ hayɩm nabʋyʋ taa. Pahayɩ tɔɔnaɣ nakɛyɛ pɩ-taa nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa pɛlɩɣ nɛ nʋmɔʋ nɛ ponuutuu nɛ pasalɩɣ. Tɔɔnaɣ ŋ́gá, kɛwɛ ɛzɩ amala yɔ.

eng: Then Pilate said, Dont you hear the testimony they bring against you.
local: Peeɖe Pilaatɩ pɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Ŋŋnɩɣ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pakʋyʋʋ ñɔ-yɔɔ yɔ yaa we?».

eng: At that very moment he called them. They followed him, leaving their father Zebedee in the boat with the hired workers.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛtɩyaʋ Zebedee pɩyalaa ḿbá nɛ peyele pa-caa nɛ tʋmlaɖaa kpɩyʋʋ taa nɛ patɩŋ ɛ-wayɩ.

eng: He said, Whatever house you enter, remain there until you leave that place.
local: Ɛtasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Yee iwobi ɖoli nɛ pamʋ-mɩ ɖɩɣa nakɛyɛ taa lɛ, ɩcaɣ peeɖe nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩkʋyʋʋ peeɖe yɔ.

eng: A kingdom involved in civil war will collapse.
local: Yee kewiyaɣ nakɛyɛ ɛwɛɛ nɛ ka-taa ñɩma youni ɖama yɔ, kaalaɣzɩɣ yɔkʋʋ.

eng: Now as the women were on their way, some of the guards came into the city and told the chief priests everything that had happened.
local: Halaa ḿbá pakʋyɩ pɩlaʋ yɔɔ nɛ pɛɖɛɣ lɛ, sɔɔjanaa mbá paɖaŋ kʋ-yɔɔ yɔ, pa-taa lɛlaa wolo tɛtʋ taa nɛ pɛkɛdɩ cɔjɔnaa sɔsaa mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa pɩlaba yɔ.

eng: Other seed fell among thorny plants. The thorny plants grew and choked the seeds, and they produced nothing.
local: Pee lɛɛna tɔlɩ kpaŋsɔɔ taa nɛ añɔ ɛzɩ pɩɩkpa camɩyɛ lɛ, kpaŋsɔɔ lɛɣtɩ nɛ pɩtapɩzɩ pɩlʋlɩ.

eng: and said, What will you give me if I turn Jesus over to you? They paid him thirty pieces of silver.
local: nɛ ɛpɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Yee manpɩzaa mankpa Yesu nɛ mɛncɛlɩ-mɩ, ɛbɛ ɩhaɣ-m?» Kpaagbaa ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pakalɩ liidiye pɔɔyɩsɩ niidozo nɛ pɛcɛlɩ-ɩ.

eng: In the same way, when you see all these things, you know that the Human One is near, at the door.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pʋwɛɛ. Yee ɩkɔm ɩnaɣ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɩtɩlɩ kpaagbaa se Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ talɩ mɩ-cɔlɔ kpam.

eng: The Pharisees said to Jesus, Look! Why are they breaking the Sabbath law.
local: Palakaɣ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, Farɩsɩ ñɩma na-wɛ nɛ powolo peheyi Yesu se: «Cɔnɩ ŋna ñɔ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa lakʋʋ mbʋ́ paɖʋ Mooyiizi paɣtʋ taa se pataala kɩyakʋ kɩhɛzʋʋ wiye yɔ.».

eng: But he didnt answer, not even a single word. So the governor was greatly amazed.
local: Ɛlɛ́, esuma, ɛtatasɩ cosuu natʋyʋ. Peeɖe pɩɖɩɣzɩ Pilaatɩ yem ɖɩɣ ɖɩɣ.

eng: Jesus and his followers went into Capernaum. Immediately on the Sabbath Jesus entered the synagogue and started teaching.
local: Yesu ya ɛyáa ḿbá lɛ, ɛ nɛ wɛ powolo Kapɛrnayum. Kɩyakʋ kɩhɛzʋʋ talaa lɛ, pasʋʋ Ɛsɔ ɖɩsɛyɛ taa nɛ ɛpazɩ ɛyáa Ɛsɔtɔm wɩlʋʋ.

eng: If a place doesnt welcome you or listen to you, as you leave, shake the dust off your feet as a witness against them. .
local: Yee nabɛyɛ ɛtamʋ-mɩ ɖoli yaa patanɩɩnɩ-mɩ lɛ, ikpizi-wɛ mɩ-naŋgbanzɩ yɔɔ mʋzʋʋ nɛ ɩɖɛɛ nɛ pɩwɩlɩ se ɩkɔɔlɩ-wɛ nɛ iyebi-wɛ nɛ pa-sʋʋtʋ.».

eng: And a house torn apart by divisions will collapse.
local: Yaa ɛyáa ɛwɛ ɖɩɣa nakɛyɛ taa nɛ poyouni ɖama yɔ, ɖɩɣa ŋ́gá kaalaɣzɩɣ yɔkʋʋ.

eng: They met with the elders and decided to give a large sum of money to the soldiers.
local: Peeɖe paba nɛ ŋgbɛyɛ taa sɔsaa pekpeɣli ɖama nɛ pɔyɔɔdɩ nɛ pañɩnɩ liidiye sakɩyɛ nɛ pɛcɛlɩ-wɛ.

eng: Other seed fell into good soil and bore fruit. Upon growing and increasing, the seed produced in one case a yield of thirty to one, in another case a yield of sixty to one, and in another case a yield of one hundred to one. .
local: Pee lɛɛna ñɔtɔlɩ tɛtʋ kɩbandʋ taa, alɛ ñɔ nɛ pɩpaɣlɩ tɩŋ nɛ ɩlʋlɩ pee. Tɩʋ lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ niidozo, lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ nɩɩnʋwa nɛ hiu nɛ lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ mɩnʋʋ.».

eng: From that time on he was looking for an opportunity to turn him in.
local: Pɩkpaɣʋnɩ alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ yɔ, ɛpazɩ ñɩnʋʋ nʋmɔʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛɛtɩŋ nɛ ɛkpa Yesu nɛ ɛ́ɖʋzɩ pe-nesi taa yɔ.

eng: I assure you that this generation wont pass away until all these things happen.
local: Toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se: ɛyáa mbá pɛwɛnɩ pɛ-ɛsɛ ɛzʋnɔ yɔ, paasɩkɩ patɩŋa nɛ pʋcɔ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩla ḿbʋ́.

eng: He said to them, Havent you ever read what David did when he was in need, when he and those with him were hungry?.
local: Peeɖe Yesu pɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Yee ḿbʋ́ ɩtakalɩdɩ mbʋ́ Daaviidi labɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ñɔɔsɩ cɛyɩ ɛ nɛ ɛ-taabalaa yɔ yaa we?.

eng: It was customary during the festival for the governor to release to the crowd one prisoner, whomever they might choose.
local: Paa Yuda ñɩma Paska Kazandʋ ndʋ́ lɛ, Pilaatɩ lɩzɩɣ salaka tɩnaa taa kʋɖʋm weyi ɛyáa samaɣ sɔɔlaa se palɩzɩ-ɩ yɔ.

eng: The people were amazed by his teaching, for he was teaching them with authority, not like the legal experts.
local: Ɛyáa mbá pewelesaɣ ɛ-tɔm yɔ, pɩlabɩ-wɛ piti nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛwɩlaɣ tɔm yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛtawɩlɩɣ-wɛ ɛzɩ pa-paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛwɩlaɣ-wɛ nɛ abalɩtʋ.

eng: So they went out and proclaimed that people should change their hearts and lives.
local: Peeɖe Yesu tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa ḿbá pɛɖɛwa nɛ papazɩ ɛyáa Ɛsɔtɔm susuu se pɛlɛɣzɩ wɛtʋ.

eng: If Satan rebels against himself and is divided, then he cant endure. Hes done for.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ yee Satanɩ eyouni ɛ-taabalaa yɔ, e-kewiyaɣ ɛɛlaɣzɩɣ yɔkʋʋ.

eng: They told them, Say that Jesus disciples came at night and stole his body while you were sleeping.
local: nɛ paka pa-ñʋŋ taa se: «Iheyi ɛyáa se iɖowaɣ ɖoó taa nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa kɔɔ pamɩlɩ-ɩ.

eng: He said, Whoever has ears to listen should pay attention! .
local: Yesu tɛm-wɛ tuuu eduuye lɛ, eheyi-wɛ se: «Weyi ɛwɛnɩ nɩŋgbaaŋ lɛ, ɛnɩɩ.».

eng: On the first day of the Festival of Unleavened Bread, the disciples came to Jesus and said, Where do you want us to prepare for you to eat the Passover meal.
local: Kazandʋ ndʋ́ tɩ-yɔɔ pɔtɔkɩ tindine nɖɩ́ ɖɩ-taa fɛyɩ sɔsɔɔna yɔ, tɩ-kajalaɣ kɩyakʋ wiye Yesu tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa woba ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se le e-liu wɛɛ se patɩzɩ-ɩ Yuda ñɩma Paska Kazandʋ tɔɔnaɣ nɛ le e-liu wɛɛ se ɛtɔkɩ-kɛ?.

eng: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will certainly not pass away.
local: Ɛsɔdaa nɛ tɛtʋ pamʋkɩ, ɛlɛ́, mɔn-tɔm ñaamʋkɩ kaʋ.».

eng: During the time when Abiathar was high priest, David went into Gods house and ate the bread of the presence, which only the priests were allowed to eat. He also gave bread to those who were with him. .
local: Ɛsʋ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa taa nɛ ɛtɔɔ tindine nɖɩ́ paaha Ɛsɔ yɔ. Ŋgʋ́, pɩfɛyɩ se nabɛyɛ ɛtɔɔ-ɖɩ yem nɛ pɛtɛkɛ cɔjɔnaa. Ɛlɛ́, Daaviidi kpaɣ-yɛ nɛ ɛ nɛ ɛ-taabalaa pɔtɔɔ. Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ lɛ, Abiyaataarɩ kɛkɛnɩ cɔjɔnaa ñʋʋdʋ.».

eng: At that time there was a well-known prisoner named Jesus Barabbas.
local: Ŋgʋ́, alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ lɛ, abalʋ weyi payaɣ se Yesu Baraabaasɩ nɛ pasɩm-ɩ paa le yɔ, ɛɛwɛ salaka taa.

eng: Suddenly, there in the synagogue, a person with an evil spirit screamed.
local: Abalʋ nɔɔyʋ kɛwɛ peeɖe, eleeu wɛ ɛ-wayɩ nɛ ɛpɩsɩɣ-ɩ kpɛndɛɣlɩsɩ. Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-yɔɔ ɖeyi ɖeyi lɛ, ɛma kubuka se:.

eng: They cast out many demons, and they anointed many sick people with olive oil and healed them.
local: Pɔɖɔɔnaɣ aleewaa ɛyáa sakɩyɛ wayɩ nɛ pataɣ kʋdɔndɩnaa sakɩyɛ num nɛ pa-kʋdɔmɩŋ cɛkɩ.

eng: No one gets into the house of a strong person and steals anything without first tying up the strong person. Only then can the house be burglarized.
local: Pʋcɔ nɔɔyʋ wolo ɛmɩlɩ weyi ɛwɛ ɖoŋ yɔ ɛ-tɛ lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se ɛpɩzɩ ɛhɔkɩ-ɩ camɩyɛ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛpɩzɩ ɛkpaɣ e-wondu.

eng: And if the governor hears about this, we will take care of it with him so you will have nothing to worry about.
local: Yee wiyaʋ sɔsɔ ɛnɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɖɩtɩlɩ mbʋ́ ɖɩɩla nɛ ɖɩhɛzɩ ɛ-laŋɩyɛ nɛ ɛtaalabɩ-mɩ pʋyʋ yɔ.».

eng: When they were alone, the people around Jesus, along with the Twelve, asked him about the parables.
local: Yesu nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa hiu nɛ naalɛ nɛ mbá paawɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ yɔ, palɩ ɛyáa samaɣ taa nɛ potuzi pa-tɩ lɛ, pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se ɛlɩzɩ-wɛ aduwa ana a-tɔbʋʋ.

eng: He replied, Go into the city, to a certain man, and say, The teacher says, My time is near. Im going to celebrate the Passover with my disciples at your house. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, ecosi-wɛ se: «Iwolo tɛtʋ taa nɔɔyʋ cɔlɔ nɛ iheyi-i se Wɩlɩyʋ se ɛ-sɩm alɩwaatʋ talaa, ñɛ-tɛ ɛ nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa pɔkɔŋ pɔtɔɔ Yuda ñɩma Paska Kazandʋ.».

eng: But nobody knows when that day or hour will come, not the heavenly angels and not the Son. Only the Father knows.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Nɔɔyʋ ɛɛsɩŋ kɩyakʋ ŋ́gʋ́ yaa alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́. Paa Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa yaa ɛ-Pɩyalʋ maɣmaɣ. Ɛlɛ́, Caa Ɛsɔ ɖeke sɩmna.

eng: Then he said, The Sabbath was created for humans; humans werent created for the Sabbath.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Paɖʋ kɩyakʋ kɩhɛzʋʋ se pʋwazɩ ɛyʋ. Ɛlɛ́, patala ɛyʋ kʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: When the crowd had come together, Pilate asked them, Whom would you like me to release to you, Jesus Barabbas or Jesus who is called Christ.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ Pilaatɩ pɔzɩ ɛyáa samaɣ ŋgá kekpeɣlaa yɔ se: «Yesu Baraabaasɩ nɛ Yesu weyi payaɣ se Krɩstʋ yɔ, pa-taa weyi mi-liu wɛɛ se meyele?».

eng: What have you to do with us, Jesus of Nazareth? Have you come to destroy us? I know who you are. You are the holy one from God.
local: «Yesu Nazarɛɛtɩ tʋ, ɛbɛ ŋcaɣnɩ-ɖʋ? Ŋkɔm se ŋkʋ-ɖʋ yaa we? Mansɩm mbʋ́ ŋkɛnaa yɔ ɖeu, ŋkɛ Ɛsɔ Ɛyʋ.».

eng: Herod the king heard about these things, because the name of Jesus had become well-known. Some were saying, John the Baptist has been raised from the dead, and this is why miraculous powers are at work through him.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ʋ́ Yesu hɩɖɛ sɛ paa le nɛ wiyaʋ Eroodi nɩɩ ɛ-taŋ nɛ ɛyáa lɛlaa tɔŋ se: «Lɩm Sɔʋ Sɔnzɩ Laɖʋ Yohanɛɛsɩ femna. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛwɛnɩ ɖoŋ nɛ ɛlakɩ Ɛsɔ hama lakasɩ.».

eng: I assure you that human beings will be forgiven for everything, for all sins and insults of every kind.
local: Iwelesi camɩyɛ, toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se kɩwɛɛkɩm mbʋ́ ɛyáa laba yɔ, paa pɩɩɖɔ ɛzɩma yaa pɛwɛɛkɩ Ɛsɔ hɩɖɛ ɛzɩma yɔ, Ɛsɔ pɩzɩɣ ekpeɣ-wɛ-pʋ.

eng: So the soldiers took the money and did as they were told. And this report has spread throughout all Judea to this very day.
local: Ɛlɛ́, sɔɔjanaa ḿbá pamʋ liidiye ńɖɩ́ nɛ pala ɛzɩ peheyuu-wɛ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ tɔm ńdʋ́ tɩwɛɛ tɩcɔʋ Yuda ñɩma cɔlɔ halɩ nɛ sɔnɔ.

eng: He said to them, The secret of Gods kingdom has been given to you, but to those who are outside everything comes in parables.
local: Peeɖe ecosi-wɛ se: «Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ tɔm wɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ. Ɛlɛ́, mɩ lɛ, ɛha-mɩ lɛɣtʋ se ɩnɩɩ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ. Piyele lɛlaa yɔ, pɛfɛyɩ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa. Panɩɣ tɔm ńdʋ́ lɛ, tɩkɛnɩ-wɛ aduwa.

eng: The disciples did just as Jesus instructed them. They prepared the Passover.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa la ɛzɩ eheyuu-wɛ yɔ nɛ patɩzɩ kazandʋ tɔɔnaɣ.

eng: As it was in the time of Noah, so it will be at the coming of the Human One.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ kɔŋ yɔ, pɩlakɩ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ pɩɩlabʋ Nowee alɩwaatʋ taa yɔ.

eng: This is why the Human One is Lord even over the Sabbath. .
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ sɩmnɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se pala kɩyakʋ kɩhɛzʋʋ wiye yɔ.».

eng: Jesus and his disciples came to the other side of the lake, to the region of the Gerasenes.
local: Puwiye ńɖɩ́ patalɩ Geraazaa ɛjaɖɛ taa Galilee teŋgu kidiiliŋ lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ.

eng: He knew that the leaders of the people had handed him over because of jealousy.
local: Ɛpɔzɩ-wɛ ḿbʋ́, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛnawa se paanaɣ Yesu nɛ ɛsɩyɛ yɔɔ pakpa-ɩ nɛ powoni ɛ-cɔlɔ.

eng: Silence! Jesus said, speaking harshly to the demon. Come out of him! .
local: Peeɖe Yesu holini-i se: «Hei! Su peeɖe nɛ ŋse abalʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-wayɩ.».

eng: Others were saying, He is Elijah. Still others were saying, He is a prophet like one of the ancient prophets.
local: Lɛlaa se: «Náyʋ Elii weyi paaɖaŋaa yɔ, ɛnʋ kɔmna» nɛ lɛlaa ñɔtɔŋ ɖɔɖɔ se: «Lɔndaa náyaa taa nɔɔyʋ.».

eng: But whoever insults the Holy Spirit will never be forgiven. That person is guilty of a sin with consequences that last forever. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee ɛyʋ ɛwɛɛkɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu hɩɖɛ yɔ, Ɛsɔ eekpeɣiɣ-i kaʋ: ɛ-kɩwɛɛkɩm wɛɣ ɛ-yɔɔ tam.».

eng: Now the eleven disciples went to Galilee, to the mountain where Jesus told them to go.
local: Yesu tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa hiu nɛ kʋɖʋm kowobi Galilee pʋʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛɛwɩlɩ-wɛ yɔ kʋ-yɔɔ nɛ paɖaŋ-ɩ peeɖe.

eng: This is so that they can look and see but have no insight, and they can hear but not understand. Otherwise, they might turn their lives around and be forgiven.
local: Pɩlakɩ ḿbʋ́ se: Pɔcɔnɩ camɩyɛ, ɛlɛ́, pataana. ‹Pewelesi nɛ panɩɩ camɩyɛ, ɛlɛ́ pataanɩɩ pʋ-tɔbʋʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, yee panɩ pʋ-tɔbʋʋ yɔ, pɛlɛɣzɩ wɛtʋ nɛ powolo Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ, nɛ Ɛsɔ kpeɣ-wɛ pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm.› ».

eng: That evening he took his place at the table with the twelve disciples.
local: Pɩlɛdaa lɛ, Yesu nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa hiu nɛ naalɛ pacaɣ tɔɔnaɣ ɖɩtɔɔyɛ.

eng: In those days before the flood, people were eating and drinking, marrying and giving in marriage, until the day Noah entered the ark.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pʋcɔ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ tɛʋ sɔsɔʋ nɩwa nɛ lɩm su yɔ kɩtalɩ lɛ, ɛyáa tɔkaɣ nɛ pɔñɔʋ nɛ abalaa kpakɩɣ halaa nɛ halaa ñawalɩɣ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Nowee sʋ kpɩyʋʋ sɔsɔʋ taa yɔ.

eng: As soon as Jesus got out of the boat, a man possessed by an evil spirit came out of the tombs.
local: Yesu lɩnɩ kpɩyʋʋ taa nɛ etii lɛ, abalʋ nɔɔyʋ tɩlɩʋnɩ pɩlaŋ taa nɛ ewolo ɛ-cɔlɔ. Abalʋ ɛnʋ, aleewaa kɛwɛ ɛ-wayɩ.

eng: While he was serving as judge, his wife sent this message to him, Leave that righteous man alone. Ive suffered much today in a dream because of him.
local: Pilaatɩ kacaɣ tɔm ɖɩhʋyɛ. Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, ɛ-halʋ tiyi se peheyi-i se: «Taaɖʋ ñɔ-nɔɔ ɛyʋ kʋtʋʋzʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-tɔm taa. Monɖozi-i ɖeɖe ɖoó taa nɛ ɛ-tɔm labɩ-m kʋñɔŋ pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ.».

eng: The unclean spirit shook him and screamed, then it came out.
local: Eleeu ɛnʋ ɛma kubuka nɛ ɛñamsɩ abalʋ ɛnʋ pɩŋŋ nɛ ese ɛ-wayɩ.

eng: He said this because the legal experts were saying, Hes possessed by an evil spirit.
local: Yesu yɔɔdaɣ ḿbʋ́, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛyáa tɔŋaɣ se eleeu wɛ ɛ-wayɩ.

eng: When they saw him, they worshipped him, but some doubted.
local: Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, pana-ɩ nɛ poluŋ ɛ-tɛɛ nɛ paɖʋ-ɩ hɩɖɛ. Ɛlɛ́, pa-taa lɛlaa wɛɛ nɛ papʋtʋʋ pa-taa.

eng: But when Herod heard these rumors, he said, John, whom I beheaded, has been raised to life.
local: Eroodi nɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛtɔ se: «Manaɣ se Lɩm Sɔʋ Sɔnzɩ Laɖʋ Yohanɛɛsɩ weyi meyebi pɛsɛtɩ ɛ-ñʋʋ yɔ, ɛnʋ femna.».

eng: Dont you understand this parable? Then how will you understand all the parables?.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu pɔzɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se: «Yee ɩtanɩɩ eduuye ɖɩnɛ ɖɩ-tɔbʋʋ lɛ, ɛzɩma ɩlakɩ nɛ ɩnɩɩ lɛɛna tɔbʋʋ yɔ?».

eng: As they were eating he said, I assure you that one of you will betray me. .
local: Pɔtɔkaɣ lɛ, eheyi-wɛ se: «Toovenim lɛ, mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se: mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ kɔŋ-m kpaʋ nɛ ɛ́ɖʋzɩ koyindinaa nesi taa.».

eng: They didnt know what was happening until the flood came and swept them all away. The coming of the Human One will be like that.
local: Pataatɩlɩ se tɛʋ kɔŋ nɩʋ pʋɖɔɔ ḿbʋ́ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ lɩm suwa nɛ pasɩ patɩŋa payɩ yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pʋkɔŋ-wɛ tuduu alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ pɩsɩɣ ɛkɔɔ yɔ.

eng: This man lived among the tombs, and no one was ever strong enough to restrain him, even with a chain.
local: nɛ ɛwɛɛ pɩlaŋ taa, paa paahɔkɩ-ɩ ɛbɛ yɔ, ɛcɛkɩ-pʋ.

eng: But the chief priests and the elders persuaded the crowds to ask for Barabbas and kill Jesus.
local: Peeɖe cɔjɔnaa sɔsaa nɛ pɛ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa sɔsaa peheyi ɛyáa samaɣ se keheyi Pilaatɩ se eyele Baraabaasɩ nɛ pɩkazɩ pakʋ Yesu.

eng: Everyone was shaken and questioned among themselves, Whats this? A new teaching with authority! He even commands unclean spirits and they obey him.
local: Peeɖe pɩlabɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa piti pɩŋŋ nɛ pɔpɔzʋʋ ɖama se: «Ɛbɛ lɛ ḿbʋ́? Ɛwɩlɩɣ tɔm kɩfatʋ nɛ abalɩtʋ! Halɩ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ aleewaa nɛ pañaŋ-ɩ.».

eng: His mother and brothers arrived. They stood outside and sent word to him, calling for him.
local: Yesu yɔɔdaɣ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, e-ɖoo nɛ e-newaa patalɩ pasɩŋ awayɩ nɛ petiyi se payaa-ɩ.

eng: Jesus came near and spoke to them, Ive received all authority in heaven and on earth.
local: Peeɖe Yesu woba pɔ-cɔlɔ nɛ eheyi-wɛ se: «Ɛsɔ ha-m ɖoŋ tɩŋa payɩ ɛsɔdaa nɛ tataa.

eng: He said this because Herod himself had arranged to have John arrested and put in prison because of Herodias, the wife of Herods brother Philip. Herod had married her.
local: Lɩm Sɔʋ Sɔnzɩ Laɖʋ Yohanɛɛsɩ sɩm tɔm yɔ. Eroodi Antipasɩ kɛlɛɣ e-neu Filiipu halʋ Eroodiyaadɩ. Yohanɛɛsɩ heyi Eroodi se: «Pɩtaha nʋmɔʋ se ŋkpaɣ ñe-neu halʋ.» Peeɖe Eroodi ɛnʋ ɛ-maɣmaɣ eyeba nɛ pakpa Yohanɛɛsɩ, pɔhɔkɩ-ɩ nɛ paɖʋ-ɩ salaka.

eng: The farmer scatters the word.
local: Peeɖe ɛlɩzɩ-wɛ eduuye ńɖɩ́ ɖɩ-tɔbʋʋ se: «Abalʋ ɛnʋ, pʋwɛ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔtɔm ɛmɩzaa yɔ.

eng: Deeply saddened, each one said to him, Im not the one, am I, Lord.
local: Ɛyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa laŋa wɛɛkɩ pɩŋŋ nɛ pɔpɔzʋʋ-ɩ kʋɖʋm kʋɖʋm se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ! Ma na?» Ɛnɛ se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ! Ma na?».

eng: At that time there will be two men in the field. One will be taken and the other left.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ lɛ, abalaa naalɛ pɩzɩɣ pɛwɛɛ hayɩm taa nɛ pɩkpaɣ kʋɖʋm nɛ piyele lɛlʋ.

eng: He had been secured many times with leg irons and chains, but he broke the chains and smashed the leg irons. No one was tough enough to control him.
local: Pɛwɛɛ pakaŋ-ɩ kpasɩ ɛ-naŋgbanzɩ taa nɛ paɖɩɣ yoŋgbasɩ e-nesi taa nɛ ɛpʋʋtɩ pɩtɩŋa. Nɔɔyʋ fɛyɩ se ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛ-tɔm.

eng: The governor said, Which of the two do you want me to release to you? Barabbas, they replied.
local: Ɛtasɩ-wɛ pɔzʋʋ se: «Anɩ mi-liu wɛɛ se meyele pa-naalɛ pa-taa?» Pocosi-i se: «Baraabaasɩ!».

eng: Right away the news about him spread throughout the entire region of Galilee.
local: Kpaagbaa ḿbʋ́ lɛ, Yesu hɩɖɛ sɛɛ Galilee egeetiye tɩŋa taa payɩ.

eng: A crowd was seated around him, and those sent to him said, Look, your mother, brothers, and sisters are outside looking for you.
local: Ŋgʋ́, ɛyáa samaɣ kɛwɛ Yesu ɛnʋ ɛ-cɔlɔ. Peeɖe peheyi-i se: «Na, Ño-ɖoo nɛ ñe-newaa pɛwɛ awayɩ nɛ pañɩnɩɣ-ŋ.».

eng: Therefore, go and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit.
local: Iwolo ajɛya kpeekpe taa ɛyáa cɔlɔ nɛ ɩla nɛ papɩsɩ mɔn-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa nɛ ɩlabɩ-wɛ lɩm sɔʋ sɔnzɩ Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ nɛ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu pa-hɩɖɛ taa.

eng: So Herodias had it in for John. She wanted to kill him, but she couldnt.
local: Eroodiyaadɩ taasɔɔlɩ Yohanɛɛsɩ tɔm. Ɛñɩnaɣ se ɛkʋ-ɩ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛtapɩzɩɣ.

eng: This is the meaning of the seed that fell on the path: When the word is scattered and people hear it, right away Satan comes and steals the word that was planted in them.
local: Ɛyáa nabɛyɛ wɛɛ, panɩɣ Ɛsɔtɔm ńdʋ́ lɛ, Satanɩ tɩŋ ɛhɔɔzɩ-tʋ pa-taa. Ḿbá wɛna ɛzɩ nʋmɔʋ nɔɔ ɖenɖe pee tɔlaa yɔ.

eng: He replied, The one who will betray me is the one who dips his hand with me into this bowl.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ecosi-wɛ se: «Weyi ma nɛ ɩ ɖɩtɔkɩ ñanaɣ kʋɖʋmaɣ taa yɔ, ɛnʋ kɔŋnɩ-m kpaʋ nɛ ɛ́ɖʋzɩ koyindinaa nesi taa.

eng: Two women will be grinding at the mill. One will be taken and the other left.
local: Halaa naalɛ pɩzɩɣ pɛwɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ namɩyɛ yɔɔ nɛ pɩkpaɣ kʋɖʋm nɛ piyele lɛlʋ.

eng: Night and day in the tombs and the hills, he would howl and cut himself with stones.
local: Ɛwɛɛ ɛcɔʋ pɩlaŋ nɛ pʋŋ pɔ-yɔɔ wɩsɩ nɛ ɖoó nɛ ɛmakɩ kubusi nɛ ɛhɛdɩɣ ɛ-tɩ nɛ pɛɛ.

eng: Pilate said, Then what should I do with Jesus who is called Christ? They all said, Crucify him.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛpɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Mala Yesu weyi payaɣ se Krɩstʋ yɔ ɛzɩma?» Pocosi-i patɩŋa se: «Kam-ɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ!».

eng: After leaving the synagogue, Jesus, James, and John went home with Simon and Andrew.
local: Yesu nɛ Yakubu nɛ Yohanɛɛsɩ nɛ Siimɔɔ nɛ Andree palɩ Ɛsɔ ɖɩsɛyɛ taa lɛ, patɩŋ Siimɔɔ nɛ Andree pɛ-tɛ.

eng: He replied, Who is my mother? Who are my brothers? .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu pɩsɩna se: «Toovenim taa lɛ, anɩ lɛ mon-ɖoo nɛ mbá lɛ me-newaa?».

eng: teaching them to obey everything that Ive commanded you. Look, I myself will be with you every day until the end of this present age. .
local: Ɩkpɛlɩkɩ-wɛ nɛ pɔɖɔ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ maaɖʋ-mɩ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ. Ɩtɩlɩ se mɛwɛɣ mɩ-cɔlɔ kɩyakɩŋ tɩŋa nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kedeŋa tɛm wiye.».

eng: This was because Herod respected John. He regarded him as a righteous and holy person, so he protected him. Johns words greatly confused Herod, yet he enjoyed listening to him.
local: Wiyaʋ Eroodi seɣaɣ Yohanɛɛsɩ nɛ ɛɖaŋɩɣ ɛ-yɔɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛsɩm-ɩ se ɛkɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩnʋ weyi ɛtʋʋzaa yɔ. Ɛyɔɔdʋʋ tɔm nɛ Eroodi nɩɣ lɛ, pɩcɛyɩɣ-ɩ. Ŋgʋ́, e-liu kɛwɛɛ se ewelesini-i siŋŋ.

eng: Heres the meaning of the seed that fell on rocky ground: When people hear the word, they immediately receive it joyfully.
local: Mbá paba wɛ ɛzɩ ɛwaɣ ŋgá kɔ-yɔɔ pee tɔlaa yɔ, panɩɣ-tʋ lɛ, petisi kpaagbaa nɛ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ.

eng: The Human One goes to his death just as it is written about him. But how terrible it is for that person who betrays the Human One! It would have been better for him if he had never been born. .
local: Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ kɔŋ kʋyʋʋ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ ɛzɩ pamaʋ ɛ-tɔm Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, pʋtɔɔ weyi ɛɖʋzʋʋ-ɩ koyindinaa nesi taa yɔ! Yee pataalʋlɩ pʋdʋ yɔ, pɩɩkɩlɩ-ɩ sɛʋ.».

eng: Therefore, stay alert! You dont know what day the Lord is coming.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩcaɣnɩ mɩ-ɛsɛ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩtatɩlɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ mɩ-Kɩpaɣlʋ pɩsɩɣ ɛkɔɔ yɔ.

eng: When he saw Jesus from far away, he ran and knelt before him.
local: Elosi Yesu poliŋ taa lɛ, ɛkpaɣ seya nɛ ewolo eluŋ ɛ-tɛɛ.

eng: But he said, Why? What wrong has he done? They shouted even louder, Crucify him.
local: Peeɖe ɛtasɩ-wɛ pɔzʋʋ se: «Ɛlɛ́, kɩdɛkɛdɩm mbʋ́ kpem ɛlaba?» Pɛtɛzɩ kobusi mabʋ ɖoŋ se: «Kam-ɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ!».

eng: Simons mother-in-law was in bed, sick with a fever, and they told Jesus about her at once.
local: Kɩnamɩyɛ kakpa Siimɔɔ yɔsɔ nɛ ɛhɛnɩ. Patalaa lɛ, pakpaɣ halʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-wɩzasɩ tɔm nɛ peheyi Yesu.

eng: Looking around at those seated around him in a circle, he said, Look, here are my mother and my brothers.
local: Peeɖe ɛkʋsɩ ɛ-ɛsɛ nɛ ɛcɔnɩ ɛyáa mbá pacaɣ ɛ-cɔlɔ kpɛɛɛ yɔ nɛ ɛtɔ se: «Na! Mon-ɖoo nɛ me-newaa pɛwɛnɩ cɩnɛ!.

eng: Finally, the time was right. It was on one of Herods birthdays, when he had prepared a feast for his high-ranking officials and military officers and Galilees leading residents.
local: Wiyaʋ Eroodi lʋlʋʋ kazandʋ kɩyakʋ talaa lɛ, ɛ́yáa e-kewiyaɣ taa sɔsaa nɛ sɔɔjanaa sɔsaa nɛ Galilee egeetiye ñʋndɩnaa. Kazandʋ ńdʋ́ tɩhanɩ halʋ ɛnʋ waɖɛ.

eng: Because they have no roots, they last for only a little while. When they experience distress or abuse because of the word, they immediately fall away.
local: Ɛlɛ́, paayeki se tɩlabɩ-wɛ tʋmɩyɛ camɩyɛ. Pɔɖɔkʋʋ-tʋ nɛ kʋñɔŋ nakʋyʋ talɩ-wɛ yaa pɛwɛɛ pa-wayɩ kaŋ kaŋ tɩ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɔtɔlɩ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa.

eng: Now Judas, who would betray him, replied, Its not me, is it, Rabbi? Jesus answered, You said it. .
local: Peeɖe Yudaasɩ weyi ɛɖʋzʋʋ-ɩ koyindinaa nesi taa yɔ, ɛpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Wɩlɩyʋ! Ma na?» Ɛlɛ́, Yesu cosi-i se: «Ñɔyɔɔdʋʋnɩ ḿbʋ́.».

eng: shouting, What have you to do with me, Jesus, Son of the Most High God? Swear to God that you wont torture me.
local: Nɛ ɛyɔɔdɩ ɖoŋ se: «Ɛsɔ Caabiyuu Pɩyalʋ Yesu, ma nɛ ŋ se we? Ɛsɔ ɖoŋ taa lɛ, mentendiɣ-ŋ se ŋtaaɖʋ-m kʋñɔŋ.».

eng: But you understand that if the head of the house knew at what time the thief would come, he would keep alert and wouldnt allow the thief to break into his house.
local: Ɩtɩlɩ ɖɔɖɔ se yee ɖɩɣa tʋ ɛɛsɩm alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mɩ́lʋ́ woki-i mɩlʋ́ʋ ɖoó taa yɔ yɔ, eeyeba ɖou nɛ ɛɖaŋ-ɩ kpam se ɛtaasʋʋ ɛ-ɖɩɣa taa.

eng: Whoever does Gods will is my brother, sister, and mother. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, weyi ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ, ɛnʋ lɛ me-neu yaa mon-ɖoo.».

eng: Pilate saw that he was getting nowhere and that a riot was starting. So he took water and washed his hands in front of the crowd. Im innocent of this mans blood, he said. Its your problem.
local: Pilaatɩ nawa se paa ɛwɛɛ ɛyɔɔdʋʋ, pɩɩlɛɣzɩɣ pʋyʋ, ɛlɛ́, pɩtɛzɩɣ miŋ saʋ kɩsaʋ. Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ʋ́ etiyaa se pɔkɔnɩ-ɩ lɩm. Pɔkɔnɩ-pʋ lɛ, ɛsɩŋ ɛyáa ɛsɩndaa nɛ ɛsaŋ e-nesi nɛ ɛtɔ se: «Pɩtɛkɛ mɔntɔmna se pakʋ ɛyʋ kʋtʋʋzʋ ɛnɛ! Mɩ-cɔlɔ lɛ!».

eng: He went to her, took her by the hand, and raised her up. The fever left her, and she served them.
local: Peeɖe Yesu woba ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛ́ɖɔ́kɩ e-nesi taa ɛkʋsɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛ-kʋdɔŋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩcɛ nɛ ɛkʋyɩ ɛha-wɛ lɩm.

eng: Herods daughter Herodias came in and danced, thrilling Herod and his dinner guests. The king said to the young woman, Ask me whatever you wish, and I will give it to you.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛ-pɛlɛ sʋ ɖenɖe ɛyáa caɣaɣ yɔ nɛ ɛpaa nɛ pɩla wiyaʋ Eroodi nɛ ɛyáa ḿbá leleŋ. Peeɖe Eroodi heyi pɛlɛ ɛnʋ se: «Pɔzɩ-m mbʋ́ ŋsɔɔlaa yɔ, mahaɣ-ŋ-pʋ.».

eng: Others are like the seed scattered among the thorny plants. These are the ones who have heard the word;.
local: Lɛlaa wɛ ɛzɩ kpaŋsɔɔ taa ɖenɖe pee tɔlaa yɔ. Pɛtɛŋ Ɛsɔtɔm nɩʋ lɛ.

eng: While they were eating, Jesus took bread, blessed it, broke it, and gave it to the disciples and said, Take and eat. This is my body. .
local: Yesu nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa pɔtɔkaɣ tɔɔnaɣ lɛ, ɛkpaɣ tindine nɛ ɛsɛɛ ɖɩ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛcɩyɩ-ɖɩ nɛ ɛcɛlɩ-wɛ se: «Ɩmʋ nɛ ɩtɔɔ, pʋnɛ lɛ mon-tomnaɣ.».

eng: He said this because Jesus had already commanded him, Unclean spirit, come out of the man! .
local: Ɛyɔɔdɩ tɔm ńdʋ́, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Yesu holini aleewaa ḿbá se: «Ise abalʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-wayɩ.».

eng: Therefore, you also should be prepared, because the Human One will come at a time you dont know.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, mɩ ɖɔɖɔ ɩñɔɔzɩ mɩ-tɩ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ pɩsɩɣ ɛkɔɔ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɩtamaɣzɩ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ.».

eng: All the people replied, Let his blood be on us and on our children.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛyáa samaɣ tɔ se: «Ɛ-sɩm sʋʋtʋ ɛpɩsɩ ɖa nɛ ɖe-piya ɖɔ-yɔɔ!».

eng: That evening, at sunset, people brought to Jesus those who were sick or demon-possessed.
local: Wɩsɩ ɖʋwa lɛ, pakpaɣ kʋdɔndɩnaa nɛ ɛyáa mbá pa-wayɩ wɛ aleewaa yɔ nɛ powoni-wɛ Yesu cɔlɔ Siimɔɔ nɛ Andree pɛ-tɛ peeɖe.

eng: but the worries of this life, the false appeal of wealth, and the desire for more things break in and choke the word, and it bears no fruit.
local: kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ lɩmaɣza wena akʋʋ ɛyáa yɔ nɛ ñɩm mbʋ́ pɩcɛtɩɣ ɛyáa yɔ pɩ-lɩmaɣza nɛ mbʋ́ mbʋ́ ɛyáa liu wɛɛ se pɛwɛna kpem yɔ pɩ-lɩmaɣza sʋʋ pa-taa nɛ pɩɖɩɣ-tʋ nʋmɔʋ nɛ paawɛɣnɩ kɛzɛɣa.

eng: Then he swore to her, Whatever you ask I will give to you, even as much as half of my kingdom.
local: Ɛlɛ́, eɖuu ɛyáa tɩŋa ɛsɩndaa se: «Paa men-kewiyaɣ hɔɔlʋʋ ŋpɔzɩ-m yɔ, mahaɣ-ŋ.».

eng: He took a cup, gave thanks, and gave it to them, saying, Drink from this, all of you.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛkpaɣ sʋlʋm nɛ caɖaɣ nɛ ɛsɛɛ pʋ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛcɛlɩ-wɛ nɛ ɛtɔ se: «Ɩmʋ nɛ ɩñɔɔ mɩtɩŋa payɩ.

eng: Jesus asked him, What is your name? He responded, Legion is my name, because we are many.
local: Peeɖe Yesu pɔzɩ abalʋ ɛnʋ se: «Payaɣ-ŋ se we?» Ecosi-i se: «Payaɣ-m se you laɖaa tikaɣ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩɖɔwa.».

eng: Who then are the faithful and wise servants whom their master puts in charge of giving food at the right time to those who live in his house?.
local: Yesu tɛm yɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛpɔzɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se: «Akɛ tʋmlaɖʋ kɩbanʋ weyi ɛwɛ lɛɣtʋ yɔ? Ɛnʋ lɛ weyi ɛ-caa yekini-i ɖɩɣa se ɛcɔŋnɩ kɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛcɛlɩɣ tʋmlaɖaa lɛlaa tɔɔnaɣ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pʋmʋnaa yɔ.

eng: Then he released Barabbas to them. He had Jesus whipped, then handed him over to be crucified.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛlɩzɩ Baraabaasɩ nɛ eyele polu Yesu agbazɛɛ nɛ ɛkpaɣ-ɩ ɛcɛlɩ-wɛ se powoni-i pakam-ɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ.

eng: The whole town gathered near the door.
local: Tɛtʋ taa ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ kpeɣli ɖɩɣa ŋ́gá kɔ-nɔnɔɔ taa lɛ.

eng: The seed scattered on good soil are those who hear the word and embrace it. They bear fruit, in one case a yield of thirty to one, in another case sixty to one, and in another case one hundred to one. .
local: Lɛlaa ñɛwɛ ɛzɩ tɛtʋ kɩbandʋ ndʋ́ tɩ-taa pee tɔlaa nɛ añɔ nɛ pɩpaɣlɩ tɩŋ nɛ ɩlʋlɩ pee yɔ: lɛɛkʋ lʋlɩ pee niidozo, lɛɛkʋ nɩɩnʋwa nɛ hiu nɛ lɛɛkʋ mɩnʋʋ. Panɩ Ɛsɔtɔm nɛ pɔ́ɖɔ́kɩ-tʋ camɩyɛ nɛ pʋwazɩ ɛyáa.».

eng: She left the banquet hall and said to her mother, What should I ask for? John the Baptists head, Herodias replied.
local: Peeɖe pɛlɛ ɛnʋ ɛlɩ tamɩyɛ nɛ ewolo ɛpɔzɩ e-ɖoo se: «Mɔnpɔzɩ-ɩ ɛbɛ?» Ɛ́lɛ́ cosi-i se: «Pɔzɩ-ɩ se ɛha-ŋ Lɩm Sɔʋ Sɔnzɩ Laɖʋ Yohanɛɛsɩ ñʋʋ.».

eng: This is my blood of the covenant, which is poured out for many so that their sins may be forgiven.
local: Sʋlʋm pʋnɛ lɛ man-calɩm mbʋ́ pɩkpɛdɩɣ ɛyáa sakɩyɛ yɔɔ se Ɛsɔ ɛpɩzɩ ekpeɣ-wɛ pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛtɩŋɩɣna nɛ ɛɖʋ nɔɔ haʋ.

eng: They pleaded with Jesus not to send them out of that region.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ewiini Yesu cɔɔɔ se ɛtaaɖɔɔnɩ aleewaa ḿbá Geraazaa ɛjaɖɛ ńɖɩ́ ɖɩ-taa.

eng: Happy are those servants whom the master finds fulfilling their responsibilities when he comes.
local: Tʋmlaɖʋ weyi ɛ-caa pɩsɩɣ nɛ ɛmaɣnɩ ɛɖɔŋ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ labʋ yɔ, ehiɣ ɛ-tɩ!.

eng: The governors soldiers took Jesus into the governors house, and they gathered the whole company of soldiers around him.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, sɔɔjanaa woni Yesu Pilaatɩ tɛ kadaɣ taa. Peeɖe powobi patɩŋa payɩ nɛ pekpeɣlini-i.

eng: The Pharisees and some legal experts from Jerusalem gathered around Jesus.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Farɩsɩ ñɩma nɛ Yuda ñɩma paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa nabɛyɛ palɩɩnɩ Yeruusalɛm nɛ powolo pekpeɣli Yesu cɔlɔ.

eng: He healed many who were sick with all kinds of diseases, and he threw out many demons. But he didnt let the demons speak, because they recognized him.
local: Yesu la nɛ kʋdɔndɩnaa sakɩyɛ ndɩ ndɩ yɔɔ cɛ nɛ ɛɖɔɔnɩ aleewaa tɩŋa payɩ. Ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛtɛm naʋ se aleewaa sɩma se ɛnʋ lɛ Weyi Ɛsɔ Lɩzaa Yɔ lɛ, etetisi se pokuli ɛ-wayɩ.

eng: Jesus said to them, Does anyone bring in a lamp in order to put it under a basket or a bed? Shouldnt it be placed on a lampstand?.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu pɔzɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se: «Pɔsɔkɩ kanɖʋ lɛ, le pasɩɣ-kʋ? Paapaŋ-kʋ ɖaakuɖe tɛɛ. Paasʋzʋʋ-kʋ kaɖʋ tɛɛ. Ɛlɛ́, pasɩɣ-kʋ ɖenɖe pʋkʋyɩ camɩyɛ ñaba yɔ nɛ pɩna paa le ñammm.

eng: Hurrying back to the ruler, she made her request: I want you to give me John the Baptists head on a plate, right this minute.
local: Ɛtɩpɩsɩ wiyaʋ cɔlɔ lɛ, eheyi-i se: «Mancaɣ se ŋɖʋ Lɩm Sɔʋ Sɔnzɩ Laɖʋ Yohanɛɛsɩ ñʋʋ ñanaɣ taa lɛɛlɛɛyɔ nɛ ŋcɛlɩ-m.».

eng: I tell you, I wont drink wine again until that day when I drink it in a new way with you in my Fathers kingdom. .
local: Mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se pɩkpaɣʋnɩ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ, maatasɩɣ sʋlʋm pʋnɛ ñɔʋ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ma nɛ mɩ ɖɩñɔ sʋlʋm kɩfam man-Caa Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa yɔ.».

eng: A large herd of pigs was feeding on the hillside.
local: Ŋgʋ́, afanaa tikaɣ nakɛyɛ kɛwɛ pɔ-cɔlɔ peeɖe pʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ kacazɩɣ tɔɔnaɣ.

eng: I assure you that he will put them in charge of all his possessions.
local: Toovenim lɛ, mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se: ɖɩɣa tʋ ɛnʋ, eyekini-i ɛ-ñɩm tɩŋa se ɛcɔnɩ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: They stripped him and put a red military coat on him.
local: nɛ pɔhɔzɩ e-wondu nɛ posuu-i awiitoko kɩsɛmʋʋ waaa.

eng: They saw some of his disciples eating food with unclean hands. They were eating without first ritually purifying their hands through washing.
local: Peeɖe pana ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa lɛlaa tɔkaɣ tɔɔnaɣ nɛ patasaŋ pe-nesi ɛzɩ paɖʋʋ pɔ-sɔnzɩ taa se pala yɔ.

eng: Early in the morning, well before sunrise, Jesus rose and went to a deserted place where he could be alone in prayer.
local: Yesu fem kajalaɣ kalɩmaŋ kou nɛ ɛlɩɩ lɛ, ewolo ɖenɖe ɛyáa fɛyɩ yɔ nɛ ɛpazɩ Ɛsɔ sɛʋ.

eng: Everything hidden will be revealed, and everything secret will come out into the open.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ ɛyáa mɛsaɣ tɛɛ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ, pʋkɔŋ pʋ-yɔɔ kuluu nɛ paa weyi ɛna.

eng: Although the king was upset, because of his solemn pledge and his guests, he didnt want to refuse her.
local: Wiyaʋ Eroodi nɩ tɔm ńdʋ́ lɛ, ɛ-taa tala leleŋ. Ŋgʋ́, ɛtɛm ɖuúu agɔmaa tɩŋa ɛsɩndaa. Pɩfɛyɩ se ekizi.

eng: Then, after singing songs of praise, they went to the Mount of Olives.
local: Ɛtɛm-wɛ heyuu ḿbʋ́ lɛ, petee kazandʋ hendu nɛ pɛɖɛɛ pakpa Somiŋ Pʋʋ yɔɔ.

eng: Send us into the pigs! they begged. Let us go into the pigs.
local: Peeɖe aleewaa ḿbá petendi Yesu se: «Ha-ɖʋ nʋmɔʋ nɛ ɖiwolo ɖɩsʋʋ afanaa taa.».

eng: But suppose those bad servants should say to themselves, My master wont come until later.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee tʋmlaɖʋ ɛnʋ ɛkɛ ɛzaɣ́ʋ nɛ pɩcɩbɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛɖʋ ɛ-taa se ɛ-caa ɛɛkaɣ kɔm lɔŋ.

eng: They twisted together a crown of thorns and put it on his head. They put a stick in his right hand. Then they bowed down in front of him and mocked him, saying, Hey! King of the Jews.
local: nɛ palʋʋ awiya hulaɣ nɛ sɔɔɔ nɛ papam-ɩ nɛ pɛcɛlɩ-ɩ ɖaʋ nɛ ɛ́ɖɔ́kɩ e-nesi kɩbanzɩ taa ɛzɩ wiyaʋ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, papazɩ ɛ-tɛɛ luŋuu nɛ pɛsɛɣ-ɩ nɛ woŋa se: «Yuda ñɩma wiyaʋ sɔsɔ! Sɛɛ ɖeu!».

eng: The Pharisees and all the Jews dont eat without first washing their hands carefully. This is a way of observing the rules handed down by the elders.
local: Ŋgʋ́, Farɩsɩ ñɩma nɛ Yuda ñɩma lɛlaa tɩŋa pɔɖɔkɩ pɔ-cɔzɔnaa sɔnzɩ. Sɔnzɩ ńzɩ́ sɩpɔzʋʋ se pasaŋ camɩyɛ nɛ pʋcɔ pɔtɔɔ.

eng: Simon and those with him tracked him down.
local: Peeɖe Siimɔɔ nɛ ɛ-taabalaa papazɩ-ɩ ñɩnʋʋ.

eng: Whoever has ears to listen should pay attention! .
local: Weyi ɛwɛnɩ nɩŋgbaaŋ lɛ, ɛnɩɩ.».

eng: So he ordered a guard to bring Johns head. The guard went to the prison, cut off Johns head.
local: Peeɖe etiyi ɛ-sabaabi lɛlʋ kpaagbaa se: «Wolo ŋsɛtɩ Yohanɛɛsɩ ñʋʋ nɛ ŋkɔna.» Ɛ́lɛ́ wolo salaka taa nɛ ɛsɛtɩ-kʋ.

eng: Then Jesus said to his disciples, Tonight you will all fall away because of me. This is because it is written, I will hit the shepherd, and the sheep of the flock will go off in all directions .
local: Yesu nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa pakpa peeɖe lɛ, eheyi-wɛ se: «Iseɣ mɩtɩŋa payɩ nɛ iyebi-m ɖoó anɛ a-taa maɣmaɣ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ yɔɔdaa nɛ pama ɛ-Tɔm Takayaɣ taa se: ‹Mamakɩ ninɖiɣyu sɩbʋ yɔɔ sɩbʋ yɔɔ, nɛ piyele heŋ mɩzɩ ɖama.›.

eng: Jesus gave them permission, so the unclean spirits left the man and went into the pigs. Then the herd of about two thousand pigs rushed down the cliff into the lake and drowned.
local: Peeɖe Yesu tisaa nɛ aleewaa ḿbá pese abalʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-wayɩ nɛ powolo pasʋʋ pa-taa nɛ paba kpaɣ seya nɛ petii pafalɩ teŋgu taa nɛ pɔñɔɔ lɩm nɛ pasɩ. Afanaa ḿbá, patalɩ ɛzɩ kutokiŋ naalɛ yɔ.

eng: And suppose they began to beat their fellow servants and to eat and drink with the drunks?.
local: nɛ ɛ nɛ sʋlʋm kpaŋɩyaa pɔtɔkɩ nɛ pɔñɔʋ nɛ ɛsʋʋ ɛ-taabalaa tʋmlaɖaa lɛlaa mabʋ yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: After they spit on him, they took the stick and struck his head again and again.
local: Nɛ pɔtɔʋ ɛ-yɔɔ ndaatʋ nɛ pamʋʋ ɖaʋ ŋgʋ́ paacɛlɩ-ɩ yɔ nɛ pamakɩ ɛ-ñʋʋ taa.

eng: Upon returning from the marketplace, they dont eat without first immersing themselves. They observe many other rules that have been handed down, such as the washing of cups, jugs, pans, and sleeping mats.
local: Yee palɩnɩ kɩyakʋ nɛ pɔtɔsɔ lɩm yɔ, paatɔkɩ. Pañalɩɣ caɖasɩ nɛ ɖeɣsi nɛ ñɩɣtʋ wondu nɛ palakɩ lakasɩ lɛɛsɩ sakɩyɛ ɛzɩ caánaʋ́ taa ñɩma yɔ.

eng: When they found him, they told him, Everyones looking for you.
local: Pana-ɩ lɛ, peheyi-i se: «Ɛyáa tɩŋa ñɩnɩɣ-ŋ.».

eng: He said to them, Listen carefully! God will evaluate you with the same standard you use to evaluate others. Indeed, you will receive even more.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Iwelesi tɔm ndʋ́ meheyiɣ-mɩ yɔ camɩyɛ nɛ ɩɖɔkɩ-tʋ. Mbʋ́ mɩ-maɣmaɣ ɩmaɣzɩɣna nɛ ɩɖʋʋ lɛlaa yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ Ɛsɔ kɔŋ-mɩ maɣzɩnaʋ nɛ halɩ ɛsɔzɩ-mɩ.

eng: brought his head on a plate, and gave it to the young woman, and she gave it to her mother.
local: nɛ ɛɖʋ ñanaɣ taa nɛ ewoni ɛcɛlɩ pɛlɛ ɛnʋ nɛ ɛ́lɛ́ woni ɛcɛlɩ e-ɖoo.

eng: But after Im raised up, Ill go before you to Galilee. .
local: Yesu tasɩ yɔɔdʋʋ se: «Ɛlɛ́, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ menfeŋ yɔ, manɖaŋɩɣ-mɩ Galilee.».

eng: Those who tended the pigs ran away and told the story in the city and in the countryside. People came to see what had happened.
local: Peeɖe afanaa ḿbá pɔ-yɔɔ cɔnɩyaa sewa kpaagbaa nɛ powolo peheyi tɛtʋ taa ɛyáa nɛ tɛyɛ yɔɔ ñɩma nɛ patɩŋa powolo se pana mbʋ́ pɩlaba yɔ.

eng: The master of those servants will come on a day when they are not expecting him, at a time they couldnt predict.
local: ɖɩɣa tʋ ɛnʋ, ɛkɔŋ kɩyakʋ nakʋyʋ ñɩ́ɣ́yʋ́ʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛtatɩlɩ yɔ kʋ-yɔɔ nɛ etudi-i.

eng: When they finished mocking him, they stripped him of the military coat and put his own clothes back on him. They led him away to crucify him.
local: Pɛtɛm-ɩ tɛtɛ pɛŋʋʋ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɔhɔzɩ toko kɩsɛmʋʋ ŋ́gʋ́ nɛ papɩsɩnɩ e-wondu posuu-i nɛ powoni-i se pakam-ɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ.

eng: So the Pharisees and legal experts asked Jesus, Why are your disciples not living according to the rules handed down by the elders but instead eat food with ritually unclean hands.
local: Farɩsɩ ñɩma nɛ Yuda ñɩma paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa ḿbá pɔpɔzɩ Yesu se: «Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma ñɔ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa yele ɖɔ-cɔzɔnaa sɔnzɩ? Se we nɛ paasaŋɩɣ pʋcɔ pɔtɔkɩ?».

eng: He replied, Lets head in the other direction, to the nearby villages, so that I can preach there too. Thats why Ive come. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu cosi-wɛ se: «Đɩcɔɔ tɛtʋ lɛɛtʋ taa nɛ monsusi Ɛsɔtɔm ɖɔɖɔ. Pɩ-maɣmaɣ pʋ-yɔɔ mɔnkɔma.».

eng: Those who have will receive more, but as for those who dont have, even what they dont have will be taken away from them. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pʋwɛ ɛzɩ pɔtɔŋʋʋ se: ‹Weyi ɛwɛna, pɔsɔzɩ-ɩ nɛ weyi ɛ́lɛ́ fɛyɩna yɔ, halɩ pɛtɛzɩɣ lɛɣʋ mbʋ́ ɛmaɣzɩɣ se ɛwɛna yɔ› yɔ.».

eng: When Johns disciples heard what had happened, they came and took his dead body and laid it in a tomb.
local: Yohanɛɛsɩ tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa nɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, powolo pakpaɣ-ɩ nɛ pepi.

eng: Peter replied, If everyone else stumbles because of you, Ill never stumble.
local: Peeɖe Pɩyɛ heyi-i se: «Paa lɛlaa eseɣ patɩŋa se peyebi-ŋ yɔ, ma maalakɩ ḿbʋ́ kaʋ!».

eng: They came to Jesus and saw the man who used to be demon-possessed. They saw the very man who had been filled with many demons sitting there fully dressed and completely sane, and they were filled with awe.
local: Patalɩ Yesu cɔlɔ lɛ, pamaɣnɩ abalʋ weyi aleewaa tikaɣ kɛwɛ ɛ-wayɩ yɔ, esu wondu nɛ ɛcaɣ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛ-kpaaŋ cɛba. Peeɖe sɔɔndʋ kpa-wɛ.

eng: He will cut them in pieces and put them in a place with the hypocrites. People there will be weeping and grinding their teeth.
local: nɛ ɛɖʋ-ɩ kʋñɔŋ siŋŋ ɛzɩ palakʋʋ tɛɛ nɛ pʋ-yɔɔ ñɩma yɔ. Peeɖe ewiliɣ nɛ ɛsalɩ e-kela.».

eng: As they were going out, they found Simon, a man from Cyrene. They forced him to carry his cross.
local: Palɩɣaɣnɩ Yesu tɛtʋ wayɩ se pakam-ɩ lɛ, pakatɩ Siirɛɛnɩ abalʋ nɔɔyʋ nɛ pakpa-ɩ se ɛsɩɣlɩ Yesu kaamaŋkaɣ, payaɣ-ɩ se Siimɔɔ.

eng: He replied, Isaiah really knew what he was talking about when he prophesied about you hypocrites. He wrote, This people honors me with their lips, but their hearts are far away from me.
local: Yesu cosi-wɛ se: «Tɛɛ nɛ pʋ-yɔɔ ñɩma mɩ! Mɩ lɛ mbá Ɛsɔ yɔɔdɩ pɔ-tɔm nɛ Ezaayii susi-tʋ camɩyɛ nɛ ɛma ɛ-takayaɣ taa yɔ. Ńdʋ́ lɛ se: ‹Ɛyáa panɛ pasaŋ-m nɛ nɔɔ yem. Pa-laŋa taa lɛ, pɔtɔsɔɔlɩ-m paa ñɩɩɩ.

eng: He traveled throughout Galilee, preaching in their synagogues and throwing out demons.
local: Peeɖe ɛpazɩ cɔʋ Galilee egeetiye tɩŋa taa nɛ esusuu Ɛsɔtɔm Ɛsɔ ɖɩsɛyɛ ndɩ ndɩ taa nɛ ɛɖɔɔnʋʋ aleewaa ɖɔɖɔ ɛyáa wayɩ.

eng: Then Jesus said, This is what Gods kingdom is like. Its as though someone scatters seed on the ground.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu tasɩ yɔɔdʋʋ se: «Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ kɔm wɛ ɛzɩ ɛyʋ ɖúu ɖomaɣ ɛ-hayɩm taa yɔ.

eng: The apostles returned to Jesus and told him everything they had done and taught.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu tiyiyaa pɩsɩ pekpeɣli ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ pɛkɛdɩ-ɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ palaba yɔ nɛ tɔm ndʋ́ pawɩlaa yɔ.

eng: Jesus said to him, I assure you that, before the rooster crows tonight, you will deny me three times. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu heyi-i se: «Toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-ŋ se ɖoó anɛ a-taa maɣmaɣ, pʋcɔ kalɩmɔʋ koo lɛ, ŋkpɛzɩɣ tam naadozo se ŋtasɩm-m.».

eng: Those who had actually seen what had happened to the demon-possessed man told the others about the pigs.
local: nɛ mbá paawɛɛ nɛ pana yɔ, pɛkɛdɩ mbá patana yɔ mbʋ́ pɩlaba nɛ aleewaa se ɛ-wayɩ yɔ nɛ mbʋ́ pɩlabɩ afanaa ɖɔɖɔ yɔ.

eng: When they came to a place called Golgotha, which means Skull Place.
local: Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, patalɩ ɖenɖe payaɣ se Goligota yɔ, pʋ-tɔbʋʋ se ñʋmbɔɔyaɣ lone.

eng: A man with a skin disease approached Jesus, fell to his knees, and begged, If you want, you can make me clean.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, canaɣ nakɛyɛ wolo Yesu cɔlɔ nɛ koluŋ ɛ-tɛɛ nɛ ketendi-i se: «Yee ŋtisiɣ yɔ, ŋla nɛ mɔ-yɔɔ cɛ nɛ manpɩsɩ ɛyʋ weyi ɛmʋnaa yɔ.».

eng: Many people were coming and going, so there was no time to eat. He said to the apostles, Come by yourselves to a secluded place and rest for a while.
local: Mbá powokaɣ ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ pɛɖɛɣ yɔ, pɔɖɔwa pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ lɛ, ɛ nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa petehiɣ nʋmɔʋ se pɔtɔɔ tɔɔnaɣ. Pʋ-yɔɔ eheyi-wɛ se: «Ɩkɔɔ ɖɩkɛzɩ ɖa-tɩ ɖenɖe ɛyáa fɛyɩ yɔ nɛ ɖɩhɛzɩ pazɩ.».

eng: Then they pleaded with Jesus to leave their region.
local: Peeɖe ɛyáa sʋ Yesu tenduu yɔɔ se ɛkʋyɩ pɛ-ɛjaɖɛ taa.

eng: Their worship of me is empty since they teach instructions that are human words.
local: Pasaŋ-m nɛ palaɣ-m kɩlaŋ, ɛlɛ́ pɩfɛyɩ-m kɛzɛɣa nakɛyɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, paɣtʋ ndʋ́ pawɩlɩɣnɩ abalɩtʋ yɔ, tɩkɛ ɛyáa paɣtʋ nɛ papɩsɩ-tʋ ɛzɩ ma-ñɩndʋ yɔ nɛ pawɩlɩɣ.› ».

eng: then sleeps and wakes night and day. The seed sprouts and grows, but the farmer doesnt know how.
local: Ɛtɛŋ-kɛ ɖúú lɛ, ɛwɛɛ yem nɛ kɔñɔ nɛ kapaɣlɩɣ. Eeɖiɣziɣni ɛzɩma pɩlakɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ.

eng: Peter said, Even if I must die alongside you, I wont deny you. All the disciples said the same thing.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Pɩyɛ heyi-i se: «Paa sɩm yɔ, ma nɛ ŋ ɖɩsɩ, maakpɛzɩɣ kaʋ se mantasɩm-ŋ.» Ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa lɛlaa yɔɔdɩ patɩŋa ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: they gave Jesus wine mixed with vinegar to drink. But after tasting it, he didnt want to drink it.
local: Ɛlɛ́, pɛcɛlɩ-ɩ sʋlʋm se ɛñɔɔ, paasidi pɩ-taa kɔyɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩwɛ ñaŋ yɔ. Ɛɖɩŋ-pʋ lɛ, ekizi se ɛɛñɔʋ.

eng: Incensed, Jesus reached out his hand, touched him, and said, I do want to. Be clean. .
local: Peeɖe kɔ-tɔm labɩ Yesu pʋtɔdɩyɛ pɩŋŋ nɛ ɛkʋsɩ e-nesi nɛ etukuni-kɛ nɛ eheyi-kɛ se: «Mentisaa, pɩsɩ ɛyʋ weyi ɛmʋnaa yɔ.».

eng: They departed in a boat by themselves for a deserted place.
local: Peeɖe pasʋ kpɩyʋʋ taa se pɛɖɛɣ.

eng: While he was climbing into the boat, the one who had been demon-possessed pleaded with Jesus to let him come along as one of his disciples.
local: Yesu woba se ɛkpaɣ kpɩyʋʋ taa lɛ, abalʋ ɛnʋ etendi-i se ɛtɩŋɩɣ-ɩ nɛ ɛwɛɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ.

eng: You ignore Gods commandment while holding on to rules created by humans and handed down to you. .
local: Peeɖe Yesu heyi-wɛ se: «Iyebi Ɛsɔ paɣtʋ nɛ ɩnɩɣnɩ ndʋ́ ɛyáa maɣmaɣ ɖʋwa yɔ.».

eng: The earth produces crops all by itself, first the stalk, then the head, then the full head of grain.
local: Tɛtʋ maɣmaɣ lakɩna nɛ pɩpaɣlɩ. Pɩcalɩɣnɩ hɔʋ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pʋñɔ. Pʋwayɩ lɛ, pɩlɩɩ hatʋ nɛ pɩpaɣlɩ nɛ pʋtʋlɩ ñʋŋ nɛ pɩpazɩ pee ɖʋʋ.

eng: Then Jesus went with his disciples to a place called Gethsemane. He said to the disciples, Stay here while I go and pray over there. .
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa patalɩ ɖenɖe payaɣ se Jesemaanɩ yɔ. Peeɖe eheyi ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se: «Ɩcaɣ cɩnɛ nɛ mowolo mɛnsɛɛ Ɛsɔ nɛ mɔnkɔɔ.».

eng: After they crucified him, they divided up his clothes among them by drawing lots.
local: Peeɖe sɔɔjanaa kpa-ɩ pakam-ɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ nɛ pɩsɛɣ paɖʋ miika nɛ patayɩ ɖama e-wondu.

eng: Instantly, the skin disease left him, and he was clean.
local: Ɛlɛ́, canaɣ ŋ́gá kɔ-yɔɔ tɩcɛbʋ nɛ kapɩsɩ ɛyʋ weyi ɛmʋnaa yɔ.

eng: Many people saw them leaving and recognized them, so they ran ahead from all the cities and arrived before them.
local: Pɛɖɛɣaɣ lɛ, ɛyáa sakɩyɛ losi-wɛ nɛ pasɩm-wɛ kpaagbaa. Peeɖe pakpaɣ seya nɛ tɛtʋ ndɩ ndɩ taa nɛ pɛlɛyɩ-wɛ talʋʋ ɖenɖe powokaɣ yɔ.

eng: But Jesus wouldnt allow it. Go home to your own people, Jesus said, and tell them what the Lord has done for you and how he has shown you mercy. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu kizi nɛ eheyi-i se: «Pɩsɩ ñɛ-tɛ ña-ñɩma cɔlɔ nɛ ŋkɛdɩ-wɛ mbʋ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ na ña-pʋtɔdɩyɛ nɛ ɛlabɩ-ŋ yɔ.».

eng: Jesus continued, Clearly, you are experts at rejecting Gods commandment in order to establish these rules.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛtasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ɩñaɣ pana nɛ iyele Ɛsɔ paɣtʋ kɩbandʋ nɛ ɩpazɩnɩ mɩ-maɣmaɣ mɩ-ñɩndʋ wɩlʋʋ.

eng: Whenever the crop is ready, the farmer goes out to cut the grain because its harvesttime. .
local: Pee ana apɩɣ lɛ, pakpaɣ loozonaa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, kʋmtʋ talaa.».

eng: When he took Peter and Zebedees two sons, he began to feel sad and anxious.
local: Ɛɖɛɣaɣ lɛ, ɛ́yáa Pɩyɛ nɛ Zebedee pɩyalaa naalɛ. Pɛɖɛ tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa lɛlaa yɔɔ pazɩ lɛ, ɛ-laŋɩyɛ wɛɛkɩ nɛ sɔɔndʋ kpa-ɩ.

eng: They sat there, guarding him.
local: Pɛtɛma lɛ, pacaɣ peeɖe nɛ paɖaŋ ɛ-yɔɔ.

eng: Sternly, Jesus sent him away.
local: nɛ Yesu heyi-i se ɛɖɛɛ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛka ɛ-ñʋʋ taa se:.

eng: When Jesus arrived and saw a large crowd, he had compassion on them because they were like sheep without a shepherd. Then he began to teach them many things.
local: Yesu lɩnɩ kpɩyʋʋ taa nɛ etii lɛ, ɛmaɣnɩ ɛyáa samaɣ nɛ pɩlabɩ-ɩ pʋtɔdɩyɛ pɩŋŋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛmaɣzɩnɩ-wɛ nɛ heŋ weyi ɩfɛyɩnɩ ninɖiɣyu yɔ. Peeɖe ɛpazɩ-wɛ wɩlʋʋ Ɛsɔtɔm ndɩ ndɩ.

eng: The man went away and began to proclaim in the Ten Cities all that Jesus had done for him, and everyone was amazed.
local: Ɛɖɛwa lɛ, ɛpazɩ susuu mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa Yesu labɩ-ɩ yɔ Tɛtʋ Hiu Egeetiye taa nɛ ɛyáa mbá patɩŋa payɩ panɩwa yɔ, pɩlabɩ-wɛ piti.

eng: Moses said, Honor your father and your mother, and The person who speaks against father or mother will certainly be put to death .
local: Đɔ-cɔzɔ Mooyiizi weyi Ɛsɔ cɛlɩ-ɩ paɣtʋ yɔ, ɛyɔɔdaa se: ‹Pʋwɛɛ se ɛyʋ ɛña ɛ-caa nɛ e-ɖoo.› Ɛyɔɔdaa ɖɔɖɔ se: ‹Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛyɔɔdɩ ɛ-caa yaa e-ɖoo tɔm ɛzaɣ́tʋ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se pakʋ-ɩ.›.

eng: He continued, Whats a good image for Gods kingdom? What parable can I use to explain it?.
local: Yesu tasɩ yɔɔdʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ se: «Ɛbɛ mɛnkɛdɩɣnɩ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ lee, yaa eduuye nɖɩ́ mɛnkɛdɩɣnɩ-kɛ?.

eng: Then he said to them, Im very sad. Its as if Im dying. Stay here and keep alert with me. .
local: Peeɖe eheyi-wɛ se: «Mɛ-ɛsɛ ñɩŋ sɩm yɔɔ sɩm yɔɔ. Ɩcaɣ cɩnɛ, ma nɛ mɩ ɖɩcaɣnɩ ɖɛ-ɛsɛ.».

eng: They placed above his head the charge against him. It read, This is Jesus, the king of the Jews.
local: Paama kpata nakʋyʋ yɔɔ mbʋ́ pʋ-yɔɔ pakam-ɩ yɔ nɛ paka kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ ɛ-ñʋʋ taa. Pamawa se: «Ɛnɛ lɛ Yesu weyi ɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma wiyaʋ sɔsɔ yɔ.».

eng: saying, Dont say anything to anyone. Instead, go and show yourself to the priest and offer the sacrifice for your cleansing that Moses commanded. This will be a testimony to them. .
local: «Taaheyi-tʋ nɔɔyʋ. Ɛlɛ́, wolo cɔjɔ cɔlɔ nɛ ɛna se ñɔ-yɔɔ cɛba, nɛ ŋwoni kileku ɛzɩ Mooyiizi kaɖʋʋ yɔ nɛ pɩwɩlɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa se ñɔ-yɔɔ cɛba.».

eng: Late in the day, his disciples came to him and said, This is an isolated place, and its already late in the day.
local: Pʋkɔma ɖanaɣ yɔɔ lɛ, ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa wolo ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ peheyi-i se: «Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ wɩsɩ kpema, ŋgʋ́ ñɩtʋ hɛkʋ taa ɖɩwɛɛ.

eng: Jesus crossed the lake again, and on the other side a large crowd gathered around him on the shore.
local: Yesu sʋ kpɩyʋʋ nɛ ɛpɩsɩ teŋgu kidiiliŋ lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ lɛ, ɛyáa samaɣ kpeɣli ɛ-cɔlɔ lɩm nɔɔ.

eng: But you say, If you tell your father or mother, Everything Im expected to contribute to you is corban , .
local: Ɛlɛ́, mɩ miheyiɣ ɛyáa se: ‹ŋpɩzɩɣ ŋheyi ña-caa yaa ño-ɖoo se: maasɔɔlaa se maha-ŋ nabʋyʋ nɛ pɩsɩna-ŋ. Kɛlɛ maapɩzɩɣ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩkɛ Kɔrbaŋ : pʋ-tɔbʋʋ se mbʋ́ pahaɣ Ɛsɔ yɔ.

eng: Consider a mustard seed. When scattered on the ground, its the smallest of all the seeds on the earth;.
local: Kɛwɛ ɛzɩ piye nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɩlɩ kɔzʋʋ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ pee tɩŋa payɩ taa yɔ.

eng: Then he went a short distance farther and fell on his face and prayed, My Father, if its possible, take this cup of suffering away from me. However—not what I want but what you want. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, etuzi ɛ-tɩ ɛsɩndaa pazɩ nɛ eluŋ nɛ ɛpa ɛ-ɛsɛ nɛ tɛtʋ nɛ etendi Ɛsɔ se: «Man-Caa! Yee ŋtisiɣ yɔ, taayele nɛ kʋñɔŋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩtalɩ-m. Ɛlɛ́, la mbʋ́ ñe-liu wɛɛ yɔ, taala mbʋ́ me-liu wɛɛ yɔ.».

eng: They crucified with him two outlaws, one on his right side and one on his left.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, paka ɖɔɖɔ mɩ́láa naalɛ nabɛyɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ: lɛlʋ ɛ-nɩwaŋ yɔɔ nɛ lɛlʋ ɛ-nɩmɩyɛ yɔɔ.

eng: Instead, he went out and started talking freely and spreading the news so that Jesus wasnt able to enter a town openly. He remained outside in deserted places, but people came to him from everywhere.
local: Ɛɖɛwa lɛ, ɛpazɩ Yesu tɔm susuu paa le. Ḿbʋ́ labɩna nɛ Yesu tapɩzɩɣ se ɛtasɩ sʋʋ tɛtʋ natʋyʋ taa keɣlee. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, ɛyáa kɩlɩɣ-ɩ cɛyʋʋ. Peeɖe ɛcaɣ lakʋ taa nɛ ɛyáa lɩɣnɩ paa le nɛ powoki ɛ-cɔlɔ.

eng: Send them away so that they can go to the surrounding countryside and villages and buy something to eat for themselves.
local: Yebi-wɛ powolo tɛyɛ yɔɔ nɛ tɛtʋ cikpetu taa nɛ paya tɔɔnaɣ nɛ pɔtɔɔ.».

eng: Jairus, one of the synagogue leaders, came forward. When he saw Jesus, he fell at his feet.
local: Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, Ɛsɔ ɖɩsɛyɛ naɖɩyɛ taa ñʋʋdʋ sɔsɔ weyi payaɣ se Yayiruusi yɔ, ɛtalɩ Yesu cɔlɔ nɛ eluŋ ɛ-tɛɛ nɛ.

eng: then you are no longer required to care for your father or mother.
local: Yee iheyi ɛyʋ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɩɩtasɩɣ-ɩ haʋ nʋmɔʋ se ɛsɩnɩ ɛ-caa nɛ e-ɖoo.

eng: but when its planted, it grows and becomes the largest of all vegetable plants. It produces such large branches that the birds in the sky are able to nest in its shade. .
local: Poɖuu-ɖɩ lɛ, ɖɩñɔ nɛ ɖɩpaɣlɩ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ kaɖaɣ taa ɖozi tɩŋ tɩŋa. Ɖɩyɛzɩɣ pilinzi sɔsɔsɩ nɛ sumasɩ woki sɩɖʋʋ ɖandʋ hɔtʋ taa.».

eng: He came back to the disciples and found them sleeping. He said to Peter, Couldnt you stay alert one hour with me?.
local: Ɛtɛm Ɛsɔ sɛʋ lɛ, ɛpɩsɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa ḿbá pɔ-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛmaɣnɩ pɔɖɔŋ ɖou. Peeɖe ɛpɔzɩ Pɩyɛ se: «Yee ḿbʋ́, ɩtapɩzɩ ɩsɩnɩ-m caɣʋ paa ñɩɩɩ!.

eng: Those who were walking by insulted Jesus, shaking their heads.
local: Nʋmɔɖɔnaa mbá pɛɖɛɣaɣnɩ peeɖe yɔ, pekpiɣyaɣ ñʋŋ nɛ patʋʋ-ɩ.

eng: He replied, You give them something to eat. But they said to him, Should we go off and buy bread worth almost eight months pay and give it to them to eat.
local: Yesu cosi-wɛ se: «Pʋwɛɛ se mɩhaɣnɩ-wɛ tɔɔnaɣ mɩ-maɣmaɣ.» Ɛlɛ́, pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Yee ɖiwoba ɖɩya tɔɔnaɣ ɛzɩ kɩyakɩŋ nasɩlɛ tʋmɩyɛ liidiye yɔ, pɩtalɩɣ-wɛ yaa we?».

eng: and pleaded with him, My daughter is about to die. Please, come and place your hands on her so that she can be healed and live.
local: ewiini-i cɔɔɔ se ewolo ɛtɩnɩ ɛ-pɩɣa peliɣa yɔɔ nesi nɛ kɔ-yɔɔ cɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, kacaɣ sɩbʋ.

eng: In this way you do away with Gods word in favor of the rules handed down to you, which you pass on to others. And you do a lot of other things just like that. .
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɩkpakɩɣ mɩ-cɔzɔnaa sɔnzɩ nzɩ́ ɩɖɛzɩɣ ɖama yɔ nɛ ɩwɛɛkɩɣnɩ Ɛsɔtɔm. Ɩlakɩ lakasɩ lɛɛsɩ ndɩ ndɩ ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ.».

eng: Stay alert and pray so that you wont give in to temptation. The spirit is eager, but the flesh is weak. .
local: Ɩcaɣnɩ mɩ-ɛsɛ nɛ ɩsɛɛ Ɛsɔ, pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, ɩkɔŋ ɩsʋʋ takʋʋ taa. Ɛyʋ liu wɛɛ se ɛla mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ, ɛlɛ́, ɛwɛnɩ kaapɩzɩtʋ.».

eng: and saying, So you were going to destroy the temple and rebuild it in three days, were you? Save yourself! If you are Gods Son, come down from the cross.
local: se: «Weyi ña ŋtɔŋaɣ se ŋyɔkʋʋ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa nɛ ŋɖaɣnɩ-kɛ maʋ nɛ kɩyakɩŋ naadozo yɔ, ya ña-maɣmaɣ ña-ñʋʋ! Yee ŋkɛ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ yɔ, tibini kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ nɛ ɖɩna!».

eng: With many such parables he continued to give them the word, as much as they were able to hear.
local: Ḿbʋ́ Yesu heyaɣ-wɛ tɔm tɩŋa nɛ aduwa taa. Ɛwɩlaɣ ɛyáa mbá pekpeɣli ɛ-cɔlɔ yɔ ndʋ́ papɩzaɣ se panɩɩ yɔ.

eng: He said to them, How much bread do you have? Take a look. After checking, they said, Five loaves of bread and two fish.
local: Yesu heyi-wɛ se: «Iwolo iwili nɛ mana se tindine hɔɔlasɩ ɛzɩma ɩwɛna.» Pewilaa lɛ, peheyi-i se tindine hɔɔlasɩ kagbaanzɩ nɛ kpakpasɩ naalɛ pɛwɛna.

eng: So Jesus went with him. A swarm of people were following Jesus, crowding in on him.
local: Peeɖe ɛ nɛ Yesu pakpaɣ nʋmɔʋ se powoki ɛ-tɛ. Pɛɖɛɣaɣ lɛ, ɛyáa sakɩyɛ tɩŋɩɣ pa-wayɩ nɛ pañɩkɩɣ ɖama nɛ pɛkpɛndɩɣnɩ Yesu.

eng: Then Jesus called the crowd again and said, Listen to me, all of you, and understand.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu tasɩ ɛyáa samaɣ kpeɣluu nɛ eheyi-kɛ se: «Mɩtɩŋa payɩ iwelesi nɛ ɩnɩɩ mɔn-tɔm camɩyɛ.

eng: A second time he went away and prayed, My Father, if its not possible that this cup be taken away unless I drink it, then let it be what you want. .
local: Ɛyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛtasɩ ɛ-tɩ tuzuu nɛ etendi Ɛsɔ se: «Man-Caa! Yee ŋŋtisiɣ se kʋñɔŋ kʋnɛ kɩɖɛɛ nɛ mantaasʋʋ kɩ-taa yɔ, ŋla mbʋ́ ñe-liu wɛɛ yɔ.».

eng: In the same way, the chief priests, along with the legal experts and the elders, were making fun of him, saying.
local: Cɔjɔnaa sɔsaa nɛ paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa nɛ Yuda ñɩma ŋgbɛyɛ taa sɔsaa pɛpɛŋaɣ Yesu tɛtɛ ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ nɛ pɔpɔzʋʋ se:.

eng: He spoke to them only in parables, then explained everything to his disciples when he was alone with them.
local: Eteheyiɣ-wɛ natʋyʋ yem nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ aduwa tuuu. Ɛ nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa pɛwɛɣ pe-ɖeke lɛ, ɛlɩzɩɣ-wɛ atɩŋa a-tɔbʋʋ.

eng: He directed the disciples to seat all the people in groups as though they were having a banquet on the green grass.
local: Peeɖe Yesu heyi-wɛ se: «Iheyi ɛyáa tɩŋa se pacaɣ tataa ñɩtʋ yɔɔ cabɩ cabɩ.».

eng: A woman was there who had been bleeding for twelve years.
local: Halʋ nɔɔyʋ kɛwɛ ɛyáa taa peeɖe. Calɩm kɛwɛɛ pikpeŋni-i nɛ pɩcɛyɩɣ-ɩ pɩŋŋ pɩnzɩ hiu nɛ naalɛ yɔ.

eng: Nothing outside of a person can enter and contaminate a person in Gods sight; rather, the things that come out of a person contaminate the person. .
local: Nabʋyʋ fɛyɩ se pitiki ɛyʋ taa nɛ pipisi-i Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa. Ɛlɛ́, mbʋ́ pɩlɩɣnɩ ɛ-taa yɔ, ḿbʋ́ pisiɣni-i. .

eng: Again he came and found them sleeping. Their eyes were heavy with sleep.
local: Ɛtasɩ pɩsʋʋ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa cɔlɔ lɛ, ɛmaɣnɩ ɖɔɖɔ pɔɖɔŋ ɖou, patapɩzɩ pacaɣnɩ pɛ-ɛsɛ.

eng: He saved others, but he cant save himself. Hes the king of Israel, so let him come down from the cross now. Then well believe in him.
local: «Ɛyabɩ lɛlaa ñʋŋ ɛzɩma tɛ, ɛɛpɩzɩɣ se ɛya ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-ñɩŋgʋ! Pɩtɛkɛ ɛnʋ tɔmna se ɛnʋ lɛ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma wiyaʋ sɔsɔ naa we? Etibini kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ nɛ ɖɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ!.

eng: Later that day, when evening came, Jesus said to them, Lets cross over to the other side of the lake. .
local: Kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Yesu tukaɣ aduwa yɔ, kɩ-ɖanaɣ yɔɔ eheyi ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se: «Đɩtɛzɩ teŋgu kidiiliŋ lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ.».

eng: They sat down in groups of hundreds and fifties.
local: Pacaɣ cabɩ cabɩ, lɛlaa mɩnʋʋ nɛ lɛlaa nɩɩnʋwa.

eng: She had suffered a lot under the care of many doctors, and had spent everything she had without getting any better. In fact, she had gotten worse.
local: Ɛcɔ fɛɖaa ndɩ ndɩ tɛ nɛ pɩnɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛwɛɛkɩ e-liidiye tɩŋa. Ɛlɛ́, ɛ-kʋdɔŋ tapasɩ, kɩtɛzaɣ kpaʋ ɖoŋ kɩkpaʋ.

eng: After leaving the crowd, he entered a house where his disciples asked him about that riddle.
local: Yesu nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa pakʋyɩ ɛyáa samaɣ taa nɛ pekpe lɛ, pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se ɛlɩzɩ-wɛ eduuye ńɖɩ́ ɖɩ-tɔbʋʋ.

eng: But he left them and again went and prayed the same words for the third time.
local: Peeɖe Yesu tuzi ɛ-tɩ tozo ɖeɖe nɛ ɛtasɩ Ɛsɔ tenduu nɛ ɛyɔɔdɩ tɔm kʋɖʋmtʋ ndʋ́.

eng: He trusts in God, so let God deliver him now if he wants to. He said, Im Gods Son.
local: Ɛɛta Ɛsɔ liu nɛ ɛkaɖɩ se ɛnʋ lɛ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ. Tɔɔ! Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, ɖɩcɔna ɖɩna se Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ se ɛya ɛ-ñʋʋ naa ɛɛyakɩ?».

eng: They left the crowd and took him in the boat just as he was. Other boats followed along.
local: Peeɖe pakʋyɩ ɛyáa samaɣ cɔlɔ nɛ powolo pasʋʋ kpɩyʋʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩ-taa ɛɛwɛɛ yɔ se pɛɖɛɣ. Kpɩyɩŋ lɛɛŋ kɛwɛ kʋ-cɔlɔ peeɖe.

eng: He took the five loaves and the two fish, looked up to heaven, blessed them, broke the loaves into pieces, and gave them to his disciples to set before the people. He also divided the two fish among them all.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu kpaɣ tindine hɔɔlasɩ kagbaanzɩ ńzɩ́ nɛ kpakpasɩ ńzɩ́ sɩ-naalɛ nɛ ɛkpazɩ ɛsɛ ɛsɔdaa nɛ ɛsɛɛ Ɛsɔ pʋ-yɔɔ. Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛcɩyɩ nɛ ɛcɛlɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se patayɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa.

eng: In those days there was another large crowd with nothing to eat. Jesus called his disciples and told them.
local: Kɩyakɩŋ ɩnʋ ɩ-taa lɛ, ɛyáa samaɣ tasɩ kpeɣluu pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ, ɛlɛ́ pɛfɛyɩnɩ tɔɔnaɣ. Peeɖe Yesu ya ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa nɛ eheyi-wɛ se:.

eng: Because she had heard about Jesus, she came up behind him in the crowd and touched his clothes.
local: Ɛyáa yɔɔdaɣ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Yesu lakaɣ nɛ kʋdɔndɩnaa yɔɔ cɛkɩ yɔ lɛ, halʋ ɛnʋ ɛnɩɩ. Peeɖe ɛsʋ ɛyáa taa nɛ ewolo etukuni Yesu toko nɛ ɛ-wayɩ.

eng: He said to them, Dont you understand either? Dont you know that nothing from the outside that enters a person has the power to contaminate?.
local: Peeɖe ɛpɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Pɩkpɛndɩnɩ-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ nɛ ɩtapɩzɩ ɩnɩɩ tɔm ndʋ́ mɔyɔɔdʋʋ yɔ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ naa we? Ɩtanɩɩ se pʋyʋ fɛyɩ se ɛyʋ tɔkɩ-pʋ nɛ pipisi-i yaa we?.

eng: Then he came to his disciples and said to them, Will you sleep and rest all night? Look, the time has come for the Human One to be betrayed into the hands of sinners.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛpɩsɩ pɔ-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛpɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Ɩwɛ ɖom yɔɔ tam ḿbʋ́? Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, alɩwaatʋ talaa se paɖʋzɩ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖaa nesi taa.

eng: The outlaws who were crucified with him insulted him in the same way.
local: Halɩ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ mɩ́láa mbá paakam ɛ-cɔlɔ yɔ nɛ patʋʋ-ɩ ɖɔɖɔ ḿbʋ́.

eng: Gale-force winds arose, and waves crashed against the boat so that the boat was swamped.
local: Patalɩ lɩm hɛkʋ taa lɛ, heɣlim sɔsɔm nabʋyʋ pazɩ mabʋ yem nɛ lɩm húú nɛ pʋsʋʋ pa-kpɩyʋʋ taa nɛ kɩcaɣ se kʋsʋʋ lɩm tɛɛ.

eng: Everyone ate until they were full.
local: Ɛlɛ́, pala ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ nɛ ɛyáa ḿbá pɔtɔɔ pahaɣ.

eng: I feel sorry for the crowd because they have been with me for three days and have nothing to eat.
local: «Ɛyáa panɛ, pɛwɛ-m pʋtɔdɩyɛ. Ɩcɔnɩ ɩna, kɩyakɩŋ naadozo yɔ pɛwɛ mɔn-cɔlɔ cɩnɛ. Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ pɛfɛyɩnɩ nabʋyʋ se pɔtɔɔ.

eng: She was thinking, If I can just touch his clothes, Ill be healed.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛmaɣzaɣ se: «Yee maatɩɩpɩzaɣ se mehiɣ e-toko nɛ montukuna yɔ, mɔ-yɔɔ kɛcɛba.».

eng: Thats because it doesnt enter into the heart but into the stomach, and it goes out into the sewer. By saying this, Jesus declared that no food could contaminate a person in Gods sight.
local: Mbʋ́ ɛyʋ tɔkɩ yɔ, pitiki e-lotu taa nɛ pʋcɔɔ kʋlɔmɩŋ taa nɛ puwolo pɩlɩɩnɩ ɛ-tɔbʋʋ. Ɛlɛ́, pɩɩsʋʋ ɛ-lɩmaɣza taa.» Yesu yɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se tɔɔnasɩ tɩŋa mʋnaa se pɔtɔɔ-sɩ.

eng: Get up. Lets go. Look, here comes my betrayer. .
local: Ɩkʋyɩ ɖɩkatɩ weyi ɛkpaɣ-m se ɛɖʋzɩ pe-nesi taa yɔ! Ɛkɔŋ naɣ yɔ!».

eng: From noon until three in the afternoon the whole earth was dark.
local: Puwiye ńɖɩ́ wɩsɩ siɣaa lɛ, cɩkpɛndʋʋ yu ɛjaɖɛ tɩŋa kpemm nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ ɖanaɣ ñɩɣtʋ naadozo.

eng: But Jesus was in the rear of the boat, sleeping on a pillow. They woke him up and said, Teacher, dont you care that were drowning.
local: Yesu hɛnɩ wayɩ nɛ ɛɖʋ ɛ-ñʋʋ ñʋʋ kʋɖʋɖʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ eɖou yem fɛɛɛ. Peeɖe ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa woba pefezi-i nɛ pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Wɩlɩyʋ! Ŋyeki-ɖʋ se ɖɩtɛŋɛlɩ cɩnɛ yaa we?».

eng: They filled twelve baskets with the leftover pieces of bread and fish.
local: Ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa kpeɣli hɔɔlasɩ nzɩ́ sɩkazaa yɔ lɛ, pusu ɖɔkɩŋ hiu nɛ naalɛ.

eng: If I send them away hungry to their homes, they wont have enough strength to travel, for some have come a long distance. .
local: Yee meheyi-wɛ se pekpe ñɔɔsɩ yɔ, pɔtɔlʋʋ nʋmɔʋ taa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pa-taa lɛlaa lɩnɩ poliŋ.».

eng: Her bleeding stopped immediately, and she sensed in her body that her illness had been healed.
local: Calɩm mbʋ́ pikpeŋaɣnɩ-ɩ yɔ, pɩtɩŋ pɩsɩŋ nɛ ɛna se ɛ-yɔɔ cɛba.

eng: Its what comes out of a person that contaminates someone in Gods sight, he said.
local: Ɛtasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩɣnɩ ɛyʋ taa yɔ, ńdʋ́ pisiɣni-i.».

eng: While Jesus was still speaking, Judas, one of the Twelve, came. With him was a large crowd carrying swords and clubs. They had been sent by the chief priests and elders of the people.
local: Yesu yɔɔdaɣ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa hiu nɛ naalɛ taa lɛlʋ weyi payaɣ-ɩ se Yudaasɩ yɔ nɛ ɛyáa samaɣ nakɛyɛ patalɩ. Pɔɖɔkɩ sɛsɩ kɩɖaɣlɩsɩ nɛ pɔla. Cɔjɔnaa sɔsaa nɛ Yuda ñɩma sɔsaa petiyini-wɛ.

eng: At about three Jesus cried out with a loud shout, Eli, Eli, lama sabachthani , which means, My God, my God, why have you left me? .
local: Pʋkɔma ɛzɩ ɖanaɣ ñɩɣtʋ naadozo yɔ lɛ, Yesu ma kubuka ɖoŋ se: «Elii, Elii! Lamaa sapaktanɩɩ.» Pʋ-tɔbʋʋ se: «Mɛ-Ɛsɔ, Mɛ-Ɛsɔ! Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ ŋlɔ-m?».

eng: He got up and gave orders to the wind, and he said to the lake, Silence! Be still! The wind settled down and there was a great calm.
local: Peeɖe ɛkʋyaa nɛ ɛkalɩ heɣlim nɛ piyele mabʋ. Ɛlɛ́, eheyi lɩm se: «Hɛɛ! Caɣ ñe-ɖeɖe.» Peeɖe pʋbʋ ñɛhɛwa ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: About five thousand had eaten.
local: Mbá pɔtɔɔ tɔɔnaɣ ŋ́gá yɔ, abalaa ɖeke kɛwɛ kutokiŋ kagbaanzɩ.

eng: His disciples responded, How can anyone get enough food in this wilderness to satisfy these people.
local: Peeɖe ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa cosi-i se: «Le ɛyʋ naɣ tɔɔnaɣ ñɩtʋ taa cɩnɛ nɛ ɛcalɩ ɛyáa samaɣ kanɛ katɩŋa?».

eng: At that very moment, Jesus recognized that power had gone out from him. He turned around in the crowd and said, Who touched my clothes? .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu na kpaagbaa se ɖoŋ nɩɩyɩ lɩ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛkɛzɩ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛyáa samaɣ yɔɔ nɛ ɛpɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Atukuni mon-toko?».

eng: Its from the inside, from the human heart, that evil thoughts come: sexual sins, thefts, murders.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛyʋ taa lɩmaɣza kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ lɩɣna se ɛla acɛyɛ nɛ ɛmɩlɩ nɛ ɛkʋ ɛyáa.

eng: His betrayer had given them a sign: Arrest the man I kiss.
local: Yudaasɩ ɛnʋ, ɛkpaɣnɩ Yesu se ɛɖʋzɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖaa nesi taa. Ɛɛtɛm ɛyáa samaɣ ŋ́gá kɛdʋʋ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛlakɩ nɛ pasɩm-ɩ nɛ pakpa-ɩ yɔ. Eheyi-wɛ se: «Yee mowobi mɛnsɛɛ nɔɔyʋ nɛ mamʋzɩ ɛ-laɣzaɣ yɔɔ lɛ, ɛnʋ lɛ. Ɩkpa-ɩ.».

eng: After hearing him, some standing there said, Hes calling Elijah.
local: Mbá paawɛ peeɖe yɔ, pa-taa lɛlaa nɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɔtɔŋ se: «Ɩnɩɩ ɛyaɣʋ Elii!».

eng: Jesus asked them, Why are you frightened? Dont you have faith yet? .
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛpɔzɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se: «Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma ɩwɛɛ sɔɔndʋ ḿbʋ́? Ɩfɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ mɔ-yɔɔ yaa we?».

eng: Right then, Jesus made his disciples get into a boat and go ahead to the other side of the lake, toward Bethsaida, while he dismissed the crowd.
local: Patɩtɛm tɔɔʋ lɛ, Yesu heyi ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se: «Ɩsʋʋ kpɩyʋʋ taa nɛ ɩɖɛ-m nɔɔ nɛ ɩtɛzɩ kidiiliŋ lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ Bɛtsayɩda kiŋ nɛ meheyi ɛyáa samaɣ se kekpe nɛ mɔnkɔɔ.».

eng: Jesus asked, How much bread do you have? They said, Seven loaves.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu pɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Tindine hɔɔlasɩ ɛzɩma wɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ?» Pocosi-i se: «Lʋbɛ.».

eng: His disciples said to him, Dont you see the crowd pressing against you? Yet you ask, Who touched me.
local: Ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa cosi-i se: «Ŋnaɣ ɛyáa ñɩkɩɣ-ŋ ḿbʋ́ nɛ ŋɖaɣnɩɣ pɔzʋʋ se atukuni-ŋ?».

eng: adultery, greed, evil actions, deceit, unrestrained immorality, envy, insults, arrogance, and foolishness.
local: nɛ ɛkpaɣ lɛlaa halaa nɛ ɛɖʋ ɛsɩyɛ lɛlaa ñɩm yɔɔ nɛ ɛla kañatʋ nɛ ɛcɛtɩ ɛyáa nɛ ɛla yem yem nɛ ɛwɛɛ ɛsɩsɛmɩyɛ nɛ ɛcɛtɩnɩ lɛlaa taa nɛ ɛkpazɩ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛla kɩmɛlɛndʋ.

eng: Just then he came to Jesus and said, Hello, Rabbi. Then he kissed him.
local: Ɛtalaa lɛ, ɛtɩwobu Yesu cɔlɔ nɛ eheyi-i se: «Wɩlɩyʋ, sɛɛ ɖeu!» Ɛlɛ́, ɛmʋzɩ ɛ-laɣzaɣ yɔɔ.

eng: One of them ran over, took a sponge full of vinegar, and put it on a pole. He offered it to Jesus to drink.
local: Peeɖe pa-taa lɛlʋ tisewa nɛ ewolo ɛkpaɣ kʋca nɛ ewona elii sʋlʋm kɩñɩŋɩm nabʋyʋ taa nɛ ɛtʋʋ ɖaʋ nɔɔ taa nɛ ɛwɩlɩɣ-ɩ se ɛmʋzɩ.

eng: Overcome with awe, they said to each other, Who then is this? Even the wind and the sea obey him.
local: Ɛlɛ́, sɔɔndʋ tɛzɩ-wɛ kpaʋ nɛ pɔpɔzʋʋ pa-tɩ se: «Ɛbɛ ɛnɛ ɛkɛnaa kpem nɛ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ heɣlim nɛ lɩm nɛ pañaŋ-ɩ?».

eng: After saying good-bye to them, Jesus went up onto a mountain to pray.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛkʋyɩ pɔ-cɔlɔ nɛ ewolo ɛkpa pʋʋ yɔɔ se ɛsɛɣ Ɛsɔ.

eng: He told the crowd to sit on the ground. He took the seven loaves, gave thanks, broke them apart, and gave them to his disciples to distribute; and they gave the bread to the crowd.
local: Peeɖe eheyi ɛyáa se pacaɣ tataa. Ɛlɛ́, ɛkpaɣ tindine hɔɔlasɩ ńzɩ́ nɛ ɛsɛɛ Ɛsɔ sɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛcɩyɩ-sɩ. Ɛtɛma lɛ, ɛcɛlɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se patayɩ-wɛ, nɛ pala ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: But Jesus looked around carefully to see who had done it.
local: Peeɖe Yesu cɔnɩ ɛ-cɔlɔ kpɛɛɛ se ɛna weyi etukuni-i yɔ.

eng: All these evil things come from the inside and contaminate a person in Gods sight. .
local: Ɛzaɣ́tʋ tʋnɛ tɩtɩŋa payɩ tɩlɩɣnɩnɩ ɛyʋ taa nɛ tipisiɣ-i.

eng: But Jesus said to him, Friend, do what you came to do. Then they came and grabbed Jesus and arrested him.
local: Yesu heyi-i se: «Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdʋ, la mbʋ́ ŋkɔm se ŋlakɩ yɔ lɔŋ!» Peeɖe ɛyáa samaɣ woba kakpa Yesu.

eng: But the rest of them said, Lets see if Elijah will come and save him.
local: Ɛlɛ́, pa-taa lɛlaa tɔ se: «Iyele ɖɩna se Elii kɔŋ nɛ ɛya ɛ-ñʋʋ naa we?».

eng: Evening came and the boat was in the middle of the lake, but he was alone on the land.
local: Pɩlɛdaa lɛ, patalɩ teŋgu hɛkʋ taa. Ŋgʋ́, Yesu ñaawɛ pʋʋ yɔɔ e-ɖeke.

eng: They also had a few fish. He said a blessing over them, then gave them to the disciples to hand out also.
local: Paawɛnɩ kpakpasɩ cikpesi pazɩ ɖɔɖɔ. Ɛlɛ́, Yesu sɛɛ Ɛsɔ sɩ-yɔɔ nɛ eheyi ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se powolo pamʋ nɛ patayɩ-wɛ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Jesus left that place and went into the region of Tyre. He didnt want anyone to know that he had entered a house, but he couldnt hide.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu wolo ɛjaɖɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩñɔtɩnɩ Tiiri yɔ ɖɩ-taa nɛ ɛsʋʋ ɖɩɣa nakɛyɛ taa. Ɛlɛ́, ɛtaasɔɔlɩ se nɔɔyʋ ɛna se ɛwɛ peeɖe. Kitefe kutoyu lɛ, ɛyáa tɩŋa tɛm naʋ.

eng: Again Jesus cried out with a loud shout. Then he died.
local: Peeɖe Yesu tasɩ mabʋ kubuka ɖoŋ nɛ ɛhɛɛ.

eng: One of those with Jesus reached for his sword. Striking the high priests slave, he cut off his ear.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa taa lɛlʋ sezi ɛkpɛɛ ɛ-sɩɣa kɩɖaɣlaɣ nɛ ɛsɛtɩ cɔjɔnaa ñʋʋdʋ tʋmlaɖʋ nɩŋgbaŋʋʋ.

eng: He saw his disciples struggling. They were trying to row forward, but the wind was blowing against them. Very early in the morning, he came to them, walking on the lake. He intended to pass by them.
local: Elosi-wɛ lɛ, pasaɣaɣ kpɩyʋʋ nɛ kiiwoki lɛɛlɛɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, heɣlim makaɣ tuliŋa. Pʋkɔma ɛzɩ kalɩmaŋ kou yɔ lɛ, ɛkʋyɩ se ewoki pɔ-cɔlɔ. Ɛlɛ́, lɩm yɔɔ ɛɖɔŋaɣ. Ɛcaɣaɣ se ɛɖɛɛ pɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: The woman, full of fear and trembling, came forward. Knowing what had happened to her, she fell down in front of Jesus and told him the whole truth.
local: Halʋ ɛnʋ ɛna mbʋ́ pɩlabɩ-ɩ yɔ lɛ, ɛ-laŋɩyɛ maa nɛ ɛ-nandʋ pazɩ paʋ nɛ ewolo eluŋ Yesu tɛɛ nɛ ɛkɛdɩ-ɩ ɛ-tɔm tɩŋa.

eng: They ate until they were full. They collected seven baskets full of leftovers.
local: Patayɩ-wɛ nɛ pɔtɔɔ patɩŋa pahaɣ nɛ pɩkazɩ nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa kpeɣli hɔɔlasɩ nzɩ́ sɩkazaa yɔ nɛ pusu ɖɔkɩŋ lʋbɛ.

eng: In fact, a woman whose young daughter was possessed by an unclean spirit heard about him right away. She came and fell at his feet.
local: Halʋ ɛgɔm weyi ɛlɩnɩ Siirii egeetiye taa nɛ ɛkɛ Fenisii tʋ yɔ, ɛnɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛtɩwobu eluŋ Yesu tɛɛ nɛ eheyi-i se: «Mɛwɛnɩ pɩɣa peliɣa nakɛyɛ, eleeu nɔɔyʋ wɛ ka-wayɩ. Mentendiɣ-ŋ se ŋɖɔɔnɩ-ɩ.».

eng: Look, the curtain of the sanctuary was torn in two from top to bottom. The earth shook, the rocks split.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-yɔɔ pɩsaʋ sɔsɔʋ ŋgʋ́ paakaɣ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa taa yɔ, kɩkpaɣnɩ ñʋʋ taa faɣʋ nɛ kitii kɩkaɖɩnɩ pɩ-tɛɛ hɔɔlɩŋ naalɛ. Tɛtʋ kañamsaa nɛ ɛwasɩ ya.

eng: Then Jesus said to him, Put the sword back into its place. All those who use the sword will die by the sword.
local: Peeɖe Yesu heyi-i se: «Pɩsɩnɩ ña-sɩɣa ko-huyuu taa, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mbá patɩŋa payɩ pakʋʋ lɛlaa nɛ sɛsɩ yɔ, sɩɣa pakʋʋnɩ-wɛ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: When they saw him walking on the lake, they thought he was a ghost and they screamed.
local: Tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa na-ɩ ɛɖɔŋaɣ lɩm yɔɔ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɛwɛ yem se ñazɩñazʋʋ nakʋyʋ. Peeɖe papazɩ kubusi mabʋ.

eng: He responded, Daughter, your faith has healed you; go in peace, healed from your disease. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu heyi-i se: «Mɛn-pɛlɛ! Lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ŋwɛnɩ mɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, kɩyabɩ ña-ñʋʋ. Kpemni laŋhɛzɩyɛ, ña-kʋdɔŋ cɛba kɩtɩŋa.».

eng: This was a crowd of about four thousand people! Jesus sent them away.
local: Ɛyáa mbá pɔtɔɔ tɔɔnaɣ ŋ́gá yɔ, patalɩ ɛzɩ kutokiŋ naanza yɔ. Pɛtɛma lɛ, Yesu heyi-wɛ se pekpe.

eng: He responded, The children have to be fed first. It isnt right to take the childrens bread and toss it to the dogs. .
local: Peeɖe Yesu tuuu halʋ ɛnʋ eduuye se: «Pɩtamʋnɩ se pakpaɣ piya tɔɔnaɣ nɛ pɛpɛɖɩ hasɩ. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se piya ɛtɔɔ sɩhaɣ nɛ pʋcɔ.».

eng: and the bodies of many holy people who had died were raised.
local: nɛ pɩlaŋ yɔɔ kuli nɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩma sakɩyɛ mbá paasɩba yɔ, pefe.

eng: Or do you think that Im not able to ask my Father and he will send to me more than twelve battle groups of angels right away?.
local: Ŋtatɩlɩ se manpɩzaɣ se mayaa man-Caa se ɛkɔɔ ɛsɩnɩ-m nɛ halɩ etiyini-m e-tiyiyaa tikasɩ hiu nɛ naalɛ kpaagbaa yaa we?.

eng: Seeing him was terrifying to all of them. Just then he spoke to them, Be encouraged! Its me. Dont be afraid. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, patɩŋa pana-ɩ lɛ, sɔɔndʋ kpa-wɛ siŋŋ. Ɛlɛ́, Yesu heyi-wɛ kpaagbaa se: «Ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ kpam, sɔɔndʋ ɛtaakpa-mɩ, ma Yesu.».

eng: While Jesus was still speaking with her, messengers came from the synagogue leaders house, saying to Jairus, Your daughter has died. Why bother the teacher any longer.
local: Yesu yɔɔdaɣ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, petiyi nabɛyɛ nɛ Yayiruusi ɛnʋ ɛ-tɛ se powolo peheyi-i se: «Ña-pɩɣa peleɣa sɩba, taaɖʋ Wɩlɩyʋ kʋñɔŋ yem falaa.».

eng: then got into a boat with his disciples and went over to the region of Dalmanutha.
local: Peeɖe ɛ nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa patɩkpa kpɩyʋʋ taa nɛ powolo Dalmanuuta ɛjaɖɛ taa.

eng: But she answered, Lord, even the dogs under the table eat the childrens crumbs.
local: Halʋ ɛnʋ ecosi-i se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ! Yee piya ɛtɔkɩ nɛ pʋtɔlʋʋ tataa, hasɩ ɛɛtɔzʋʋ yaa we?».

eng: After Jesus resurrection they came out of their graves and went into the holy city where they appeared to many people.
local: nɛ palɩɩnɩ pɩlaŋ taa. Yesu kɔma efe lɛ, powolo Yeruusalɛm nɛ ɛyáa sakɩyɛ na-wɛ.

eng: But if I did that, how would the scriptures be fulfilled that say this must happen? .
local: Ŋgʋ́, yee malabɩ ḿbʋ́, ɛzɩma tɔm ndʋ́ pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa yɔ, tɩpɩzɩɣ tɩla? Pamawa se pʋwɛɛ se tɩla ḿbʋ́.».

eng: He got into the boat, and the wind settled down. His disciples were so baffled they were beside themselves.
local: Ɛyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛkpa pɔ-cɔlɔ kpɩyʋʋ taa nɛ ɛcaɣ nɛ heɣlim hɛɛ kpaagbaa. Peeɖe pɩlabɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa piti pɩŋŋ.

eng: But Jesus overheard their report and said to the synagogue leader, Dont be afraid; just keep trusting. .
local: Yesu nɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, eheyi Yayiruusi se: «Ña-laŋɩyɛ ɛtaamaa, ñɩtɩ ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ.».

eng: The Pharisees showed up and began to argue with Jesus. To test him, they asked for a sign from heaven.
local: Patalɩ Dalmanuuta peeɖe lɛ, Farɩsɩ ñɩma wolo Yesu cɔlɔ nɛ pa nɛ ɩ pɔhɔŋnɩ ɖama tɔm nɛ pañɩ ɛ-nɔɔ cɔlɔ tɔm. Pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se ɛla ɛsɔdaa hama lakasɩ nasɩyɩ nɛ pana.

eng: Good answer! he said. Go on home. The demon has already left your daughter. .
local: Peeɖe Yesu heyi-i se: «Ño-cosuu pʋnɛ pɩwɩlɩɣ pɩŋŋ se ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ mɔ-yɔɔ: wolo. Eleeu ɛnʋ ese ña-pɩɣa peliɣa ŋ́gá ka-wayɩ.».

eng: When the centurion and those with him who were guarding Jesus saw the earthquake and what had just happened, they were filled with awe and said, This was certainly Gods Son.
local: Room sɔɔja sɔsɔ nɛ lɛlaa mbá ɛ nɛ wɛ paaɖaŋ Yesu yɔɔ yɔ, pana tɛtʋ ñamsʋʋ nɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ lɛ, sɔɔndʋ kpa-wɛ siŋŋ nɛ pɔtɔ se: «Toovenim, ɛnɛ ɛɛkɛ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ!».

eng: Then Jesus said to the crowds, Have you come with swords and clubs to arrest me, like a thief? Day after day, I sat in the temple teaching, but you didnt arrest me.
local: Peeɖe Yesu pɔzɩ ɛyáa samaɣ se: «Ɩkɔm ma-wayɩ nɛ sɛsɩ kɩɖaɣlɩsɩ nɛ pɔla yɔ, mɛnkɛ mɩ́lʋ́ naa we? Ma nɛ mɩ ɖɩɩwɛ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa taa kɩyakɩŋ tɩŋa nɛ mawɩlɩɣ Ɛsɔtɔm, ɛlɛ́, ɩtakpa-m.

eng: Thats because they hadnt understood about the loaves. Their minds had been closed so that they resisted Gods ways.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pa-laŋa wɛ kpɩzɩŋ nɛ pataanɩɩ hama lakasɩ nzɩ́ ɛlaba nɛ tindine huúu nɛ ɛcalɩnɩ ɛyáa yɔ sɩ-tɔbʋʋ.

eng: He didnt allow anyone to follow him except Peter, James, and John, James brother.
local: Peeɖe ɛya Pɩyɛ nɛ Yakubu nɛ e-neu Yohanɛɛsɩ se pasɩɩ-ɩ. Ɛlɛ́, eteyele se lɛlaa ɛsɩɩ-ɩ.

eng: With an impatient sigh, Jesus said, Why does this generation look for a sign? I assure you that no sign will be given to it. .
local: Peeɖe Yesu hʋ ɛ-taa pɩŋŋ nɛ emuzi nɛ ɛtɔ se: «Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma ɛyáa panɛ pañɩnɩɣ Ɛsɔ hama lakasɩ? Toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se ɩɩkaɣ naʋ hama lakasɩ nasɩyɩ kaʋ.».

eng: When she returned to her house, she found the child lying on the bed and the demon gone.
local: Ekpema lɛ, ɛmaɣnɩ ɛ-pɩɣa ŋ́gá kɛhɛnɩ ñalʋʋ yɔɔ. Eleeu tɛm ka-wayɩ seu.
