eng: Jesus reached out his hand, touched him, and said, I do want to. Be clean. Instantly, the skin disease left him.
local: Peeɖe Yesu posi e-nesi nɛ etukuni-i nɛ eheyi-i se: «Mentisaa, pɩsɩ ɛyʋ weyi ɛmʋnaa yɔ!» Ɛyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛ-yɔɔ tɩcɛbʋ.

eng: Everyone who heard it was amazed at what the shepherds told them.
local: Peeɖe pɩlabɩ ɛyáa mbá patɩŋa panɩ tɔm ndʋ́ pɛkɛdaa yɔ piti.

eng: Standing behind him at his feet and crying, she began to wet his feet with her tears. She wiped them with her hair, kissed them, and poured the oil on them.
local: nɛ ewolo ɛsɩŋ nɛ wayɩ Yesu naŋgbanzɩ cɔlɔ nɛ ewiɣ nɛ ɛ-ɛsɩtɛɣlɩm kpeŋ sɩ-yɔɔ. Pikpema lɛ, ɛhɛzɩ-pʋ nɛ ɛ-ñɔsɩ nɛ ɛkpa-sɩ, nɛ pɩwɩlɩ se ɛñam-ɩ nɛ ɛpɩyɩ sɩ-yɔɔ tɩlaaɖɩ.

eng: How terrible for you when all speak well of you. Their ancestors did the same things to the false prophets.
local: Pʋtɔɔ-mɩ! Mbá mɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa yɩɣyɩɣ-mɩ yɔ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ḿbʋ́ pɔ-cɔzɔnaa lakaɣ mbá pɛcɛtaɣ ɖɔɖɔ se pɛkɛ náyaa yɔ.».

eng: When he saw Jesus, he shrieked and fell down before him. Then he shouted, What have you to do with me, Jesus, Son of the Most High God? I beg you, dont torture me.
local: Pɩɩwɛɛ pʋkʋyʋʋnɩ-ɩ. Pʋkʋyɩnɩ-ɩ lɛ, paa paɖʋ e-nesi nɛ ɛ-naŋgbanzɩ pa-taa yoŋgbasɩ yɔ, ɛpʋʋtʋʋ-sɩ, nɛ eleeu wɛɛ nɛ ɛsʋzʋʋ-ɩ ñɩtʋ. Abalʋ ɛnʋ ɛtalɩ Yesu cɔlɔ lɛ, ɛma kubuka nɛ eluŋ ɛ-tɛɛ nɛ ɛyɔɔdɩ ɖoŋ se: «Ɛsɔ Caabiyuu Pɩyalʋ Yesu, ma nɛ ŋ se we? Mentendiɣ-ŋ se ŋtaaɖʋ-m kʋñɔŋ.» Ɛyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Yesu holini aleewaa ḿbá se pese ɛ-wayɩ.

eng: Whatever house you enter, remain there until you leave that place.
local: Yee ɩtalɩ ɖoli nɛ pamʋ-mɩ ɖɩɣa nakɛyɛ taa lɛ, ɩcaɣ peeɖe nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɩkʋyʋʋ yɔ.

eng: Whenever you enter a house, first say, May peace be on this house.
local: Yee ɩsʋ ɖɩɣa nakɛyɛ taa lɛ, iheyi ka-taa ñɩma se: ‹Ɛsɔ ɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa.›.

eng: All the people who gathered to worship were praying outside during this hour of incense offering.
local: Ɛsʋwa nɛ ɛɖʋʋ lɛ, ɛyáa samaɣ tɩŋa wɛɛ awayɩ nɛ pɛsɛɣ Ɛsɔ.

eng: Jesus ordered him not to tell anyone. Instead, Jesus said, go and show yourself to the priest and make an offering for your cleansing, as Moses instructed. This will be a testimony to them. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu ka ɛ-ñʋʋ taa se: «Taaheyi-tʋ nɔɔyʋ, wolo cɔjɔ cɔlɔ nɛ ɛna se ñɔ-yɔɔ cɛba, nɛ ŋwoni kileku ɛzɩ Mooyiizi kaɖʋʋ yɔ nɛ pɩwɩlɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa se ñɔ-yɔɔ cɛba.».

eng: Jesus told them, When you pray, say: Father, uphold the holiness of your name. Bring in your kingdom.
local: Peeɖe Yesu heyi-wɛ se: «Yee ɩsɛɣ Ɛsɔ lɛ, ɩsɛɛ se: Caa! Ña-hɩɖɛ ɛsɛɛ paa le . La nɛ paa weyi ɛsɩm-ɖɩ! Ñe-kewiyaɣ ɛkɔɔ.

eng: Mary committed these things to memory and considered them carefully.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Maarɩɩ ɖɔkɩ tɔm ńdʋ́ tɩtɩŋa payɩ nɛ ɛmaɣzɩɣ tɩ-yɔɔ siŋŋ.

eng: When the Pharisee who had invited Jesus saw what was happening, he said to himself, If this man were a prophet, he would know what kind of woman is touching him. He would know that she is a sinner.
local: Farɩsɩ tʋ weyi ɛya Yesu yɔ, ɛna ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛmaɣzɩ ɛ-taa se: «Yee abalʋ ɛnɛ ɛɛkɛ náyʋ yɔ, ɛɛsɩm halʋ weyi etukuuni-i ḿbʋ́ yɔ nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛ-wɛtʋ wɛɛ yɔ: ɛkɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖʋ.».

eng: But I say to you who are willing to hear: Love your enemies. Do good to those who hate you.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu tasɩ yɔɔdʋʋ se: «Mbá mɩ iwelesiɣni-m yɔ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se ɩsɔɔlɩ mi-koyindinaa nɛ ɩla mbá papaɖɩɣ-mɩ yɔ camɩyɛ.

eng: Jesus asked him, What is your name? Legion, he replied, because many demons had entered him.
local: Peeɖe Yesu pɔzɩ abalʋ ɛnʋ se: «Payaɣ-ŋ se we?» Ecosi se payaɣ-m se: «You Laɖaa Tikaɣ.» Toovenim taa lɛ, aleewaa sakɩyɛ kɛwɛnɩ ɛ-wayɩ.

eng: Wherever they dont welcome you, as you leave that city, shake the dust off your feet as a witness against them. .
local: Yee ɩtalɩ tɛtʋ natʋyʋ taa nɛ ɛyáa ɛtamʋ-mɩ lɛ, ikpizi-wɛ mɩ-naŋgbanzɩ yɔɔ mʋzʋʋ nɛ ɩɖɛɛ nɛ pɩwɩlɩ se ɩkɔɔlɩ-wɛ nɛ iyebi-wɛ nɛ pa-sʋʋtʋ.

eng: If anyone there shares Gods peace, then your peace will rest on that person. If not, your blessing will return to you.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛwɛ ka-taa nɛ ɛñɩnɩɣ laŋhɛzɩyɛ yɔ, mɩ-laŋhɛzɩyɛ tɔm wɛɣ ɛ-cɔlɔ. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, tɩpɩsɩɣ mɩ-maɣmaɣ mɩ-cɔlɔ.

eng: An angel from the Lord appeared to him, standing to the right of the altar of incense.
local: Peeɖe Kɩpaɣlʋ tiyiyu nɔɔyʋ lɩ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛsɩŋ lone kɩbanɖɛ taa tɩlaaɖɩ ɖɩhɔɖɛ.

eng: News of him spread even more and huge crowds gathered to listen and to be healed from their illnesses.
local: Yesu hɩɖɛ tɛzaɣ sɛʋ paa le nɛ ɛyáa samaɣ sɔsɔɔ kpeɣliɣ ɛ-cɔlɔ se kanɩɩ ndʋ́ eheyiɣ-kɛ yɔ nɛ ɛla nɛ pɛ-ɛyáa kʋdɔmɩŋ cɛ.

eng: Give us the bread we need for today.
local: Ha-ɖʋ paa kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ kʋ-tɔɔnaɣ.

eng: The shepherds returned home, glorifying and praising God for all they had heard and seen. Everything happened just as they had been told.
local: Ninɖiɣyaa ḿbá pana-wɛ lɛ, pakpaɣ nʋmɔʋ kpem yɔɔ nɛ pasaŋ Ɛsɔ nɛ pɛɖɛyɩɣ-ɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa panɩwa nɛ pana yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩtɩŋa pɩlabɩ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ tiyiyu kɛkɛdʋʋ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: Jesus replied, Simon, I have something to say to you. Teacher, speak, he said.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu heyi Farɩsɩ tʋ ɛnʋ se: «Siimɔɔ! Mɛwɛnɩ tɔm natʋyʋ se meheyiɣ-ŋ.» Siimɔɔ cosi-i se: «Wɩlɩyʋ! Yɔɔdɩ.».

eng: Bless those who curse you. Pray for those who mistreat you.
local: Ɩwazɩ mbá pawɩlɩɣ-mɩ kpalʋʋ yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɩsɛɛ Ɛsɔ mbá panazɩɣ-mɩ yɔ paba yɔɔ.

eng: They pleaded with him not to order them to go back into the abyss.
local: Ɛlɛ́, aleewaa ḿbá petendi-i se ɛtaaɖɔɔnɩ-wɛ se powolo ɖenɖe kʋñɔŋ wɛɛ yɔ.

eng: They departed and went through the villages proclaiming the good news and healing people everywhere.
local: Peeɖe tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa ḿbá pɛɖɛwa nɛ pɔcɔʋ tɛtʋ cikpetu ndɩ ndɩ taa nɛ posusuu Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm nɛ palakɩ nɛ kʋdɔndɩnaa yɔɔ cɛkɩ paa le.».

eng: When Zechariah saw the angel, he was startled and overcome with fear.
local: Zakaarii na-ɩ lɛ, pɩlabɩ-ɩ yaaa nɛ sɔɔndʋ kpa-ɩ.

eng: Remain in this house, eating and drinking whatever they set before you, for workers deserve their pay. Dont move from house to house.
local: Ɩsʋ ka-taa lɛ, ɩcaɣ peeɖe nɛ paha-mɩ mbʋ́ lɛ, ɩtɔɔ nɛ ɩñɔɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ḿbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa se pɛhɛyɩ tʋmlaɖʋ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ yɔɔ. Ɩtaacɔɔ ɖɩsɩ tɩŋa taa yem yem.

eng: But Jesus would withdraw to deserted places for prayer.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu yeki-wɛ nɛ ɛɖɛɣ lakʋ taa nɛ ɛsɛɣ Ɛsɔ.

eng: Forgive us our sins, for we also forgive everyone who has wronged us. And dont lead us into temptation. .
local: Kpeɣ-ɖʋ ɖa-kɩwɛɛkɩm, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖa ɖɔɖɔ ɖikpeɣiɣ mbá payʋsʋʋnɩ-ɖʋ yɔ. Taayele nɛ pɩtakɩ-ɖʋ.».

eng: When eight days had passed, Jesus parents circumcised him and gave him the name Jesus. This was the name given to him by the angel before he was conceived.
local: Kɩyakʋ lutozo ñɩŋgʋ wiye lɛ, pɩtalaa se pɛpɛlɩ pɩɣa ŋ́gá nɛ paha-kɛ hɩɖɛ nɖɩ́ Ɛsɔ tiyiyu keheyi ko-ɖoo nɛ pʋcɔ ɛhaɣ-kɛ yɔ: ńɖɩ́ lɛ Yesu.

eng: A certain lender had two debtors. One owed enough money to pay five hundred people for a days work. The other owed enough money for fifty.
local: Peeɖe Yesu kɛdɩ-ɩ se: «Abalʋ nɔɔyʋ kɛwɛnɩ kɩndɩyaa naalɛ nabɛyɛ: kajalaɣ tʋ kɩndɩ liidiye pɔɔyɩsɩ taŋga nɛ lɛlʋ pɔɔyɩsɩ nɩɩnʋwa.

eng: If someone slaps you on the cheek, offer the other one as well. If someone takes your coat, dont withhold your shirt either.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛcɛbɩ ña-laɣzaɣ kadaŋa yɔ, kɛzɩ lɛɛka nɛ ɛtɛzɩ-kɛ cɛbʋ. Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛmʋ ño-toko sɔsɔʋ yɔ, yele nɛ ɛtɛzɩ cikpeluu mʋ́ʋ.

eng: A large herd of pigs was feeding on the hillside. The demons begged Jesus to let them go into the pigs. Jesus gave them permission.
local: Afanaa tikaɣ sɔsɔɔ nakɛyɛ kɛwɛ peeɖe pʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ kacazɩɣ tɔɔnaɣ. Ɛlɛ́, aleewaa tendi Yesu se ɛha-wɛ nʋmɔʋ nɛ pasʋʋ afanaa ḿbá pa-taa. Peeɖe etisaa.

eng: Herod the ruler heard about everything that was happening. He was confused because some people were saying that John had been raised from the dead.
local: Wiyaʋ sɔsɔ Eroodi nɩɣaɣ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa pɩlakaɣ ḿbʋ́ yɔ nɛ piliɣtiɣ-i. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛyáa lɛlaa tɔŋaɣ se: «Lɩm Sɔʋ Sɔnzɩ Laɖʋ Yohanɛɛsɩ weyi paakʋwa yɔ, ɛnʋ femna.».

eng: The angel said, Dont be afraid, Zechariah. Your prayers have been heard. Your wife Elizabeth will give birth to your son and you must name him John.
local: Ɛlɛ́, tiyiyu ɛnʋ eheyi-i se: «Zakaarii! Taasɔɔndɩ, Ɛsɔ nɩ ñe-tenduu. Ña-halʋ Elizaabɛɛtɩ hakɩ howa nɛ ɛlʋlɩ abalɩbɩɣa nɛ ŋyaa-kɛ se Yohanɛɛsɩ.

eng: Whenever you enter a city and its people welcome you, eat what they set before you.
local: Yee ɩtalɩ tɛtʋ natʋyʋ taa nɛ nɔɔyʋ mʋ-mɩ nɛ ɛha-mɩ pʋyʋ yɔ, ɩtɔɔ.

eng: One day when Jesus was teaching, Pharisees and legal experts were sitting nearby. They had come from every village in Galilee and Judea, and from Jerusalem. Now the power of the Lord was with Jesus to heal.
local: Kɩyakʋ nakʋyʋ Yesu wɩlaɣ Ɛsɔtɔm. Farɩsɩ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma nɛ paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa mbá palɩnɩ Galilee nɛ Yudee pɛ-tɛtʋ tɩŋa taa nɛ Yeruusalɛm yɔ, paacaɣ ɛ-cɔlɔ. Kɩpaɣlʋ ɖoŋ kɛwɛ ɛ-yɔɔ se ɛla nɛ kʋdɔndɩnaa yɔɔ cɛ.

eng: He also said to them, Imagine that one of you has a friend and you go to that friend in the middle of the night. Imagine saying, Friend, loan me three loaves of bread.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Yee mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ ɛwɛnɩ taabalʋ nɛ pʋdʋ wolo ɛ-cɔlɔ ɖoó hɛkʋ taa nɛ etendi-i se: ‹Hayɩ, man-taabalʋ! Kʋlʋ-m tɔɔnaɣ pazɩ.

eng: When the time came for their ritual cleansing, in accordance with the Law from Moses, they brought Jesus up to Jerusalem to present him to the Lord. .
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, alɩwaatʋ talɩ se pala cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ wɛtʋ sɔnzɩ ɛzɩ paɖʋʋ Mooyiizi paɣtʋ taa yɔ. Peeɖe pakpaɣ pɩɣa ŋ́gá nɛ powoni Yeruusalɛm se paɖʋzɩ-kɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ Ɛsɔ nesi taa.

eng: When they couldnt pay, the lender forgave the debts of them both. Which of them will love him more? .
local: Pa-taa nɔɔyʋ tapɩzɩɣ se ɛhɛyɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛtɛzɩ pa-naalɛ kpeɣu se pataatasɩ-ɩ hɛyʋʋ. Pa-naalɛ pa-taa lɛ, akɩlɩɣ-ɩ sɔɔlʋʋ?».

eng: Give to everyone who asks and dont demand your things back from those who take them.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛsʋlʋmɩ-ŋ nabʋyʋ yɔ, taapɛm-ɩ. Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛkpaɣ ña-ñɩm yɔ, taapɔzɩ-ɩ se ɛcɛlɩ-ŋ-pʋ.

eng: and the demons left the man and entered the pigs. The herd rushed down the cliff into the lake and drowned.
local: nɛ aleewaa ḿbá pese abalʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-wayɩ nɛ powolo pasʋʋ pa-taa. Ɛlɛ́, pakpaɣ seya nɛ pʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ petii pafalɩ teŋgu taa nɛ pɔñɔɔ lɩm nɛ pasɩ patɩŋa.

eng: others that Elijah had appeared, and still others that one of the ancient prophets had come back to life.
local: Lɛlaa se: «Náyʋ Elii lɩnɩnɩ ɛsɔdaa nɛ etii.» Lɛlaa ɖɔɖɔ se: «Đooo lɔŋ taa náyaa taa nɔɔyʋ femna.».

eng: He will be a joy and delight to you, and many people will rejoice at his birth.
local: Pɩlakɩ-ŋ leleŋ nɛ ña-taa hʋlʋmɩ nɛ ɛyáa sakɩyɛ mayɩ amaya nɛ ka-lʋlʋʋ.

eng: Heal the sick who are there, and say to them, Gods kingdom has come upon you.
local: Ɩla nɛ kʋdɔndɩnaa mbá pɛwɛ peeɖe yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ cɛ nɛ iheyi-wɛ se Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ talɩ mɩ-cɔlɔ kpam.

eng: Some men were bringing a man who was paralyzed, lying on a cot. They wanted to carry him in and place him before Jesus.
local: Peeɖe nabɛyɛ kpaɣ kalɩkalaɣ nakɛyɛ nɛ ka-ñalʋʋ nɛ pañɩnɩɣ se powoni-kɛ Yesu cɔlɔ kuduyuu tɛɛ ɖenɖe ɛɛwɛɛ yɔ.

eng: because a friend of mine on a journey has arrived and I have nothing to set before him.
local: Man-taabalʋ nɔɔyʋ lɩnɩ nʋmɔʋ nɛ ɛkɔɔ mɛn-tɛ nɛ mɛnfɛyɩnɩ pʋyʋ se mɛncɛlɩ-ɩ.›.

eng: Its written in the Law of the Lord, Every firstborn male will be dedicated to the Lord.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, paɖʋ Kɩpaɣlʋ paɣtʋ taa se: «Paa abalɩbɩɣa kajalaɣ ñɩŋga ŋgá lɛ, pasɩɩ-kɛ nɛ hɔɔlʋʋ nɛ kɛkɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ñɩŋga.».

eng: Simon replied, I suppose the one who had the largest debt canceled. Jesus said, You have judged correctly. .
local: Peeɖe Siimɔɔ cosi-i se: «Mamaɣzɩɣ se weyi ɛ-kɩmɩyɛ kɩlɩ paɣlʋʋ yɔ.» Ɛlɛ́, Yesu heyi-i se: «Ŋwɛnɩ toovenim.».

eng: Treat people in the same way that you want them to treat you.
local: Mbʋ́ ɩcaɣ se ɛyáa ɛlabɩ-mɩ yɔ, ɩlabɩ-wɛ ɖɔɖɔ ḿbʋ́ ɖeyi ɖeyi.

eng: When those who tended the pigs saw what happened, they ran away and told the story in the city and in the countryside.
local: Ɛyáa mbá pɔcɔŋaɣnɩ afanaa ḿbá pɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, pana mbʋ́ pɩlaba yɔ lɛ, pese nɛ powolo peheyi tɛtʋ sɔsɔtʋ taa ɛyáa nɛ haɖaa cikpema taa ñɩma.

eng: Herod said, I beheaded John, so now who am I hearing about? Herod wanted to see him.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Eroodi tɔ se: «Meyebi pɛsɛtɩ Yohanɛɛsɩ ñʋʋ lɛ, a-tɔm kpem manɩɣ pɔyɔɔdʋʋ yɔ?» Peeɖe ɛñɩnaɣ se ɛna pʋdʋ.

eng: for he will be great in the Lords eyes. He must not drink wine and liquor. He will be filled with the Holy Spirit even before his birth.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, kɛkɛɣ ɛyʋ sɔsɔ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛsɩndaa. Kaañɔʋ sʋlʋm mbʋ́ pʋkʋʋ ɛyáa yɔ pɩ-taa nabʋyʋ. Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu wɛɣ kɔ-cɔlɔ ɖooo ko-ɖoo lotu taa.

eng: Whenever you enter a city and the people dont welcome you, go out into the streets and say.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee ɩtalɩ tɛtʋ natʋyʋ taa nɛ patamʋ-mɩ lɛ, ɩcɔɔ habɛɛ yɔɔ nɛ isusi ɛyáa se:.

eng: but they couldnt reach him because of the crowd. So they took him up on the roof and lowered him—cot and all—through the roof tiles into the crowded room in front of Jesus.
local: Ɛyáa samaɣ yɔɔ lɛ, paanaɣ se patɩŋnɩ le nɛ patanɩ-kɛ. Ɛlɛ́, pakpanɩ-kɛ kuduyuu ñʋʋ taa nɛ pakʋ pɔʋ nɛ petisi-kɛ nɛ ka-ñalʋʋ ɛyáa samaɣ hɛkʋ taa Yesu cɔlɔ.

eng: Imagine further that he answers from within the house, Dont bother me. The door is already locked, and my children and I are in bed. I cant get up to give you anything.
local: Yee ɛ-taabalʋ ɛnʋ ecosi-i nɛ kuduyuu tɛɛ se: ‹Taacɛyɩ-m ḿbʋ́, mɛntɛm kuduyuu nɔɔ ɖɩɣʋ nɛ mankaɖɩ. Ma nɛ men-piya ɖɩtɛm hɛnʋʋ, maapɩzɩɣ mantasɩ kʋyʋʋ se mɛncɛlɩɣ-ŋ tɔɔnaɣ› yɔ.

eng: They offered a sacrifice in keeping with whats stated in the Law of the Lord, A pair of turtledoves or two young pigeons .
local: Peeɖe Maarɩɩ nɛ Yozɛɛfʋ palaba ɛzɩ paɖʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ Kɩpaɣlʋ paɣtʋ taa se palaa ahowa naalɛ yaa halikukunaa cikpema naalɛ yɔ.

eng: Jesus turned to the woman and said to Simon, Do you see this woman? When I entered your home, you didnt give me water for my feet, but she wet my feet with tears and wiped them with her hair.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛkɛzɩ ɛ-tɩ nɛ halʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ eheyi Siimɔɔ se: «Ŋnaɣ halʋ ɛnɛ? Mansʋʋ ña-ɖɩɣa taa cɩnɛ yɔ, ŋtaha-m lɩm se pɔkɔ ma-naŋgbanzɩ. Ɛlɛ́, halʋ ɛnɛ ɛ́lɛ́ kɔ ma-naŋgbanzɩ nɛ ɛ-ɛsɩtɛɣlɩm nɛ ɛhɛzɩ sɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛ-ñɔsɩ.

eng: If you love those who love you, why should you be commended? Even sinners love those who love them.
local: Yee mbá pɔsɔɔlɩ-mɩ yɔ pe-ɖeke ɩsɔɔlʋʋ lɛ, kʋjɔʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩɖaŋɩɣ se Ɛsɔ ɛlabɩ-mɩ yɔ? Halɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖaa maɣmaɣ ñɔsɔɔlɩ mbá pɔsɔɔlɩ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: People came to see what had happened. They came to Jesus and found the man from whom the demons had gone. He was sitting at Jesus feet, fully dressed and completely sane. They were filled with awe.
local: Peeɖe ɛyáa kʋyaa nɛ powolo se pana mbʋ́ pɩlaba yɔ. Powobi Yesu cɔlɔ lɛ, pamaɣnɩ abalʋ weyi aleewaa kɛwɛ ɛ-wayɩ yɔ. Ɛ-kpaaŋ cɛba nɛ esuu wondu kɩbandʋ nɛ ɛcaɣ Yesu naŋgbanzɩ tɛɛ. Ɛlɛ́, sɔɔndʋ kpa-wɛ.

eng: When the apostles returned, they described for Jesus what they had done. Taking them with him, Jesus withdrew privately to a city called Bethsaida.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu tiyiyaa pɩsɩ ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ pɛkɛdɩ-ɩ mbʋ́ palaba yɔ pɩtɩŋa. Ɛlɛ́, ɛ nɛ wɛ powolo pacaɣ ɖoli nɔɔyʋ pe-ɖeke tɛtʋ ndʋ́ payaɣ se Bɛtsayɩda yɔ tɩ-cɔlɔ.

eng: He will bring many Israelites back to the Lord their God.
local: Ŋ́gʋ́ yekina nɛ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma sakɩyɛ pɩsɩnɩ pa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ.

eng: As a complaint against you, we brush off the dust of your city that has collected on our feet. But know this: Gods kingdom has come to you.
local: ‹Đikpizi-mɩ mɩ-tɛtʋ taa mʋzʋʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩkpa ɖa-naŋgbanzɩ yɔɔ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɩtɩlɩ ɖeu se Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ talɩ mɩ-cɔlɔ kpam.›.

eng: When Jesus saw their faith, he said, Friend, your sins are forgiven. .
local: Peeɖe Yesu nawa se pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ eheyi kalɩkalaɣ ŋ́gá se: «Man-taabalʋ! Menkpeɣ-ŋ ña-kɩwɛɛkɩm.».

eng: I assure you, even if he wouldnt get up and help because of his friendship, he will get up and give his friend whatever he needs because of his friends brashness.
local: toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se pʋtɔma yɔ, ɛtaakʋyʋʋ se ɛcɛlɩ-ɩ mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛkɛ ɛ-taabalʋ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛkʋyʋʋ ɛcɛlɩ-ɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa ɛsɔɔlaa yɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛcɛyɩɣ-ɩ.

eng: A man named Simeon was in Jerusalem. He was righteous and devout. He eagerly anticipated the restoration of Israel, and the Holy Spirit rested on him.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ lɛ, abalʋ nɔɔyʋ wɛ Yeruusalɛm, payaɣ-ɩ se Siimeyɔɔ. Ɛɛkɛ ɛyʋ kʋtʋʋzʋ nɛ ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ. Ɛɛɖaŋ weyi ɛkɔŋ hɛzʋʋ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma laŋa yɔ. Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu kɛwɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ.

eng: You didnt greet me with a kiss, but she hasnt stopped kissing my feet since I came in.
local: Mɔnkɔm ñɛ-tɛ yɔ, ŋtamʋ-m nɛ ŋsɛ-m ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, halʋ ɛnɛ ɛ́lɛ́ mʋ-m nɛ halɩ ɛwɛɛ ɛkpaɣ ma-naŋgbanzɩ.

eng: If you do good to those who do good to you, why should you be commended? Even sinners do that.
local: Yee mbá palakɩ-mɩ camɩyɛ yɔ pe-ɖeke ɩlakɩ camɩyɛ lɛ, kʋjɔʋ ŋgʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ ɩɖaŋɩɣ se Ɛsɔ ɛlabɩ-mɩ yɔ? Halɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖaa maɣmaɣ ñalakɩ ḿbʋ́.

eng: Those people who had actually seen what had happened told them how the demon-possessed man had been delivered.
local: Mbá paawɛɛ nɛ pana mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩlaba yɔ, pɛkɛdɩ mbá pɔkɔma yɔ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pɩlaba nɛ ɛ-yɔɔ cɛ yɔ.

eng: When the crowds figured it out, they followed him. He welcomed them, spoke to them about Gods kingdom, and healed those who were sick.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛyáa samaɣ nɩɩ nɛ kakʋyɩ katɩŋ pa-wayɩ. Katalaa lɛ, Yesu mʋ-kɛ nɛ eheyi-kɛ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ tɔm nɛ ɛla nɛ mbá pɩɩwɛnɩ-wɛ yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ cɛ.

eng: He will go forth before the Lord, equipped with the spirit and power of Elijah. He will turn the hearts of fathers back to their children, and he will turn the disobedient to righteous patterns of thinking. He will make ready a people prepared for the Lord.
local: Ka-maɣmaɣ kɛwɛɣnɩ náyʋ Elii lɩmaɣza nɛ e-ɖoŋ nɛ kɛɖɛɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛnʋ nɔɔ nɛ kɛkpɛndɩ caanaa nɛ pe-piya nɛ kokuli kaañamtʋ tɩnaa ɛsɛ nɛ papɩsɩ kʋtʋʋzaa nɛ kɔñɔɔzɩ ɛjaɖɛ taa ñɩma ɖeu nɛ paɖaŋ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛnʋ kpam.».

eng: I assure you that Sodom will be better off on Judgment Day than that city.
local: Mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ hʋʋnɩ ɛyáa yɔ, Sodom ñɩma kʋñɔŋ ɛɛtalɩɣ tɛtʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-taa ñɩma ñɩŋgʋ.».

eng: The legal experts and Pharisees began to mutter among themselves, Who is this who insults God? Only God can forgive sins.
local: Ɛlɛ́, paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa nɛ Farɩsɩ ñɩma papazɩ miduu pe-liŋ tɛɛ nɛ pɔpɔzʋʋ ɖama se: «Ɛnɛ ɛkɛ anɩ nɛ ɛwɛɛkɩɣ Ɛsɔ hɩɖɛ ḿbʋ́? Apɩzɩɣ nɛ ekpeɣ kɩwɛɛkɩm nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ Ɛsɔ?».

eng: And I tell you: Ask and you will receive. Seek and you will find. Knock and the door will be opened to you.
local: Pʋyɔɔ meheyiɣ-mɩ se: ɩsʋlʋmɩ Ɛsɔ, ɛhaɣ-mɩ, ɩñɩnɩ ɛ-cɔlɔ, ihikiɣ, ɩma pɔɔyʋʋ yɔɔ, ɛtʋlʋʋ-mɩ.

eng: The Holy Spirit revealed to him that he wouldnt die before he had seen the Lords Christ.
local: nɛ keheyi-i se ɛnaɣ Weyi Kɩpaɣlʋ Lɩzaa nɛ etiyi-i yɔ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛsɩ.

eng: You didnt anoint my head with oil, but she has poured perfumed oil on my feet.
local: Ŋtataa ma-ñʋʋ taa sɔzɩŋ num. Ɛlɛ́, halʋ ɛnɛ ɛ́lɛ́ pɩyɩ ma-naŋgbanzɩ yɔɔ tɩlaaɖɩ.

eng: If you lend to those from whom you expect repayment, why should you be commended? Even sinners lend to sinners expecting to be paid back in full.
local: Yee ɩkɩndɩɣ mbá ɩɖaŋɩɣ se paahɛyɩ-mɩ pu-lone taa yɔ pe-ɖeke lɛ, kʋjɔʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩɖaŋɩɣ se Ɛsɔ ɛlabɩ-mɩ yɔ? Halɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖaa maɣmaɣ ñakɩndɩɣ pa-taabalaa lɛlaa se paahɛyɩ-wɛ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ paakɩndʋʋ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: Then everyone gathered from the region of the Gerasenes asked Jesus to leave their area because they were overcome with fear. So he got into the boat and returned across the lake.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Geraazaa ñɩma tɩŋa tendi Yesu se ɛkʋyɩ pɛ-tɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, sɔɔndʋ kpa-wɛ pɩŋŋ. Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛkpa kpɩyʋʋ taa se ɛɖɛɣ.

eng: When the day was almost over, the Twelve came to him and said, Send the crowd away so that they can go to the nearby villages and countryside and find lodging and food, because we are in a deserted place.
local: Wɩsɩ caɣaɣ kpem lɛ, ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa hiu nɛ naalɛ ḿbá powolo ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ peheyi-i se: «Heyi ɛyáa samaɣ se kowolo tɛtʋ cikpetu taa nɛ ɖɩsɩ nzɩ́ sɩmalɩnɩ cɩnɛ yɔ sɩ-taa nɛ pehiɣ ɖɩsʋyɛ nɛ tɔɔnaɣ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩwɛ ñɩtʋ taa.».

eng: Zechariah said to the angel, How can I be sure of this? My wife and I are very old.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Zakaarii pɔzɩ tiyiyu ɛnʋ se: «Ɛbɛ wɩlɩɣ-m se pɩkɛ toovenim? Ma nɛ ma-halʋ ɖɩtɛm kpadɩyʋʋ!».

eng: How terrible it will be for you, Chorazin. How terrible it will be for you, Bethsaida. If the miracles done among you had been done in Tyre and Sidon, they would have changed their hearts and lives long ago. They would have sat around in funeral clothes and ashes.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu tasɩ yɔɔdʋʋ se: «Koraazɛɛ nɛ Bɛtsayɩda ñɩma mɩ! Pʋtɔɔ-mɩ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, palabɩ Ɛsɔ hama lakasɩ nzɩ́ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ, yee paalabɩ-sɩ Tiiri nɛ Sidɔɔ ñɩma pɔ-cɔlɔ yɔ, paatɛm caɣʋ tɔlɩma taa nɛ posuu kutokiŋ nɛ pɩwɩlɩ se pɛlɛɣzɩ wɛtʋ.

eng: Jesus recognized what they were discussing and responded, Why do you fill your minds with these questions?.
local: Yesu na pa-lɩmaɣza ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛpɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma ɩhʋʋ mɩ-taa ḿbʋ́?.

eng: Everyone who asks, receives. Whoever seeks, finds. To everyone who knocks, the door is opened.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, weyi ɛsʋlʋmʋʋ-ɩ yɔ, ɛhaɣ-ɩ, weyi ɛ́lɛ́ ñɩnɩɣ ɛ-cɔlɔ yɔ, ehikiɣ, weyi ɛ́lɛ́ makɩ pɔɔyʋʋ yɔɔ yɔ, ɛtʋlʋʋ-ɩ.

eng: Led by the Spirit, he went into the temple area. Meanwhile, Jesus parents brought the child to the temple so that they could do what was customary under the Law.
local: Puwiye lɛ, Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu keti Siimeyɔɔ ɛnʋ nɛ kiwoni-i Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa taa. Pɩɣa caa nɛ ko-ɖoo powoni-kɛ se pala kɔ-yɔɔ mbʋ́ Mooyiizi kaɖʋ ɛ-paɣtʋ taa yɔ.

eng: This is why I tell you that her many sins have been forgiven; so she has shown great love. The one who is forgiven little loves little. .
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mankaɖɩɣ-ŋ se sɔɔlɩm sɔsɔm tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɛlaba yɔ, ɖɩwɩlɩɣ se pɛtɛm-ɩ kpeɣu ɛ-kɩwɛɛkɩm sakɩyɛ mbʋ́ ɛlaba yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, weyi pekpeɣiɣ-i kɩwɛɛkɩm pazɩ yɔ, ɛwɛɣnɩ sɔɔlɩm pazɩ.».

eng: Instead, love your enemies, do good, and lend expecting nothing in return. If you do, you will have a great reward. You will be acting the way children of the Most High act, for he is kind to ungrateful and wicked people.
local: Mɩ lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se ɩsɔɔlɩ mi-koyindinaa nɛ ɩla ɛyáa camɩyɛ. Ɩkɩndɩ-wɛ, ɛlɛ́, ɩtaaɖaŋ se paahɛyɩ-mɩ. Peeɖe ɩmʋʋ kɩhɛyʋʋ sɔsɔʋ nɛ pɩwɩlɩ se ɩkɛ Ɛsɔ Caabiyuu piya. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛlakɩ mbá pɛfɛyɩnɩ ɛsɩmɩyɛ yɔ nɛ kañadɩnaa camɩyɛ lakasɩ.

eng: The man from whom the demons had gone begged to come along with Jesus as one of his disciples. Jesus sent him away, saying.
local: Peeɖe abalʋ weyi aleewaa se ɛ-wayɩ yɔ etendi-i se ɛtɩŋɩɣ-ɩ nɛ ɛwɛɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ. Ɛlɛ́, Yesu kizi nɛ eheyi-i se:.

eng: He replied, You give them something to eat. But they said, We have no more than five loaves of bread and two fish—unless we go and buy food for all these people.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu cosi-wɛ se: «Ɩha-wɛ tɔɔnaɣ mɩ-maɣmaɣ nɛ pɔtɔɔ.» Peeɖe peheyi-i se: «Tindine hɔɔlasɩ kagbaanzɩ nɛ kpakpasɩ naalɛ pe-ɖeke pɛwɛnɩ ɖɔ-cɔlɔ. Yaa ŋcaɣ se ɖayabɩnɩ tɔɔnaɣ nɛ ɖɩcalɩ ɛyáa samaɣ kanɛ katɩŋa?».

eng: The angel replied, I am Gabriel. I stand in Gods presence. I was sent to speak to you and to bring this good news to you.
local: Peeɖe tiyiyu ɛnʋ ecosi-i se: «Ma Gabrɩyɛɛlɩ, Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ mɛwɛɛ. Ɛnʋ tiyini-m se mɔnkɔɔ meheyi-ŋ tɔm kɩbandʋ tʋnɛ.

eng: But Tyre and Sidon will be better off at the judgment than you.
local: Toovenim lɛ, kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ hʋʋnɩ ɛyáa yɔ, Tiiri nɛ Sidɔɔ pɛ-tɛtʋ taa ñɩma kʋñɔŋ ɛɛtalɩɣ mɩ-ñɩŋgʋ.

eng: Which is easier—to say, Your sins are forgiven, or to say, Get up and walk?.
local: Yee meheyi kalɩkalaɣ ŋ́gá se menkpeɣ-kɛ ka-kɩwɛɛkɩm yaa kakʋyɩ kɔɖɔ, tɩ-naalɛ tɩ-taa lɛ, ndʋ́ tɩfɛyɩ kaɖɛ?.

eng: Which father among you would give a snake to your child if the child asked for a fish?.
local: Yee mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ ɛwɛnɩ pɩɣa nɛ kasʋlʋmɩ-ɩ kpakpayaɣ, ɛcɛlɩɣ-kɛ ɖʋm naa we?.

eng: Simeon took Jesus in his arms and praised God. He said.
local: Peeɖe Siimeyɔɔ mʋ-kɛ nɛ ɛsɛɛ Ɛsɔ se:.

eng: Then Jesus said to her, Your sins are forgiven. .
local: Peeɖe Yesu heyi halʋ ɛnʋ se: «Menkpeɣ-ŋ ña-kɩwɛɛkɩm.».

eng: Be compassionate just as your Father is compassionate.
local: Ɩna ɛyáa pʋtɔdɩyɛ ɛzɩ mɩ-Caa Ɛsɔ yɔ.».

eng: Return home and tell the story of what God has done for you. So he went throughout the city proclaiming what Jesus had done for him.
local: «Pɩsɩ ña-ñɩma cɔlɔ nɛ ŋheyi-wɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa Ɛsɔ labɩ-ŋ yɔ.» Abalʋ ɛnʋ, ɛcaŋ ɛɖɛɛ nɛ eheyi ɛ-tɛtʋ taa ñɩma tɩŋa payɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa Yesu labɩ-ɩ yɔ.

eng: Jesus said to his disciples, Seat them in groups of about fifty. .
local: Ŋgʋ́, abalaa katalɩ ɛzɩ kudokiŋ kagbaanzɩ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, Yesu heyi ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se: «Iheyi ɛyáa ḿbá se pacaɣ cabɩ cabɩ ɛzɩ nɩɩnʋwa nɩɩnʋwa yɔ.».

eng: Know this: What I have spoken will come true at the proper time. But because you didnt believe, you will remain silent, unable to speak until the day when these things happen.
local: Đenɖe ŋtetisi se mɔn-tɔm kɔŋ labʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ paɖʋwa yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ, ŋpɩsɩɣ kaayɔɔdaɣ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ mɔn-tɔm ńdʋ́ tɩlaba yɔ.».

eng: And you, Capernaum, will you be honored by being raised up to heaven? No, you will be cast down to the place of the dead.
local: Mɩ Kapɛrnayum ñɩma lɛ, ɩmaɣzɩɣ se ɩkpaɣ ɛsɔdaa yaa we? Ɩɩkpaɣ kaʋ. Ɛlɛ́, petisiɣ-mɩ tɛtɛɛ ɖenɖe kʋñɔŋ maatɛŋ wɛɛ yɔ.».

eng: But so that you will know that the Human One has authority on the earth to forgive sins —Jesus now spoke to the man who was paralyzed, I say to you, get up, take your cot, and go home. .
local: Mancaɣ mawɩlɩ-mɩ se Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ wɛnɩ ɖoŋ se ekpeɣ ɛyáa pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ.» Peeɖe eheyi kalɩkalaɣ ŋ́gá se: «Ña! Kʋyɩ ŋkpaɣ ña-ñalʋʋ nɛ ŋkpe.».

eng: If a child asked for an egg, what father would give the child a scorpion?.
local: Yaa kasʋlʋm-ɩ yaɖɛ, ɛcɛlɩɣ-kɛ pɩcaka naa we? Mantasa.

eng: Now, master, let your servant go in peace according to your word.
local: «Kɩpaɣlʋ! Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ŋlabɩ mbʋ́ ŋɖʋwa se ŋlakɩ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ŋpɩzɩɣ ŋyele nɛ pɩkpaɣ ña-tʋmlaɖʋ ma laŋhɛzɩyɛ taa.

eng: The other table guests began to say among themselves, Who is this person that even forgives sins.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛ nɛ mbá paawɛ ɖɩtɔɔyɛ yɔ, pamaɣzɩɣ pa-taa se: «Anɩ lɛ ɛnɛ nɛ ɛkatɩ nɛ ɛtɔŋ se ekpeɣ kɩwɛɛkɩm?».

eng: Dont judge, and you wont be judged. Dont condemn, and you wont be condemned. Forgive, and you will be forgiven.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ heyuu se: «Ɩtaahʋʋnɩ nɔɔyʋ nɛ Ɛsɔ ɛɛhʋʋnɩ-mɩ. Ɩtaakʋ nɔɔyʋ tɔm nɛ Ɛsɔ ɛɛkʋʋ mɩ-ñɩndʋ. Ikpeɣ nɛ Ɛsɔ kpeɣ-mɩ.

eng: When Jesus returned, the crowd welcomed him, for they had been waiting for him.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu lɩɩnɩ teŋgu kidiiliŋ lɛɛkʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛpɩsɩ. Ɛtalaa lɛ, ɛyáa samaɣ mʋ-ɩ ɖeu, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, patɩŋa paaɖaŋ-ɩ.

eng: They did so, and everyone was seated.
local: Ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa caɣzɩ patɩŋa payɩ ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Meanwhile, the people were waiting for Zechariah, and they wondered why he was in the sanctuary for such a long time.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ lɛ, ɛyáa samaɣ kɛwɛ awayɩ nɛ kaɖaŋ Zakaarii nɛ pɩlabɩ-kɛ piti. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛkɩlɩ leɖuu lone kaɖɛ ñɩnɖɛ ńɖɩ́ ɖɩ-taa.

eng: Whoever listens to you listens to me. Whoever rejects you rejects me. Whoever rejects me rejects the one who sent me. .
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛtasɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa heyuu se: «Weyi ɛnɩɣnɩ-mɩ yɔ, ɛnɩnɩ-m. Weyi ɛlɔʋ-mɩ yɔ, ɛlɔ-m. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ lɔʋ-m yɔ, ɛlɔ weyi etiyi-m yɔ.».

eng: Right away, the man stood before them, picked up his cot, and went home, praising God.
local: Peeɖe katɩkʋyɩ patɩŋa pɛ-ɛsɩndaa nɛ kakpaɣ ka-ñalʋʋ nɛ kasaŋ Ɛsɔ kpem yɔɔ.

eng: If you who are evil know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will the heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him? .
local: Mbá mɩ ɩkɛ azaɣ́a yɔ, yee ɩsɩm haʋ mi-piya mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ lɛ, ɛzɩma mɩ-Caa Ɛsɔ weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ, ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛha e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu mbá pasʋlʋmʋʋ-ɩ-kʋ yɔ?».

eng: because my eyes have seen your salvation.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ma-maɣmaɣ mana Ñʋʋ Yaɖʋ nɛ mɛ-ɛsɛ.

eng: Jesus said to the woman, Your faith has saved you. Go in peace. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu heyi halʋ ɛnʋ se: «Lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ŋwɛna yɔ, kɩyabɩ ña-ñʋʋ. Kpemni laŋhɛzɩyɛ.».

eng: Give, and it will be given to you. A good portion—packed down, firmly shaken, and overflowing—will fall into your lap. The portion you give will determine the portion you receive in return. .
local: Ɩha lɛlaa nɛ Ɛsɔ ha-mɩ. Mbʋ́ ɩmaɣzɩɣna nɛ ɩɖʋʋ lɛlaa yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ Ɛsɔ kɔŋ-mɩ maɣzɩnaʋ. Ɛɖʋʋ-mɩ nɛ eciɣdi nɛ pɩñɩɣ ɖeu nɛ pusu pɩwadɩ waaa.».

eng: A man named Jairus, who was a synagogue leader, came and fell at Jesus feet. He pleaded with Jesus to come to his house.
local: Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, Ɛsɔ ɖɩsɛyɛ naɖɩyɛ taa ñʋʋdʋ sɔsɔ weyi payaɣ se Yayiruusi yɔ, ɛtalɩ eluŋ Yesu tɛɛ nɛ ewini-i se ewolo ɛ-tɛ.

eng: He took the five loaves and the two fish, looked up to heaven, blessed them, and broke them and gave them to the disciples to set before the crowd.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu kpaɣ tindine hɔɔlasɩ kagbaanzɩ ńzɩ́ nɛ kpakpasɩ ńzɩ́ sɩ-naalɛ nɛ ɛkpazɩ ɛ-ɛsɛ ɛsɔdaa nɛ ɛsɛɛ pʋ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛcɩyɩ nɛ ɛcɛlɩ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se patayɩ ɛyáa samaɣ ŋ́gá.

eng: When he came out, he was unable to speak to them. They realized he had seen a vision in the temple, for he gestured to them and couldnt speak.
local: Ɛlɩwa lɛ, ɛtapɩzɩ ekuli ɛ-nɔɔ nɛ ɛyɔɔdɩnɩ-wɛ. Nesi yem ɛyɔɔdaɣnɩ-wɛ. Peeɖe peɖiɣzinaa se Ɛsɔ wɩlɩ-ɩ pʋyʋ lone ńɖɩ́ ɖɩ-taa.

eng: The seventy-two returned joyously, saying, Lord, even the demons submit themselves to us in your name.
local: Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, Yesu tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa nɩɩnʋwa nɛ nɩɩlɛ nɛ naalɛ ḿbá papɩsɩ ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ nɛ peheyi-i se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ! Pɩkpɛndɩnɩ aleewaa nɛ pañaŋ-ɖʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩkalɩɣ-wɛ nɛ ñɔ-nɔɔ yɔ.».

eng: All the people were beside themselves with wonder. Filled with awe, they glorified God, saying, Weve seen unimaginable things today.
local: Ɛyáa ḿbá pana ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɩɖɩɣzɩ patɩŋa payɩ nɛ sɔɔndʋ kpa-wɛ nɛ pasaŋ Ɛsɔ nɛ pɔyɔɔdʋʋ se: «Sɔnɔ ɖɩna mbʋ́ wiɖiyi ɖɩtana kaʋ yɔ.».

eng: Jesus was throwing out a demon that causes muteness. When the demon was gone, the man who couldnt speak began to talk. The crowds were amazed.
local: Nakʋyʋ wiye Yesu ɖɔɔnɩ eleeu nɔɔyʋ. Ɛɛpɩsɩ abalʋ nɔɔyʋ kaayɔɔdaɣ. Ese ɛ-wayɩ lɛ, abalʋ ɛnʋ ɛpazɩ yɔɔdʋʋ nɛ pɩɖɩɣzɩ ɛyáa samaɣ pɩŋŋ.

eng: You prepared this salvation in the presence of all peoples.
local: ɛnʋ ŋñɔɔzaa nɛ ɛyáa tɩŋa naɣ-ɩ.

eng: Everyone ate until they were full, and the disciples filled twelve baskets with the leftovers.
local: Patɩŋa pɔtɔɔ pahaɣ nɛ pokuu hɔɔlasɩ nzɩ́ sɩkazaa yɔ ɖɔkɩŋ hiu nɛ naalɛ.

eng: Jesus also told them a riddle. A blind person cant lead another blind person, right? Wont they both fall into a ditch?.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu tuu-wɛ eduuye se: «Yʋlʋmaa ɛɛhɔŋ ɖama. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, pɔtɔlʋʋ patɩŋa pɔʋ nakʋyʋ taa.

eng: Jesus replied, I saw Satan fall from heaven like lightning.
local: Peeɖe Yesu cosi-wɛ se: «Mana Satanɩ, ɛlɩnɩ ɛsɔdaa nɛ ɛtɔlɩ ɛzɩ tɛʋ ñɩlɩsʋʋ yɔ.

eng: When he completed the days of his priestly service, he returned home.
local: Kɩyakɩŋ weyi pʋwɛɛ se Zakaarii ɛlabɩnɩ tʋmɩyɛ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa taa yɔ ɩtɛma lɛ, ɛlɩɩ ekpe.

eng: But some of them said, He throws out demons with the authority of Beelzebul, the ruler of demons.
local: Peeɖe pa-taa nabɛyɛ yɔɔdaa se: «Aleewaa caa Belzeebuuli hanɩ-ɩ ɖoŋ nɛ ɛɖɔɔnʋʋnɩ aleewaa.».

eng: Its a light for revelation to the Gentiles and a glory for your people Israel.
local: Ɛnʋ lɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩwɩlɩɣ ajɛya kpeekpe nʋmɔʋ yɔ. Ɛnʋ yekina nɛ patɩŋa pasɩm-ŋ nɛ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma hɩɖɛ sɛɛ.».

eng: Afterward, Jesus went out and saw a tax collector named Levi sitting at a kiosk for collecting taxes. Jesus said to him, Follow me. .
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu lɩɩ nɛ ɛna tikee mʋyʋ weyi payaɣ se Leevi yɔ, ɛcaɣ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ taa. Peeɖe Yesu heyi-i se: «Kʋyɩ ŋtɩŋ-m.».

eng: Once when Jesus was praying by himself, the disciples joined him, and he asked them, Who do the crowds say that I am? .
local: Nakʋyʋ wiye Yesu sɛɣaɣ Ɛsɔ e-ɖeke nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa wɛɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ. Peeɖe ɛpɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Ɛyáa maɣzɩɣ se ma lɛ anɩ?».

eng: Disciples arent greater than their teacher, but whoever is fully prepared will be like their teacher.
local: Tʋmɩyɛ tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyʋ nɔɔyʋ ɛɛkɩlɩɣ ɛ-wɩlɩyʋ. Ɛlɛ́, tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyʋ ɛnʋ ɛkɔm ɛsɩ tʋmɩyɛ ɖeu yɔ, ɛ nɛ ɛ-wɩlɩyʋ ɛnʋ pɛwɛɣ kɩmaŋ.».

eng: because his only daughter, a twelve-year-old, was dying. As Jesus moved forward, he faced smothering crowds.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛ-pɩɣa peliɣa caɣ sɩbʋ. Ŋgʋ́, ke-ɖeke koŋ ɛwɛna. Kɛwɛnɩ ɛzɩ pɩnzɩ hiu nɛ naalɛ yɔ. Yesu kʋyaa se ewoki lɛ, ɛyáa samaɣ ñɩkɩɣ-ɩ cenje.

eng: Look, I have given you authority to crush snakes and scorpions underfoot. I have given you authority over all the power of the enemy. Nothing will harm you.
local: Iwelesi nɛ ɩnɩɩ, maha-mɩ ɖoŋ se ɩɖɔ ɖʋmaa nɛ pɩcasɩ pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɩwa Kañadʋ ɖoŋ tɩŋa payɩ. Pʋyʋ nɔɔyʋ ɛɛlakɩ-mɩ.

eng: Afterward, his wife Elizabeth became pregnant. She kept to herself for five months, saying.
local: Pɩlabɩ pazɩ lɛ, ɛ-halʋ Elizaabɛɛtɩ haɣ howa. Ɛlɛ́, ɛmɛlɩ ɖɩɣa fenasɩ kagbaanzɩ. Peeɖe ɛyɔɔdaa se:.

eng: Others were testing him, seeking a sign from heaven.
local: Pa-taa lɛlaa ñɩkaɣ ɛ-nɔɔ cɔlɔ tɔm. Pʋ-yɔɔ pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ se ɛla ɛsɔdaa hama lakasɩ nasɩyɩ nɛ pana.

eng: His father and mother were amazed by what was said about him.
local: Siimeyɔɔ yɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɩɖɩɣzɩ Yesu caa nɛ e-ɖoo pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ.

eng: Levi got up, left everything behind, and followed him.
local: Ɛ́lɛ́ kʋyɩ eyele pɩtɩŋa nɛ ɛtɩŋ-ɩ.

eng: They answered, John the Baptist, others Elijah, and still others that one of the ancient prophets has come back to life.
local: Pocosi-i se: «Nabɛyɛ tɔŋ se ña lɛ Lɩm Sɔʋ Sɔnzɩ Laɖʋ Yohanɛɛsɩ. Lɛlaa se náyʋ Elii lɩnɩnɩ ɛsɔdaa nɛ etii. Lɛlaa ñɔtɔŋ se ɖooo lɔŋ taa náyaa taa nɔɔyʋ femna.».

eng: Why do you see the splinter in your brothers or sisters eye but dont notice the log in your own eye?.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ tuuu eduuye se: «Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ ŋnaɣ kemaɣ ŋgá kɛwɛ ña-taabalʋ ɛsɩyɛ taa yɔ nɛ ŋŋnaɣ ɖaʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩwɛ ña-ñɩnɖɛ taa yɔ?.

eng: A woman was there who had been bleeding for twelve years. She had spent her entire livelihood on doctors, but no one could heal her.
local: Halʋ nɔɔyʋ kɛwɛ pa-taa peeɖe ɖɔɖɔ. Calɩm kɛwɛɛ pikpeŋni-i nɛ pɩcɛyɩɣ-ɩ pɩŋŋ pɩnzɩ hiu nɛ naalɛ yɔ. Halʋ ɛnʋ, e-liidiye tɩŋa tɛmnɩ fɛɖaa tɛ. Ɛlɛ́, nɔɔyʋ tapɩzɩ ɛla nɛ ɛ-yɔɔ cɛ.

eng: Nevertheless, dont rejoice because the spirits submit to you. Rejoice instead that your names are written in heaven. .
local: Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pɩtaalabɩ-mɩ leleŋ se aleewaa ñaŋ-mɩ. Ɛlɛ́, pɩlabɩ-mɩ leleŋ se Ɛsɔ ma mɩ-hɩla ɛ-takayaɣ taa.».

eng: This is the Lords doing. He has shown his favor to me by removing my disgrace among other people.
local: «Mana mbʋ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ labɩ-m yɔ: ɛlabɩ-m lootiye nɛ ɛlɩzɩ-m mbʋ́ pɩkɛnɩ-m fɛyɛ ɛyáa ɛsɩndaa yɔ pɩ-taa.».

eng: Because Jesus knew what they were thinking, he said to them, Every kingdom involved in civil war becomes a wasteland, and a house torn apart by divisions will collapse.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu na pa-lɩmaɣza ḿbʋ́ nɛ eheyi-wɛ se: «Yee kewiyaɣ nakɛyɛ ɛwɛɛ nɛ ka-taa ɛyáa youni ɖama yɔ, kaalaɣzɩɣ yɔkʋʋ. Halɩ ka-taa ɖɩsɩ tɔlʋʋ ɖama yɔɔ.

eng: Simeon blessed them and said to Mary his mother, This boy is assigned to be the cause of the falling and rising of many in Israel and to be a sign that generates opposition.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛwazɩ pa nɛ Yesu pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ eheyi Yesu ɖoo Maarɩɩ se: «Ɛsɔ lɩzɩ pɩɣa kanɛ se Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma sakɩyɛ ɛtɔlɩ nɛ lɛlaa hiɣ ñʋʋ yabʋ. Ŋ́gá wɩlɩɣnɩ ɛyáa mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ nɛ paatisiɣ kɔ-tɔm.

eng: Then Levi threw a great banquet for Jesus in his home. A large number of tax collectors and others sat down to eat with them.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Leevi la kazandʋ ɛ-tɛ nɛ ɛ́yáa Yesu nɛ tikee mʋyaa sakɩyɛ nɛ ɛyáa lɛlaa sakɩyɛ nɛ powolo pacaɣ tɔɔnaɣ ɖɩtɔɔyɛ.

eng: He asked them, And what about you? Who do you say that I am? Peter answered, The Christ sent from God.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu pɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Mɩ yɔ, mɩhʋʋ se ma lɛ anɩ?» Ɛlɛ́, Pɩyɛ cosi-i se: «Ña lɛ Weyi Ɛsɔ Lɩzaa Yɔ.».

eng: How can you say to your brother or sister, Brother, Sister, let me take the splinter out of your eye, when you dont see the log in your own eye? You deceive yourselves! First take the log out of your eye, and then you will see clearly to take the splinter out of your brothers or sisters eye.
local: Ɛzɩma ŋpɩzɩɣ ŋheyi ña-taabalʋ se: ‹Sɩŋ malɩzɩ-ŋ ñɛ-ɛsɩyɛ taa kemaɣ› nɛ ŋŋnaɣ ɖaʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩwɛ ña-ñɩnɖɛ taa yɔ? Tɛɛ nɛ pʋ-yɔɔ tʋ ña! Lɩzɩ ɖaʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩwɛ ñɛ-ɛsɩyɛ taa yɔ nɛ pʋcɔ ŋna camɩyɛ nɛ ŋlɩzɩ kemaɣ ŋgá kɛwɛ ña-taabalʋ ñɩnɖɛ taa yɔ.».

eng: She came up behind him and touched the hem of his clothes, and at once her bleeding stopped.
local: Peeɖe ewobi Yesu cɔlɔ nɛ etukuni e-toko nɔɔ nɛ ɛ-wayɩ nɛ calɩm mbʋ́ pikpeŋaɣnɩ-ɩ yɔ pɩsɩŋ kpaagbaa.

eng: At that very moment, Jesus overflowed with joy from the Holy Spirit and said, I praise you, Father, Lord of heaven and earth, because youve hidden these things from the wise and intelligent and shown them to babies. Indeed, Father, this brings you happiness.
local: Yesu yɔɔdaɣ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yele nɛ ɛ-laŋɩyɛ hʋlʋmɩ siŋŋ nɛ ɛtɔ se: «Man-Caa! Ɛsɔdaa nɛ tataa Kɩpaɣlʋ! Mansaŋ-ŋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ŋmɛsɩ ñɔ-tɔm lɔŋsɩnɖaa nɛ lɛɣsɩnɖaa nɛ ŋkuli tɩ-yɔɔ nɛ mbá pɛtɛkɛ pʋyʋ yɔ panɩɩ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ. Man-Caa! Ñɔsɔɔlɩna se pɩla ḿbʋ́ nɛ pɩla ɖɔɖɔ.».

eng: When Elizabeth was six months pregnant, God sent the angel Gabriel to Nazareth, a city in Galilee.
local: Pɩlabɩ fenasɩ loɖo ɛzɩ Elizaabɛɛtɩ haɣʋ howa yɔ. Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ʋ́ Ɛsɔ tiyi e-tiyiyu Gabrɩyɛɛlɩ Galilee tɛtʋ ndʋ́ payaɣ-tʋ se Nazarɛɛtɩ yɔ tɩ-taa.

eng: If Satan is at war with himself, how will his kingdom endure? I ask this because you say that I throw out demons by the authority of Beelzebul.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ yee Satanɩ nɛ ɛ-taabalaa poyouni ɖama yɔ, e-kewiyaɣ ɛɛlaɣzɩɣ yɔkʋʋ. Mɔyɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩyɔɔdʋʋ se aleewaa caa Belzeebuuli hanɩ-m ɖoŋ nɛ mɔnɖɔɔnʋʋnɩ aleewaa.

eng: so that the inner thoughts of many will be revealed. And a sword will pierce your innermost being too.
local: Peeɖe eyeki nɛ pukuli mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛyáa sakɩyɛ maɣzɩɣ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ paa weyi ɛna. Ña ko-ɖoo lɛ, ŋkɔŋ nɩʋ siziŋ ña-lɩmaɣza taa ɛzɩ pɔsɔbɩ-ŋ sɩɣa yɔ.».

eng: The Pharisees and their legal experts grumbled against his disciples. They said, Why do you eat and drink with tax collectors and sinners.
local: Peeɖe pɩtɛkɛdɩnɩ Farɩsɩ ñɩma nɛ paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa mbá pɛkɛ pɔ-hɔɔlʋʋ taa ñɩma yɔ nɛ pɔpɔzɩ Yesu tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se: «Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma mɩ nɛ tikee mʋyaa nɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖaa lɛlaa ɩkpɛndɩ ɩtɔkɩ nɛ ɩñɔʋ?».

eng: Jesus gave them strict orders not to tell this to anyone.
local: Peeɖe Yesu paɣ́ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa ɖeu se pataaheyi nɔɔyʋ mbʋ́ ɛkɛnaa yɔ.

eng: A good tree doesnt produce bad fruit, nor does a bad tree produce good fruit.
local: Yesu tasɩ-wɛ tuuu eduuye se: «tɩʋ kɩbaŋgʋ ɛɛlʋlʋʋ pee kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ nɛ tɩʋ kɩdɛkɛdʋʋ ñaalʋlʋʋ pee kɩbana.

eng: Who touched me? Jesus asked. When everyone denied it, Peter said, Master, the crowds are surrounding you and pressing in on you.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu pɔzɩ ɛyáa se: «Atukuni-m?» Patɩŋa pɛkpɛzɩ se patana nɛ Pɩyɛ pɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Wɩlɩyʋ! Ɛyáa samaɣ ñɩkɩɣ-ŋ nɛ ŋtasɩɣ pɔzʋʋ se atukuni-ŋ?».

eng: My Father has handed all things over to me. No one knows who the Son is except the Father, or who the Father is except the Son and anyone to whom the Son wants to reveal him. .
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, eheyi ɛyáa se: «Man-Caa cɛlɩ-m pɩtɩŋa payɩ. Nɔɔyʋ tasɩ mbʋ́ mɛnkɛnaa yɔ nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ man-Caa nɛ nɔɔyʋ tasɩm-ɩ nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ ma nɛ mbá mɔnsɔɔlaa se mawɩlɩ-ɩ-wɛ yɔ.».

eng: to a virgin who was engaged to a man named Joseph, a descendant of Davids house. The virgins name was Mary.
local: Etiyi-i pɛlɛ nɔɔyʋ cɔlɔ. Pɛlɛ ɛnʋ, weyi esu-i yɔ, payaɣ-ɩ se Yozɛɛfʋ. Yozɛɛfʋ kɛ wiyaʋ sɔsɔ Daaviidi liɖe taa tʋ. Pɛlɛ ɛnʋ lɛ, payaɣ-ɩ se Maarɩɩ.

eng: If I throw out demons by the authority of Beelzebul, then by whose authority do your followers throw them out? Therefore, they will be your judges.
local: Yee ma mɔnɖɔɔnʋʋ aleewaa nɛ Belzeebuuli ɖoŋ lɛ, anɩ ñaha mi-piya ɖoŋ nɛ sɩɖɔɔnʋʋnɩ-wɛ yɔ? Mi-piya ńzɩ́, sɩ-maɣmaɣ sɩkɔŋnɩ wɩlʋʋ se mɩ-tɔm sɩba.

eng: There was also a prophet, Anna the daughter of Phanuel, who belonged to the tribe of Asher. She was very old. After she married, she lived with her husband for seven years.
local: Náyʋ halɩñɩnʋ nɔɔyʋ kɛwɛ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa taa peeɖe ɖɔɖɔ. Payaɣ-ɩ se Ana. Ɛkɛ Asɛɛrɩ liɖe taa tʋ Fanʋyɛɛlɩ pɛlɛ, ɛkpadɩyɩ koŋgonoo. Abalʋ weyi ɛɛcɛbɩ ɛ-pɩsatʋ yɔ, ɛ nɛ ɩ pacaɣ pɩnzɩ lʋbɛ lɛ, ɛ́lɛ́ ɖɛɛ ɛsɩ.

eng: Jesus answered, Healthy people dont need a doctor, but sick people do.
local: Yesu cosi-wɛ se: «Pɩtɛkɛ alaafɩya tɩnaa pʋpɔzʋʋ se powolo fɛɖaa tɛ, kʋdɔndɩnaa pʋpɔzʋʋ se powolo.

eng: He said, The Human One must suffer many things and be rejected—by the elders, chief priests, and the legal experts—and be killed and be raised on the third day. .
local: Ɛtasɩ-wɛ heyuu se pʋwɛɛ se Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ ɛla kʋñɔŋ siŋŋ. Yuda ñɩma sɔsaa nɛ pɔ-cɔjɔnaa sɔsaa nɛ pa-paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa pɔkɔŋ kizuu ɛ-tɔm nɛ pakʋ-ɩ ɛsɩ. Kɩyakʋ naadozo ñɩŋgʋ wiye lɛ, Ɛsɔ fezi-i nɛ sɩm taa.

eng: Each tree is known by its own fruit. People dont gather figs from thorny plants, nor do they pick grapes from prickly bushes.
local: Pasɩŋ paa tɩʋ ŋgʋ́ nɛ ki-pee. Paakoyuu hiyikajásɩ sɔɔ tɩʋ yɔɔ, paakoyuu ɖɔɖɔ leemiŋ ŋgone yɔɔ.

eng: But Jesus said, Someone touched me. I know that power has gone out from me. .
local: Yesu pɩsɩnɩ-ɩ se: «Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, nɔɔyʋ tukuni-m. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, manɩ ɖoŋ nɩɩyɩ lɩ mɔ-yɔɔ.».

eng: Turning to the disciples, he said privately, Happy are the eyes that see what you see.
local: Peeɖe Yesu kɛzɩ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa yɔɔ nɛ eheyi pe-ɖeke se: «Mbá panaɣ ɛzɩ ɩnaɣʋ yɔ, pehiɣ pa-tɩ!.

eng: When the angel came to her, he said, Rejoice, favored one! The Lord is with you.
local: Peeɖe Ɛsɔ tiyiyu woba ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛsɛɛ-ɩ se: «Weyi ña Ɛsɔ labɩ-ŋ lootiye yɔ, sɛɛ ɖeu! Kɩpaɣlʋ wɛ ñɔ-cɔlɔ.».

eng: But if I throw out demons by the power of God, then Gods kingdom has already overtaken you.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Ɛsɔ ɖoŋ mɔnɖɔɔnʋʋnɩ aleewaa. Ḿbʋ́ wɩlɩɣna se Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ talɩ mɩ-cɔlɔ kpam.

eng: She was now an -year-old widow. She never left the temple area but worshipped God with fasting and prayer night and day.
local: Peeɖe ɛcaɣ lelitu nɛ ɛkɔɔ ɛtalɩ pɩnzɩ nɩɩnʋwa nɛ niidozo nɛ naanza. Ɛɛwɛɛ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa taa alɩwaatʋ kpeekpe nɛ ɛsaŋ-ɩ wɩsɩ nɛ ɖoó nɛ ɛhɔkʋʋ nɔɔ nɛ ɛsɛɣ-ɩ.

eng: I didnt come to call righteous people but sinners to change their hearts and lives. .
local: Pɩtɛkɛ mbá pamaɣzɩɣ se pɛkɛ kʋtʋʋzaa yɔ, pa-wayɩ mɔnkɔma. Ɛlɛ́, mbá pasɩm pa-tɩ se pɛkɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖaa yɔ, pa-wayɩ mɔnkɔm se pɛlɛɣzɩ wɛtʋ.».

eng: Jesus said to everyone, All who want to come after me must say no to themselves, take up their cross daily, and follow me.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, eheyi patɩŋa payɩ se: «Weyi e-liu wɛɛ se ɛtɩŋɩɣ ma-wayɩ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɛsɔɔ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ etisi nɛ ɛtɔɔ kʋñɔŋ siŋŋ paa ɖooye.

eng: A good person produces good from the good treasury of the inner self, while an evil person produces evil from the evil treasury of the inner self. The inner self overflows with words that are spoken.
local: Ɛyʋ kɩbanʋ yɔɔdʋʋ tɔm kɩbandʋ ndʋ́ tɩhaɣ ɛ-taa yɔ. Piyele kɩdɛkɛdʋʋ ñɔyɔɔdʋʋ kɩdɛkɛdɩtʋ ndʋ́ tɩhaɣ kʋkʋ taa yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, tɔm ndʋ́ tɩhaɣ ɛyʋ taa yɔ, ńdʋ́ lɩɣnɩ ɛ-nɔɔ taa.».

eng: When the woman saw that she couldnt escape notice, she came trembling and fell before Jesus. In front of everyone, she explained why she had touched him and how she had been immediately healed.
local: Peeɖe halʋ ɛnʋ ɛnawa se pʋtʋlʋʋ ɛ-yɔɔ, nɛ ewolo eluŋ Yesu tɛɛ nɛ eseliɣ yem kpa kpa kpa nɛ ɛkɛdɩ-ɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa ɛsɩndaa mbʋ́ pʋ-yɔɔ etukuni-i yɔ nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛ-yɔɔ tɩcɛba yɔ.

eng: I assure you that many prophets and kings wanted to see what you see and hear what you hear, but they didnt. .
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se: náyaa sakɩyɛ nɛ awiya sɔsɔna sakɩyɛ pañɩnaɣ se pana mbʋ́ ɩnaɣ ɛzʋnɔ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, patapɩzɩ. Pañɩnaɣ ɖɔɖɔ se panɩɩ ndʋ́ ɩnɩɣ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, patapɩzɩ.».

eng: She was confused by these words and wondered what kind of greeting this might be.
local: Ɛyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɩla Maarɩɩ yaaa nɛ ɛpɔzɩ ɛ-tɩ se sɛtʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ se we?.

eng: When a strong man, fully armed, guards his own palace, his possessions are secure.
local: Yee ɖoŋ tʋ nɔɔyʋ ɛkpaɣ tɔŋ nɛ ɛɖaŋ ɛ-ɖɩɣa yɔɔ kpam yɔ, nɔɔyʋ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ewolo ɛmɩlɩ ɛ-ñɩm.

eng: She approached at that very moment and began to praise God and to speak about Jesus to everyone who was looking forward to the redemption of Jerusalem.
local: Siimeyɔɔ wazaɣ Yesu nɛ ɛ-ñɩma pɔ-yɔɔ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ewolo pɔ-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛsaŋ Ɛsɔ nɛ eheyiɣ mbá paaɖaŋaa se Ɛsɔ ɛkɔɔ ɛya Yeruusalɛm ñʋʋ yɔ Yesu ɛnʋ ɛ-tɔm.

eng: Some people said to Jesus, The disciples of John fast often and pray frequently. The disciples of the Pharisees do the same, but your disciples are always eating and drinking.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛyáa ḿbá paɖaɣnɩ Yesu pɔzʋʋ se: «Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma Farɩsɩ ñɩma tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa nɛ Lɩm Sɔʋ Sɔnzɩ Laɖʋ Yohanɛɛsɩ ñɩma pɔhɔkʋʋ nɔɔ ɖoŋ ɖoŋ nɛ pɛsɛɣ Ɛsɔ nɛ ña-ñɩma ñaahɔkʋʋ?».

eng: All who want to save their lives will lose them. But all who lose their lives because of me will save them.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, weyi ɛñɩnɩɣ se ɛcaɣ wezuu tam yɔ, ɛtɛŋnɩ-kʋ lesuu. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ sɩkɩ mɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɛcakɩ wezuu tam.

eng: Why do you call me Lord, Lord and dont do what I say?.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu pɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Ɛbɛ yɔɔ ɩyaɣ-m se Kɩpaɣlʋ! Kɩpaɣlʋ! nɛ ɩɩlakɩ mbʋ́ mɔnpɔzʋʋ-mɩ yɔ?.

eng: Daughter, your faith has healed you, Jesus said. Go in peace. .
local: Peeɖe Yesu heyi-i se: «Mɛn-pɛlɛ! Lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ŋwɛnɩ mɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, kɩyabɩ ña-ñʋʋ. Kpemni laŋhɛzɩyɛ.».

eng: A legal expert stood up to test Jesus. Teacher, he said, what must I do to gain eternal life.
local: Yesu yɔɔdaɣ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, paɣtʋ wɩlɩyʋ nɔɔyʋ kʋyɩ ɛñɩ ɛ-nɔɔ cɔlɔ tɔm se: «Wɩlɩyʋ! Ɛbɛ pʋwɛɛ se mala nɛ mehiɣ wezuu maatɛŋ?».

eng: The angel said, Dont be afraid, Mary. God is honoring you.
local: Peeɖe Ɛsɔ tiyiyu ɛnʋ eheyi-i se: «Maarɩɩ! Taasɔɔndɩ, Ɛsɔ labɩ-ŋ lootiye.

eng: But as soon as a stronger one attacks and overpowers him, the stronger one takes away the armor he had trusted and divides the stolen goods.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee nɔɔyʋ ɛkɩlɩ-ɩ ɖoŋ nɛ ɛwabɩ-ɩ yɔ, pʋdʋ mʋ́ʋ ɛ-tɔŋ weyi ɛtaɣaɣ yɔ nɛ ɛkpaɣ ɛ-ñɩm nɛ ɛtayɩ ɛ-taabalaa.

eng: When Mary and Joseph had completed everything required by the Law of the Lord, they returned to their hometown, Nazareth in Galilee.
local: Yesu ñɩma tɛm labʋ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa paɖʋ Kɩpaɣlʋ paɣtʋ taa yɔ lɛ, pakpaɣ pa-pɩɣa nɛ papɩsɩ pɛ-tɛ Nazarɛɛtɩ, Galilee egeetiye taa.

eng: Jesus replied, You cant make the wedding guests fast while the groom is with them, can you?.
local: Peeɖe Yesu cosi-wɛ se: «Ɩmaɣzɩɣ se ɩpɩzɩɣ ɩcɛyɩ ɛyáa mbá payaɣ-wɛ se powolo halɩkpaɣyɛ kazandʋ ɖeɖe yɔ se pacaɣ ñɔɔsɩ halʋ kɩfalʋ walʋ ɛsɩndaa yaa we? Pɩɩlakɩ ḿbʋ́.

eng: What advantage do people have if they gain the whole world for themselves yet perish or lose their lives?.
local: Yee ɛyʋ ehiɣ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ ñɩm tɩŋa payɩ nɛ elesi e-wezuu yaa ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛla asɛyʋʋ lɛ, pɩwazɩɣ-ɩ we?.

eng: Ill show what its like when someone comes to me, hears my words, and puts them into practice.
local: Mɛnkɛdɩɣ-mɩ weyi ɛkɔŋ mɔn-cɔlɔ nɛ ewelesiɣ mɔn-tɔm nɛ ɛɖɔŋ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ ɛ-tɔm.

eng: While Jesus was still speaking, someone came from the synagogue leaders house, saying to Jairus, Your daughter has died. Dont bother the teacher any longer.
local: Ɛyɔɔdaɣ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, petiyi nɔɔyʋ nɛ Yayiruusi ɛnʋ ɛ-tɛ se ewolo eheyi-i se: «Taaɖʋ ɖa-wɩlɩyʋ kʋñɔŋ yem, ña-pɩɣa peliɣa tɛm sɩbʋ.».

eng: Jesus replied, What is written in the Law? How do you interpret it? .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu pɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Se we paɖʋ Mooyiizi paɣtʋ taa? Ŋkalɩɣ-tʋ lɛ, se we ŋnɩɣ?».

eng: Look! You will conceive and give birth to a son, and you will name him Jesus.
local: Ŋhakɩ howa nɛ ŋlʋlɩ abalɩbɩɣa nɛ ŋyaa-kɛ se Yesu.

eng: Whoever isnt with me is against me, and whoever doesnt gather with me, scatters.
local: Weyi ɛɛtɩnɩɣ mɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɛkʋyʋʋ mɔ-yɔɔ. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ ɛɛsɩŋnɩ-m ɛyáa kpeɣluu yɔ, ɛmɩzɩɣ-wɛ.».

eng: The child grew up and became strong. He was filled with wisdom, and Gods favor was on him.
local: Pɩɣa ŋ́gá, kapaɣlaɣ nɛ kɛtɛzɩɣ kpaʋ ɖoŋ. Kaawɛnɩ lɔŋ pɩŋŋ nɛ Ɛsɔ lootiye wɛɛ kɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: The days will come when the groom will be taken from them, and then they will fast. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, pɔkɔŋ lɩzʋʋ walʋ ɛnʋ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa alɩwaatʋ natʋyʋ. Tɩ-taa pɔkɔŋ nɔɔ hɔkʋʋ.».

eng: Whoever is ashamed of me and my words, the Human One will be ashamed of that person when he comes in his glory and in the glory of the Father and of the holy angels.
local: Yee fɛyɛ ɛkpa nɔɔyʋ ma nɛ mɔn-tɔm ɖɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩkaɣ-m kpaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ ma mɛnkpɛndɩɣnɩ mon-koboyaɣ nɛ man-Caa Ɛsɔ ñɩŋga nɛ e-tiyiyaa ñɩŋga nɛ mɔnkɔɔ yɔ.

eng: Its like a person building a house by digging deep and laying the foundation on bedrock. When the flood came, the rising water smashed against that house, but the water couldnt shake the house because it was well built.
local: Ɛwɛ ɛzɩ weyi ɛmawaɣ kuduyuu nɛ ehuyi pilimi nɛ ɛtalɩ ɛwaɣ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛsɩɩ tigiɖe yɔ. Pɔɔ kɔɔ kosu, lɩm wadɩ nɛ pɩmakɩ kuduyuu ŋ́gʋ́, ɛlɛ́, kɩtañamsɩ nɛ pʋcɔ paatɔ se kɩtɔlaa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pama-kʋ camɩyɛ.

eng: When Jesus heard this, he responded, Dont be afraid; just keep trusting, and she will be healed. .
local: Yesu nɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, eheyi Yayiruusi se: «Ña-laŋɩyɛ ɛtaamaa, ñɩtɩ ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ, ña-pɩɣa ŋ́gá kɔ-yɔɔ cɛkɩ.».

eng: He responded, You must love the Lord your God with all your heart, with all your being, with all your strength, and with all your mind, and love your neighbor as yourself .
local: Peeɖe paɣtʋ wɩlɩyʋ ɛnʋ ecosi-i se: «Paɖʋwa se: sɔɔlɩ ña-Kɩpaɣlʋ Ɛsɔ nɛ ña-laŋɩyɛ tɩŋa nɛ ñe-liu tɩŋa nɛ ño-ɖoŋ tɩŋa nɛ ña-lɩmaɣza tɩŋa nɛ ŋsɔɔlɩ ña-taabalʋ ɛzɩ ŋsɔɔlʋʋ ña-maɣmaɣ yɔ.».

eng: He will be great and he will be called the Son of the Most High. The Lord God will give him the throne of David his father.
local: Kɔkɔŋ kɛʋ sɔsɔ nɛ payaa-kɛ se Ɛsɔ Caabiyuu Pɩyalʋ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ, ɛcɛlɩ-kɛ kewiyaɣ sɔsɔɔ ɛzɩ kɔ-cɔzɔ Daaviidi ñɩŋga yɔ.

eng: When an unclean spirit leaves a person, it wanders through dry places looking for a place to rest. But it doesnt find any. Then it says, Ill go back to the house I left.
local: Yesu yɔɔdaa ɖɔɖɔ se: «Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ eleeu seɣ ɛyʋ wayɩ yɔ, eleeu ɛnʋ ɛwɛɣ ɛcɔʋ lakʋ taa se ɛñɩnɩ ɖɩhɛzɩyɛ. Eehikiɣ lɛ, ɛtɔŋ se: ‹Mɛntɛzɩɣ pɩsʋʋ ɖɩɣa ŋgá ka-taa maawɛɛ yɔ.›.

eng: Each year his parents went to Jerusalem for the Passover Festival.
local: Paa pɩnaɣ ŋgá lɛ, Yesu caa nɛ e-ɖoo powokaɣ Yeruusalɛm Yuda ñɩma Paska Kazandʋ tɔɔʋ.

eng: Then he told them a parable. No one tears a patch from a new garment to patch an old garment. Otherwise, the new garment would be ruined, and the new patch wouldnt match the old garment.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, etuu-wɛ eduuye se: «Paacɩyɩɣ wonuu kɩfalʋʋ hɔɔlaɣ nɛ pɔtɔnɩ kɩbɩnʋʋ. Palabɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pɛwɛɛkɩɣ kɩfalʋʋ. Piyele hɔɔlaɣ kɩfalaɣ ɛɛmʋʋnɩ wonuu kɩbɩnʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: I assure you that some standing here wont die before they see Gods kingdom. .
local: Toovenim lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se mbá pɛwɛ cɩnɛ yɔ, pa-taa lɛlaa naɣ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ nɛ pʋcɔ pasɩ.».

eng: But those who dont put into practice what they hear are like a person who built a house without a foundation. The floodwater smashed against it and it collapsed instantly. It was completely destroyed. .
local: Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ welesiɣ mɔn-tɔm nɛ ɛɛɖɔŋ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɛ́lɛ́ wɛ ɛzɩ weyi ɛma kuduyuu tataa yem nɛ ɛtasɩɩ tigiɖe yɔ. Pɔɔ kɔɔ kosu nɛ lɩm wadɩ nɛ pɩmabɩ-kʋ nɛ kʋtɔlɩ kpaagbaa nɛ kʋyɔkɩ naŋa naŋa.».

eng: When he came to the house, he didnt allow anyone to enter with him except Peter, John, and James, and the childs father and mother.
local: Patalɩ Yayiruusi tɛ lɛ, Yesu yaa Pɩyɛ nɛ Yohanɛɛsɩ nɛ Yakubu nɛ pɩɣa ŋ́gá ka-caa nɛ ko-ɖoo nɛ pasʋʋ kuduyuu tɛɛ. Ɛlɛ́, ekizi se lɛlaa ɛtaasʋʋ.

eng: Jesus said to him, You have answered correctly. Do this and you will live. .
local: Yesu heyi-i se: «Ŋcosi camɩyɛ, la ḿbʋ́ nɛ ŋhiɣ wezuu maatɛŋ.».

eng: He will rule over Jacobs house forever, and there will be no end to his kingdom.
local: Ŋ́gá kɔŋnɩ tɔɔʋ kewiyaɣ tam Yakubu liɖe taa. Ke-kewiyaɣ ŋ́gá, kaakɔŋ sɩʋ tɩnaɣ.».

eng: When it arrives, it finds the house cleaned up and decorated.
local: Ɛpɩsɩɣ ka-taa lɛ, ɛmaɣna pahazaa nɛ paɖaɣnɩ camɩyɛ.

eng: When he was years old, they went up to Jerusalem according to their custom.
local: Yesu wɛnɩ pɩnzɩ hiu nɛ naalɛ nɛ powoki kazandʋ ńdʋ́ ti-ɖeɖe ɛzɩ patɩɩwokuu yɔ lɛ, pɛkpɛndɩnɩ-ɩ.

eng: Nobody pours new wine into old wineskins. If they did, the new wine would burst the wineskins, the wine would spill, and the wineskins would be ruined.
local: Paasuu sʋlʋm pɛŋ weyi ɩtɔwaa yɔ ɩ-taa. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, pʋkɔŋ se pɩpɩɣ yɔ, pɩyasɩɣ-ɩ nɛ sʋlʋm wɛɛkɩ pikpe tataa yem nɛ pɛŋ ñala asɛyʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: About eight days after Jesus said these things, he took Peter, John, and James, and went up on a mountain to pray.
local: Yesu tɛm yɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́ nɛ pɩla kɩyakɩŋ ɛzɩ lutozo yɔ lɛ, ɛ́yáa Pɩyɛ nɛ Yohanɛɛsɩ nɛ Yakubu nɛ ɛ nɛ wɛ pakpa pʋʋ yɔɔ se ɛsɛɛ Ɛsɔ.

eng: They were all crying and mourning for her, but Jesus said, Dont cry. She isnt dead. Shes only sleeping. .
local: Ɛyáa tɩŋa wilaɣ nɛ patɩmɩɣ. Ɛlɛ́, Yesu heyi-wɛ se: «Ɩtaawii! Pɩɣa ŋ́gá, koɖou kuɖou, katɩsɩ kɩsɩbʋ.».

eng: Then Mary said to the angel, How will this happen since I havent had sexual relations with a man.
local: Peeɖe Maarɩɩ pɔzɩ Ɛsɔ tiyiyu ɛnʋ se: «Ɛzɩma pɩlakɩ ḿbʋ́ nɛ mantasɩ abalʋ?».

eng: Then it goes and brings with it seven other spirits more evil than itself. They go in and make their home there. That person is worse off at the end than at the beginning. .
local: Peeɖe ewoki ɛ́yáa ɛ-taabalaa lɛlaa mbá pakɩlɩ-ɩ kañatʋ yɔ lʋbɛ nɛ ɛ nɛ wɛ papɩsɩ pacaɣ ɖɩɣa ŋ́gá ka-taa. Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ ɛyʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-wɛtʋ kɩbɩndʋ pɩsɩ tɩkɩlɩ wee wee lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ñɩndʋ.».

eng: After the festival was over, they were returning home, but the boy Jesus stayed behind in Jerusalem. His parents didnt know it.
local: Kazandʋ tɛma lɛ, ɛ-ñɩma kpaɣ nʋmɔʋ se pekpeŋ. Naze lɛ, pɩɣa Yesu ɛnʋ, ɛcaɣ Yeruusalɛm nɛ peteɖiɣzina.

eng: But the legal expert wanted to prove that he was right, so he said to Jesus, And who is my neighbor.
local: Paɣtʋ wɩlɩyʋ ɛnʋ ɛnɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛcaɣ se ɛkʋsɩ ɛ-ñʋʋ yɔɔ fɛyɛ. Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛpɔzɩ Yesu se: «Anɩ lɛ man-taabalʋ?».

eng: Instead, new wine must be put into new wineskins.
local: Pɛŋ weyi ɩtɔtɔɔ yɔ, ɩ-taa posuu.

eng: As he was praying, the appearance of his face changed and his clothes flashed white like lightning.
local: Ɛsɛɣaɣ Ɛsɔ lɛ, ɛ-ɛsɩndaa lɛɣzɩ nɛ e-wondu hʋlʋmɩ layɩ layɩ nɛ tiɖeɣ miŋ yem pelu pelu.

eng: They laughed at him because they knew she was dead.
local: Ɛlɛ́, powoŋ-i, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɛtɛm naʋ se pɩɣa ŋ́gá kasɩba.

eng: The angel replied, The Holy Spirit will come over you and the power of the Most High will overshadow you. Therefore, the one who is to be born will be holy. He will be called Gods Son.
local: Ɛ́lɛ́ cosi-i se: «Ɛsɔ Caabiyuu Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu tiki ñɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ki-ɖoŋ nɛ kihuuzi ñɔ-yɔɔ ɖeu ɛzɩ kuzotuu yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ pɩɣa ŋgá ŋlʋlʋʋ yɔ, kɛkɛɣ Ɛsɔ ñɩnʋ nɛ payaa-kɛ se: Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ.

eng: While Jesus was saying these things, a certain woman in the crowd spoke up: Happy is the mother who gave birth to you and who nursed you.
local: Yesu tɩyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, halʋ nɔɔyʋ heyi-i nɛ ɛyáa samaɣ taa ɖoŋ se: «Halʋ weyi ɛlʋlɩ-ŋ nɛ ŋmʋzɩ-ɩ yɔ, ehiɣ ɛ-tɩ!».

eng: Supposing that he was among their band of travelers, they journeyed on for a full day while looking for him among their family and friends.
local: Paawɛ yem se ɛwɛ pa-taabalaa nʋmɔɖɔnaa lɛlaa cɔlɔ nɛ pɔɖɔ kɩyakʋ nɛ kɩ-tɛɛ pilim, patana-ɩ. Peeɖe papazɩ-ɩ ñɩnʋʋ pa-ñɩma nɛ pa-taabalaa pɔ-cɔlɔ.

eng: Jesus replied, A man went down from Jerusalem to Jericho. He encountered thieves, who stripped him naked, beat him up, and left him near death.
local: Peeɖe Yesu tuu-i eduuye se: «Nakʋyʋ wiye abalʋ nɔɔyʋ lɩnɩ Yeruusalɛm nɛ etiki Yeriikoo. Etikaɣ lɛ, ɛlɩɩ mɩ́láa nabɛyɛ yɔɔ nɛ pakpa-ɩ pɔhɔɔ-ɩ nɛ efiɣni nɛ pɔhɔzɩ ɛ-yɔɔ wondu nɛ pɛpɛɖɩ-ɩ nɛ pacaŋ pɛɖɛɛ.

eng: No one who drinks a well-aged wine wants new wine, but says, The well-aged wine is better. .
local: Nɔɔyʋ fɛyɩ se ɛñɔʋ sʋlʋm kɩpɩbɩm nɛ ɛtasɩ awula. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛtɔŋ se kɩpɩbɩm kɩlɩ ɖeu.».

eng: Two men, Moses and Elijah, were talking with him.
local: Kpaagbaa ḿbʋ́ lɛ, abalaa naalɛ nabɛyɛ lɩ nɛ pa nɛ ɩ palakɩ lɩmaɣza. Ḿbá lɛ Mooyiizi nɛ Elii.

eng: Taking her hand, Jesus called out, Child, get up. .
local: Peeɖe Yesu woba ɛ́ɖɔ́kɩ ke-nesi taa nɛ eholi ɖoŋ se: «Pɩɣa ña, kʋyɩ!».

eng: Look, even in her old age, your relative Elizabeth has conceived a son. This woman who was labeled unable to conceive is now six months pregnant.
local: Đɔɖɔ lɛ, ña-ñɩnʋ Elizaabɛɛtɩ weyi pɔtɔŋaɣ-ɩ se ɛkɛ kaalʋlaɣ yɔ, paa ɛkpadɩyaa yɔ, ɛhaɣ howa. E-fenasɩ loɖo yɔ, ɛlʋlʋʋ abalɩbɩɣa.

eng: But he said, Happy rather are those who hear Gods word and put it into practice. .
local: Peeɖe Yesu cosi-i se: «Mbá panɩɣ Ɛsɔtɔm nɛ pɔɖɔŋ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ, ḿbá manaɣ se pehiɣ pa-tɩ.».

eng: When they didnt find Jesus, they returned to Jerusalem to look for him.
local: Ɛlɛ́, patana-ɩ ɖɔɖɔ. Peeɖe pakpaɣ-ɩ ñɩnʋʋ ka ka ka nɛ papɩsɩ Yeruusalɛm.

eng: Now it just so happened that a priest was also going down the same road. When he saw the injured man, he crossed over to the other side of the road and went on his way.
local: Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, cɔjɔ nɔɔyʋ ɖɛɣ habɩyɛ ńɖɩ́ ɖɩ-yɔɔ yem. Ɛtalaa nɛ ɛna abalʋ ɛnʋ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ekoli-i nɛ ɛɖɛɛ.

eng: They were clothed with heavenly splendor and spoke about Jesus departure, which he would achieve in Jerusalem.
local: Paawɛ Ɛsɔ koboyaɣ taa nɛ pa nɛ Yesu pɔyɔɔdʋʋ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛtɛzɩɣ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ nɛ sɩm Yeruusalɛm yɔ pʋ-tɔm.

eng: Nothing is impossible for God.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, nabʋyʋ fɛyɩ se Ɛsɔ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛlabɩ-pʋ.».

eng: Her life returned and she got up at once. He directed them to give her something to eat.
local: Kpaagbaa ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ke-fezuu kpa nɛ kakʋyɩ. Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu heyi-wɛ se paha-kɛ tɔɔnaɣ nɛ kɔtɔɔ.

eng: When the crowds grew, Jesus said, This generation is an evil generation. It looks for a sign, but no sign will be given to it except Jonahs sign.
local: Ɛyáa samaɣ kpeɣlɩ Yesu cɔlɔ lɛ, ɛyɔɔdɩ se: «Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɛyáa kɛ azaɣ́a. Pañɩnɩɣ se pala ɛsɔdaa hama lakasɩ nasɩyɩ nɛ pana. Ɛlɛ́, paakaɣ yʋsaɣ nakɛyɛ naʋ nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ náyʋ Yoonaasɩ ñɩŋga.

eng: After three days they found him in the temple. He was sitting among the teachers, listening to them and putting questions to them.
local: Pɩlabɩ kɩyakɩŋ naadozo lɛ, pana-ɩ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa taa. Ɛcaɣ paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa hɛkʋ taa nɛ ewelesiɣ nɛ ɛpɔzʋʋ-wɛ tɔm.

eng: Likewise, a Levite came by that spot, saw the injured man, and crossed over to the other side of the road and went on his way.
local: Ɛ-wayɩ lɛ, Leevi liɖe taa tʋ nɔɔyʋ talɩ ɛmaɣnɩ-ɩ peeɖe ɖɔɖɔ. Ɛ́lɛ́ na-ɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ekoli-i ɖɔɖɔ nɛ ɛɖɛɛ.

eng: Peter and those with him were almost overcome by sleep, but they managed to stay awake and saw his glory as well as the two men with him.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ lɛ, Pɩyɛ nɛ ɛ-taabalaa paawɛ ɖom yɔɔ. Pefema lɛ, pana Yesu e-koboyaɣ taa, abalaa ḿbá pa-naalɛ pasɩŋ ɛ-cɔlɔ.

eng: Then Mary said, I am the Lords servant. Let it be with me just as you have said. Then the angel left her.
local: Peeɖe Maarɩɩ heyi-i se: «Mɛnkɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ tʋmlaɖʋ. Pɩla ɛzɩ ŋheyuu-m yɔ.» Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ tiyiyu ɛnʋ ɛcaŋ ɛɖɛɛ.

eng: Her parents were beside themselves with joy, but he ordered them to tell no one what had happened.
local: Peeɖe pɩɖɩɣzɩ ka-ñɩma pɩŋŋ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛpaɣ-wɛ se pataaheyi-tʋ nɔɔyʋ.

eng: Just as Jonah became a sign to the people of Nineveh, so the Human One will be a sign to this generation.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pɩlabɩ Yoonaasɩ nɛ pɩkɛnɩ yʋsaɣ Niniivi ñɩma yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ kɛnɩ yʋsaɣ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɛyáa ḿbá.

eng: Everyone who heard him was amazed by his understanding and his answers.
local: Ɛyáa mbá paawɛ peeɖe nɛ pewelesiɣ yɔ, panɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɩla patɩŋa piti nɛ ɛ-lɛɣtʋ nɛ ɛ-tɔm cosuu.

eng: A Samaritan, who was on a journey, came to where the man was. But when he saw him, he was moved with compassion.
local: Ɛ́lɛ́ ɖɛwa lɛ, Samaarɩɩ tʋ nɔɔyʋ wokaɣ nʋmɔʋ. Ɛtalɩ abalʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛna-ɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɩlabɩ-ɩ pʋtɔdɩyɛ pɩŋŋ.

eng: As the two men were about to leave Jesus, Peter said to him, Master, its good that were here. We should construct three shrines: one for you, one for Moses, and one for Elijah—but he didnt know what he was saying.
local: Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, abalaa ḿbá pakʋyɩ Yesu cɔlɔ se pɛɖɛɣ. Peeɖe Pɩyɛ heyi Yesu se: «Wɩlɩyʋ! Đɩwɛʋ cɩnɛ yɔ, pʋwɛ ɖeu pɩŋŋ. Pʋmʋnaa se ɖisiɣ kɩɖanɖɩŋ naadozo: ña lɛɛkʋ, Mooyiizi lɛɛkʋ nɛ Elii lɛɛkʋ.» Ɛtaamaɣzɩ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́.

eng: Mary got up and hurried to a city in the Judean highlands.
local: Pɩlaba pazɩ lɛ, Maarɩɩ ɖɛɛ. Ɛɖɔŋaɣ lɛɛlɛɛ nɛ ɛkpaɣ pʋʋ se ewolo Yudee egeetiye tɛtʋ natʋyʋ taa.

eng: The queen of the South will rise up at the judgment with the people of this generation and condemn them, because she came from a distant land to hear Solomons wisdom. And look, someone greater than Solomon is here.
local: Niniivi ñɩma lɛɣzɩ wɛtʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ panɩ Yoonaasɩ susi Ɛsɔtɔm yɔ. Ŋgʋ́, nɔɔyʋ ñɛwɛ cɩnɛ, ɛ́lɛ́ kɩlɩ Yoonaasɩ. Ḿbʋ́ labɩna nɛ Kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ hʋʋnɩ ɛyáa tɔm yɔ, Niniivi ñɩma kʋyʋʋ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɛyáa yɔɔ nɛ pakʋ pɔ-tɔm! Abiɖe nɖɩ́ ɖɩcɔŋnɩ Hadɛ Kiŋ Ɛjaɖɛ yɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩlɩnɩ ɖooo poliŋ nɛ ɖɩkɔɔ se ɖɩnɩɩ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ tɔm ndʋ́ Salomɔɔ yɔɔdaɣ yɔ. Ŋgʋ́ nɔɔyʋ wɛ cɩnɛ, ɛ́lɛ́ kɩlɩ Salomɔɔ ɛnʋ. Ḿbʋ́ labɩna nɛ tɔm hʋʋ wiye lɛ, Hadɛ Kiŋ Ɛjaɖɛ abiɖe kʋyʋʋ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɛyáa yɔɔ nɛ ɖɩkʋ pɔ-tɔm!».

eng: The Samaritan went to him and bandaged his wounds, tending them with oil and wine. Then he placed the wounded man on his own donkey, took him to an inn, and took care of him.
local: Peeɖe ewobi ɛ-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛhɛzɩ e-heŋ taa nɛ ɛɖʋ kɔyɛ nɛ ɛhɔkɩ. Ɛtɛma lɛ, ewoni-i ɛcaɣzɩ ɛ-kpaŋaɣ yɔɔ nɛ ewoni-i nʋmɔɖɔnaa ɖɩɣa nakɛyɛ taa nɛ ɛcaɣ ɛ-cɔlɔ.

eng: Peter was still speaking when a cloud overshadowed them. As they entered the cloud, they were overcome with awe.
local: Ɛyɔɔdaɣ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛsɔmɩnʋʋ nakʋyʋ wolo kuhuuzi pɔ-yɔɔ. Yesu tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa na ḿbʋ́ lɛ, sɔɔndʋ kpa-wɛ.

eng: When his parents saw him, they were shocked. His mother said, Child, why have you treated us like this? Listen! Your father and I have been worried. Weve been looking for you.
local: Ɛ-ñɩma na-ɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɩɖɩɣzɩ-wɛ ɖɩɣ ɖɩɣ nɛ e-ɖoo pɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Man-pɩɣa! Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ ŋlabɩ-ɖʋ ḿbʋ́? Sɔɔndʋ kpa ma nɛ ña-caa siŋŋ nɛ ɖɩwɛ-ŋ ñɩnʋʋ yɔɔ.».

eng: She entered Zechariahs home and greeted Elizabeth.
local: Ɛtalaa lɛ, ɛsʋʋ Zakaarii ɖɩɣa taa nɛ ɛsɛɛ Elizaabɛɛtɩ.

eng: People dont light a lamp and then put it in a closet or under a basket. Rather, they place the lamp on a lampstand so that those who enter the house can see the light.
local: Yesu tasɩ yɔɔdʋʋ se: «Nɔɔyʋ fɛyɩ se ɛsɔkɩ kanɖʋ nɛ ɛmɛsɩ-kʋ yaa ɛpam-kʋ ɖaakuɖe tɛɛ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛsɩɣ-kʋ ɖenɖe pʋkʋyɩ camɩyɛ ñaba yɔ nɛ pɩna ɛyáa mbá pasʋʋ ɖɩɣa taa yɔ patɩŋa.

eng: The next day, he took two full days worth of wages and gave them to the innkeeper. He said, Take care of him, and when I return, I will pay you back for any additional costs.
local: Tɛʋ fema lɛ, ɛlɩzɩ kɩyakɩŋ naalɛ tʋmɩyɛ liidiye nɛ ɛcɛlɩ ɖɩɣa ŋ́gá kɔ-yɔɔ cɔnɩyʋ nɛ eheyi-i se: ‹Cɔnɩ abalʋ ɛnɛ ɛ-yɔɔ ɖeu nɛ maapɩsɩɣ lɛ, mantɩŋnɩ cɩnɛ nɛ mbʋ́ ŋcɔnɩnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ, pɩlɩ ɛzɩma lɛ, maatɛzɩ-ŋ hɛyʋʋ.› ».

eng: Then a voice from the cloud said, This is my Son, my chosen one. Listen to him.
local: Peeɖe panɩ pʋyɔɔdʋʋnɩ-wɛ nɛ kɩ-tɛɛ se: «Ɛnɛ lɛ man-Pɩyalʋ. Malɩzɩ-ɩ se ɛla man-tʋmɩyɛ, ɩnɩɩnɩ-ɩ.».

eng: Jesus replied, Why were you looking for me? Didnt you know that it was necessary for me to be in my Fathers house? .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu pɔzɩ-wɛ se: «Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ ɩñɩnɩɣ-m? Ɩtatɩlɩ se pʋmʋnaa se mɛwɛɛ man-Caa ɖɩɣa taa yaa we?».

eng: When Elizabeth heard Marys greeting, the child leaped in her womb, and Elizabeth was filled with the Holy Spirit.
local: Elizaabɛɛtɩ nɩ Maarɩɩ sɛtʋ lɛ, ɛ-pɩɣa ciɣdi ɛ-taa nɛ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu tii ɛ-yɔɔ.

eng: When a crowd of thousands upon thousands had gathered so that they were crushing each other, Jesus began to speak first to his disciples: Watch out for the yeast of the Pharisees—I mean, the mismatch between their hearts and lives.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɛyáa kpeɣli sakɩyɛ nɛ pɛfɛyɩɣ ɖama naŋgbanzɩ yɔɔ. Ɛlɛ́, Yesu calɩnɩ paɣ́ʋ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se: «Ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ nɛ Farɩsɩ ñɩma sɔsɔɔna. Pɛ-tɛɛ nɛ pʋ-yɔɔ lakasɩ tɔm mɔyɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́.

eng: Your eye is the lamp of your body. When your eye is healthy, your whole body is full of light. But when your eye is bad, your whole body is full of darkness.
local: Ɛyʋ ɛsɛ lɛ e-tomnaɣ kanɖʋ, ana ɛnaɣna. Yee ñɛ-ɛsɛ ɛnaɣ camɩyɛ yɔ, ñatɩŋa payɩ ŋwɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ taa. Ɛlɛ́, yee aanaɣ camɩyɛ yɔ, ñatɩŋa payɩ ŋwɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa.

eng: What do you think? Which one of these three was a neighbor to the man who encountered thieves? .
local: Peeɖe Yesu pɔzɩ-ɩ se: «Ŋmaɣzɩɣ se ɛyáa ḿbá pa-naadozo pa-taa lɛ, akɛ weyi mɩ́láa mabɩ-ɩ yɔ ɛ-taabalʋ?».

eng: Even as the voice spoke, Jesus was found alone. They were speechless and at the time told no one what they had seen.
local: Pʋyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, panaɣ Yesu ɖeke peeɖe. Ɛlɛ́, ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa su ɖiɣ ɖiɣ, peteheyi nɔɔyʋ mbʋ́ panawa yɔ pʋ-tɔm alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-taa.

eng: But they didnt understand what he said to them.
local: Ɛlɛ́, patanɩɩ tɔm ndʋ́ ɛpɔzɩ-wɛ yɔ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ.

eng: With a loud voice she blurted out, God has blessed you above all women, and he has blessed the child you carry.
local: Peeɖe ɛmabɩ kubuka se: «Ɛsɔ ɛ́wazɩ ñɔ-yɔɔ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ halaa tɩŋa nɛ ɛ́wazɩ ɖɔɖɔ pɩɣa ŋgá ŋkɔŋ lʋlʋʋ yɔ kɔ-yɔɔ!.

eng: Nothing is hidden that wont be revealed, and nothing is secret that wont be brought out into the open.
local: Mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa pʋwɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ yɔ, pɔkɔŋ pʋ-yɔɔ kuluu nɛ paa weyi ɛna.

eng: Therefore, see to it that the light in you isnt darkness.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɖɔkɩ ña-tɩ camɩyɛ nɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ŋwɛna yɔ, ɖɩtaapɩsɩ cɩkpɛndʋʋ.

eng: Then the legal expert said, The one who demonstrated mercy toward him. Jesus told him, Go and do likewise. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Paɣtʋ wɩlɩyʋ ɛnʋ ecosi-i se: «Weyi ɛna ɛ-pʋtɔdɩyɛ yɔ.» Yesu heyi-i se: «Wolo nɛ ŋla ɛzɩ abalʋ ɛnʋ ɛlabʋ yɔ.».

eng: The next day, when Jesus, Peter, John, and James had come down from the mountain, a large crowd met Jesus.
local: Tɛʋ fema lɛ, Yesu nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa palɩɩnɩ pʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ petiki. Peeɖe ɛyáa samaɣ sɔsɔɔ nakɛyɛ katɩ-ɩ.

eng: Jesus went down to Nazareth with them and was obedient to them. His mother cherished every word in her heart.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, pa nɛ ɩ pakʋyɩ papɩsɩ pɛ-tɛ Nazarɛɛtɩ. Yesu ɛnʋ, ɛñaŋ ɛ-caa nɛ e-ɖoo camɩyɛ. Mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩlaba yɔ, pʋwɛɛ e-ɖoo taa nɛ ɛtɔzʋʋ pʋ-yɔɔ paa ɖooye.

eng: Why do I have this honor, that the mother of my Lord should come to me?.
local: Ma anɩ nɛ ña weyi ŋlʋlʋʋ Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔ, ŋkɔɔ mɛn-tɛ! Ŋɖʋ-m hɩɖɛ siŋŋ!.

eng: Therefore, whatever you have said in the darkness will be heard in the light, and whatever you have whispered in the rooms deep inside the house will be announced from the rooftops.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, tɔm ndʋ́ tɩtɩŋa ɩwɛɛtɩɣ ɖama mi-kuduyiŋ tɛɛ nɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa yɔ, pɔkɔŋ-tʋ susuu paa le nɛ paa weyi ɛnɩɩ.».

eng: If your whole body is full of light—with no part darkened—then it will be as full of light as when a lamp shines brightly on you. .
local: Yee ŋwɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ taa nɛ ñɔ-hɔɔlʋʋ nakʋyʋ ɛfɛyɩ cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa yɔ, ñatɩŋa pilim ŋwɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ taa ɛzɩ kanɖʋ miŋ tʋsʋʋ ñɔ-yɔɔ ñammm yɔ.».

eng: While Jesus and his disciples were traveling, Jesus entered a village where a woman named Martha welcomed him as a guest.
local: Nakʋyʋ wiye Yesu nɛ ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa powokaɣ nʋmɔʋ. Patalɩ tɛtʋ cikpetu natʋyʋ taa lɛ, halʋ nɔɔyʋ mʋ Yesu ɛ-tɛ, payaɣ-ɩ se Maarta.

eng: A man from the crowd shouted, Teacher, I beg you to take a look at my son, my only child.
local: nɛ ka-taa abalʋ nɔɔyʋ ma kubuka se: «Wɩlɩyʋ! Mentendiɣ-ŋ se ŋna man-pɩyalʋ ɛgbamɩyɛ ɖɩnɛ ɖɩ-pʋtɔdɩyɛ.

eng: Jesus matured in wisdom and years, and in favor with God and with people.
local: Yesu kɛwɛɛ ɛpaɣlɩɣ nɛ ɛ-lɔŋ tɛzɩɣ sɔzʋʋ kʋsɔzʋʋ nɛ ɛ-tɔm pazɩ tɩkɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛyáa pɩŋŋ.

eng: As soon as I heard your greeting, the baby in my womb jumped for joy.
local: Mantɩnɩ ñɛ-sɛtʋ lɛ, pɩla man-taa pɩɣa leleŋ nɛ keciɣdi.

eng: I tell you, my friends, dont be terrified by those who can kill the body but after that can do nothing more.
local: «Mbá mɩ ɩkɛ man-taabalaa yɔ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se ɩtaasɔɔndɩ mbá pakʋʋ tomnaɣ nɛ pʋwayɩ lɛ, paapɩzɩɣ patasɩ pʋyʋ labʋ yɔ.

eng: While Jesus was speaking, a Pharisee invited him to share a meal with him, so Jesus went and took his place at the table.
local: Yesu tɛm yɔɔdʋʋ lɛ, Farɩsɩ tʋ nɔɔyʋ yaa-ɩ se ewolo ɛ-tɛ nɛ ɛtɔɔ tɔɔnaɣ. Ewoba lɛ, ɛcaɣ tɔɔnaɣ ɖɩtɔɔyɛ.

eng: She had a sister named Mary, who sat at the Lords feet and listened to his message.
local: Ɛɛwɛnɩ neu nɔɔyʋ, payaɣ-ɩ se Maarɩɩ nɛ ɛ́lɛ́ wolo ɛcaɣ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu cɔlɔ nɛ ewelesiɣ ndʋ́ ɛwɩlaɣ yɔ.

eng: Look, a spirit seizes him and, without any warning, he screams. It shakes him and causes him to foam at the mouth. It tortures him and rarely leaves him alone.
local: Eleeu nɔɔyʋ wɛɛ ekpiki-i nɛ ɛmakɩ kobusi nɛ ɛñamsɩɣ-ɩ nɛ huluu ñɛyɩɣ ɛ-nɔɔ. Ɛwɛɛ ɛcɔzʋʋ-ɩ nɛ ɛwɩɣnɩ ɛ-wayɩ seu.

eng: Happy is she who believed that the Lord would fulfill the promises he made to her.
local: Ña lɛ, ŋhiɣ ña-tɩ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ŋtisaa se tɔm ndʋ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ tiyaa nɛ peheyi-ŋ yɔ, tɩla. Tɩkɔŋ labʋ.».

eng: When the Pharisee saw that Jesus didnt ritually purify his hands by washing before the meal, he was astonished.
local: Peeɖe Farɩsɩ tʋ ɛnʋ ɛnawa se Yesu tasaŋ e-nesi ɛzɩ paɖʋʋ pɔ-sɔnzɩ taa yɔ nɛ pɩlabɩ-ɩ piti.

eng: By contrast, Martha was preoccupied with getting everything ready for their meal. So Martha came to him and said, Lord, dont you care that my sister has left me to prepare the table all by myself? Tell her to help me.
local: Maarta ñaawɛɛ ɛkʋʋ ɛ-tɩ nɛ mɩzaɣ nɔɔ tʋma. Pɩkɛdaa lɛ, ewolo ɛpɔzɩ Yesu se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ, ɛzɩ me-neu yebuni-m mɩzaɣ nɔɔ tʋmɩyɛ yɔ, piiheyiɣ-ŋ natʋyʋ yaa we? Heyi-i se ɛkɔɔ ɛsɩnɩ-m.».

eng: I begged your disciples to throw it out, but they couldnt.
local: Mewini ñɔ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se pɔɖɔɔnɩ eleeu ɛnʋ, ɛlɛ́, patapɩzɩ.».

eng: Ill show you whom you should fear: fear the one who, after you have been killed, has the authority to throw you into hell. Indeed, I tell you, thats the one you should fear.
local: Mawɩlɩɣ-mɩ weyi pʋmʋnaa se ɩsɔɔndɩ yɔ: ɩsɔɔndɩ Ɛsɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, e-ɖeke ɛpɩzɩɣna ɛkʋ ɛyʋ nɛ ɛtɛ ɛɖʋ-ɩ ɖenɖe kʋñɔŋ maatɛŋ wɛɛ yɔ. Meheyiɣ-mɩ se ɛnʋ pʋmʋnaa se ɩsɔɔndɩ.

eng: Mary said, With all my heart I glorify the Lord!.
local: Elizaabɛɛtɩ yɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, Maarɩɩ tɔ se: «Mansaŋ Kɩpaɣlʋ siŋŋ!.

eng: The Lord said to him, Now, you Pharisees clean the outside of the cup and platter, but your insides are stuffed with greed and wickedness.
local: Kɩpaɣlʋ na ɛ-lɩmaɣza ḿbʋ́ lɛ, eheyi-i se: «Farɩsɩ ñɩma mɩ! Ɩwɛ ɛzɩ mbá pañalɩɣ pa-ñanzɩ nɛ pe-eyisi sɩ-wayɩ ɖeke nɛ paañalɩɣ sɩ-taa yɔ. Ɩcaɣ se mɩ-yɔɔ ɛwɛɛ ɖeu, ŋgʋ́ mɩlɩm nɛ kañatʋ pa-lɩmaɣza suni mɩ-taa ɖo.

eng: The Lord answered, Martha, Martha, you are worried and distracted by many things.
local: Peeɖe Kɩpaɣlʋ cosi-i se: «Maarta! Maarta! Ŋkɩlɩɣ ña-tɩ kʋʋ wondu sakɩyɛ yɔɔ nɛ pɩcɛyɩɣ-ŋ.

eng: Jesus answered, You faithless and crooked generation, how long will I be with you and put up with you? Bring your son here. .
local: Peeɖe Yesu holaa se: «Heyi! Ɛyáa kɩdɛkɛdaa lidaʋ fɛyɩwaa mɩ! Alɩwaatʋ ɛzɩma mantasɩɣ mɩ-cɔlɔ caɣʋ nɛ pʋwɛɛ se mɔnɖɔkɩ mɔ-hɔyɛ ɖɔɖɔ? Kɔnɩ-m ña-pɩyalʋ cɩnɛ.».

eng: Arent five sparrows sold for two small coins? Yet not one of them is overlooked by God.
local: Paa kobanaa naalɛ pɛpɛdɩɣ sumasɩ cɩʋcɩʋwaa kagbaanzɩ yɔ, Ɛsɔ ɛɛsɔʋ pa-taa nɔɔyʋ yɔɔ kaʋ.

eng: In the depths of who I am I rejoice in God my savior.
local: Ma-laŋɩyɛ hʋlʋmɩnɩ-ɩ. Ɛnʋ lɛ Ɛsɔ weyi ɛyabɩ ma-ñʋʋ yɔ.

eng: Foolish people! Didnt the one who made the outside also make the inside?.
local: Kɩmɛlɛmɩŋ mɩ! Ɩtatɩlɩ se weyi ɛlabɩ ɛyʋ yɔɔ yɔ, ɛnʋ labɩnɩ ɛ-taa ɖɔɖɔ yaa we?.

eng: One thing is necessary. Mary has chosen the better part. It wont be taken away from her. .
local: Ŋgʋ́, pʋyʋ kʋɖʋm koŋ wɛnɩ wazaɣ. Maarɩɩ lɩzɩnɩ ɖeu ɖeɖe. Nɔɔyʋ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛmʋ-pʋ ɛ-cɔlɔ kaʋ.».

eng: While he was coming, the demon threw him down and shook him violently. Jesus spoke harshly to the unclean spirit, healed the child, and gave him back to his father.
local: Ewokaɣnɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛñɔtɩnɩ Yesu lɛ, eleeu co ɛ-pɩyalʋ ɛnʋ nɛ ɛyaɣnɩ tɛtʋ nɛ ɛpɩsɩ-ɩ kpɛndɛɣlɩsɩ. Ɛlɛ́, Yesu holini eleeu ɛnʋ nɛ ɛla nɛ pɩɣa ŋ́gá kɔ-yɔɔ cɛ nɛ ɛcɛlɩ-kɛ ka-caa.

eng: Even the hairs on your head are all counted. Dont be afraid. You are worth more than many sparrows.
local: Halɩ mɩ-ñʋŋ taa ñɔsɩ wɛʋ yɔ, Ɛsɔ kalɩ sɩtɩŋa payɩ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtaasɔɔndɩ. Ɩkɩlɩ sumasɩ cɩʋcɩʋwaa sakɩyɛ wazaɣ.».

eng: He has looked with favor on the low status of his servant. Look! From now on, everyone will consider me highly favored.
local: Etisi ɛ-ɛsɛ nɛ ɛcɔnɩ weyi ma mɛnkɛ halʋ yem nɛ malakɩ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩkpaɣʋnɩ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ, ɛyáa kpeekpe wɛɣ yɔɔdʋʋ yɔɔ se mehiɣ man-tɩ.

eng: Therefore, give to those in need from the core of who you are and you will be clean all over.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩkɩlɩ ɖeu se ɩha kʋñɔndɩnaa mbʋ́ pʋwɛ mɩ-ñanzɩ nɛ mi-eyisi pa-taa yɔ. Ɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, nabʋyʋ ɛɛtasɩɣ-mɩ pisuu.

eng: Everyone was overwhelmed by Gods greatness. While everyone was marveling at everything he was doing, Jesus said to his disciples.
local: Peeɖe pɩlabɩ ɛyáa samaɣ ŋ́gá katɩŋa piti nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖoŋ paɣlaa yɔ. Pɩlakaɣ ɛyáa tɩŋa piti nɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa Yesu lakaɣ yɔ lɛ, eheyi ɛ-tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa se:.

eng: I tell you, everyone who acknowledges me before humans, the Human One will acknowledge before Gods angels.
local: «Meheyiɣ-mɩ se weyi ɛkaɖɩɣ ɛyáa taa se mantɩnɩ-ɩ yɔ, Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ ma mankaɖɩɣ ɖɔɖɔ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa ɛsɩndaa se mantɩnɩ-ɩ.

eng: because the mighty one has done great things for me. Holy is his name.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Đoŋ Tɩŋa Tʋ labɩ-m mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu pɩŋŋ yɔ. Ɛnʋ lɛ Ɛsɔ.

eng: How terrible for you Pharisees! You give a tenth of your mint, rue, and garden herbs of all kinds, while neglecting justice and love for God. These you ought to have done without neglecting the others.
local: Farɩsɩ ñɩma mɩ, pʋtɔɔ-mɩ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩtayɩɣ nɛ ɩkpɛndɩɣnɩ ɖozi hatʋ maɣmaɣ tam hiu nɛ ɩhaɣ Ɛsɔ pɩtɛ kʋɖʋmbʋ. Ɛlɛ́, ɩtɔsɔɔlɩ-ɩ nɛ ɩɩlakɩ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ. Ŋgʋ́, pɩ-naalɛ pɩɩmʋnaa se ɩla nɛ ɩtaasɔɔ lɛɛbʋ yɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Take these words to heart: the Human One is about to be delivered into human hands. .
local: «Ɩɖɔkɩ tɔm ndʋ́ meheyiɣ-mɩ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ camɩyɛ. Pɔkɔŋ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ kpaʋ nɛ paɖʋzɩ ɛyáa nesi taa.».

eng: But the one who rejects me before others will be rejected before Gods angels.
local: Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛkpɛzɩɣ ɛyáa ɛsɩndaa se pɩtɛkɛ mantɩnɩ-ɩ yɔ, mɔnkɔŋ kpɛzʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa ɛsɩndaa se pɩtɛkɛ mantɩnɩ-ɩ.

eng: He shows mercy to everyone, from one generation to the next, who honors him as God.
local: Đooo ɛzɩ pʋwɛʋ yɔ, mbá pañaŋ-ɩ yɔ, ɛnaɣ pa-pʋtɔdɩyɛ.

eng: How terrible for you Pharisees! You love the most prominent seats in the synagogues and respectful greetings in the marketplaces.
local: Farɩsɩ ñɩma mɩ, pʋtɔɔ-mɩ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩkɩlɩ sɔɔlʋʋ lona sɔsɔna taa caɣʋ Ɛsɔ ɖɩsɛyɛ taa nɛ ɩsɔɔlɩ se pɛsɛɣ-mɩ ɛyáa ɖikpeɣliye taa nɛ poluŋuu mɩ-tɛɛ.

eng: They didnt understand this statement. Its meaning was hidden from them so they couldnt grasp it. And they were afraid to ask him about it.
local: Ɛlɛ́, patanɩɩ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, piihuuzi tɩ-yɔɔ se pataanɩɩ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ. Ŋgʋ́, pataakatɩɣ se pɔpɔzɩ-ɩ natʋyʋ tɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: Anyone who speaks a word against the Human One will be forgiven, but whoever insults the Holy Spirit wont be forgiven.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛtʋ Ɛyʋ Pɩyalʋ ma yɔ, Ɛsɔ kpeɣiɣ-i. Ɛlɛ́, yee ɛyʋ ɛwɛɛkɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu hɩɖɛ yɔ, Ɛsɔ eekpeɣiɣ-i kaʋ.

eng: He has shown strength with his arm. He has scattered those with arrogant thoughts and proud inclinations.
local: Ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛlabɩ tʋma sɔsɔna nɛ e-ɖoŋ: ɛɖɔɔnɩ mbá pakpazɩɣ pa-tɩ yɔ nɛ pese pamɩzɩ ɖama.

eng: How terrible for you! You are like unmarked graves, and people walk on them without recognizing it. .
local: Farɩsɩ ñɩma mɩ, pʋtɔɔ-mɩ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩwɛ ɛzɩ pɩlaŋ weyi ɛyáa ɛɛnaɣ nɛ pɔɖɔŋ ɩ-yɔɔ yɔ.».

eng: An argument arose among the disciples about which of them was the greatest.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yesu tɔmkpɛlɩkɩyaa hɔŋnɩ ɖama tɔm se pana se anɩ lɛ pa-taa sɔsɔ.

eng: Some who were present on that occasion told Jesus about the Galileans whom Pilate had killed while they were offering sacrifices.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ʋ́ ɛyáa nabɛyɛ woba Yesu cɔlɔ nɛ peheyi-i se Room wiyaʋ Pilaatɩ kaha nɔɔ nɛ pakʋ Galilee ñɩma nabɛyɛ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ palaɣaɣ kɩlaŋ yɔ.

eng: When they bring you before the synagogues, rulers, and authorities, dont worry about how to defend yourself or what you should say.
local: Yee paya-mɩ se pahʋʋnɩ-mɩ Ɛsɔ ɖɩsɛyɛ taa yaa ñʋndɩnaa cɔlɔ yɔ, ɩtaanɩɣzɩ tɔm ndʋ́ ɩɩhʋʋ nɛ ɩlɩɩ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: He has pulled the powerful down from their thrones and lifted up the lowly.
local: Etisi awiya sɔsɔna a-kpelisi yɔɔ nɛ ɛkpazɩ mbá patakpaɣ-wɛ payaa pʋyʋ yɔ lone kɩbanɖɛ taa.

eng: One of the legal experts responded, Teacher, when you say these things, you are insulting us too.
local: Peeɖe paɣtʋ wɩlɩyʋ nɔɔyʋ pɩsɩnɩ-ɩ se: «Wɩlɩyʋ! Ŋyɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ŋtʋ-ɖʋ ɖɔɖɔ.».

eng: Aware of their deepest thoughts, Jesus took a little child and had the child stand beside him.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu na pa-lɩmaɣza ḿbʋ́ nɛ ɛkpaɣ pɩɣa nakɛyɛ nɛ ɛsɩɩ-kɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ.

eng: He replied, Do you think the suffering of these Galileans proves that they were more sinful than all the other Galileans?.
local: Peeɖe Yesu pɩsɩnɩ-wɛ se: «Pʋtɔmaɣ yɔ, ɩmaɣzɩɣ se mbá pakʋ-wɛ nɛ pasɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm kɩlɩnɩ ɖɔʋ Galilee ñɩma lɛlaa ñɩmbʋ.

eng: The Holy Spirit will tell you at that very moment what you must say. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu wɩlɩɣ-mɩ ndʋ́ pʋmʋnaa se ɩyɔɔdɩ alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ yɔ.».

eng: He has filled the hungry with good things and sent the rich away empty-handed.
local: Ɛha kʋñɔndɩnaa ñɩm sakɩyɛ nɛ piyele ɛɖɔɔnɩ ñɩm tɩnaa nɛ pɛɖɛɛ nesi kpɛɖɛ yeɣ yeɣ.

eng: Jesus said, How terrible for you legal experts too! You load people down with impossible burdens and you refuse to lift a single finger to help them.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu pɩsɩnɩ-ɩ se: «Paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa mɩ, pʋtɔɔ-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩsʋkɩ ɛyáa sʋʋtʋ yuŋ ñɩndʋ, ɛlɛ́, ɩɩɖʋʋ-wɛ nesi paa ñɩɩɩ.

eng: Jesus said to his disciples, Whoever welcomes this child in my name welcomes me. Whoever welcomes me, welcomes the one who sent me. Whoever is least among you all is the greatest. .
local: nɛ eheyi-wɛ se: «Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛmʋ pɩɣa cikpelaɣ ɛzɩ kanɛ yɔ mɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, man-tɩ tɩŋa pʋdʋ mʋwa. Weyi ɛmʋ-m yɔ, ɛmʋ ɖɔɖɔ weyi etiyi-m yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, weyi ɛpɩsɩ ɛ-tɩ mɩ-taa pɩɣa yɔ, ɛnʋ lɛ sɔsɔ.».

eng: No, I tell you, but unless you change your hearts and lives, you will die just as they did.
local: Meheyiɣ-mɩ se pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́. Ɛlɛ́, yee ɩtɛlɛɣzɩ wɛtʋ yɔ, ɩsɩkɩ mɩtɩŋa ɛzɩ pasɩbʋ ɖɔɖɔ yɔ.

eng: Someone from the crowd said to him, Teacher, tell my brother to divide the inheritance with me.
local: Yesu yɔɔdaɣ ḿbʋ́ lɛ, nɔɔyʋ kʋyɩ ɛyáa samaɣ taa nɛ eheyi-i se: «Wɩlɩyʋ! Heyi man-ɖalʋ se ma nɛ ɩ ɖɩtayɩ ñɩm mbʋ́ ɖa-caa yebini-ɖʋ yɔ.».

eng: He has come to the aid of his servant Israel, remembering his mercy.
local: Ɛkɔm Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma mbá pɛkɛ ɛ-tʋmlaɖaa yɔ sɩnaʋ. Ɛwɩlɩɣ-wɛ tam se ɛsɔɔlɩ-wɛ.

eng: How terrible for you! You built memorials to the prophets, whom your ancestors killed.
local: Pʋtɔɔ-mɩ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩcanɩɣ náyaa pɩlaŋ ɖeu. Ŋgʋ́, mɩ-cɔzɔnaa kʋnɩ-wɛ.

eng: John replied, Master, we saw someone throwing demons out in your name, and we tried to stop him because he isnt in our group of followers.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, Yohanɛɛsɩ heyi Yesu se: «Wɩlɩyʋ, ɖɩna nɔɔyʋ ɖɔɔnaɣ aleewaa nɛ ño-ɖoŋ nɛ ɖɩkʋyɩ se ɖikiziɣni-i se ɛtɛkɛ ɖa-ñɩnʋ.».

eng: What about those eighteen people who were killed when the tower of Siloam fell on them? Do you think that they were more guilty of wrongdoing than everyone else who lives in Jerusalem?.
local: Ɛyáa hiu nɛ lutozo mbá Siloowee kuduyuu sɔsɔʋ kpɛzaa kɩɖabɩ-wɛ nɛ pasɩ yɔ, ɩmaɣzɩɣ se ḿbá kɩlɩnɩ wɛɛkʋʋ Yeruusalɛm ñɩma lɛlaa tɩŋa payɩ yaa we?.

eng: Jesus said to him, Man, who appointed me as judge or referee between you and your brother? .
local: Peeɖe Yesu pɩsɩnɩ-ɩ se: «Man-taabalʋ ña! Aɖʋ-m se mahʋʋ mɩ-tɔm nɛ mantayɩ-mɩ mɩ-ñɩm?».

eng: just as he promised to our ancestors, to Abraham and to Abrahams descendants forever.
local: Ɛtɔsɔɔ ɛ-camɩyɛ lakasɩ nzɩ́ ɛɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ ɖɔ-cɔzɔnaa, Abraham nɛ e-liɖe taa ñɩma yɔ sɩ-yɔɔ kaʋ.».
