eng: each ones work will be clearly shown. The day will make it clear, because it will be revealed with fire—the fire will test the quality of each ones work.
local: pɔkɔŋ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ naʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, tɔm hʋʋ kɩyakʋ wiye lɛ, Ɛsɔ ɖʋʋ paa weyi ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ miŋ taa. Miŋ ɛnʋ ɛwɩlɩɣna se ɖɩwɛ ɖeu naa ɖɩfɛyɩ ɖeu nɛ pasɩm-ɖɩ.

eng: If anyones work survives, theyll get a reward.
local: Weyi paɖʋʋ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ miŋ taa nɛ ɖɩtañaɣ yɔ, pɔkɔŋ-ɩ hɛyʋʋ.

eng: We who are powerful need to be patient with the weakness of those who dont have power, and not please ourselves.
local: Mbá ɖa ɖɩwɛ ɖoŋ ɖe-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩkʋ ɖɔ-hɔ mbá pɛkɛ ajamaa pe-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa yɔ pɔ-tɔm taa, ɖɩtaanɩɩnɩ ɖe-liu ñɩm.

eng: But if anyones work goes up in flames, theyll lose it. However, they themselves will be saved as if they had gone through a fire.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee paɖʋ nɔɔyʋ tʋmɩyɛ miŋ taa nɛ ɖɩñaɣ yɔ, pʋdʋ lesiɣ ɛ-kɩhɛyʋʋ. Ehikiɣ ñʋʋ yabʋ, ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɣ ɛzɩ ɛyʋ seɣu ɛtɩŋɩɣnɩ miŋ taa nɛ ɛtʋlɩ yɔ.

eng: Each of us should please our neighbors for their good in order to build them up.
local: Paa ɖa-taa weyi, ɛcɛyɩ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛla mbʋ́ pɩkɛdɩnɩ ɛ-taabalʋ yɔ, mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ pɩ-taa nɛ ɛ-taabalʋ ɛnʋ, ɛpɩɩ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa.

eng: Dont you know that you are Gods temple and Gods Spirit lives in you?.
local: Ɩtatɩlɩ se ɩwɛ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa ŋgá e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu wɛ ka-taa yɔ yaa we?.

eng: Christ didnt please himself, but, as it is written, The insults of those who insulted you fell on me. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Krɩstʋ tanɩɩnɩ mbʋ́ pɩkɛdɩnɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, pɩtalɩ-ɩ e-wezuu caɣʋ taa ɛzɩ pamaʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Tʋtʋ ndʋ́ patʋ ña Ɛsɔ yɔ, tɩpɩsɩ mɔ-yɔɔ» yɔ.

eng: If someone destroys Gods temple, God will destroy that person, because Gods temple is holy, which is what you are.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛyɔkɩ-kɛ yɔ, Ɛsɔ tɔyɩtʋʋ-ɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, kɛkɛ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-pʋyʋ. Mɩ lɛ ɖɩɣa ŋ́gá.

eng: Whatever was written in the past was written for our instruction so that we could have hope through endurance and through the encouragement of the scriptures.
local: Tɔm ndʋ́ tɩtɩŋa payɩ pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa ɖooo lɔŋ yɔ, pama-tʋ se tikuli ɖɛ-ɛsɛ nɛ ɖɩɖɔkɩ ɖɔ-hɔ nɛ tiyele pɩlabɩ-ɖʋ hʋnʋm nɛ ɖɩɖaŋ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ yɔ.

eng: Dont fool yourself. If some of you think they are worldly-wise, then they should become foolish so that they can become wise.
local: Nɔɔyʋ ɛtaacɛtɩ ɛ-tɩ yem. Yee mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ ɛmaɣzɩɣ se ɛwɛnɩ kedeŋa lɔŋsɩnɖɛ yɔ, pʋdʋ ɛpɩsɩ ɛzɩ kɩmɛlɛŋ yɔ. Peeɖe ɛkɛɣ lɔŋsɩnɖʋ toovenim taa.

eng: May the God of endurance and encouragement give you the same attitude toward each other, similar to Christ Jesus attitude.
local: Ɛsɔ weyi eyeki se ɛyáa ɛ́ɖɔ́kɩ pɔ-hɔ nɛ pɩlabɩ-wɛ hʋnʋm yɔ, eyele nɛ ɩla nɔɔ kʋɖʋmaɣ nɛ ɩla ɛzɩ Krɩstʋ Yesu kalakʋʋ yɔ.

eng: This worlds wisdom is foolishness to God. As its written, He catches the wise in their cleverness. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, kedeŋa lɔŋsɩnɖɛ kɛ kɩmɛlɛndʋ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa. Pʋwɛ ɛzɩ pamaʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Ɛsɔ kpaɣ lɔŋsɩnɖaa nɛ pa-maɣmaɣ pɛ-cɛtɩm» yɔ.

eng: That way you can glorify the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ together with one voice.
local: nɛ ɩkpɛndɩ mɩtɩŋa payɩ nɛ ɩsa Ɛsɔ weyi ɛkɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ Caa yɔ.

eng: And also, The Lord knows that the thoughts of the wise are silly .
local: Patasɩ maʋ ɖɔɖɔ se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ sɩm lɔŋsɩnɖaa lɩmaɣza. Ɛnawa se aawazɩɣ pʋyʋ.».

eng: So welcome each other, in the same way that Christ also welcomed you, for Gods glory.
local: Ɩmʋ ɖama camɩyɛ ɛzɩ Krɩstʋ mʋ́ʋ-mɩ nɛ Ɛsɔ hɩɖɛ sɛɛ yɔ.

eng: So then, no one should brag about human beings. Everything belongs to you—.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, nɔɔyʋ ɛtaakʋndɩ se ɛkɛ lɛlʋ ñɩnʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, paa weyi ɛkɛ mɩ-ñɩnʋ:.

eng: Im saying that Christ became a servant of those who are circumcised for the sake of Gods truth, in order to confirm the promises given to the ancestors.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se Krɩstʋ pɩsɩ Yuda ñɩma tʋmlaɖʋ se ɛla mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ kaɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ pɔ-cɔzɔnaa yɔ nɛ pɩwɩlɩ se ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ.

eng: Paul, Apollos, Cephas, the world, life, death, things in the present, things in the future—everything belongs to you.
local: paa ma Pɔɔlɩ yaa Apoloosi yaa Pɩyɛ. Paa kedeŋa yaa wezuu yaa sɩm yaa mbʋ́ pʋwɛ sɔnɔ yaa mbʋ́ pʋkɔŋ yɔ yɔ, pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩkɛ mɩ-ñɩm ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: and so that the Gentiles could glorify God for his mercy. As it is written, Because of this I will confess you among the Gentiles, and I will sing praises to your name .
local: Ɛkɔm ɖɔɖɔ se mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ, pasa Ɛsɔ ɛ-pʋtɔdɩyɛ naʋ yɔɔ ɛzɩ pamaʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa yɔ. Pamawa se: «Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, mankaɣ-ŋ sam ɛyáa tɩŋa hɛkʋ taa nɛ mentee hendu nɛ manɖʋ-ŋ hɩɖɛ.».

eng: but you belong to Christ, and Christ belongs to God.
local: Ɛlɛ́, mɩ mɩkɛ Krɩstʋ ñɩma nɛ Krɩstʋ ñɛkɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩnʋ.

eng: And again, it says, Rejoice, Gentiles, with his people .
local: Pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa ɖɔɖɔ se: «Mbá mɩ ɩtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ, ɩkpɛndɩ Ɛsɔ ñɩma yɔɔ nɛ mɩ nɛ wɛ ɩmayɩ amaya.».

eng: And again, Praise the Lord, all you Gentiles, and all the people should sing his praises .
local: Patasɩ maʋ ɖɔɖɔ se: «Kedeŋa yɔɔ ɛyáa tɩŋa, mɩtɩŋa payɩ ɩkpazɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ hɩɖɛ ɛsɔdaa. Ɛyáa kpeekpe, ɩsam-ɩ!».

eng: And again, Isaiah says, There will be a root of Jesse, who will also rise to rule the Gentiles. The Gentiles will place their hope in him .
local: Ezaayii ma ɛ-takayaɣ taa ɖɔɖɔ se: «Yesee liɖe taa tʋ nɔɔyʋ kaɣ kɔm. Ɛkaɣ kʋyʋʋ nɛ ɛcɔnɩ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ pataa-ɩ liu.».

eng: May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace in faith so that you overflow with hope by the power of the Holy Spirit.
local: Ɛsɔ weyi eyeki se ɖɩtaa-ɩ yɔ, ɛtɩŋnɩ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩwɛnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ kʋ-yɔɔ nɛ eyele mɩ-laŋa hʋlʋmɩ siŋŋ nɛ ɛhɛzɩ-yɛ camɩyɛ. Peeɖe pɩtɩŋɩɣnɩ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ɖoŋ yɔɔ nɛ ɩtɛzɩ-ɩ taʋ kpem.

eng: My brothers and sisters, I myself am convinced that you yourselves are full of goodness, filled with all knowledge, and are able to teach each other.
local: Man-taabalaa mɩ, ma-maɣmaɣ mana siŋŋ se ɩlakɩ ɖeu pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa nɛ ɩtɩlɩ mbʋ́ pʋpɔzʋʋ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ pɩtɩŋa payɩ. Ɩpɩzɩɣ ɩtasɩ ɖama lɛɣtʋ.

eng: But Ive written to you in a sort of daring way, partly to remind you of what you already know. Im writing to you in this way because of the grace that was given to me by God.
local: Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, mama-mɩ-tʋ kpayɩ ɖoli ɖoli se mɔntɔzɩ-mɩ mbʋ́ ɩɩtɛm kpɛlɩkʋʋ nɛ pɩɖɛɛ yɔ. Lootiye nɖɩ́ Ɛsɔ labɩ-m yɔ, ńɖɩ́ hanɩ-m waɖɛ se mama-mɩ ḿbʋ́.

eng: It helps me to be a minister of Christ Jesus to the Gentiles. Im working as a priest of Gods gospel so that the offering of the Gentiles can be acceptable and made holy by the Holy Spirit.
local: Ɛlabɩ-m-ɖɩ se mɛnkɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu tʋmlaɖʋ nɛ mansɩnɩ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ monsusuu-wɛ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ ɛ-cɔlɔ yɔ. Mɛwɛ ɛzɩ cɔjɔ nɛ ḿbá ñɛwɛɛ ɛzɩ kɩlaʋ kpɩnɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ nɛ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu kɛzɩ-ɖɩ nɛ hɔɔlʋʋ nɛ ɖɩkɛ ɛ-ñɩnɖɛ yɔ.

eng: So in Christ Jesus I brag about things that have to do with God.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ma nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa lɛ, manpɩzɩɣ mankʋndɩnɩ Ɛsɔ tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ malakɩ yɔ.

eng: I dont dare speak about anything except what Christ has done through me to bring about the obedience of the Gentiles. He did it by what Ive said and what Ive done.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, maacazɩɣ nabʋyʋ tɔm yɔɔdʋʋ nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ mbʋ́ Krɩstʋ tɩŋnɩ mɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛla se mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ, papɩzɩ paña Ɛsɔ yɔ pʋ-tɔm. Tɔm ndʋ́ monsusaɣ yɔ nɛ mbʋ́ malakaɣ yɔ, pʋ-yɔɔ ɛtɩŋnaa.

eng: by the power of signs and wonders, and by the power of Gods Spirit. So Ive completed the circuit of preaching Christs gospel from Jerusalem all the way around to Illyricum.
local: Ɛlabɩ ɖɔɖɔ hama lakasɩ ndɩ ndɩ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ɖoŋ. Ḿbʋ́ monsusi Krɩstʋ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm siŋŋ, kpaɣ Yeruusalɛm nɛ puwolo pɩsɩɩnɩ Iliirii.

eng: In this way, I have a goal to preach the gospel where they havent heard of Christ yet, so that I wont be building on someone elses foundation.
local: Manɖʋwa siŋŋ se monsusuu Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ɖenɖe pɔtɔyɔɔdɩdɩ Krɩstʋ tɔm yɔ nɛ mantaakɔɔ mantɩnɩ nɔɔyʋ tigiɖe yɔɔ.

eng: Instead, as its written, Those who hadnt been told about him will see, and those who hadnt heard will understand .
local: Ɛlɛ́, malakɩ ɛzɩ pamaʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa yɔ. Pamawa se: «Mbá pataaheyi-wɛ ɛ-tɔm yɔ, pɔkɔŋ-ɩ naʋ, nɛ mbá pataayɔɔdɩ ɛ-tɔm nɛ panɩɩ yɔ, pɔkɔŋ-tʋ nɩʋ nɛ panɩɩ tɩ-taa.».

eng: Im introducing our sister Phoebe to you, who is a servant of the church in Cenchreae.
local: Meheyiɣ-mɩ se ɖa-taabalʋ halʋ ñɩnʋ Foobee kɛ ɛyʋ siŋŋ. Ɛlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ Sankree Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa.

eng: Thats why Ive been stopped so many times from coming to see you.
local: Tɔm ńdʋ́ ti-susuu wɛna pɩlaɣzɩɣ-m nɛ mɔntɔkɔmda mɩ-tɛ.

eng: Welcome her in the Lord in a way that is worthy of Gods people, and give her whatever she needs from you, because she herself has been a sponsor of many people, myself included.
local: Ɩmʋ-ɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔɔ ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ se Ɛsɔ ñɩma ɛmʋ ɖama yɔ nɛ ɩsɩnɩ-ɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ e-liu wɛɛ se ɩsɩnɩ-ɩ yɔ pɩ-taa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛsɩnɩ ɛyáa sakɩyɛ, ɛsɩnɩ ma-maɣmaɣ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: But now, since I dont have any place to work in these regions anymore, and since Ive wanted to come to see you for many years.
local: Ɛlɛ́, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ mɛntɛm man-tʋmɩyɛ hɔɔlɩŋ ɩnɛ ɩ-taa. Pɩlabɩ pɩnzɩ sakɩyɛ yɔ, manɖʋʋ se mɔnkɔŋ mana-mɩ yɔ.

eng: Say hello to Prisca and Aquila, my coworkers in Christ Jesus.
local: Ɩsɛɛ Prisiili nɛ Akilaasɩ ɛyáa mbá ma nɛ wɛ ɖɩlakɩ Krɩstʋ Yesu tʋmɩyɛ yɔ.

eng: Ill visit you when I go to Spain. I hope to see you while Im passing through. And I hope you will send me on my way there, after I have first been reenergized by some time in your company.
local: Mancaɣ se maaɖɛɣ Ɛspaañɩ lɛ, mantɩŋ mɩ-tɛ nɛ mana-mɩ alɩwaatʋ pazɩ nɛ me-liu sɩ. Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɩsɩnɩ-m nɛ mɔnɖɔ ma-nʋmɔʋ.

eng: who risked their own necks for my life. Im not the only one who thanks God for them, but all the churches of the Gentiles do the same.
local: Ḿbá coɖini sɩm nɛ paya ma-ñʋʋ. Pɩtɛkɛ men-ɖeke mɛnsɛɣnɩ-wɛ, Yesu aŋgba wena awɛ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ pɛ-tɛ yɔ, atɩŋa a-taa ñɩma sɛɣ-wɛ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: But now Im going to Jerusalem, to serve Gods people.
local: Ɛlɛ́, mowoki Yeruusalɛm alɩwaatʋ tʋnɛ tɩ-taa nɛ mansɩnɩ Ɛsɔ ñɩma mbá pɛwɛ peeɖe yɔ nɛ pʋcɔ.

eng: Also say hello to the church that meets in their house. Say hello to Epaenetus, my dear friend, who was the first convert in Asia for Christ.
local: Ɩsɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma mbá pekpeɣliɣ Prisiili nɛ Akilaasɩ ñɩma ḿbá pɛ-tɛ yɔ. Ɩsɛɛ man-taabalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ Epayɩnɛɛtɩ. Ɛnʋ calɩnɩ wɛnaʋ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ Aazii hɔɔlʋʋ taa.

eng: Macedonia and Achaia have been happy to make a contribution for the poor among Gods people in Jerusalem.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Yesu aŋgba wena awɛ Masedonii nɛ Akayɩ yɔ, a-taa ñɩma ɖʋwa se pɔcɔʋ nabʋyʋ nɛ pasɩnɩ kʋñɔndɩnaa mbá pɛwɛ Yeruusalɛm Ɛsɔ ñɩma taa yɔ.

eng: Say hello to Mary, who has worked very hard for you.
local: Ɩsɛɛ Maarɩɩ weyi ɛlabɩ-mɩ tʋmɩyɛ siŋŋ yɔ.

eng: They were happy to do this, and they are actually in debt to Gods people in Jerusalem. If the Gentiles got a share of the Jewish peoples spiritual resources, they ought to minister to them with material resources.
local: Pa-maɣmaɣ paɖʋna se palakɩ ḿbʋ́. Toovenim lɛ, pɩɩwɛɛ se pala ḿbʋ́. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Yeruusalɛm Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma mbá pɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ, pawɩlɩ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ mbʋ́ pasɩm Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pʋwɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ se mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ, paba ɛsɩnɩ-wɛ nɛ pa-maɣmaɣ pa-ñɩm.

eng: Say hello to Andronicus and Junia, my relatives and my fellow prisoners. They are prominent among the apostles, and they were in Christ before me.
local: Ɩsɛɛ Andronikuusi nɛ Yuuniyaasɩ mbá pɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ ma yɔ. Ma nɛ wɛ paaɖʋ salaka. Pɛkɛ Krɩstʋ tiyiyaa mbá ɛyáa sɩm-wɛ siŋŋ yɔ. Pɛkɛ Krɩstʋ ñɩma nɛ pʋcɔ pɩtalɩnɩ-m.

eng: So then after I have finished this job and have safely delivered the final amount of the Gentiles offering to them, I will leave for Spain, visiting you on the way.
local: Pɩtɛŋ nɛ mankpaɣ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɛcɛlɩ-m yɔ nɛ mowona manɖʋzɩ pe-nesi taa nɛ mankʋyɩ se mɛnɖɛɣ Ɛspaañɩ lɛ, mantɩŋnɩ mɩ-tɛ.

eng: Say hello to Ampliatus, my dear friend in the Lord.
local: Ɩsɛɛ Ampliyaatuusi weyi pɩtɩŋnɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛkɛ man-taabalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ yɔ.

eng: And I know that when I come to you I will come with the fullest blessing of Christ.
local: Manawa se mɔnkɔŋʋʋ mɩ-tɛ yɔ, Krɩstʋ tɩŋɩɣnɩ mɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛwazɩ mɩ-yɔɔ siŋŋ.

eng: Say hello to Urbanus, our coworker in Christ, and my dear friend Stachys.
local: Ɩsɛɛ ɖa-taabalʋ Urbɛɛnɩ weyi ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩlakɩ Krɩstʋ tʋmɩyɛ yɔ nɛ man-taabalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ Staacɩɩ.

eng: From Paul, called by Gods will to be an apostle of Jesus Christ, and from Sosthenes our brother.
local: Ma Pɔɔlɩ lɛ, pɩkɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛya-m se mɛnkɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu tiyiyu. Ma nɛ taabalʋ Sɔstɛɛnɩ ɖɩmaɣnɩ-mɩ takayaɣ kanɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I urge you, through our Lord Jesus Christ and through the love of the Spirit, to join me in my struggles in your prayers to God for me.
local: Ɛlɛ́, man-taabalaa, ndʋ́ meheyiɣ-mɩ yɔ lɛ se ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yeba nɛ ɖɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ lɛ, monkuluu-mɩ hulaɣ se ɩsɩnɩ-m nɛ ɖitendi Ɛsɔ mɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɖa-laŋa tɩŋa.

eng: Say hello to Apelles, who is tried and true in Christ. Say hello to the members of the household of Aristobulus.
local: Ɩsɛɛ Apelɛɛsɩ weyi pɩtɩŋnɩ takʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ se ɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ siŋŋ yɔ. Ɩsɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ Aristoobuuli hɔʋ taa ñɩma.

eng: To Gods church that is in Corinth: To those who have been made holy to God in Christ Jesus, who are called to be Gods people. Together with all those who call upon the name of our Lord Jesus Christ in every place—hes their Lord and ours!.
local: Đɩmaɣ-kɛ mbá mɩ ɩkɛ Ɛsɔ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma Kɔrɛntɩ yɔ. Ɛya-mɩ se pɩtɩŋnɩ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɩcaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ pɩkɛdɩnaʋ-ɩ yɔ. Pɩtɩŋnɩ mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɩkɛ ɛ-ñɩma. Đɩmaɣ-kɛ mɩ nɛ mbá patɩŋa payɩ pɛwɛ paa le nɛ payaɣ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ hɩɖɛ yɔ. Yesu Krɩstʋ lɛ pa-Kɩpaɣlʋ. Ɛnʋ ɖɔɖɔ lɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ.

eng: Pray that I will be rescued from the people in Judea who dont believe. Also, pray that my service for Jerusalem will be acceptable to Gods people there.
local: Itendi-i se mantaasʋʋ Yudee ñɩma mbá paañaŋ Krɩstʋ yɔ pe-nesi taa. Itendi-i ɖɔɖɔ se Ɛsɔ ñɩma mbá pɛwɛ Yeruusalɛm yɔ, pamʋ haɖɛ nɖɩ́ mowokini-wɛ yɔ nesi naalɛ.

eng: Say hello to my relative Herodion. Say hello to the members of the household of Narcissus who are in the Lord.
local: Ɩsɛɛ Eroodiyɔɔ weyi ɛkɛ Yuda tʋ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ ma yɔ nɛ Narsiisi hɔʋ taa ñɩma mbá pɛkɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ñɩma yɔ.

eng: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Đɩsɛ-mɩ: ɖa-Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ palabɩ-mɩ lootiye nɛ pɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa!.

eng: so that I can come to you with joy by Gods will and be reenergized with your company.
local: Ɛsɔ etisaa yɔ, ḿbʋ́ mɔnkɔŋ mɩ-tɛ nɛ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ siŋŋ nɛ ma nɛ mɩ ɖɩcaɣ nɛ mɔ-yɔɔ hɛɛ.

eng: Say hello to Tryphaena and Tryphosa, who are workers for the Lord. Say hello to my dear friend Persis, who has worked hard in the Lord.
local: Ɩsɛɛ Triifɛɛnɩ nɛ Triifoozi. Pɛkɛ halaa mbá palakɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ tʋmɩyɛ yɔ. Ɩsɛɛ man-taabalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ halʋ ñɩnʋ Pɛɛrzidii weyi ɛlabɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ tʋmɩyɛ siŋŋ yɔ.

eng: I thank my God always for you, because of Gods grace that was given to you in Christ Jesus.
local: Mansaŋ Ɛsɔ mɩ-yɔɔ paa ɖooye. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛlabɩ-mɩ lootiye mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa.

eng: May the God of peace be with you all. Amen.
local: Ɛsɔ weyi ɛhɛzɩɣ ɛyáa laŋa yɔ, ɛwɛɛ mɩtɩŋa payɩ mɩ-cɔlɔ. Pɩla ḿbʋ́!.

eng: Say hello to Rufus, who is an outstanding believer, along with his mother and mine.
local: Ɩsɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ Ruufuusi weyi ɛkɛ ɛyʋ kɩbanʋ Kɩpaɣlʋ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ nɛ e-ɖoo weyi mayaɣ ɖɔɖɔ se mon-ɖoo yɔ.

eng: That is, you were made rich through him in everything: in all your communication and every kind of knowledge.
local: Toovenim lɛ, mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ ḿbʋ́ pʋ-yɔɔ ɩpɩsɩ ñɩm tɩnaa. Ɛsɔ ha-mɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ. Kɔzɩkɔzɩ eyebu nɛ ɩtɩlɩ toovenim nɛ isusuu ɛ-tɔm yɔ.

eng: Say hello to Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, Hermas, and the brothers and sisters who are with them.
local: Ɩsɛɛ Asiŋkriiti nɛ Fleegɔɔ nɛ Ɛrmɛɛsɩ nɛ Patroobaasɩ nɛ Ɛrmaasɩ nɛ taabalaa mbá pa nɛ wɛ pɛwɛɛ yɔ.

eng: in the same way that the testimony about Christ was confirmed with you.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Krɩstʋ tɔm ndʋ́ ɖisusi-mɩ yɔ, tɩcaɣ mɩ-taa camɩyɛ.

eng: Say hello to Philologus and Julia, Nereus and his sister, and Olympas, and all the saints who are with them.
local: Ɩsɛɛ Filoloogi nɛ Yuuli nɛ Neeree nɛ ɛ-kɔɔ nɛ Olɛmpaasɩ nɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩma lɛlaa mbá pa nɛ wɛ pɛwɛɛ yɔ patɩŋa payɩ.

eng: The result is that you arent missing any spiritual gift while you wait for our Lord Jesus Christ to be revealed.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mbá mɩ ɩɖaŋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ kaɣ ɛ-tɩ lɩzʋʋ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ ɛyáa yɔ, pɩtɛsɛɣ kʋjɔʋ nakʋyʋ se Ɛsɔ talabɩ-mɩ.

eng: Say hello to each other with a holy kiss. All the churches of Christ say hello to you.
local: Ɩsɛɛ ɖama camɩyɛ ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ se Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma ɛsɛɛ ɖama yɔ. Yesu aŋgba tɩŋa taa ñɩma sɛ-mɩ.

eng: He will also confirm your testimony about Christ until the end so that you will be blameless on the day of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ ɛhaɣnɩ-mɩ ɖoŋ nɛ ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ ḿbʋ́ ɛ-nʋmɔʋ taa nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɛtɛzaɣ wiye se pataana kɩdɛkɛdɩm nabʋyʋ mɩ-yɔɔ puwiye nɖɩ́ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ kɔŋ yɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I urge you to watch out for people who create divisions and problems against the teaching that you learned. Keep away from them.
local: Man-taabalaa, meheyiɣ-mɩ se ɩkpa mɩ-tɩ nɛ mbá paatisiɣ tɔm ndʋ́ pawɩlɩ-mɩ yɔ nɛ pawɩlɩɣ-mɩ ndʋ́ tɩwɛnɩ ndɩ yɔ. Ḿbá cɛyɩɣnɩ Ɛsɔ ñɩma pe-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa nɛ patayɩɣ-wɛ. Ɩtaañɔtɩnɩ-wɛ.

eng: God is faithful, and you were called by him to partnership with his Son, Jesus Christ our Lord.
local: Ɛsɔ weyi ɛya-mɩ se mɩ nɛ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ weyi ɛkɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔ ɩkpɛndɩ ɩla nɔɔ kʋɖʋmaɣ yɔ, ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ yɔ.

eng: People like that arent serving the Lord. They are serving their own feelings. They deceive the hearts of innocent people with smooth talk and flattery.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩtɛ ɛyáa ḿbá, paalakɩ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Krɩstʋ tʋmɩyɛ. Ɛlɛ́, pe-hiliŋ taa ɖeke pɔcɔŋna nɛ palakɩ nɔɔ leleŋ nɛ pɛcɛtɩɣnɩ mbá patasɩmdɩ pʋyʋ yɔ.

eng: Now I encourage you, brothers and sisters, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ: Agree with each other and dont be divided into rival groups. Instead, be restored with the same mind and the same purpose.
local: Taabalaa Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma, meheyiɣ mɩtɩŋa payɩ nɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ nɔɔ se ɩnɩɩnɩ ɖama camɩyɛ. Tayʋʋ nabʋyʋ ɛtaawɛɛ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa. Ɛlɛ́, ɩla nɔɔ kʋɖʋmaɣ nɛ ɩwɛnɩ lɩmaɣza kʋɖʋma.

eng: The news of your obedience has reached everybody, so Im happy for you. But I want you to be wise about whats good, and innocent about whats evil.
local: Mɩ lɛ, ɛyáa tɩŋa na ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩñaŋ Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ man-taa hʋlʋmɩnɩ-mɩ. Ɛlɛ́, me-liu wɛɛ se ɩkɛ lɔŋsɩnɖaa nɛ ɩla mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ nɛ ikoli mbʋ́ pɩfɛyɩ ɖeu yɔ.

eng: My brothers and sisters, Chloes people gave me some information about you, that youre fighting with each other.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Klowee tɛ ñɩma heyi-m se iyou.

eng: The God of peace will soon crush Satan under your feet. The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Ŋgʋ́, Ɛsɔ weyi ɛhɛzɩɣ ɛyáa laŋa yɔ, ɛkɔŋ Satanɩ nuutuu alɩwaatʋ pazɩ taa nɛ efiɣni nɛ eluzi-i mɩ-tɛɛ. Đa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu ɛlabɩ-mɩ lootiye.

eng: What I mean is this: that each one of you says, I belong to Paul, I belong to Apollos, I belong to Cephas, I belong to Christ.
local: Ndʋ́ mɔyɔɔdʋʋ yɔ, tɩ-tɔbʋʋ se mɩ-taa nabɛyɛ wɛɛ pɔyɔɔdʋʋ se pɛkɛ Pɔɔlɩ ñɩma nɛ lɛlaa se paba kɛ Apoloosi ñɩma. Lɛlaa ñɔtɔŋ ɖɔɖɔ se paba ñɛkɛ Pɩyɛ ñɩma nɛ lɛlaa se pɛkɛ Krɩstʋ ñɩma.

eng: Timothy my coworker says hello to you, and Lucius, Jason, and Sosipater, my relatives.
local: Man-taabalʋ Timootee weyi ma nɛ ɩ ɖɩlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ yɔ nɛ Lusiyuusi nɛ Yaasɔɔ nɛ Soziipatɛɛrɩ mbá pɛkɛ ɖɔɖɔ Yuda ñɩma ɛzɩ ma yɔ, pɛsɛ-mɩ.

eng: Has Christ been divided? Was Paul crucified for you, or were you baptized in Pauls name?.
local: Krɩstʋ ɛnʋ patayɩ-ɩ yaa we? Ma Pɔɔlɩ pakam kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ mɩ-yɔɔ, yaa mɔ-nɔɔ palabɩnɩ-mɩ lɩm sɔʋ sɔnzɩ?.

eng: Im Tertius, and Im writing this letter to you in the Lord—hello!.
local: Ma Tɛrtiyuusi weyi Pɔɔlɩ heyi-m nɛ mama takayaɣ kanɛ nɛ ɛ-nɔɔ yɔ, mɛnsɛɣ-mɩ ɖa nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa.

eng: Thank God that I didnt baptize any of you, except Crispus and Gaius.
local: Mansaŋ Ɛsɔ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ mantala mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ lɩm sɔʋ sɔnzɩ nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ Krispuusi nɛ Gayuusi yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: Gaius, who is host to me and to the whole church, says hello to you. Erastus the city treasurer says hello to you, along with our brother Quartus.
local: Gayuusi weyi ɛmʋ-m ɛ-tɛ yɔ, ɛsɛ-mɩ. Ɛ-tɛ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma tɩŋa woki pekpeɣliɣ. Eraastɩ weyi ɛkɛ tɛtʋ taa liidiye ɖɔkɩyʋ yɔ nɛ ɖa-taabalʋ Kaartuusi pɛsɛ-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ. .

eng: so that nobody can say that you were baptized in my name!.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, nɔɔyʋ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛyɔɔdɩ se mɔ-nɔɔ palabɩnɩ-mɩ-sɩ.

eng: May the glory be to God who can strengthen you with my good news and the message that I preach about Jesus Christ. He can strengthen you with the announcement of the secret that was kept quiet for a long time.
local: Đɩsa Ɛsɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛha-mɩ ɖoŋ nɛ ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ ɛ-nʋmɔʋ taa. Pʋwɛ ɛzɩ paɖʋʋ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ndʋ́ monsusuu nɛ mɛnkɛdɩɣ ɛyáa Yesu Krɩstʋ tɔm yɔ tɩ-taa yɔ. Tɩ-taa ɛwɩlɩ-ɖʋ mbʋ́ pɩɩwɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ nɛ ɛtaawɩlɩ-pʋ ɛyáa ɖooo ɛzɩ ɛlabʋ kedeŋa yɔ.

eng: Oh, I baptized the house of Stephanas too. Otherwise, I dont know if I baptized anyone else.
local: Ahaɣaɣ, maasɔwa! Malabɩ-sɩ ɖɔɖɔ Stefanaasɩ nɛ ɛ-hɔʋ taa ñɩma. Pa-wayɩ lɛ, mantatasɩ tɔzʋʋ se malabɩ-sɩ nɔɔyʋ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Now that secret is revealed through what the prophets wrote. It is made known to the Gentiles in order to lead to their faithful obedience based on the command of the eternal God.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ pɩtɩŋnɩ tɔm ndʋ́ náyaa mawa yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ nɛ pukuli tɩ-yɔɔ nɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ ɛyáa kpeekpe tɩlɩ-tʋ ɛzɩ ɛnʋ Ɛsɔ weyi ɛwɛ tam yɔ ɛɖʋʋ yɔ. Pɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ nɛ pañam-ɩ.

eng: Christ didnt send me to baptize but to preach the good news. And Christ didnt send me to preach the good news with clever words so that Christs cross wont be emptied of its meaning.
local: Krɩstʋ tetiyi-m se mɔnkɔɔ mala ɛyáa lɩm sɔʋ sɔnzɩ. Ɛlɛ́, etiyi-m se monsusi Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm. Maasusuu-tʋ ɛyáa ɛzɩ weyi ɛyɔɔdʋʋnɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-lɔŋsɩnɖɛ camɩyɛ yɔ. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, sɩm mbʋ́ Krɩstʋ sɩbɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ yɔ, pɩɩtasɩɣ wɛnaʋ wazaɣ nakɛyɛ.

eng: May the glory be to God, who alone is wise! May the glory be to him through Jesus Christ forever! Amen.
local: Ɛsɔ weyi e-ɖeke koŋ ɛkɛ lɔŋsɩnɖʋ yɔ, ɖɩsam-ɩ tam. Pɩtɩŋnɩ Yesu Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɖɩsam-ɩ. Pɩla ḿbʋ́!.

eng: The message of the cross is foolishness to those who are being destroyed. But it is the power of God for those of us who are being saved.
local: Tɔm ndʋ́ posusuu se Krɩstʋ sɩbɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ yɔ, mbá pɛwɛ asayʋʋ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ, panɩɣ-tʋ lɛ, tɩwɛ-wɛ ɛzɩ kɩmɛlɛndʋ tɔm yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, mbá ɖa payakɩ ɖa-ñʋʋ yɔ, tɩkɛnɩ-ɖʋ Ɛsɔ ɖoŋ.

eng: It is written in scripture: I will destroy the wisdom of the wise, and I will reject the intelligence of the intelligent .
local: Pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Menɖeziɣ mbá pamaɣzɩɣ se pɛwɛnɩ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ yɔ pɔ-lɔŋsɩnɖɛ nɛ mamʋʋzɩ mbá pamaɣzɩɣ se pɛwɛnɩ lɛɣtʋ yɔ pɛ-lɛɣtʋ.».

eng: Where are the wise? Where are the legal experts? Where are todays debaters? Hasnt God made the wisdom of the world foolish?.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́ weyi ɛmaɣzɩɣ se ɛkɛ lɔŋsɩnɖʋ yɔ, se we ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛtasɩ yɔɔdʋʋ? Nɛ weyi ɛ́lɛ́ woba sukuli yɔ? Nɛ weyi ɛ́lɛ́ maɣzɩɣ se ɛsɩm tɔm yɔɔdʋʋ camɩyɛ yɔ, ɛwazɩɣ we? Se we ɛyáa panɛ patɩŋa papɩzɩɣ patasɩ yɔɔdʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ? Paawazɩɣ pʋyʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ wɩlaa se kedeŋa ñɩma lɔŋsɩnɖɛ kɛ kɩmɛlɛndʋ.

eng: In Gods wisdom, he determined that the world wouldnt come to know him through its wisdom. Instead, God was pleased to save those who believe through the foolishness of preaching.
local: Toovenim lɛ, kedeŋa ñɩma nɛ pɔ-lɔŋsɩnɖɛ patapɩzɩ patɩlɩ Ɛsɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛnʋ sɔɔlɩnɩ ḿbʋ́ ɛ-lɔŋsɩnɖɛ taa. Ɛlɛ́, ɛɖʋwa se ɛyakɩ mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ tɔm ndʋ́ ɖisusuu-wɛ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ pa-ñʋʋ. Ŋgʋ́, tɔm ńdʋ́ tɩwɛ lɛlaa ɛzɩ kɩmɛlɛndʋ tɔm yɔ.

eng: Jews ask for signs, and Greeks look for wisdom.
local: Yuda ñɩma pɔzʋʋ se pala hama lakasɩ nɛ pana nɛ pʋcɔ petisi, Grɛɛkɩ ñɩma ñañɩnɩɣ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ se pʋcɔ.

eng: but we preach Christ crucified, which is a scandal to Jews and foolishness to Gentiles.
local: Piyele ɖa lɛ, ɖisusuu Krɩstʋ weyi pakam-ɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ yɔ ɛ-tɔm. Tɔm ńdʋ́, tɩkɛnɩ Yuda ñɩma mbʋ́ putuuluu-wɛ yɔ nɛ tɩkɛnɩ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ ɛzɩ kɩmɛlɛndʋ tɔm yɔ.

eng: But to those who are called—both Jews and Greeks—Christ is Gods power and Gods wisdom.
local: Ɛlɛ́, mbá Ɛsɔ yawa yɔ, paa pɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yaa pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ, Krɩstʋ ɛnʋ, ɛkɛnɩ-wɛ Ɛsɔ ɖoŋ nɛ Ɛsɔ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ.

eng: This is because the foolishness of God is wiser than human wisdom, and the weakness of God is stronger than human strength.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ lɩmaɣza wena ɛyáa kpakɩɣ se akɛ kɩmɛlɛndʋ yɔ, akɩlɩ ɛyáa lɔŋsɩnɖɛ. Ɛ-lakasɩ nzɩ́ ɛyáa kpakɩɣ ɖɔɖɔ se sɩwɛ ɛjandʋ yɔ, sɩkɩlɩ ɛyáa ɖoŋ.

eng: Look at your situation when you were called, brothers and sisters! By ordinary human standards not many were wise, not many were powerful, not many were from the upper class.
local: Taabalaa, ɩcɔnɩ ɩna mbʋ́ ɩɩkɛwa nɛ pʋcɔ Ɛsɔ yaa-mɩ yɔ. Mbá ɛyáa kpakaɣ se lɔŋsɩnɖaa yaa ɖoŋ tɩnaa yaa sɔsaa yɔ, pataaɖɔɔ mɩ-taa.

eng: But God chose what the world considers foolish to shame the wise. God chose what the world considers weak to shame the strong.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ lɩzɩ mbá ɛyáa kpakɩɣ se kɩmɛlɛmɩŋ yɔ nɛ ɛɖʋnɩ lɔŋsɩnɖaa fɛyɛ. Ɛlɩzɩ ɖɔɖɔ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɛjandʋ kedeŋa yɔɔ yɔ nɛ ɛɖʋnɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖoŋ yɔ fɛyɛ.

eng: And God chose what the world considers low-class and low-life—what is considered to be nothing—to reduce what is considered to be something to nothing.
local: Ɛnʋ lɩzɩnɩ ɖɔɖɔ mbá pɛfɛyɩ wazaɣ nakɛyɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ nɛ ɛyáa takpaɣ-wɛ payaa pʋyʋ nɛ pɛfɛyɩ natʋyʋ taa kpem yɔ. Ɛlɩzɩ-wɛ se papɩsɩ sɔsaa mbá pamaɣzɩɣ se pawazɩɣ pʋyʋ yɔ pɛ-ɛsɩndaa.

eng: So no human being can brag in Gods presence.
local: Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se nɔɔyʋ ɛtaapɩzɩ ɛtasɩ ɛ-tɩ kpazʋʋ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa.

eng: It is because of God that you are in Christ Jesus. He became wisdom from God for us. This means that he made us righteous and holy, and he delivered us.
local: Ŋgʋ́, Ɛsɔ kpɛndɩ mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu. Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ eyebina se ɛkɛ ɖɔ-lɔŋsɩnɖɛ. Ɛ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ tɩŋnaa nɛ ɛpɩsɩ-ɖʋ kʋtʋʋzaa nɛ ɖɩpɩsɩ ɛ-ñɩma nɛ ɛya ɖa-ñʋʋ.

eng: This is consistent with what was written: The one who brags should brag in the Lord! .
local: Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se pɩla ɛzɩ pamaʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Yee nɔɔyʋ liu ɛwɛɛ se ɛkʋndʋʋ yɔ, ɛkʋndɩnɩ mbʋ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ laba yɔ.».

eng: When someone in your assembly has a legal case against another member, do they dare to take it to court to be judged by people who arent just, instead of by Gods people?.
local: Yee tɔm ɛwɛ mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ nɛ ɛ-taabalʋ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa lɛ, pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ pʋdʋ woki mbá Ɛsɔ tapɩsɩ-wɛ kʋtʋʋzaa yɔ pɔ-cɔlɔ se pahʋʋ-wɛ-tʋ nɛ eewoki Ɛsɔ ñɩma cɔlɔ?.

eng: Or dont you know that Gods people will judge the world? If the world is to be judged by you, are you incompetent to judge trivial cases?.
local: Ɩtatɩlɩ se Ɛsɔ ñɩma kɔŋnɩ hʋnaʋ kedeŋa ñɩma tɔm naa we? Yee mɩ pʋwɛɛ se ɩhʋʋnɩ kedeŋa ñɩma tɩŋa payɩ lɛ, pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma ɩɩpɩzɩɣ ɩhʋʋ tɔm cikpetu yɔ?.

eng: Dont you know that we will judge angels? Why not ordinary things?.
local: Ɩtatɩlɩ se ɖɩkɔŋ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa tɔm hʋnaʋ naa we? Yee ḿbʋ́ lɛ, ɛzɩma ɖɩɩpɩzɩɣ ɖɩhʋʋ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ tɔm yɔ?.

eng: So then if you have ordinary lawsuits, do you appoint people as judges who arent respected by the church?.
local: Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ yee tɔm natʋyʋ ɛwɛ mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ nɛ ɛ-taabalʋ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa lɛ, ɛyáa mbá Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma takpaɣ-wɛ payaa pʋyʋ yɔ, pɔ-cɔlɔ powoki se pahʋʋ-wɛ-tʋ?.

eng: Im saying this because you should be ashamed of yourselves! Isnt there one person among you who is wise enough to pass judgment between believers?.
local: Fɛyɛ ɛɛkpaɣ-mɩ yaa we? Lɔŋsɩnɖʋ kʋɖʋm nɔɔyʋ fɛyɩ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa se ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛhʋʋ ɛ-taabalaa mɩ mɩ-tɔm naa we?.

eng: But instead, does a brother or sister have a lawsuit against another brother or sister, and do they do this in front of unbelievers?.
local: Đenɖe ɛzɩ pɩɩla ḿbʋ́ lɛ, powokini pɔ-tɔm mbá pɛfɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ pɔ-cɔlɔ se pahʋʋ-wɛ-tʋ.

eng: The fact that you have lawsuits against each other means that youve already lost your case. Why not be wronged instead? Why not be cheated?.
local: Yee tɔm natʋyʋ ɛtɩɩwɛ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa se pahʋʋ-tʋ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se ɩtɛm tɔlʋʋ kpem. Pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma ɩɩpɩzɩɣ se ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ nɔɔyʋ lakɩ-mɩ kɩdɛkɛdɩm yaa ɛmɩlɩ mɩ-pʋyʋ yɔ?.

eng: But instead you are doing wrong and cheating—and youre doing it to your own brothers and sisters.
local: Halɩ mɩlakɩnɩ lɛlaa kɩdɛkɛdɩm nɛ ɩmɩlɩɣ-wɛ. Ŋgʋ́, pɛkɛ mɩ-taabalaa!.

eng: Dont you know that people who are unjust wont inherit Gods kingdom? Dont be deceived. Those who are sexually immoral, those who worship false gods, adulterers, both participants in same-sex intercourse.
local: Ɩtatɩlɩ se kɩdɛkɛdɩm laɖaa ɛɛkaɣ sʋʋ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa yaa we? Ɩtaacɛtɩ mɩ-tɩ: acɛyɛ laɖaa yaa sɩɩnaa layaa yaa acɛyɛ laɖaa yaa abalaa mbá pacaɣ ɖama yɔ.

eng: thieves, the greedy, drunks, abusive people, and swindlers wont inherit Gods kingdom.
local: yaa mɩ́láa yaa kujoŋjoŋ tɩnaa yaa sʋlʋm kpaŋɩyaa yaa mbá patʋʋ ɛyáa yɔ yaa mɔntɔkɩnɩ mon-ɖoŋwaa paakaɣ sʋʋ Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ taa.

eng: That is what some of you used to be! But you were washed clean, you were made holy to God, and you were made right with God in the name of the Lord Jesus Christ and in the Spirit of our God.
local: Ḿbʋ́ mɩ-taa lɛlaa lakaɣ. Ɛlɛ́ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, Ɛsɔ ñalɩ mɩ-kɩwɛɛkɩm nɛ ɛpɩsɩ-mɩ ɛ-ñɩma nɛ pɩtɩŋnɩ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔ nɛ ɩkɛ kʋtʋʋzaa ɛ-ɛsɩndaa Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ yɔɔ.

eng: I have the freedom to do anything, but not everything is helpful. I have the freedom to do anything, but I wont be controlled by anything.
local: Toovenim lɛ: «Pɩha-ɖʋ waɖɛ se ɖɩla pɩtɩŋa,» ɛlɛ́, pɩtɛkɛ pɩtɩŋa pʋwɛnɩ wazaɣ. «Pɩha-ɖʋ waɖɛ se ɖɩla pɩtɩŋa,» ɛlɛ́, ɖiiyeki se nabʋyʋ ɛpɩsɩ-ɖʋ pu-yomaa.

eng: Food is for the stomach and the stomach is for food, and yet God will do away with both. The body isnt for sexual immorality but for the Lord, and the Lord is for the body.
local: Meheyiɣ-mɩ se: «Tɔɔnasɩ yɔɔ lotu wɛɛ nɛ lotu ñɛwɛɛ tɔɔnasɩ yɔɔ.» Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, Ɛsɔ kɔŋ pa-naalɛ yɔkʋʋ. Pɩtɛkɛ acɛyɛ yɔɔ palabɩ tomnaɣ: palabɩ-kɛ se kawazɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ nɛ ɛcɔnɩ kɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: God has raised the Lord and will raise us through his power.
local: Đɔɖɔ lɛ, Ɛsɔ weyi efezi Kɩpaɣlʋ nɛ sɩm taa yɔ, ɛkɔŋ-ɖʋ fezuu ɖɔɖɔ nɛ e-ɖoŋ.

eng: Dont you know that your bodies are parts of Christ? So then, should I take parts of Christ and make them a part of someone who is sleeping around? No way!.
local: Ɩtatɩlɩ se mi-tomnasɩ kɛ Krɩstʋ tomnaɣ pilinzi naa we? Pʋwɛ ɖeu se pakpaɣ Krɩstʋ tomnaɣ piliŋa nɛ pɛcɛlɩ halʋ weyi ɛlakɩ acɛyɛ yɔ yaa we? Aayɩ! Pɩfɛyɩ ɖeu ḿbʋ́ kpem.

eng: Dont you know that anyone who is joined to someone who is sleeping around is one body with that person? The scripture says, The two will become one flesh .
local: Ɩtatɩlɩ ɖɔɖɔ se weyi ɛca halʋ weyi ɛlakɩ acɛyɛ yɔ, ɛ nɛ ɩ po-tomnasɩ pɩsɩ kʋɖʋmaɣ naa we? Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Pa-naalɛ papɩsɩɣ tomnaɣ kʋɖʋmaɣ.».

eng: The one who is joined to the Lord is one spirit with him.
local: Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ pɛkpɛndɩɣ yɔ, ɛ nɛ ɩ pa-kalɩzasɩ pɩsɩ kʋɖʋmaɣ.

eng: Avoid sexual immorality! Every sin that a person can do is committed outside the body, except those who engage in sexual immorality commit sin against their own bodies.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtaatɩɩlabʋ acɛyɛ kpem. Kɩwɛɛkɩm lɛɛbʋ mbʋ́ ɛyáa lakɩ yɔ, piitukuuni po-tomnasɩ. Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛlakɩ acɛyɛ yɔ, ɛwɛɛkɩɣ ɛ-maɣmaɣ e-tomnaɣ.

eng: Or dont you know that your body is a temple of the Holy Spirit who is in you? Dont you know that you have the Holy Spirit from God, and you dont belong to yourselves?.
local: Ɩtatɩlɩ se mi-tomnaɣ lɛ Fezuu ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ ha-mɩ nɛ kɩwɛɛ mɩ-taa yɔ kɩ-ɖɩɣa naa we? Pɩtɛkɛ mɩtɩnɩ mɩ-tɩ.

eng: You have been bought and paid for, so honor God with your body.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩkɛ ɛyáa mbá Ɛsɔ yabɩ-wɛ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩkpaɣ mi-tomnasɩ nɛ ɩɖʋnɩ Ɛsɔ hɩɖɛ.

eng: Now, about what you wrote: Its good for a man not to have sex with a woman.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, moncosuu-mɩ tɔm ndʋ́ ɩma-m takayaɣ nɛ ɩpɔzɩ-m yɔ. Meheyiɣ-mɩ se: pʋwɛ ɖeu se abalʋ ɛcaɣ ḿbʋ́, ɛtaakpaɣ halʋ.

eng: Each man should have his own wife, and each woman should have her own husband because of sexual immorality.
local: Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, acɛyɛ yɔɔ lɛ, pʋwɛ ɖeu se paa abalʋ weyi ɛkpaɣ halʋ nɛ paa halʋ weyi lɛ, ɛ́lɛ́ walɩ.

eng: The husband should meet his wifes sexual needs, and the wife should do the same for her husband.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se abalʋ ɛla ɛ-halʋ mbʋ́ pʋpɔzʋʋ-ɩ yɔ nɛ halʋ ñala ɖɔɖɔ ɛ-walʋ mbʋ́ pʋpɔzʋʋ ɛ́lɛ́ yɔ.

eng: The wife doesnt have authority over her own body, but the husband does. Likewise, the husband doesnt have authority over his own body, but the wife does.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ halʋ tɩnɩ ɛ-tɩ, ɛlɛ́, ɛ-walʋ tɩnɩ-ɩ. Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pʋwɛnɩ abalʋ. Pɩtɛkɛ ɛnʋ tɩnɩ ɛ-tɩ, ɛlɛ́, ɛ-halʋ tɩnɩ-ɩ.

eng: Dont refuse to meet each others needs unless you both agree for a short period of time to devote yourselves to prayer. Then come back together again so that Satan might not tempt you because of your lack of self-control.
local: Halʋ nɛ ɛ-walʋ pataapɛ pa-tɩ ɖama. Yee panɩnɩ ɖama se papɩzɩ pehiɣ alɩwaatʋ nɛ pɛsɛɛ Ɛsɔ yɔ, kalɩ pi-ɖeke. Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pataacaɣ nɛ puwolo poliŋ. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, paapɩzɩɣ pɔ́ɖɔ́kɩ pa-tɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Satanɩ takɩɣ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: Im saying this to give you permission; its not a command.
local: Ndʋ́ mɔyɔɔdaa yɔ, tɩtɛkɛnɩ-mɩ paɣtʋ. Ɛlɛ́, mamaɣzɩɣ se ɩpɩzaɣ se ɩla ḿbʋ́.

eng: I wish all people were like me, but each has a particular gift from God: one has this gift, and another has that one.
local: Ma me-liu kɛwɛɛ se ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ ɛcaɣ ḿbʋ́ ɛzɩ ma yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ labɩ ɛyáa kʋjɔŋ ndɩ ndɩ. Paa weyi ɛ nɛ ɛ-ñɩŋgʋ.

eng: Im telling those who are single and widows that its good for them to stay single like me.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, meheyiɣ mbá patakpaɣ halaa nɛ mbá patawalɩ nɛ lelaa se pʋwɛ ɖeu se pacaɣ ḿbʋ́ ɛzɩ ma yɔ.

eng: But if they cant control themselves, they should get married, because its better to marry than to burn with passion.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee paapɩzɩɣ pa-tɩ ɖɔkʋʋ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se pakpaɣ halaa yaa pawalɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩkɩlɩ ɖeu se ɛyʋ ɛkpaɣ halʋ yaa ɛwalɩ ɖenɖe ɛzɩ pɩɩwɛɛ pɩlakɩ-ɩ liu nɛ pɩkɩlɩ kpem yɔ.

eng: Im passing on the Lords command to those who are married: A wife shouldnt leave her husband.
local: Mbá pawalaa yaa pakpaɣ halaa yɔ, Kɩpaɣlʋ ɖʋna se halʋ ɛtaakʋyɩ ɛ-walʋ yɔɔ. Pɩtɛkɛ maɖʋna. Yee ɛtɛm kʋyʋʋ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɛcaɣ ḿbʋ́. Ɛtaatasɩ walʋʋ yaa ɛ nɛ ɛ-walʋ pɔñɔɔzɩ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa. Pɩfɛyɩ se abalʋ ɛɖɔɔnɩ ɛ-halʋ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Im telling everyone else : If a believer has a wife who doesnt believe, and she agrees to live with him, then he shouldnt divorce her.
local: Piyele lɛlaa yɔ, pɩtɛkɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ heyiɣni-wɛ. Ma-maɣmaɣ meheyiɣnɩ-wɛ se: yee weyi ɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ ɛtɛm kpaɣʋ halʋ weyi ɛfɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛ́lɛ́ tisi se ɛ nɛ ɩ pɛwɛɛ yɔ, pɩfɛyɩ se abalʋ ɛnʋ ɛɖɔɔnɩ-ɩ.

eng: If a woman has a husband who doesnt believe and he agrees to live with her, then she shouldnt divorce him.
local: Đɔɖɔ lɛ, yee halʋ weyi ɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ ɛtɛm walʋʋ weyi ɛfɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛ́lɛ́ tisi se ɛɖɔkʋʋ-ɩ yɔ, pɩfɛyɩ se ɛkʋyɩ ɛ-yɔɔ.

eng: The husband who doesnt believe belongs to God because of his wife, and the wife who doesnt believe belongs to God because of her husband. Otherwise, your children would be contaminated by the world, but now they are spiritually set apart.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, halʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-yɔɔ lɛ, Ɛsɔ sɩ abalʋ weyi ɛfɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ nɛ hɔɔlʋʋ se ɛkɛ ɛ-ñɩnʋ. Yaa abalʋ yɔɔ lɛ, Ɛsɔ sɩ halʋ weyi ɛ́lɛ́ fɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ nɛ hɔɔlʋʋ se ɛkɛ ɛ-ñɩnʋ ɖɔɖɔ. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, mi-piya ɛɛkɛɣ Ɛsɔ ñɩma, ŋgʋ́ sɩkɛ ɛ-ñɩma.

eng: But if a spouse who doesnt believe chooses to leave, then let them leave. The brother or sister isnt tied down in these circumstances. God has called you to peace.
local: Yee weyi ɛfɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ, ekiziɣni weyi ɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ, ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛla ḿbʋ́. Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ lɛ, pɛfɛyɩ ɖama taa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ ya-mɩ se mɩ nɛ lɛlaa ɩwɛɛ laŋhɛzɩyɛ taa.

eng: So a person should think about us this way—as servants of Christ and managers of Gods secrets.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se ɛyáa ɛtɩlɩ se Krɩstʋ tiyiyaa ɖa, ɖɩkɛ ɛ-tʋmlaɖaa. Ɛsɔ ɖʋzɩ e-toovenim mbʋ́ pɩɩwɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ yɔ ɖe-nesi taa se ɖɩwɩlɩ ɛyáa.

eng: How do you know as a wife if you will save your husband? Or how do you know as a husband if you will save your wife?.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, halʋ weyi ña ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ, ŋlabɩ ɛzɩma ŋtɩlɩ se ŋpɩzɩɣ ŋya ña-walʋ ñʋʋ? Piyele abalʋ weyi ña ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ, ñalabɩ ɛzɩma ŋtɩlɩ se ŋpɩzɩɣ ŋya ña-halʋ ñʋʋ?.

eng: In this kind of situation, what is expected of a manager is that they prove to be faithful.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋpɔzʋʋ weyi paɖʋzɩ e-nesi taa pʋyʋ yɔ lɛ se: ɛla mbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa yɔ.

eng: Nevertheless, each person should live the kind of life that the Lord assigned when he called each one. This is what I teach in all the churches.
local: Piyele tɔm lɛɛtʋ tɩŋa payɩ taa lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se paa weyi ɛcaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ haʋ-ɩ yɔ nɛ ɛwɛɛ ɛzɩ ɛɛwɛʋ nɛ pʋcɔ Ɛsɔ yaa-ɩ yɔ. Paɣtʋ tʋnɛ manɖʋʋ Yesu aŋgba tɩŋa taa ñɩma.

eng: I couldnt care less if Im judged by you or by any human court; I dont even judge myself.
local: Ma lɛ, yee ɩmaɣzɩɣ se malabɩ mbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa yɔ yaa mbʋ́ pɩtamʋna yɔ yɔ, pɩtana-m nɛ pʋyʋ. Paa lɛlaa ɛtɔm se malabɩ mbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa yɔ yaa mbʋ́ pɩtamʋna yɔ yɔ, pɩtana-m nɛ pʋyʋ. Halɩ ma-maɣmaɣ maatɔŋ ma-ñɩndʋ se pʋyʋ.

eng: If someone was circumcised when called, he shouldnt try to reverse it. If someone wasnt circumcised when he was called, he shouldnt be circumcised.
local: Ɛzɩ yee paapɛlɩ nɔɔyʋ nɛ pʋcɔ Ɛsɔ yaa-ɩ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɛwɛɛ ḿbʋ́. Yee pataapɛlɩ nɔɔyʋ nɛ pʋcɔ Ɛsɔ yaa-ɩ yɔ, pɩfɛyɩ se ɛtɔ se pɛpɛlɩ-ɩ.

eng: Im not aware of anything against me, but that doesnt make me innocent, because the Lord is the one who judges me.
local: Mantatɩlɩ ɛzaɣ́tʋ ndʋ́ tɩwɛ mɔ-yɔɔ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, pɩɩwɩlɩɣ se mantala ɛzaɣ́tʋ natʋyʋ. Kɩpaɣlʋ hʋʋnɩ mɔn-tɔm.

eng: Circumcision is nothing; not being circumcised is nothing. What matters is keeping Gods commandments.
local: Pɛpɛlɩ-ŋ yaa pɛtɛpɛlɩ-ŋ yɔ, pɩfɛyɩ wazaɣ nakɛyɛ. Ɛlɛ́, mbʋ́ pʋwɛ wazaɣ yɔ lɛ Ɛsɔ paɣtʋ yɔɔ ɖɔm.

eng: So dont judge anything before the right time—wait until the Lord comes. He will bring things that are hidden in the dark to light, and he will make peoples motivations public. Then there will be recognition for each person from God.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtaahʋʋnɩ ɖama nɛ pʋcɔ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋwa se Kɩpaɣlʋ kɔŋ yɔ, tɩtalɩ. Ɛnʋ lɩzɩɣnɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa yɔ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ. Ɛnʋ kuluuni ɖɔɖɔ mbʋ́ ɛyáa maɣzɩɣ pa-taa yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ. Peeɖe Ɛsɔ saŋ paa weyi mbʋ́ ɛlaba yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: Each person should stay in the situation they were in when they were called.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se paa weyi ɛwɛɛ ɛzɩ ɛɛwɛʋ nɛ pʋcɔ Ɛsɔ yaa-ɩ yɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I have applied these things to myself and Apollos for your benefit. Ive done this so that you can learn what it means not to go beyond what has been written and so none of you will become arrogant by supporting one of us against the other.
local: Taabalaa Krɩstʋ ñɩma, mɩ-yɔɔ mankpaɣ tɔm ndʋ́ mɔyɔɔdaa yɔ nɛ mɛnkɛdɩnɩ ma nɛ Apoloosi. Mancaɣaɣ se ɩnɩɩ eduuye ɖɩnɛ ɖɩ-tɔbʋʋ: «Ɩtaala nɛ pɩɖɛɛ mbʋ́ pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.» Pʋbʋ lɛ, nɔɔyʋ ɛɛtɩnɩɣ lɛlʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛkpazɩ ɛ-tɩ nɛ eniɣzi lɛlʋ.

eng: If you were a slave when you were called, dont let it bother you. But if you are actually able to be free, take advantage of the opportunity.
local: Ɛzɩ yee yom ŋŋkɛwa nɛ pʋcɔ ɛya-ŋ yɔ, taahʋʋ natʋyʋ. Ɛlɛ́, yee pɩha-ŋ waɖɛ se ŋwɛɛ ña-tɩ yɔɔ yɔ, ñaɣ pana.

eng: Who says that you are better than anyone else? What do you have that you didnt receive? And if you received it, then why are you bragging as if you didnt receive it?.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, aheyi-ŋ se ŋkɩlɩ lɛlaa? Pɩtɛkɛ Ɛsɔ hanɩ-ŋ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ŋwɛna yɔ yaa we? Yee toovenim se ɛnʋ ɛhanɩ-ŋ-pʋ lɛ, pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma ŋkʋndʋʋnɩ-pʋ ɛzɩ pataha-ŋ-pʋ kɩhaʋ yɔ?.

eng: Anyone who was a slave when they were called by the Lord has the status of being the Lords free person. In the same way, anyone who was a free person when they were called is Christs slave.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, weyi ɛɛkɛ yom nɛ pʋcɔ Kɩpaɣlʋ yaa-ɩ yɔ, ɛwɛ ɛ-tɩ yɔɔ ɛ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛnʋ pɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, weyi ɛɛwɛ ɛ-tɩ yɔɔ nɛ pʋcɔ Krɩstʋ yaa-ɩ yɔ, ɛpɩsɩ Krɩstʋ ɛnʋ e-yom.

eng: Youve been filled already! Youve become rich already! You rule like kings without us! I wish you did rule so that we could be kings with you!.
local: Ei! Naze mɩtɛm mi-ɖeɖe hiɣu! Ɩtɛm pɩsʋʋ ñɩm tɩnaa! Naze mɩpɩsɩ awiya nɛ piyebi-ɖʋ! Toovenim lɛ, ɖe-liu kɛwɛɛ kpem se ɩtɔɔ kewiyaɣ nɛ ɖɩkɔɔ ɖa nɛ mɩ ɖɩtɔɔ-kɛ.

eng: You were bought and paid for. Dont become slaves of people.
local: Ɩkɛ ɛyáa mbá Ɛsɔ yabɩ-wɛ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtaapɩsɩ mɩ-tɩ ɛyáa yomaa.

eng: I suppose that God has shown that we apostles are at the end of the line. We are like prisoners sentenced to death, because we have become a spectacle in the world, both to angels and to humans.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩlakɩ-m ɛzɩ ɖa Krɩstʋ tiyiyaa lɛ, lone nɖɩ́ pʋtɔyɩnɩ-ɖɩ yɔ, ɖɩ-taa Ɛsɔ sɩ-ɖʋ yɔ. Đɩwɛ ɛzɩ mbá pakʋ pɔ-tɔm nɛ pʋpɔzʋʋ se pakʋ-wɛ yɔ. Pelem-ɖʋ ɛyáa nɛ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa patɩŋa payɩ pɛ-ɛsɩndaa.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, each of you should stay with God in the situation you were in when you were called.
local: Taabalaa, pʋwɛɛ se paa weyi ɛwɛɛ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa ɛzɩ ɛɛwɛʋ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛ́yáa-ɩ yɔ.

eng: We are fools for Christ, but you are wise through Christ! We are weak, but you are strong! You are honored, but we are dishonored!.
local: Ei! Đɛkɛ kɩmɛlɛmɩŋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ mɩ mɩkɛ lɔŋsɩnɖaa mɩ nɛ ɩ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa! Đɛkɛ ajamaa nɛ mɩkɛ ɖoŋ tɩnaa! Patakpaɣ-ɖa payaa pʋyʋ nɛ piyele pasaŋ-mɩ!.

eng: I dont have a command from the Lord about people who have never been married, but Ill give you my opinion as someone you can trust because of the Lords mercy.
local: Aɖamɛɛ tɔm lɛ, Kɩpaɣlʋ taɖʋ-m se meheyi-mɩ natʋyʋ. Weyi ma ɛlabɩ lootiye nɛ pʋmʋna se ɛyʋ ɛta-m liu yɔ, ma-maɣmaɣ ma-lɩmaɣza meheyiɣ-mɩ.

eng: Up to this very moment we are hungry, thirsty, wearing rags, abused, and homeless.
local: Toovenim lɛ, halɩ nɛ sɔnɔ, ñɔɔsɩ wɛɛ sɩwɩɣ-ɖʋ nɛ lɔkɔtʋ ñɔɖɔkɩ-ɖʋ. Đɩfɛyɩnɩ wondu se ɖisuu. Pamakɩ-ɖʋ nɛ ɖɩwɛɛ ɖɩcɔʋ paa le.

eng: So I think this advice is good because of the present crisis: Stay as you are.
local: Ɩɩnaɣ mbʋ́ mamaɣzɩɣ se pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ: alɩwaatʋ kaɖɛ ñɩndʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩwɛ tɩ-taa lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩkɩlɩ wee wee se ɛyʋ ɛcaɣ ɛɖanɛ ḿbʋ́.

eng: We work hard with our own hands. When we are insulted, we respond with a blessing; when we are harassed, we put up with it;.
local: Đɩkʋʋ ɖa-tɩ nɛ tʋmɩyɛ se ɖihiɣ ɖɩtɔɔ. Ŋgʋ́, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛyáa tʋʋ-ɖʋ yɔ, ɖɩwazɩɣ-wɛ. Đɩɖɔkʋʋ ɖa-tɩ ɖɔɖɔ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pɛwɛɣ ɖa-wayɩ kaŋ kaŋ yɔ.

eng: If you are married, dont get a divorce. If you are divorced, dont try to find a spouse.
local: Yee ŋtɛm halʋ kpaɣʋ yɔ, taaɖɔɔnɩ-ɩ. Yee ŋtakpaɣda yɔ, taacazɩ kpaɣʋ.

eng: when our reputation is attacked, we are encouraging. We have become the scum of the earth, the waste that runs off everything, up to the present time.
local: Yee ɛyáa ɛyɔɔdʋʋ-ɖʋ tɔm ɛzaɣ́tʋ yɔ, ɖicosuu-wɛ camɩyɛ. Halɩ nɛ sɔnɔ, ɛyáa kpakɩɣ-ɖʋ ɛzɩ kedeŋa yɔɔ azuluma nɛ ñɩtʋ ndʋ́ pahazɩɣ yɔ.

eng: But if you do marry, you havent sinned; and if someone who hasnt been married gets married, they havent sinned. But married people will have a hard time, and Im trying to spare you that.
local: Ɛlɛ́, paa ŋɖʋwa se ŋkpakɩɣ halʋ yɔ, ŋtala kɩwɛɛkɩm. Paa pɛlɛ ɛɖʋwa se ɛwalɩɣ yɔ, ɛtala kɩwɛɛkɩm ɖɔɖɔ. Ɛlɛ́, mbá pakpakɩɣ halaa yaa pawalɩɣ yɔ, pɔkɔŋ tɔɔʋ kʋñɔŋ pe-wezuu caɣʋ taa. Kʋñɔŋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩ-taa me-liu wɛɛ se malɩzɩ-mɩ.

eng: Im not writing these things to make you ashamed but to warn you, since you are my loved children.
local: Maamaɣ-mɩ tɔm tʋnɛ se manɖʋ-mɩ fɛyɛ. Ɛlɛ́, mamaɣ-mɩ-tʋ se mansɩɣzɩ-mɩ lɔŋ ɛzɩ men-piya nzɩ́ mɔnsɔɔlaa siŋŋ yɔ.

eng: Now concerning meat that has been sacrificed to a false god: We know that we all have knowledge. Knowledge makes people arrogant, but love builds people up.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, pʋcɔ ɖɩyɔɔdɩ kɩlaʋ nandʋ tɔm lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se pɩkɛ toovenim se: «Đatɩŋa payɩ ɖɩsɩm lɛɣtʋ.» Ɛlɛ́, lɛɣtʋ ńdʋ́ tiyeki nɛ ɛyʋ kpazɩ ɛ-tɩ. Ŋgʋ́, sɔɔlɩm ñeyeki nɛ ɛyʋ tɛzɩ pɩʋ e-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa.

eng: This is what Im saying, brothers and sisters: The time has drawn short. From now on, those who have wives should be like people who dont have them.
local: Taabalaa, ɩɩnaɣ ndʋ́ meheyiɣ-mɩ yɔ: alɩwaatʋ kazɩ pazɩ yem. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩkpaɣʋnɩ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ nɛ pɩɖɛɣ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se mbá pakpaɣ halaa yɔ, pacaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ aɖamɛɛ yɔ.

eng: You may have ten thousand mentors in Christ, but you dont have many fathers. I gave birth to you in Christ Jesus through the gospel.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, paa ɩɩwɛnɩ wɩlɩyaa sakɩyɛ nɛ pawɩlɩɣ-mɩ Krɩstʋ tɔm yɔ, ɩɩpɩzɩɣ ɩwɛnɩ caanaa sakɩyɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mɔnkɔmnɩ monsusi-mɩ Krɩstʋ Yesu Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm nɛ pɩtɩŋnɩ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ manpɩsɩ ɛzɩ mɩ-caa yɔ.

eng: If anyone thinks they know something, they dont yet know as much as they should know.
local: Weyi ɛmaɣzɩɣ se ɛsɩm nabʋyʋ yɔ, ɛtasɩmda nɛ pɩtalɩ ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ se ɛtɩlɩ yɔ.

eng: Those who are sad should be like people who arent crying. Those who are happy should be like people who arent happy. Those who buy something should be like people who dont have possessions.
local: Mbá pewiliɣ yɔ, pacaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ paawiliɣ yɔ. Mbá pɛwɛ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ taa yɔ, pacaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ pɛfɛyɩ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ taa yɔ nɛ mbá payakɩ yɔ, paba ñacaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ pɩtɛkɛ ḿbá tɩnɩ mbʋ́ payaba yɔ.

eng: so I encourage you to follow my example.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mentendiɣ-mɩ se ɩtɩŋ ma-nʋmɔʋ.

eng: But if someone loves God, then they are known by God.
local: Ŋgʋ́, yee nɔɔyʋ ɛsɔɔlɩ Ɛsɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ sɩm-ɩ.

eng: Those who use the world should be like people who arent preoccupied with it, because this world in its present form is passing away.
local: Mbá pakpaɣ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ ñɩm nɛ palakɩnɩ tʋmɩyɛ yɔ, pataaɖʋ pa-lɩmaɣza pʋ-yɔɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pɩkazaa se kedeŋa ŋgá ɩnaɣ ɛzʋnɔ yɔ kɛtɛ yɔ, tɩtɔɖɔɔ.

eng: This is why Ive sent Timothy to you; hes my loved and trusted child in the Lord; hell remind you about my way of life in Christ Jesus. Hell teach the same way as I teach everywhere in every church.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yebina nɛ mentiyini-mɩ man-pɩɣa kʋsɔɔlaɣ Timootee weyi ɛkɛ ɛyʋ toovenim tʋ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛsɩndaa yɔ. Ɛnʋ tɔzʋʋnɩ-mɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ mɔnɖɔŋ Krɩstʋ nʋmɔʋ taa me-wezuu caɣʋ taa yɔ, nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ mawɩlɩɣ paa le Yesu aŋgba tɩŋa payɩ taa yɔ.

eng: So concerning the actual food involved in these sacrifices to false gods, we know that a false god isnt anything in this world, and that there is no God except for the one God.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, mancaɣ se mɔyɔɔdɩ kɩlaʋ nandʋ tɔɔʋ tɔm. Đɩnawa se agɔlɩma fɛyɩnɩ wazaɣ nakɛyɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ. Đɩnawa ɖɔɖɔ se Ɛsɔ kʋɖʋm koŋ wɛna.

eng: I want you to be free from concerns. A man who isnt married is concerned about the Lords concerns—how he can please the Lord.
local: Ŋgʋ́, me-liu taawɛɛ se mɩ-lɩmaɣza ɛkʋ-mɩ. Ɛɖanɛ lɛ, Kɩpaɣlʋ tʋmɩyɛ lɩmaɣza kʋʋnɩ-ɖɩ.

eng: Some have become arrogant as if Im not coming to see you.
local: Mɩ-taa lɛlaa kpazaɣ pa-tɩ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩlakaɣ-wɛ se maatasɩɣ kɔm mɩ-tɛ.

eng: Granted, there are so-called gods, in heaven and on the earth, as there are many gods and many lords.
local: Toovenim lɛ, nabɛyɛ kpakɩɣ ɛsɔdaa nɛ tataa wondu natʋyʋ se tɩkɛ pɛ-ɛsɔnaa. Nɛ ɛyáa ḿbá, pamaɣzɩɣ toovenim taa se ɛsɔnaa ɖɔwa nɛ kɩpaɣlaa wɛɛ ndɩ ndɩ.

eng: But a married man is concerned about the worlds concerns—how he can please his wife.
local: Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛkpaɣ halʋ yɔ, kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ lɩmaɣza kʋʋnɩ-ɩ. Ɛñɩnɩɣ se ɛla mbʋ́ pɩkɛdɩnɩ ɛ-halʋ yɔ.

eng: But, if the Lord is willing, Ill come to you soon. Then I wont focus on what these arrogant people say, but Ill find out what power they possess.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee Kɩpaɣlʋ etisaa yɔ, mɔnkɔŋ mɩ-tɛ alɩwaatʋ tʋnɛ tɩ-taa nɛ mana se tɩ-kpazɩyaa ḿbá, pɔyɔɔdʋʋ yem yaa pɛwɛnɩ ɖoŋ nɩɩyɩ.

eng: However, for us believers, There is one God the Father. All things come from him, and we belong to him. And there is one Lord Jesus Christ. All things exist through him, and we live through him.
local: Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɖa ɖanawa se Ɛsɔ kʋɖʋm koŋ wɛna. Ɛnʋ lɛ ɖa-Caa. Ɛnʋ labɩnɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ, ɛnʋ tɩnɩ-ɖʋ ɖe-wezuu caɣʋ taa. Kɩpaɣlʋ kʋɖʋm koŋ ɖɔɖɔ ɖɩwɛna. Ɛnʋ lɛ Yesu Krɩstʋ weyi Ɛsɔ tɩŋnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛla mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ yɔ. Ɛnʋ hanɩ-ɖʋ wezuu.

eng: His attention is divided. A woman who isnt married or who is a virgin is concerned about the Lords concerns so that she can be dedicated to God in both body and spirit. But a married woman is concerned about the worlds concerns—how she can please her husband.
local: Ɛwɛ cenje. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, pɛlɛ yaa halʋ weyi ɛfɛyɩnɩ walʋ yɔ, Kɩpaɣlʋ tʋmɩyɛ lɩmaɣza kʋʋnɩ-ɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛkpaɣ ɛ-tɩ pilim nɛ ɛha Ɛsɔ. Weyi ɛwalaa yɔ, kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ lɩmaɣza kʋʋnɩ-ɩ. Ɛñɩnɩɣ se ɛla mbʋ́ pɩkɛdɩnɩ ɛ-walʋ yɔ.

eng: Gods kingdom isnt about words but about power.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩtɛkɛ ɛyáa yɔɔdaɣ panaɣnɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ tɔkɩ e-Kewiyaɣ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, pa-lakasɩ panaɣna.

eng: But not everybody knows this. Some are eating this food as though it really is food sacrificed to a real idol, because they were used to idol worship until now. Their conscience is weak because it has been damaged.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛyáa tɩŋa tatɩlɩ ḿbʋ́. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, agɔlɩma tɔm sʋnɩ mɩ-taa nabɛyɛ siŋŋ nɛ pɔtɔkɩ kɩlaʋ nandʋ nɛ pamaɣzɩɣ se agɔlɩma ana awɛnɩ ɖoŋ pɔ-yɔɔ. Ɛzɩma mbʋ́ patapɩɩ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa nɛ pa-lɩmaɣza fɛyɩ a-ɖeɖe yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pamaɣzɩɣ se papɩsɩɣ azaɣ́a tɔɔnaɣ ŋgá kɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: Im saying this for your own advantage. Its not to restrict you but rather to promote effective and consistent service to the Lord without distraction.
local: Mancaɣ se piɖeni-mɩ yɔɔ mɔyɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́. Pɩtɛkɛ nʋmɔʋ manɖɩkɩ-mɩ. Mancaɣ se ɩcaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ yɔ nɛ ɩtɩŋ Kɩpaɣlʋ wayɩ nɛ mɩ-laŋɩyɛ tɩŋa pilim.

eng: Which do you want? Should I come to you with a big stick to punish you, or with love and a gentle spirit?.
local: Ɛbɛ mi-liu wɛɛ: mɔnkɔɔ mɩ-tɛ nɛ ɛgbazɩyɛ yaa mɔnkɔmnɩ sɔɔlɩm nɛ ma nɛ mɩ pʋwɛɛ leleŋ?.

eng: Food wont bring us close to God. Were not missing out if we dont eat, and we dont have any advantage if we do eat.
local: Ŋgʋ́, pɩtɛkɛ tɔɔnaɣ nakɛyɛ tɔɔʋ yekina nɛ ɖɩpɩsɩ ɛyáa kɩbama Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa. Paa ɖɩtɔɔ-kɛ yaa ɖɩtɔtɔɔ-kɛ yɔ, pɩɩsɔzʋʋ-ɖʋ pʋyʋ.

eng: If someone thinks he is acting inappropriately toward an unmarried woman whom he knows, and if he has strong feelings and it seems like the right thing to do, he should do what he wants—hes not sinning—they should get married.
local: Yee evebu nɔɔyʋ ɛwɛnɩ ɖaŋ nɛ ɛɖʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛkpakɩɣ-ɩ yɔ, nɛ pʋwayɩ ɛlabɩ-ɩ liu nɛ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ se ɛcaɣ nɛ pɩtalɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛkpaɣ-ɩ ɛzɩ e-liu wɛʋ yɔ: ɛtala kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ.

eng: But watch out or else this freedom of yours might be a problem for those who are weak.
local: Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɩkpa mɩ-tɩ se waɖɛ nɖɩ́ pɩha-mɩ se ɩtɔɔ kɩlaʋ nandʋ yɔ, ɖitaayele nɛ mbá patapɩɩ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ, pa-taa nɔɔyʋ tɔlɩ.

eng: But if a man stands firm in his decision, and doesnt feel the pressure, but has his own will under control, he does right if he decides in his own heart not to marry the woman.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee pɩtalɩɩnɩ nɔɔyʋ cɔlɔ nɛ evebu maɣmaɣ ɛɖʋnɩ ɛ-taa kpem se ɛɛkpakɩɣ ɛ-ɖaŋ se ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛcaɣ ḿbʋ́ nɛ ɛ́ɖɔ́kɩ ɛ-tɩ yɔ, ɛlabɩ camɩyɛ.

eng: Suppose someone sees you eating in an idols temple. Wont the person with a weak conscience be encouraged to eat the meat sacrificed to false gods?.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, weyi ña ŋsɩm ḿbʋ́ yɔ, yee ŋcaɣ agɔlɩma naŋ nakʋyʋ tɛɛ nɛ ŋtɔkɩ kɩlaʋ nandʋ nɛ weyi ɛtapɩɩ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ ɛna-ŋ yɔ, pɩɩlakɩ ɛ́lɛ́ ɖɔɖɔ se ɛtɔɔ-tʋ yaa we?.

eng: Therefore, the one who marries the unmarried woman does right, and the one who doesnt get married will do even better.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, weyi ɛkpakɩɣ ɛ-ɖaŋ yɔ, ɛlabɩ camɩyɛ. Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛɛkpakɩɣ ɛ-ñɩnʋ yɔ, ɛlabɩ camɩyɛ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ.

eng: The weak brother or sister for whom Christ died is destroyed by your knowledge.
local: Peeɖe mbʋ́ ŋsɩma yɔ, pilesiɣ weyi ɛtapɩɩ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ. Ŋgʋ́, ɛkɛ ña-taabalʋ weyi Krɩstʋ sɩbɩ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: A woman is obligated to stay in her marriage as long as her husband is alive. But if her husband dies, she is free to marry whomever she wants, only it should be a believer in the Lord.
local: Halʋ ɛtɛm walʋʋ abalʋ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɛwɛɛ ɛ-yɔɔ ḿbʋ́ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ abalʋ ɛnʋ ɛwɛnɩ ɛ-ɛsɛ yɔ. Yee abalʋ ɛnʋ ɛsɩba yɔ, ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛwalɩ weyi e-liu wɛɛ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se pʋdʋ ɛkɛ weyi ɛ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ pɛkpɛndaa yɔ.

eng: You sin against Christ if you sin against your brothers and sisters and hurt their weak consciences this way.
local: Yee ɩyʋsʋʋnɩ mɩ-taabalaa mbá patapɩɩ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ ḿbʋ́ nɛ piliɣtiɣ pa-lɩmaɣza yɔ, Krɩstʋ maɣmaɣ ɩyʋsɩnaa.

eng: But in my opinion, she will be happier if she stays the way she is. And I think that I have Gods Spirit too.
local: Ma lɛ, mamaɣzɩɣ se yee ɛcaɣ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɛ-laŋɩyɛ hʋlʋmʋʋ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ ɛzɩ ɛɛɖaɣnɩ walʋʋ yɔ. Manawa ɖɔɖɔ se Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu heyini-m ndʋ́ mɔyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ.

eng: This is why, if food causes the downfall of my brother or sister, I wont eat meat ever again, or else I may cause my brother or sister to fall.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, yee tɔɔnaɣ ŋgá ka-taa wɛ kɩlaʋ nandʋ yɔ kɔ-tɔɔʋ eyekina se man-taabalʋ ɛtɔlɩ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ, maatasɩɣ nandʋ tɔɔʋ kaʋ.

eng: Everyone has heard that there is sexual immorality among you. This is a type of immorality that isnt even heard of among the Gentiles—a man is having sex with his fathers wife!.
local: Pɔyɔɔdʋʋ paa le se mɩ-taa nabɛyɛ lakɩ acɛyɛ. Halɩ paanaɣ wɛtʋ ńdʋ́ mbá paañaŋ Krɩstʋ yɔ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa. Pɔyɔɔdʋʋ se mɩ-taa lɛlʋ wɛɛ ɛsʋʋnɩ ɛ-caa halʋ.

eng: And youre proud of yourselves instead of being so upset that the one who did this thing is expelled from your community.
local: Pɩtasɩ ɖɔɖɔ lɛ, ɩwɛɛ ɩkpazɩɣ mɩ-tɩ. Ŋgʋ́, pɩɩwɛɛ se mɩ-ɛsɛ ɛñɩŋ nɛ ɩɖɔɔnɩ weyi ɛlabɩ lakasɩ ńzɩ́ yɔ mɩ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa.

eng: Though Im absent physically, Im present in the spirit and Ive already judged the man who did this as if I were present.
local: Ma lɛ, mɛnfɛyɩ mɩ-cɔlɔ, ɛlɛ́, mɛwɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ ma-lɩmaɣza taa. Pʋ-yɔɔ mɛntɛm weyi ɛlabɩ ɛzaɣ́tʋ ńdʋ́ yɔ ɛ-tɔm kʋʋ ɛzɩ maawɛɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ peeɖe yɔ.

eng: When you meet together in the name of our Lord Jesus, Ill be present in spirit with the power of our Lord Jesus.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ikpeɣliɣ tɔm ńdʋ́ tɩ-yɔɔ nɛ mɛwɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ ma-lɩmaɣza taa yɔ, Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu ɖoŋ wɛɣ ɖɔ-cɔlɔ.

eng: At that time we need to hand this man over to Satan to destroy his human weakness so that his spirit might be saved on the day of the Lord.
local: Peeɖe ɖɩɖʋzʋʋ pʋdʋ Satanɩ nesi taa nɛ ɛ́lɛ́ nuuti e-tomnaɣ nɛ Ɛsɔ ya ɛ-kalɩzaɣ ñʋʋ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ hʋʋnɩ ɛyáa tɔm yɔ.

eng: Your bragging isnt good! Dont you know that a tiny grain of yeast makes a whole batch of dough rise?.
local: Pɩfɛyɩ ɖeu se ɩkpazɩ mɩ-tɩ. Ɩtatɩlɩ se potuu eduuye se: «Sɔsɔɔna pazɩ yekina nɛ somtu huúú yaa we?».

eng: Clean out the old yeast so you can be a new batch of dough, given that youre supposed to be unleavened bread. Christ our Passover lamb has been sacrificed.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se ɩlɩzɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm mbʋ́ pʋwɛ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pʋwɛ ɛzɩ sɔsɔɔna yɔ. Peeɖe ɩwɛɣ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ ɛzɩ somtu ndʋ́ tɩ-taa fɛyɩ sɔsɔɔna yɔ. Toovenim lɛ, ɩtɛm wɛʋ ḿbʋ́. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pala Krɩstʋ ɖɔ-yɔɔ ɛzɩ ɖe-heɣa ŋgá ɖʋkʋʋ se ɖɩtɔɔnɩ Paska Kazandʋ yɔ.

eng: so lets celebrate the feast with the unleavened bread of honesty and truth, not with old yeast or with the yeast of evil and wickedness.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɖɩtɔɔ ɖa-kazandʋ ńdʋ́. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩtɔɔ-tʋ nɛ tindine nɖɩ́ ɖɩ-taa fɛyɩ sɔsɔɔna yɔ. Pʋ-tɔbʋʋ se ɖɩwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ nɛ ɖɩkɛ toovenim tɩnaa. Điyele kɩwɛɛkɩm nɛ acɛyɛ mbá ɖɩlakaɣ yɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɛwɛ ɛzɩ sɔsɔɔna yɔ.

eng: I wrote to you in my earlier letter not to associate with sexually immoral people.
local: Takayaɣ ŋgá maama-mɩ yɔ, maaheyi-mɩ ka-taa se mɩ nɛ acɛyɛ laɖaa ɩtaaɖɔ.

eng: But I wasnt talking about the sexually immoral people in the outside world by any means—or the greedy, or the swindlers, or people who worship false gods—otherwise, you would have to leave the world entirely!.
local: Mɔyɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pɩtatɩɩkɛʋ mbá pɛfɛyɩ mɩ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa yɔ, pɔ-tɔm mɔyɔɔdʋʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, yee nɔɔyʋ ɛɛcaɣ se ɛ nɛ acɛyɛ laɖaa yaa kujoŋjoŋ tɩnaa yaa mɩ́láa yaa sɩɩnaa layaa mbá pɛwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ yɔ pɛwɛɛ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɛkʋyɩ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ kpem.

eng: But now Im writing to you not to associate with anyone who calls themselves brother or sister who is sexually immoral, greedy, someone who worships false gods, an abusive person, a drunk, or a swindler. Dont even eat with anyone like this.
local: Mbá pɛwɛ mɩ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa yɔ, ḿbá mɔyɔɔdʋʋ. Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛtɔm se ɛkɛ Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa tʋ nɛ ɛlakɩ acɛyɛ yaa kujoŋjoŋ yaa ɛlaɣ sɩɩnaa yaa ɛtʋʋ ɛyáa yaa ɛkpaŋɩɣ sʋlʋm yaa ɛmɩlɩɣ yɔ, mɩ nɛ pɩtɛ ɛyʋ ɩtaaɖɔ, paa tɔɔnaɣ yɔ, ɩtaakpɛndɩ.

eng: What do I care about judging outsiders? Isnt it your job to judge insiders?.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ ma pʋmʋnaa se mahʋʋnɩ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma yɔ. Ɛsɔ kɔŋna hʋʋ mbá pɛtɛkɛ ɖɩ-taa ñɩma yɔ pɔ-tɔm. Ɛlɛ́, mbá pɛkɛ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma yɔ, ḿbá pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩhʋʋna. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩla ɛzɩ pamaʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa yɔ. Pamawa se: «Ɩɖɔɔnɩ ɛzaɣ́ʋ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ.».

eng: Am I not free? Am I not an apostle? Havent I seen Jesus our Lord? Arent you my work in the Lord?.
local: Ma yɔ, mɛnfɛyɩ man-tɩ yɔɔ yaa we? Mɛntɛkɛ Krɩstʋ tiyiyu naa we? Mantana ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu yaa we? Ɩtɛkɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ malaba yɔ ɖɩ-kɛzɛɣa naa we?.

eng: If Im not an apostle to others, at least I am to you! You are the seal that shows Im an apostle.
local: Paa lɛlaa ɛtakpaɣ-m se mɛnkɛ Krɩstʋ tiyiyu yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se mɩ mɩkpaɣ-m se mɛnkɛ-ɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mɩ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa lɛ, mɩ lɛ mbʋ́ pɩwɩlɩɣ toovenim se malabɩ Krɩstʋ tiyiyu tʋmɩyɛ yɔ.

eng: This is my defense against those who criticize me.
local: Mbá pɛkpɛzɩɣnɩ-m yɔ, mɔnpɔzʋʋ-wɛ se:.

eng: Dont we have the right to eat and drink?.
local: pɩtamʋnɩ se ɩha-m mbʋ́ mɔntɔɔ nɛ mɔñɔɔ tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ malakɩ yɔ ɖɩ-yɔɔ yaa we?.

eng: Dont we have the right to travel with a wife who believes like the rest of the apostles, the Lords brothers, and Cephas?.
local: Pɩtamʋnɩ se mankpaɣ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa halʋ nɛ ma nɛ ɩ ɖɩɖɔŋ nʋmɔʋ ɛzɩ e-tiyiyaa lɛlaa nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ newaa nɛ Pɩyɛ palakʋʋ yɔ yaa we?.

eng: Or is it only I and Barnabas who dont have the right to not work for our living?.
local: Ɛzɩ ma nɛ Barnaabaasɩ ɖe-ɖeke pɩwɛnɩ se ɖɩla tʋmɩyɛ nɛ ɖɩcɔnɩ ɖa-tɩ yɔɔ yaa we?.

eng: Who joins the army and pays their own way? Who plants a vineyard and doesnt eat its fruit? Who shepherds a flock and doesnt drink its milk?.
local: Alakɩ sɔɔjatʋ nɛ paahɛyɩɣ-ɩ? Asɔʋ tɩʋ nɛ ɛɛtɔkɩ ki-pee? Aɖiyiɣ wondu nɛ ɛɛñɔʋ tɩ-naalɩm?.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to be sure of the fact that our ancestors were all under the cloud and they all went through the sea.
local: Taabalaa, me-liu wɛɛ se ɩtɔzɩ mbʋ́ pɩɩlabɩ ɖɔ-cɔzɔnaa mbá nɛ Mooyiizi pɔɖɔŋaɣ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ. Ɛsɔmɩnʋʋ kohuuzi patɩŋa payɩ pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ paɖʋ Teŋgu Kɩsɛmʋʋ nɛ palɩɩ patɩŋa payɩ pɛɖɛɛ.

eng: Im not saying these things just based on common sense, am I? Doesnt the Law itself say these things?.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ mbʋ́ ɛyáa lakɩ yɔ, pi-ɖeke pʋ-yɔɔ mɔyɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́. Ɛlɛ́, paɖʋ Mooyiizi paɣtʋ taa ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: All were baptized into Moses in the cloud and in the sea.
local: Pɩlabʋ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pʋwɛ ɛzɩ palabɩ patɩŋa payɩ lɩm sɔʋ sɔnzɩ ɛsɔmɩnʋʋ tɛɛ nɛ Teŋgu Kɩsɛmʋʋ taa yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pa nɛ Mooyiizi paakpɛndaa.

eng: In Moses Law its written: You will not muzzle the ox when it is threshing . Is God worried about oxen.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, paɖʋ tɩ-taa se: «Nɔ weyi ɛmakɩ mɩla yɔ , paahɔkʋʋ ɛ-nɔɔ se ɛtaatɔɔ.» Naŋ yɔɔ Ɛsɔ maɣzaa nɛ ɛyɔɔdɩ yaa.

eng: All ate the same spiritual food.
local: Patɩŋa payɩ paatɔɔ tɔɔnaɣ ŋgá kalɩnɩ ɛsɔdaa yɔ.

eng: or did he say this entirely for our sake? It was written for our sake because the one who plows and the one who threshes should each do so with the hope of sharing the produce.
local: ɖɔ-yɔɔ ɖeke ɛmaɣzɩɣ nɛ ɛyɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́? Toovenim lɛ, ɖɔ-yɔɔ pama-tʋ. Pʋwɛɛ se weyi ɛhayɩɣ nɛ weyi ɛmakɩ mɩla yɔ, pataa liu se pɔkɔŋ hiɣu pe-ɖeɖe.

eng: and all drank the same spiritual drink. They drank from a spiritual rock that followed them, and the rock was Christ.
local: nɛ pɔñɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ patɩŋa payɩ Ɛsɔ pɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩtɩŋaɣ pa-wayɩ yɔ ɖɩ-lɩm. Pɩyɛ ńɖɩ́ lɛ Krɩstʋ.

eng: If we sowed spiritual things in you, is it so much to ask to harvest some material things from you?.
local: Đisusi-mɩ Ɛsɔtɔm nɛ tɩwɛɛ mɩ-taa ɛzɩ poɖuu ɖomaɣ hayɩm taa yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɖɩɩɖɛlɛsɩɣ niye alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩpɔzʋʋ-mɩ se ɩha-ɖʋ mbʋ́ ɖɩcakɩnɩ wezuu yɔ.

eng: However, God was unhappy with most of them, and they were struck down in the wilderness.
local: Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pa-taa ɛyáa sakɩyɛ taakɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ pasɩbɩ lakʋ taa pɛɛbɛɛ.

eng: If others have these rights over you, dont we deserve them all the more? However, we havent made use of this right, but we put up with everything so we dont put any obstacle in the way of the gospel of Christ.
local: Yee Ɛsɔtɔm susiyaa lɛlaa ɩwɛnɩ waɖɛ se pɔtɔɔ pɛ-Ɛsɔtɔm susuu yɔɔ lɛ, ɖɩfɛyɩnɩ waɖɛ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ-wɛ yaa we? Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɖɩtɔpɔzɩ-mɩ se ɩsɩnɩ-ɖʋ. Ɛlɛ́, ɖitisaa nɛ ɖɩla kʋñɔŋ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa se ɖa-lakasɩ nasɩyɩ ɛtaaɖɩɣ ɛyáa nʋmɔʋ se pataanɩɩ Krɩstʋ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm.

eng: These things were examples for us, so we wont crave evil things like they did.
local: Ḿbʋ́ wɩlɩɣnɩ-ɖʋ se ɖɩtaasɔɔlɩ kɩdɛkɛdɩm labʋ ɛzɩ paasɔɔlʋʋ yɔ.

eng: Dont you know that those who serve in the temple get to eat food from the temple, and those who serve at the altar share part of what is sacrificed on the altar?.
local: Ɩnawa se mbá palakɩ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa taa tʋmɩyɛ yɔ, pa-tʋmɩyɛ yɔɔ pɔtɔkɩ. Mbá paba ñalaɣ yɔ, kɩlaʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩ-taa pehikiɣ pɔtɔkɩ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Dont worship false gods like some of them did, as it is written, The people sat down to eat and drink and they got up to play .
local: Ɩtaanɩɩnɩ agɔlɩma kpɛyʋʋ ɛzɩ pa-taa lɛlaa yɔ. Pʋwɛ ɛzɩ pamaʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Ɛyáa caɣaɣ pɔtɔɔ nɛ pɔñɔɔ, pɛtɛma lɛ, pakʋyɩ pamayɩ amaya» yɔ.

eng: In the same way, the Lord commanded that those who preach the gospel should get their living from the gospel.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɖʋwa se mbá posusuu Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔ, pɩtɩŋnɩ mbá posusuu-wɛ-tʋ yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ pehiɣ pɔtɔɔ.

eng: Lets not practice sexual immorality, like some of them did, and twenty-three thousand died in one day.
local: Pɩfɛyɩ se ɖɩla acɛyɛ ɛzɩ pa-taa lɛlaa kalabʋ yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, palabɩ ḿbʋ́ nɛ pa-taa ɛyáa kutokiŋ nɩɩlɛ nɛ naadozo tɔlɩ evemiye kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ nɛ pasɩ.

eng: But I havent taken advantage of this. And Im not writing this so that it will be done for me. Its better for me to die than to lose my right to brag about this!.
local: Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, mɔntɔpɔzɩ nɔɔyʋ pʋyʋ. Ndʋ́ mamawa yɔ, mantama se ɩha-m pʋyʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩkɩlɩ wee wee se mansɩ ɛzɩ maasʋlʋmɩ nɔɔyʋ pʋyʋ yɔ: nɔɔyʋ ɛɛkaɣ wɛɛkʋʋ mbʋ́ malabɩ falaa nɛ mankʋndʋʋnɩ-pʋ yɔ.

eng: Lets not test Christ, like some of them did, and were killed by the snakes.
local: Ɖɩtaahɔ Kɩpaɣlʋ nɔɔ tam. Pɩfɛyɩ se ɖɩñɩnɩ nɛ ɖɩna tam ɛzɩma ɖɩpɩzɩɣ ɖɩla kɩwɛɛkɩm nɛ pʋcɔ ɛhɔ ɖa-nɩŋgbaŋʋʋ yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ḿbʋ́ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma ḿbá pa-taa lɛlaa kalaba nɛ ɖʋmaa ñasɩ-wɛ nɛ pasɩ.

eng: If I preach the gospel, I have no reason to brag, since Im obligated to do it. Im in trouble if I dont preach the gospel.
local: Ŋgʋ́, Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm susuu tɛkɛnɩ-m mbʋ́ mankʋndʋʋna yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ ɖʋnɩ-m se monsusi-tʋ. Yee montosusi-tʋ yɔ, eyeki nɛ pɩnɩ-m siŋŋ.

eng: Lets not grumble, like some of them did, and were killed by the destroyer.
local: Pɩfɛyɩ ɖɔɖɔ se imidi ɛzɩ pa-taa lɛlaa kemiduu nɛ sɩm tiyiyu kʋ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: If I do this voluntarily, I get rewarded for it. But if Im forced to do it, then Ive been charged with a responsibility.
local: Yee ma-maɣmaɣ maasɔɔlɩna se malakɩ tʋmɩyɛ ńɖɩ́ yɔ, maaɖaŋaa se pɛhɛyɩ-m. Ɛlɛ́, ɛzɩma mbʋ́ paɖʋ-m-ɖɩ kʋɖʋʋ lɛ, pɩkɛnɩ-m kɩcɛyʋʋ se malabɩ-ɖɩ.

eng: These things happened to them as an example and were written as a warning for us to whom the end of time has come.
local: Pɩlabɩ-wɛ ḿbʋ́ se ɖɩna nɛ ɖɩkpa ɖa-tɩ. Ńdʋ́ pamawa se pasɩɣzɩnɩ mbá ɖa ɖɩwɛ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ tɩwɩzɩ tɛm yɔ tɩ-taa yɔ lɔŋ.

eng: What reward do I get? That when I preach, I offer the good news free of charge. Thats why I dont use the rights to which Im entitled through the gospel.
local: Man-kɩhɛyʋʋ lɛ ŋgʋ́ yɔ? Ŋ́gʋ́ lɛ waɖɛ nɖɩ́ pɩha-m se monsusuu Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm falaa yɔ. Maapɔzʋʋ nɔɔyʋ se ɛlabɩ-m mbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa se palabɩ-m tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: So those who think they are standing need to watch out or else they may fall.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, weyi ɛmaɣzɩɣ se ɛsɩŋ ɛ-nasɩ taa yɔ, ɛkpa ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛtaakɔɔ ɛtɔlɩ.

eng: Although Im free from all people, I make myself a slave to all people, to recruit more of them.
local: Paa mɛnkɛ weyi ɛwɛ ɛ-tɩ yɔɔ ɛyáa tɩŋa ɛsɩndaa yɔ, manpɩsɩ man-tɩ patɩŋa payɩ po-yom se manpɩzɩ mansɩnɩ ɛyáa sakɩyɛ nɛ pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ.

eng: No temptation has seized you that isnt common for people. But God is faithful. He wont allow you to be tempted beyond your abilities. Instead, with the temptation, God will also supply a way out so that you will be able to endure it.
local: Pɩtakɩɣ-mɩ takʋʋ mbʋ́ yɔ, pɩfɛyɩ ndɩ nɛ ɛyáa lɛlaa takʋʋ. Ɛsɔ tʋʋzaa. Ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ. Eeyeki se pɩtakɩ-mɩ nɛ pɩɖɛɛ mi-ɖoŋ yɔɔ. Ɛlɛ́, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pɩtakɩɣ-mɩ yɔ, ɛwɩlɩɣ-mɩ nʋmɔʋ ŋgʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se ɩtɩŋ nɛ ɩlɩɩ pɩ-taa yɔ.

eng: I act like a Jew to the Jews, so I can recruit Jews. I act like Im under the Law to those under the Law, so I can recruit those who are under the Law .
local: Mɛwɛɣ Yuda ñɩma cɔlɔ lɛ, mɛwɛ ɛzɩ ḿbá yɔ se manpɩzɩ mansɩnɩ-wɛ nɛ pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ. Ma nɛ mbá pɔɖɔŋ Mooyiizi paɣtʋ yɔɔ yɔ ɖɩwɛɣ lɛ, mɛwɛ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ ḿbá yɔ. Ŋgʋ́, pɩtɛkɛnɩ-m kɩcɛyʋʋ se mɔnɖɔ tɩ-yɔɔ. Ɛlɛ́, malakɩ ḿbʋ́ se manpɩzɩ mansɩnɩ mbá pɔɖɔŋ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ nɛ pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ.

eng: So then, my dear friends, run away from the worship of false gods!.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa, iyele agɔlɩma tɔm kpem.

eng: I act like Im outside the Law to those who are outside the Law, so I can recruit those outside the Law .
local: Mɛwɛɣ mbá patasɩ Mooyiizi paɣtʋ yɔ pɔ-cɔlɔ lɛ, mɛwɛ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ ḿbá yɔ. Malakɩ ḿbʋ́ se manpɩzɩ mansɩnɩ-wɛ nɛ pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ. Ŋgʋ́, ma-maɣmaɣ mɛntɛkɛ weyi ɛtasɩ Ɛsɔ paɣtʋ yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mɔnɖɔŋ Krɩstʋ paɣtʋ yɔɔ.

eng: Im talking to you like you are sensible people. Think about what Im saying.
local: Mɔyɔɔdʋʋnɩ-mɩ ɛzɩ mbá pɛwɛ lɛɣtʋ yɔ. Mɩ-maɣmaɣ ɩmaɣzɩ ndʋ́ meheyiɣ-mɩ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɩna.

eng: I act weak to the weak, so I can recruit the weak. I have become all things to all people, so I could save some by all possible means.
local: Ma nɛ mbá pɛkɛ ajamaa pe-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa yɔ ɖɩwɛɣ lɛ, mɛwɛ ɛzɩ ḿbá ɖɔɖɔ yɔ se manpɩzɩ mansɩnɩ-wɛ nɛ pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ siŋŋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ manpɩsɩ man-tɩ ɛzɩ paa weyi yɔ se paa pɩɩla ɛzɩma yɔ, manpɩzɩ mansɩnɩ nabɛyɛ nɛ Ɛsɔ ya pa-ñʋʋ.

eng: Isnt the cup of blessing that we bless a sharing in the blood of Christ? Isnt the loaf of bread that we break a sharing in the body of Christ?.
local: Kpɛndʋʋ caɖaɣ ŋgá ɖɩsɛɣ kɔ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ yɔ, kaakpɛndɩɣ ɖa nɛ Krɩstʋ calɩm alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩñɔʋ-kɛ yɔ yaa we? Nɛ tindine nɖɩ́ ɖɩcɩyɩɣ yɔ, ɖɩɩkpɛndɩɣ ɖa nɛ Krɩstʋ tomnaɣ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩtɔkɩ-ɖɩ yɔ yaa we?.

eng: All the things I do are for the sake of the gospel, so I can be a partner with it.
local: Malakɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ḿbʋ́ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔɔ se mehiɣ ɖɔɖɔ ñɩm mbʋ́ pʋwɛ tɩ-taa yɔ.

eng: Since there is one loaf of bread, we who are many are one body, because we all share the one loaf of bread.
local: Ɛzɩma mbʋ́ tindine kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ koŋ ɖɩtɔkɩ yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ paa ɖɩɖɔwa yɔ, ɖɩkɛ tomnaɣ kʋɖʋmaɣ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖatɩŋa payɩ ɖɩtɔkɩ tindine kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ ńɖɩ́.

eng: Dont you know that all the runners in the stadium run, but only one gets the prize? So run to win.
local: Ɩtatɩlɩ se mbá powoki seu yɔ, peseɣ patɩŋa payɩ, ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛwakɩ yɔ e-ɖeke koŋ palakɩ kʋjɔʋ naa we? Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩñaɣ pana nɛ ise lidaʋ nʋmɔʋ taa nɛ ɩwa nɛ palabɩ-mɩ kʋjɔʋ ŋ́gʋ́.

eng: Look at the people of Israel. Dont those who eat the sacrifices share from the altar?.
local: Ɩcɔnɩ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma nɛ ɩna: mbá pɔtɔkɩ mbʋ́ pala Ɛsɔ yɔ, pa nɛ kɩlaŋ ɖɩlayɛ pɛtɛkpɛndɩ pala kʋɖʋm naa we?.

eng: Everyone who competes practices self-discipline in everything. The runners do this to get a crown of leaves that shrivel up and die, but we do it to receive a crown that never dies.
local: Mbá patɩŋa peseɣ yɔ, pɛpɛŋ pa-tɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛɛ se pɛpɛ pa-tɩ yɔ se papɩzɩ pese nɛ pawa nɛ pehiɣ kʋjɔʋ. Ɛlɛ́, kʋjɔʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩɩwɛɣ tam. Đa lɛ, ɖɩñɔɔzʋʋ ɖa-tɩ se ɖɩwa lidaʋ nʋmɔʋ taa nɛ palabɩ-ɖʋ kʋjɔʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩwɛɣ tam yɔ.

eng: What am I saying then? That food sacrificed to a false god is anything, or that a false god is anything?.
local: Ndʋ́ mɔyɔɔdaa yɔ, tɩ-tɔbʋʋ se we? Tɩ-tɔbʋʋ se nandʋ ndʋ́ pala agɔlɩma yɔɔ yɔ, tɩkɛ pʋyʋ yaa we? Đɔɖɔ lɛ, agɔlɩma wena pala a-yɔɔ yɔ, akɛ pʋyʋ yaa we?.

eng: So now this is how I run—not without a clear goal in sight. I fight like a boxer in the ring, not like someone who is shadowboxing.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ menseɣ se mowolo ɖenɖe pʋwɛɛ se mowolo yɔ, maaseɣ yem. Mɛwɛ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ weyi ɛlʋkɩ nɛ ɛɛlʋkɩ yem se pɔtɔm se palʋ yɔ.

eng: No, but this kind of sacrifice is sacrificed to demons and not to God. I dont want you to be sharing in demons.
local: Pa-taa nabʋyʋ tɛkɛ pʋyʋ. Ɛlɛ́, pʋ-tɔbʋʋ se mbʋ́ mbá paañaŋ Krɩstʋ yɔ palaɣ yɔ, aleewaa palaɣ-pʋ, pɩtɛkɛ Ɛsɔ. Ŋgʋ́, mɔntɔsɔɔlɩ se mɩ nɛ aleewaa ɩkpɛndɩ.

eng: Rather, Im landing punches on my own body and subduing it like a slave. I do this to be sure that I myself wont be disqualified after preaching to others.
local: Mɛwɛɛ mankʋʋ man-tɩ se manpɩzɩ mɔnɖɔkɩ man-tɩ siŋŋ nɛ pɩtaakɔɔ pɩɖɩɣnɩ weyi ma monsusi lɛlaa Ɛsɔtɔm yɔ.

eng: You cant drink the cup of the Lord and the cup of demons; you cant participate in the table of the Lord and the table of demons.
local: Ɩɩpɩzɩɣ ɩñɔɔ Kɩpaɣlʋ sʋlʋm caɖaɣ nɛ ɩtɛ ɩñɔɔ aleewaa ñɩmbʋ caɖaɣ. Mɩ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɩɩpɩzɩɣ ɩkpɛndɩ ɩtɔɔ nɛ mɩ nɛ aleewaa ɩtɛ ɩkpɛndɩ ɩtɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Or should we make the Lord jealous? We arent stronger than he is, are we?.
local: Đɩcaɣ se ɖɩla ḿbʋ́ nɛ pukulusi Kɩpaɣlʋ sʋsɩ naa we? Ɛzɩ ɖakɩlɩnɩ-ɩ ɖoŋ naa we?.

eng: Everything is permitted, but everything isnt beneficial. Everything is permitted, but everything doesnt build others up.
local: Toovenim lɛ: «Pɩha-ɖʋ waɖɛ se ɖɩla pɩtɩŋa.» Ɛlɛ́, pɩtɛkɛ pɩtɩŋa pʋwɛnɩ wazaɣ. «Pɩha-ɖʋ waɖɛ se ɖɩla pɩtɩŋa.» Ɛlɛ́, pɩtɛkɛ pɩtɩŋa piyekina se ɖɩpɩɩ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa.

eng: No one should look out for their own advantage, but they should look out for each other.
local: Nɔɔyʋ ɛtaañɩnɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-kɛzɛɣa. Ɛlɛ́, ɛñɩnɩ lɛlaa ñɩŋga.

eng: Eat everything that is sold in the marketplace, without asking questions about it because of your conscience.
local: Ɩpɩzɩɣ ɩtɔɔ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɛpɛdɩɣ kɩyakʋ taa yɔ. Ɩtaapɔzɩ mɩ-tɩ tɔm natʋyʋ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ pʋkɔɔ piliɣti-mɩ.

eng: The earth and all that is in it belong to the Lord .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pʋwɛ ɛzɩ pamaʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ tɩnɩ tɛtʋ nɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ.».

eng: If an unbeliever invites you to eat with them and you want to go, eat whatever is served, without asking questions because of your conscience.
local: Yee weyi ɛfɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ, ɛya-ŋ se ŋwolo ŋtɔɔ ɛ-tɛ nɛ ŋtalɩ yɔ, ŋpɩzɩɣ ŋtɔɔ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa pɔkɔŋnɩ-ŋ yɔ. Taapɔzɩ ña-tɩ tɔm natʋyʋ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ pʋkɔɔ piliɣti-ŋ.

eng: But if someone says to you, This meat was sacrificed in a temple, then dont eat it for the sake of the one who told you and for the sake of conscience.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee nɔɔyʋ eheyi-mɩ se: «Nandʋ tʋnɛ tɩkɛ kɩlaʋ nandʋ» yɔ, weyi eheyi-mɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ ɛ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtaatɔɔ. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, piliɣtiɣ-i.

eng: Now when I say conscience I dont mean yours but the other persons. Why should my freedom be judged by someone elses conscience?.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩtɛkɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ piiliɣti-mɩ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ mɔyɔɔdʋʋ cɩnɛ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛzɩma mbʋ́ piiliɣti lɛlʋ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ mɔyɔɔdʋʋ. Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, nɔɔyʋ lɩmaɣza ɛɛpɩzɩɣ pɩɖɩɣ nʋmɔʋ ŋgʋ́ pɩha-m se mala pʋyʋ yɔ.

eng: If I participate with gratitude, why should I be blamed for food I thank God for?.
local: Yee manpɩzɩɣ se mansa Ɛsɔ mbʋ́ mɔntɔkɩ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma ɛyáa kʋyʋʋ mɔ-yɔɔ mbʋ́ pʋ-yɔɔ mansaŋ-ɩ yɔ?.

eng: So, whether you eat or drink or whatever you do, you should do it all for Gods glory.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, paa ɛbɛ ɩtɔkɩ yaa ɩñɔʋ yaa ɩlakɩ yɔ, ɩla pɩtɩŋa payɩ se Ɛsɔ hɩɖɛ ɛsɛɛ.

eng: Dont offend either Jews or Greeks, or Gods church.
local: Mi-wezuu caɣʋ taa lɛ, itaayele nɛ pɩtɩŋnɩ mɩ-yɔɔ nɛ Yuda ñɩma yaa mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ yaa Ɛsɔ ñɩma pa-taa nɔɔyʋ tɔlɩ nʋmɔʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛɖɔŋ yɔ kɩ-taa.

eng: This is the same thing that I do. I please everyone in everything I do. I dont look out for my own advantage, but I look out for many people so that they can be saved.
local: Ɩla ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ ma yɔ: mañakɩ pana se mɔn-tɔm ɛkɛdɩnɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa. Maañɩnɩɣ se piɖeni ma-maɣmaɣ. Ɛlɛ́, mañɩnɩɣ se piɖeni ɛyáa tɩŋa nɛ pɩya pa-ñʋʋ.

eng: If I speak in tongues of human beings and of angels but I dont have love, Im a clanging gong or a clashing cymbal.
local: Meheyiɣ-mɩ se: paa maapɩzaɣ se mɔyɔɔdɩ ɛyáa kʋnʋmɩŋ nɛ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa ñɩŋ nɛ yee maasɔɔlʋʋ ɛyáa yɔ, mɛwɛ ɛzɩ suye yaa ŋgbanɛ nɖɩ́ pamakɩ nɛ ɖiwiɣ yem yɔ.

eng: If I have the gift of prophecy and I know all the mysteries and everything else, and if I have such complete faith that I can move mountains but I dont have love, Im nothing.
local: Paa pɩɩha-m se monsusi tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ yɔ nɛ mɛwɛnɩ lɛɣtʋ tɩŋa nɛ manpɩzɩɣ manɩɣ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩwɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ yɔ tɩtɩŋa yaa paa maawɛnɩ lidaʋ siŋŋ se manpɩzɩɣ mɛnkpɛzɩɣnɩ pʋŋ nɛ yee maasɔɔlʋʋ ɛyáa yɔ, mɛntɛkɛ pʋyʋ.

eng: If I give away everything that I have and hand over my own body to feel good about what Ive done but I dont have love, I receive no benefit whatsoever.
local: Paa maakpaɣ ma-ñɩm tɩŋa payɩ nɛ mantayɩ lɛlaa yaa paa maacɛlɩ man-tɩ se pɔsɔbɩ-m miŋ ɛyáa yɔɔ nɛ yee maasɔɔlʋʋ-wɛ yɔ, pɩɩlɩɣ-m pʋyʋ.

eng: Love is patient, love is kind, it isnt jealous, it doesnt brag, it isnt arrogant.
local: Weyi ɛsɔɔlʋʋ ɛyáa yɔ, ɛɖɔkʋʋ ɛ-tɩ, ɛsɩŋnɩ-wɛ, ɛɛwɛɣ ɛsɩsɛmɩyɛ. Ɛɛkpazɩɣ ɛ-tɩ, ɛɛwɛɣ ajana.

eng: it isnt rude, it doesnt seek its own advantage, it isnt irritable, it doesnt keep a record of complaints.
local: Ɛɛlakɩ mbʋ́ pɩkpaɣ ɛyáa fɛyɛ yɔ, ɛɛñɩnɩɣ e-ɖeke e-ɖeɖe, ɛɛmʋʋ pana, ɛɛcakɩnɩ lɛlaa.

eng: it isnt happy with injustice, but it is happy with the truth.
local: Ɛ-taa ɛɛhʋlʋmʋʋnɩ kɩdɛkɛdɩm, ɛlɛ́, toovenim ɛ-taa hʋlʋmʋʋna.

eng: Love puts up with all things, trusts in all things, hopes for all things, endures all things.
local: Etisiɣ pɩtɩŋa payɩ, ɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa, ɛtaɣ liu se pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋkɔŋ labʋ, ɛɖɔkʋʋ ɛ-tɩ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa.

eng: Love never fails. As for prophecies, they will be brought to an end. As for tongues, they will stop. As for knowledge, it will be brought to an end.
local: Sɔɔlɩm wɛɣ tam, ɛlɛ́, tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ yɔ ti-susuu kaɣ sɩʋ tɩnaɣ. Kʋnʋmɩŋ ndɩ ndɩ yɔɔdʋʋ nɛ mbʋ́ ɖɩsɩma yɔ, pɔkɔŋ sɩʋ tɩnaɣ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: We know in part and we prophesy in part;.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩtasɩ pɩtɩŋa. Đɩɩpɩzɩɣ ɖisusi tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ yɔ tɩtɩŋa payɩ.

eng: but when the perfect comes, what is partial will be brought to an end.
local: Ɛlɛ́, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ pɩtɩŋa payɩ yɔ pʋkɔŋ lɛ, mbʋ́ pɩfɛyɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ yɔ pʋmʋkɩ.

eng: When I was a child, I used to speak like a child, reason like a child, think like a child. But now that I have become a man, Ive put an end to childish things.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ maakɛ pɩɣa yɔ, mɔyɔɔdaɣ nɛ mamaɣzɩɣ nɛ mahʋʋ man-taa ɛzɩ pɩɣa yɔ. Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ malabɩ ɛyʋ lɛ, meyele pɩcatʋ tɔm.

eng: Now we see a reflection in a mirror; then we will see face-to-face. Now I know partially, but then I will know completely in the same way that I have been completely known.
local: Alɩwaatʋ tʋnɛ tɩ-taa lɛ, pʋwɛ ɛzɩ ñɩnʋʋ fiɖiyii ñɩŋgʋ taa ɖɩcɔŋna yɔ, ɖɩɩnaɣ pɩtɩŋa camɩyɛ. Ɛlɛ́ puwiye lɛ, ɖɩkɔŋ pɩtɩŋa naʋ ɖɛ-ɛsɩndaa kaŋŋ. Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ mantatɩlɩ pɩtɩŋa, ɛlɛ́, mɔnkɔŋ tɛzʋʋ pɩtɩŋa payɩ sɩm puwiye ńɖɩ́ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ sɩm-m ɖɔɖɔ yɔ.

eng: Now faith, hope, and love remain—these three things—and the greatest of these is love.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ lidaʋ nɛ ɖaŋʋʋ nɛ sɔɔlɩm pa-naadozo pɛwɛɣna tam. Ɛlɛ́, pa-taa lɛ, sɔɔlɩm kɩlɩna.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I dont want you to be ignorant about spiritual gifts.
local: Taabalaa, Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu kʋjɔŋ tɔm taa lɛ, mɔntɔsɔɔlɩ se ɩwɛɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ tɛɛ.

eng: You know that when you were Gentiles you were often misled by false gods that cant even speak.
local: Ɩtɛm sɩm ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pʋhɔŋaɣ-mɩ nɛ ɩtɩŋɩɣ sɩʋ kpelisi nzɩ́ sɩɩyɔɔdʋʋ yɔ sɩ-wayɩ yem ɖimɖim alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɩtaañaŋ Krɩstʋ yɔ.

eng: So I want to make it clear to you that no one says, Jesus is cursed! when speaking by Gods Spirit, and no one can say, Jesus is Lord, except by the Holy Spirit.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ se: nɔɔyʋ fɛyɩ se ɛyɔɔdʋʋnɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ɖoŋ nɛ ɛtɛ ɛtɔ se: «Ɛsɔ ɛwɩlɩ Yesu kpalʋʋ.» Nɔɔyʋ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛyɔɔdɩ ɖɔɖɔ se: «Yesu lɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ» nɛ pɩtatɩŋnɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔ.

eng: There are different spiritual gifts but the same Spirit;.
local: Paa Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu kʋjɔŋ ɩwɛ ndɩ ndɩ yɔ, ki-ɖeke koŋ kɩhaɣnɩ-ɩ.

eng: and there are different ministries and the same Lord;.
local: Paa tʋma wena ɖɩlakɩ yɔ awɛ ndɩ ndɩ yɔ, Kɩpaɣlʋ kʋɖʋm ɖeke ɖɩlakɩ-yɛ.

eng: and there are different activities but the same God who produces all of them in everyone.
local: Paa ɖa-tʋma labʋ ɛwɛ ndɩ ndɩ yɔ, Ɛsɔ kʋɖʋm ɛnʋ ɛhaɣnɩ ɖatɩŋa payɩ ɖoŋ se ɖɩla atɩŋa.

eng: A demonstration of the Spirit is given to each person for the common good.
local: Ŋgʋ́, kʋjɔʋ ŋgʋ́ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu lakɩ paa weyi se pʋwazɩ ɖatɩŋa payɩ yɔ, ŋ́gʋ́ wɩlɩɣna se kɩwɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ.

eng: A word of wisdom is given by the Spirit to one person, a word of knowledge to another according to the same Spirit.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ kɩha ɖa-taa nabɛyɛ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ se pɔyɔɔdɩna, nɛ kɩha lɛlaa lɛɣtʋ se paba ɛyɔɔdɩna ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: faith to still another by the same Spirit, gifts of healing to another in the one Spirit.
local: Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu kʋɖʋmʋʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩhanɩ nabɛyɛ se pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ nɛ kɩha lɛlaa se pala nɛ kʋdɔndɩnaa yɔɔ cɛ.

eng: Pursue love, and use your ambition to try to get spiritual gifts but especially so that you might prophesy.
local: Ɩñɩnɩ sɔɔlɩm. Ɩsɔɔlɩ ɖɔɖɔ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu kʋjɔŋ lɛɛŋ, kɔzɩkɔzɩ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ yɔ ti-susuu ñɩŋgʋ.

eng: performance of miracles to another, prophecy to another, the ability to tell spirits apart to another, different kinds of tongues to another, and the interpretation of the tongues to another.
local: Ŋ́gʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ hanɩ nabɛyɛ se pala hama lakasɩ, lɛlaa se posusi tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ yɔ, lɛlaa se patɩlɩ mbʋ́ pɩlɩnɩ kʋ-cɔlɔ yaa mbʋ́ pɩtalɩɩnɩ kʋ-cɔlɔ yɔ, lɛlaa se pɔyɔɔdɩ kʋnʋmɩŋ ndɩ ndɩ nɛ lɛlaa se palɩzɩ a-tɔbɩŋ.

eng: This is because those who speak in a tongue dont speak to people but to God; no one understands it—they speak mysteries by the Spirit.
local: Toovenim lɛ, weyi ɛyɔɔdʋʋ kʋnʋmɩŋ ndɩ ndɩ yɔ, pɩtɛkɛ ɛyáa ɛyɔɔdʋʋna, ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ ɛyɔɔdʋʋna. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, nɔɔyʋ ɛɛnɩɣ ndʋ́ ɛyɔɔdʋʋ yɔ. Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu wɩlɩɣnɩ-ɩ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ tɔm nɛ ɛyɔɔdʋʋ.

eng: All these things are produced by the one and same Spirit who gives what he wants to each person.
local: Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu kʋɖʋmʋʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩlakɩnɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ nɛ kɩha paa weyi e-ɖeɖe ɛzɩ ki-liu wɛʋ yɔ.

eng: Those who prophesy speak to people, building them up, and giving them encouragement and comfort.
local: Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ susuu tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ yɔ, ɛyáa ɛyɔɔdʋʋnɩ se ɛsɩnɩ-wɛ nɛ papɩɩ pe-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa nɛ pɩlabɩ-wɛ hʋnʋm nɛ ɛhɛzɩ pa-laŋa.

eng: Christ is just like the human body—a body is a unit and has many parts; and all the parts of the body are one body, even though there are many.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Krɩstʋ wɛ ɛzɩ tomnaɣ kʋɖʋmaɣ ŋgá kɛwɛnɩ pilinzi sakɩyɛ yɔ. Paa ke-pilinzi ɛɖɔwa yɔ, kɛkɛ kʋɖʋmaɣ.

eng: People who speak in a tongue build up themselves; those who prophesy build up the church.
