eng: And God raised us up and seated us in the heavens with Christ Jesus.
local: Toovenim lɛ Ɛsɔ kpɛndɩ ɖa nɛ ɩ fezuu nɛ ɛcaɣzɩ-ɖʋ ɛsɔdaa ɖa nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu ɛnʋ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa.

eng: Earlier generations didnt know this hidden plan that God has now revealed to his holy apostles and prophets through the Spirit.
local: Mɛsaɣ tɛɛ tɔm ńdʋ́, kpaɖɩŋ weyi ɩɖɛwa yɔ, ɩ-taa ñɩma taasɩm-tʋ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ tɩŋnaʋ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔ nɛ eyele nɛ náyaa nɛ ɛ-maɣmaɣ e-tiyiyaa pasɩm-tʋ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ.

eng: God did this to show future generations the greatness of his grace by the goodness that God has shown us in Christ Jesus.
local: Ḿbʋ́ wɩlɩɣnɩ e-lootiye cee wayɩ. Ńɖɩ́ kɩlɩnɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ. Đa nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ ɛkaɣ pɩzʋʋ nɛ ɛla camɩyɛ lakasɩ ńzɩ́.

eng: This plan is that the Gentiles would be coheirs and parts of the same body, and that they would share with the Jews in the promises of God in Christ Jesus through the gospel.
local: Ńdʋ́ lɛ se: mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ nɛ Yuda ñɩma, pɛkɛ tomnaɣ kʋɖʋmaɣ pilinzi. Ñɩm kʋɖʋmʋm Ɛsɔ ñɔɔzaa nɛ ɛsɩɩ-wɛ. Ñɩm kʋɖʋmʋm ɖɔɖɔ ɛɖʋwa se ɛhaɣ-wɛ pa nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu pɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa. Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔɔ ɛtɩŋnaa nɛ ɛla ḿbʋ́.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will. To the holy and faithful people in Christ Jesus in Ephesus.
local: Ma Pɔɔlɩ weyi pɩkɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ nɛ eyele se mɛnkɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu tiyiyu yɔ, mamaɣnɩ takayaɣ kanɛ. Ɛsɔ ñɩma mbá mɩ ɩwɛ Efɛɛzɩ nɛ ɩtɩŋɩɣ Krɩstʋ Yesu nʋmɔʋ yɔ mamaɣ-kɛ.

eng: You are saved by Gods grace because of your faith. This salvation is Gods gift. Its not something you possessed.
local: E-lootiye ńɖɩ́ ɖɩ-yɔɔ ɛtɩŋnɩ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩwɛnɩ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ kʋ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛya mɩ-ñʋʋ. Pɩtɛkɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ pɩlɩnaa, Ɛsɔ kʋjɔʋ pɩkɛnaa.

eng: I became a servant of the gospel because of the grace that God showed me through the exercise of his power.
local: Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ńdʋ́, manpɩsɩ tɩ-tʋmlaɖʋ. Ɛsɔ tɩŋnɩnɩ e-ɖoŋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛlabɩ-m lootiye se manpɩzɩ malabɩ-ɖɩ.

eng: Grace and peace to you from God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Mɛnsɛ-mɩ: ɖa-Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ palabɩ-mɩ lootiye nɛ pɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa.

eng: Its not something you did that you can be proud of.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ mɩ-tʋma yɔɔ pɩyabɩ mɩ-ñʋʋ. Pɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se nɔɔyʋ ɛtaakʋndɩ.

eng: God gave his grace to me, the least of all Gods people, to preach the good news about the immeasurable riches of Christ to the Gentiles.
local: Weyi ma mɛnkɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩma tɩŋa taa tɔyaɣ yɔ, ɛlabɩ-m lootiye ńɖɩ́ se monsusi mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ ñɩm mbʋ́ pɩfɛyɩ ɖaɣʋ yɔ pʋ-tɔm.

eng: Bless the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! He has blessed us in Christ with every spiritual blessing that comes from heaven.
local: Đɩsa Ɛsɔ! Ɛnʋ lɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ Caa. Ɛtɩŋnɩ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔ nɛ ɛwazɩ ɖɔ-yɔɔ ɖa nɛ Krɩstʋ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa. Wazʋʋ ḿbʋ́, pʋ-yɔɔ ɛtɩŋnaa nɛ ɛha-ɖʋ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu taa nɛ pɩlɩɩnɩ ɛsɔdaa yɔ.

eng: Instead, we are Gods accomplishment, created in Christ Jesus to do good things. God planned for these good things to be the way that we live our lives.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ tɩŋnɩnɩ ɖa nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛlabɩ-ɖʋ-kʋ se ɖɩla tʋma kɩbana wena ɛɛñɔɔzɩ ɖooo lɔŋ se ɖɩlabɩ-yɛ yɔ.

eng: God sent me to reveal the secret plan that had been hidden since the beginning of time by God, who created everything.
local: Ɛɖʋ-m ɖɔɖɔ se meyele nɛ ɛyáa na ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se mbʋ́ ɛɛɖʋwa nɛ pʋwɛɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ ɖooo lɔŋ yɔ, pɩla yɔ. Ɛnʋ labɩnɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ.

eng: God chose us in Christ to be holy and blameless in Gods presence before the creation of the world.
local: Kpɛndʋʋ ḿbʋ́, pɩ-taa Ɛsɔ lɩzɩ-ɖʋ se ɖɩkɛ ɛ-ñɩma nɛ pataana kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ ɖɔ-yɔɔ. Ɛɛlɩzɩ-ɖʋ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛla kedeŋa. Ɛsɔɔlɩ-ɖʋ yɔɔ.

eng: So remember that once you were Gentiles by physical descent, who were called uncircumcised by Jews who are physically circumcised.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtɔzɩ se: ɖooo lɛ, mbá mɩ ɩtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ, Yuda ñɩma niɣzaɣ-mɩ se ɩkɛ kɩtɛpɛlɩŋ. Ŋgʋ́, pɛlʋʋ wɛʋ yɔ, tomnaɣ yɔɔ yem pɛpɛlɩɣ-pʋ.

eng: Gods purpose is now to show the rulers and powers in the heavens the many different varieties of his wisdom through the church.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́, pɩkpaɣʋnɩ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ, pɩtɩŋɩɣnɩ Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma yɔɔ nɛ ñʋndɩnaa nɛ ɛsɔdaa ɖoŋ tɩŋa patɩlɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ paɣlaa pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ yɔ.

eng: God destined us to be his adopted children through Jesus Christ because of his love. This was according to his goodwill and plan.
local: ɛɖʋ ɖooo lɔŋ se ɛtɩŋɩɣnɩ Yesu Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ eyele ɖɩkɛ e-piya. Ḿbʋ́ e-liu wɛɛ, pɩkɛdɩnɩ-ɩ.

eng: At that time you were without Christ. You were aliens rather than citizens of Israel, and strangers to the covenants of Gods promise. In this world you had no hope and no God.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-taa lɛ, ɩtaakɛ Krɩstʋ ñɩma. Pɩtaaha-mɩ waɖɛ nɖɩ́ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma wɛna yɔ. Ɩtaatɩlɩ nɔsɩ haʋ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋ ɛ nɛ wɛ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, ɩɩwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ yem: ɩtaaɖaŋ pʋyʋ, Ɛsɔ taawɛɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ.

eng: This was consistent with the plan he had from the beginning of time that he accomplished through Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɛɛɖʋ ɖooo lɔŋ se ɛlakɩ nɛ ɛtɩŋnɩ Krɩstʋ Yesu yɔɔ nɛ ɛlabɩ-pʋ. Ɛnʋ lɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ.

eng: and to honor his glorious grace that he has given to us freely through the Son whom he loves.
local: Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɖɩsam-ɩ lootiye koboyaɣ ñɩnɖɛ nɖɩ́ ɛtɩŋnɩ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛlabɩ-ɖʋ yɔ ɖɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: But now, thanks to Christ Jesus, you who once were so far away have been brought near by the blood of Christ.
local: Ɛlɛ́, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ lɛ, mbá mɩ iiposini Ɛsɔ yɔ, ɩñɔtɩnɩ-ɩ. Krɩstʋ calɩm mbʋ́ pɩkpɛdaa yɔ, pʋ-yɔɔ pɩtɩŋnaa.

eng: In Christ we have bold and confident access to God through faith in him.
local: Ɛ-yɔɔ pɩtɩŋɩɣnɩ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɖɩwɛnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ kʋ-yɔɔ nɛ pɩhaɣ-ɖʋ waɖɛ se ɖiwolo Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ kaalɛyɩtʋ.

eng: We have been ransomed through his Sons blood, and we have forgiveness for our failures based on his overflowing grace.
local: Đa nɛ ɩ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa Ɛsɔ tɩŋnɩ ɛ-calɩm yɔɔ nɛ eholi-ɖʋ kɩdɛkɛdɩm nesi taa nɛ ekpeɣ-ɖʋ ɖa-kɩwɛɛkɩm. Ḿbʋ́ wɩlɩɣna se e-lootiye fɛyɩ ɖaɣʋ.

eng: Christ is our peace. He made both Jews and Gentiles into one group. With his body, he broke down the barrier of hatred that divided us.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛ-yɔɔ ɖɩwɛ laŋhɛzɩyɛ taa. Ɛnʋ yɔkɩnɩ koloŋa ŋgá kaawɛ Yuda ñɩma nɛ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa nɛ piyele pala nɔɔ kʋɖʋmaɣ. Koloŋa ŋ́gá lɛ koyindiye.

eng: So then, I ask you not to become discouraged by what Im suffering for you, which is your glory.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ meheyiɣ-mɩ se pitaatisi mi-toma taa kʋñɔmɩŋ weyi mɔntɔkɩ mɩ-yɔɔ yɔ ɩ-yɔɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɩkʋndɩnɩ-ɩ.

eng: which he poured over us with wisdom and understanding.
local: Ɛtɩŋnɩ ɛ-lɔŋsɩnɖɛ nɛ ɛ-lɛɣtʋ pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛlabɩ-ɖʋ-ɖɩ pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ.

eng: He canceled the detailed rules of the Law so that he could create one new person out of the two groups, making peace.
local: Ɛtɩŋnɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛlɩzɩ paɣtʋ nɛ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ tɩ-taa yɔ pu-ɖoŋ. Ḿbʋ́ yebina nɛ laŋhɛzɩyɛ wɛɛ Yuda ñɩma nɛ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa. Ḿbʋ́ ɛpɩsɩ patɩŋa ɛyʋ kʋɖʋm, pʋdʋ kɛ kɩfalʋ.

eng: This is why I kneel before the Father.
local: Tɔm ńdʋ́, tɩ-yɔɔ moluŋuu ma-nɩmbɔla yɔɔ Caa Ɛsɔ tɛɛ.

eng: God revealed his hidden design to us, which is according to his goodwill and the plan that he intended to accomplish through his Son.
local: Pɩkɛdɩnɩ-ɩ nɛ eyele nɛ ɖɩtɩlɩ mbʋ́ ɛɛɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ nɛ pʋwɛɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ yɔ. Ɛ nɛ Krɩstʋ pɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa ɛɛɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ-pʋ.

eng: He reconciled them both as one body to God by the cross, which ended the hostility to God.
local: Đɔɖɔ lɛ, eyeba nɛ pa nɛ Ɛsɔ peceɣ nɛ papɩsɩ kʋɖʋm. Kʋñɔŋ ŋgʋ́ ɛtɔwaa nɛ ɛkɔɔ ɛsɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ yɔ, kʋ-yɔɔ ɛtɩŋnaa nɛ eɖezi koyindiye ḿbʋ́.

eng: Every ethnic group in heaven or on earth is recognized by him.
local: Ɛnʋ ɖɔkɩnɩ ɛsɔdaa ñɩma nɛ tataa ñɩma patɩŋa payɩ.

eng: This is what God planned for the climax of all times: to bring all things together in Christ, the things in heaven along with the things on earth.
local: Alɩwaatʋ talɩɣ lɛ, ɛlabɩ-pʋ: ekpeɣliɣ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ ɛsɔdaa nɛ tataa yɔ wiyaʋ kʋɖʋm koŋ tɛɛ. Ɛnʋ lɛ Krɩstʋ.

eng: When he came, he announced the good news of peace to you who were far away from God and to those who were near.
local: Ɛkɔm kedeŋa yɔɔ nɛ esusi Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm mbá mɩ iiposini Ɛsɔ yɔ nɛ Yuda ñɩma mbá paba kɔñɔtɩnɩ-ɩ yɔ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: I ask that he will strengthen you in your inner selves from the riches of his glory through the Spirit.
local: Mentendiɣ-i ḿbʋ́ se eyele nɛ pɩtɩŋnɩ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔ nɛ ɩkpa ɖoŋ siŋŋ mɩ-lɩmaɣza taa ɛzɩ e-koboyaɣ wɛʋ nɛ kɛfɛyɩ tɩnaɣ yɔ.

eng: We have also received an inheritance in Christ. We were destined by the plan of God, who accomplishes everything according to his design.
local: Đa nɛ ɩ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa Ɛsɔ ha-ɖʋ pɩtɩŋa payɩ. Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛɛlɩzɩ-ɖʋ ɖooo lɔŋ. Ɛlakɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛzɩ pɩkɛdɩnaʋ ɛ-maɣmaɣ nɛ ɛɖʋ yɔ.

eng: We both have access to the Father through Christ by the one Spirit.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛ-yɔɔ pɩtɩŋnaa nɛ pɩha Yuda ñɩma nɛ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ waɖɛ se paa weyi ɛtɩŋnɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔ nɛ ewolo Caa cɔlɔ. Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu kʋɖʋmʋʋ kɔŋ wɛna.

eng: I ask that Christ will live in your hearts through faith. As a result of having strong roots in love.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ pɩtɩŋnɩ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩwɛna yɔ kʋ-yɔɔ nɛ Krɩstʋ wɛɛ mɩ-laŋa taa nɛ ɩtɛzɩ pɩʋ sɔɔlɩm taa siŋŋ.

eng: We are called to be an honor to Gods glory because we were the first to hope in Christ.
local: se ɖɩsa e-koboyaɣ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖa lɛ mbá pata Krɩstʋ liu nɛ pʋcɔ ɛkɔɔ yɔ.

eng: So now you are no longer strangers and aliens. Rather, you are fellow citizens with Gods people, and you belong to Gods household.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtatasɩ kɛʋ agɔmaa yaa nʋmɔɖɔnaa. Ɛlɛ́, mɩ nɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩma ɩwɛ ɛjaɖɛ kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ taa, ɩkɛ ɛ-hɔʋ taa ñɩma.

eng: I ask that youll have the power to grasp loves width and length, height and depth, together with all believers.
local: Peeɖe mɩ nɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩma tɩŋa payɩ ɩpɩzɩɣ ɩna ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Krɩstʋ sɔɔlɩm paɣlaa pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ yɔ: pɩwalaa nɛ pɩɖaɣlɩ nɛ pʋkʋyɩ nɛ pilimi.

eng: You too heard the word of truth in Christ, which is the good news of your salvation. You were sealed with the promised Holy Spirit because you believed in Christ.
local: Mɩ nɛ ɩ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa ɖɔɖɔ ɩnɩ toovenim tɔm. Ńdʋ́ lɛ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ndʋ́ tɩyakɩ mɩ-ñʋʋ yɔ. Pɩ-taa ɖɔɖɔ Ɛsɔ ha-mɩ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ. Ŋ́gʋ́ ɛɖʋwa se ɛhaɣ ɛ-ñɩma. Ŋ́gʋ́ lɛ mayaɣ ŋgá ɛñɩɣ mɩ-yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: As Gods household, you are built on the foundation of the apostles and prophets with Christ Jesus himself as the cornerstone.
local: Mɩ lɛ ɖɩɣa ŋgá Yesu tiyiyaa nɛ náyaa pɛkɛ ke-kiɖe yɔ ko-kolonzi. Krɩstʋ Yesu maɣmaɣ lɛ pɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɩlɩ wazaɣ yɔ.

eng: I ask that youll know the love of Christ that is beyond knowledge so that you will be filled entirely with the fullness of God.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ ɩtɩlɩ se sɔɔlɩm ḿbʋ́, pɩkɩlɩ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ tɩŋa payɩ. Ḿbʋ́ yekina ɖɔɖɔ nɛ Ɛsɔ tɛzɩ mɩ-taa wɛʋ pilim.

eng: The Holy Spirit is the down payment on our inheritance, which is applied toward our redemption as Gods own people, resulting in the honor of Gods glory.
local: Ŋ́gʋ́ wɩlɩɣnɩ ɖɔɖɔ se ɛhaɣ-ɖʋ ñɩm mbʋ́ ɛɛñɔɔzaa se ɛcɛlɩɣ-ɖʋ puwiye nɖɩ́ eholuu mbá ehiɣa se pasa e-koboyaɣ yɔ.

eng: The whole building is joined together in him, and it grows up into a temple that is dedicated to the Lord.
local: Ɛ-yɔɔ pama-kɛ nɛ kapaɣlɩ nɛ kɛwɛɛ ɖoŋ katɩŋa payɩ. Ḿbʋ́ kapɩsɩɣ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ ñɩŋga ɖa nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ.

eng: Glory to God, who is able to do far beyond all that we could ask or imagine by his power at work within us;.
local: Ɛnʋ weyi ɛlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ ɖa-taa nɛ e-ɖoŋ yɔ, ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛlabɩ-ɖʋ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ mbʋ́ ɖɩpɔzʋʋ-ɩ yɔ yaa mbʋ́ ɖɩmaɣzɩɣ yɔ kpem.

eng: Since I heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all Gods people, this is the reason that.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yebina nɛ kpaɣ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ manɩ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩwɛnɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu yɔɔ yɔ nɛ sɔɔlɩm mbʋ́ ɩsɔɔlɩ Ɛsɔ ñɩma tɩŋa yɔ pɔ-tɔm lɛ.

eng: Christ is building you into a place where God lives through the Spirit.
local: Ɛ-yɔɔ mɩ ɖɔɖɔ ɩwɛ mbá pamanɩ-kɛ se Ɛsɔ ɛtɩŋnɩ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔ nɛ ɛwɛɛ ka-taa yɔ pa-taa.

eng: glory to him in the church and in Christ Jesus for all generations, forever and always. Amen.
local: Ɛ-hɩɖɛ ɛsɛɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa ɛ nɛ ɩ pɛ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ kpaɖɩŋ tɩŋa taa pɩnzɩ ɛgbaŋ ɛgbaŋ! Pɩla ḿbʋ́.

eng: I dont stop giving thanks to God for you when I remember you in my prayers.
local: ma ɖɔɖɔ mɛwɛɛ mansaŋ Ɛsɔ mɩ-yɔɔ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mentendiɣ-i mɩ-yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: I pray that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, will give you a spirit of wisdom and revelation that makes God known to you.
local: Malakɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ Ɛsɔ, Caa koboyaɣ tʋ ɛha-mɩ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ Fezuu nɛ kɩwɩlɩ-mɩ pɩtɩŋa nɛ ɩtɩlɩ-ɩ.

eng: I pray that the eyes of your heart will have enough light to see what is the hope of Gods call, what is the richness of Gods glorious inheritance among believers.
local: Mentendiɣ-i ɖɔɖɔ se ekuli mɩ-lɩmaɣza yɔɔ nɛ ɩtɩlɩ mbʋ́ ɛya-mɩ se ɩɖaŋ kpam yɔ nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛ-ñɩm koboyaɣ ɖewa pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ ɛsɩ ɛ-ñɩma.

eng: and what is the overwhelming greatness of Gods power that is working among us believers. This power is conferred by the energy of Gods powerful strength.
local: Mentendiɣ-i ɖɔɖɔ se eyele nɛ ɩtɩlɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ e-ɖoŋ sɔsɔŋ weyi ɛfɛyɩ tɩnaɣ yɔ, ɛlakɩ mbá ɖa ɖɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ tʋmɩyɛ yɔ.

eng: Gods power was at work in Christ when God raised him from the dead and sat him at Gods right side in the heavens.
local: Ɛnʋ ɛlabɩnɩ tʋmɩyɛ Krɩstʋ taa nɛ efezini-i sɩɖaa taa nɛ ɛcaɣzɩ-ɩ ɛ-cɔlɔ lone kɩbanɖɛ taa ɛsɔdaa.

eng: far above every ruler and authority and power and angelic power, any power that might be named not only now but in the future.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yebina nɛ ɛkɛ ɛsɔdaa ɖoŋ tɩŋa nɛ kewiyisi tɩŋa nɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩpaɣlaa nɛ pɩ-hɩɖɛ sɛɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ yɔ pʋ-ñʋʋdʋ. Pɩtɛkɛ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ alɩwaatʋ tʋnɛ tɩ-taa yɔ pi-ɖeke pʋ-ñʋʋdʋ ɛkɛnaa, ɛlɛ́, pɩkpɛndɩnɩ mbʋ́ pʋkɔŋ wɛʋ cee wayɩ yɔ.

eng: God put everything under Christs feet and made him head of everything in the church.
local: Ɛsɔ luzi pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛ-tɛɛ nɛ eyele nɛ ɛkɛ ɛ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma tɩŋa payɩ ñʋʋdʋ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa.

eng: which is his body. His body, the church, is the fullness of Christ, who fills everything in every way.
local: Ńɖɩ́ lɛ e-tomnaɣ. Đɩ-taa Krɩstʋ ɛnʋ ɛwɛɛ pilim: ɛlakɩ ɖɩ-taa ñɩma tɩŋa pɩtɩŋa payɩ. Ɛwɛ kedeŋa kpeekpe yɔɔ nɛ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛɛ e-nesi taa.

eng: Therefore, as a prisoner for the Lord, I encourage you to live as people worthy of the call you received from God.
local: Ɛsɔ ya-mɩ se ɩɖɔ ɛzɩ pɩkɛdɩnaʋ-ɩ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ weyi ma paɖʋ salaka se malakɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ tʋmɩyɛ yɔ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se ɩñaɣ pana nɛ ɩɖɔ pʋ-yɔɔ ḿbʋ́:.

eng: Brothers and sisters, if a person is caught doing something wrong, you who are spiritual should restore someone like this with a spirit of gentleness. Watch out for yourselves so you wont be tempted too.
local: Taabalaa! Mbá mɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu wɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ yɔ, yee nɔɔyʋ ɛlakɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ nɛ ɩna-ɩ yɔ, ɩlabɩ-ɩ hɛɛɛ nɛ ɩsɩnɩ-ɩ nɛ ɩwɩlɩ-ɩ nʋmɔʋ kɩbaŋgʋ. Ɛlɛ́, meheyiɣ mɩ-taa paa anɩ se ɛcɔnɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ yɔɔ camɩyɛ nɛ pɩtaakɔɔ pɩtakɩ-ɩ.

eng: Conduct yourselves with all humility, gentleness, and patience. Accept each other with love.
local: iluzi mɩ-tɩ kpem nɛ ɩwɛɛ leleŋ nɛ ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-hɔ. Ɩɖɔkɩ ɖama camɩyɛ nɛ sɔɔlɩm.

eng: Carry each others burdens and so you will fulfill the law of Christ.
local: Ɩsɩnɩ ɖama mɩ-kʋñɔmɩŋ taa. Yee ɩlakɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se ɩɖɔŋ Krɩstʋ paɣtʋ yɔɔ.

eng: and make an effort to preserve the unity of the Spirit with the peace that ties you together.
local: Ɩñaɣ pana nɛ ɩtɩŋnɩ laŋhɛzɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩwɛ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ ɖɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɩɖɔkɩ nɔɔ kʋɖʋmaɣ ŋgá Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yeba nɛ ɩla yɔ ḿbʋ́.

eng: If anyone thinks they are important when they arent, theyre fooling themselves.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛmaɣzɩɣ se ɛ-wayɩ lɛ, nɔɔyʋ fɛyɩ nɛ pʋdʋ fɛyɩ wazaɣ nakɛyɛ yɔ, ɛcɛtɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ kpem.

eng: You are one body and one spirit, just as God also called you in one hope.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, tomnaɣ kʋɖʋmaɣ koŋ nɛ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu kʋɖʋmʋʋ koŋ nɛ ɖaŋʋʋ kʋɖʋmʋm koŋ pɛwɛna. Đaŋʋʋ ḿbʋ́, pʋ-yɔɔ ɛya-mɩ.

eng: Each person should test their own work and be happy with doing a good job and not compare themselves with others.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se paa weyi ɛcɔnɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-lakasɩ nɛ ɛna. Yee ɛnawa se sɩwɛ ɖeu yɔ, ɛkʋndɩnɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ. Pɩfɛyɩ se ɛkɛdɩ ɛ-tɩ nɛ lɛlaa.

eng: There is one Lord, one faith, one baptism.
local: Kɩpaɣlʋ kʋɖʋm koŋ nɛ lidaʋ kʋɖʋmʋʋ koŋ nɛ lɩm sɔʋ sɔnzɩ kʋɖʋmsɩ koŋ pɛwɛna.

eng: Each person will have to carry their own load.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se paa weyi ɛsɩɣlɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-sʋʋtʋ.

eng: and one God and Father of all, who is over all, through all, and in all.
local: Ɛsɔ kʋɖʋm koŋ wɛna: ɛnʋ lɛ Krɩstʋ ñɩma tɩŋa payɩ Caa. Ɛnʋ cɔŋnɩnɩ patɩŋa pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛwɛɛ patɩŋa pa-taa nɛ ɛlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ patɩŋa pa-taa.

eng: Those who are taught the word should share all good things with their teacher.
local: Weyi pawɩlɩɣ Ɛsɔtɔm yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɛsɩnɩ weyi ɛwɩlɩɣ-ɩ yɔ nɛ ñɩm mbʋ́ ɛwɛna yɔ.

eng: God has given his grace to each one of us measured out by the gift that is given by Christ.
local: Paa ḿbʋ́, Krɩstʋ labɩ paa ɖa-taa weyi kʋjɔʋ ɛzɩ ɛɖʋʋ se ɛhaɣ-ɩ yɔ nɛ kɩwɛnɩ ndɩ.

eng: Make no mistake, God is not mocked. A person will harvest what they plant.
local: Ɩtaacɛtɩ mɩ-tɩ yem: paawoŋuu Ɛsɔ. Mbʋ́ ɛyʋ ɖúu yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɛkʋŋ:.

eng: Thats why scripture says, When he climbed up to the heights, he captured prisoners, and he gave gifts to people .
local: Ḿbʋ́ pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Ɛkpa ɖooo ɛsɔdaa, ɛkpɛndɩnɩ yomaa, ɛlabɩ ɛyáa kʋjɔŋ.».

eng: Those who plant only for their own benefit will harvest devastation from their selfishness, but those who plant for the benefit of the Spirit will harvest eternal life from the Spirit.
local: yee nɔɔyʋ ɛlakɩ lakasɩ kɩdɛkɛdɩsɩ nzɩ́ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛsɔɔlaa yɔ yɔ, siyeki nɛ ɛsɩ. Ɛlɛ́, yee nɔɔyʋ ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu liu wɛɛ yɔ yɔ, kiyeki nɛ ehiɣ wezuu maatɛŋ.

eng: What does the phrase he climbed up mean if it doesnt mean that he had first gone down into the lower regions, the earth?.
local: Pɔtɔm se ɛkpawa yɔ, pʋ-tɔbʋʋ se we? Pʋ-tɔbʋʋ se eetiba ɖooo tɛtɛɛ nɛ pʋcɔ.

eng: Lets not get tired of doing good, because in time well have a harvest if we dont give up.
local: Pɩtaaɖɛɛ-ɖʋ nɛ camɩyɛ lakasɩ labʋ. Yee ɖɩwɛ sɩ-labʋ yɔɔ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, alɩwaatʋ talɩɣ lɛ, paa weyi ɛkʋ mbʋ́ eɖuwa yɔ.

eng: The one who went down is the same one who climbed up above all the heavens so that he might fill everything.
local: Weyi eetiba yɔ, kʋɖʋm ɛnʋ ɛkpanɩ ɖooo ɛsɔdaa se ɛwɛɛ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋ-cɔlɔ.

eng: So then, lets work for the good of all whenever we have an opportunity, and especially for those in the household of faith.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, yee pɩha-ɖʋ waɖɛ yɔ, ɖɩsɩnɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa, kɔzɩkɔzɩ mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: He gave some apostles, some prophets, some evangelists, and some pastors and teachers.
local: Krɩstʋ ɛnʋ ɛhanɩ nabɛyɛ se pɛkɛ e-tiyiyaa nɛ lɛlaa náyaa nɛ lɛlaa Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm susiyaa nɛ lɛlaa ɖiyiyaa nɛ lɛlaa Ɛsɔtɔm wɩlɩyaa.

eng: Look at the large letters Im making with my own handwriting!.
local: Ɩcɔnɩ ɩna ɛzɩma mbʋ́ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ma-maɣmaɣ mamanɩ me-nesi nɛ pɩpaɣlɩ camɩyɛ kpooluu kpooluu yɔ.

eng: His purpose was to equip Gods people for the work of serving and building up the body of Christ.
local: Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɛñɔɔzɩ Ɛsɔ ñɩma nɛ pala ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ nɛ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma tɛzɩ kpaʋ ɖoŋ pe-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa.

eng: Whoever wants to look good by human standards will try to get you to be circumcised, but only so they wont be harassed for the cross of Christ.
local: Mbá patɩŋa payɩ pe-liu wɛɛ se payaa-wɛ se kɩbama yɔ, ḿbá cɛyɩɣnɩ-mɩ se pʋwɛɛ se pɛpɛlɩ-mɩ. Palakɩ ḿbʋ́ kpem se ɛyáa ɛtaawɛɛ pa-wayɩ kaŋ kaŋ. Yee posusuu Krɩstʋ sɩbʋ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ yɔ pʋ-tɔm yɔ, pʋbʋ, pɛwɛɣ pa-wayɩ kaŋ kaŋ.

eng: until we all reach the unity of faith and knowledge of Gods Son. Gods goal is for us to become mature adults—to be fully grown, measured by the standard of the fullness of Christ.
local: nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖatɩŋa payɩ ɖɩlabɩ nɔɔ kʋɖʋmaɣ ɖe-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa nɛ ɖɩtɩlɩ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ siŋŋ nɛ ɖɩpɩsɩ ɛyáa sʋtʋyaa nɛ ɖɩwɛɛ ɛzɩ Krɩstʋ wɛʋ kpem yɔ.

eng: Those who are circumcised dont observe the Law themselves, but they want you to be circumcised, so they can boast about your physical body.
local: Ɛyáa ḿbá, pa-maɣmaɣ paaɖɔŋ paɣtʋ yɔɔ. Ɛlɛ́, pe-liu wɛɛ se pɛpɛlɩ-mɩ nɛ pakʋndɩ se itisi yʋsaɣ ŋ́gá mɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: As a result, we arent supposed to be infants any longer who can be tossed and blown around by every wind that comes from teaching with deceitful scheming and the tricks people play to deliberately mislead others.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ ɖɩɩtasɩɣ kɛʋ piya nzɩ́ pawɩlɩɣ-sɩ nɛ sɩɩsɩŋ mbʋ́ sɩla nɛ peyiliɣ-sɩ nɛ pʋcɔzʋʋ-sɩ yem yem yɔ.

eng: But as for me, God forbid that I should boast about anything except for the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. The world has been crucified to me through him, and I have been crucified to the world.
local: Ma lɛ, ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ sɩbʋ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ yɔ, pi-ɖeke mankʋndʋʋna, nabʋyʋ fɛyɩ nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ-pʋ. Sɩm ḿbʋ́ pʋ-yɔɔ pɩtɩŋnaa nɛ kɩdɛkɛdɩm mbʋ́ pʋwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ yɔ, pɩtatasɩ ɖoŋ nɩɩyɩ wɛnaʋ mɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ma ɖɔɖɔ mɛnkɛ sɩɖʋ pɩ-ɛsɩndaa.

eng: Instead, by speaking the truth with love, lets grow in every way into Christ.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɖɩyɔɔdʋʋ toovenim nɛ ɖɩsɔɔlʋʋ ɖama nɛ ɖɩpaɣlɩɣ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa nɛ ɖɩñɔtʋʋnɩ weyi ɛkɛ ñʋʋdʋ yɔ, ɛnʋ lɛ Krɩstʋ.

eng: Being circumcised or not being circumcised doesnt mean anything. What matters is a new creation.
local: Paa pɛpɛlɩ nɔɔyʋ yaa pɛtɛpɛlɩ-ɩ yɔ, pɩfɛyɩ wazaɣ nakɛyɛ. Ɛlɛ́, mbʋ́ pʋwɛ wazaɣ yɔ lɛ se: ɖɩkɛ ɛyáa kɩfama.

eng: who is the head. The whole body grows from him, as it is joined and held together by all the supporting ligaments. The body makes itself grow in that it builds itself up with love as each one does its part.
local: Ɛ-yɔɔ pɩtɩŋɩɣna nɛ e-tomnaɣ hɔɔlɩŋ tɩŋa kpɛndɩ camɩyɛ nɛ paa hɔɔlʋʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩpaɣlɩɣ ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ. Nɛ yee tomnaɣ ŋ́gá, kɔ-hɔɔlɩŋ tɩŋa ɩlakɩ a-tʋmɩyɛ ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ yɔ, kɛwɛɣ kɛtɛzɩɣ kpaʋ ɖoŋ sɔɔlɩm taa.

eng: May peace and mercy be on whoever follows this rule and on Gods Israel.
local: Mbá patɩŋa payɩ pɔɖɔŋ tɔm tʋnɛ tɩ-yɔɔ pe-wezuu caɣʋ taa yɔ, Caa Ɛsɔ ɛna pa-pʋtɔdɩyɛ nɛ ɛhɛzɩ pa-laŋa nɛ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ ɛ-ñɩma, ḿbá lɛ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma!.

eng: So Im telling you this, and I insist on it in the Lord: you shouldnt live your life like the Gentiles anymore. They base their lives on pointless thinking.
local: Iwelesi tɔm ndʋ́ mankaɖɩɣ-mɩ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ nɔɔ yɔ. Ńdʋ́ lɛ se: pɩfɛyɩ se ɩtasɩ caɣʋ wezuu ɛzɩ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ. Palakɩ mbʋ́ pamaɣzɩɣ nɛ pɩɩtalɩɣnɩ-wɛ ɖoli yɔ.

eng: From now on, no one should bother me because I bear the marks of Jesus on my body.
local: Pɩkpaɣʋnɩ sɔnɔ yɔ, nɔɔyʋ ɛtaatasɩ-m cɛyʋʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, tɔndɔlɩŋ weyi ɩwɛ mɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɩwɩlɩɣ se mɔntɔɔ kʋñɔŋ Yesu yɔɔ.

eng: and they are in the dark in their reasoning. They are disconnected from Gods life because of their ignorance and their closed hearts.
local: Pɛwɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ tɛɛ, paasɩŋ wezuu ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ haɣ yɔ, pa-laŋkpɩzɩyɛ yɔɔ lɛ, pɛwɛ kaatɩlɩtʋ taa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, may the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit. Amen.
local: Taabalaa! Đa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ ɛlabɩ-mɩ lootiye! Pɩla ḿbʋ́!.

eng: They are people who lack all sense of right and wrong, and who have turned themselves over to doing whatever feels good and to practicing every sort of corruption along with greed.
local: Fɛyɛ ɛɛtasɩɣ-wɛ kpaʋ nɛ pʋyʋ, palakɩ yem yem nɛ azuluma lakasɩ tɩŋa payɩ nɛ pɛwɛnɩ liidiye laɣzaɣ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: But you didnt learn that sort of thing from Christ.
local: Piyele mɩ lɛ, pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́ pɛkpɛlɩkɩ-mɩ Krɩstʋ tɔm taa.

eng: Since you really listened to him and you were taught how the truth is in Jesus.
local: Paa pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma, pɔyɔɔdɩ ɛ-tɔm nɛ ɩnɩɩ nɛ pɛkpɛlɩkɩ Yesu ñɩma mɩ toovenim mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ yɔ.

eng: change the former way of life that was part of the person you once were, corrupted by deceitful desires.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́, pʋwɛɛ se iyele mɩ-wɛtʋ kɩbɩndʋ nɛ mi-wezuu caɣʋ kɩbɩm, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ḿbá cɛtɩɣnɩ-mɩ nɛ paɖʋzʋʋ-mɩ.

eng: Instead, renew the thinking in your mind by the Spirit.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se paa mɩ-taa weyi eyele nɛ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu lɛɣzɩ ɛ-lɩmaɣza.

eng: and clothe yourself with the new person created according to Gods image in justice and true holiness.
local: nɛ ɛkɛ ɛyʋ kɩfalʋ. Ɛsɔ ma-ɩ ɛzɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ yɔ nɛ ɛtʋʋzɩ nɛ ɛwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ ɛzɩ pɩwɛʋ toovenim taa yɔ.

eng: Therefore, after you have gotten rid of lying, Each of you must tell the truth to your neighbor because we are parts of each other in the same body.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se iyele cɛtʋʋ: paa mɩ-taa weyi eheyi lɛlʋ toovenim. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖatɩŋa payɩ ɖɩkɛ Krɩstʋ tomnaɣ pilinzi.

eng: Be angry without sinning. Dont let the sun set on your anger.
local: Yee mɩ-pana ɛkpawa lɛ, ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ nɛ ɩtaala kɩwɛɛkɩm, wɩsɩ ɛtaakpem-yɛ.

eng: Dont provide an opportunity for the devil.
local: Ɩtaaha eleeu waɖɛ naɖɩyɛ kaʋ.

eng: Thieves should no longer steal. Instead, they should go to work, using their hands to do good so that they will have something to share with whoever is in need.
local: Weyi ɛmɩlaɣ yɔ, ɛtaatasɩ mɩlʋ́ʋ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛñaɣ pana nɛ ɛla tʋmɩyɛ nɛ toovenim nɛ ɛ-maɣmaɣ e-nesi nɛ ehiɣ nɛ ɛha weyi ɛwɛ kʋñɔŋ taa yɔ.

eng: Dont let any foul words come out of your mouth. Only say what is helpful when it is needed for building up the community so that it benefits those who hear what you say.
local: Ɛzaɣ́tʋ tɔm natʋyʋ ɛtaalɩɩ mɩ-nɔɔ taa. Ɛlɛ́, yee pʋwɛɛ se natʋyʋ ɛlɩɩ yɔ, tɩkɛnɩ kɩbandʋ ndʋ́ tiyeki se mbá panɩɣ-tʋ yɔ, pɛtɛzɩ pɩʋ nɛ patɩlɩ mbʋ́ lootiye kɛnaa yɔ.

eng: Dont make the Holy Spirit of God unhappy—you were sealed by him for the day of redemption.
local: Ɩtaapɩsɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu hɔyɛ, ŋ́gʋ́ lɛ mayaɣ ŋgá ɛñɩɣ mɩ-yɔɔ se ɛɛlɩzɩ-mɩ pɩ-taa puwiye nɖɩ́ ɛkɔŋ yɔ.

eng: Put aside all bitterness, losing your temper, anger, shouting, and slander, along with every other evil.
local: Iyele ɛsɛñɩŋɩyɛ nɛ tɔm ñasʋʋ nɛ pana nɛ holuu nɛ ɛyáa hɩla wɛɛkʋʋ nɛ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ kañatʋ tɩŋa payɩ.

eng: Be kind, compassionate, and forgiving to each other, in the same way God forgave you in Christ.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɩla ɖama hɛɛɛ nɛ ɩna ɖama pʋtɔdɩyɛ. Ikpeɣ ɖama ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ kpeɣu-mɩ yɔ, mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa.

eng: As for children, obey your parents in the Lord, because it is right.
local: Mɩ piya lɛ, ɩña mɩ-ñɩma ɛzɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ liu wɛʋ yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pʋmʋnɩ ḿbʋ́.

eng: The commandment Honor your father and mother is the first one with a promise attached:.
local: Ḿbʋ́ pamawa se: «Đʋ ña-caa nɛ ño-ɖoo hɩɖɛ.» Ńdʋ́ lɛ kajalaɣ paɣtʋ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ tɔm se yee ŋɖɔm tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɛlakɩ-ŋ pʋyʋ yɔ:.

eng: so that things will go well for you, and you will live for a long time in the land .
local: «Ŋhikiɣ ña-tɩ nɛ ŋcaɣ wezuu kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ nɛ pileɖi.».

eng: As for parents, dont provoke your children to anger, but raise them with discipline and instruction about the Lord.
local: Mɩ caanaa lɛ, ɩtaala nɛ mi-piya pana kpa. Ɛlɛ́, ɩɖɔkɩ-sɩ nɛ ɩsɩɣzɩ-sɩ lɔŋ nɛ ɩka sɩ-ñʋŋ taa ɛzɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ liu wɛʋ yɔ.

eng: As for slaves, obey your human masters with fear and trembling and with sincere devotion to Christ.
local: Mɩ yomaa lɛ, ɩña kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ mɩ-caanaa camɩyɛ nɛ ɩsɔɔndɩ-wɛ toovenim taa, ñamtʋ ndʋ́ ɩñaŋ Krɩstʋ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: Dont work to make yourself look good and try to flatter people, but act like slaves of Christ carrying out Gods will from the heart.
local: Ɩtaañam-wɛ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pɛwɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ nɛ pɔcɔŋnɩ-mɩ yɔ ti-ɖeke se pasam-mɩ. Ɛlɛ́, ɩla ḿbʋ́ se ɩkɛ Krɩstʋ tʋmlaɖaa mbá palakɩ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ nɛ pa-laŋɩyɛ tɩŋa pilim yɔ.

eng: Therefore, imitate God like dearly loved children.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtɩɣzɩnɩ Ɛsɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩkɛ piya nzɩ́ ɛsɔɔlɩ-sɩ yɔ.

eng: Serve your owners enthusiastically, as though you were serving the Lord and not human beings.
local: Ɩlabɩ-wɛ tʋma nɛ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ ɛzɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ maɣmaɣ ɩlakɩ yɔ. Pɩtaakɛ se ɛyáa ɩlakɩ-yɛ.

eng: Live your life with love, following the example of Christ, who loved us and gave himself for us. He was a sacrificial offering that smelled sweet to God.
local: Ɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama ɛzɩ Krɩstʋ sɔɔlʋʋ-ɖʋ nɛ ɛkpaɣ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ ɛha nɛ palaa-ɩ ɖɔ-yɔɔ ɛzɩ kpɩnɛ nɖɩ́ pɔhɔba nɛ ɖɩlɩɣ sɔzɩŋ camɩyɛ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa yɔ.

eng: You know that the Lord will reward every person who does what is right, whether that person is a slave or a free person.
local: Ɩtɛm naʋ se paa pɩɩkɛ yom yaa weyi ɛwɛ ɛ-tɩ yɔɔ yɔ, ɖeu mbʋ́ ɛlaba yɔ, pʋ-yɔɔ Kɩpaɣlʋ hɛyɩɣ-ɩ.

eng: Sexual immorality, and any kind of impurity or greed, shouldnt even be mentioned among you, which is right for holy persons.
local: Pataatɩɩnɩʋ acɛyɛ yaa azuluma lakasɩ tɩŋa yaa liidiye laɣzaɣ pa-taŋ kpem mɩ-hɛkʋ taa ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ Ɛsɔ ñɩma yɔ.

eng: As for masters, treat your slaves in the same way. Stop threatening them, because you know that both you and your slaves have a master in heaven. He doesnt distinguish between people on the basis of status.
local: Piyele mɩ caanaa lɛ, ɩla mi-yomaa ɖɔɖɔ ḿbʋ́. Ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ nɛ ɩtaañazɩ-wɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩtɛm sɩm se mɩ nɛ wɛ mɩ-Caa wɛ ɛsɔdaa. Ɛɛcɔŋnɩ nɔɔyʋ ɛsɩndaa nɛ pʋcɔ ɛlabɩ-ɩ pʋyʋ.

eng: Obscene language, silly talk, or vulgar jokes arent acceptable for believers. Instead, there should be thanksgiving.
local: Tʋtʋ nɛ tɔm ɛzaɣ́tʋ nɛ niɣzuu tɔm, pataatɩɩlɩʋ ɖɔɖɔ mɩ-nɔɔ taa: pɩfɛyɩ ɖeu. Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ sam ɖeke ɛlɩɩna.

eng: Finally, be strengthened by the Lord and his powerful strength.
local: Tɔm ndʋ́ mɛntɛzɩɣna yɔ lɛ se: ɩkpa ɖoŋ mɩ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa e-ɖoŋ sɔsɔŋ yɔɔ.

eng: Because you know for sure that persons who are sexually immoral, impure, or greedy—which happens when things become gods—those persons wont inherit the kingdom of Christ and God.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩtɩlɩ camɩyɛ se paatayɩɣnɩ acɛyɛ laɖʋ nɛ azuluma tʋ yaa liidiye laɣzaɣ tʋ ñɩm mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ñɔɔzaa nɛ ɛsɩɩ ɛ nɛ Krɩstʋ pe-Kewiyaɣ taa yɔ. Liidiye laɣzaɣ tʋ ñɛwɛ ɛzɩ agɔlɩma kpɛyɩyʋ yɔ.

eng: Put on Gods armor so that you can make a stand against the tricks of the devil.
local: Ɩkpaɣ you wondu ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ ha-mɩ yɔ tɩtɩŋa payɩ nɛ ɩpɩzɩ ɩkaɖɩnɩ eleeu alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛñɩkɩ-mɩ ɛ-kpacanaa yɔ.

eng: Nobody should deceive you with stupid ideas. Gods anger comes down on those who are disobedient because of this kind of thing.
local: Itaayele nɔɔyʋ yili-mɩ nɛ ɛ-tɔm ndʋ́ tɩfɛyɩ wazaɣ nakɛyɛ yɔ: pʋ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ pana kpaɣnɩ mbá paañaŋ-ɩ yɔ.

eng: We arent fighting against human enemies but against rulers, authorities, forces of cosmic darkness, and spiritual powers of evil in the heavens.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ ɛyáa pʋwɛɛ se ɖiyoona. Ɛlɛ́, ɛsɔdaa ɖoŋ tɩŋa payɩ nɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ tɛɛ awiya nɛ feziŋ kɩdɛkɛdɩŋ pʋwɛɛ se ɖiyoona.

eng: So you shouldnt have anything to do with them.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́, mɩ nɛ wɛ ɩtaakaa pʋyʋ.

eng: Therefore, pick up the full armor of God so that you can stand your ground on the evil day and after you have done everything possible to still stand.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ pʋwɛɛ se ɩkpaɣ Ɛsɔ you wondu tɩŋa payɩ nɛ ɩpɩzɩ ɩkaɖɩnɩ-wɛ kɩyakɩŋ kɩdɛkɛdɩŋ taa. Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ ɩwɛɛ mi-ɖeɖe ḿbʋ́ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɩtɛŋ patɩŋa payɩ yonaʋ yɔ.

eng: You were once darkness, but now you are light in the Lord, so live your life as children of light.
local: Toovenim lɛ, ɖooo lɛ ɩɩkɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ tɛɛ ñɩma. Ɛlɛ́, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɩkɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ taa ñɩma mɩ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩɖɔ ɛzɩ ñalɩmɩyɛ taa ñɩma yɔ.

eng: So stand with the belt of truth around your waist, justice as your breastplate.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩwɛɛ mi-ɖeɖe ḿbʋ́: ɩkpaɣ toovenim ɛzɩ tambaɖɛ nɖɩ́ sɔɔja tɔɔlʋʋ yɔ nɛ tʋʋzʋʋ ɛzɩ ñɩ́ɣ́yʋ́ʋ ŋgʋ́ ehuuzuu e-lotu yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: Light produces fruit that consists of every sort of goodness, justice, and truth.
local: Mbʋ́ pɩlɩɣnɩ ñalɩmɩyɛ taa yɔ lɛ: camɩyɛ lakasɩ tɩŋa nɛ tʋʋzʋʋ nɛ toovenim.

eng: and put shoes on your feet so that you are ready to spread the good news of peace.
local: Ɩkpaɣ mi-kpekpeka ŋgá ɩwɛnɩ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ɖisusiye yɔ ɛzɩ naataŋgbala wena ɩlɛɣ yɔ.

eng: Therefore, test everything to see whats pleasing to the Lord.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩñaɣ pana nɛ ɩtɩlɩ mbʋ́ pɩkɛdɩnɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔ.

eng: Above all, carry the shield of faith so that you can extinguish the flaming arrows of the evil one.
local: Pʋnɛ pɩtɩŋa pʋ-wayɩ lɛ, ɩkpaɣ mi-lidaʋ alɩwaatʋ kpeekpe ɛzɩ kpayʋʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩmʋʋnɩ ñɩma wena Satanɩ tɔʋ nɛ a-nɔsɩ taa nɛ miŋ sɔsɔŋ yɔ.

eng: and dont participate in the unfruitful actions of darkness. Instead, you should reveal the truth about them.
local: Ɩtaaɖʋ mi-nesi mbá palakɩ wazaɣ fɛyɩ tʋmɩyɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ tɛɛ yɔ pa-tʋma taa. Ɛlɛ́, ikuli a-yɔɔ ñammm.

eng: Take the helmet of salvation and the sword of the Spirit, which is Gods word.
local: Ɩkpaɣ ɖɔɖɔ mɩ-ñʋʋ yabʋ ɛzɩ you hulaɣ yɔ nɛ Ɛsɔtɔm ɛzɩ you sɩɣa ŋgá e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu cɛlɩ-mɩ yɔ.

eng: Its embarrassing to even talk about what certain persons do in secret.
local: Toovenim lɛ, mbʋ́ pɩtɛ ɛyáa lakɩ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ yɔ, halɩ pʋwɛ fɛyɛ se pɔyɔɔdɩ pʋ-tɔm.

eng: Offer prayers and petitions in the Spirit all the time. Stay alert by hanging in there and praying for all believers.
local: Đɔɖɔ lɛ, ɩtɩŋnɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔ nɛ ɩsɛɛ-ɩ nɛ itendi-i alɩwaatʋ tɩŋa pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa. Ɩtaaɖoo pʋ-yɔɔ, ɩñaɣ pana nɛ itendi-i ɛ-ñɩma tɩŋa yɔɔ.

eng: But everything exposed to the light is revealed by the light.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ñalɩmɩyɛ ɛñalɩ pʋ-yɔɔ yɔ, panaɣ-pʋ keɣlee, panaɣ mbʋ́ pɩkɛnaa kpem yɔ.

eng: As for me, pray that when I open my mouth, Ill get a message that confidently makes this secret plan of the gospel known.
local: Itendi-i ɖɔɖɔ mɔ-yɔɔ se eyele nɛ monkuli mɔ-nɔɔ lɛ, mantɩlɩ ndʋ́ maawɩlɩnɩ kaalɛyɩtʋ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm taa yɔ.

eng: Everything that is revealed by the light is light. Therefore, it says, Wake up, sleeper! Get up from the dead, and Christ will shine on you. .
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ pɔtɔŋ se: «Weyi ña ŋɖou yɔ, fe, kʋyɩ nɛ sɩɖaa taa, Krɩstʋ ñalɩmɩyɛ ñalɩɣ ñɔ-yɔɔ.».

eng: Im an ambassador in chains for the sake of the gospel. Pray so that the Lord will give me the confidence to say what I have to say.
local: Ńdʋ́ Ɛsɔ tiyi-m se monsusi, tɩ-yɔɔ mɛwɛ salaka taa yɔ. Itendi-i nɛ manpɩzɩ monsusi-tʋ kaalɛyɩtʋ ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ.

eng: So be careful to live your life wisely, not foolishly.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́, ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ camɩyɛ mɩ-ɖɔnɛ taa. Ɩtaaɖɔ ɛzɩ kɩmɛlɛmɩŋ yɔ, ɛlɛ́, ɩɖɔ ɛzɩ lɔŋsɩnɖaa yɔ.

eng: Tychicus, my loved brother and faithful servant of the Lord, can inform you about my situation and what Im doing.
local: Pʋcɔ mɩ ɖɔɖɔ ɩtɩlɩ mbʋ́ mɛnkɛnaa nɛ mbʋ́ malakɩ yɔ lɛ, taabalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ Ticiiki weyi ɛkɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ tʋmlaɖʋ nɛ ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ, ɛkɔŋnɩ-mɩ kɛdʋʋ pɩtɩŋa payɩ.

eng: Take advantage of every opportunity because these are evil times.
local: Ɩtaayele alɩwaatʋ nɛ tɩɖɛɛ yem, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, kɩyakɩŋ weyi ɖɩwɛ ɩ-taa yɔ, ɩfɛyɩ ɖeu.

eng: Ive sent him for this reason—so that you will know about us. He can reassure you.
local: Pɩ-maɣmaɣ pʋ-yɔɔ kpem mentiyi-i mɩ-cɔlɔ se ɛkɛdɩ-mɩ mbʋ́ pɩ-taa ɖɩwɛɛ yɔ nɛ ɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa.

eng: Because of this, dont be ignorant, but understand the Lords will.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtaawɛɛ kaatɩlɩtʋ taa, ɛlɛ́, ɩñaɣ pana nɛ ɩtɩlɩ mbʋ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ liu wɛɛ yɔ.

eng: May there be peace with the brothers and sisters as well as love with the faith that comes from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ pɛhɛzɩ taabalaa tɩŋa laŋa nɛ peyele pɔsɔɔlɩ ɖama nɛ pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ.

eng: Dont get drunk on wine, which produces depravity. Instead, be filled with the Spirit in the following ways:.
local: Ɩtaañɔɔ sʋlʋm nɛ pʋkʋ-mɩ: pɩkɛ yem yem lakasɩ. Ɛlɛ́, iyele nɛ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu wɛɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ kpaagbaa kpem.

eng: May grace be with all those who love our Lord Jesus Christ forever.
local: Ɛsɔ ɛla mbá patɩŋa payɩ pɔsɔɔlɩ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ kámaɣ́ fɛyɩ yɔ lootiye!.

eng: speak to each other with psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs; sing and make music to the Lord in your hearts;.
local: Ɩkpɛndɩ ɖama nɛ ɩma keɣsi nɛ itee hendu ndʋ́ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu wɩlɩɣ-mɩ yɔ. Itee hendu nɛ ɩyɩɣyɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ nɛ mɩ-laŋɩyɛ tɩŋa pilim.

eng: always give thanks to God the Father for everything in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ;.
local: Ɩsa Caa Ɛsɔ alɩwaatʋ kpeekpe pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ hɩɖɛ taa.

eng: and submit to each other out of respect for Christ.
local: Mbá mɩ ɩñaŋ Krɩstʋ yɔ, iluzi mɩ-tɩ ɖama tɛɛ.

eng: For example, wives should submit to their husbands as if to the Lord.
local: Mɩ halaa lɛ, paa weyi eluzi ɛ-tɩ ɛ-walʋ tɛɛ ɛzɩ eluzuu ɛ-tɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ tɛɛ yɔ.

eng: A husband is the head of his wife like Christ is head of the church, that is, the savior of the body.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, halʋ ñʋʋdʋ lɛ ɛ-walʋ ɛzɩ Krɩstʋ kɛʋ ɛ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma ñʋʋdʋ yɔ. Ḿbá lɛ e-tomnaɣ nɛ ɛnʋ lɛ ka-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ.

eng: So wives submit to their husbands in everything like the church submits to Christ.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́, paa halʋ weyi eluzi ɛ-tɩ ɛ-walʋ tɛɛ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa ɛzɩ Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma luzuu pa-tɩ ɛ́lɛ́ tɛɛ yɔ.

eng: As for husbands, love your wives just like Christ loved the church and gave himself for her.
local: Mɩ walaa lɛ, paa weyi ɛsɔɔlɩ ɛ-halʋ ɛzɩ Krɩstʋ sɔɔlʋʋ ɛ-ŋgbɛyɛ nɛ ɛkpaɣ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛha ɖɩ-taa ñɩma yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: He did this to make her holy by washing her in a bath of water with the word.
local: Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɛtɩŋnɩ lɩm nɛ tɔm pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ eyele pɛwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ nɛ papɩsɩ Ɛsɔ ñɩma.

eng: He did this to present himself with a splendid church, one without any sort of stain or wrinkle on her clothes, but rather one that is holy and blameless.
local: Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ se Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ ɛwɛɛ koboyaɣ taa nɛ ewoni-ɖɩ ɛ-ɛsɩndaa, azuluma yaa mɩndʋ yaa mbʋ́ pɩnɩɣzɩnɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pataawɛɛ ɖɩ-yɔɔ, ɛlɛ́, ɖɩwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ, ɛzaɣ́tʋ natʋyʋ ɛtaawɛɛ ɖɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: Thats how husbands ought to love their wives—in the same way as they do their own bodies. Anyone who loves his wife loves himself.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pʋwɛɛ se walaa ɛsɔɔlɩ pa-halaa ɛzɩ pɔsɔɔlʋʋ pa-maɣmaɣ pa-tɩ yɔ: weyi ɛsɔɔlɩ ɛ-halʋ yɔ, ɛsɔɔlɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ.

eng: No one ever hates his own body, but feeds it and takes care of it just like Christ does for the church.
local: Toovenim lɛ, nɔɔyʋ fɛyɩ se ɛpaɖɩɣ ɛ-maɣmaɣ e-tomnaɣ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛcalɩɣ-kɛ nɛ ɛcɔŋnɩ kɔ-yɔɔ camɩyɛ ɛzɩ Krɩstʋ cɔŋʋʋnɩ ɛ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: because we are parts of his body.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ḿbá lɛ mbá ɖa ɖɩkɛ e-tomnaɣ pilinzi yɔ.

eng: This is why a man will leave his father and mother and be united with his wife, and the two of them will be one body .
local: Pʋwɛ ɛzɩ pamaʋ se: «Abalʋ yeki ɛ-caa nɛ e-ɖoo nɛ ɛkpaɣ halʋ nɛ pa-naalɛ papɩsɩ ɛyʋ kʋɖʋm» yɔ.

eng: Marriage is a significant allegory, and Im applying it to Christ and the church.
local: Tɔm tʋnɛ, tɩkɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ tɔm, tɩ-taa wɛ cukaŋ. Krɩstʋ nɛ ɛ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma mamaɣzɩnaa nɛ mɔyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́.

eng: In any case, as for you individually, each one of you should love his wife as himself, and wives should respect their husbands.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pʋwɛnɩ-mɩ: paa mɩ-taa weyi ɛsɔɔlɩ ɛ-halʋ ɛzɩ ɛsɔɔlʋʋ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ yɔ nɛ paa halʋ weyi ɛ́lɛ́ ña ɛ-walʋ.

eng: From Paul and Timothy, slaves of Christ Jesus. To all those in Philippi who are Gods people in Christ Jesus, along with your supervisors and servants.
local: Ma Pɔɔlɩ, ma nɛ Timootee ɖɩkɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu tʋmlaɖaa. Ɖamaɣnɩ takayaɣ kanɛ. Đɩmaɣ-kɛ mbá mɩ ɩkɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩma mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɩwɛɛ Filiipu tɛtʋ taa yɔ mɩtɩŋa payɩ. Đɩmaɣ-kɛ mɩ nɛ mɩ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma yɔɔ cɔnɩyaa nɛ mbá pɛkɛ tayɩyaa ɖɩ-taa yɔ.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Đɩsɛ-mɩ: ɖa-Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ palabɩ-mɩ lootiye nɛ pɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa.

eng: I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ tɩtɩŋa payɩ mɔntɔzʋʋ mɩ-yɔɔ yɔ, mansaŋ Ɛsɔ mɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: Im thankful for all of you every time I pray, and its always a prayer full of joy.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ tɩtɩŋa payɩ mɛnsɛɣ Ɛsɔ mɩtɩŋa mɩ-yɔɔ yɔ, mɛnsɛɣ-ɩ nɛ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ.

eng: Im glad because of the way you have been my partners in the ministry of the gospel from the time you first believed it until now.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, kpaɣ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩpɩsɩ Krɩstʋ ñɩma yɔ, ɩwɛ sɩnaʋ yɔɔ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ alɩwaatʋ tʋnɛ nɛ ɛ-Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm tɛzɩɣ cɔʋ.

eng: Im sure about this: the one who started a good work in you will stay with you to complete the job by the day of Christ Jesus.
local: Manawa se paa pɩɩla ɛzɩma yɔ, Ɛsɔ weyi ɛpazɩ tʋmɩyɛ kɩbanɖɛ mɩ-taa yɔ, ɛlakɩ-ɖɩ ḿbʋ́ nɛ ɛkɔɔ ɛtɛm-ɖɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Krɩstʋ Yesu kɔŋ yɔ.

eng: I have good reason to think this way about all of you because I keep you in my heart. You are all my partners in Gods grace, both during my time in prison and in the defense and support of the gospel.
local: Pʋmʋnaa se mamaɣzɩ mɩtɩŋa mɩ-yɔɔ ḿbʋ́. Mɔnsɔɔlɩ-mɩ siŋŋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, lootiye nɖɩ́ Ɛsɔ labɩ-mɩ yɔ, ma nɛ mɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛlabɩ-ɖɩ paa lɛɛlɛɛyɔ mɛwɛʋ salaka taa yɔ, yaa maawɛʋ man-tɩ yɔɔ nɛ malʋkɩ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔɔ nɛ mawɩlɩɣ ɛyáa se tɩkɛ toovenim yɔ.

eng: God is my witness that I feel affection for all of you with the compassion of Christ Jesus.
local: Ɛsɔ na sɔɔlɩm mbʋ́ mɔnsɔɔlɩ mɩtɩŋa siŋŋ yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ lɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu sɔɔlɩm kpem.

eng: This is my prayer: that your love might become even more and more rich with knowledge and all kinds of insight.
local: Mentendiɣ Ɛsɔ se eyele nɛ ɩtɛzɩ ɖama sɔɔlʋʋ nɛ ɩpɩzɩ ɩtɩlɩ toovenim nɛ ɩtɛzɩ nɩʋ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa.

eng: I pray this so that you will be able to decide what really matters and so you will be sincere and blameless on the day of Christ.
local: nɛ ɩpɩzɩ ɩlɩzɩ mbʋ́ pɩkɩlɩ ɖeu yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ ɩwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ nɛ paanaɣ kawanaɣ nakɛyɛ mɩ-yɔɔ puwiye nɖɩ́ Krɩstʋ lɩzɩɣ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ yɔ.

eng: I pray that you will then be filled with the fruit of righteousness, which comes from Jesus Christ, in order to give glory and praise to God.
local: nɛ ɛ-lakasɩ kʋtʋʋzasɩ tɛzɩ ɖɔʋ mɩ-taa nɛ siyele pasa Ɛsɔ nɛ paɖʋ-ɩ hɩɖɛ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to know that the things that have happened to me have actually advanced the gospel.
local: Taabalaa! Mancaɣ se ɩtɩlɩ se mbʋ́ pɩtalɩ-m yɔ, halɩ piyeba nɛ ɖɩtɛzɩɣ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm susuu.

eng: The whole Praetorian Guard and everyone else knows that Im in prison for Christ.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yebina nɛ wiyaʋ sɔsɔ ɖɩɣa yɔɔ ɖaŋɩyaa nɛ ɛyáa lɛlaa, patɩŋa payɩ patɩlɩ se malakɩ Krɩstʋ tʋmɩyɛ yɔɔ paɖʋ-m salaka.

eng: Most of the brothers and sisters have had more confidence through the Lord to speak the word boldly and bravely because of my jail time.
local: Đɔɖɔ lɛ, mbá pɛkɛ ɖa-taabalaa pa nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ pɛ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ yɔ, pa-taa sakɩyɛ nawa se mɛwɛ salaka taa lɛ, pɩlabɩ-wɛ hʋnʋm nɛ pɛtɛzɩɣ susuu Ɛsɔtɔm kaalɛyɩtʋ.

eng: Some certainly preach Christ with jealous and competitive motives, but others preach with good motives.
local: Toovenim lɛ, pa-taa nabɛyɛ taa wɛnɩ-m nɛ posusuu Krɩstʋ tɔm nɛ ɛsɩsɛmɩyɛ. Ɛlɛ́, pa-taa lɛlaa ñosusaɣ-tʋ nɛ lɩmaɣza kɩbana. Paba lakɩ ḿbʋ́ nɛ sɔɔlɩm, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɛtɛm naʋ se Ɛsɔ ɖʋnɩ-m cɩnɛ se malʋ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔɔ. Piyele kajalaɣ ñɩma yɔ, paasusuu Krɩstʋ tɔm nɛ lɩmaɣza kɩbana. Pañɩnɩɣ se pala mɔ-yɔɔ ɛsɩsɛmɩyɛ nɛ piyele mɛntɛzɩ labʋ kʋñɔŋ salaka taa.

eng: What do I think about this? Just this: since Christ is proclaimed in every possible way, whether from dishonest or true motives, Im glad and Ill continue to be glad.
local: Pɩna-m nɛ we! Paa pɛwɛnɩ lɩmaɣza kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ yaa wena amʋnaa yɔ yɔ, Krɩstʋ tɔm posusuu. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, man-taa hʋlʋmaa. Halɩ pʋhʋlʋmʋʋ ḿbʋ́ tam.

eng: Im glad because I know that this will result in my release through your prayers and the help of the Spirit of Jesus Christ.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, manawa se mɩ-Ɛsɔ sɛʋ nɛ Yesu Krɩstʋ Fezuu sɩnaʋ pɔ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋkɔŋ yabʋ ma-ñʋʋ.

eng: It is my expectation and hope that I wont be put to shame in anything. Rather, I hope with daring courage that Christs greatness will be seen in my body, now as always, whether I live or die.
local: Mbʋ́ me-liu wɛɛ siŋŋ nɛ manɖaŋ-pʋ yɔ lɛ se fɛyɛ ɛtaatɩɩkpaʋ-m kpem. Ɛlɛ́, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ paa mansɩba yaa mɛwɛ wezuu yɔ, pɩtɩŋɩɣnɩ mɔ-yɔɔ ɛzɩ pɩpam labʋ yɔ nɛ Krɩstʋ hɩɖɛ sɛɛ nɛ paa weyi ɛna kaŋŋ.

eng: Because for me, living serves Christ and dying is even better.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Krɩstʋ kɩlɩnɩ-m wazaɣ me-wezuu caɣʋ taa nɛ sɩm ñɛkɛnɩ-m kɛzɛɣa.

eng: If I continue to live in this world, I get results from my work.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee mɛwɛ wezuu nɛ manpɩzɩɣ se mantasɩ tʋmɩyɛ wazaɣ ñɩnɖɛ naɖɩyɛ labʋ yɔ, pʋbʋ maanaɣ se malɩzɩ wezuu naa sɩm.

eng: But I dont know what I prefer. Im torn between the two because I want to leave this life and be with Christ, which is far better.
local: Mɛwɛ cenje: me-liu wɛɛ se meyele kedeŋa yɔɔ wezuu kʋnɛ nɛ mowolo ma nɛ Krɩstʋ ɖɩwɛɛ. Ḿbʋ́ kɩlɩnɩ ɖeu kpem.

eng: However, its more important for me to stay in this world for your sake.
local: Ɛlɛ́, mɩ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩkɩlɩ wazaɣ se mantasɩ caɣʋ wezuu.

eng: Im sure of this: I will stay alive and remain with all of you to help your progress and the joy of your faith.
local: Ḿbʋ́ manawa kpem. Manawa se mantasɩɣ caɣʋ wezuu nɛ mɛwɛɛ mɩtɩŋa payɩ mɩ-cɔlɔ nɛ mansɩnɩ-mɩ nɛ ɩɖɛɛnɩ ɛsɩndaa nɛ mɩ-laŋa hʋlʋmɩ mi-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa.

eng: and to increase your pride in Christ Jesus through my presence when I visit you again.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ manpɩsɩɣ mɩ-cɔlɔ yɔ, ɩtɛzɩɣ-m kʋndɩnaʋ mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa.

eng: Most important, live together in a manner worthy of Christs gospel. Do this, whether I come and see you or Im absent and hear about you. Do this so that you stand firm, united in one spirit and mind as you struggle together to remain faithful to the gospel.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ yɔ lɛ se: ɩɖɔ camɩyɛ ɛzɩ Krɩstʋ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm pɔzʋʋ yɔ. Yee ḿbʋ́, paa mɔnkɔm se mana-mɩ yaa mɔntɔkɔɔ yɔ, manɩɩ se ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ kpam ḿbʋ́ nɛ ɩwɛnɩ lɩmaɣza kʋɖʋmɛɛ nɛ laŋɩyɛ kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ, tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɩlakɩ se ɛyáa etisi Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ńdʋ́ yɔ ɖɩ-taa.

eng: That way, you wont be afraid of anything your enemies do. Your faithfulness and courage are a sign of their coming destruction and your salvation, which is from God.
local: Pʋbʋ, sɔɔndʋ ɛɛkpaɣ-mɩ nɛ mi-koyindinaa nabʋyʋ taa. Ḿbʋ́ wɩlɩɣnɩ-wɛ se nʋmɔʋ kilebuu taa pɛwɛɛ nɛ pɩwɩlɩ-mɩ se mɩ mɩwɛ ñʋʋ yabʋ nʋmɔʋ taa, Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ pɩlɩnaa.

eng: God has generously granted you the privilege, not only of believing in Christ but also of suffering for Christs sake.
local: Ɛsɔ ha-mɩ se ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɩtɛ ɩtɔɔ kʋñɔŋ ɛ-yɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: You are having the same struggle that you saw me face and now hear that Im still facing.
local: nɛ ɩlʋ lʋbɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɩna malʋkaɣ yɔ. Ńɖɩ́ mɔnɖɔŋ lʋbʋ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ nɛ ɩnɩɣ ɖɩ-taŋ.

eng: Therefore, if there is any encouragement in Christ, any comfort in love, any sharing in the Spirit, any sympathy.
local: Manawa se mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ yeki nɛ ɩkpa ɖoŋ nɛ ɛ-sɔɔlɩm ñeyele nɛ pɩlabɩ-mɩ hʋnʋm. Manawa ɖɔɖɔ se mɩ nɛ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ɩlabɩ nɔɔ kʋɖʋmaɣ nɛ ɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama nɛ ɩnaɣ ɖama pʋtɔdɩyɛ.

eng: complete my joy by thinking the same way, having the same love, being united, and agreeing with each other.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́ ɩnɩɩnɩ ɖama siŋŋ nɛ man-taa tɛzɩ hʋlʋmʋʋ, ɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama nɛ ɩwɛnɩ hɔyɛ kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ nɛ lɩmaɣza kʋɖʋmɛɛ.

eng: Dont do anything for selfish purposes, but with humility think of others as better than yourselves.
local: Ɩtaala nabʋyʋ se ɩkɩlɩnɩ lɛlaa yaa ɩkʋndɩnɩ-pʋ falaa. Ɛlɛ́, iluzi mɩ-tɩ ɖama tɛɛ, paa weyi ɛkpaɣ lɛlaa se pakɩlɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ.

eng: Instead of each person watching out for their own good, watch out for what is better for others.
local: Paa weyi lɛ, ɛtaañɩnɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-kɛzɛɣa ɖeke. Ɛlɛ́, ɛmaɣzɩ lɛlaa ñɩŋga yɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Adopt the attitude that was in Christ Jesus:.
local: Ɩwɛnɩ wɛtʋ ndʋ́ Krɩstʋ Yesu kɛwɛna yɔ.

eng: Though he was in the form of God, he did not consider being equal with God something to exploit.
local: Ɛ nɛ Ɛsɔ paawɛ kɩmaŋ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛtakpaɣ ɖɔndɩyɛ ńɖɩ́ nɛ ɛ́yáa pʋyʋ.

eng: But he emptied himself by taking the form of a slave and by becoming like human beings. When he found himself in the form of a human.
local: Ɛ-maɣmaɣ eyebi mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛɛwɛna yɔ pʋ-tɔm nɛ ɛpɩsɩ tʋmlaɖʋ nɛ ɛwɛɛ ɛzɩ ɛyáa yɔ.

eng: he humbled himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross.
local: Ɛpɩsɩ ɛyʋ lɛ, ɛtɛzɩ ɛ-tɩ luzuu kpem nɛ ɛña Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛkɔɔ ɛsɩ. Halɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ ɛsɩba.

eng: Therefore, God highly honored him and gave him a name above all names.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛ́lɛ́ kpazɩ-ɩ lone nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɩlɩ kʋyʋʋ yɔ ɖɩ-taa nɛ ɛ́yáa-ɩ hɩɖɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɩlɩ lɛɛna tɩŋa payɩ yɔ.

eng: so that at the name of Jesus everyone in heaven, on earth, and under the earth might bow.
local: Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ ɛsɔdaa nɛ tataa cɩnɛ nɛ halɩ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ tɛtɛɛ yɔ, pɩnɩ hɩɖɛ ńɖɩ́ se Yesu lɛ, pɩñam-ɩ nɛ puluŋ pɩ-nɩmbɔla yɔɔ nɛ.

eng: and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
local: pʋtɔ se Yesu Krɩstʋ lɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ se Caa Ɛsɔ hɩɖɛ ɛsɛɛ.

eng: Therefore, my loved ones, just as you always obey me, not just when I am present but now even more while I am away, carry out your own salvation with fear and trembling.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Đenɖe Ɛsɔ yabɩ mɩ-ñʋʋ yɔ, ɩwɛɛ tʋmɩyɛ labʋ yɔɔ ñʋʋ yabʋ ḿbʋ́ pɩ-taa. Ɩlakɩ-ɖɩ lɛ, ɩña Ɛsɔ nɛ ɩsɔɔndɩ-ɩ. Ḿbʋ́ ɩpam labʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ maawɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ yɔ. Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, ɖenɖe mɛnfɛyɩ mɩ-cɔlɔ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɩla ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ.

eng: God is the one who enables you both to want and to actually live out his good purposes.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Ɛsɔ yekina se itisi nɛ ɩla tʋmɩyɛ ɛzɩ pɩkɛdɩnaʋ ɛ-maɣmaɣ nɛ ɛɖʋ yɔ.

eng: Do everything without grumbling and arguing.
local: Mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɩlakɩ yɔ, ɩlabɩ-pʋ, ɛlɛ́, ɩtaamidi mi-liŋ tɛɛ nɛ ɩhɔŋnɩ ɖama tɔm.

eng: so that you may be blameless and pure, innocent children of God surrounded by people who are crooked and corrupt. Among these people you shine like stars in the world.
local: Ɩla ḿbʋ́ nɛ pataana kawanaɣ nakɛyɛ mɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɩwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ nɛ ɩkɛ Ɛsɔ piya nzɩ́ paanaɣ sɩ-yɔɔ kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ yɔ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ ɛyáa azaɣ́a nɛ kɩtatʋʋzɩŋ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa. Mɩ lɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa ɛzɩ ɛsɔdaa tɩɩnzɩ yɔ.

eng: because you hold on to the word of life. This will allow me to say on the day of Christ that I havent run for nothing or worked for nothing.
local: Miheyiɣni-wɛ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩhaɣ wezuu yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ mankʋndɩ puwiye nɖɩ́ Krɩstʋ lɩzɩɣ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ wɩlɩɣnɩ toovenim se tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ mañaɣ pana nɛ mala yɔ, ɖɩtɛkɛ falaa ñɩnɖɛ.

eng: But even if I am poured out like a drink offering upon the altar of service for your faith, I am glad. Im glad with all of you.
local: Mi-lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩwɛnɩ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ yɔ, kʋwɛ ɛzɩ kɩlaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩlaɣ-ɩ yɔ. Pʋtɔma yɔ, pakʋʋ-m nɛ man-calɩm sɔzɩ mɩ-kɩlaʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kʋ-yɔɔ. Paa pɩlaba ḿbʋ́ yɔ, man-taa hʋlʋmʋʋ nɛ ma nɛ mɩ ɖɩmayɩ amaya.

eng: You should be glad about this in the same way. Be glad with me!.
local: Mɩ ɖɔɖɔ lɛ, mɩ-taa ɛhʋlʋmɩ nɛ ma nɛ mɩ ɖɩkpɛndɩ ɖɩmayɩ amaya.

eng: I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to see you soon so that I may be encouraged by hearing about you.
local: Mantaɣ liu se yee Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu etisaa yɔ, mentiyiɣni-mɩ Timootee kɩyakɩŋ ɩnɛ ɩ-taa nɛ pɩpɩzɩ pɩlabɩ-m leleŋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛpɩsɩɣ ɛkɔɔ nɛ eheyi-m mɩ-tɔm yɔ.

eng: I have no one like him. He is a person who genuinely cares about your well-being.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mbá patɩŋa payɩ pamaɣzɩɣ mɩ-yɔɔ yɔ, pa-taa lɛ, ma nɛ e-ɖeke koŋ ɖɩwɛnɩnɩ lɩmaɣza kʋɖʋmɛɛ nɛ ɖɩñɩnɩɣ mɩ-kɛzɛɣa.

eng: All the others put their own business ahead of Jesus Christs business.
local: Lɛlaa tɩŋa payɩ ñɩnɩɣ pa-maɣmaɣ pɛ-kɛzɛsɩ, ɛlɛ́ paañɩnɩɣ Krɩstʋ Yesu ñɩŋga.

eng: You know his character, how he labors with me for the gospel like a son works with his father.
local: Piyele ɛnʋ lɛ, ɩtɛm sɩm ɛ-yɔɔ se ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ yɔ: ɛsɩnɩ-m nɛ ma nɛ ɩ ɖɩla tʋmɩyɛ ɛzɩ pɩɣa nɛ ka-caa yɔ nɛ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm tɛzɩɣ cɔʋ.

eng: So he is the one that I hope to send as soon as I find out how things turn out here for me.
local: Mantaɣ liu se manaɣ mbʋ́ pɩtɛŋnɩ-m yɔ lɛ, mentiyiɣni-mɩ-ɩ.

eng: I trust in the Lord that I also will visit you soon.
local: Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔɔ lɛ, mantaɣ liu se ma-maɣmaɣ mɔnkɔŋ ɖɔɖɔ alɩwaatʋ tʋnɛ tɩ-taa nɛ mana-mɩ.

eng: I think it is also necessary to send Epaphroditus to you. He is my brother, coworker, and fellow soldier; and he is your representative who serves my needs.
local: Manawa se pʋwɛɛ se meyele nɛ man-taabalʋ Epafroditi pɩsɩ mɩ-cɔlɔ. Ma nɛ ɩ ɖɩlakɩnɩ tʋmɩyɛ nɛ ɖɩlʋkɩ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔɔ. Miitiyini-i mɔn-cɔlɔ se ɛkɔɔ ɛsɩnɩ-m alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ maawɛ kɩcɛyɩm taa yɔ.

eng: He misses you all, and he was upset because you heard he was sick.
local: E-liu kaawɛ siŋŋ se ɛna mɩtɩŋa payɩ. Peheyi-i se ɩnɩwa se pɩwɩɣ-ɩ lɛ, ɛ-lɩmaɣza wɛɛkɩ.

eng: In fact, he was so sick that he nearly died. But God had mercy on him—and not just on him but also on me, because his death would have caused me great sorrow.
local: Toovenim lɛ, pɩwɩ-ɩ sɩbʋ yɔɔ sɩbʋ yɔɔ. Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ na ɛ-pʋtɔdɩyɛ. Pɩtɛkɛ e-ɖeke ɛ-ñɩnɖɛ ɛnawa. Ɛna ɖɔɖɔ ma-ñɩnɖɛ se mɛ-ɛsɛ ɛtaapaŋ ñɩŋʋʋ.

eng: Therefore, I am sending him immediately so that when you see him again you can be glad and I wont worry.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ menkpedesiɣ se meyele nɛ ɛpɩsɩ mɩ-cɔlɔ nɛ ɩna-ɩ nɛ mɩ-taa ɖaɣnɩ hʋlʋmʋʋ nɛ ma ɖɔɖɔ lɛ, mɛ-ɛsɛ ɛtaatasɩ ñɩŋʋʋ.

eng: So welcome him in the Lord with great joy and show great respect for people like him.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩmʋ-ɩ nɛ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ siŋŋ mɩ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa. Pʋwɛɛ se ɩña ɛyáa mbá patɩŋa payɩ pɛwɛ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ ɛnʋ yɔ.

eng: He risked his life and almost died for the work of Christ, and he did this to make up for the help you couldnt give me.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Krɩstʋ tʋmɩyɛ yɔɔ ɛcaɣaɣ sɩbʋ: ecoɖi sɩm se ɛsɩnɩ-m sɩnaʋ mbʋ́ mɩ-maɣmaɣ ɩtaapɩzɩɣ se ɩsɩnɩ-m yɔ.

eng: So then, my brothers and sisters, be glad in the Lord. Its no trouble for me to repeat the same things to you because they will help keep you on track.
local: Man-taabalaa! Ndʋ́ mɛntɛzɩɣnɩ-mɩ yɔ lɛ se mɩ-taa ɛhʋlʋmɩ se mɩ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɩkpɛndaa. Pɩɩcɛyɩɣ-m se mantasɩ-mɩ maʋ Laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ Tɔm ńdʋ́. Piyele mɩ lɛ, pɩkɩlɩ wee wee se pama-mɩ ḿbʋ́.

eng: Watch out for the dogs. Watch out for people who do evil things. Watch out for those who insist on circumcision, which is really mutilation.
local: Ɩkpa mɩ-tɩ nɛ tʋmlaɖaa azaɣ́a, pɛkɛ hasɩ mancaaciwaa, pɛtɛpɛlɩ-wɛ siŋŋ.

eng: We are the circumcision. We are the ones who serve by Gods Spirit and who boast in Christ Jesus. We dont put our confidence in rituals performed on the body.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖɛkɛnɩ mbá pɛpɛlɩ-wɛ siŋŋ yɔ, pɩtɛkɛ ḿbá. Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔ ɖɩtɩŋɩɣna nɛ ɖiluŋuu ɛ-tɛɛ nɛ ɖɩkʋndʋʋnɩ Yesu Krɩstʋ. Đɩɩtaɣ tomnaɣ yɔɔ pɛlʋʋ.

eng: though I have good reason to have this kind of confidence. If anyone else has reason to put their confidence in physical advantages, I have even more:.
local: Ŋgʋ́, ma ɖɔɖɔ manpɩzaɣ se mantaa ma-maɣmaɣ man-tɩ. Yee nabɛyɛ ɛmaɣzɩɣ se papɩzɩɣ pataa pa-maɣmaɣ pa-tɩ liu yɔ, mɛwɛnɩ waɖɛ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ-wɛ.

eng: I was circumcised on the eighth day. I am from the people of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a Hebrew of the Hebrews. With respect to observing the Law, Im a Pharisee.
local: Palʋlɩ-m nɛ kɩyakʋ sɩŋ lɛ, pɛpɛlɩ-m. Mɛnkɛ Izrɛɛlɩ tʋ, palʋlɩ-m Bɛnjamɛɛ liɖe taa. Mɛnkɛ Ebree tʋ, Ebree ñɩma lʋlɩnɩ-m. Mɔnɖɔŋaɣ Yuda ñɩma paɣtʋ yɔɔ ɖɔm mbʋ́ yɔ, maakɛ Farɩsɩ tʋ.

eng: With respect to devotion to the faith, I harassed the church. With respect to righteousness under the Law, Im blameless.
local: Mɛ-ɛsɩyɛ kɛsɛnɩ Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma wayɩ wɛʋ kaŋ kaŋ. Paɣtʋ yɔɔ ɖɔm lɛ, natʋyʋ fɛyɩ se paawanɩ-m.

eng: These things were my assets, but I wrote them off as a loss for the sake of Christ.
local: Ɛlɛ́, mbʋ́ pɩɩkɛnɩ-m kɛzɛɣa yɔ, Krɩstʋ yɔɔ lɛ, mankpakɩɣ-pʋ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ se pʋɖʋzɩ-m.

eng: But even beyond that, I consider everything a loss in comparison with the superior value of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have lost everything for him, but what I lost I think of as sewer trash, so that I might gain Christ.
local: Halɩ mankpakɩɣ pɩtɩŋa payɩ se pʋɖʋzɩ-m, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mansɩm man-Kɩpaɣlʋ Krɩstʋ Yesu yɔ, pɩkɩlɩ-m wazaɣ pɩtɩŋa payɩ. Ɛ-yɔɔ lɛ, mentisaa se melesi pɩtɩŋa payɩ. Mankpakɩɣ pɩtɩŋa ɛzɩ azuluma pʋyʋ yɔ se manpɩzɩ mehiɣ Krɩstʋ ɛnʋ. Malakɩ ḿbʋ́ se ma nɛ ɩ ɖɩwɛɛ ɖama taa. Yee ḿbʋ́ pɩtɛkɛ paɣtʋ yɔɔ ɖɔm yebina nɛ manpɩsɩ ɛyʋ kʋtʋʋzʋ. Ɛlɛ́, mɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔɔ manpɩsɩ ɛyʋ kʋtʋʋzʋ. Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ pɩlɩnaa se pɩtɩŋnɩ lidaʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛyʋ pɩsɩ kʋtʋʋzʋ ḿbʋ́.

eng: The righteousness that I have comes from knowing Christ, the power of his resurrection, and the participation in his sufferings. It includes being conformed to his death.
local: Mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa me-liu wɛɛ yɔ lɛ se: me-wezuu caɣʋ taa lɛ, mantɩlɩ Krɩstʋ nɛ mana ɖoŋ weyi efemnaa yɔ, nɛ mɔntɔɔ kʋñɔŋ ŋgʋ́ ɛtɔwaa yɔ nɛ mansɩ ɛzɩ ɛnʋ yɔ.

eng: so that I may perhaps reach the goal of the resurrection of the dead.
local: nɛ pʋwɛɛ yɔ, Ɛsɔ kefezi-m ɖɔɖɔ sɩɖaa taa.

eng: Its not that I have already reached this goal or have already been perfected, but I pursue it, so that I may grab hold of it because Christ grabbed hold of me for just this purpose.
local: Maatɔŋ se mɛntɛm hiɣu pɩtɩŋa payɩ yaa mɛntɛm kɛʋ weyi ɛmʋnaa yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, mɔnɖɔŋ ñaɣʋ pana se mantalɩ nɛ mamʋ man-kɩhɛyʋʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Krɩstʋ Yesu tɛm-m mʋ́ʋ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I myself dont think Ive reached it, but I do this one thing: I forget about the things behind me and reach out for the things ahead of me.
local: Taabalaa! Ma-maɣmaɣ maatɔŋ se mɛntɛm talʋʋ nɛ mamʋ man-kɩhɛyʋʋ. Ɛlɛ́, pʋyʋ kʋɖʋm koŋ weyi malakɩ yɔ lɛ se: mɔnsɔʋ mbʋ́ pɩtɛm ɖɛʋ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ piyele mɔnɖɔɔnɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛnɩ ɛsɩndaa yɔ.

eng: The goal I pursue is the prize of Gods upward call in Christ Jesus.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ malʋkɩ se mantalɩ tɩnaɣ yɔɔ nɛ mamʋ kɩhɛyʋʋ ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ tɩŋnɩ Krɩstʋ Yesu yɔɔ nɛ ɛ́yáa-ɖʋ nɛ ɛsɔdaa se ɖɩmʋ yɔ.

eng: So all of us who are spiritually mature should think this way, and if anyone thinks differently, God will reveal it to him or her.
local: Mbá ɖa ɖɩtɛm kɛʋ mbá pamʋnaa yɔ, ɖɩmaɣzɩ ḿbʋ́. Ɛlɛ́, yee nabʋyʋ taa mɩ-lɩmaɣza ɛwɛ ndɩ yɔ, Ɛsɔ wɩlɩɣ-mɩ mbʋ́ pɩkɛ toovenim yɔ.

eng: Only lets live in a way that is consistent with whatever level we have reached.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ yɔ lɛ se: Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ ŋgʋ́ ɖɩɖɔŋ kɩ-taa yɔ, ɖɩwɛɛ kɩ-taa ḿbʋ́ nɛ pɩɖɛɛnɩ ɛsɩndaa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, become imitators of me and watch those who live this way—you can use us as models.
local: Taabalaa! Mɩtɩŋa payɩ ɩla ɛzɩ malakʋʋ yɔ. Ɩcɔnɩ mbá pɔɖɔŋ lidaʋ nʋmɔʋ taa ɛzɩ ɖa yɔ nɛ ɩɖɔ ḿbʋ́.

eng: As I have told you many times and now say with deep sadness, many people live as enemies of the cross.
local: Toovenim lɛ, tɔm ndʋ́ manpam-mɩ heyuu yɔ, ńdʋ́ mantasɩɣ-mɩ heyuu lɛɛlɛɛyɔ nɛ ɛsɩtɛɣlɩm. Ńdʋ́ lɛ se: ɛyáa sakɩyɛ wɛɛ nɛ pɔ-ɖɔnɛ wɩlɩɣ se pɛkɛ Krɩstʋ weyi pakam-ɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ yɔ e-koyindinaa.

eng: Their lives end with destruction. Their god is their stomach, and they take pride in their disgrace because their thoughts focus on earthly things.
local: Ɛyáa ḿbá, pɛtɛŋnɩ lebu, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, po-lotu lɛ pɛ-Ɛsɔ. Mbʋ́ pɩɩwɛɛ se pɩkpa-wɛ fɛyɛ yɔ, papɩsaa pakʋndʋʋnɩ-pʋ nɛ pamaɣzɩɣ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ yɔ, pʋ-yɔɔ ɖeke.

eng: Our citizenship is in heaven. We look forward to a savior that comes from there—the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Đa lɛ, ɖɩkɛ ɛsɔdaa kewiyaɣ taa ñɩma. Peeɖe ɖɩɖaŋnɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ se ɛkɔɔ ɛya ɖa-ñʋʋ.

eng: He will transform our humble bodies so that they are like his glorious body, by the power that also makes him able to subject all things to himself.
local: Ɛnʋ kɔŋnɩ lɛɣzʋʋ ɖo-tomnaɣ pʋtɔdɩyɛ ñɩŋga ŋgá ɖɩwɛnɩ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ yɔ nɛ kapɩsɩ koboyaɣ ñɩŋga ɛzɩ ɛ-ñɩŋga yɔ. E-ɖoŋ weyi ɛwakɩnɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ yɔ ɛlakɩnɩ ḿbʋ́.

eng: Therefore, my brothers and sisters whom I love and miss, who are my joy and crown, stand firm in the Lord. Loved ones.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, man-taabalaa kʋsɔɔlaa! Meheyiɣ-mɩ se ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ kpam mɩ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa. Mɩ-yɔɔ lɛ, ma-laŋɩyɛ hʋlʋmaa siŋŋ nɛ mankʋndʋʋnɩ-mɩ. Mɩ me-liu wɛɛ kpem se mana.

eng: I urge Euodia and I urge Syntyche to come to an agreement in the Lord.
local: Meheyiɣ Evoodi nɛ Sɛntiici se pɛwɛnɩ lɩmaɣza kʋɖʋmɛɛ pa nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ pɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa.

eng: Yes, and Im also asking you, loyal friend, to help these women who have struggled together with me in the ministry of the gospel, along with Clement and the rest of my coworkers whose names are in the scroll of life.
local: Piyele weyi ña ŋkɛ man-taabalʋ siŋŋ tʋmɩyɛ taa yɔ, mentendiɣ-ŋ ɖɔɖɔ se ŋsɩnɩ-wɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ma nɛ wɛ ɖɩlʋbɩnɩ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔɔ nɛ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ Klemaɣ nɛ taabalaa lɛlaa mbá pa-hɩla wɛ wezuu takayaɣ taa yɔ patɩŋa payɩ.

eng: Be glad in the Lord always! Again I say, be glad!.
local: Mɩ-taa ɛhʋlʋmɩ tam se mɩ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɩkpɛndaa. Mantasɩɣ-mɩ heyuu se: mɩ-taa ɛhʋlʋmɩ!.

eng: Let your gentleness show in your treatment of all people. The Lord is near.
local: Iyele nɛ mɩ nɛ ɛyáa tɩŋa pʋwɛɛ leleŋ, Kɩpaɣlʋ wɩzɩ kɔm.

eng: Dont be anxious about anything; rather, bring up all of your requests to God in your prayers and petitions, along with giving thanks.
local: Ɩtaanɩɣzɩ kaʋ. Ɛlɛ́, paa mbʋ́ pɩ-taa lɛ, ɩtɩŋnɩ Ɛsɔ sɛʋ nɛ e-tenduu pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛpɔzɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛsɩmɩyɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa pɩtɛɖɩɣ-mɩ yɔ.

eng: Then the peace of God that exceeds all understanding will keep your hearts and minds safe in Christ Jesus.
local: Pʋbʋ, Ɛsɔ laŋhɛzɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɩlɩ ɛyáa lɛɣtʋ tɩŋa payɩ yɔ, pɩtɩŋɩɣnɩ Krɩstʋ Yesu yɔɔ nɛ ɖihuuzi mɩ-laŋa nɛ mɩ-lɩmaɣza pɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: From now on, brothers and sisters, if anything is excellent and if anything is admirable, focus your thoughts on these things: all that is true, all that is holy, all that is just, all that is pure, all that is lovely, and all that is worthy of praise.
local: Taabalaa! Ndʋ́ mɛntɛzɩɣnɩ-mɩ yɔ lɛ se: ɩmaɣzɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu nɛ pʋmʋna se pasam-pʋ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ. Ḿbʋ́ yɔ: mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩkɛ toovenim yɔ nɛ mbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa se pañam-pʋ yɔ nɛ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ nɛ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ yɔ nɛ mbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa se pɔsɔɔlɩ-pʋ yɔ nɛ mbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa se payɩɣyɩ-pʋ yɔ nɛ mbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa se palabɩ-pʋ yɔ nɛ mbʋ́ pʋbʋ mʋnaa se paɖʋ-pʋ hɩɖɛ yɔ. Ɩmaɣzɩ pʋ-yɔɔ camɩyɛ.

eng: Practice these things: whatever you learned, received, heard, or saw in us. The God of peace will be with you.
local: Mbʋ́ mɛnkpɛlɩkɩ-mɩ nɛ ndʋ́ mɔyɔɔdaa nɛ ɩnɩɩ nɛ mbʋ́ malaba nɛ ɩna yɔ, ɩɖɔ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋ-yɔɔ. Peeɖe Ɛsɔ laŋhɛzɩyɛ tʋ wɛɣ mɩ-cɔlɔ.

eng: I was very glad in the Lord because now at last you have shown concern for me again.
local: Ma nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ lɛ, man-taa hʋlʋmaa siŋŋ. Man-taa hʋlʋmaa se pɩha-mɩ waɖɛ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ se ɩɖaɣnɩ mɔ-yɔɔ tɔzʋʋ. Maatɔŋ se iiyebi mɔ-yɔɔ maɣzʋʋ, ɛlɛ́, pɩtaaha-mɩ waɖɛ se ɩsɩnɩ-m.

eng: Im not saying this because I need anything, for I have learned how to be content in any circumstance.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ se nabʋyʋ tɛɖɩɣ-m yɔɔ mɔyɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́. Toovenim lɛ, mamalɩsɩ man-tɩ se paa ɛbɛ taa mɛwɛɛ yɔ, pɩtaacɛyɩ-m.

eng: I know the experience of being in need and of having more than enough; I have learned the secret to being content in any and every circumstance, whether full or hungry or whether having plenty or being poor.
local: Mɛwɛ tanɩm taa yaa mɛwɛnɩ sakɩyɛ yɔ, mansɩm man-tɩ ɖɔkʋʋ. Mamalɩsɩ man-tɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩ-taa: paa ñɔɔsɩ taa yaa haɣnaɣ taa yaa mɛwɛnɩ sakɩyɛ yaa pazɩ yɔ, mamalɩsɩ man-tɩ.

eng: I can endure all these things through the power of the one who gives me strength.
local: Krɩstʋ haɣnɩ-m ɖoŋ, ɛ-yɔɔ manpɩzɩɣ malakɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ.

eng: Still, you have done well to share my distress.
local: Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɩlabɩ ɖeu nɛ ɩsɩnɩ-m man-kʋñɔmɩŋ taa.

eng: You Philippians know from the time of my first mission work in Macedonia how no church shared in supporting my ministry except you.
local: Mɩ Filiipu Krɩstʋ ñɩma lɛ, mɩ-maɣmaɣ ɩtɛm naʋ se: alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ papazɩ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm susuu Masedonii nɛ mankʋyɩ se menkpeŋ yɔ, mɩ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma ɖeke kasɩnɩnɩ-m. Yee ḿbʋ́, ma nɛ mɩ ɖe-ɖeke koŋ ɖɩsɩnɩnɩ ɖama.

eng: I want you to know how much I struggle for you, for those in Laodicea, and for all who havent known me personally.
local: Mancaɣ se ɩna lʋbɩyɛ sɔsɔɖɛ nɖɩ́ mɛwɛɛ malʋkɩ mɩ nɛ Laodisee ñɩma nɛ mbá patɩŋa payɩ patatɩɩnadɩ ma Pɔɔlɩ mɛ-ɛsɩndaa yɔ mɩ-yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: You sent contributions repeatedly to take care of my needs even while I was in Thessalonica.
local: Maawɛ Tesalooniki lɛ, halɩ ɩtɛm-m tiyinaʋ tam naalɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɛɖaɣ-m yɔ.

eng: My goal is that their hearts would be encouraged and united together in love so that they might have all the riches of assurance that come with understanding, so that they might have the knowledge of the secret plan of God, namely Christ.
local: Malʋkɩ ḿbʋ́ se pɩlabɩ-wɛ hʋnʋm nɛ pɔsɔɔlɩ ɖama camɩyɛ nɛ papɩsɩ ɛyʋ kʋɖʋm nɛ piyele pɛtɛzɩ wɛnaʋ lɛɣtʋ. Pʋbʋ, patɩlɩɣ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ kɛmɛsaa yɔ: ḿbʋ́ lɛ Krɩstʋ.

eng: Im not hoping for a gift, but I am hoping for a profit that accumulates in your account.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ se me-liu wɛ haɖɛ yɔɔ mɔyɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́. Ɛlɛ́, mañɩnɩɣ se pɩsɛɛ-mɩ nɛ mɩ-ñɩm huúu Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ.

eng: All the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden in him.
local: Ɛ-cɔlɔ Ɛsɔ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ nɛ ɛ-lɛɣtʋ pa-ñɩm tɩŋa payɩ wɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ.

eng: I now have plenty and it is more than enough. I am full to overflowing because I received the gifts that you sent from Epaphroditus. Those gifts give off a fragrant aroma, an acceptable sacrifice that pleases God.
local: Meheyiɣ-mɩ se mbʋ́ ɩcɛlɩ Epafroditi se ɛkɔnɩ-m yɔ, mamʋ pɩtɩŋa payɩ. Pʋɖɔwa pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ. Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, mɛwɛnɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩtɛɖaɣ-m yɔ nɛ halɩ pɩɖɛɛ pʋ-yɔɔ. Mɩ-haɖɛ ńɖɩ́ ɖɩwɛ ɛzɩ kɩlaʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩlɩɣ sɔzɩŋ camɩyɛ nɛ kɩkɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ siŋŋ yɔ.

eng: Im telling you this so that no one deceives you with convincing arguments.
local: Meheyiɣ-mɩ ḿbʋ́ se nɔɔyʋ ɛtaakɔɔ ɛcɛtɩ-mɩ nɛ ɛ-nɔɔ leleŋ.

eng: My God will meet your every need out of his riches in the glory that is found in Christ Jesus.
local: Ɛzɩma mbʋ́ mɛ-Ɛsɔ wɛnɩ ñɩm siŋŋ yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ ɛtɩŋɩɣnɩ Krɩstʋ Yesu yɔɔ nɛ ɛha-mɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩtɛɖɩɣ-m yɔ.

eng: because even though I am absent physically, Im with you in spirit. Im happy to see the discipline and stability of your faith in Christ.
local: Paa mɛnfɛyɩ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ, mɛwɛɛ mamaɣzɩɣ mɩ-yɔɔ. Man-taa hʋlʋmaa, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, manaɣ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩwɛɛ ɩlakɩ ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ yɔ nɛ ɩɖɔkʋʋ mɩ-tɩ siŋŋ mi-lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩwɛnɩ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ kɩ-taa yɔ.

eng: Let glory be given to God our Father forever and always. Amen.
local: Pasa ɖa-Caa Ɛsɔ weyi ɛwɛ koboyaɣ taa tam yɔ. Pɩla ḿbʋ́!.

eng: So live in Christ Jesus the Lord in the same way as you received him.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɖenɖe itisaa se Krɩstʋ Yesu lɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔ, ɩcaɣ wezuu mɩ nɛ ɩ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa.

eng: Greet all Gods people in Christ Jesus. The brothers and sisters with me send you their greeting.
local: Ɩsɛɛ mbá patɩŋa payɩ pɛkɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩma pa nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu pɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa yɔ. Taabalaa mbá ma nɛ wɛ ɖɩwɛɛ yɔ, pɛsɛ-mɩ.

eng: Be rooted and built up in him, be established in faith, and overflow with thanksgiving just as you were taught.
local: Ɩka lila ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ ɩpaɣlɩ nɛ ɩtɛzɩ pɩʋ mi-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa ɛzɩ pawɩlʋʋ-mɩ yɔ. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, ɩsam-ɩ siŋŋ.

eng: All Gods people here, especially those in Caesars household, send you their greeting.
local: Ɛsɔ ñɩma tɩŋa payɩ mbá pɛwɛ cɩnɛ yɔ, pɛsɛ-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ. Kɔzɩkɔzɩ Room wiyaʋ sɔsɔ ɖɩɣa taa ñɩma.

eng: See to it that nobody enslaves you with philosophy and foolish deception, which conform to human traditions and the way the world thinks and acts rather than Christ.
local: Ɩkpa mɩ-tɩ ɖeu nɛ nabɛyɛ ɛtaacɛtɩ-mɩ nɛ pa-maɣmaɣ pɔ-lɔŋsɩnɖɛ tɔm. Cɛtɩm tɔm ńdʋ́, tɩɩwazɩɣ pʋyʋ. Ɛyáa sɔnzɩ nɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ ɖoŋ pɔ-cɔlɔ tɩlɩnaa. Tɩtɛkɛ Krɩstʋ ñɩndʋ.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirits.
local: Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ ɛlabɩ-mɩ lootiye.

eng: All the fullness of deity lives in Christs body.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Krɩstʋ wɛʋ yɔ, Ɛsɔ wɛ e-tomnaɣ taa pilim.

eng: And you have been filled by him, who is the head of every ruler and authority.
local: nɛ mɩ nɛ ɩ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa lɛ, ihiɣ pɩtɩŋa. Ɛnʋ kɩlɩnɩ awiya nɛ ɖoŋ tɩŋa payɩ.

eng: In him you were also circumcised with a circumcision not administered by human hands. The circumcision of Christ is realized in the stripping away of the whole self dominated by sin.
local: Mɩ nɛ ɩ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ ḿbʋ́ pɩ-taa pɛpɛlɩ-mɩ. Pɛtɛpɛlɩ-mɩ ɛzɩ ɛyáa pɛlʋʋ yɔ, ɛlɛ́, pɛpɛlɩ-mɩ ɛzɩ Krɩstʋ ɖʋʋ yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ lɛ se ɩsɛtɩ mɩ-kɩwɛɛkɩm nɛ ɩlɔ.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, and Timothy our brother.
local: Ma Pɔɔlɩ weyi pɩkɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ nɛ eyele se mɛnkɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu tiyiyu yɔ, ma nɛ taabalʋ Timootee.

eng: You were buried with him through baptism and raised with him through faith in the power of God, who raised him from the dead.
local: Palabʋ-mɩ lɩm sɔʋ sɔnzɩ yɔ, mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ pepima. Mɩ nɛ ɩ ifemna ɖɔɖɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɖoŋ weyi Ɛsɔ fezini-i nɛ sɩɖaa taa yɔ ɛ-yɔɔ.

eng: To the holy and faithful brothers and sisters in Christ in Colossae. Grace and peace to you from God our Father.
local: ɖɩmaɣnɩ takayaɣ kanɛ taabalaa Ɛsɔ ñɩma mbá mɩ ɩwɛ Koloosi nɛ ɩtɩŋɩɣ Krɩstʋ nʋmɔʋ ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ mɩ nɛ ɩ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ yɔ. Đɩsɛ-mɩ: ɖa-Caa Ɛsɔ ɛlabɩ-mɩ lootiye nɛ ɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa!.

eng: When you were dead because of the things you had done wrong and because your body wasnt circumcised, God made you alive with Christ and forgave all the things you had done wrong.
local: Đooo lɛ, ɩɩkɛ sɩɖaa mɩ-kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔɔ. Ɩɩkɛ ɖɔɖɔ sɩɖaa mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pataapɛlɩ-mɩ. Ɛlɛ́, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ Ɛsɔ tɩŋnɩ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛha-mɩ wezuu: ekpeɣ-ɖʋ ɖa-kɩwɛɛkɩm tɩŋa payɩ.

eng: We always give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩsɛɣ Ɛsɔ yɔ, ɖiiyeki-i sam mɩ-yɔɔ. Ɛnʋ lɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ Caa.

eng: He destroyed the record of the debt we owed, with its requirements that worked against us. He canceled it by nailing it to the cross.
local: Ɛkpaɣ takayaɣ ŋgá pama ka-taa kɩwɛɛkɩm mbʋ́ paɣtʋ wɩlaa se ɖɩlaba yɔ nɛ ɛkam-kɛ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ nɛ eɖizini-kɛ.

eng: Weve done this since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and your love for all Gods people.
local: Toovenim lɛ, pɔyɔɔdɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ Yesu yɔɔ yɔ nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩsɔɔlɩ Ɛsɔ ñɩma tɩŋa payɩ yɔ pʋ-tɔm nɛ ɖɩnɩɩ.

eng: When he disarmed the rulers and authorities, he exposed them to public disgrace by leading them in a triumphal parade.
local: Ḿbʋ́ Ɛsɔ lɩzɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ ɛsɔdaa nɛ tataa yɔ pu-ɖoŋ nɛ eyele nɛ ɛyáa tɩŋa na-pʋ nɛ pɩwɩlɩ se ɛtɩŋnɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ nɛ ɛwabɩ-pʋ.

eng: You have this faith and love because of the hope reserved for you in heaven. You previously heard about this hope through the true message, the good news.
local: Đaŋʋʋ mbʋ́ ɩɖaŋ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ kɔñɔɔzaa nɛ ɛsɩɩ-mɩ ɛsɔdaa yɔ, pʋ-yɔɔ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ nɛ sɔɔlɩm ḿbʋ́. Đaŋʋʋ ḿbʋ́, pʋ-tɔm paacalɩ-mɩ heyuu alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ posusaɣ-mɩ toovenim tɔm yɔ. Ńdʋ́ lɛ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm.

eng: So dont let anyone judge you about eating or drinking or about a festival, a new moon observance, or sabbaths.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtaaha nɔɔyʋ waɖɛ se ɛkpɛzɩnɩ-mɩ mbʋ́ ɩtɔkɩ yaa ɩñɔʋ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ yaa mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se ɩla kazandʋ natʋyʋ wiye yaa ɩla alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ fenaɣ kɩfalaɣ lɩɣ yɔ yaa kɩyakʋ kɩhɛzʋʋ wiye yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: which has come to you. This message has been bearing fruit and growing among you since the day you heard and truly understood Gods grace, in the same way that it is bearing fruit and growing in the whole world.
local: Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ńdʋ́, tɩtalɩ mɩ-tɛ ɛzɩ tɩcɔʋ kedeŋa kpeekpe yɔɔ ɛyáa cɔlɔ nɛ tɩlabɩ-wɛ tʋmɩyɛ siŋŋ yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ tɩlabɩ-mɩ tʋmɩyɛ kpaɣ ɖooo kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩnɩ Ɛsɔ lootiye tɔm nɛ ɩtɩlɩ-ɖɩ kpem yɔ.

eng: These religious practices are only a shadow of what was coming—the body that cast the shadow is Christ.
local: Pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩkɛ mbʋ́ pɩkaɣ kɔm yɔ pɩ-kɩlɛmʋʋ. Ḿbʋ́ lɛ Krɩstʋ.

eng: You learned it from Epaphras, who is the fellow slave we love and Christs faithful minister for your sake.
local: Ńdʋ́ ɖɛ-ɛgbaɣdʋ Epafraasɩ weyi ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ yɔ, ɛwɩlɩ-mɩ. Ɛkɛ Krɩstʋ tʋmlaɖʋ mɩ-cɔlɔ, ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ.

eng: Dont let anyone who wants to practice harsh self-denial and worship angels rob you of the prize. They go into detail about what they have seen in visions and have become unjustifiably arrogant by their selfish way of thinking.
local: Ɩtaayele nɛ mbá pawaɣnɩ se poluzuu pa-tɩ nɛ poluŋuu Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa tɛɛ yɔ, pa-taa nɔɔyʋ kʋ mɩ-tɔm. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pakpakɩɣ po-ɖozee payaɣ pʋyʋ nɛ pakpazɩɣ pa-tɩ nɛ pa-maɣmaɣ pa-lɩmaɣza. Ŋgʋ́, akɛ ɛyáa lɩmaɣza yem.

eng: He informed us of your love in the Spirit.
local: Ɛnʋ heyini-ɖʋ sɔɔlɩm mbʋ́ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yeba nɛ pʋwɛɛ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ pʋ-tɔm.

eng: They dont stay connected to the head. The head nourishes and supports the whole body through the joints and ligaments, so the body grows with a growth that is from God.
local: Weyi ɛlakɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɛ nɛ Krɩstʋ pɛfɛyɩ ɖama taa. Ŋgʋ́, ɛ́lɛ́ lɛ tomnaɣ ñʋʋ. Ñʋʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kiyekina nɛ hola nɛ ɖɩtanɛ pɛkpɛndɩ ɖama nɛ papaɣlɩ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ liu wɛʋ yɔ.

eng: Because of this, since the day we heard about you, we havent stopped praying for you and asking for you to be filled with the knowledge of Gods will, with all wisdom and spiritual understanding.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yebina nɛ kpaɣ ɖooo kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɖɩnɩ tɔm ńdʋ́ yɔ, ɖɩwɛɛ ɖitendiɣ Ɛsɔ mɩ-yɔɔ se ɛha-mɩ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu lɔŋsɩnɖɛ nɛ kɩ-lɛɣtʋ nɛ ɩtɩlɩ mbʋ́ e-liu wɛɛ yɔ camɩyɛ.

eng: If you died with Christ to the way the world thinks and acts, why do you submit to rules and regulations as though you were living in the world?.
local: Mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ ɩsɩbɩna nɛ pɩlɩzɩ-mɩ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ ɖoŋ nesi taa. Yee ḿbʋ́ lɛ, pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ ɩɖaɣnɩɣ wezuu caɣʋ ɛzɩ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ ñɩma nɛ iyeki mɩ-tɩ nɛ paɖʋʋ-mɩ paɣtʋ se:.

eng: Were praying this so that you can live lives that are worthy of the Lord and pleasing to him in every way: by producing fruit in every good work and growing in the knowledge of God;.
local: Pʋbʋ, ɩɖɔŋ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛsɩndaa ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ yɔ nɛ pɩkɛdɩnɩ-ɩ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa. Peeɖe ɩlakɩ tʋma kɩbana ndɩ ndɩ nɛ ɩtɛzɩ Ɛsɔ tɩlʋʋ kpem.

eng: Dont handle! Dont taste! Dont touch.
local: «Taakpaɣ pʋnɛ» «Taaɖɩŋ ḿbʋ́ yɔ» Yaa «Taatukuni pʋnɛ yɔ»?.

eng: by being strengthened through his glorious might so that you endure everything and have patience;.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ pɩtɩŋnɩ e-ɖoŋ koboyaɣ ñɩŋ yɔɔ nɛ ɩkpa ɖoŋ siŋŋ nɛ ɩpɩzɩ ɩñaɣ pana nɛ ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-hɔ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa nɛ.

eng: All these things cease to exist when they are used. Such rules are human commandments and teachings.
local: Pʋnɛ pɩtɩŋa payɩ, palakɩnɩ-pʋ tʋmɩyɛ nɛ pɩtɛmnɩ mʋʋ́ʋ. Ɛyáa yem ɖʋnɩ-pʋ nɛ pawɩlɩɣ.

eng: and by giving thanks with joy to the Father. He made it so you could take part in the inheritance, in light granted to Gods holy people.
local: ɩsa Caa nɛ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ. Ɛnʋ yebina se mɩ nɛ ɛ-ñɩma ɩtayɩ ñɩm mbʋ́ ɛñɔɔzaa nɛ ɛsɩɩ-wɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ taa yɔ.

eng: They look like they are wise with this self-made religion and their self-denial by the harsh treatment of the body, but they are no help against indulging in selfish immoral behavior.
local: Toovenim lɛ, tɩwɛ ɛsɛ yɔɔ ɛzɩ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, tiyeki nɛ poluŋuu Ɛsɔ tɛɛ ɛzɩ pa-maɣmaɣ paɖʋʋ yɔ. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, poluzuu pa-tɩ nɛ paɖʋʋ pa-tɩ kʋñɔŋ. Ɛlɛ́, pɩfɛyɩnɩ wazaɣ nakɛyɛ, pa-maɣmaɣ pɩkɛdɩɣna.

eng: He rescued us from the control of darkness and transferred us into the kingdom of the Son he loves.
local: Ɛlɩzɩ-ɖʋ cɩkpɛndʋʋ ɖoŋ taa nɛ ewoni-ɖʋ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ kewiyaɣ taa.

eng: He set us free through the Son and forgave our sins.
local: Ɛ́lɛ́ holini-ɖʋ nɛ ɖa-kɩwɛɛkɩm taa nɛ ekpeɣ-ɖʋ-pʋ.

eng: The Son is the image of the invisible God, the one who is first over all creation.
local: Ɛsɔ wɛʋ yɔ, paanaɣ-ɩ, ɛlɛ́, Krɩstʋ lɛ ɛ-lɛzʋʋ. Ɛnʋ lɛ kajalaɣ tʋ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ Ɛsɔ laba yɔ pɩ-taa.

eng: Because all things were created by him: both in the heavens and on the earth, the things that are visible and the things that are invisible. Whether they are thrones or powers, or rulers or authorities, all things were created through him and for him.
local: Ɛ-yɔɔ ɛ́lɛ́ tɩŋnaa nɛ ɛla pɩtɩŋa payɩ. Ɛlabɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɛsɔdaa nɛ tataa yɔ, mbʋ́ panaɣ yɔ nɛ mbʋ́ paanaɣ yɔ. Ɛnʋ labɩnɩ awiya sɔsɔna nɛ cikpena nɛ ɖoŋ ndɩ ndɩ. Ɛ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ tɩŋnaa nɛ ɛla pɩtɩŋa payɩ nɛ ɛtɩɣyɩ-pʋ.

eng: He existed before all things, and all things are held together in him.
local: Ɛɛwɛɛ nɛ pʋcɔ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛɛ nɛ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛɛ pu-lona taa ɛ-yɔɔ.

eng: He is the head of the body, the church, who is the beginning, the one who is firstborn from among the dead so that he might occupy the first place in everything.
local: Ɛnʋ lɛ ñʋʋ nɛ e-tomnaɣ lɛ ɛ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma. Ɛnʋ lɛ kiɖe, ɛnʋ calɩnɩ fem nɛ sɩɖaa taa se ɛkɛ kajalaɣ tʋ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa.

eng: Because all the fullness of God was pleased to live in him.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩkɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ nɛ eyele ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛwɛɛ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-taa pilim.

eng: and he reconciled all things to himself through him— whether things on earth or in the heavens. He brought peace through the blood of his cross.
local: Ɛ-yɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ Ɛsɔ tɩŋnaa nɛ eyele se ɛ nɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa pʋwɛ tataa nɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ, peceɣ. Calɩm mbʋ́ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ ɛnʋ ɛkpɛdɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ yɔ, pʋ-yɔɔ ɛtɩŋnaa nɛ ɛla ḿbʋ́ nɛ ɛkɔnɩ laŋhɛzɩyɛ.

eng: Once you were alienated from God and you were enemies with him in your minds, which was shown by your evil actions.
local: Đooo lɛ, mɩ ɖɔɖɔ mɩ nɛ Ɛsɔ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa katayaa nɛ ɩkɛ e-koyindinaa mɩ-lɩmaɣza kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ nɛ mɩ-ɛzaɣ́tʋ lakasɩ pɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: But now he has reconciled you by his physical body through death, to present you before God as a people who are holy, faultless, and without blame.
local: Ɛlɛ́, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ Ɛsɔ tɩŋnɩ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ sɩm yɔɔ nɛ mɩ nɛ ɩ iceɣ se ɛpɩzɩ ewoni-mɩ ɛ-ɛsɩndaa nɛ ɩkɛ ɛ-ñɩma nɛ ɩwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ nɛ pataana kawanaɣ nakɛyɛ mɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: But you need to remain well established and rooted in faith and not shift away from the hope given in the good news that you heard. This message has been preached throughout all creation under heaven. And I, Paul, became a servant of this good news.
local: Yee toovenim taa ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ ḿbʋ́ nɛ ɩkpa ɖoŋ siŋŋ nɛ itelesi mɩ-ɖaŋʋʋ yɔ, pɩlakɩ ḿbʋ́. Đaŋʋʋ ḿbʋ́, Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ndʋ́ ɩnɩwa yɔ, tɩ-yɔɔ pɩtɩŋnaa nɛ ɩɖaŋ. Ńdʋ́ posusi kedeŋa kpeekpe yɔɔ nɛ ma Pɔɔlɩ manpɩsɩ tɩ-tʋmlaɖʋ.

eng: Now Im happy to be suffering for you. Im completing what is missing from Christs sufferings with my own body. Im doing this for the sake of his body, which is the church.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, man-taa hʋlʋmɩnɩ kʋñɔŋ ŋgʋ́ mɔntɔkɩ mɩ-yɔɔ yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mɛntɛzɩɣ tɔɔʋ kʋñɔŋ ŋgʋ́ pɩɩkazaa se Krɩstʋ ɛtɔɔ e-tomnaɣ pilinzi yɔɔ yɔ. E-tomnaɣ ŋ́gá lɛ ɛ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma.

eng: I became a servant of the church by Gods commission, which was given to me for you, in order to complete Gods word.
local: Manpɩsɩ pa-tʋmlaɖʋ: Ɛsɔ ɖʋnɩ-m se malɩzɩ-mɩ ɛ-tɔm tɔbʋʋ siŋŋ.

eng: Im completing it with a secret plan that has been hidden for ages and generations but which has now been revealed to his holy people.
local: Đooo lɛ, tɩɩwɛ kpaɖɩŋ tɩŋa taa ɛyáa mɛsaɣ tɛɛ, ɛlɛ́ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, ekuli tɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ ɛ-ñɩma.

eng: God wanted to make the glorious riches of this secret plan known among the Gentiles, which is Christ living in you, the hope of glory.
local: E-liu wɛɛ se patɩlɩ ñɩm sɔsɔm mbʋ́ pʋwɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ nɛ posusuu pʋ-tɔm ajɛya kpeekpe taa yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ lɛ se: Krɩstʋ wɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ. Ɛnʋ yekina nɛ ɩɖaŋ se ɩkɔŋ sʋʋ Ɛsɔ koboyaɣ taa.

eng: This is what we preach as we warn and teach every person with all wisdom so that we might present each one mature in Christ.
local: Ɛ-tɔm ɖisusuu nɛ ɖɩkaŋ paa weyi ɛ-ñʋʋ taa nɛ ɖɩwɩlɩɣ-ɩ nɛ ɖɔ-lɔŋsɩnɖɛ tɩŋa. Đɩlakɩ ḿbʋ́ se pɩtɩŋnɩ ɛ nɛ Krɩstʋ pɛ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛpɩɩ.

eng: I work hard and struggle for this goal with his energy, which works in me powerfully.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mankʋʋ man-tɩ nɛ tʋmɩyɛ nɛ e-ɖoŋ seɣtiɣ-m siŋŋ nɛ malʋkɩ.

eng: Masters, be just and fair to your slaves, knowing that you yourselves have a master in heaven.
local: Mɩ caanaa lɛ, ɩtɔzɩ se mɩ ɖɔɖɔ ɩwɛnɩ Caa nɔɔyʋ ɛsɔdaa. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩla mi-yomaa mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa nɛ pɩtɛ pʋmʋna yɔ.

eng: Therefore, if you were raised with Christ, look for the things that are above where Christ is sitting at Gods right side.
local: Mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ ifemna nɛ ɩlɩɩnɩ sɩɖaa taa. Yee ḿbʋ́, ɩñɩnɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɛsɔdaa ɖenɖe ɛcaɣ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ lone kɩbanɖɛ taa yɔ.

eng: Keep on praying and guard your prayers with thanksgiving.
local: Mɩ-ɛsɩyɛ ɛsɛɛnɩ Ɛsɔ sɛʋ nɛ piyele ɩcaɣnɩ mɩ-ɛsɛ nɛ ɩsam-ɩ.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy. To the Thessalonians church that is in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ. Grace and peace to all of you.
local: Ma Pɔɔlɩ, ma nɛ Silaasɩ nɛ Timootee ɖɩmaɣnɩ takayaɣ kanɛ. Đɩmaɣ-kɛ Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma mbá mɩ ɩwɛ Tesalooniki nɛ ɩkɛ Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ pa-ñɩma yɔ. Đɩsɛ-mɩ: Ɛsɔ ɛlabɩ-mɩ lootiye nɛ ɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa!.

eng: Think about the things above and not things on earth.
