local: Mɩ-ɛsɩyɛ ɛsɛɛnɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ nɛ iyele mbʋ́ pʋwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ yɔ pʋ-tɔm.

eng: We always thank God for all of you when we mention you constantly in our prayers.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ tɩtɩŋa ɖɩtɔzʋʋ mɩ-yɔɔ ɖɛ-Ɛsɔ sɛtʋ taa yɔ, ɖɩsaŋ-ɩ mɩtɩŋa payɩ mɩ-yɔɔ tam.

eng: At the same time, pray for us also. Pray that God would open a door for the word so we can preach the secret plan of Christ—which is why Im in chains.
local: Itendi-i ɖɔɖɔ ɖɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛha-ɖʋ nʋmɔʋ nɛ ɖisusi ɛ-tɔm nɛ ɖɩpɩzɩ ɖɩlɩzɩ Krɩstʋ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩwɛ ɛyáa tɩŋa mɛsaɣ tɛɛ yɔ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ. Tɩ-yɔɔ mɛwɛ salaka taa lɛɛlɛɛyɔ.

eng: You died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩsɩba nɛ mi-wezuu mɛlɩ Krɩstʋ cɔlɔ ɛ nɛ Ɛsɔ pɛ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ.

eng: This is because we remember your work that comes from faith, your effort that comes from love, and your perseverance that comes from hope in our Lord Jesus Christ in the presence of our God and Father.
local: Đɩtɔzʋʋ tam ɖa-Caa Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ siŋŋ nɛ ɩlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ yɔ nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ mɩ-sɔɔlɩm yeba nɛ ɩwɛɛ kpekpeka yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ. Đɩtɔzʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩɖaŋ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ kpam yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: Pray that I might be able to make it as clear as I ought to when I preach.
local: Itendi-i se eyele nɛ monsusi-tʋ kpayɩ kpayɩ ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ.

eng: When Christ, who is your life, is revealed, then you also will be revealed with him in glory.
local: Ɛnʋ lɛ mi-wezuu. Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛkɔŋ yɔ, mɩ nɛ ɩ ɖɔɖɔ ɩkɔŋnɩ lɩʋ koboyaɣ taa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you are loved by God, and we know that he has chosen you.
local: Taabalaa! Đɩnawa se Ɛsɔ sɔɔlɩ-mɩ nɛ ɛlɩzɩ-mɩ se ɩkɛ ɛ-ñɩma.

eng: Act wisely toward outsiders, making the most of the opportunity.
local: Ɩɖɔmnɩ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Krɩstʋ ñɩma yɔ pɔ-cɔlɔ. Ɩtaayele alɩwaatʋ nɛ tɩɖɛɛ yem.

eng: So put to death the parts of your life that belong to the earth, such as sexual immorality, moral corruption, lust, evil desire, and greed .
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ipi kedeŋa lakasɩ kɩdɛkɛdɩsɩ nzɩ́ ɩlakɩ yɔ. Ńzɩ́ yɔ: acɛyɛ nɛ azuluma lakasɩ nɛ sɔɔlɩm kɩdɛkɛdɩm nɛ lɩmaɣza kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ nɛ ñɩm laɣzaɣ. Pʋbʋ ñɛwɛ ɛzɩ agɔlɩma kpɛyʋʋ yɔ.

eng: We know this because our good news didnt come to you just in speech but also with power and the Holy Spirit and with deep conviction. You know as well as we do what kind of people we were when we were with you, which was for your sake.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ndʋ́ ɖisusi-mɩ yɔ, pɩtɛkɛ nɔɔ taa yem ɖɩlaba. Ɛlɛ́, pɩtɩŋnɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔ nɛ ɩna ti-ɖoŋ nɛ ɛzɩma ɖɩtaɣ-tʋ liu siŋŋ yɔ. Mɩ-maɣmaɣ ɩna ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɖɩcaɣ wezuu mɩ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ, ɖɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se pɩsɩnɩ-mɩ.

eng: Your speech should always be gracious and sprinkled with insight so that you may know how to respond to every person.
local: Mɩ-nɔɔ taa tɔm ɛwɛɛ leleŋ nɛ tɩwɛnɩ kɛzɛɣa siŋŋ nɛ piyele ɩtɩlɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se icosi paa weyi yɔ.

eng: The wrath of God is coming upon disobedient people because of these things.
local: Ɛsɔ pana kɔŋ kpanaʋ mbá palakɩ pɩtɛ lakasɩ sɩnɛ yɔ.

eng: You became imitators of us and of the Lord when you accepted the message that came from the Holy Spirit with joy in spite of great suffering.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yebina nɛ ɩtɩŋ ɖa nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɖa-nʋmɔʋ. Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ itisi Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔ, ɩtɔɔ kʋñɔŋ siŋŋ. Ɛlɛ́, Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu kasɩnɩ-mɩ nɛ ɩwɛɛ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ taa.

eng: Tychicus, our dearly loved brother, faithful minister, and fellow slave in the Lord, will inform you about everything that has happened to me.
local: Piyele mɔn-tɔm lɛ, man-taabalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ Ticiiki kɔŋnɩ-mɩ tɩtɩŋa payɩ kɛdʋʋ. Ma nɛ ɩ ɖɩlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ ɖa nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ. Ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ.

eng: You used to live this way, when you were alive to these things.
local: Đooo lɛ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ ɩlakaɣ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɩɩwɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm ḿbʋ́ pɩ-taa yɔ.

eng: As a result you became an example to all the believers in Macedonia and Achaia.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ ɩpɩsɩ mbá pawɩlɩɣ nʋmɔʋ mbá patɩŋa payɩ pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ Masedonii nɛ Akayɩ pa-ageeta taa yɔ.

eng: This is why I sent him to you, so that youll know all about us and so he can encourage your hearts.
local: Mentiyiɣni-mɩ-ɩ faŋŋ se eheyi-mɩ mbʋ́ pɩ-taa ɖɩwɛɛ yɔ nɛ ɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa.

eng: But now set aside these things, such as anger, rage, malice, slander, and obscene language.
local: Ɛlɛ́ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, mɩ ɖɔɖɔ ɩhɔzɩ pɩtɩŋa: pana nɛ pana kadadaɣyaɣ nɛ kañatʋ nɛ tʋtʋ nɛ tɔm ɛzaɣ́tʋ ndʋ́ tɩlɩɣnɩ mɩ-nɔɔ taa yɔ patɩŋa payɩ nɛ ɩlɔ.

eng: The message about the Lord rang out from you, not only in Macedonia and Achaia but in every place. The news about your faithfulness to God has spread so that we dont even need to mention it.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Kɩpaɣlʋ tɔm lɩnɩ mɩ-tɛ nɛ tɩcɔʋ ageeta ana a-taa. Ɛlɛ́, pɩtasɩɩnɩ a-taa ɖeke, tɩcɔ paa le nɛ ɛyáa na ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩtacazɩ pɔzʋʋ se ɖɩyɔɔdɩ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: I sent him with Onesimus, our faithful and dearly loved brother, who is one of you. They will let you know about everything here.
local: Ɛ nɛ mɩ-tɛ tʋ Onezim mentiyiɣ. Ɛkɛ man-taabalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ, ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ. Ḿbá kɔŋnɩ-mɩ kɛdʋʋ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩlakɩ cɩnɛ yɔ.

eng: Dont lie to each other. Take off the old human nature with its practices.
local: Đɔɖɔ lɛ, ɩtaacɛtɩ ɖama, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩhɔzɩ ɖooo mɩ-wɛtʋ kɩbɩndʋ nɛ tɩ-lakasɩ nɛ ɩlɔ.

eng: People tell us about what sort of welcome we had from you and how you turned to God from idols. As a result, you are serving the living and true God.
local: Pa-maɣmaɣ pɛkɛdɩɣ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩmʋ-ɖʋ mɩ-tɛ yɔ pʋ-tɔm nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩha agɔlɩma siɣ́ye nɛ ɩnɩɣnɩ Ɛsɔ wezuu tʋ nɛ toovenim tʋ tʋmɩyɛ.

eng: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner, says hello to you. So does Mark, Barnabas cousin .
local: Aristaarkɩ weyi ma nɛ ɩ ɖɩwɛ salaka taa yɔ, ɛsɛ-mɩ. Barnaabaasɩ ɖɛtʋ Maarkɩ sɛ-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ. Ɛ-tɔm paaheyi-mɩ se ɛtalɩ mɩ-tɛ lɛ, ɩmʋ-ɩ camɩyɛ.

eng: and put on the new nature, which is renewed in knowledge by conforming to the image of the one who created it.
local: nɛ ɩlɛɣzɩ kɩfatʋ. Ńdʋ́ wɛɣnɩ lɛɣzʋʋ yɔɔ ḿbʋ́ nɛ ɩkɔɔ ɩtɛzɩ tɩlʋʋ pɩtɩŋa payɩ. Ḿbʋ́ weyi ɛma-mɩ yɔ, ɛwɛɛ.

eng: and you are waiting for his Son from heaven. His Son is Jesus, who is the one he raised from the dead and who is the one who will rescue us from the coming wrath.
local: se ɩɖaŋ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ weyi ɛlɩɣnɩ ɛsɔdaa se ɛkɔɔ yɔ. Ɛnʋ lɛ Yesu weyi efezi-i nɛ sɩɖaa taa yɔ. Ɛnʋ lɩzɩɣnɩ-ɖʋ Ɛsɔ pana wena akɔŋ-ɖʋ kpanaʋ yɔ a-taa.

eng: Jesus, called Justus, also says hello. These are my only fellow workers for Gods kingdom who are Jewish converts. They have been an encouragement to me.
local: Yesu weyi payaɣ ɖɔɖɔ se Yustuusi yɔ, ɛsɛ-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ. Yuda ñɩma taa lɛ, pa-naadozo pe-ɖeke pasɩŋnɩnɩ-m Ɛsɔ Kewiyaɣ tʋmɩyɛ labʋ nɛ piyele pɩlabɩ-m hʋnʋm.

eng: In this image there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcised nor uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave nor free, but Christ is all things and in all people.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́, tayʋʋ nabʋyʋ fɛyɩ Yuda ñɩma nɛ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ, mbá pɛpɛlɩ-wɛ yɔ nɛ kɩtɛpɛlɩŋ, mbá pɛ-ɛsɛ kulaa yɔ nɛ mbá pa-ñɩna tokuli yɔ, nɛ yomaa nɛ mbá pɛwɛ pa-tɩ yɔɔ yɔ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa. Ɛlɛ́, Krɩstʋ wɛ patɩŋa payɩ pɔ-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛkɛnɩ-wɛ pɩtɩŋa.

eng: Epaphras, who is one of you, says hello. Hes a slave of Christ Jesus who always wrestles for you in prayers so that you will stand firm and be fully mature and complete in the entire will of God.
local: Epafraasɩ weyi ɛ-tɛ mɩ-tɛ ɖɔɖɔ yɔ, ɛsɛ-mɩ. Ɛkɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu tʋmlaɖʋ, ɛwɛɛ ɛlʋkɩ mɩ-yɔɔ ɛ-Ɛsɔ sɛtʋ taa se ɩsɩŋ mi-ɖeɖe ḿbʋ́ mi-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa nɛ ɩtɛzɩ pɩʋ nɛ ɩtɩlɩ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ siŋŋ.

eng: Therefore, as Gods choice, holy and loved, put on compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience.
local: Đama pʋtɔdɩyɛ naʋ siŋŋ nɛ camɩyɛ lakasɩ nɛ tɩ luzuu nɛ leleŋ wɛʋ nɛ hɔyɛ ɖɔkʋʋ, pɛkɛnɩ-mɩ wondu nɛ isuu. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ sɔɔlɩ-mɩ nɛ ɛlɩzɩ-mɩ se ɩkɛ ɛ-ñɩma.

eng: I can vouch for him that he has worked hard for you and for those in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
local: Malɩzɩɣ ɛ-aseɣɖe se ɛñakɩ pana siŋŋ mɩ nɛ Laodisee nɛ Iyerapoolisi ñɩma mɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: Be tolerant with each other and, if someone has a complaint against anyone, forgive each other. As the Lord forgave you, so also forgive each other.
local: Ɩɖɔkɩ ɖama camɩyɛ nɛ ikpeɣiɣ ɖama. Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛyʋsɩnɩ-ŋ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ŋkpeɣ-i ɛzɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ kpeɣu-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ yɔ.

eng: Luke, the dearly loved physician, and Demas say hello.
local: Taabalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ Luka weyi ɛkɛ ɖɔkɔtɔ yɔ nɛ Demaasɩ pɛsɛ-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: And over all these things put on love, which is the perfect bond of unity.
local: Ɩtɛm-tʋ suu payɩ lɛ, sɔɔlɩm ɛkɛnɩ-mɩ tambaɖɛ nɛ ɩtam-ɖɩ: ḿbʋ́ kpɛndɩɣnɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ nɛ pɩtɛzɩ wɛʋ ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ yɔ.

eng: Say hello to the brothers and sisters in Laodicea, along with Nympha and the church that meets in her house.
local: Ɩsɛɛ taabalaa mbá pɛwɛ Laodisee yɔ. Ɩsɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ Nimfaa nɛ Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma mbá pekpeɣliɣ ɛ-ɖɩɣa taa yɔ.

eng: The peace of Christ must control your hearts—a peace into which you were called in one body. And be thankful people.
local: Iyele nɛ Krɩstʋ laŋhɛzɩyɛ la tʋmɩyɛ mɩ-laŋa taa, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩ-tɔm taa Ɛsɔ ya-mɩ nɛ ɩkpɛndɩ ɖama nɛ ɩpɩsɩ ɛyʋ kʋɖʋm. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩwɛnɩ ɛsɩmɩyɛ.

eng: After this letter has been read to you publicly, make sure that the church in Laodicea reads it and that you read the one from Laodicea.
local: Ɩtɛm takayaɣ kanɛ kalʋʋ mɩ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma ɛsɩndaa lɛ, iyele nɛ Laodisee ñɩma kalɩ-kɛ ɖɔɖɔ ḿbʋ́. Mɩ mɩkalɩ ɖɔɖɔ ŋgá paba tiyiɣni-mɩ yɔ .

eng: The word of Christ must live in you richly. Teach and warn each other with all wisdom by singing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs. Sing to God with gratitude in your hearts.
local: Iyele ɖɔɖɔ nɛ Krɩstʋ tɔm su mɩ-taa ɖo: ɩkpɛlɩkɩ ɖama nɛ ɩka ɖama ñʋŋ taa nɛ mɩ-lɔŋsɩnɖɛ tɩŋa. Itee hendu nɛ ɩsa Ɛsɔ nɛ mɩ-laŋɩyɛ tɩŋa pilim e-lootiye yɔɔ: ɩyaa keɣsi nɛ itee-i hendu ndʋ́ ndʋ́ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu wɩlɩɣ-mɩ yɔ.

eng: And tell Archippus, See to it that you complete the ministry that you received in the Lord.
local: Iheyi Arciipu se ɛ́ɖɔ́kɩ ɛ-tɩ nɛ tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ etisaa nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɖʋzɩ e-nesi taa yɔ nɛ ɛpɩzɩ ɛlabɩ-ɖɩ.

eng: Whatever you do, whether in speech or action, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus and give thanks to God the Father through him.
local: Đɔɖɔ lɛ, mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɩlakɩ yaa ndʋ́ ɩyɔɔdʋʋ yɔ, ɩlabɩ-pʋ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu yɔɔ nɛ pɩtɩŋnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ ɩsa Caa Ɛsɔ.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting personally. Remember that Im in prison. Grace be with you.
local: Ma Pɔɔlɩ, ma-maɣmaɣ mamaɣnɩ tɔm pee anɛ nɛ me-nesi. Ana lɛ se: mɛnsɛ-mɩ. Ɩtɔzɩ se mɛwɛ salaka taa. Ɛsɔ ɛlabɩ-mɩ lootiye!.

eng: Wives, submit to your husbands in a way that is appropriate in the Lord.
local: Mɩ halaa lɛ, paa weyi eluzi ɛ-tɩ ɛ-walʋ tɛɛ ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ mɩ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa yɔ.

eng: Husbands, love your wives and dont be harsh with them.
local: Piyele mɩ walaa lɛ, paa weyi ɛsɔɔlɩ ɛ-halʋ, ɛtaañɩŋnɩ-ɩ.

eng: Children, obey your parents in everything, because this pleases the Lord.
local: Mɩ piya lɛ, ɩña mɩ-ñɩma pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ḿbʋ́ kɛdɩnɩnɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ.

eng: Parents, dont provoke your children in a way that ends up discouraging them.
local: Mɩ piya caanaa lɛ, ɩtaañasɩ-sɩ tɔm, pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, pitiki si-toma taa.

eng: Slaves, obey your masters on earth in everything. Dont just obey like people pleasers when they are watching. Instead, obey with the single motivation of fearing the Lord.
local: Mɩ yomaa lɛ, ɩña kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ mɩ-caanaa pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩ-taa. Ɩtaañam-wɛ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pɛwɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ nɛ pɔcɔŋnɩ-mɩ yɔ tɩ-taa ɖeke se pasam-mɩ. Ɛlɛ́, ɩñam-wɛ toovenim taa, ñamtʋ ndʋ́ ɩñaŋ Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: Whatever you do, do it from the heart for the Lord and not for people.
local: Paa tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ paɖʋ-mɩ yɔ, ɩlabɩ-ɖɩ nɛ mɩ-laŋɩyɛ tɩŋa pilim. Ɩtaalabɩ-ɖɩ ɛzɩ ɛyáa ɩlakɩ-ɖɩ yɔ, ɛlɛ́, ɩlabɩ-ɖɩ ɛzɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɩlakɩ-ɖɩ yɔ.

eng: You know that you will receive an inheritance as a reward. You serve the Lord Christ.
local: Ɩtɔzɩ se ɛkɔŋ-mɩ hɛyʋʋ ñɩm mbʋ́ ɛñɔɔzaa nɛ ɛɖaŋnɩ ɛ-ñɩma yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Caa weyi ɩlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ ńɖɩ́ yɔ, ɛnʋ lɛ Krɩstʋ.

eng: But evildoers will receive their reward for their evil actions. There is no discrimination.
local: Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ pɩtatʋʋzɩ yɔ, pɩ-kɩhɛyʋʋ ɛkɔŋ mʋ́ʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ ɛɛcɔŋnɩ nɔɔyʋ ɛsɩndaa se pʋcɔ ɛlabɩ-ɩ pʋyʋ.

eng: As you yourselves know, brothers and sisters, our visit with you wasnt a waste of time.
local: Taabalaa! Mɩ-maɣmaɣ ɩtɛm naʋ se pɩtɛkɛ falaa ɖɩkɔm mɩ-tɛ.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, we ask and encourage you in the Lord Jesus to keep living the way you already are and even do better in how you live and please God—just as you learned from us.
local: Taabalaa! Đɩɩkpɛlɩkɩ-mɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se ɩɖɔ nɛ pɩkɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ yɔ. Paa pɩɩla ɛzɩma, ḿbʋ́ ɩɖɔŋ. Ɛlɛ́, tɔm ndʋ́ ɖɩtɛzɩɣnɩ-mɩ yɔ lɛ se ɖɩsazɩɣ-mɩ nɛ ɖiheyiɣ-mɩ ɖa nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa se: ɩla nɛ pɩkɩlɩ ḿbʋ́!.

eng: On the contrary, we had the courage through God to speak Gods good news in spite of a lot of opposition, although we had already suffered and were publicly insulted in Philippi, as you know.
local: Ɩtɛm naʋ ɖɔɖɔ se pʋcɔ ɖɩtalɩ mɩ-tɛ lɛ, ɖɩɩlaba kʋñɔŋ siŋŋ nɛ patʋʋ-ɖʋ Filiipu tɛtʋ taa. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, ɛyáa cɛyaɣ-ɖʋ siŋŋ mɩ-tɛ. Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, Ɛsɔ yeba nɛ ɖisusi-mɩ ɛ-Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm kaalɛyɩtʋ.

eng: You know the instructions we gave you through the Lord Jesus.
local: Toovenim lɛ, ɩsɩm tɔm ndʋ́ ɖiheyi-mɩ nɛ ɛ-nɔɔ se ɩɖɔ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: Our appeal isnt based on false information, the wrong motives, or deception.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩtɛkɛ nʋmɔʋ kilebuu tɔm yaa cɛtɩm tɔm yaa lɩmaɣza kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ tɔm ɖɩsazɩɣnɩ ɛyáa.

eng: Gods will is that your lives are dedicated to him. This means that you stay away from sexual immorality.
local: Mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ lɛ se: ɩtɛzɩ wɛʋ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ. Ḿbʋ́ lɛ se ɩkpa mɩ-tɩ nɛ acɛyɛ labʋ.

eng: Rather, we have been examined and approved by God to be trusted with the good news, and thats exactly how we speak. We arent trying to please people, but we are trying to please God, who continues to examine our hearts.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɖɩyɔɔdʋʋ tam ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ liu wɛʋ yɔ: ɛmaɣzɩ-ɖʋ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛ́ɖʋzɩ ɖe-nesi taa ɛ-Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm. Pɩtɛkɛ se ɖɩñɩnɩɣ se ɖɔ-tɔm ɛkɛdɩnɩ ɛyáa, ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ ɖɩñɩnɩɣ se tɩkɛdɩna, ɛnʋ naɣnɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖa-laŋa taa yɔ.

eng: and learn how to control your own body in a pure and respectable way.
local: Paa mɩ-taa weyi ɛtɩlɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se ɛ nɛ ɛ-halʋ pacaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa yɔ nɛ pʋɖʋ-mɩ hɩɖɛ.

eng: As you know, we never used flattery, and God is our witness that we didnt have greedy motives.
local: Ɩtɛm naʋ se ɖɩtaalabɩ-mɩ nɔɔ leleŋ kaʋ. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, liidiye laɣzaɣ tɔm natʋyʋ taawɛɛ ɖɔ-tɔm taa mɛsaɣ tɛɛ. Ɛsɔ lɛ ɖa-aseɣɖe tʋ.

eng: Dont be controlled by your sexual urges like the Gentiles who dont know God.
local: Ɛtaayele ɛ-tɩ nɛ pɩɖɛnɩ-ɩ lɩmaɣza kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ taa ɛzɩ mbá paañaŋ Ɛsɔ yɔ.

eng: We didnt ask for special treatment from people—not from you or from others—.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ se ɖɩñɩnɩɣ se ɛyáa ɛsam-ɖʋ: paa mɩ yaa nabɛyɛ.

eng: No one should mistreat or take advantage of their brother or sister in this issue. The Lord punishes people for all these things, as we told you before and sternly warned you.
local: Nɔɔyʋ ɛtaamuli ɛ-taabalʋ pʋnɛ pɩ-taa, ɛtaacɛtɩ-ɩ. Đɩɩtɛm-mɩ-tʋ heyuu nɛ ɖɩka mɩ-ñʋŋ taa siŋŋ se Kɩpaɣlʋ kɔŋ hɔm mbá palakɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ pa-nɩŋgbaaŋ.

eng: although we could have thrown our weight around as Christs apostles. Instead, we were gentle with you like a nursing mother caring for her own children.
local: Ŋgʋ́, ɖɩpɩzaɣ ɖinuuti-mɩ se ɖɩkɛ Krɩstʋ tiyiyaa. Ɛlɛ́, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩɩwɛ mɩ-tɛ yɔ, ɖa nɛ mɩ ɖɛ-hɛkʋ taa kɛwɛ leleŋ siŋŋ. Đɩɩwɛ ɛzɩ halʋ weyi ɛcɔŋnɩ e-piya yɔɔ camɩyɛ yɔ.

eng: So when we couldnt stand it any longer, we thought it was a good idea to stay on in Athens by ourselves.
local: Đe-liu wɛ ḿbʋ́ kpem se ɖɩkɔɔ mɩ-tɛ. Ɛlɛ́, ɖɩtaatasɩɣ pɩzʋʋ se ɖɩɖaŋ lɛ, ɖɩtɛzɩ labʋ lɩmaɣza se ɖɩcakɩ ɖe-ɖeke Atɛɛnɩ.

eng: God didnt call us to be immoral but to be dedicated to him.
local: Ɛsɔ tayaa-ɖʋ se ɖɩwɛɛ azuluma taa, ɛlɛ́, ɛya-ɖʋ se ɖɩwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ.

eng: We were glad to share not only Gods good news with you but also our very lives because we cared for you so much.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɩɩsɔɔlɩ-mɩ kpem nɛ piyele ɖisusi-mɩ Ɛsɔ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm nɛ halɩ paa ɖe-wezuu maɣmaɣ yɔ, ɖɩpɩzaɣ se ɖɩha-kʋ mɩ-yɔɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩɩsɔɔlɩ-mɩ siŋŋ.

eng: and we sent you Timothy, who is our brother and Gods coworker in the good news about Christ. We sent him to strengthen and encourage you in your faithfulness.
local: nɛ piyele ɖitiyi ɖa-tʋmlaɖʋ Timootee. Ɛkɛ Ɛsɔ tʋmlaɖʋ nɛ esusuu Krɩstʋ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm. Đitiyi-i mɩ-cɔlɔ se eyele nɛ ɩtɛzɩ pɩʋ nɛ pɩlabɩ-mɩ hʋnʋm mi-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa.

eng: Therefore, whoever rejects these instructions isnt rejecting a human authority. They are rejecting God, who gives his Holy Spirit to you.
local: Weyi ekiziɣ tɔm tʋnɛ yɔ, pɩtɛkɛ ɛyʋ ekizaa. Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ ekizaa. Ŋgʋ́, ɛ́lɛ́ ha-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu.

eng: You remember, brothers and sisters, our efforts and hard work. We preached Gods good news to you, while we worked night and day so we wouldnt be a burden on any of you.
local: Taabalaa! Paa pɩɩla ɛzɩma ɩtɔzʋʋ ɖa-tʋmɩyɛ nɛ ɖa-kʋñɔŋ pɔ-yɔɔ: ɖɩɩlaba tʋmɩyɛ wɩsɩ nɛ ɖoó se ɖɩtaakɛnɩ mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ sʋʋtʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖisusaɣ-mɩ Ɛsɔ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔ.

eng: We didnt want any of you to be shaken by these problems. You know very well that we were meant to go through this.
local: nɛ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ taa kʋñɔmɩŋ ɛtaañamsɩ mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ. Mɩ-maɣmaɣ ɩtɛm naʋ se kʋñɔmɩŋ ɩnʋ Ɛsɔ ɖʋwa se pɩtɛmnɩ-ɖʋ.

eng: You dont need us to write about loving your brothers and sisters because God has already taught you to love each other.
local: Ɛsɔ tɛm mɩ-maɣmaɣ kpɛlɩkʋʋ ɖama sɔɔlʋʋ tɔm. Ḿbʋ́ ɩɖɔŋ labʋ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩtacazɩ pɔzʋʋ se ɖɩma pʋ-tɔm nɛ ɖiheyi-mɩ.

eng: You and God are witnesses of how holy, just, and blameless we were toward you believers.
local: Mbá mɩ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ yɔ, mɩ-ɛsɩndaa lɛ, ɖe-wezuu caɣʋ kɛwɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ nɛ kʋtʋʋzɩ nɛ paanaɣ kawanaɣ nakɛyɛ pɩ-taa. Mɩ nɛ Ɛsɔ lɛ ɖa-aseɣɖe tɩnaa.

eng: In fact, when we were with you, we kept on predicting that we were going to face problems exactly like what happened, as you know.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩɩwɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ yɔ, ɖɩɩtɛm-mɩ heyuu se ɖɩkɔŋ tɔɔʋ kʋñɔmɩŋ. Ḿbʋ́ ɩtɛm naʋ, ḿbʋ́ talɩna yɔ.

eng: In fact, you are doing loving deeds for all the brothers and sisters throughout Macedonia. Now we encourage you, brothers and sisters, to do so even more.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ ɩsɔɔlɩ taabalaa mbá pɛwɛ Masedonii egeetiye kpeekpe taa yɔ patɩŋa payɩ. Ɛlɛ́, taabalaa! Đɩsazɩɣ-mɩ se ɩla nɛ pɩkɩlɩ ḿbʋ́!.

eng: Likewise, you know how we treated each of you like a father treats his own children.
local: Ɩnawa ɖɔɖɔ se ɖa nɛ mɩ-taa paa weyi pɩɩwɛ ɛzɩ caja nɛ e-piya yɔ.

eng: Thats why I sent Timothy to find out about your faithfulness when I couldnt stand it anymore. I was worried that the tempter might have tempted you so that our work would have been a waste of time.
local: Me-liu wɛ ḿbʋ́ kpem nɛ pɩɩsaŋ lɛ, mɛntɛzɩ tiyuu Timootee se ɛkɔɔ nɛ mana se ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ mbʋ́? Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, sɔɔndʋ kpaɣaɣ-m se takɩyʋ ɛtaakɔɔ ɛtakɩ-mɩ nɛ tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩlaba yɔ, ɖɩpɩsɩ falaa ñɩnɖɛ.

eng: Aim to live quietly, mind your own business, and earn your own living, just as I told you.
local: Ɩñaɣ pana nɛ ɩwɛɛ laŋhɛzɩyɛ taa fɛɛɛ nɛ ɩnɩɩnɩ mɩ-maɣmaɣ mɩ-tɔm nɛ ɩla tʋma nɛ mi-nesi ɛzɩ ɖɩtɛm-mɩ heyuu yɔ.

eng: We appealed to you, encouraged you, and pleaded with you to live lives worthy of the God who is calling you into his own kingdom and glory.
local: Điiyeba pɩlabɩ-mɩ hʋnʋm nɛ ɖɩhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa nɛ ɖɩka mɩ-ñʋŋ taa se ɩɖɔ ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa yɔ. Ɛnʋ yaɣnɩ-mɩ se ɩkɛ e-Kewiyaɣ nɛ e-koboyaɣ pa-taa ñɩma.

eng: Now Timothy has returned to us from you and has given us good news about your faithfulness and love! He says that you always have good memories about us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, Timootee lɩnɩ mɩ-tɛ nɛ ɛtalɩ. Ɛkɔnɩ-ɖʋ tɔm kɩbandʋ mi-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ nɛ mɩ-sɔɔlɩm nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩwɛɛ ɩtɔzʋʋ ɖɔ-yɔɔ camɩyɛ nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ mi-liu wɛɛ kpem ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ ɖa yɔ se ɩtasɩ-ɖʋ naʋ yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: That way youll behave appropriately toward outsiders, and you wont be in need.
local: Pʋbʋ, ɩkɛɣ mbá pamʋnaa yɔ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Krɩstʋ ñɩma yɔ pɛ-ɛsɩndaa. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, ɩɩkɛɣnɩ nɔɔyʋ sʋʋtʋ.

eng: We also thank God constantly for this: when you accepted Gods word that you heard from us, you welcomed it for what it truly is. Instead of accepting it as a human message, you accepted it as Gods message, and it continues to work in you who are believers.
local: Đɩsaŋ Ɛsɔ tam nabʋyʋ yɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ. Ḿbʋ́ lɛ se: alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖisusi-mɩ ɛ-tɔm nɛ ɩnɩɩ-tʋ yɔ, itetisi-tʋ ɛzɩ ɛyáa tɔm yem yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, itisi-tʋ ɛzɩ mbʋ́ tɩkɛ toovenim taa yɔ, tɩkɛ Ɛsɔtɔm siŋŋ nɛ tɩlakɩ mbá mɩ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ tʋmɩyɛ.

eng: Because of this, brothers and sisters, we were encouraged in all our distress and trouble through your faithfulness.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, taabalaa, paa ɖɩnɩɣ siziŋ nɛ ɖɩtɔkɩ kʋñɔmɩŋ yɔ, ɖa-laŋɩyɛ hɛnɩ-mɩ mi-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ yɔɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we want you to know about people who have died so that you wont mourn like others who dont have any hope.
local: Taabalaa! Sɩɖaa tɔm taa lɛ, ɖe-liu fɛyɩ se ɩwɛɛ kaatɩlɩtʋ taa nɛ piyele mɩ-ɛsɛ kɔɔ añɩŋ ɛzɩ lɛlaa mbá paataɣ pʋyʋ liu yɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, you became imitators of the churches of God in Judea, which are in Christ Jesus. This was because you also suffered the same things from your own people as they did from the Jews.
local: Taabalaa! Toovenim lɛ, ɩtɩŋ Yudee Ɛsɔ aŋgba taa ñɩma nʋmɔʋ. Aŋgba ana, a nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu pɛ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ akɛ ḿbʋ́. Mɩ-maɣmaɣ mɩ-tɛ ñɩma ɖʋ-mɩ kʋñɔŋ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ Yuda ñɩma kaaɖʋʋ a-taa ñɩma yɔ.

eng: For now we are alive if you are standing your ground in the Lord.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, ɖenɖe ɖɩnɩwa se ɩwɛ mi-ɖeɖe ḿbʋ́ mɩ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa yɔ, pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɖitisi fezuu.

eng: Since we believe that Jesus died and rose, so we also believe that God will bring with him those who have died in Jesus.
local: Toovenim lɛ, yee ɖɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ se Yesu sɩba nɛ Ɛsɔ fezi-i yɔ, pʋbʋ, ɖɩwɛnɩ-kʋ ɖɔɖɔ se ɛtɩŋɩɣnɩ Yesu ɛnʋ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ efezi mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ pʋcɔ pasɩ yɔ.

eng: They killed both the Lord Jesus and the prophets and drove us out. They dont please God, and they are hostile to the entire human race.
local: Yuda ñɩma ḿbá pakʋnɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu nɛ náyaa nɛ pɛwɛɛ ɖa-wayɩ kaŋ kaŋ. Pɔ-tɔm tɛkɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ, papɩsɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa koyindinaa.

eng: How can we thank God enough for you, given all the joy we have because of you before our God?.
local: Ɛzɩma kpem ɖɩpɩzɩɣ ɖɩsa Ɛsɔ mɩ-yɔɔ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ iyeba nɛ ɖɩwɛnɩ ɛ-ɛsɩndaa yɔ ɖɩ-yɔɔ?.

eng: What we are saying is a message from the Lord: we who are alive and still around at the Lords coming definitely wont go ahead of those who have died.
local: Ɩna tɔm ndʋ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔɔdaa nɛ ɖiheyiɣ-mɩ yɔ. Ńdʋ́ lɛ se: mbá ɖa ɖɩwɛɣnɩ ɖɛ-ɛsɛ puwiye nɖɩ́ ɛkɔŋ yɔ, ɖɩɩkaɣ ɖɛʋ mbá pasɩba yɔ nɔɔ kaʋ.

eng: when they try to stop us from speaking to the Gentiles so they can be saved. Their sins are constantly pushing the limit. Gods wrath has caught up with them in the end.
local: Paɖɩkɩ-ɖʋ nʋmɔʋ se ɖitaasusi mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ ñʋʋ yabʋ tɔm. Ḿbʋ́ pɛwɛɛ pɛtɛzɩɣ kɩwɛɛkɩm labʋ. Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ pana tɛmnɩ-wɛ kpanaʋ.

eng: Night and day, we pray more than ever to see all of you in person and to complete whatever you still need for your faith.
local: Đɩwɛɛ ɖitendiɣ-i wɩsɩ nɛ ɖoó siŋŋ se ɛha-ɖʋ nʋmɔʋ nɛ ɖɩtasɩ mɩ-ɛsɩndaa naʋ nɛ ɖɩtɛzɩ-mɩ wɩlʋʋ mbʋ́ pɩkazɩ-mɩ mi-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa yɔ.

eng: This is because the Lord himself will come down from heaven with the signal of a shout by the head angel and a blast on Gods trumpet. First, those who are dead in Christ will rise.
local: Kɩyakʋ ŋ́gʋ́, pɔkɔŋ panɩɩ nɔɔ haʋ kubuka nɛ Ɛsɔ tiyiyu sɔsɔ nɔɔyʋ ñɩŋga nɛ Ɛsɔ ɛgandɩyɛ lɛ, Kɩpaɣlʋ maɣmaɣ lɩɣnɩ ɛsɔdaa nɛ etii. Peeɖe mbá paawɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ pʋcɔ pasɩ yɔ, pɛlɛyɩɣ fem.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we were separated from you for a while physically but not in our hearts. We made every effort in our desire to see you again face-to-face.
local: Taabalaa! Đa nɛ mɩ ɖɩyasɩ ɖama alɩwaatʋ pazɩ. Ɛlɛ́, ɖɩɩwɛɛ ɖɩmaɣzɩɣ mɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɖe-liu wɛɛ kpem nɛ ɖɩcɛyɩ ɖa-tɩ se ɖɩtasɩ mɩ-ɛsɩndaa naʋ. Ɛlɛ́, pɩtala.

eng: Now may our God and Father himself and our Lord Jesus guide us on our way back to you.
local: Đa-Caa Ɛsɔ maɣmaɣ nɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu pɔñɔɔzɩ ɖa-nʋmɔʋ nɛ ɖɩpɩzɩ ɖɩtalɩ-mɩ!.

eng: Then, we who are living and still around will be taken up together with them in the clouds to meet with the Lord in the air. That way we will always be with the Lord.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, mbá ɖa ɖɩwɛɣnɩ ɖɛ-ɛsɛ alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ yɔ, pɩkpazɩ ɖa nɛ wɛ yem ɛsɔmɩndʋ tɛɛ nɛ ɖɩkatɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛsɔdaa nɛ ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩwɛɛ tam.

eng: We wanted to come to you—I, Paul, tried over and over again—and Satan stopped us.
local: Đɩɩɖʋwa se ɖɩpɩsɩɣ mɩ-tɛ, mancaɣ mɔntɔ se ma Pɔɔlɩ, manɖʋ nabʋlɛ nabʋlɛ se mɔnkɔŋ, ɛlɛ́, Satanɩ ɖɩɣ-ɖʋ nʋmɔʋ.

eng: May the Lord cause you to increase and enrich your love for each other and for everyone in the same way as we also love you.
local: Kɩpaɣlʋ eyele nɛ ɩtɛzɩ ɖama sɔɔlʋʋ nɛ ɩtɛzɩ ɖɔɖɔ lɛlaa tɩŋa payɩ sɔɔlʋʋ ɛzɩ ɖɩsɔɔlʋʋ-mɩ yɔ.

eng: So encourage each other with these words.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩsazɩ ɖama nɛ tɔm ndɩ ndɩ tʋnɛ.

eng: What is our hope, joy, or crown that we can brag about in front of our Lord Jesus when he comes? Isnt it all of you?.
local: Ŋgʋ́, mi-ɖeke koŋ ɖɩtaɣ liu, mɩ ɖa-taa hʋlʋmʋʋna. Mɩ ɖɔɖɔ lɛ ɖa-wabɩyɛ yʋsaɣ ŋgá ɖɩkʋndʋʋnɩ puwiye nɖɩ́ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu pɩsɩɣ ɛkɔɔ yɔ.

eng: May the love cause your hearts to be strengthened, to be blameless in holiness before our God and Father when our Lord Jesus comes with all his people. Amen.
local: Ḿbʋ́ eyeki nɛ ɩtɛzɩ pɩʋ nɛ ɩwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ nɛ paanaɣ kawanaɣ nakɛyɛ mɩ-yɔɔ ɖa-Caa Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa puwiye nɖɩ́ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu nɛ ɛ-ñɩma tɩŋa payɩ pɔkɔŋ yɔ.

eng: You are our glory and joy!.
local: Toovenim lɛ, mɩ ɖɩkʋndʋʋna, ɖa-taa hʋlʋmɩnɩ-mɩ.

eng: From Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy: To the church of the Thessalonians, which is in God our Father, and in the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ma Pɔɔlɩ, ma nɛ Silaasɩ nɛ Timootee ɖɩmaɣnɩ Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma mbá mɩ ɩwɛ Tesalooniki nɛ ɩkɛ ɖa-Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ pa-ñɩma yɔ takayaɣ kanɛ.

eng: Grace and peace to all of you from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Đɩsɛ-mɩ: Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ palabɩ-mɩ lootiye nɛ pɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we must always thank God for you. This is only right because your faithfulness is growing by leaps and bounds, and the love that all of you have for each other is increasing.
local: Taabalaa! Pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩsa Ɛsɔ mɩ-yɔɔ tam. Pʋmʋna ḿbʋ́, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩwɛɛ ɩtɛzɩɣ lidaʋ wɛnaʋ nɛ mɩtɩŋa payɩ ɩtɛzɩɣ ɖama sɔɔlʋʋ.

eng: Thats why we ourselves are bragging about you in Gods churches. We tell about your endurance and faithfulness in all the harassments and trouble that you have put up with.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ ɖa-maɣmaɣ ɖɩkʋndʋʋnɩ-mɩ Ɛsɔ aŋgba taa ñɩma hɛkʋ taa ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩpɩzaa ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ nɛ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pɛwɛ mɩ-wayɩ kaŋ kaŋ nɛ panazɩɣ-mɩ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: This shows that Gods judgment is right, and that you will be considered worthy of Gods kingdom for which you are suffering.
local: Ḿbʋ́ wɩlɩɣnɩ se Ɛsɔ tɔm hʋʋ tʋʋzaa. Pɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɩmʋnɩ e-Kewiyaɣ ŋgá kɔ-yɔɔ ɩtɔkɩ kʋñɔŋ yɔ ka-taa ñɩma.

eng: After all, its right for God to pay back the ones making trouble for you with trouble.
local: Ɛsɔ naʋ taa lɛ, pʋmʋna ḿbʋ́ se pɔkɔɔ paɖʋ kʋñɔŋ mbá paɖʋʋ-mɩ-kʋ yɔ.

eng: and to pay back you who are having trouble with relief along with us. This payback will come when the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven with his powerful angels.
local: Piyele mbá mɩ ɩtɔkɩ kʋñɔŋ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ, ɖa nɛ mɩ ɖɩkɔŋ hɛzʋʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu nɛ e-tiyiyaa ɖoŋ ñɩma palɩzɩɣ pa-tɩ ɛsɔdaa nɛ pana-wɛ.

eng: He will give justice with blazing fire to those who dont recognize God and dont obey the good news of our Lord Jesus.
local: miŋ sɔsɔŋ taa yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ ɛkɔŋ se ɛhɔ mbá patasɩ Ɛsɔ nɛ paañaŋ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔ pa-nɩŋgbaaŋ.

eng: They will pay the penalty of eternal destruction away from the Lords presence and away from his mighty glory.
local: Kɩmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɛkpaɣ-wɛ yɔ lɛ se ewokini-wɛ asayʋʋ maatɛŋ taa, puposuuni Kɩpaɣlʋ nɛ e-ɖoŋ koboyaɣ.

eng: This will happen when he comes on that day to receive honor from his holy people and to be admired by everyone who has believed—and our testimony to you was believed.
local: Puwiye ńɖɩ́ lɛ, ɛkɔŋ se pɩtɩŋnɩ ɛ-ñɩma yɔɔ nɛ ɛ-hɩɖɛ sɛɛ nɛ mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ, patɩŋa payɩ payɩɣyɩ-ɩ. Ŋgʋ́, mɩ mitisi aseɣɖe nɖɩ́ ɖɩlɩzaa yɔ.

eng: We are constantly praying for you for this: that our God will make you worthy of his calling and accomplish every good desire and faithful work by his power.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ ɖɩwɛɛ ɖɩsɛɣ ɖɛ-Ɛsɔ mɩ-yɔɔ se eyele nɛ ɩmʋnɩ mbʋ́ pʋ-yɔɔ ɛya-mɩ yɔ. Đɩsɛɣ-ɩ ɖɔɖɔ se ɛtɩŋnɩ e-ɖoŋ yɔɔ nɛ eyele ɩla camɩyɛ lakasɩ nzɩ́ sɩtɩŋa payɩ ɩɖʋwa yɔ nɛ ɩtɛzɩ wɛʋ kpekpeka mi-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa.

eng: Then the name of our Lord Jesus will be honored by you, and you will be honored by him, consistent with the grace of our God and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ḿbʋ́ pɩtɩŋɩɣnɩ mɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu hɩɖɛ sɛɛ nɛ pɩtɩŋnɩ ɛ́lɛ́ yɔɔ nɛ mɩ-ñɩnɖɛ ñɛsɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ. Đɛ-Ɛsɔ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ, po-lootiye yɔɔ pʋkɔŋ pɩla ḿbʋ́.

eng: We dont need to write to you about the timing and dates, brothers and sisters.
local: Taabalaa! Pɩtacazɩ pɔzʋʋ se ɖɩma alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ yaa wɛtʋ ndʋ́ tɩ-taa pʋkɔŋ labʋ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pʋ-tɔm nɛ ɖiheyi-mɩ.

eng: You know very well that the day of the Lord is going to come like a thief in the night.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mɩ-maɣmaɣ ɩsɩm ɖeu se kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ kɔŋ yɔ, kʋkɔŋ-mɩ tuduu ɛzɩ mɩ́lʋ́ tuduu ɛyáa ɖoó taa yɔ.

eng: When they are saying, There is peace and security, at that time sudden destruction will attack them, like labor pains start with a pregnant woman, and they definitely wont escape.
local: Ɛyáa kɔŋ yɔɔdʋʋ se: «Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, laŋhɛzɩyɛ wɛɛ, you nakʋyʋ fɛyɩ!» Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ʋ́ asayʋʋ nakʋyʋ tuduu-wɛ yem ɛzɩ halʋ howa tʋ wɩzasɩ yɔ nɛ paapɩzɩɣ palɩɩ kɩ-taa.

eng: But you arent in darkness, brothers and sisters, so the day wont catch you by surprise like a thief.
local: Ɛlɛ́, taabalaa! Mɩ lɛ, ɩfɛyɩ cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa se paatɔ se kɩyakʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kutuduu-mɩ ɛzɩ mɩ́lʋ́ yɔ.

eng: All of you are children of light and children of the day. We dont belong to night or darkness.
local: Toovenim lɛ, mɩtɩŋa payɩ ɩkɛ wɩsɩ nɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ pa-taa ñɩma. Đɩtɛkɛ ɖoó taa yaa cɩkpɛndʋʋ tɛɛ ñɩma.

eng: So then, lets not sleep like the others, but lets stay awake and stay sober.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɖitaaɖoo ɛzɩ lɛlaa yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩcaɣ ɖɛ-ɛsɛ yɔɔ nɛ ɖɩwɛnɩ ɖɛ-ɛsɛ camɩyɛ.

eng: People who sleep sleep at night, and people who get drunk get drunk at night.
local: Đoó taa poɖou, a-taa ɖɔɖɔ ɛyáa ñɔʋ sʋlʋm nɛ pʋkʋʋ-wɛ.

eng: Since we belong to the day, lets stay sober, wearing faithfulness and love as a piece of armor that protects our body and the hope of salvation as a helmet.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɖa ɖɛkɛ wɩsɩ taa ñɩma. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɖɩwɛnɩ ɖɛ-ɛsɛ camɩyɛ. Lidaʋ nɛ sɔɔlɩm pɛkɛnɩ-ɖʋ ñɩ́ɣ́yʋ́ʋ wondu nɛ ɖisuu nɛ pʋyʋ nɔɔyʋ ɛtaalabɩ-ɖʋ. Đa-ñʋʋ yabʋ ɖaŋʋʋ ɛkɛnɩ-ɖʋ you hulaɣ nɛ ɖɩpaŋ.

eng: God didnt intend for us to suffer his wrath but rather to possess salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ taɖʋ se ɛ-pana ɛkpanɩ-ɖʋ, ɛlɛ́, ɛɖʋwa se pɩtɩŋnɩ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɖihiɣ ñʋʋ yabʋ.

eng: Jesus died for us so that, whether we are awake or asleep, we will live together with him.
local: Krɩstʋ ɛnʋ ɛsɩbɩnɩ ɖɔ-yɔɔ se paa ɖɩsɩba yaa ɖɩwɛnɩ ɖɛ-ɛsɛ yɔ, ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩkpɛndɩ ɖɩwɛɛ wezuu.

eng: So continue encouraging each other and building each other up, just like you are doing already.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩsazɩ ɖama nɛ ɩsɩnɩ ɖama nɛ ɩkpa ɖoŋ ɛzɩ ɩtɛm pazʋʋ labʋ yɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we ask you to respect those who are working with you, leading you, and instructing you.
local: Taabalaa! Đitendiɣ-mɩ se ɩña mbá pɛwɛ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa nɛ palakɩ tʋmɩyɛ yɔ. Ḿbá Kɩpaɣlʋ lɩzaa se pɔcɔnɩ mɩ-yɔɔ nɛ paka mɩ-ñʋŋ taa.

eng: Think of them highly with love because of their work. Live in peace with each other.
local: Pɔ-tɔm ɛkɛdɩnɩ-mɩ siŋŋ nɛ ɩsɔɔlɩ-wɛ pa-tʋmɩyɛ yɔɔ. Laŋhɛzɩyɛ ɛwɛɛ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we urge you to warn those who are disorderly. Comfort the discouraged. Help the weak. Be patient with everyone.
local: Taabalaa! Đɩsazɩɣ-mɩ se ɩka fendinaa ñʋŋ taa nɛ ɩtasɩ lɛɣtʋ mbá pitibi po-toma taa yɔ. Ɩsɩnɩ ajamaa nɛ ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-hɔ nɛ paa weyi.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we have a request for you concerning our Lord Jesus Christs coming and when we are gathered together to be with him.
local: Taabalaa! Đɩcaɣ ɖiheyi-mɩ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ kɔm nɛ ɖikpeɣluu ɛ-cɔlɔ yɔ pɔ-tɔm. Đitendiɣ-mɩ se:.

eng: Make sure no one repays a wrong with a wrong, but always pursue the good for each other and everyone else.
local: Ɩkpa mɩ-tɩ nɛ ɖama kɩmɩyɛ kpaʋ. Ɩwɛɛ ɖama camɩyɛ labʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɩkpɛndɩnɩ lɛlaa tɩŋa payɩ.

eng: We dont want you to be easily confused in your mind or upset if you hear that the day of the Lord is already here, whether you hear it through some spirit, a message, or a letter supposedly from us.
local: ɩtaayele mɩ-tɩ nɛ piliɣti mɩ-lɩmaɣza kɩbana kɛlɛʋ yaa sɔɔndʋ kpa-mɩ se Kɩpaɣlʋ kɩyakʋ talaa. Paa nɔɔyʋ eheyi-mɩ se Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu heyini-i-tʋ yaa pɩkɛ Ɛsɔ tɔm yaa ɛcɛlɩ-mɩ takayaɣ se ɖamanɩ-mɩ-kɛ yɔ, ɩtaayele mɩ-tɩ.

eng: Rejoice always.
local: Mɩ-taa ɛhʋlʋmɩ tam.

eng: Dont let anyone deceive you in any way. That day wont come unless the rebellion comes first and the person who is lawless is revealed, who is headed for destruction.
local: Ɩtaayele nɛ nɔɔyʋ yili-mɩ natʋyʋ taa kaʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pʋcɔ kɩyakʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩtalɩ lɛ, ɛyáa haɣ Ɛsɔ siɣ́ye nɛ Kañadʋ weyi ɛkɔŋ tɛmnaʋ asayʋʋ yɔ, ɛlɩzɩ ɛ-tɩ nɛ pana-ɩ.

eng: Pray continually.
local: Ɩsɛɛ Ɛsɔ tam.

eng: He is the opponent of every so-called god or object of worship and promotes himself over them. So he sits in Gods temple, displaying himself to show that he is God.
local: Ɛkɔŋ kpazʋʋ ɛ-tɩ se ɛkɩlɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛyáa kpakɩɣ se Ɛsɔ yɔ yaa poluŋuu pɩ-tɛɛ yɔ. Halɩ ewoki ɛsʋʋ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa taa nɛ ɛcaɣ se ɛ-maɣmaɣ lɛ Ɛsɔ.

eng: Give thanks in every situation because this is Gods will for you in Christ Jesus.
local: Ɩsam-ɩ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa, ḿbʋ́ e-liu wɛɛ se ɩla mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ.

eng: You remember that I used to tell you these things while I was with you, dont you?.
local: Ɩɩtɔzʋʋ se ńdʋ́ meheyaɣ-mɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ maawɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ yɔ yaa we?.

eng: Dont suppress the Spirit.
local: Ɩtaaɖizi Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu miŋ.

eng: Now you know what holds him back so that he can be revealed when his time comes.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, ɩsɩm mbʋ́ pɩɖɩkɩ-ɩ nʋmɔʋ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛlɩzɩɣ ɛ-tɩ nɛ pana-ɩ yɔ camɩyɛ.

eng: Dont brush off Spirit-inspired messages.
local: Ɩtaaniɣzi tɔm ndʋ́ náyaa yɔɔdʋʋ yɔ.

eng: The hidden plan to live without any law is at work now, but it will be secret only until the one who is holding it back is out of the way.
local: Ɛ-kañatʋ lakasɩ nzɩ́ sɩwɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ yɔ, sɩtɛm pazʋʋ. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se weyi ɛɖɔkɩ-ɩ yɔ, pakʋsɩ-ɩ nɛ pʋcɔ sɩtalɩ.

eng: but examine everything carefully and hang on to what is good.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɩtakɩ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa camɩyɛ nɛ ɩɖɔkɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ nesi naalɛ.

eng: Then the person who is lawless will be revealed. The Lord Jesus will destroy him with the breath from his mouth. When the Lord comes, his appearance will put an end to him.
local: Peeɖe Kañadʋ lɩzɩɣ ɛ-tɩ nɛ pana-ɩ, ɛlɛ́, Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu kɔŋ-ɩ kʋʋ nɛ ɛ-nɔɔ taa heɣlim mbʋ́ ehosuu ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ nɛ ɛnaŋ-ɩ nɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɛkɔŋna yɔ.

eng: Avoid every kind of evil.
local: Ɩkpa mɩ-tɩ nɛ paa kɩdɛkɛdɩm mbʋ́.

eng: When the person who is lawless comes, it will happen through Satans effort, with all kinds of fake power, signs, and wonders.
local: Pʋcɔ pɩla ḿbʋ́ lɛ, Kañadʋ ɛnʋ, ɛkaɣ kɔm nɛ Satanɩ ɖoŋ nɛ ɛla hama lakasɩ ndɩ ndɩ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ kawɩlɩsɩ nɛ ɛcɛtɩnɩ ɛyáa.

eng: Now, may the God of peace himself cause you to be completely dedicated to him; and may your spirit, soul, and body be kept intact and blameless at our Lord Jesus Christs coming.
local: Ɛsɔ laŋhɛzɩyɛ tʋ maɣmaɣ eyele nɛ ɩtɛzɩ wɛʋ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ. Ɛɖɔkɩ mɩ-kalɩzasɩ nɛ mi-ciyamnaa nɛ mi-tomnasɩ camɩyɛ nɛ pataana kawanaɣ nakɛyɛ pɔ-yɔɔ puwiye nɖɩ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ kɔŋ yɔ.

eng: It will happen with every sort of wicked deception of those who are heading toward destruction because they have refused to love the truth that would allow them to be saved.
local: Ɛkɔŋ tɩŋnaʋ kɩdɛkɛdɩm ndɩ ndɩ tɩŋa yɔɔ nɛ eyili mbá pɔkɔŋ lebu yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɔtɔsɔɔlɩ toovenim tɔm ndʋ́ pɩɩwɛɛ se tɩya pa-ñʋʋ yɔ.

eng: The one who is calling you is faithful and will do this.
local: Weyi ɛya-mɩ yɔ, ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ: ɛnʋ kɔŋnɩ-pʋ labʋ.

eng: This is why God will send them an influence that will mislead them so that they will believe the lie.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ tiyiɣni-wɛ ɖoŋ weyi eyeki nɛ pele yɔ se petisi cɛtɩm tɔm.

eng: Brothers and sisters, pray for us.
local: Taabalaa! Ɩsɛɛ Ɛsɔ ɖɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: The result will be that everyone will be judged who is not convinced by the truth but is happy with injustice.
local: Pɩlakɩ ḿbʋ́ se pahʋʋnɩ mbá patɩŋa payɩ petetisi toovenim tɔm nɛ panɩɩnɩ mbʋ́ pɩtatʋʋzɩ yɔ.

eng: Greet all the brothers and sisters with a holy kiss.
local: Ɩsɛɛ taabalaa tɩŋa payɩ ɖeu nɛ sɔɔlɩm.

eng: But we always must thank God for you, brothers and sisters who are loved by God. This is because he chose you from the beginning to be the first crop of the harvest. This brought salvation, through your dedication to God by the Spirit and through your belief in the truth.
local: Piyele ɖa lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩsa Ɛsɔ tam taabalaa mbá mɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ sɔɔlaa yɔ mɩ-yɔɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mɩ ɛcalɩ lɩzʋʋ se pɩtɩŋnɩ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ŋgʋ́ kɩpɩsɩɣ-mɩ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ ñɩma yɔ nɛ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɩwɛnɩ toovenim yɔɔ yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛya mɩ-ñʋʋ.

eng: By the Lords authority, I order all of you to have this letter read aloud to all the brothers and sisters.
local: Mankaŋ mɩ-ñʋʋ taa nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ nɔɔ se ɩkalɩ takayaɣ kanɛ nɛ taabalaa tɩŋa nɩɩ.

eng: God called all of you through our good news so you could possess the honor of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ ɛtɩŋnɩ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ndʋ́ ɖiheyi-mɩ yɔ, tɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛ́yáa-mɩ se ihiɣ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ koboyaɣ.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Đa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ ɛlabɩ-mɩ lootiye!.

eng: So then, brothers and sisters, stand firm and hold on to the traditions we taught you, whether we taught you in person or through our letter.
local: Taabalaa! Yee ḿbʋ́, ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ kpam nɛ ɩɖɔkɩ ɖɔɖɔ tɔm ndʋ́ ɖɩwɩlɩ-mɩ nɛ nɔɔ taa yaa ndʋ́ ɖɩma-mɩ nɛ ɖɩwɩlɩ-mɩ yɔ nesi naalɛ.

eng: Our Lord Jesus Christ himself and God our Father loved us and through grace gave us eternal comfort and a good hope.
local: Toovenim lɛ, ɖa-Caa Ɛsɔ sɔɔlɩ-ɖʋ nɛ ɛtɩŋnɩ e-lootiye yɔɔ nɛ eyele ɖa-laŋa hɛɛ tam nɛ ɖɩɖaŋ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa se ɛhaɣ-ɖʋ yɔ kpam. Ɛ nɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ maɣmaɣ.

eng: May he encourage your hearts and give you strength in every good thing you do or say.
local: pɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa nɛ peyele ɩtɛzɩ kpaʋ ɖoŋ nɛ ɩla mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ mɩ-lakasɩ nɛ mɩ-yɔɔdaɣ pa-taa.

eng: From Paul, who is an apostle of Jesus Christ by the command of God our savior and of Christ Jesus our hope.
local: Ma Pɔɔlɩ, ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ Ɛsɔ nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu weyi ɖɩtaɣ liu yɔ pahanɩ-m nɔɔ se mɛnkɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu tiyiyu.

eng: To Timothy, my true child in the faith. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Timootee, ña mamaɣ takayaɣ kanɛ. Ña lɛ man-pɩɣa siŋŋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ña ɖɔɖɔ ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ. Mɛnsɛ-ŋ: Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Krɩstʋ Yesu palabɩ-ŋ lootiye nɛ pana ña-pʋtɔdɩyɛ nɛ pɛhɛzɩ ña-laŋɩyɛ.

eng: When I left for Macedonia, I asked you to stay behind in Ephesus so that you could instruct certain individuals not to spread wrong teaching.
local: Ɛzɩ maaheyuu-ŋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mɛnɖɛɣaɣ Masedonii se ŋcaɣ Efɛɛzɩ yɔ, caɣ ḿbʋ́. Peeɖe ŋheyiɣ ɛyáa mbá pɛwɛ peeɖe nɛ pawɩlɩɣ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩwɛ ndɩ nɛ ɖa-ñɩndʋ yɔ se pasɩɩ tɩnaɣ.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to myths and endless genealogies. Their teaching only causes useless guessing games instead of faithfulness to Gods way of doing things.
local: Heyi-wɛ ɖɔɖɔ se pataanɩɩnɩ mʋya nɛ pɔ-cɔzɔnaa hɩla wena afɛyɩ kalʋʋ yɔ pɔ-tɔm. Ḿbʋ́ lɩzɩɣnɩ puuyaɣ. Pɩɩsɩŋnɩ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ yɔ se puwobini ɛsɩndaa. Ɛlɛ́, lidaʋ yɔɔ pɩtɩŋɩɣna nɛ puwobini ɛsɩndaa.

eng: The goal of instruction is love from a pure heart, a good conscience, and a sincere faith.
local: Ŋheyiɣ-wɛ ḿbʋ́ se pɛwɛnɩ sɔɔlɩm mbʋ́ pɩlɩnɩ hɔyɛ kɩbanɖɛ nɛ lɩmaɣza kɩbana nɛ lidaʋ siŋŋ pa-taa yɔ.

eng: Because they missed this goal, some people have been distracted by talk that doesnt mean anything.
local: Nabɛyɛ kizi sɔɔlɩm tɔm ńdʋ́ nɛ pɛ-ɛsɛ sɛɛnɩ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩɩwazɩɣ pʋyʋ kpem yɔ tɩ-yɔɔdʋʋ.

eng: They want to be teachers of Law without understanding either what they are saying or what they are talking about with such confidence.
local: Pacaɣ se pɛkɛ Mooyiizi paɣtʋ wɩlɩyaa sɔsaa. Ɛlɛ́, paanɩɣ tɔm ndʋ́ pa-maɣmaɣ pɔyɔɔdʋʋ yɔ yaa ndʋ́ tɩ-yɔɔ pɛwɛ ɖoŋ yɔ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ.

eng: Now we know that the Law is good if used appropriately.
local: Đɩtɛm naʋ se Mooyiizi paɣtʋ wɛ ɖeu. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se palabɩnɩ-tʋ tʋmɩyɛ ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ.

eng: We understand this: the Law isnt established for a righteous person but for people who live without laws and without obeying any authority. They are the ungodly and the sinners. They are people who are not spiritual, and nothing is sacred to them. They kill their fathers and mothers, and murder others.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩtɩlɩ se: pɩtɛkɛ mbá palakɩ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ paɖʋ paɣtʋ. Ɛlɛ́, mbá paaɖɔŋ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ nɛ kaañamtʋ tɩnaa nɛ mbá pɛpɛŋɩɣ Ɛsɔ tɛtɛ yɔ nɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖaa nɛ mbá paalakɩ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ yaa paañaŋ ɛ-ñɩm yɔ nɛ mbá pakʋʋ pa-caanaa yaa po-ɖoonaa yɔ nɛ ɛyáa kʋyaa paɖʋ-tʋ.

eng: They are people who are sexually unfaithful, and people who have intercourse with the same sex. They are kidnappers, liars, individuals who give false testimonies in court, and those who do anything else that is opposed to sound teaching.
local: Paɖʋ-tʋ ɖɔɖɔ acɛyɛ laɖaa nɛ abalaa yaa halaa mbá pacaɣ ɖama yɔ nɛ yomaa pɛdɩyaa nɛ cɛtɩyaa nɛ mbá paalakɩ mbʋ́ poɖuwaa se palakɩ yɔ nɛ lakasɩ lɛɛsɩ nzɩ́ sɩtɩŋa payɩ sɩwɛɛkɩɣ tɔm kɩbandʋ ndʋ́ pawɩlɩɣ-ɖʋ yɔ sɩ-laɖaa.

eng: Sound teaching agrees with the glorious gospel of the blessed God that has been trusted to me.
local: Tɔm kɩbandʋ ńdʋ́, tɩwɛ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ndʋ́ tɩkɛ koboyaɣ yɔ tɩ-taa. Ɛsɔ weyi ɛwɛ laŋhɛzɩyɛ taa yɔ, ɛɖʋzɩnɩ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ńdʋ́ me-nesi taa.

eng: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me strength because he considered me faithful. So he appointed me to ministry.
local: Mansaŋ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Krɩstʋ Yesu weyi ɛha-m ɖoŋ se malabɩnɩ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ yɔ. Mansaŋ-ɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛnawa se malakɩ mbʋ́ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ nɛ ɛlɩzɩ-m se mɛnkɛ ɛ-tʋmlaɖʋ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: even though I used to speak against him, attack his people, and I was proud. But I was shown mercy because I acted in ignorance and without faith.
local: Ŋgʋ́, maawɛɛkɩ ɛ-hɩɖɛ nɛ mɛwɛɛ ɛ-wayɩ kaŋ kaŋ nɛ mantʋʋ-ɩ ɖɔɖɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛna man-pʋtɔdɩyɛ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mantaatɩlɩ mbʋ́ malakaɣ yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mantaawɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ.

eng: Our Lords favor poured all over me along with the faithfulness and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Peeɖe ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Krɩstʋ Yesu ɛnʋ ɛlabɩ-m lootiye siŋŋ nɛ eyele mɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ nɛ sɔɔlɩm mbá palɩnɩ ɛ-cɔlɔ yɔ.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves full acceptance: Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners—and Im the biggest sinner of all.
local: Tɔm ndʋ́ meheyiɣ-mɩ yɔ, tɩkɛ toovenim. Tɩmʋnaa se ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ etisi-tʋ nɛ pa-laŋa tɩŋa. Ńdʋ́ lɛ se Krɩstʋ Yesu kɔm kedeŋa yɔɔ se ɛya kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖaa ñʋʋ. Pa-taa lɛ, ma-maɣmaɣ pɩwabɩnaa.

eng: But this is why I was shown mercy, so that Christ Jesus could show his endless patience to me first of all. So Im an example for those who are going to believe in him for eternal life.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛna man-pʋtɔdɩyɛ se ɛwɩlɩ-mɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛɖɔkʋʋ ɛ-hɔyɛ kpem yɔ. Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se mbá patɩŋa payɩ pɔkɔŋ wɛnaʋ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ pehiɣ wezuu maatɛŋ yɔ pana.

eng: Now to the king of the ages, to the immortal, invisible, and only God, may honor and glory be given to him forever and always! Amen.
local: Ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ ɛsam-ɩ nɛ paɖʋ-ɩ hɩɖɛ tam. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛnʋ lɛ Wiyaʋ sɔsɔ weyi e-kewiyaɣ tɔɔʋ fɛyɩ tɩnaɣ yɔ, ɛɛsɩkɩ, nɔɔyʋ ɛɛnaɣ-ɩ, e-ɖeke koŋ lɛ Ɛsɔ tam! Pɩla ḿbʋ́!.

eng: Timothy, my child, Im giving you these instructions based on the prophecies that were once made about you. So if you follow them, you can wage a good war.
local: Man-pɩɣa Timootee, manɖʋzʋʋ tɔm ndʋ́ mamaɣ takayaɣ kanɛ ka-taa yɔ ñe-nesi taa ɛzɩ paayɔɔdʋʋ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ yɔ ñɔ-yɔɔ yɔ. Pʋwɛɛ se ŋtɩŋnɩ tɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ŋlʋ lʋbɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩmʋnaa yɔ.

eng: because you have faith and a good conscience. Some people have ruined their faith because they refused to listen to their conscience.
local: nɛ ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ ḿbʋ́ nɛ ña-lɩmaɣza caɣ a-ɖeɖe. Nabɛyɛ lɩmaɣza taacaɣ a-ɖeɖe nɛ pa-laŋa wɛɛ kpɩzɩŋ nɛ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ paawɛna yɔ kɩla asayʋʋ.

eng: such as Hymenaeus and Alexander. Ive handed them over to Satan so that they can be taught not to speak against God.
local: Pa-taa lɛ Imenee nɛ Alɛksandrɩ mbá mankpaɣ manɖʋzɩ Satanɩ nesi taa yɔ. Peeɖe panaɣ se pɩtamʋnɩ se pɛwɛɛkɩ Ɛsɔ hɩɖɛ.

eng: First of all, then, I ask that requests, prayers, petitions, and thanksgiving be made for all people.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, mbʋ́ mancalɩɣ ɛyáa heyuu yɔ lɛ se: pɛsɛɛ Ɛsɔ nɛ petendi-i nɛ pasam-ɩ ɛyáa kpeekpe yɔɔ.

eng: Pray for kings and everyone who is in authority so that we can live a quiet and peaceful life in complete godliness and dignity.
local: Ɩla ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ awiya nɛ ñʋndɩnaa patɩŋa payɩ pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɖɩpɩzɩ ɖɩcaɣ wezuu laŋhɛzɩyɛ taa fɛɛɛ nɛ ɖɩña Ɛsɔ camɩyɛ nɛ ɖɩla mbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa yɔ.

eng: This is right and it pleases God our savior.
local: Ḿbʋ́ wɛnɩ ɖeu nɛ pɩkɛdɩnɩ ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ Ɛsɔ.

eng: who wants all people to be saved and to come to a knowledge of the truth.
local: E-liu wɛɛ se pɩya ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ ñʋʋ nɛ patɩlɩ toovenim.

eng: There is one God and one mediator between God and humanity, the human Christ Jesus.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ kʋɖʋm koŋ wɛna nɛ ceyiyu kʋɖʋm koŋ ñɛwɛɛ Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ nɛ ɛyáa pɛ-hɛkʋ taa nɛ patɩŋɩɣnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ. Ɛnʋ lɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu.

eng: who gave himself as a payment to set all people free. This was a testimony that was given at the right time.
local: Ɛkpaɣ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛhɛyɩ ɛyáa yɔɔ se puholi patɩŋa payɩ: ḿbʋ́ lɩzɩnɩ aseɣɖe alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋwa yɔ se Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ e-liu wɛɛ se ɛya ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ ñʋʋ.

eng: I was appointed to be a preacher and apostle of this testimony—Im telling the truth and Im not lying! Im a teacher of the Gentiles in faith and truth.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ palɩzɩ man-tɩ tɩŋa se mɛnkɛ Ɛsɔtɔm susiyu nɛ mɛntɛ mɛnkɛ Krɩstʋ tiyiyu. Mɔyɔɔdʋʋ toovenim, maacɛtɩɣ. Paɖʋ-m se mawɩlɩ mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ toovenim nɛ lidaʋ pɔ-tɔm.

eng: Therefore, I want men to pray everywhere by lifting up hands that are holy, without anger or argument.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ me-liu wɛɛ se abalaa ɛsɛɣ Ɛsɔ paa le lɛ, pakpazɩ pe-nesi ɛsɔdaa. Ɛlɛ́, kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ ɛtaawɛɛ pɔ-yɔɔ. Nɔɔyʋ pana ɛtaakpanɩ lɛlʋ, you ɛtaawɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: In the same way, I want women to enhance their appearance with clothing that is modest and sensible, not with elaborate hairstyles, gold, pearls, or expensive clothes.
local: Me-liu wɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ se halaa esuu wondu ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa yɔ, pataaɖɛlɛsɩ niye, pataakɩlɩ pa-tɩ canʋʋ. Pataakɩlɩ canʋʋ pɔ-ñɔsɩ, pataalɛɛ ñɩɣlɩ́m nɩŋgbacaɣlɩnaa yaa lɩtʋ ndʋ́ tɩwɛ liidiye yɔ, pataasuu wondu ndʋ́ tɩkɩlɩ liidiye yɔ.

eng: They should make themselves attractive by doing good, which is appropriate for women who claim to honor God.
local: Ɛlɛ́, pala tʋma kɩbana ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ se halaa mbá pɔtɔŋ pa-tɩ se pañaŋ Ɛsɔ yɔ pala yɔ.

eng: A wife should learn quietly with complete submission.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se halaa esu nɛ petisi pa-tɩ kpem alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pɛkpɛlɩkɩɣ-wɛ Ɛsɔtɔm yɔ.

eng: I dont allow a wife to teach or to control her husband. Instead, she should be a quiet listener.
local: Maahaɣ halʋ nʋmɔʋ se ɛwɩlɩ abalaa yaa ɛwɛnɩ ɖoŋ pɔ-yɔɔ. Pʋwɛɛ se esu.

eng: Adam was formed first, and then Eve.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Aɖam Ɛsɔ calɩnɩ labʋ kedeŋa yɔɔ. Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛla Ɛɛvɩ.

eng: Adam wasnt deceived, but rather his wife became the one who stepped over the line because she was completely deceived.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ Aɖam pɛcɛtaa, ɛlɛ́, halʋ pɛcɛtaa nɛ eyele ɖɔm mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋwa yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: But a wife will be brought safely through childbirth, if they both continue in faith, love, and holiness, together with self-control.
local: Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, halaa lʋlʋʋ piya nɛ Ɛsɔ ya pa-ñʋʋ. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ tam ḿbʋ́ nɛ pɔsɔɔlɩ ɛyáa nɛ pɛwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ ɛ-ɛsɩndaa. Pataaɖɛlɛsɩ niye.

eng: Finally, brothers and sisters, pray for us so that the Lords message will spread quickly and be honored, just like it happened with you.
local: Taabalaa! Ndʋ́ ɖɩtɛzɩɣnɩ-mɩ yɔ lɛ se: ɩsɛɛ Ɛsɔ ɖɔ-yɔɔ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ tɔm wɛɛ cɔʋ yɔɔ lɛɛlɛɛ nɛ ɛyáa ɖʋ-tʋ hɩɖɛ ɛzɩ paɖʋʋ-tʋ mɩ-tɛ yɔ.

eng: Pray too that we will be rescued from inappropriate and evil people since everyone that we meet wont respond with faith.
local: Ɩsɛɛ-ɩ se ɛtaayele nɛ ɖɩsʋʋ ñʋŋ taa fɛyɩwaa nɛ kañadɩnaa pe-nesi taa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩtɛkɛ ɛyáa tɩŋa lakɩnɩ mbʋ́ paɖʋwa yɔ.

eng: But the Lord is faithful and will give you strength and protect you from the evil one.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Kɩpaɣlʋ ñalakɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ. Eyeki nɛ ɩkpa ɖoŋ nɛ ehuuzi mɩ-yɔɔ se Satanɩ ɛtaapɩzɩ ɛlabɩ-mɩ pʋyʋ.

eng: We are confident about you in the Lord—that you are doing and will keep doing what we tell you to do.
local: Đa nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ lɛ, ɖɩtaɣ-mɩ liu se ɩɖɔŋ labʋ ɛzɩ ɖɩkam mɩ-ñʋʋ taa yɔ, halɩ ɩwɛɣ pɩ-labʋ yɔɔ ḿbʋ́.

eng: May the Lord lead your hearts to express Gods love and Christs endurance.
local: Kɩpaɣlʋ eyele nɛ Ɛsɔ sɔɔlɩm nɛ Krɩstʋ hɔyɛ ɖɔkʋʋ pɛwɛɛ mɩ-lɩmaɣza taa.

eng: Brothers and sisters, we command you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to stay away from every brother or sister who lives an undisciplined life that is not in line with the traditions that you received from us.
local: Taabalaa! Đɩkaŋ mɩ-ñʋʋ taa nɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ nɔɔ se ɩtaañɔtɩnɩ taabalaa mbá palakɩ fendu nɛ paaɖɔŋ tɔm ndʋ́ ɖɩwɩlɩ-mɩ nɛ itisi yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ pa-taa nɔɔyʋ.

eng: You yourselves know how you need to imitate us because we were not undisciplined when we were with you.
local: Mɩ-maɣmaɣ, ɩtɛm sɩm mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se ɩla nɛ ɩtɩŋ ɖa-nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ: ɖɩtaala fendu alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩɩwɛ mɩ-tɛ yɔ.

eng: We didnt eat anyones food without paying for it. Instead, we worked night and day with effort and hard work so that we would not impose on you.
local: Đɩtɔtɔɔ nɔɔyʋ tɔɔnaɣ yem falaa. Ɛlɛ́, ɖɩlabɩ tʋmɩyɛ siŋŋ wɩsɩ nɛ ɖoó nɛ ɖɩnɩɩ siziŋ se ɖɩtaakɛnɩ mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ sʋʋtʋ.

eng: We did this to give you an example to imitate, not because we didnt have a right to insist on financial support.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ se ɖɩtaawɛnɩ waɖɛ yɔɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɖa-maɣmaɣ ɖɩcaɣaɣ se ɖɩwɩlɩ-mɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se ɩla nɛ ɩtɩŋ ɖa-nʋmɔʋ yɔ.

eng: Even when we were with you we were giving you this command: If anyone doesnt want to work, they shouldnt eat.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩɩwɛ mɩ-tɛ yɔ, ɖɩɩkam mɩ-ñʋʋ taa se: «Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛɛcaɣ se ɛla tʋmɩyɛ yɔ, ɛtaatɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ.».

eng: We hear that some of you are living an undisciplined life. They arent working, but they are meddling in other peoples business.
local: Ŋgʋ́, ɖɩnɩɣ naɣ yɔ se mɩ-taa nabɛyɛ lakɩ fendu, mbʋ́ ɛzɩ paala tʋmɩyɛ lɛ, peyele panɩɣnɩ mbʋ́ pɩɩwazɩɣ pʋyʋ yɔ.

eng: By the Lord Jesus Christ, we command and encourage such people to work quietly and put their own food on the table.
local: Điheyiɣ pɩtɛ ɛyáa ḿbá nɛ ɖɩsazɩɣ-wɛ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ nɔɔ se pala tʋmɩyɛ pɛɛyɛɛ taa nɛ pa-maɣmaɣ pe-nesi nɛ pehiɣ pɔtɔɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, dont get discouraged in doing what is right.
local: Taabalaa! Piyele mɩ lɛ, pɩtaanɩɩ-mɩ nɛ camɩyɛ labʋ.

eng: Take note of anyone who doesnt obey what we have said in this letter. Dont associate with them so they will be ashamed of themselves.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛɛɖɔŋ tɔm ndʋ́ ɖɩma takayaɣ kanɛ ka-taa yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtɩlɩ pʋdʋ camɩyɛ, ɩtaañɔtɩnɩ-ɩ nɛ piyele fɛyɛ kpa-ɩ.

eng: Dont treat them like enemies, but warn them like you would do for a brother or sister.
local: Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɩtaakpaɣ-ɩ ɛzɩ mi-koyindu yɔ, ɛlɛ́, ɩkalɩ-ɩ ɛzɩ mɩ-taabalʋ yɔ.

eng: May the Lord of peace himself give you peace always in every way. The Lord be with all of you.
local: Kɩpaɣlʋ laŋhɛzɩyɛ tʋ maɣmaɣ ɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa alɩwaatʋ kpeekpe pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa! Ɛwɛɛ mɩtɩŋa payɩ mɩ-cɔlɔ!.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting with my own hand. This verifies that the letter is from me, as in every letter of mine. This is how I write.
local: Ma Pɔɔlɩ, ma-maɣmaɣ mamaɣnɩ tɔm pee anɛ nɛ me-nesi. Ana lɛ se: mɛnsɛ-mɩ. Ḿbʋ́ mañɩkɩɣ nesi man-takayɩsɩ tɩŋa taa. Ḿbʋ́ mamaɣ.

eng: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with all of you.
local: Đa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ ɛla mɩtɩŋa payɩ lootiye!.

eng: The Spirit clearly says that in latter times some people will turn away from the faith. They will pay attention to spirits that deceive and to the teaching of demons.
local: Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔdɩ kpayɩ se kɛtɛzaɣ alɩwaatʋ taa lɛ, ɛyáa nabɛyɛ kɔŋ yebu lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ pɛwɛnɩ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ nɛ panɩɣnɩ feziŋ weyi ɩcɛtɩɣ yɔ nɛ pewelesiɣ tɔm ndʋ́ aleewaa wɩlɩɣ yɔ.

eng: They will be controlled by the pretense of lying, and their own consciences will be seared.
local: Tɛɛ nɛ pʋ-yɔɔ ñɩma mbá pɛcɛtɩɣ yɔ, ḿbá lesiɣni-wɛ nʋmɔʋ. Tɛɛ nɛ pʋ-yɔɔ ñɩma ḿbá, pa-ñʋŋ taa wɩlɩ kaŋ kaŋ ɛzɩ pɔhɔbɩ ñɩmɩyɛ miŋ nɛ pañaɣzɩ pe-feteɣnim yɔ.

eng: They will prohibit marriage and eating foods that God created—and he intended them to be accepted with thanksgiving by those who are faithful and have come to know the truth.
local: Pɩtɛ ɛyáa ḿbá pɔtɔŋnɩ se pataakpaɣ halaa, pataatɔɔ tɔɔnasɩ nasɩyɩ. Ŋgʋ́, Ɛsɔ labɩ-sɩ se pɔtɔɔ-sɩ. Mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ patɩlɩ mbʋ́ pɩkɛ toovenim yɔ, papɩzɩɣ pɔtɔɔ-sɩ nɛ pasa Ɛsɔ sɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: Everything that has been created by God is good, and nothing that is received with thanksgiving should be rejected.
local: Mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ Ɛsɔ laba yɔ, pʋwɛ ɖeu. Pɩfɛyɩ se pekizi pɩ-taa nabʋyʋ. Ɛlɛ́, ɖɩsɛɛ-ɩ mbʋ́ ɛhaɣ-ɖʋ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: These things are made holy by Gods word and prayer.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔtɔm nɛ Ɛsɔ sɛʋ peyekina se papɩzɩ pɔtɔɔ-pʋ.

eng: If you point these things out to the believers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus who has been trained by the words of faith and the good teaching that youve carefully followed.
local: Yee ŋwɩlɩɣ ña-taabalaa tɔm ńdʋ́ yɔ, ŋkɛɣ Krɩstʋ Yesu tʋmlaɖʋ kɩbanʋ. Ḿbʋ́ wɩlɩɣna se ŋyeki nɛ lidaʋ tɔm sʋʋnɩ-ŋ nɛ ŋɖɔŋ camɩyɛ tɔm kɩbandʋ ndʋ́ pɛkpɛlɩkɩ-ŋ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: But stay away from the godless myths that are passed down from the older women. Train yourself for a holy life!.
local: Kizi tɔm ndʋ́ tɩtɛkɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩndʋ yɔ nɛ halaa akpadɩyaa mʋya wena aawazɩɣ pʋyʋ yɔ. Malɩsɩ ña-tɩ nɛ ŋcaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ liu wɛʋ yɔ.

eng: While physical training has some value, training in holy living is useful for everything. It has promise for this life now and the life to come.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛmalɩsɩɣ e-tomnaɣ nɛ nabʋyʋ yɔ, pʋwɛ waɣzaɣ pazɩ yem. Ɛlɛ́, yee ɛcaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ liu wɛʋ yɔ yɔ, pʋwɛ waɣzaɣ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩhaɣ-ɖʋ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ wezuu nɛ cee wayɩ ñɩŋgʋ.

eng: This saying is reliable and deserves complete acceptance.
local: Tɔm ńdʋ́ tɩkɛ toovenim. Tɩmʋnaa se paa weyi etisi-tʋ nɛ ɛ-laŋɩyɛ tɩŋa.

eng: We work and struggle for this: Our hope is set on the living God, who is the savior of all people, especially those who believe.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ ɖɩlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ sɩbʋ yɔɔ sɩbʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɖɩlʋkɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩtaɣ Ɛsɔ weyi ɛwɛ wezuu yɔ. Ɛkɛ ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ ñʋʋ yaɖʋ, kɔzɩkɔzɩ mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: Command these things. Teach them.
local: Ḿbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se ŋheyi ɛyáa nɛ ŋwɩlɩ-wɛ.

eng: Dont let anyone look down on you because you are young. Instead, set an example for the believers through your speech, behavior, love, faith, and by being sexually pure.
local: Taayele se nɔɔyʋ ɛpɛŋ-ŋ tɛtɛ se ŋkɛ evebu. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se ŋwɩlɩ mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ nʋmɔʋ nɛ ñɔ-yɔɔdaɣ nɛ ñɔ-ɖɔnɛ nɛ ñɔ-sɔɔlɩm nɛ ñe-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ nɛ ña-cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ wɛtʋ.

eng: Until I arrive, pay attention to public reading, preaching, and teaching.
local: Wɛɛ Ɛsɔtɔm kalʋʋ yɔɔ ɛyáa samaɣ taa nɛ ŋyele pɩlabɩ-wɛ hʋnʋm nɛ ŋwɩlɩ-wɛ-tʋ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mɔnkɔŋ yɔ.

eng: Dont neglect the spiritual gift in you that was given through prophecy when the elders laid hands on you.
local: Taaniɣzi kʋjɔʋ ŋgʋ́ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu labɩ-ŋ yɔ. Kɩlabɩ-ŋ-kʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ paayɔɔdɩ ñɔ-yɔɔ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ nɛ sɔsaa tɩnɩ ñɔ-yɔɔ nesi yɔ.

eng: Practice these things, and live by them so that your progress will be visible to all.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se ŋha ña-tɩ pilim nɛ ŋla tʋmɩyɛ ńɖɩ́ nɛ ɛyáa tɩŋa na ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ŋwokini ɛsɩndaa yɔ.

eng: Focus on working on your own development and on what you teach. If you do this, you will save yourself and those who hear you.
local: Ñaɣ pana ŋɖɔkɩ ña-tɩ nɛ ŋɖʋ ɛsɩyɛ mbʋ́ ŋwɩlɩɣ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, yee ŋlabɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ŋyakɩ ña nɛ mbá pewelesiɣni-ŋ yɔ mɩ-ñʋʋ.

eng: Dont correct an older man, but encourage him like hes your father; treat younger men like your brothers.
local: Yee ña nɛ akpadɩyʋ nɔɔyʋ ɩwɛɛ yɔ, taakpɩɣdɩ-ɩ, ɛlɛ́, yɔɔdɩnɩ-ɩ ɛzɩ ña-caa yɔ. Kpaɣ evebiya ɛzɩ ña-ñɩma yɔ.

eng: treat older women like your mother, and treat younger women like your sisters with appropriate respect.
local: Kpaɣ ɖɔɖɔ halaa akpadɩyaa ɛzɩ ño-ɖoonaa yɔ nɛ asayaa ɛzɩ ñɛ-ɛyáa yɔ. Taawɛnɩ lɩmaɣza kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ pa-taa nɔɔyʋ yɔɔ.

eng: Take care of widows who are truly needy.
local: Đʋ lelaa mbá pɛfɛyɩnɩ nɔɔyʋ kpem yɔ hɩɖɛ.

eng: But if a particular widow has children or grandchildren, they should first learn to respect their own family and repay their parents, because this pleases God.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee lelu nɔɔyʋ ɛwɛnɩ piya yaa sayɩnaa yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ḿbá ɛcalɩnɩ kpɛlɩkʋʋ mbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa se pala pɔ-hɔʋ taa ñɩma yɔ. Pʋ-tɔbʋʋ se ḿbá pɩtalɩnaa se pɔcɔnɩ pa-ñɩma yɔɔ ɛzɩ paba kɔcɔnaʋ pɔ-yɔɔ yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ḿbʋ́ kɛdɩnɩnɩ Ɛsɔ.

eng: A widow who is truly needy and all alone puts her hope in God and keeps on going with requests and prayers, night and day.
local: Lelu weyi ɛwɛ e-ɖeke kpem nɛ ɛfɛyɩnɩ nɔɔyʋ se ɛcɔnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɛtaɣ Ɛsɔ liu nɛ ɛwɛɣ-ɩ sɛʋ yɔɔ nɛ etendiɣ-i wɩsɩ nɛ ɖoó.

eng: But a widow who tries to live a life of luxury is dead even while she is alive.
local: Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛ́lɛ́ wɛɛ ɛlakɩ yem yem yɔ, paa ɛwɛ wezuu yɔ, ɛtɛm sɩbʋ.

eng: Teach these things so that the families will be without fault.
local: Ḿbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se ŋheyi-wɛ nɛ nɔɔyʋ ɛtaana ɛzaɣ́tʋ natʋyʋ nɛ ɛwanɩ-wɛ.

eng: But if someone doesnt provide for their own family, and especially for a member of their household, they have denied the faith. They are worse than those who have no faith.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛɛcɔŋnɩ ɛ-ñɩma yɔɔ, kɔzɩkɔzɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-hɔʋ taa ñɩma yɔɔ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se ɛlɔ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛwɛnɩ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ. Weyi ɛfɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ, ɛ́lɛ́ ñakɩlɩ-ɩ wee wee.

eng: Put a widow on the list who is older than years old and who was faithful to her husband.
local: Pʋcɔ pama lelu nɔɔyʋ hɩɖɛ lelitu takayaɣ taa lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se ɛwɛnɩ pɩnzɩ nɩɩnʋwa nɛ hiu nɛ pɩkpaɣ pɩɖɛɛ. Pʋwɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ se pɩkɛnɩ weyi ɛɛwalɩ abalʋ kʋɖʋm koŋ yɔ.

eng: She should have a reputation for doing good: raising children, providing hospitality to strangers, washing the feet of the saints, helping those in distress, and dedicating herself to every kind of good thing.
local: Pʋwɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ se ɛyáa ɛlɩzɩ ɛ-aseɣɖe se ɛcɔnɩ e-piya yɔɔ ɖeu nɛ ɛmʋ mbá powokaɣ ɛ-tɛ yɔ camɩyɛ nɛ ɛkɔ Ɛsɔ ñɩma naŋgbanzɩ lɩm nɛ ɛsɩnɩ kʋñɔndɩnaa nɛ ɛ-ɛsɩyɛ sɛɛnɩ mbʋ́ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ pɩtɩŋa payɩ.

eng: But dont accept younger widows for the list. When their physical desires distract them from Christ, they will want to get married.
local: Ɛlɛ́, taama lelaa mbá patakpadɩyɩ yɔ pa-hɩla. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mbʋ́ pe-liu wɛɛ yɔ pɩyasɩɣ pa nɛ Krɩstʋ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ, pɩlakɩ-wɛ liu se paɖaɣnɩ walʋʋ.

eng: Then they will be judged for setting aside their earlier commitment.
local: Palabɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pasʋʋ tɔm. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, peyebi mbʋ́ pacalɩ ɖʋʋ se palakɩ yɔ.

eng: Also, they learn to be lazy by going from house to house. They are not only lazy, but they also become gossips and busybodies, talking about things they shouldnt.
local: Paa patatasɩ walʋʋ yɔ, papɩsɩɣ fendinaa, panɩɣnɩ ɖɩsɩ taa cɔʋ. Pɩɩsɩɣnɩ pi-ɖeke. Ɛlɛ́, papɩsɩɣ ɖɔɖɔ kɔkɔɖɛ yaɖaa nɛ paɖʋʋ pɔ-nɔsɩ lɛlaa tɔm taa nɛ pɔyɔɔdʋʋ tɔm ndʋ́ pɩtamʋnɩ se pɔyɔɔdɩ yɔ.

eng: So I want younger widows to marry, have children, and manage their homes so that they wont give the enemy any reason to slander us. .
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ me-liu wɛɛ se paɖaɣnɩ walʋʋ nɛ palʋlɩ piya nɛ pɔcɔnɩ pa-ɖɩsɩ yɔɔ nɛ pataaha koyindinaa waɖɛ nɛ pɔyɔɔdɩ tɔm ɛzaɣ́tʋ.

eng: Some have already turned away to follow Satan.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, lelaa ḿbá, pa-taa nabɛyɛ tɛm yebu Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ nɛ patɩŋ Satanɩ wayɩ.

eng: If any woman who is a believer has widows in her family, she should take care of them and not burden the church, so that it can help other widows who are truly needy.
local: Yee lelaa ɛwɛ Krɩstʋ tʋ halʋ ñɩnʋ nɔɔyʋ liɖe taa yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɛsɩnɩ-wɛ. Ɛtaayebini-wɛ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ. Peeɖe ɖɩɖɩ pɩzɩɣ ɖɩsɩnɩ lelaa mbá pɛfɛyɩnɩ nɔɔyʋ yɔ.

eng: Elders who lead well should be paid double, especially those who work with public speaking and teaching.
local: Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa sɔsaa mbá pɔcɔŋnɩ ɛ-ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma yɔɔ camɩyɛ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se panɩɩnɩ-wɛ siŋŋ. Kɔzɩkɔzɩ mbá pañakɩ pana nɛ peheyiɣ ɛyáa Ɛsɔtɔm nɛ pawɩlɩɣ-tʋ yɔ.

eng: The scripture says, Dont put a muzzle on an ox while it treads grain , and Workers deserve their pay .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Nɔ weyi ɛmakɩ mɩla yɔ , paahɔkʋʋ ɛ-nɔɔ se ɛtaatɔɔ.» Pamawa ɖɔɖɔ se: «Pʋmʋnaa se pɛhɛyɩ tʋmlaɖʋ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ yɔɔ.».

eng: Dont accept an accusation made against an elder unless it is confirmed by two or three witnesses.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛkʋyɩ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa sɔsɔ nɔɔyʋ yɔɔ e-ɖeke se ɛlabɩ pʋyʋ yɔ, taanɩnɩ-ɩ. Pʋwɛɛ se ŋnɩɩ aseɣɖe tɩnaa naalɛ yaa naadozo nɔsɩ taa nɛ pʋcɔ ŋtisi.

eng: This saying is reliable: if anyone has a goal to be a supervisor in the church, they want a good thing.
local: Tɔm ndʋ́ meheyiɣ-mɩ yɔ, tɩkɛ toovenim. Ńdʋ́ lɛ se: yee nɔɔyʋ ɛcaɣ se ɛkɛ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma yɔɔ cɔnɩyʋ yɔ, tʋmɩyɛ kɩbanɖɛ pʋdʋ liu wɛɛ.

eng: Discipline those who are sinning in front of everyone so that all the others will be afraid.
local: Kalɩ mbá palakɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ ɛyáa samaɣ taa nɛ sɔɔndʋ kpa lɛlaa.

eng: So the churchs supervisor must be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, sober, modest, and honest. They should show hospitality and be skilled at teaching.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se weyi ɛlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ ńɖɩ́ yɔ, kawanaɣ nakɛyɛ ɛtaawɛɛ ɛ-yɔɔ. Ɛwɛnɩ halʋ kʋɖʋm koŋ, ɛ-ɛsɛ ekuli. Ɛkɛ ɛyʋ weyi ɛmaɣzɩɣ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛla pʋyʋ yɔ, ɛla mbʋ́ pʋmʋnaa yɔ, ɛmʋ agɔmaa camɩyɛ. Pʋwɛɛ se ɛtɩlɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pawɩlɩɣ Ɛsɔtɔm yɔ.

eng: I charge you before God and Christ Jesus and the elect angels to follow these practices without bias, and without playing favorites.
local: Meheyiɣ-ŋ Ɛsɔ nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu nɛ Ɛsɔ lɩzɩ e-tiyiyaa mbá yɔ pɛ-ɛsɩndaa kpayɩ se ŋɖɔ tɔm ńdʋ́ tɩ-yɔɔ camɩyɛ. Taacɔnɩ nɔɔyʋ ɛsɛ yɔɔ yem, taala nabʋyʋ ɛsɩmɩyɛ yɔɔ.

eng: They shouldnt be addicted to alcohol or be a bully. Instead, they should be gentle, peaceable, and not greedy.
local: Pɩtamʋnɩ se ɛkɛ sʋlʋm kpaŋɩyʋ, ɛtaawɛɛ helu helu. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se ɛwɛɛ leleŋ, ɛtaakɛ tɔm cayʋ, ɛtaawɛɛ liidiye laɣzaɣ.

eng: Dont rush to commission anyone to leadership, and dont participate in the sins of others. Keep yourself morally pure.
local: Taakpedesi se ŋtɩnɩɣ nɔɔyʋ yɔɔ nesi. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, yee ɛlabɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ yɔ, pʋwɛ ɛzɩ ŋtɩnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, wɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ ḿbʋ́.

eng: They should manage their own household well—they should see that their children are obedient with complete respect.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛpɩzɩ ɛcɔnɩ ɛ-hɔʋ taa ñɩma yɔɔ camɩyɛ nɛ ɛkpɛlɩkɩ e-piya nɛ siluzi sɩ-tɩ ɛ-tɛɛ nɛ sɩñam-ɩ ɖeu siŋŋ.

eng: Dont drink water anymore, but use a little wine because of your stomach problems and your frequent illnesses.
local: Paa ḿbʋ́, taatasɩ ñɔʋ lɩkpadaɣ ɖeke, ɛlɛ́, ñɔɔ sʋlʋm pazɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ŋwɛnɩ lotu kʋdɔŋ nɛ pɩɩlaɣzɩɣ-ŋ wɩʋ.

eng: because if they dont know how to manage their own household, how can they take care of Gods church?.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, yee ɛyʋ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-hɔʋ taa ñɩma yɔɔ cɔnaʋ lɛ, ɛzɩma ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛcɔnɩ Ɛsɔ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma yɔɔ yɔ?.

eng: The sins of some people are obvious, and the sins are judged before the people must face judgment, but the sins of other people show up later.
local: Paacazɩɣ ɛyáa lɛlaa maɣzʋʋ nɛ pʋcɔ pana pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm. Pɩkazɩ lɛlaa lɛ, pɛtɛŋ-wɛ maɣzʋʋ nɛ pʋcɔ pana pa-ñɩmbʋ.

eng: They shouldnt be new believers so that they wont become proud and fall under the devils spell.
local: Pɩtamʋnɩ se ɛkɛ ɛyʋ weyi ɛpɩsɩ Krɩstʋ tʋ nɛ piteleɖida yɔ. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, nabʋyʋ taa ɛkɔŋ ɛkpazɩ ɛ-tɩ nɛ Ɛsɔ hʋʋnɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛkʋ ɛ-tɔm ɛzɩ ɛkʋʋ Satanɩ ñɩndʋ yɔ.

eng: In the same way, the good that people do is also obvious and cant be hidden.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pʋwɛɛ, panaɣ ɖɔɖɔ tʋma kɩbana kaŋŋ. Paa patana naayɛ kpaagbaa yɔ, aawɛɣ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ tam ḿbʋ́.

eng: They should also have a good reputation with those outside the church so that they wont be embarrassed and fall into the devils trap.
local: Pʋwɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ se mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma yɔ, palɩzɩ ɛ-yɔɔ aseɣɖe kɩbanɖɛ. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, pɛpɛŋɩɣ-ɩ tɛtɛ nɛ Satanɩ kaamʋʋ kɔɔ kɩkpa-ɩ.

eng: In the same way, servants in the church should be dignified, not two-faced, heavy drinkers, or greedy for money.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se mbá pɛkɛɣ tayɩyaa Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa yɔ, pɛkɛ ɛyáa kʋtʋʋzaa, pataawɛnɩ nɔsɩ naalɛ naalɛ. Pɩfɛyɩ se pɔñɔɔ sʋlʋm nɛ pɩkɩlɩ-wɛ yaa pomuli lɛlaa se pehiɣ kɛzɛɣa.

eng: They should hold on to the faith that has been revealed with a clear conscience.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se pɔ́ɖɔ́kɩ lidaʋ tɔm ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ lɩzaa ɛwɩlɩ ɛ-ñɩma yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, pa-lɩmaɣza ɛtaacɛyɩ-wɛ pe-wezuu caɣʋ taa.

eng: They should also be tested and then serve if they are without fault.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se pacalɩ-wɛ maɣzʋʋ nɛ yee patana kawanaɣ nakɛyɛ pɔ-yɔɔ lɛ, peyebi-wɛ nɛ pɛkɛ tayɩyaa.

eng: In the same way, women who are servants in the church should be dignified and not gossip. They should be sober and faithful in everything they do.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se pa-halaa ɛkɛ ɖɔɖɔ ɛyáa kʋtʋʋzaa. Pataayɔɔdʋʋ ɛyáa tɔm, pɛ-ɛsɛ ekuli nɛ pala paa ɛbɛ ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ.

eng: Servants must be faithful to their spouse and manage their children and their own households well.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se weyi ɛkɛ tayɩyʋ yɔ, ɛwɛnɩ halʋ kʋɖʋm koŋ. Pʋwɛɛ se ɛpɩzɩ ɛcɔnɩ e-piya nɛ ɛ-hɔʋ taa ñɩma lɛlaa pɔ-yɔɔ camɩyɛ.

eng: Those who have served well gain a good standing and considerable confidence in the faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, tayɩyaa mbá palakɩ pa-tʋmɩyɛ camɩyɛ yɔ, paɖʋʋ-wɛ hɩɖɛ, pa-laŋɩyɛ ɛɛmaɣnɩ pʋyʋ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ Yesu yɔɔ.

eng: I hope to come to you quickly. But Im writing these things to you so that.
local: Mamaɣ-ŋ takayaɣ kanɛ, ɛlɛ́, mamaɣzɩɣ se mɔnkɔŋ ñɛ-tɛ alɩwaatʋ tʋnɛ tɩ-taa.

eng: if Im delayed, youll know how you should behave in Gods household. It is the church of the living God and the backbone and support of the truth.
local: Yee mɔntɔkɔɔ lɔŋ yɔ, takayaɣ kanɛ kawɩlɩɣnɩ-ŋ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se pɔɖɔ Ɛsɔ hɔʋ taa yɔ. Ŋ́gʋ́ lɛ Ɛsɔ weyi ɛwɛ wezuu yɔ ɛ-ŋgbɛyɛ. Ŋ́gʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ lɛ toovenim tɔm tilimiye nɛ ti-sisika.

eng: Without question, the mystery of godliness is great: he was revealed as a human, declared righteous by the Spirit, seen by angels, preached throughout the nations, believed in around the world, and taken up in glory.
local: Toovenim lɛ, tɔm ndʋ́ tɩɩwɛ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ nɛ Ɛsɔ wɩlɩ-ɖʋ-tʋ nɛ ɖɩtɩŋɩɣnɩ tɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɖɩlakɩ mbʋ́ e-liu wɛɛ yɔ, tɩpaɣlaa kámaɣ́ fɛyɩ! Ńdʋ́ lɛ se: weyi ɛwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ, etiba nɛ ɛpɩsɩ ɛyʋ. Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu wɩlaa se ɛtʋʋzaa, Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa na-ɩ. Posusi ɛ-tɔm paa le, ɛyáa sakɩyɛ wɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ, Ɛsɔ kpazɩ-ɩ koboyaɣ taa.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, to promote the promise of life that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Ma Pɔɔlɩ, Ɛsɔ liu wɛnɩ se mɛnkɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu tiyiyu nɛ meheyi ɛyáa wezuu ŋgʋ́ ɛɖʋwa se ɛhaɣ-ɖʋ ɖa nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu ɛnʋ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa yɔ kʋ-tɔm.

eng: To Timothy, my dear child. Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Timootee, man-pɩɣa kʋsɔɔlaɣ! Ña mamaɣ takayaɣ kanɛ. Mɛnsɛ-ŋ: Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Krɩstʋ Yesu palabɩ-ŋ lootiye nɛ pana ña-pʋtɔdɩyɛ nɛ pɛhɛzɩ ña-laŋɩyɛ.

eng: Im grateful to God, whom I serve with a good conscience as my ancestors did. I constantly remember you in my prayers day and night.
local: Mansaŋ Ɛsɔ se malakɩ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ nɛ laŋɩyɛ kɩbanɖɛ ɛzɩ mɔn-cɔzɔnaa kalabʋ yɔ. Paa wɩsɩ yaa ɖoó yaa alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mɛnsɛɣ-ɩ yɔ, mansaŋ-ɩ ñɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: When I remember your tears, I long to see you so that I can be filled with happiness.
local: Mɔntɔzʋʋ ñe-wiluu yɔɔ nɛ piyele pɩlakɩ-m liu kpem se mantasɩ-ŋ naʋ nɛ ma-laŋɩyɛ tɛzɩ hʋlʋmʋʋ.

eng: Im reminded of your authentic faith, which first lived in your grandmother Lois and your mother Eunice. Im sure that this faith is also inside you.
local: Mɔntɔzʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ nɛ tɛɛ nɛ pʋ-yɔɔ lɩmaɣza fɛyɩ kɩ-taa yɔ. Lidaʋ ŋ́gʋ́, ñe-neze Loyisi kacalɩnɩ-kʋ wɛnaʋ, ɛ́lɛ́ wayɩ lɛ, ño-ɖoo Eniisi nɛ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ manaɣʋ yɔ, pɩtalɩnɩ-ŋ.

eng: Because of this, Im reminding you to revive Gods gift that is in you through the laying on of my hands.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mɔntɔzʋʋ-ŋ se ŋla nɛ kʋjɔʋ ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ labɩ-ŋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mantɩnɩ ñɔ-yɔɔ nesi yɔ, kɩpaɣlɩ camɩyɛ.

eng: God didnt give us a spirit that is timid but one that is powerful, loving, and self-controlled.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ ha-ɖʋ yɔ, kiiyeki se ɖɩwɛɛ niŋkaɣ, ɛlɛ́, kiyeki se ɖɩwɛnɩ ɖoŋ nɛ sɔɔlɩm nɛ tɩ ɖɔkʋʋ.

eng: So dont be ashamed of the testimony about the Lord or of me, his prisoner. Instead, share the suffering for the good news, depending on Gods power.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, fɛyɛ ɛtaakpa-ŋ nɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔɔ aseɣɖe lɩzʋʋ yaa weyi ma paɖʋ salaka ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ mɔ-yɔɔ. Ɛlɛ́, Yesu Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔɔ lɛ, tisi nɛ pɩtɩŋnɩ ɖoŋ weyi Ɛsɔ ha-ŋ yɔ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ ŋtɔɔ kʋñɔŋ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ ma yɔ.

eng: God is the one who saved and called us with a holy calling. This wasnt based on what we have done, but it was based on his own purpose and grace that he gave us in Christ Jesus before time began.
local: Ɛnʋ yabɩnɩ ɖa-ñʋʋ nɛ ɛ́yáa-ɖʋ se ɖɩkɛ ɛ-ñɩma. Pɩtɛkɛ tʋma wena ɖɩlaba yɔ a-yɔɔ ɛlabɩ-ɖʋ ḿbʋ́. Ɛlɛ́, pʋcɔ ɛla kedeŋa lɛ, ɛɛɖʋwa se ɛtɩŋɩɣnɩ Krɩstʋ Yesu yɔɔ nɛ ɛlabɩ-ɖʋ lootiye.

eng: Now his grace is revealed through the appearance of our savior, Christ Jesus. He destroyed death and brought life and immortality into clear focus through the good news.
local: Đa-Ñʋʋ Yaɖʋ Krɩstʋ Yesu kɔm yebina nɛ ɖɩnaɣ-ɖɩ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛwabɩ sɩm nɛ piyele ɛtɩŋnɩ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm yɔɔ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ wezuu maatɛŋ.

eng: I was appointed a messenger, apostle, and teacher of this good news.
local: Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ńdʋ́, tɩ-taa Ɛsɔ ɖʋ-m se mɛnkɛ Yesu tiyiyu nɛ mɛntɛ mɛnkɛ wɩlɩyʋ nɛ mɛntɛ mɛnkɛ ti-susiyu.

eng: This is also why Im suffering the way I do, but Im not ashamed. I know the one in whom Ive placed my trust. Im convinced that God is powerful enough to protect what he has placed in my trust until that day.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mɔntɔkɩ kʋñɔŋ kʋnɛ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, fɛyɛ ɛɛkpaɣ-m nɛ kʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mansɩm weyi ɛ-yɔɔ mɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ yɔ nɛ mana siŋŋ se ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛcɔnɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋzɩ me-nesi taa yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ.

eng: Hold on to the pattern of sound teaching that you heard from me with the faith and love that are in Christ Jesus.
local: Yele nɛ toovenim tɔm ndʋ́ meheyi-ŋ yɔ, tɩkɛnɩ ña-nʋmɔʋ lidaʋ wɛnaʋ nɛ sɔɔlɩm mbá ŋwɛnɩ ña nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa yɔ pa-taa.

eng: Protect this good thing that has been placed in your trust through the Holy Spirit who lives in us.
local: Đɔkɩ pʋyʋ kɩbanʋ weyi Ɛsɔ tɩŋnɩ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ŋgʋ́ kɩwɛ ɖa-taa yɔ kʋ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛ́ɖʋzɩ ñe-nesi taa yɔ nesi naalɛ kpam.

eng: You know that everyone in Asia has turned away from me, including Phygelus and Hermogenes.
local: Ɛzɩ ŋtɛm naʋ yɔ, Aazii egeetiye taa ñɩma tɩŋa payɩ ha-m siɣ́ye, pa-taa yɔ: Fiijɛɛlɩ nɛ Ɛrmoojɛɛnɩ.

eng: May the Lord show mercy to Onesiphorus household, because he supported me many times and he wasnt ashamed of my imprisonment.
local: Pɩkazɩ Onezifɔɔrɩ lɛ, Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛna ɛ-hɔʋ taa ñɩma pʋtɔdɩyɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛɛpam hɛzʋʋ ma-laŋɩyɛ, fɛyɛ takpa-ɩ mɔ-yɔɔ se mɛwɛ salaka taa.

eng: After I arrived in Rome, he quickly looked for me and found me.
local: Halɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛkɔm Room yɔ, ɛñɩnɩ-m ɛzɩ ɛsɩyɛ taa pɩɣa yɔ nɛ ɛkɔɔ ɛna-m.

eng: May the Lord allow him to find his mercy on that day .
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, Kɩpaɣlʋ eyele nɛ Ɛsɔ na ɛ-pʋtɔdɩyɛ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ. Ŋsɩm ɖɔɖɔ tʋma wena atɩŋa payɩ ɛlabɩ-m Efɛɛzɩ yɔ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ lɛlaa tɩŋa.

eng: So, my child, draw your strength from the grace that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́ ña man-pɩɣa lɛ, tɩŋnɩ lootiye nɖɩ́ palabɩ-ɖʋ ɖa nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa yɔ ɖɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ŋkpa ɖoŋ.

eng: Take the things you heard me say in front of many other witnesses and pass them on to faithful people who are also capable of teaching others.
local: Tɔm ndʋ́ ŋnɩ mawɩlaɣ ɛyáa sakɩyɛ ɛsɩndaa yɔ, ɖʋzɩ-tʋ mbá ŋtaɣ-wɛ liu yɔ pe-nesi taa nɛ papɩzɩ pawɩlɩ-tʋ ɖɔɖɔ lɛlaa.

eng: Accept your share of suffering like a good soldier of Christ Jesus.
local: Ña ɖɔɖɔ, tisi nɛ ŋtɔɔ kʋñɔŋ ɛzɩ Krɩstʋ Yesu sɔɔja kɩbanʋ yɔ.

eng: Nobody who serves in the military gets tied up with civilian matters, so that they can please the one who recruited them.
local: Yee sɔɔja nɔɔyʋ ɛwɛ you taa nɛ ɛcaɣ se ɛ-tɔm ɛkɛdɩnɩ ɛ-ñʋʋdʋ yɔ, ɛɛnɩɣnɩ mbʋ́ mbá pɛtɛkɛ sɔɔjanaa yɔ palakɩ yɔ.

eng: Also in the same way, athletes dont win unless they follow the rules.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pʋwɛɛ: weyi ewoki seya taa yɔ, yee ese ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ yɔ, kalɩ pi-ɖeke eehiɣ nabʋyʋ.

eng: A hardworking farmer should get the first share of the crop.
local: Đɔɖɔ lɛ, haɖʋ weyi ɛkaŋ ñʋʋ nɛ ɛhayɩ siŋŋ yɔ, ɛnʋ pʋwɛɛ se ɛcalɩ mʋ́ʋ e-ɖeɖe.

eng: Think about what Im saying; the Lord will give you understanding about everything.
local: Maɣzɩ tɔm ndʋ́ mɔyɔɔdʋʋ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ camɩyɛ, peeɖe Kɩpaɣlʋ yeki nɛ ŋnɩɩ tɩtɩŋa payɩ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ.

eng: Remember Jesus Christ, who was raised from the dead and descended from David. This is my good news.
local: Tɔzɩ Daaviidi liɖe taa tʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ weyi Ɛsɔ fezi-i nɛ sɩɖaa taa yɔ ɛ-yɔɔ. Ɛ-tɔm lɛ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ndʋ́ monsusuu yɔ.

eng: This is the reason Im suffering to the point that Im in prison like a common criminal. But Gods word cannot be imprisoned.
local: Tɩ-yɔɔ malakɩ kʋñɔŋ, halɩ paɖɩ-m yoŋgbasɩ ɛzɩ kɩdɛkɛdɩm laɖʋ nɔɔyʋ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, pataɖɩ Ɛsɔtɔm yoŋgbasɩ.

eng: This is why I endure everything for the sake of those who are chosen by God so that they too may experience salvation in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mentisaa se manɩɩ wɩzasɩ ńzɩ́ sɩtɩŋa nɛ pʋwazɩ mbá Ɛsɔ lɩzaa yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ paba pɩzɩ pehiɣ ñʋʋ yabʋ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu cɔlɔ yɔ nɛ koboyaɣ maatɛŋ.

eng: This saying is reliable: If we have died together, we will also live together.
local: Tɔm ndʋ́ meheyiɣ-mɩ yɔ, tɩkɛ toovenim. Ńdʋ́ lɛ se: «Yee ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩsɩbɩna yɔ, ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩkɔŋnɩ wɛʋ wezuu ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: If we endure, we will also rule together. If we deny him, he will also deny us.
local: Yee ɖɩɖɔkɩ ɖa-tɩ ḿbʋ́ kpam yɔ, ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩkɔŋnɩ tɔɔʋ kewiyaɣ ɖɔɖɔ. Yee ɖikizi-i yɔ, ɛkɔŋ-ɖʋ kizuu ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: If we are disloyal, he stays faithful because he cant be anything else than what he is.
local: Yee ɖa ɖaalakɩ mbʋ́ ɖɩɖʋwa yɔ yɔ, ɛnʋ ñalakɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ, ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ekizini ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ.».

eng: Remind them of these things and warn them in the sight of God not to engage in battles over words that arent helpful and only destroy those who hear them.
local: Tɔzɩ ɛyáa tɔm ńdʋ́ nɛ ŋheyi-wɛ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa se pataayoo tɔm pee yɔɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, you ŋ́gʋ́ kɩɩwazɩɣ pʋyʋ, ɛlɛ́, kʋɖʋzʋʋ mbá pewelesiɣ-kʋ yɔ.

eng: Understand that the last days will be dangerous times.
local: Nɩɩ ɖeu se: alɩwaatʋ kaɖɛ ñɩndʋ kɔŋ wɛʋ kɛtɛzaɣ kɩyakɩŋ taa.

eng: Make an effort to present yourself to God as a tried-and-true worker, who doesnt need to be ashamed but is one who interprets the message of truth correctly.
local: Ñaɣ pana nɛ ŋkɛ ɛyʋ weyi pasɩm ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa ɛzɩ tʋmlaɖʋ weyi fɛyɛ ɛɛkpaɣ-ɩ nɛ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ nɛ esusuu toovenim tɔm camɩyɛ yɔ.

eng: People will be selfish and love money. They will be the kind of people who brag and who are proud. They will slander others, and they will be disobedient to their parents. They will be ungrateful, unholy.
local: Toovenim lɛ, ɛyáa kɔŋ nɩnaʋ pa-tɩ nɛ pɛ-ɛsɩyɛ sɛɛnɩ liidiye cazʋʋ nɛ pɛkɛ pɔpɔtɩnaa nɛ pakpazɩɣ pa-tɩ nɛ pɛwɛɛkɩɣ Ɛsɔ hɩɖɛ nɛ paañaŋ pa-ñɩma, paawɛɣ ɛsɩmɩyɛ, paañaŋ Ɛsɔ ñɩm.

eng: Avoid their godless discussions, because they will lead many people into ungodly behavior.
local: Taayɔɔdɩ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩɩwazɩɣ pʋyʋ nɛ tɩtɛkɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ yɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mbá panɩɣnɩ-tʋ yɔ, pɛtɛzɩɣ-ɩ posinaʋ tam.

eng: unloving, contrary, and critical. They will be without self-control and brutal, and they wont love what is good.
local: Pa-paa ɛɛwɛɣnɩ pʋyʋ, paasɩŋ pʋtɔdɩyɛ, pɛwɛɛkɩɣ ɛyáa hɩla, paasɩŋ pa-tɩ ɖɔkʋʋ, pɛwɛɣ ñaŋ nɛ pɛkɛ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ pu-koyindinaa.

eng: and their ideas will spread like an infection. This includes Hymenaeus and Philetus.
local: Pɔ-tɔm kɔŋ wɛʋ ɛzɩ kɩcɩkpʋʋ ŋgʋ́ kʋsʋ sonzoowe yɔ. Pa-taa lɛ: Imenee nɛ Filɛɛtɩ.

eng: They will be people who are disloyal, reckless, and conceited. They will love pleasure instead of loving God.
local: Palɩɣ ɛyáa wayɩ, pa-lɩmaɣza fɛyɩ, tɩ kpazʋʋ suni pa-taa. Ɛzɩ paasɔɔlɩ Ɛsɔ lɛ, peyeki pɔsɔɔlʋʋ mbʋ́ pɩkɛdɩnɩ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: who have deviated from the truth by claiming that the resurrection has already happened. This has undermined some peoples faith.
local: mbá peyebi toovenim nʋmɔʋ nɛ peheyiɣ ɛyáa se Ɛsɔ tɛm-ɖʋ fezuu nɛ sɩɖaa taa yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ labɩna nɛ nabɛyɛ lesi pe-lidaʋ.

eng: They will look like they are religious but deny Gods power. Avoid people like this.
local: Pɔkɔŋ wɛʋ ɛsɛ yɔɔ ɛzɩ mbá pɔɖɔŋ lidaʋ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ, naze lɛ, pekiziɣ se ɖoŋ nɩɩyɩ fɛyɩ kɩ-taa. Se pɩtɛ ɛyáa ḿbá!.

eng: Gods solid foundation is still standing with this sign: The Lord knows the people who belong to him, and Everyone who confesses the Lords name must avoid wickedness. .
local: Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, tigiɖe nɖɩ́ Ɛsɔ sɩwa yɔ, ɖɩwɛ ɖoŋ pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ, nabʋyʋ ɛɛlakɩ-ɖɩ. Pama ɖɩ-yɔɔ se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ sɩm ɛ-ñɩma.» Pamawa ɖɔɖɔ se: «Weyi ɛkaɖɩɣ se ɛkɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ñɩnʋ yɔ, pʋdʋ ɛha mbʋ́ pɩtatʋʋzɩ yɔ siɣ́ye.».

eng: Some will slither into households and control immature women who are burdened with sins and driven by all kinds of desires.
local: Pa-taa nabɛyɛ sʋʋ ɖɩsɩ taa nɛ ponuutuu halaa mbá pɔ-tɔm fɛyɩ kaɖɛ nɛ kɩdɛkɛdɩm su pa-taa ɖo nɛ pe-liu wɛɛ paa ɛbɛ labʋ yɔ.

eng: In a mansion, there arent just gold and silver bowls but also some bowls that are made of wood and clay. Some are meant for special uses, some for garbage.
local: Ɩtɛm sɩm se: pɩtɛkɛ sika ñanzɩ nɛ liidiye ñɩnzɩ pe-ɖeke pɛwɛnɩ ñɩm tʋ ɖɩɣa taa. Ɛlɛ́, tɩŋ ñɩnzɩ nɛ cʋʋ ñɩnzɩ pɛwɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ. Paɖʋʋ kajalaɣ ñɩnzɩ taa mbʋ́ pʋwɛ wazaɣ yɔ nɛ piyele paɖʋ tɩŋ nɛ cʋʋ pa-ñɩnzɩ taa mbʋ́ pɩfɛyɩ wazaɣ yɔ.

eng: These women are always learning, but they can never arrive at an understanding of the truth.
local: Halaa ḿbá, pɛwɛɛ pɛkpɛlɩkɩɣ, ɛlɛ́, paatɩɩpɩzɩɣ se patɩlɩ mbʋ́ pɩkɛ toovenim yɔ kaʋ.

eng: So if anyone washes filth off themselves, they will be set apart as a special bowl. They will be useful to the owner of the mansion for every sort of good work.
local: Ḿbʋ́ pʋwɛnɩ ɛyáa: yee nɔɔyʋ eyebi azuluma lakasɩ yɔ, ɛwɛɣ ɛzɩ ñanaɣ ŋgá paɖʋʋ ka-taa mbʋ́ pʋwɛ wazaɣ yɔ. Pɛkɛzɩɣ-ɩ nɛ hɔɔlʋʋ se ɛkɛ ɛ-caa ñɩnʋ nɛ ɛwɛɛ-ɩ wazaɣ. Ɛwɛɛ se palabɩnɩ-ɩ paa tʋmɩyɛ kɩbanɖɛ nɖɩ́.

eng: These people oppose the truth in the same way that Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses. Their minds are corrupt and their faith is counterfeit.
local: Ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Yaanɛɛsɩ nɛ Yambrɛɛsɩ paakʋyɩ Mooyiizi yɔɔ yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ ɛyáa ḿbá pakʋyʋʋ mbʋ́ pɩkɛ toovenim yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ. Pɛkɛ mbá pa-ñʋŋ taa wɛɛkaa yɔ. Ɛsɔ takɩɣ-wɛ pe-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa se ɛna lɛ, paahɔzʋʋ pʋyʋ:.
