eng: Run away from adolescent cravings. Instead, pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace together with those who confess the Lord with a clean heart.
local: Se ɛzaɣ́tʋ ndʋ́ evebiya nɛ pɛlaa pe-liu wɛɛ kpem se pala yɔ. Ña nɛ mbá pasaŋ Kɩpaɣlʋ nɛ laŋa kɩbana yɔ, ɩñɩnɩ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ nɛ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ nɛ ɩsɔɔlɩ lɛlaa nɛ ɩñɩnɩ laŋhɛzɩyɛ.

eng: But they wont get very far. Their foolishness will become obvious to everyone like those others.
local: paakɔŋ talʋʋ ɖoli, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛyáa tɩŋa kɔŋ naʋ se pa-ñʋŋ taa fɛyɩ ɛzɩ pɩɩlabʋ Yaanɛɛsɩ nɛ Yambrɛɛsɩ yɔ.

eng: Avoid foolish and thoughtless discussions, since you know that they produce conflicts.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yele kɩmɛlɛndʋ tɔm nɛ ndʋ́ tɩɩwazɩɣ pʋyʋ yɔ pɔ-hɔm, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ŋna ɖeu se tɩkɔŋnɩ you.

eng: But you have paid attention to my teaching, conduct, purpose, faithfulness, patience, love, and endurance.
local: Ña lɛ, ŋtɩŋ-m ma-wɩlʋʋ nɛ mɔn-ɖɔnɛ nɛ mbʋ́ manɖʋwa se malakɩ yɔ nɛ me-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ nɛ mɔ-hɔyɛ ɖɔkʋʋ nɛ mɔn-sɔɔlɩm nɛ man-tɩ ɖɔkʋʋ.

eng: Gods slave shouldnt be argumentative but should be kind toward all people, able to teach, patient.
local: Ŋgʋ́, pɩfɛyɩ se Kɩpaɣlʋ tʋmlaɖʋ nɛ nɔɔyʋ poyoo. Pʋwɛɛ se ɛla ɛyáa tɩŋa mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ nɛ ɛpɩzɩ ɛwɩlɩɣ tɔm nɛ ɛɖɔkʋʋ ɛ-hɔyɛ.

eng: You have seen me experience physical abuse and ordeals in places such as Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. I put up with all sorts of abuse, and the Lord rescued me from it all!.
local: nɛ ma-wayɩ wɛʋ kaŋ kaŋ nɛ man-kʋñɔmɩŋ pa-taa. Ŋsɩm kʋñɔmɩŋ weyi mɔntɔɔ Antɩyɔɔsɩ nɛ Ikoniyɔm nɛ Listrɩ yɔ nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ paawɛ ma-wayɩ kaŋ kaŋ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, Kɩpaɣlʋ lɩzɩ-m pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩ-taa.

eng: and should correct opponents with gentleness. Perhaps God will change their mind and give them a knowledge of the truth.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se ɛwɩlɩ mbá paatisiɣ ɛ-tɔm nɛ pɛlɛɣzɩɣ pa-ñɩndʋ yɔ hɛɛɛ nɛ pʋtɔma yɔ, Ɛsɔ ha-wɛ nʋmɔʋ nɛ pɛlɛɣzɩ pa-lɩmaɣza nɛ papɩzɩ patɩlɩ toovenim.

eng: In fact, anyone who wants to live a holy life in Christ Jesus will be harassed.
local: Toovenim lɛ, mbá patɩŋa payɩ pe-liu wɛɛ se pacaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ liu wɛʋ yɔ pa nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu pɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa yɔ, pɛwɛɣ pa-wayɩ kaŋ kaŋ.

eng: They may come to their senses and escape from the devils trap that holds them captive to do his will.
local: nɛ pʋtɔma yɔ, palɩɩ eleeu weyi ɛkpa-wɛ se pala mbʋ́ e-liu wɛɛ yɔ ɛ-kaamʋʋ taa.

eng: But evil people and swindlers will grow even worse, as they deceive others while being deceived themselves.
local: Ɛlɛ́, kañadɩnaa nɛ cɛtɩyaa pɛtɛzɩɣ labʋ kɩdɛkɛdɩm nɛ pɛcɛtɩ lɛlaa, ɛlɛ́ pɔkɔŋ pa-maɣmaɣ cɛtʋʋ.

eng: But you must continue with the things you have learned and found convincing. You know who taught you.
local: Piyele ña lɛ, ɖɔkɩ mbʋ́ ŋkpɛlɩkaa nɛ ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ pʋ-yɔɔ yɔ nesi naalɛ kpam. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ŋsɩm weyi ɛkpɛlɩkɩ-ŋ-pʋ yɔ.

eng: Since childhood you have known the holy scriptures that help you to be wise in a way that leads to salvation through faith that is in Christ Jesus.
local: Toovenim lɛ, ŋsɩm tɔm ndʋ́ pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa yɔ ɖooo ña-pɩjatʋ taa. Tɩpɩzɩɣ tɩha-ŋ lɔŋ weyi eyeki nɛ pɩtɩŋnɩ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ŋwɛnɩ Krɩstʋ Yesu yɔɔ yɔ kʋ-yɔɔ nɛ pɩya ña-ñʋʋ yɔ.

eng: Every scripture is inspired by God and is useful for teaching, for showing mistakes, for correcting, and for training character.
local: Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ tɔm ndʋ́ pama takayaɣ ŋ́gá ka-taa yɔ, tɩtɩŋa payɩ tɩlɩnaa. Tɩwɛ wazaɣ: ńdʋ́ pawɩlɩɣnɩ ɛyáa toovenim nɛ mbʋ́ palabɩ pɩfɛyɩ ɖeu yɔ nɛ pɔñɔɔzɩ-wɛ nɛ pɛkpɛlɩkɩ-wɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pacaɣ wezuu kʋtʋʋzʋʋ yɔ.

eng: so that the person who belongs to God can be equipped to do everything that is good.
local: Pɩlakɩ ḿbʋ́ se Ɛsɔ ɛyʋ ɛtɛzɩ pɩʋ nɛ ɛwɛnɩ mbʋ́ ɛɛlabɩnɩ paa tʋmɩyɛ kɩbanɖɛ nɖɩ́ yɔ.

eng: Im giving you this commission in the presence of God and of Christ Jesus, who is coming to judge the living and the dead, and by his appearance and his kingdom.
local: Krɩstʋ Yesu kɔŋ hʋʋ ɛsɛ ñɩma nɛ sɩɖaa tɔm. Ɛnʋ kaɣnɩ kɔm nɛ ɛtɔɔ kewiyaɣ. Meheyiɣ-ŋ ɛ nɛ Ɛsɔ pɛ-ɛsɩndaa se:.

eng: Preach the word. Be ready to do it whether it is convenient or inconvenient. Correct, confront, and encourage with patience and instruction.
local: paa nʋmɔʋ ɛwɛɛ yaa kɩfɛyɩ yɔ, susi ɛyáa Ɛsɔtɔm nɛ ŋñɩɣ tɩ-yɔɔ niye nɛ ŋla nɛ petisi-tʋ nɛ ŋkalɩ-wɛ nɛ ŋsazɩ-wɛ nɛ ŋɖɔkɩ ñɔ-hɔyɛ tam ña-wɩlʋʋ taa.

eng: There will come a time when people will not tolerate sound teaching. They will collect teachers who say what they want to hear because they are self-centered.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, alɩwaatʋ natʋyʋ kaɣ kɔm nɛ pɩɖɛɛ ɛyáa nɛ tɔm kɩbandʋ ndʋ́ pawɩlɩɣ-wɛ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pa-nɩŋgbaaŋ taa puu lɛ, pɔkɔŋ ñɩnʋʋ wɩlɩyaa ndɩ ndɩ se paba eheyi-wɛ mbʋ́ pa-maɣmaɣ pe-liu wɛɛ kpem yɔ nɛ pewelesi.

eng: They will turn their back on the truth and turn to myths.
local: Pɔkɔŋ nɩnaʋ mʋya welesuu yem. Ŋgʋ́, pɔtɔʋ pa-nɩŋgbaaŋ taa se pataawelesi toovenim tɔm.

eng: But you must keep control of yourself in all circumstances. Endure suffering, do the work of a preacher of the good news, and carry out your service fully.
local: Piyele ña lɛ, ɖɔkɩ ña-tɩ camɩyɛ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa. Tisi nɛ ŋtɔɔ kʋñɔŋ, la Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm susuu tʋmɩyɛ, la tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋ-ŋ yɔ ɖɩtɩŋa.

eng: Im already being poured out like a sacrifice to God, and the time of my death is near.
local: Ma lɛ, mɛwɛ ɛzɩ lɩm mbʋ́ pɛtɛm lizuu tataa yɔ, alɩwaatʋ talaa se mowoni sɔsaa mʋlʋm.

eng: I have fought the good fight, finished the race, and kept the faith.
local: Malʋbɩ lʋbɩyɛ kɩbanɖɛ nɛ mense nɛ mantalɩ men-seya tɩnaɣ yɔɔ nɛ mɔnɖɔkɩ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ mɛwɛnɩ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: At last the champions wreath that is awarded for righteousness is waiting for me. The Lord, who is the righteous judge, is going to give it to me on that day. Hes giving it not only to me but also to all those who have set their heart on waiting for his appearance.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ lɛ, ɛsɩ man-kɩhɛyʋʋ nɛ ɛɖaŋnɩ-m: ŋ́gʋ́ lɛ tʋʋzʋʋ hulaɣ ŋgá Kɩpaɣlʋ kɔŋ-m cɛlʋʋ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ. Ɛtʋʋzɩ ɛ-tɔm hʋʋ taa. Pɩtɛkɛ men-ɖeke ɛkɔŋ-kʋ cɛlʋʋ, ɛlɛ́, ɛcɛlɩɣ-kʋ ɖɔɖɔ mbá patɩŋa payɩ paɖaŋnɩ sɔɔlɩm alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛkɔŋ yɔ.

eng: Do your best to come to me quickly.
local: Cɛyɩ ña-tɩ nɛ ŋkɔɔ mɔn-cɔlɔ kɩyakɩŋ ɩnɛ ɩ-taa.

eng: Demas has fallen in love with the present world and has deserted me and has gone to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Demaasɩ kɩlɩ sɔɔlʋʋ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ yɔ nɛ ese mɔn-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛɖɛɛ Tesalooniki. Krɛɛsaɣ ñowobi Galaasii nɛ piyele Tiiti ñowolo Dalmaasii.

eng: Only Luke is with me. Get Mark, and bring him with you. He has been a big help to me in the ministry.
local: Luka ɖeke wɛnɩ mɔn-cɔlɔ. Yaa Maarkɩ nɛ ña nɛ ɩ ɩkɔɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛwɛɣ-m wazaɣ siŋŋ man-tʋmɩyɛ taa.

eng: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
local: Mentiyi Ticiiki Efɛɛzɩ.

eng: When you come, bring along the coat I left with Carpus in Troas. Also bring the scrolls and especially the parchments.
local: Yee ŋkɔŋ lɛ, ŋkpɛndɩnɩ-m toko sɔsɔʋ ŋgʋ́ meyebi Karpuusi tɛ Trowaasɩ yɔ. Kɔnɩ-m ɖɔɖɔ takayɩsɩ, kɔzɩkɔzɩ nzɩ́ palabɩnɩ tɔna yɔ.

eng: Alexander, the craftsman who works with metal, has really hurt me. The Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
local: Alɛksandrɩ weyi ɛkɛ kolu yɔ, ɛlabɩ-m ɛzaɣ́tʋ kpem. Kɩpaɣlʋ kɔŋ-ɩ hɛyʋʋ mbʋ́ ɛlaba yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: But watch out for him, because he opposes our teaching.
local: Ña ɖɔɖɔ, kpa ña-tɩ nɛ ɩ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛpam tɔm ndʋ́ ɖɩyɔɔdaa yɔ nɛ ɛsɛ siŋŋ.

eng: No one took my side at my first court hearing. Everyone deserted me. I hope that God doesnt hold it against them!.
local: Nɔɔyʋ taawɛɛ mɔn-cɔlɔ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mancalɩ hʋʋ mɔn-tɔm yɔ, pese patɩŋa payɩ peyebi-m. Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛtaakpaɣ-tʋ ɛlabɩnɩ tʋmɩyɛ.

eng: But the Lord stood by me and gave me strength, so that the entire message would be preached through me and so all the nations could hear it. I was also rescued from the lions mouth!.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛnʋ kɛwɛnɩ mɔn-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛha-m ɖoŋ nɛ piyele manpɩzɩ monsusi mbá pɛtɛkɛ Yuda ñɩma yɔ Ɛsɔtɔm tɩŋa payɩ. Ɛnʋ lɩzɩnɩ-m tɔɔyʋʋ nɔɔ taa.

eng: The Lord will rescue me from every evil action and will save me for his heavenly kingdom. To him be the glory forever and always. Amen.
local: Ɛkɔŋ-m lɩzʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ kɩdɛkɛdɩm mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩtalɩ-m yɔ pɩ-taa cɩŋɩlɩm nɛ ewoni-m e-Kewiyaɣ taa ɛsɔdaa. Ɛtɩɣyɩ koboyaɣ pɩnzɩ ɛgbaŋ ɛgbaŋ! Pɩla ḿbʋ́!.

eng: Say hello to Prisca and Aquila and the household of Onesiphorus.
local: Sɛɛ Prisiili nɛ Akilaasɩ nɛ Onezifɔɔrɩ hɔʋ taa ñɩma.

eng: Erastus stayed in Corinth, and I left Trophimus in Miletus because of his illness.
local: Eraastɩ caɣ Kɔrɛntɩ nɛ meyele Trofim Miilɛɛ tɛtʋ taa, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩwɩɣaɣ-ɩ.

eng: Try hard to come to me before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, Claudia, and all the brothers and sisters say hello.
local: Cɛyɩ ña-tɩ nɛ ŋkɔɔ mɔn-cɔlɔ nɛ pʋcɔ pɩtalɩ niŋkaɣ alɩwaatʋ. Ebuluusi nɛ Pudɛɛnɩ nɛ Liinuusi nɛ Kloodiyaa nɛ taabalaa lɛlaa tɩŋa pɛsɛ-ŋ.

eng: The Lord be with your spirit. Grace be with you all.
local: Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛwɛɛ ñɔ-cɔlɔ. Ɛlabɩ-mɩ lootiye.

eng: Those who are under the bondage of slavery should consider their own masters as worthy of full respect so that Gods name and our teaching wont get a bad reputation.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se mbá patɩŋa payɩ pɛkɛ yomaa yɔ, patɩlɩ se pʋmʋnaa se paɖʋ pa-caanaa hɩɖɛ siŋŋ. Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ nɔɔyʋ ɛɛyɔɔdʋʋ Ɛsɔ nɛ mbʋ́ ɖɩwɩlɩɣ yɔ ɛzaɣ́tʋ tɔm natʋyʋ.

eng: And those who have masters who are believers shouldnt look down on them because they are brothers. Instead, they should serve them more faithfully, because the people who benefit from your good service are believers who are loved. Teach and encourage these things.
local: Yom weyi ɛ-caa kɛ Krɩstʋ tʋ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se yom ɛnʋ, ɛtaaniɣzi-i se ɛkɛ ɛ-taabalʋ yɔ, ɛ nɛ ɩ pɛwɛ kɩmaŋ. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se ɛlabɩ-ɩ tʋmɩyɛ camɩyɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, weyi ɛlakɩ-ɩ tʋmɩyɛ ńɖɩ́ yɔ, ɛkɛ Krɩstʋ tʋ nɛ taabalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ. Tɔm ndʋ́ meheyi-ŋ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ŋwɩlɩ-tʋ ɛyáa nɛ ŋsazɩnɩ-wɛ.

eng: If anyone teaches anything different and doesnt agree with sound teaching about our Lord Jesus Christ and teaching that is consistent with godliness.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛwɩlɩɣ mbʋ́ pʋwɛnɩ ndɩ yɔ nɛ ɛɛɖɔŋ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ tɔm kɩbandʋ nɛ ndʋ́ tiyeki se ɛyáa ɛɖɔ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ liu wɛʋ yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: that person is conceited. They dont understand anything but have a sick obsession with debates and arguments. This creates jealousy, conflict, verbal abuse, and evil suspicions.
local: pʋdʋ wɛ cɛjɛyɛ. Ɛtatɩlɩ nabʋyʋ kpem. Tɔm hɔm kʋdɔŋ kpa-ɩ nɛ ɛ nɛ lɛlaa poyou tɔm ndɩ ndɩ yɔɔ. Ḿbʋ́ kɔŋnɩnɩ ɛsɩsɛmɩyɛ nɛ pana nɛ tʋtʋ nɛ ɖama yɔɔ lɩmaɣza kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ ɖʋʋ.

eng: There is constant bickering between people whose minds are ruined and who have been robbed of the truth. They think that godliness is a way to make money!.
local: Pʋkɔŋnɩ ɖɔɖɔ you kaatɛŋa ɛyáa mbá pɛfɛyɩnɩ lɩmaɣza kɩbana nɛ patatasɩ sɩm toovenim yɔ. Pamaɣzɩɣ se yee ɛyʋ ɛñɩtaa ɛɖɔŋ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ, pɩkɛɣnɩ-ɩ waɖɛ se ehiɣ liidiye.

eng: Actually, godliness is a great source of profit when it is combined with being happy with what you already have.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa ɖɔm kɛnɩ ɛyʋ waɖɛ siŋŋ se ehiɣ kɛzɛɣa. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se ɛ-laŋɩyɛ ɛhʋlʋmɩnɩ mbʋ́ ɛwɛna yɔ.

eng: We didnt bring anything into the world and so we cant take anything out of it:.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩtaakpɛndɩnɩ pʋyʋ nɛ ɖɩkɔɔ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ. Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩkʋyʋʋ kɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩɩkpɛndɩɣnɩ ka-pʋyʋ.

eng: well be happy with food and clothing.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, yee ɖɩwɛnɩ tɔɔnaɣ nɛ tokonaa yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se pɩmaɣ-ɖʋ.

eng: But people who are trying to get rich fall into temptation. They are trapped by many stupid and harmful passions that plunge people into ruin and destruction.
local: Ɛlɛ́, mbá pacaɣ se pɛkɛ ñɩm tɩnaa yɔ, pasʋʋ takʋʋ taa nɛ kaamʋʋ kpa-wɛ. Pe-liu wɛ kɩmɛlɛndʋ ndʋ́ tɩwɛɛkɩɣ-wɛ yɔ. Ńdʋ́ sʋzʋʋnɩ-wɛ asayʋʋ taa.

eng: The love of money is the root of all kinds of evil. Some have wandered away from the faith and have impaled themselves with a lot of pain because they made money their goal.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, liidiye laɣzaɣ sʋzʋʋ ɛyʋ ɛzaɣ́tʋ tɩŋa taa. Liidiye laɣzaɣ kakpa nabɛyɛ nɛ pele lidaʋ nʋmɔʋ nɛ pa-maɣmaɣ pasʋzɩ pa-tɩ wɩzasɩ ndɩ ndɩ taa.

eng: But as for you, man of God, run away from all these things. Instead, pursue righteousness, holy living, faithfulness, love, endurance, and gentleness.
local: Weyi ña ŋkɛ Ɛsɔ ɛyʋ yɔ, koli pɩtɛ lakasɩ ńzɩ́. Ñɩnɩ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ nɛ ŋñɩnɩ ɖɔɖɔ se ŋla mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ. Ñaɣ pana nɛ ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ ḿbʋ́ nɛ ŋsɔɔlɩ ɛyáa nɛ ŋɖɔkɩ ña-tɩ nɛ ŋwɛɛ leleŋ.

eng: But you should talk in a way that is consistent with sound teaching.
local: Ña lɛ, wɩlɩ ɛzɩ pʋwɛʋ tɔm kɩbandʋ ndʋ́ pawɩlɩ-ŋ yɔ tɩ-taa yɔ.

eng: From Paul, a slave of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. Im sent to bring about the faith of Gods chosen people and a knowledge of the truth that agrees with godliness.
local: Ma Pɔɔlɩ weyi ɛkɛ Ɛsɔ tʋmlaɖʋ nɛ Yesu Krɩstʋ tiyiyu yɔ, mamaɣnɩ takayaɣ kanɛ. Paɖʋ-m se mala nɛ mbá Ɛsɔ lɩzaa yɔ, pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ nɛ mawɩlɩ-wɛ nɛ patɩlɩ toovenim nɛ pacaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ liu wɛʋ yɔ.

eng: Compete in the good fight of faith. Grab hold of eternal life—you were called to it, and you made a good confession of it in the presence of many witnesses.
local: Lʋ lidaʋ taa lʋbɩyɛ kɩbanɖɛ. Ñaɣ pana nɛ ŋhiɣ wezuu maatɛŋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, kʋ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ ya-ŋ nɛ ŋkaɖɩ aseɣɖe tɩnaa sakɩyɛ ɛsɩndaa kpayɩ se ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ.

eng: Tell the older men to be sober, dignified, sensible, and healthy in respect to their faith, love, and patience.
local: Heyi abalaa akpadɩyaa se pɛ-ɛsɛ ekuli. Pɛkɛ ɛyáa mbá pamʋnaa se paɖʋ-wɛ hɩɖɛ yɔ nɛ mbá pamaɣzɩɣ pa-ñʋŋ taa nɛ pʋcɔ pala pʋyʋ yɔ. Pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ yɔ nɛ pɔsɔɔlɩ lɛlaa siŋŋ nɛ pɔ́ɖɔ́kɩ ḿbʋ́ kpam.

eng: Their faith and this knowledge are based on the hope of eternal life that God, who doesnt lie, promised before time began.
local: Ḿbʋ́ paɖaŋaa se pehiɣ wezuu maatɛŋ. Ɛsɔ weyi ɛɛcɛtɩɣ yɔ, pʋcɔ ɛla kedeŋa lɛ, ɛɛɖʋwa se ɛhaɣ-ɖʋ-kʋ.

eng: I command you in the presence of God, who gives life to all things, and Christ Jesus, who made the good confession when testifying before Pontius Pilate.
local: Ɛsɔ weyi ɛhaɣ pɩtɩŋa payɩ wezuu yɔ nɛ Krɩstʋ Yesu weyi ɛkaɖɩ toovenim kpayɩ wiyaʋ sɔsɔ Pilaatɩ ɛsɩndaa yɔ pɛ-ɛsɩndaa lɛ, meheyiɣ-ŋ se:.

eng: Likewise, tell the older women to be reverent in their behavior, teaching what is good, rather than being gossips or addicted to heavy drinking.
local: Halaa akpadɩyaa lɛ, heyi paba se pacaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ se Ɛsɔ ñɩma ɛcaɣ yɔ. Pɩtamʋnɩ se pɛwɛɛkɩɣ ɛyáa hɩla yaa pɛkɛ sʋlʋm yomaa. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se patasɩ ɛyáa tɔm kɩbandʋ.

eng: God revealed his message at the appropriate time through preaching, and I was trusted with preaching this message by the command of God our savior.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ tɩtalaa lɛ, ɛtɩŋnɩ ɛ-tɔm yɔɔ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ wezuu ŋ́gʋ́. Me-nesi taa ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ Ɛsɔ ɖʋzɩ-tʋ nɛ ɛha-m nɔɔ se monsusi-tʋ.

eng: Obey this order without fault or failure until the appearance of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: ɖɔkɩ tɔm ndʋ́ meheyi-ŋ yɔ kpam nɛ ŋwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ. Pataana kawanaɣ nakɛyɛ ñɔ-yɔɔ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ pɩsaa ɛkɔɔ yɔ.

eng: That way they can mentor young women to love their husbands and children.
local: Peeɖe papɩzɩɣ pawɩlɩ asayaa ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se pɔsɔɔlɩ pa-walaa nɛ pe-piya yɔ.

eng: To Titus, my true child in a common faith. Grace and peace from God the Father and Christ Jesus our savior.
local: Tiiti weyi ña ŋkɛ man-pɩɣa mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ ŋwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛzɩ ma yɔ, ña mamaɣ takayaɣ kanɛ, mɛnsɛ-ŋ: Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ Krɩstʋ Yesu palabɩ-ŋ lootiye nɛ pɛhɛzɩ ña-laŋɩyɛ.

eng: The timing of this appearance is revealed by God alone, who is the blessed and only master, the King of kings and Lord of lords.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋwa yɔ tɩtalɩɣ lɛ, eyele nɛ Krɩstʋ pɩsɩ ɛkɔɔ. Ɛnʋ lɛ Ɛsɔ weyi ɛwɛ laŋhɛzɩyɛ taa yɔ. E-ɖeke koŋ ɛcɔŋnɩnɩ pɩtɩŋa pʋ-yɔɔ. Ɛnʋ lɛ awiya taa Wiyaʋ nɛ kɩpaɣlaa taa Kɩpaɣlʋ.

eng: and to be sensible, morally pure, working at home, kind and submissive to their own husbands, so that Gods word wont be ridiculed.
local: Pawɩlɩɣ-wɛ ɖɔɖɔ se pataawɛɛ ɛsɛ naɣnaɣ, ɛlɛ́, patɩlɩ pa-tɩ ɖɔkʋʋ. Pɛkɛ mɩzaɣ nɔɔ tʋmlaɖaa nɛ ɛyáa kɩbama nɛ pañaŋ pa-walaa se nɔɔyʋ ɛtaapɩzɩ ɛwɛɛkɩ Ɛsɔtɔm.

eng: The reason I left you behind in Crete was to organize whatever needs to be done and to appoint elders in each city, as I told you.
local: Meyebi-ŋ Krɛɛtɩ se ŋñɔɔzɩ mbʋ́ pɩsɛɣa se pala yɔ nɛ paa tɛtʋ ndʋ́ tɩ-taa lɛ, ŋsɩɩ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa sɔsaa. Ŋsɩɣ-wɛ lɛ, ŋtɔzɩ mbʋ́ mɛnkpɛlɩkɩ-ŋ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ:.

eng: He alone has immortality and lives in light that no one can come near. No human being has ever seen or is able to see him. Honor and eternal power belong to him. Amen.
local: E-ɖeke koŋ ɛɛsɩkɩna, ñalɩmɩyɛ naɖɩyɛ taa ɛwɛɛ. Nɔɔyʋ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛñɔtɩnɩ-ɖɩ. Nɔɔyʋ tana-ɩ, nɔɔyʋ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛna-ɩ ɖɔɖɔ. Paɖʋ-ɩ hɩɖɛ nɛ e-ɖoŋ wɛɛ tam! Pɩla ḿbʋ́.

eng: Likewise, encourage the younger men to be sensible.
local: Piyele evebiya lɛ, heyi paba se patɩlɩ pa-tɩ ɖɔkʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Elders should be without fault. They should be faithful to their spouse, and have faithful children who cant be accused of self-indulgence or rebelliousness.
local: pɩfɛyɩ se pana kawanaɣ nakɛyɛ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa sɔsɔ yɔɔ. Pʋwɛɛ se ɛwɛnɩ halʋ kʋɖʋm koŋ nɛ e-piya ñam-ɩ. Pataasam-sɩ nɛ yem yem lakasɩ yaa kaañamtʋ.

eng: Tell people who are rich at this time not to become egotistical and not to place their hope on their finances, which are uncertain. Instead, they need to hope in God, who richly provides everything for our enjoyment.
local: Ñɩm tɩnaa lɛ, heyi-wɛ se pataakpazɩ pa-tɩ. Pataataa pa-ñɩm, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩɩwɛɣ tam. Ɛlɛ́, pataa Ɛsɔ weyi ɛhaɣ-ɖʋ pɩtɩŋa payɩ sakɩyɛ se ɖa-laŋa ɛhʋlʋmɩnɩ-pʋ yɔ.

eng: in every way. Offer yourself as a role model of good actions. Show integrity, seriousness.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se ña-maɣmaɣ ŋlakɩ tʋma kɩbana tam nɛ ŋwɩlɩɣnɩ-wɛ. Taakɛ cɛtɩyʋ ña-wɩlʋʋ taa, taawɩlɩ pʋ-yɔɔ pʋ-yɔɔ yem.

eng: This is because supervisors should be without fault as Gods managers: they shouldnt be stubborn, irritable, addicted to alcohol, a bully, or greedy.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, weyi ɛcɔŋnɩ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma yɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ ɖʋnɩ-ɩ se ɛlabɩ-ɩ tʋmɩyɛ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩtamʋnɩ se pana kawanaɣ nakɛyɛ ɛ-yɔɔ. Pɩfɛyɩ se ɛkpazɩ ɛ-tɩ yaa ɛkɛ pana tʋ yaa sʋlʋm kpaŋɩyʋ yaa weyi ɛwɛ helu helu yɔ yaa weyi emuluu ɛyáa se ehiɣ kɛzɛɣa yɔ.

eng: Tell them to do good, to be rich in the good things they do, to be generous, and to share with others.
local: Heyi-wɛ ɖɔɖɔ se pala tʋma kɩbana. Palabɩ-yɛ sakɩyɛ nɛ pasɩnɩ lɛlaa, pahanɩ hɔ kɩbana.

eng: and a sound message that is above criticism when you teach, so that any opponent will be ashamed because they wont find anything bad to say about us.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yɔɔdɩ tɔm kɩbandʋ ndʋ́ kawanaɣ nakɛyɛ fɛyɩ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ nɛ fɛyɛ kpa ɖo-koyindinaa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, paahikiɣ tɔm ɛzaɣ́tʋ ndʋ́ paayɔɔdɩ-ɖʋ yɔ.

eng: Instead, they should show hospitality, love what is good, and be reasonable, ethical, godly, and self-controlled.
local: Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se ɛmʋ ɛyáa camɩyɛ nɛ ɛsɔɔlɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ. Ɛkɛ weyi ɛmaɣzɩɣ ɛ-ñʋʋ taa camɩyɛ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛla pʋyʋ yɔ. Ɛkɛ ɖɔɖɔ ɛyʋ kʋtʋʋzʋ nɛ ɛ-tɔm kɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛ́ɖɔ́kɩ ɛ-tɩ.

eng: When they do these things, they will save a treasure for themselves that is a good foundation for the future. That way they can take hold of what is truly life.
local: Yee palakɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pasɩɣ pa-tɩ ñɩm mbʋ́ pɩɩwɛɛkɩɣ yɔ cee wayɩ yɔɔ. Peeɖe pehikiɣ wezuu maatɛŋ.

eng: Tell slaves to submit to their own masters and please them in everything they do. They shouldnt talk back.
local: Piyele yomaa lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se paña pa-caanaa nɛ pɔ-tɔm kɛdɩnɩ-wɛ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa. Pɩfɛyɩ se pɔhɔmnɩ pa-caanaa tɔm.

eng: They must pay attention to the reliable message as it has been taught to them so that they can encourage people with healthy instruction and refute those who speak against it.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se ɛ́ɖɔ́kɩ tɔm kɩbandʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩwɩlɩɣ yɔ nesi naalɛ kpam. Tɩmʋnaa se pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ tɩ-yɔɔ. Tɩ-yɔɔ ɛtɩŋɩɣna nɛ ɛsazɩ ɛ-taabalaa nɛ ɛwɩlɩ mbá paatisiɣ ɛ-tɔm yɔ ɖenɖe pucoɖi-wɛ yɔ.

eng: Timothy, protect what has been given to you in trust. Avoid godless and pointless discussions and the contradictory claims of so-called knowledge.
local: Man-taabalʋ Timootee, ɖɔkɩ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋzɩ ñe-nesi taa yɔ nesi naalɛ kpam. Taaɖʋ ñɔ-nɔɔ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩɩwazɩɣ pʋyʋ nɛ tiiyeki se ɛyʋ ɛtɩlɩ Ɛsɔ yɔ tɩ-taa. Koli tɔm hɔm mbʋ́ ɛyáa kpakɩɣ se pɩkɛ lɛɣtʋ yɔ.

eng: or steal. Instead, they should show that they are completely reliable in everything so that they might make the teaching about God our savior attractive in every way.
local: Pɩfɛyɩ ɖɔɖɔ se pesezi pa-ñɩm yɔɔ. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se pawɩlɩ pa-tɩ tam se pɛkɛ ɛyáa kɩbama nɛ toovenim tɩnaa. Peeɖe ɛyáa ɖʋʋ ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ Ɛsɔ tɔm ndʋ́ pawɩlɩɣ yɔ hɩɖɛ.

eng: In fact, there are many who are rebellious people, loudmouths, and deceivers, especially some of those who are Jewish believers.
local: Ɛyáa mbá paañaŋ nɛ peyiliɣ lɛlaa nɛ pa-kɩmɛlɛndʋ tɔm yɔ, pɔɖɔwa. Ɛlɛ́, Yuda ñɩma mbá papɩsɩ Krɩstʋ ñɩma yɔ, pɛ-hɛkʋ taa pakɩlɩ wɛʋ.

eng: When some people adopted this false knowledge, they missed the goal of faith. May grace be with you all.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, nabɛyɛ tɔŋaɣ se pɛwɛnɩ pɩtɛ lɛɣtʋ ńdʋ́ ḿbʋ́ nɛ pele lidaʋ nʋmɔʋ. Ɛsɔ ɛlabɩ-mɩ lootiye.

eng: The grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation to all people.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ yeba nɛ ɛyáa na e-lootiye. Đɩ-taa patɩŋa payɩ pa-ñʋʋ yabʋ lɩɣna.

eng: They must be silenced because they upset entire households. They teach what they shouldnt to make money dishonestly.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se ŋɖɩɣ-wɛ nʋmɔʋ nɛ pataapɩzɩ pɔyɔɔdɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, poyozuu hɔŋ taa ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ nɛ pawɩlɩɣ mbʋ́ pɩtamʋna yɔ se pehiɣ kɛzɛɣa.

eng: It educates us so that we can live sensible, ethical, and godly lives right now by rejecting ungodly lives and the desires of this world.
local: Eyebi ḿbʋ́ se ɛwɩlɩnɩ-ɖʋ se ɖiyele mbʋ́ e-liu fɛyɩ yɔ pɩ-labʋ nɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ ñɩm sɔɔlʋʋ. Peeɖe ɖɩɖɔkʋʋ ɖa-tɩ nɛ ɖɩcaɣ wezuu ŋgʋ́ kʋtʋʋzaa nɛ kɩkɛdɩnɩ Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ yɔ.

eng: Remind them to submit to rulers and authorities. They should be obedient and ready to do every good thing.
local: Tɔzɩ Krɩstʋ ñɩma se pʋwɛɛ se poluzi pa-tɩ mbá pɔcɔŋnɩ ajɛya yɔɔ yɔ nɛ ñʋndɩnaa pɛ-tɛɛ. Pʋwɛɛ se pañam-wɛ nɛ paɖaŋ se pala paa tʋmɩyɛ kɩbanɖɛ nɖɩ́.

eng: Someone who is one of their own prophets said, People from Crete are always liars, wild animals, and lazy gluttons.
local: Krɛɛtɩ ñɩma taa náyʋ maɣmaɣ yɔɔdɩnɩ se: «Paa ɖooye Krɛɛtɩ ñɩma kɛ cɛtɩyaa, pɛkɛ kpɩna kañadɩnaa nɛ fendinaa mbá pamaɣzɩɣ tɔkɩyɛ ɖeke yɔɔ yɔ.».

eng: At the same time we wait for the blessed hope and the glorious appearance of our great God and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Ḿbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩla nɛ ɖɩɖaŋnɩ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɖɩɖaŋaa yɔ. Ki-wiye Krɩstʋ Yesu weyi ɛkɛ ɖɛ-Ɛsɔ sɔsɔ nɛ ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ yɔ e-koboyaɣ lɩɣ.

eng: They shouldnt speak disrespectfully about anyone, but they should be peaceful, kind, and show complete courtesy toward everyone.
local: Pataawɛɛkɩ nɔɔyʋ hɩɖɛ, pataacaa tɔm. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se pɔ́ɖɔ́kɩ pɔ-hɔ nɛ pa nɛ lɛlaa pʋwɛɛ leleŋ tam.

eng: This statement is true. Because of this, correct them firmly, so that they can be healthy in their faith.
local: Tɔm ndʋ́ ɛyɔɔdʋʋ yɔ, tɩkɛ toovenim. Pʋ-yɔɔ pʋwɛɛ se ŋkalɩ-wɛ siŋŋ. Peeɖe pɛwɛɣnɩ lidaʋ kɩbaŋgʋ.

eng: He gave himself for us in order to rescue us from every kind of lawless behavior, and cleanse a special people for himself who are eager to do good actions.
local: Ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛha ɛ-tɩ se pɩlɩzɩ-ɖʋ kɩdɛkɛdɩm tɩŋa payɩ taa nɛ ɛpɩsɩ-ɖʋ ɛyáa mbá pɛwɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ nɛ pɛkɛ e-ɖeke koŋ ɛ-ñɩma nɛ pɩlakɩ-wɛ hʋnʋm se pala tʋma kɩbana yɔ.

eng: We were once foolish, disobedient, deceived, and slaves to our desires and various pleasures too. We were spending our lives in evil behavior and jealousy. We were disgusting, and we hated other people.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖooo lɛ, ɖa ɖɔɖɔ ɖɩɩkɛ kɩmɛlɛmɩŋ nɛ kaañamtʋ tɩnaa, ɖiilebi nʋmɔʋ. Đɩɩwɛ ɛzɩ yomaa yɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩɩkɛnɩ-ɖʋ kɩcɛyʋʋ se ɖɩla mbʋ́ mbʋ́ ɖe-liu wɛɛ yɔ nɛ mbʋ́ mbʋ́ pɩkɛdɩnɩ-ɖʋ yɔ. Đɩɩwɛ kañatʋ nɛ ɛsɛ naɣnaɣ pa-taa. Ɛyáa paɖaɣ-ɖʋ nɛ ɖɩpaɖɩɣ ɖama ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: They shouldnt pay attention to Jewish myths and commands from people who reject the truth.
local: nɛ paatasɩɣ nɩnaʋ Yuda ñɩma mʋya nɛ paɣtʋ ndʋ́ ɛyáa mbá paha toovenim siɣ́ye yɔ paɖʋwa yɔ.

eng: In the past, God spoke through the prophets to our ancestors in many times and many ways.
local: Ɛsɔ katɩŋnɩ náyaa yɔɔ ɖooo lɔŋ nɛ ɛyɔɔdɩnɩ ɖɔ-cɔzɔnaa tam sakɩyɛ nɛ wɛtʋ ndɩ ndɩ taa.

eng: Talk about these things. Encourage and correct with complete authority. Dont let anyone disrespect you.
local: Tɔm ńdʋ́ tɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛɛ se ŋheyi ɛyáa. Kpaɣ ña-abalɩtʋ tɩŋa payɩ nɛ ŋsazɩnɩ mbá pewelesiɣ ñɔ-tɔm yɔ yaa ŋkalɩnɩ-wɛ. Taayele pa-taa nɔɔyʋ pɛŋ-ŋ tɛtɛ.

eng: But when God our saviors kindness and love appeared.
local: Ɛlɛ́, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ Ɛsɔ yeba nɛ ɛyáa na se ɛwɛ ɖeu nɛ ɛsɔɔlɩ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: From Paul, who is a prisoner for the cause of Christ Jesus, and our brother Timothy. To Philemon our dearly loved coworker.
local: Pɔɔlɩ weyi ma paɖʋ-m salaka se malakɩ Krɩstʋ Yesu tʋmɩyɛ yɔ, ma nɛ ɖa-taabalʋ Timootee ɖɩmaɣnɩ takayaɣ kanɛ. Fileemɔɔ weyi ña ŋkɛ ɖɛ-ɛgbaɣdʋ nɛ ɖa nɛ ŋ ɖɩlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ yɔ, ña.

eng: Everything is clean to those who are clean, but nothing is clean to those who are corrupt and without faith. Instead, their mind and conscience are corrupted.
local: Mbá pɛwɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ yɔ, panaɣ pɩtɩŋa payɩ se pʋwɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ. Ɛlɛ́, mbá pɛfɛyɩ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ nɛ paañaŋ Krɩstʋ yɔ, nabʋyʋ fɛyɩ-wɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛzaɣ́tʋ pisi pɛ-lɛɣtʋ nɛ pa-lɩmaɣza fɛyɩ a-ɖeɖe.

eng: In these final days, though, he spoke to us through a Son. God made his Son the heir of everything and created the world through him.
local: Ɛlɛ́, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɛtɩŋnɩ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛyɔɔdɩnɩ-ɖʋ kɛtɛzaɣ kɩyakɩŋ ɩnɛ ɩ-taa. Ɛ-yɔɔ ɛtɩŋnaa nɛ ɛla kedeŋa. Ɛlɩzɩ-ɩ se ɛtɩɣyɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ.

eng: Apphia our sister, Archippus our fellow soldier, and the church that meets in your house.
local: nɛ Yesu ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma mbá pekpeɣliɣ ñɛ-tɛ yɔ nɛ ɖa-taabalʋ halʋ ñɩnʋ Apɩya nɛ Arciipu weyi ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩlakɩ you kʋɖʋmʋʋ lidaʋ yɔɔ yɔ ɖɩmaɣ-kɛ.

eng: The Son is the light of Gods glory and the imprint of Gods being. He maintains everything with his powerful message. After he carried out the cleansing of people from their sins, he sat down at the right side of the highest majesty.
local: Ɛnʋ wɩlɩɣnɩ Ɛsɔ koboyaɣ. Ɛnʋ ɖɔɖɔ lɛ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ kɛnaa kpem yɔ. Ɛnʋ yekina se pɩtɩŋnɩ ɛ-tɔm ndʋ́ tɩwɛ ɖoŋ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ nɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ tam. Ɛtɛm ɛyáa kɩwɛɛkɩm ñalʋʋ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ lɛ, ɛkpa ɛsɔdaa nɛ ɛcaɣ Ɛsɔ Caabiyuu cɔlɔ lone kɩbanɖɛ taa.

eng: he saved us because of his mercy, not because of righteous things we had done. He did it through the washing of new birth and the renewing by the Holy Spirit.
local: ɛyabɩ ɖa-ñʋʋ. Pɩtɛkɛ se ɖɩlabɩ tʋma kɩbana yɔɔ ɛlabɩ-ɖʋ ḿbʋ́. Ɛlɛ́, ɛna ɖa-pʋtɔdɩyɛ yɔɔ ɛlabɩ-ɖʋ ḿbʋ́. Ɛyabɩ ɖa-ñʋʋ nɛ pɩtɩŋnɩ lɩm mbʋ́ pʋ-yɔɔ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu tɩŋnaa se ɖɩpɩsɩ ɛyáa kɩfama yɔ. Pɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɖihiɣ wezuu caɣʋ kɩfam.

eng: They claim to know God, but they deny God by the things that they do. They are detestable, disobedient, and disqualified to do anything good.
local: Pɔyɔɔdʋʋ se pasɩm Ɛsɔ, ɛlɛ́, pa-lakasɩ ɛɛwɩlɩɣ ḿbʋ́. Pɛwɛ sɔɔndʋ kpem, pɛkɛ kaañamtʋ tɩnaa, paapɩzɩɣ pala tʋmɩyɛ kɩbanɖɛ naɖɩyɛ.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: ɖɩsɛ-mɩ: ɖa-Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ palabɩ-mɩ lootiye nɛ pɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa.

eng: And the Son became so much greater than the other messengers, such as angels, that he received a more important title than theirs.
local: Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ pɩsaa ɛkɩlɩ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa tɩŋa. Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛya-ɩ hɩɖɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɩlɩ pa-ñɩnɖɛ yɔ.

eng: which God poured out upon us generously through Jesus Christ our savior.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ tɩŋnɩ ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛha-ɖʋ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu nɛ pʋwɛɛ ɛzɩ ehuuzi-kʋ ɖɔ-yɔɔ kuhuuzuu kpem yɔ.

eng: Philemon, I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: Fileemɔɔ, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ tɩtɩŋa mɛnsɛɣ Ɛsɔ ñɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, mansaŋ-ɩ.

eng: After all, when did God ever say to any of the angels: You are my Son. Today I have become your Father? Or, even, I will be his Father, and he will be my Son? .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, wiɖiyi Ɛsɔ teheyi e-tiyiyaa taa nɔɔyʋ se: «Ña lɛ man-Pɩyalʋ. Pɩkpaɣʋnɩ sɔnɔ yɔ, ma lɛ ña-Caa.» Wiɖiyi eteheyi ɖɔɖɔ e-tiyiyaa taa nɔɔyʋ se: «Ma mɛnkɛɣ ɛ-Caa nɛ ɛnʋ ñɛkɛ man-Pɩyalʋ.».

eng: because Ive heard of your love and faithfulness, which you have both for the Lord Jesus and for all Gods people.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, manɩɣ pɔyɔɔdʋʋ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ŋsɔɔlɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu nɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩma tɩŋa payɩ nɛ ŋlakɩ pa nɛ Yesu ɛnʋ mbʋ́ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ.

eng: So, since we have been made righteous by his grace, we can inherit the hope for eternal life.
local: Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se pɩtɩŋnɩ e-lootiye yɔɔ nɛ ɖɩpɩsɩ kʋtʋʋzaa ɛ-ɛsɩndaa nɛ ɛha-ɖʋ wezuu maatɛŋ ŋgʋ́ ɖɩɖaŋaa yɔ.

eng: But then, when he brought his firstborn into the world, he said, All of Gods angels must worship him. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ etiyaɣ ɛ-kajalaɣ pɩɣa kedeŋa yɔɔ yɔ, ɛtɔm se: «Pʋwɛɛ se e-tiyiyaa tɩŋa payɩ eluŋ kɛ-tɛɛ.».

eng: I pray that your partnership in the faith might become effective by an understanding of all that is good among us in Christ.
local: Mentendiɣ Ɛsɔ se eyele nɛ nɔɔ kʋɖʋmaɣ ŋgá pɩtɩŋnɩ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɖɩwɛnɩ yɔ kʋ-yɔɔ nɛ ɖɩla yɔ, kasɩnɩ-ŋ nɛ ŋtɩlɩ ñɩm kɩbam mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɖɩwɛnɩ ɖa nɛ Krɩstʋ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa yɔ.

eng: This saying is reliable. And I want you to insist on these things, so that those who have come to believe in God might give careful attention to doing good. These things are good and useful for everyone.
local: Tɔm ńdʋ́, tʋmʋnaa se pataa-tʋ liu. Mancaɣ se ŋwɛɛ tɩ-yɔɔ ɖoŋ nɛ mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ yɔ, paka ñʋʋ nɛ pala tʋma kɩbana ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ. Ŋnawa, ḿbʋ́ wɛnɩ ɖeu nɛ pʋwɛɛ ɛyáa wazaɣ.

eng: He talks about the angels: Hes the one who uses the spirits for his messengers and who uses flames of fire as ministers. .
local: Piyele e-tiyiyaa lɛ, ɛyɔɔdɩ paba tɔm se: «Ɛlabɩ e-tiyiyaa nɛ pɛwɛɛ ɛzɩ heɣlim yɔ nɛ eyele ɛ-tʋmlaɖaa ñɛwɛɛ ɛzɩ miŋ nzʋlʋmɛɛ yɔ.».

eng: I have great joy and encouragement because of your love, since the hearts of Gods people are refreshed by your actions, my brother.
local: Man-taabalʋ, ñɔ-sɔɔlɩm yeba nɛ man-taa hʋlʋmɩ siŋŋ nɛ pɩlabɩ-m ɖɔɖɔ hʋnʋm. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, piyeba nɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩma laŋa hɛɛ.

eng: Avoid stupid controversies, genealogies, and fights about the Law, because they are useless and worthless.
local: Ɛlɛ́, koli cɔzɔnaa hɩla wena afɛyɩ kalʋʋ yɔ a-tɔm, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, tɩkɛ kɩmɛlɛndʋ. Koli ɖɔɖɔ you nɛ Mooyiizi paɣtʋ yɔɔ tɔm hɔm. Pɩfɛyɩ wazaɣ nakɛyɛ, pɩfɛyɩ kɛzɛɣa ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: But he says to his Son, God, your throne is forever and your kingdoms scepter is a rod of justice. .
local: Piyele ɛ-Pɩyalʋ lɛ, ɛyɔɔdɩ ɛ́lɛ́ tɔm se: «Hayɩ Ɛsɔ! Ñe-kewiyaɣ wɛ tam. Ŋcɔŋnɩ ñɛ-ɛyáa yɔɔ nɛ toovenim.

eng: Therefore, though I have enough confidence in Christ to command you to do the right thing.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, paa Krɩstʋ ɛha-m waɖɛ tɩŋa se mañazɩ-ŋ nɛ ŋla mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se ŋla yɔ yɔ.

eng: After a first and second warning, have nothing more to do with a person who causes conflict.
local: Paɣ́ weyi eyozuu ɛyáa yɔ kajalaɣ ɖeɖe nɛ nabʋlɛ ɖeɖe, pʋwayɩ lɛ ŋɖɔɔnɩ-ɩ.

eng: This is why its necessary for us to pay more attention to what we have heard, or else we may drift away from it.
local: Pʋyɔɔ pʋwɛɛ se ɖɛ-ɛsɩyɛ ɛsɛɛnɩ tɔm ndʋ́ ɖɩnɩwa yɔ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ ɛzɩ pɩtɩɩ yɔ nɛ ɖɩtaakɔɔ ɖile nʋmɔʋ.

eng: You loved righteousness and hated lawless behavior. That is why God, your God, has anointed you more than your companions with the oil of joy. .
local: Ŋsɔɔlɩ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ nɛ ŋpaɖɩɣ kɩdɛkɛdɩm. Hayɩ Ɛsɔ! Pʋ-yɔɔ ma ñɛ-Ɛsɔ malɩzɩ-ŋ ña-taabalaa hɛkʋ taa nɛ manpɩyɩ ña-ñʋʋ taa amaya num. Ɛsɔɔlɩ-ŋ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ awiya lɛɛna».

eng: I would rather appeal to you through love. I, Paul—an old man, and now also a prisoner for Christ Jesus—.
local: sɔɔlɩm yɔɔ lɛ, mentendiɣ-ŋ se ŋlabɩ-pʋ. Đenɖe mɛwɛɛ yɔ, ma Pɔɔlɩ mankpadɩyaa. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ paɖʋ-m salaka Krɩstʋ Yesu yɔɔ.

eng: because you know that someone like this is twisted and sinful—so they condemn themselves.
local: Ŋsɩm ɖeu se pɩtɛ ɛyʋ ɛnʋ ɛwɛɛkaa kpem nɛ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-kɩwɛɛkɩm wɩlɩɣ se ɛ-tɔm sɩba.

eng: If the message that was spoken by angels was reliable, and every offense and act of disobedience received an appropriate consequence.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, tɔm ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa yɔɔdaa yɔ tɩwɛ wazaɣ siŋŋ. Mbá patɩŋa payɩ pɔtɔɖɔ tɩ-yɔɔ yaa patañam-tʋ yɔ, Ɛsɔ hɔm pa-nɩŋgbaaŋ ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ yɔ.

eng: And he says, You, Lord, laid the earths foundations in the beginning, and the heavens are made by your hands. .
local: Ɛtasɩ-ɩ heyuu se: «Ña Kɩpaɣlʋ lɛ, ɖooo kiɖe tɛɛ ŋlabɩ tɛtʋ nɛ ŋla ɛsɔdaa nɛ ñe-nesi.

eng: appeal to you for my child Onesimus. I became his father in the faith during my time in prison.
local: Mentendiɣ-ŋ Onezim yɔɔ. Ɛpɩsɩ man-pɩɣa, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, salaka taa cɩnɛ pɩtɩŋnɩ mɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ Yesu ɛnʋ ɛ-yɔɔ.

eng: When I send Artemas or Tychicus to you, try to come to me in Nicopolis, because Ive decided to spend the winter there.
local: Mentiyiɣ Artemaasɩ yaa Ticiiki ñɔ-cɔlɔ. Pa-taa weyi ɛtalaa lɛ, ŋñaɣ pana nɛ ŋkatɩ-m Niikopoliisi. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, manɖʋwa se mancakɩ peeɖe niŋkaɣ alɩwaatʋ taa.

eng: how will we escape if we ignore such a great salvation? It was first announced through the Lord, and then it was confirmed by those who heard him.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ lɛ, ɛzɩma ɖa ɖapɩzɩɣ ɖɩlɩɩ pɩ-taa alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩtakpaɣ ñʋʋ yabʋ siŋŋ tɔm tʋnɛ nɛ ɖɩyaa pʋyʋ yɔ? Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu calɩnɩ pʋ-tɔm yɔɔdʋʋ nɛ mbá panɩ-tʋ yɔ, paɖaɣnɩ-ɖʋ-tʋ heyuu se tɩkɛ toovenim.

eng: They will pass away, but you remain. They will all wear out like old clothes. .
local: Pʋnɛ pɩtɩŋa pʋkɔŋ mʋʋ́ʋ. Ɛlɛ́, ña ñɛwɛɣ tam. Pɩtɩŋa pʋkɔŋ kpadɩyʋʋ ɛzɩ tokonaa cadʋʋ yɔ.

eng: He was useless to you before, but now he is useful to both of us.
local: Đooo lɛ, ɛtaawɛ-ŋ wazaɣ. Ɛlɛ́, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɛwɛ-ŋ wazaɣ nɛ ɛwɛ-m wazaɣ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Help Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey with enthusiasm so that they wont need anything.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se ŋsɩnɩ paɣtʋ sɩnɖʋ Zenaasɩ nɛ Apoloosi pa-nʋmɔʋ ɖɔm taa. Taayele se nabʋyʋ ɛtɛɖɩ-wɛ.

eng: God also vouched for their message with signs, amazing things, various miracles, and gifts from the Holy Spirit, which were handed out the way he wanted.
local: Ɛsɔ ñatɩŋnɩ kawɩlɩsɩ nɛ hama lakasɩ ndɩ ndɩ pɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ se tɔm ndʋ́ pɔyɔɔdaa yɔ, tɩkɛ toovenim. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, ɛtayɩ-wɛ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu haɖɛ ɛzɩ ɛ-maɣmaɣ e-liu wɛʋ yɔ.

eng: You will fold them up like a coat. They will be changed like a person changes clothes, but you stay the same, and the years of your life wont come to an end. .
local: Ŋkɔŋ-wɛ kpiyuu ɛzɩ pekpiyuu toko sɔsɔʋ yɔ. Pɔkɔŋ-wɛ lɛɣzʋʋ ɛzɩ pɛlɛɣzʋʋ toko yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ña ñɛwɛɣ tam ɛzɩ ŋwɛʋ yɔ, ña-pɩnzɩ ɛɛkaɣ tɛm kaʋ.».

eng: Im sending him back to you, which is like sending you my own heart.
local: Manpɩsɩɣnɩ-ŋ-ɩ, ɛnʋ lɛ me-liu tɛɛ ñɩnʋ.

eng: But our people should also learn to devote themselves to doing good in order to meet pressing needs so they arent unproductive.
local: Pʋwɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ se ɖa-taa ñɩma ɛkpɛlɩkɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ paaka pa-ñʋŋ nɛ pala tʋma kɩbana ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ nɛ papɩzɩ pala ɛyáa mbʋ́ pʋpɔzʋʋ-wɛ yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ paakɛɣ mbá pɛfɛyɩ wazaɣ yɔ.

eng: God didnt put the world that is coming under the angels control.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Ɛsɔ taha e-tiyiyaa waɖɛ se pɔcɔnɩ kedeŋa ŋgá kakaɣ kɔm yɔ kɔ-yɔɔ. Kɔ-tɔm ɖɩɖɔŋ yɔɔdʋʋ.

eng: When has he ever said to any of the angels, Sit at my right side until I put your enemies under your feet like a footstool? .
local: Wiɖiyi Ɛsɔ teheyi ɖɔɖɔ e-tiyiyaa taa nɔɔyʋ se: «Caɣ mɔn-cɔlɔ lone kɩbanɖɛ taa nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ moluzi ño-koyindinaa ñɛ-tɛɛ kpem yɔ.».

eng: I considered keeping him with me so that he might serve me in your place during my time in prison because of the gospel.
local: Weyi ma paɖʋ-m salaka Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm susuu yɔɔ yɔ, me-liu kɛwɛɛ se mansɩɩ-ɩ mɔn-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛlabɩ-m tʋmɩyɛ ño-lone taa.

eng: Everyone with me greets you; greet those who love us faithfully. Grace be with all of you.
local: Mbá patɩŋa payɩ pɛwɛ mɔn-cɔlɔ yɔ, pɛsɛ-ŋ. Sɛɛ mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ pɔsɔɔlɩ-ɖʋ yɔ. Ɛsɔ ɛla mɩtɩŋa payɩ lootiye.

eng: Instead, someone declared somewhere, What is humanity that you think about them? Or what are human beings that you care about them? .
local: Ɛlɛ́, nɔɔyʋ lɩzɩ aseɣɖe Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ hɔɔlʋʋ nakʋyʋ taa se: «Anɩ ɛyʋ nɛ pʋwɛɛ se ŋtɔzɩ ɛ-yɔɔ? Anɩ ɛyʋ kpem nɛ pʋwɛɛ se ŋcɔnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ?.

eng: Arent all the angels ministering spirits who are sent to serve those who are going to inherit salvation?.
local: Mbá lɛ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa yɔ? Ḿbá lɛ feziŋ weyi petiyi-i Ɛsɔ tʋmɩyɛ taa se ɩlabɩ-ɖɩ nɛ pɩsɩnɩ mbá pʋwɛɛ se pehiɣ ñʋʋ yabʋ yɔ.

eng: However, I didnt want to do anything without your consent so that your act of kindness would occur willingly and not under pressure.
local: Ɛlɛ́, mantañɩnɩ se mamanɩ ñɔ-yɔɔ nɛ mala nabʋyʋ: maacɛyɩɣ-ŋ se ŋlabɩ-m mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ. Me-liu wɛɛ se ŋlabɩ-m-pʋ nɛ ña-maɣmaɣ ñɔ-sɔɔlɩm.

eng: For a while you made them lower than angels. You crowned human beings with glory and honor. .
local: Ŋyeba nɛ ñe-tiyiyaa kɩlɩ-ɩ alɩwaatʋ pazɩ. Ɛlɛ́, ŋpam-ɩ koboyaɣ hulaɣ nɛ ŋɖʋ-ɩ hɩɖɛ.

eng: Maybe this is the reason that Onesimus was separated from you for a while so that you might have him back forever—.
local: Pʋtɔma yɔ, Onezim kɔhɔm ɛ-tɩ kʋhɔm alɩwaatʋ pazɩ se ɛpɩsɩ ɛkɔɔ nɛ ña nɛ ɩ ɩwɛɛ tam.

eng: You put everything under their control. When he puts everything under their control, he doesnt leave anything out of control. But right now, we dont see everything under their control yet.
local: Ŋkpaɣ pɩtɩŋa payɩ nɛ ŋɖʋzɩ e-nesi taa.» Yee pɔtɔm se Ɛsɔ ɖʋzɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ e-nesi taa yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se nabʋyʋ takazɩ se pɩfɛyɩ ɛ-tɛɛ. Ŋgʋ́ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, ɖɩnaɣ se pɩtɛkɛ pɩtɩŋa pʋwɛnɩ e-nesi taa.

eng: no longer as a slave but more than a slave—that is, as a dearly loved brother. He is especially a dearly loved brother to me. How much more can he become a brother to you, personally and spiritually in the Lord!.
local: Ɛlɛ́ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, ɛtatasɩ kɛʋ yom. Ɛkɩlɩ yom wee wee. Taabalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ ɛkɛnaa. Ma lɛ, mɔnsɔɔlɩ-ɩ siŋŋ. Paa pɩɩla ɛzɩma, ñɔsɔɔlʋʋ-ɩ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛkɛ ña-ñɩnʋ nɛ ɛtɛ ɛkɛ ña-taabalʋ ɖa nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa.

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters who are partners in the heavenly calling, think about Jesus, the apostle and high priest of our confession.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, taabalaa Ɛsɔ ñɩma mbá mɩ ɛya-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ yɔ, ɩcɔnɩ Yesu weyi Ɛsɔ tiyaa se ɛkɛ cɔjɔnaa ñʋʋdʋ yɔ. Ɛ-tɔm ɖiheyiɣ ɛyáa, ɛ-yɔɔ ɖɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ.

eng: Therefore, since the promise that we can enter into rest is still open, lets be careful so that none of you will appear to miss it.
local: Ɛsɔ tɛm ɖʋʋ se ɖɩpɩzɩɣ ɖɩsʋʋ ɖenɖe ɛñɔɔzɩ-ɖʋ ɖɩhɛzɩyɛ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩkpa mɩ-tɩ nɛ pɩtaakɔɔ pɩla se pucoɖi mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ se ɛɛsʋʋ peeɖe.

eng: However, we do see the one who was made lower in order than the angels for a little while—its Jesus! Hes the one who is now crowned with glory and honor because of the suffering of his death. He suffered death so that he could taste death for everyone through Gods grace.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ yeba nɛ Yesu luzi ɛ-tɩ Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ e-tiyiyaa tɛɛ alɩwaatʋ pazɩ. Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se pɩtɩŋnɩ e-lootiye yɔɔ nɛ Yesu sɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ yɔɔ. Ɛnʋ ɖɩnaɣ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, Ɛsɔ pam-ɩ koboyaɣ hulaɣ nɛ ɛɖʋ-ɩ hɩɖɛ sɩm mbʋ́ ɛlabɩ kʋñɔŋ nɛ ɛsɩ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: Jesus was faithful to the one who appointed him just like Moses was faithful in Gods house.
local: Ɛlakaɣ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ Ɛsɔ weyi ɛlɩzɩ-ɩ yɔ eheyaɣ-i yɔ ɛzɩ Mooyiizi kalabʋ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ camɩyɛ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa tɩŋa taa yɔ.

eng: We also had the good news preached to us, just as the Israelites did. However, the message they heard didnt help them because they werent united in faith with the ones who listened to it.
local: Peheyi-ɖʋ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ paaheyuu mbá paawɛ lakʋ taa yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, tɔm ndʋ́ panɩwa yɔ, tɩtawazɩ-wɛ pʋyʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mbá panɩ-tʋ yɔ, pataawɛnɩ lidaʋ tɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: So, if you really consider me a partner, welcome Onesimus as if you were welcoming me.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, yee ŋkpaɣ-m ɛzɩ ña-taabalʋ yɔ yɔ, mʋ-ɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ŋmʋwaɣ-m yɔ.

eng: It was appropriate for God, for whom and through whom everything exists, to use experiences of suffering to make perfect the pioneer of salvation. This salvation belongs to many sons and daughters whom hes leading to glory.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Ɛsɔ labɩnɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ nɛ pʋwɛɛ e-nesi taa. Yesu lɛ weyi ɛpazɩ ñʋʋ yabʋ tʋmɩyɛ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩɩmʋnɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɛla kʋñɔŋ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛsʋʋ e-koboyaɣ taa. Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɛyáa sakɩyɛ ɛsʋʋ ka-taa ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: But he deserves greater glory than Moses in the same way that the builder of the house deserves more honor than the house itself.
local: Toovenim lɛ, pʋmʋnaa se pasa Yesu kpem nɛ pɩkɩlɩ Mooyiizi. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, paɖʋʋ weyi ɛma ɖɩɣa yɔ hɩɖɛ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ ɖɩɣa ŋ́gá ka-maɣmaɣ.

eng: We who have faith are entering the rest. As God said, And because of my anger I swore: They will never enter into my rest! And yet Gods works were completed at the foundation of the world.
local: Mbá ɖa ɖɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩsʋʋ hɛzʋʋ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ yɔɔdɩ pʋ-tɔm yɔ pɩ-taa. Ɛtɔm se: «Man-pana kpawa nɛ monɖuúu se: ‹Toovenim lɛ, paakɔŋ sʋʋ ɛjaɖɛ nɖɩ́ mɔñɔɔzɩ-wɛ se powolo pɛhɛzɩ yɔ ɖɩ-taa kaʋ.› » Ɛsɔ kɔyɔɔdɩ tɔm ńdʋ́ ḿbʋ́, ŋgʋ́, ɛɛtɛm ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ labʋ ɖooo alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛɛlaba kedeŋa yɔ.

eng: If he has harmed you in any way or owes you money, charge it to my account.
local: Paa ɛtɩɩyʋsɩnɩ-ŋ yaa ɛtɩɩtɔɔ-ŋ kɩmɩyɛ naɖɩyɛ yɔ, kpaɣ se mɔntɔɔnɩ-ŋ-ɖɩ.

eng: This is because the one who makes people holy and the people who are being made holy all come from one source. That is why Jesus isnt ashamed to call them brothers and sisters when he says.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛnʋ Yesu weyi ɛñalɩɣ ɛyáa kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ nɛ mbá ɛñalɩɣ-wɛ-pʋ yɔ, patɩŋa payɩ pa nɛ ɩ pa-Caa kʋɖʋm. Pʋ-yɔɔ fɛyɛ ɛɛkpaɣ-ɩ se ɛ́yáa-wɛ se ɛ-ñɩma.

eng: Then somewhere he said this about the seventh day of creation: God rested on the seventh day from all his works. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pama ɖoli nɔɔyʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa kɩyakʋ lʋbɛ ñɩŋgʋ tɔm se: «Ɛsɔ tɛm ɛ-tʋma tɩŋa payɩ lɛ, ɛhɛzɩ kɩyakʋ lʋbɛ ñɩŋgʋ wiye.».

eng: Every house is built by someone, but God is the builder of everything.
local: Paa ɖɩɣa ŋgá lɛ, nɔɔyʋ manɩ-kɛ. Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛma pɩtɩŋa payɩ yɔ lɛ Ɛsɔ.

eng: I will publicly announce your name to my brothers and sisters. I will praise you in the middle of the assembly. .
local: Halɩ ɛtɔm se: «Hayɩ Ɛsɔ! Mankaɣ heyuu ma-ñɩma ñɔ-tɔm. Mankaɣ-ŋ sam alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pekpeɣliɣ se pasam-ŋ yɔ.».

eng: But again, in the passage above, God said, They will never enter my rest! .
local: Pama ɖɔɖɔ hɔɔlʋʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩ-taa se: «Toovenim lɛ, paakɔŋ sʋʋ ɛjaɖɛ nɖɩ́ mɔñɔɔzɩ-wɛ se powolo pɛhɛzɩ yɔ ɖɩ-taa kaʋ.».

eng: Moses was faithful in all Gods house as a servant in order to affirm the things that would be spoken later.
local: Mooyiizi lɛ, ɛɛlaba ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ camɩyɛ Ɛsɔ ɖɩɣa tɩŋa taa ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ tʋmlaɖʋ yɔ se ɛlɩzɩ tɔm ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ kɔŋ yɔɔdʋʋ yɔ tɩ-aseɣɖe.

eng: He also says, I will rely on him. And also, Here I am with the children whom God has given to me. .
local: Ɛtasɩ yɔɔdʋʋ se: «Mɔnkɔŋ Ɛsɔ taʋ liu.» Ɛtasɩ ɖɔɖɔ se: «Ɩna ma nɛ ɛyáa mbá Ɛsɔ cɛlɩ-m yɔ!».

eng: Therefore, its left open for some to enter it, and the ones who had the good news preached to them before didnt enter because of disobedience.
local: Mbá pacalɩ Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ńdʋ́ nɩʋ yɔ, patasʋʋ hɛzʋʋ ḿbʋ́ pɩ-taa, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɛkɛ kaañamtʋ tɩnaa. Pʋ-yɔɔ lone ńɖɩ́ ɖɩwɛɛ se lɛlaa ɛsʋʋ.

eng: But Jesus was faithful over Gods house as a Son. We are his house if we hold on to the confidence and the pride that our hope gives us.
local: Piyele Krɩstʋ lɛ, ɛ́lɛ́ ñalabɩ ɛ-ñɩnɖɛ camɩyɛ ɛzɩ abalɩbɩɣa ŋgá kɔcɔŋnɩ ka-caa ɖɩɣa yɔɔ yɔ. Yee ɖɩwɛɛ nɛ sɔɔndʋ ɛɛkpaɣ-ɖʋ nɛ ɖɩɖɔkɩ ɖe-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ mbʋ́ pʋkɔŋ labʋ yɔ pɩ-taa yɔ, pʋbʋ, ɖɩkɛ ɛ-ɖɩɣa taa ñɩma. Ḿbʋ́ ɖa-taa hʋlʋmɩnaa.

eng: I, Paul, will pay it back to you . Of course, I wont mention that you owe me your life.
local: Ma-maɣmaɣ mamaɣnɩ se: ma Pɔɔlɩ mɔnkɔŋ-ŋ-ɖɩ hɛyʋʋ. Ŋgʋ́, pɩfɛyɩ se mɔntɔzɩ-ŋ kʋtɔzʋʋ se ŋtɔɔ-m kɩmɩyɛ ɖɔɖɔ. Ńɖɩ́ lɛ ña-maɣmaɣ ñe-wezuu.

eng: Therefore, since the children share in flesh and blood, he also shared the same things in the same way. He did this to destroy the one who holds the power over death—the devil—by dying.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́, ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛyáa ḿbá pɛkɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ ñɩma yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ Yesu ɛnʋ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛkɔm ɛzɩ ɛyʋ yɔ nɛ ɛkɔɔ ɛsɩ. Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɛpɩsɩ weyi ɛɛɖɔkɩ sɩm ɖoŋ yɔ ɛjam: ɛnʋ lɛ Satanɩ.

eng: Just as it says in the passage above, God designates a certain day as today, when he says through David much later, Today, if you hear his voice, dont have stubborn hearts. .
local: Ḿbʋ́ labɩna nɛ Ɛsɔ ɖaɣnɩ ɖʋʋ kɩyakʋ lɛɛkʋ. Payaɣ-kʋ se: «Sɔnɔ.» Pʋkɔma pileɖi siŋŋ lɛ, ɛtɩŋnɩ wiyaʋ sɔsɔ Daaviidi yɔɔ nɛ ɛyɔɔdɩ ɛzɩ ɩtɛm nɩʋ yɔ. Ńdʋ́ lɛ se: «Yee ɩnɩ Ɛsɔ nɔɔ sɔnɔ sɔnɔ lɛ, ɩtaala laŋɩyɛ ɖoŋ.».

eng: So, as the Holy Spirit says, Today, if you hear his voice, .
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ pʋwɛ ɛzɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔdʋʋ yɔ. Kɩyɔɔdaa se: «Yee ɩnɩ Ɛsɔ nɔɔ sɔnɔ sɔnɔ yɔ.

eng: Yes, brother, I want this favor from you in the Lord! Refresh my heart in Christ.
local: Hayɩ! Man-taabalʋ, mentendiɣ-ŋ se Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔɔ lɛ, labɩ-m tʋmɩyɛ ńɖɩ́. Đa nɛ Krɩstʋ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ yɔɔ lɛ, hɛzɩ ma-laŋɩyɛ.

eng: He set free those who were held in slavery their entire lives by their fear of death.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɛlaba nɛ eholi mbá peseɣaɣ sɩm alɩwaatʋ kpeekpe pe-wezuu caɣʋ taa nɛ pɛwɛɛ ɛzɩ yomaa yɔ.

eng: If Joshua gave the Israelites rest, God wouldnt have spoken about another day later on.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, yee Yozuwee eewoni ɛyáa lone kɩhɛzɩyɛ ńɖɩ́ ɖɩ-taa yɔ, Ɛsɔ taatasɩ yɔɔdʋʋ kɩyakʋ lɛɛkʋ tɔm pʋwayɩ.

eng: dont have stubborn hearts as they did in the rebellion, on the day when they tested me in the desert. .
local: ɩtaala hɔyɛ ɖoŋ ɛzɩ mɩ-cɔzɔnaa kakʋyʋʋ ɛ-yɔɔ lakʋ taa alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pɩtakaɣ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: Im writing to you, confident of your obedience and knowing that you will do more than what I ask.
local: Mamaɣʋ-ŋ takayaɣ kanɛ yɔ, mantaɣ liu se ŋlakɩ mbʋ́ mɔnpɔzɩ-ŋ yɔ. Halɩ ŋlakɩ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ ḿbʋ́.

eng: Of course, he isnt trying to help angels, but rather hes helping Abrahams descendants.
local: Toovenim lɛ, pɩtɛkɛ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa Yesu sɩŋna. Ɛlɛ́, Abraham liɖe taa ñɩma ɛsɩŋna.

eng: So you see that a sabbath rest is left open for Gods people.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, hɛzʋʋ nabʋyʋ wɛɛ nɛ pɩɖaŋ Ɛsɔ ñɩma ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ hɛzʋʋ kɩyakʋ lʋbɛ ñɩŋgʋ wiye yɔ.

eng: That is where your ancestors challenged and tested me, though they had seen my work for forty years. .
local: Nɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔɔdɩ se: «Mɩ-cɔzɔnaa taka-m se pana se ɛbɛ malakɩ. Ŋgʋ́, pɛtɛm naʋ tʋma wena malaba yɔ.

eng: Also, one more thing—prepare a guest room for me. I hope that I will be released from prison to be with you because of your prayers.
local: Ñɔɔzɩ-m ɖɔɖɔ ɖɩsʋyɛ kpaagbaa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mantaɣ liu se Ɛsɔ nɩɣ mɩ-sɛtʋ nɛ paha-m nʋmɔʋ nɛ mɔnkɔɔ mɩ-cɔlɔ.

eng: Therefore, he had to be made like his brothers and sisters in every way. This was so that he could become a merciful and faithful high priest in things relating to God, in order to wipe away the sins of the people.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ pɩɩkɛnɩ-ɩ kɩcɛyʋʋ se ɛpɩsɩ ɛ-tɩ kpem ɛzɩ ɛ-ñɩma yɔ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa. Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɛpɩsɩ cɔjɔ sɔsɔ weyi ɛnaɣ pa-pʋtɔdɩyɛ nɛ ɛlakɩ Ɛsɔ tʋmɩyɛ camɩyɛ se ɛ́lɛ́ ekpeɣ ɛyáa pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ.

eng: The one who entered Gods rest also rested from his works, just as God rested from his own.
local: Weyi ɛsʋʋ hɛzʋʋ ḿbʋ́ pɩ-taa yɔ, ɛkɔŋ hɛzʋʋ. Ɛhɛzɩɣnɩ ɛ-tʋma ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ hɛzʋʋnɩ ɛ-ñɩma yɔ.

eng: So I was angry with them. I said, Their hearts always go off course, and they dont know my ways. .
local: pɩnzɩ nɩɩnaza taa. Pʋ-yɔɔ man-pana kpanɩ-wɛ nɛ mɔntɔŋ se poyotuu yem. Pɔtɔsɔɔlɩ se patɩlɩ ma-nʋmɔŋ.

eng: Epaphras, who is in prison with me for the cause of Christ Jesus, greets you.
local: Epafraasɩ weyi ma nɛ ɩ ɖɩwɛ salaka taa Krɩstʋ Yesu yɔɔ yɔ, ɛsɛ-ŋ.

eng: Hes able to help those who are being tempted, since he himself experienced suffering when he was tempted.
local: Ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛlabɩ kʋñɔŋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pɩtakɩ-ɩ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛsɩnɩ mbá pɩtakɩɣ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: Therefore, lets make every effort to enter that rest so that no one will fall by following the same example of disobedience.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɖikpedesi nɛ ɖɩsʋʋ hɛzʋʋ ḿbʋ́ pɩ-taa nɛ ɖa-taa nɔɔyʋ ɛtaakɔɔ ɛtɔlɩ se ɛlabɩ kaañamtʋ ɛzɩ ɖɔ-cɔzɔnaa yɔ.

eng: Because of my anger I swore: They will never enter my rest! .
local: Peeɖe man-pana kpawa nɛ monɖuúu se: ‹Toovenim lɛ, paakɔŋ sʋʋ ɛjaɖɛ nɖɩ́ mɔñɔɔzɩ-wɛ se powolo pɛhɛzɩ yɔ ɖɩ-taa kaʋ.› ».

eng: as well as my coworkers Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke.
local: Maarkɩ nɛ Aristaarkɩ nɛ Demaasɩ nɛ Luka mbá ma nɛ wɛ ɖɩlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ yɔ, pɛsɛ-ŋ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Watch out, brothers and sisters, so that none of you have an evil, unfaithful heart that abandons the living God.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, taabalaa! Ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ camɩyɛ nɛ mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ ɛtaawɛnɩ kañadɩnaa nɛ mbá paañaŋ Ɛsɔ yɔ pɔ-hɔ nɛ pʋdʋ kɔɔ ɛha Ɛsɔ wezuu tʋ siɣ́ye!.

eng: because Gods word is living, active, and sharper than any two-edged sword. It penetrates to the point that it separates the soul from the spirit and the joints from the marrow. Its able to judge the hearts thoughts and intentions.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔtɔm wɛ wezuu nɛ tɩwɛɛ ɖoŋ ɖɔɖɔ. Tɩwɛ lɔŋ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ sɛsɩ nzɩ́ sɩwɛ lɔŋ cenje yɔ. Tɩsʋʋ ɛyʋ fɩŋ fɩŋ nɛ tɩtalɩ e-ciyam nɛ ɛ-kalɩzaɣ pa-ɖɩtanɛ nɛ tɩtayɩ-wɛ. Tɩtalɩɣ ɖɔɖɔ ɛ-mɔɔ nɛ a-taa num nɛ tɩtayɩ-wɛ. Ńdʋ́ tayɩɣnɩ ɖɔɖɔ ɛ-lɩmaɣza: kɩbana hɔɔlʋʋ nɛ kɩdɛkɛdɛɛ hɔɔlʋʋ.

eng: Every high priest is taken from the people and put in charge of things that relate to God for their sake, in order to offer gifts and sacrifices for sins.
local: Paa cɔjɔnaa ñʋʋdʋ weyi lɛ, ɛyáa hɛkʋ taa palɩzɩ-ɩ. Ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ lɛ se ewolo Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa nɛ ɛlɔ nɔɔ nɛ ɛcɛlɩ-ɩ haɖɛ ndɩ ndɩ nɖɩ́ pahawa yɔ nɛ ɛlaa-ɩ kɩlaŋ nɛ ɛ́lɛ́ kpeɣ-wɛ pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm.

eng: Instead, encourage each other every day, as long as its called today, so that none of you become insensitive to God because of sins deception.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɩsazɩ ɖama kɩyakɩŋ tɩŋa nɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm ɛtaacɛzɩ mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ nɛ ɛla laŋɩyɛ ɖoŋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɔtɔŋʋʋ se: «Sɔnɔ» yɔ, pʋ-tɔbʋʋ se lootiye alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ tɩ-taa ɖɩwɛɛ yɔ.

eng: May the grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit.
local: Đa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ ɛlabɩ-mɩ lootiye.

eng: The high priest is able to deal gently with the ignorant and those who are misled since he himself is prone to weakness.
local: Ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛnɩɩ mbá paasɩŋ nɛ mbá pelebi nʋmɔʋ yɔ pɔ-tɔm taa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛwɛnɩ ɛjandʋ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: We are partners with Christ, but only if we hold on to the confidence we had in the beginning until the end.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, yee ɖɩɖɔkɩ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɖɩɩwɛna kajalaɣ taa yɔ nesi naalɛ kpam nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɛtɛzaɣ alɩwaatʋ yɔ, pʋbʋ, ɖa nɛ Krɩstʋ ɖɩwɛna wezuu.

eng: Because of his weakness, he must offer sacrifices for his own sins as well as for the people.
local: Ɛjandʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-yɔɔ pʋwɛɛ se ɛlaa pʋyʋ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔɔ nɛ ɛlaa ɖɔɖɔ lɛlaa ñɩmbʋ yɔɔ.

eng: No creature is hidden from it, but rather everything is naked and exposed to the eyes of the one to whom we have to give an answer.
local: Mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ yɔ, nabʋyʋ fɛyɩ Ɛsɔ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ. Pukuli pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ pile ɛ-ɛsɩndaa nɛ ɛnaɣ-pʋ. Ɛnʋ pʋwɛɛ se ɖatɩŋa payɩ ɖiheyi mbʋ́ ɖɩlaba yɔ.

eng: When it says, Today, if you hear his voice, dont have stubborn hearts as they did in the rebellion. .
local: Pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Yee ɩnɩ Ɛsɔ nɔɔ sɔnɔ sɔnɔ lɛ, ɩtaala laŋɩyɛ ɖoŋ, ɛzɩ mɩ-cɔzɔnaa kakʋyʋʋ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ.».

eng: Also, lets hold on to the confession since we have a great high priest who passed through the heavens, who is Jesus, Gods Son;.
local: Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ Yesu lɛ cɔjɔnaa ñʋndɩnaa taa sɔsɔ, ɛnʋ wobina Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩɖɔkɩ lidaʋ ŋgʋ́ ɖɩwɛnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ ɖisusuu ɛyáa kʋ-tɔm yɔ nesi naalɛ kpam.

eng: So lets press on to maturity, by moving on from the basics about Christs word. Lets not lay a foundation of turning away from dead works, of faith in God.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɖɩɖɛɛnɩ ɛsɩndaa nɛ ɖɩkpɛlɩkɩ Krɩstʋ tɔm ɛzɩ mbá papɩ lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa yɔ. Đɩtaawɛɛ ɖɩnɩɣnɩ ndʋ́ pɛkpɛlɩkɩ-ɖʋ kajalaɣ taa yɔ ti-ɖeke. Pɩtatasɩ pɔzʋʋ se pɛkpɛlɩkɩ-mɩ natʋyʋ ɛzɩ: tʋma wena aawazɩɣ pʋyʋ yɔ a-yebu nɛ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ lidaʋ wɛnaʋ.

eng: Who was it who rebelled when they heard his voice? Wasnt it all of those who were brought out of Egypt by Moses?.
local: Ɛyáa pɩɩma nɩ Ɛsɔ nɔɔ nɛ pakʋyɩ ɛ-yɔɔ? Ḿbá lɛ mbá patɩŋa payɩ Mooyiizi kalɩzɩnɩ Ejiptɩ yɔ.

eng: No one takes this honor for themselves but takes it only when they are called by God, just like Aaron.
local: Nɔɔyʋ ɛɛɖʋʋ ɛ-tɩ hɩɖɛ se ɛkɛ cɔjɔnaa ñʋʋdʋ. Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ lɩzɩɣnɩ-ɩ ɛzɩ ɛlɩzʋʋ Aarɔɔnɩ yɔ.

eng: because we dont have a high priest who cant sympathize with our weaknesses but instead one who was tempted in every way that we are, except without sin.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, cɔjɔnaa ñʋndɩnaa taa sɔsɔ ɛnʋ, ɛtɛkɛ weyi ɛɛpɩzɩɣ se ɛsɩnɩ-ɖʋ ɖɛ-ɛjandʋ taa yɔ: pɩtakɩ-ɩ ɛzɩ ɖa yɔ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa. Ɛlɛ́, ɛtala kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ.

eng: And with whom was God angry for forty years? Wasnt it with the ones who sinned, whose bodies fell in the desert?.
local: Ɛyáa pɩɩma Ɛsɔ pana kakpanɩ pɩnzɩ nɩɩnaza? Ḿbá lɛ mbá palabɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm nɛ pasɩ lakʋ taa yɔ.

eng: In the same way Christ also didnt promote himself to become high priest. Instead, it was the one who said to him, You are my Son. Today I have become your Father .
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pʋwɛnɩ Krɩstʋ. Pɩtɛkɛ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛɖʋnɩ ɛ-tɩ hɩɖɛ se ɛkɛɣ cɔjɔnaa ñʋʋdʋ. Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ lɩzɩnɩ-ɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ eheyi-i se: «Ña lɛ man-Pɩyalʋ. Pɩkpaɣʋnɩ sɔnɔ yɔ, ma lɛ ña-Caa.».

eng: of teaching about ritual ways to wash with water, laying on of hands, the resurrection from the dead, and eternal judgment—all over again.
local: nɛ lɩm sɔʋ sɔnzɩ ndɩ ndɩ labʋ nɛ ɛyáa yɔɔ nesi tɩnʋʋ nɛ sɩɖaa fem nɛ tɔm hʋʋ maatɛŋ, pɔ-tɔm.

eng: Finally, lets draw near to the throne of favor with confidence so that we can receive mercy and find grace when we need help.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩñɔtɩnɩ Ɛsɔ kewiyaɣ kpelaɣ kaalɛyɩtʋ, kɔ-cɔlɔ lootiye wɛɛ. Đɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɛnaɣ ɖa-pʋtɔdɩyɛ nɛ ɛlabɩ-ɖʋ lootiye nɛ ɛsɩnɩ-ɖʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pʋpɔzʋʋ yɔ.

eng: And against whom did he swear that they would never enter his rest, if not against the ones who were disobedient?.
local: Ɛsɔ ɖuwaa se: «Toovenim lɛ, paakɔŋ sʋʋ ɛjaɖɛ nɖɩ́ mɔñɔɔzɩ-wɛ se powolo pɛhɛzɩ yɔ ɖɩ-taa kaʋ.» Mbá eɖuuni ḿbʋ́? Ḿbá lɛ kaañamtʋ tɩnaa ḿbá.

eng: as he also says in another place, You are a priest forever, according to the order of Melchizedek. .
local: Ɛyɔɔdɩ ɖɔɖɔ ɖoli nɔɔyʋ se: «Ŋkɛɣ cɔjɔ tam ɛzɩ Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ yɔ.».

eng: Were going to press on, if God allows it.
local: Đɩɖɛɛnɩ ɛsɩndaa! Yee Ɛsɔ ɛha-ɖʋ waɖɛ yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɩlakɩ.

eng: We see that they couldnt enter because of their lack of faith.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɖɩnawa se pɛfɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ yɔɔ patapɩzɩ pasʋʋ hɛzʋʋ ḿbʋ́ pɩ-taa.

eng: During his days on earth, Christ offered prayers and requests with loud cries and tears as his sacrifices to the one who was able to save him from death. He was heard because of his godly devotion.
local: Yesu kɛwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ lɛ, ɛsɛɣaɣ Ɛsɔ nɛ kubusi nɛ ɛsɩtɛɣlɩm. Etendaɣ-ɩ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, e-ɖeke ɛpɩzɩɣnɩ ɛlɩzɩ-ɩ sɩm taa. Ɛ-ñamtʋ siŋŋ yɔɔ lɛ, ɛ́lɛ́ nɩɩnɩ-ɩ.

eng: Because its impossible to restore people to changed hearts and lives who turn away once they have seen the light, tasted the heavenly gift, become partners with the Holy Spirit.
local: Nabɛyɛ wɛɛ, Ɛsɔ ñalɩmɩyɛ kɛtɛm pɔ-yɔɔ ñalʋʋ nɛ paɖɩŋ ɛsɔdaa kʋjɔʋ nɛ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu wɛɛ pɔ-cɔlɔ.

eng: and tasted Gods good word and the powers of the coming age.
local: nɛ pana se Ɛsɔtɔm wɛ ɖeu nɛ panɩɩ kedeŋa ɖoŋ weyi ɛkaɣ kɔm yɔ ɛ-taŋ.

eng: Although he was a Son, he learned obedience from what he suffered.
local: Paa ɛkɛ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ yɔ, pɩtɩŋnɩ kʋñɔŋ ŋgʋ́ ɛtɔwaa yɔ kʋ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛkpɛlɩkɩ ñamtʋ.

eng: They are crucifying Gods Son all over again and exposing him to public shame.
local: Ɛlɛ́, paha Ɛsɔ siɣ́ye. Paakaɣ patasɩ tɩlʋʋ pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm nɛ pɛlɛɣzɩ wɛtʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, paɖaɣnɩɣ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ kam kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ nɛ patʋʋ-ɩ ɛyáa ɛsɩndaa.

eng: After he had been made perfect, he became the source of eternal salvation for everyone who obeys him.
local: Ɛsɔ yeba nɛ ɛtalɩ ɖenɖe ɛñɩnaɣnɩ-ɩ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛpɩsɩ mbá patɩŋa pañaŋ Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ yɔ pa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ.

eng: The ground receives a blessing from God when it drinks up the rain that regularly comes and falls on it and yields a useful crop for those people for whom it is being farmed.
local: Toovenim lɛ, yee tɛʋ ɛnɩ hayɩm nabʋyʋ taa camɩyɛ nɛ tɔɔnaɣ la yɔ, pʋwazɩ mbá pɔ-yɔɔ pahayɩ-kɛ yɔ. Ɛsɔ wazɩɣ hayɩm ḿbʋ́ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: He was appointed by God to be a high priest according to the order of Melchizedek.
local: Ɛnʋ lɩzɩnɩ-ɩ se ɛkɛ cɔjɔnaa ñʋʋdʋ ɛzɩ Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ yɔ.

eng: But if it produces thorns and thistles, its useless and close to being cursed. It ends up being burned.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee kpaŋsɔɔ nɛ sɔɔ tɩŋ pañɩɣnɩ pɩ-taa yɔ, pɩɩwazɩɣ pʋyʋ. Ɛsɔ tɛŋnɩ-pʋ kpalʋʋ wɩlʋʋ nɛ paɖʋ-pʋ miŋ.

eng: We have a lot to say about this topic, and its difficult to explain, because you have been lazy and you havent been listening.
local: Đɩwɛnɩ tɔm sakɩyɛ se ɖɩyɔɔdʋʋ Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ ɛnʋ ɛ-yɔɔ. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛ-ɖʋ kaɖɛ se ɖɩlɩzɩ-mɩ tɩ-tɔbʋʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩpɩsɩ mbá paanɩɣ lɔŋ yɔ.

eng: But we are convinced of better things in your case, brothers and sisters, even though we are talking this way—things that go together with salvation.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Paa ɖɩyɔɔdɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɖɩtaɣ-mɩ liu siŋŋ se ɩwɛ nʋmɔʋ kɩbaŋgʋ taa, ŋ́gʋ́ lɛ ñʋʋ yabʋ nʋmɔʋ.

eng: Although you should have been teachers by now, you need someone to teach you an introduction to the basics about Gods message. You have come to the place where you need milk instead of solid food.
local: Ŋgʋ́, pɩtalʋʋ nɛ sɔnɔ yɔ, pɩɩwɛɛ se ɩkɛ wɩlɩyaa. Ɛlɛ́, pʋpɔzʋʋ se paɖaɣnɩ-mɩ wɩlʋʋ Ɛsɔtɔm kajalaɣ ñɩndʋ ndʋ́ tɩfɛyɩ kaɖɛ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩwɛ ɛzɩ mbá pɩɩwɛɛ se pɔtɔɔ tɔɔnaɣ yuŋ ñɩŋga yɔ, ɛlɛ́, iyele ɩnɩɣnɩ hɩlɩm mʋzʋʋ.

eng: God isnt unjust so that he forgets your efforts and the love you have shown for his names sake when you served and continue to serve Gods holy people.
local: Ɛsɔ lɛ weyi ɛhʋʋ tɔm nɛ toovenim yɔ. Ɛɛsɔʋ mɩ-camɩyɛ lakasɩ yɔɔ. Ɛɛsɔʋ ɖɔɖɔ sɔɔlɩm mbʋ́ ɩsɔɔlɩ-ɩ nɛ ɩtɩŋɩɣnɩ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ ɩsɩŋnɩ ɛ-ñɩma yɔ pʋyɔɔ. Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ ɩwɛɛ ɩlakɩ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ.

eng: Everyone who lives on milk is not used to the word of righteousness, because they are babies.
local: Ŋgʋ́, weyi ɛmʋzʋʋ hɩlɩm yɔ, ɛkɛ pɩɣa. Ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛtɩlɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm yaa mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ.

eng: This Melchizedek, who was king of Salem and priest of the Most High God, met Abraham as he returned from the defeat of the kings, and Melchizedek blessed him.
local: Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ ɛnʋ, ɛɛkɛ Saalɛm wiyaʋ nɛ ɛtɛ ɛkɛ Ɛsɔ Caabiyuu cɔjɔ. Abraham lɩnɩ awiya naayɛ ɖɩwaɖɛ nɛ ɛkɔŋ lɛ, Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ katɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛwazɩ Abraham ɛnʋ ɛ-yɔɔ.

eng: But we desperately want each of you to show the same effort to make your hope sure until the end.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɖe-liu wɛɛ se paa mɩ-taa weyi lɛ, ɛñaɣ pana ḿbʋ́ siŋŋ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ ɛ-kɛtɛzaɣ kɩyakʋ wiye. Yee ɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ihikiɣ mbʋ́ ɩɖaŋaa yɔ.

eng: But solid food is for the mature, whose senses are trained by practice to distinguish between good and evil.
local: Sɔsaa lɛ, tɔɔnaɣ yuŋ ñɩŋga paba ñɔtɔkɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɛkpɛlɩkaa nɛ patɩlɩ kɩbandʋ nɛ ɛzaɣ́tʋ.

eng: Abraham gave a tenth of everything to him. His name means first king of righteousness, and then king of Salem, that is, king of peace.
local: Peeɖe ɛ́lɛ́ tayɩ ɛ-ñɩm tɩŋa tam hiu nɛ ɛcɛlɩ-ɩ pʋ-hɔɔlʋʋ kʋɖʋmʋʋ. Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ tɔbʋʋ se: «Toovenim wiyaʋ.» Đɔɖɔ lɛ, ɛkɛ Saalɛm wiyaʋ. Pʋbʋ tɔbʋʋ se: «Laŋhɛzɩyɛ wiyaʋ.».

eng: This is so you wont be lazy but follow the example of the ones who inherit the promises through faith and patience.
local: Pʋbʋ, ɩɩpɩsɩɣ fendinaa. Ɛlɛ́, ɩlakɩ ɛzɩ mbá pɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ nɛ pɔɖɔkʋʋ pa-tɩ se pehiɣ kʋjɔʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛ́lɛ́ ɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: He is without father or mother or any family. He has no beginning or end of life, but hes like Gods Son and remains a priest for all time.
local: Ɛfɛyɩnɩ caa yaa ɖoo yaa liɖe. Pɔtɔyɔɔdɩ ɛ-lʋlʋʋ yaa ɛ-sɩm tɔm ɖoli. Ɛnɩɣzɩnɩ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ nɛ ɛkɛ cɔjɔ tam.

eng: When God gave Abraham his promise, he swore by himself since he couldnt swear by anyone greater.
local: Nɔɔyʋ takɩlɩ Ɛsɔ se eeɖuuni pʋdʋ. Pʋ-yɔɔ eɖuuni ɛ-tɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ Abraham pʋyʋ yɔ.

eng: See how great Melchizedek was! Abraham, the father of the people, gave him a tenth of everything he captured.
local: Ɩcɔnɩ ɩna ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛkɩlaa kpem yɔ! Đɔ-cɔzɔ Abraham maɣmaɣ hiɣ ñɩm mbʋ́ you taa yɔ, ɛtayɩ-pʋ tam hiu nɛ ɛkpaɣ pʋ-hɔɔlʋʋ kʋɖʋmʋʋ nɛ ɛha-ɩ.

eng: He said, I will certainly bless you and multiply your descendants. .
local: nɛ ɛtɔ se: «Toovenim lɛ, mɔnkɔŋ ñɔ-yɔɔ wazʋʋ nɛ meyele ñe-liɖe taa ñɩma huúú siŋŋ.».

eng: The descendants of Levi who receive the office of priest have a commandment under the Law to collect a tenth of everything from the people who are their brothers and sisters, though they also are descended from Abraham.
local: Leevi liɖe taa ñɩma mbá pɛkɛɣ cɔjɔnaa yɔ, Ɛsɔ kaɖʋ-wɛ paɣtʋ natʋyʋ. Ńdʋ́ lɛ se pɔpɔzɩ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma lɛlaa se patayɩ pa-ñɩm tam hiu nɛ pakpaɣ pʋ-hɔɔlʋʋ kʋɖʋmʋʋ nɛ pɛcɛlɩ-wɛ. Palakaɣ ḿbʋ́, ŋgʋ́ paba ɖɔɖɔ kɛ Abraham liɖe taa ñɩma.

eng: So Abraham obtained the promise by showing patience.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yebina nɛ Abraham ɖɔkɩ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛwɛɛ ɖaŋʋʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛkɔɔ ɛmʋ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ kaɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ-ɩ yɔ.

eng: But Melchizedek, who isnt related to them, received a tenth of everything from Abraham and blessed the one who had received the promises.
local: Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ ɛnʋ, ɛtaakɛ Leevi liɖe taa tʋ. Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, Abraham tayɩ ɛ-ñɩm tam hiu nɛ ɛkpaɣ pʋ-hɔɔlʋʋ kʋɖʋmʋʋ nɛ ɛcɛlɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛ́lɛ́ wazɩ ɛ-yɔɔ. Ŋgʋ́ Abraham ɛnʋ, Ɛsɔ kɛtɛm ɖʋʋ se ɛlakɩ-ɩ pʋyʋ.

eng: People pledge by something greater than themselves. A solemn pledge guarantees what they say and shuts down any argument.
local: Ɛyáa ɖukuni weyi ɛkɩlɩ-wɛ yɔ. Đuuu ḿbʋ́ pɩwɩlɩɣnɩ se pɔyɔɔdɩ toovenim nɛ pɩfɛyɩ se nɔɔyʋ ɛkpɛzɩ.

eng: Without question, the less important person is blessed by the more important person.
local: Ŋgʋ́, paa weyi ɛsɩm ḿbʋ́ se sɔsɔ wazɩɣnɩ pɩɣa yɔɔ.

eng: When God wanted to further demonstrate to the heirs of the promise that his purpose doesnt change, he guaranteed it with a solemn pledge.
local: Ɛsɔ liu ñaawɛɛ se ɛwɩlɩ ɛ-ɛyáa kaŋŋ se mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ, ɛɛlɛɣzɩ-pʋ kaʋ. Pʋ-yɔɔ eɖuuni ɛ-tɩ nɛ pɩtasɩnɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ yɔ.

eng: In addition, in one case a tenth is received by people who die, and in the other case, the tenth is received by someone who continues to live, according to the record.
local: Leevi piya mbá Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma tayɩɣ pa-ñɩm tam hiu nɛ pɛcɛlɩɣ-wɛ pʋ-hɔɔlʋʋ kʋɖʋmʋʋ yɔ, pasɩkɩ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ ɛyáa lɛlaa yɔ. Piyele Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ yɔ, ɛ-tɔm pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se ɛwɛ wezuu.

eng: So these are two things that dont change, because its impossible for God to lie. He did this so that we, who have taken refuge in him, can be encouraged to grasp the hope that is lying in front of us.
local: Paapɩzɩɣ pɛlɛɣzɩ lakasɩ ńzɩ́ sɩ-naalɛ kaʋ. Ɛsɔ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛcɛtɩnɩ sɩ-taa. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, mbá ɖa ɖihiɣ ɖɩcɔzɩyɛ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ yɔ, pɩlakɩ-ɖʋ hʋnʋm siŋŋ se ɖɩtaa liu mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa se ɛhaɣ-ɖʋ yɔ.

eng: It could be said that Levi, who received a tenth, paid a tenth through Abraham.
local: Ɖɔɖɔ lɛ, papɩzɩɣ pɔtɔ se Abraham katayʋʋ ɛ-ñɩm nɛ ɛha Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ yɔ, Leevi weyi e-liɖe taa ñɩma Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma tayɩɣ pa-ñɩm nɛ pɛcɛlɩɣ-wɛ yɔ ɛ́lɛ́ kahawa ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Now the main point of what we are saying is this: We have this kind of high priest. He sat down at the right side of the throne of the majesty in the heavens.
local: Tɔm ndʋ́ meheyiɣ-mɩ yɔ, tɩ-taa ndʋ́ tɩkɩlɩ wazaɣ yɔ lɛ se: ɖɩwɛnɩ cɔjɔ sɔsɔ nɔɔyʋ. Ɛcaɣ Ɛsɔ Đoŋ Tɩŋa Tʋ kewiyaɣ kpelaɣ cɔlɔ lone kɩbanɖɛ taa ɛsɔdaa.

eng: This hope, which is a safe and secure anchor for our whole being, enters the sanctuary behind the curtain.
local: Liu taʋ ḿbʋ́ pʋɖɔkɩnɩ ɖa-ciyamnaa kpam. Ḿbʋ́ sʋʋnɩ pɩsaʋ ŋgʋ́ pakaɣ lone kaɖɛ ñɩnɖɛ taa ɛsɔdaa yɔ kʋ-wayɩ.

eng: because he was still in his ancestors body when Abraham paid the tenth to Melchizedek.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, paa pataalʋlɩdɩ-ɩ yɔ, ɛɛwɛ Abraham calɩm taa alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ katɩ-ɩ yɔ.

eng: Hes serving as a priest in the holy place, which is the true meeting tent that God, not any human being, set up.
local: Ɛnʋ lɛ cɔjɔ sɔsɔ weyi ɛlakɩ tʋmɩyɛ ɖenɖe Ɛsɔ wɛɛ yɔ. Lone ńɖɩ́, pɩtɛkɛ nɔɔyʋ labɩnɩ-ɖɩ ɛzɩ paasiɣu kɩɖanɖʋʋ Mooyiizi alɩwaatʋ taa yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, Kɩpaɣlʋ labɩnɩ-ɖɩ, ńɖɩ́ lɛ laŋaɣ siŋŋ.

eng: Thats where Jesus went in advance and entered for us, since he became a high priest according to the order of Melchizedek.
local: Đɔ-yɔɔ Yesu ɖɛ nɔɔ nɛ ɛsʋʋ ɖɩ-taa nɛ ɛpɩsɩ cɔjɔnaa ñʋʋdʋ tam ɛzɩ Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ yɔ.

eng: So if perfection came through the levitical office of priest , why was there still a need to speak about raising up another priest according to the order of Melchizedek rather than one according to the order of Aaron?.
local: Ɛsɔ ɖʋ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma paɣtʋ se pala pɩtɩŋa ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ yɔ. Ŋgʋ́, yee Leevi liɖe taa ñɩma ɛɛlaba ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pɩtaapɔzɩ ɖɔɖɔ se cɔjɔ nɔɔyʋ ɛtasɩ lɩʋ ɛzɩ Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ yɔ nɛ ɛtalɩɩnɩ Aarɔɔnɩ liɖe taa.

eng: Every high priest is appointed to offer gifts and sacrifices. So its necessary for this high priest also to have something to offer.
local: Paa cɔjɔ sɔsɔ weyi lɛ, pasɩ-ɩ se ewoni Ɛsɔ haɖɛ nɛ kpɩna wena palaɣ Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se ɖɔ-cɔjɔ sɔsɔ ɖɔɖɔ ehiɣ nabʋyʋ nɛ ewoni ɛha-ɩ.

eng: When the order of the priest changes, there has to be a change in the Law as well.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, yee pɛlɛɣzɩ cɔjɔnaa liɖe yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se pɛlɛɣzɩ ɖɔɖɔ paɣtʋ.

eng: If he was located on earth, he wouldnt be a priest because there are already others who offer gifts based on the Law.
local: Ŋgʋ́, yee ɛɛwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ yɔ, ɛtaatɩɩkɛʋ cɔjɔ maɣmaɣ nɛ pʋcɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, cɔjɔnaa lɛlaa wɛɛ nɛ powokini Ɛsɔ haɖɛ ɛzɩ paɖʋʋ paɣtʋ taa yɔ.

eng: The person we are talking about belongs to another tribe, and no one ever served at the altar from that tribe.
local: Đa-Kɩpaɣlʋ weyi pɔyɔɔdʋʋ ɛ-tɔm cɩnɛ yɔ, e-cejewiye kɛwɛnɩ ndɩ. Đɩ-taa tʋ nɔɔyʋ taalakɩ cɔjɔtʋ tʋmɩyɛ tɩlaaɖɩnaa ɖɩhɔɖɛ kaʋ.

eng: They serve in a place that is a copy and shadow of the heavenly meeting tent. This is indicated when Moses was warned by God when he was about to set up the meeting tent: See that you follow the pattern that I showed you on the mountain in every detail .
local: Tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ cɔjɔnaa ḿbá palakɩ yɔ, ɖɩwɛ ɛzɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ pɩ-kɩlɛmʋʋ yɔ. Palakaɣ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ keheyuu Mooyiizi alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛcaɣaɣ se esiɣ-i kɩɖanɖʋʋ yɔ. Eeheyi-i se: «Cɔnɩ ŋna, la pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛzɩ mawɩlʋʋ-ŋ pʋʋ yɔɔ yɔ.».

eng: Its clear that our Lord came from the tribe of Judah, but Moses never said anything about priests from that tribe.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩsɩm ɖeu se ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ kɛ Yuda liɖe taa tʋ. Mooyiizi tɔyɔɔdɩ pe-cejewiye taa cɔjɔnaa tɔm natʋyʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛyɔɔdaɣ cɔjɔnaa tɔm yɔ.

eng: But now, Jesus has received a superior priestly service just as he arranged a better covenant that is enacted with better promises.
local: Ɛlɛ́ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, paɖʋ Krɩstʋ tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɩlɩ pa-ñɩna yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛnʋ lɛ ceyiyu nɔɔ haʋ mbʋ́ pɩkɩlɩ ɖeu nɛ pʋwɛɛ Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛyáa pɛ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ pɩ-taa. Halɩ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ nɔɔ haʋ ḿbʋ́ pɩ-taa yɔ, pɩkɩlɩ ɖeu.

eng: And its even clearer if another priest appears who is like Melchizedek.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɖɩnɩɣ tɔm ndʋ́ pɔyɔɔdaa yɔ tɩ-taa camɩyɛ: ńdʋ́ lɛ se cɔjɔ lɛlʋ weyi ɛnɩɣzɩnɩ Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ yɔ, ɛlɩwa.

eng: If the first covenant had been without fault, it wouldnt have made sense to expect a second.
local: Toovenim lɛ, yee kajalaɣ nɔɔ haʋ ɛɛpɩzaɣ se pɩla pɩtɩŋa yɔ, pɩtaapɔzɩ se patasɩ ñɩnʋʋ naalɛ ñɩmbʋ nɛ pɛlɛɣzɩnɩ-pʋ.

eng: He has become a priest by the power of a life that cant be destroyed, rather than a legal requirement about physical descent.
local: Pɩtɛkɛ paɣtʋ ndʋ́ ɛyáa ɖʋwa yɔ ńdʋ́ hanɩ-ɩ waɖɛ se ɛpɩsɩ cɔjɔ. Ɛlɛ́, wezuu ŋgʋ́ kɩfɛyɩ tɩnaɣ yɔ, ku-ɖoŋ taa ɛkɛ ḿbʋ́.

eng: But God did find fault with them, since he says, Look, the days are coming, says the Lord, when I will make a covenant with the house of Israel, and I will make a new covenant with the house of Judah. .
local: Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ kalaɣ ɛ-ñɩma yɔ ɛtɔm se: «Ma Kɩpaɣlʋ, mɔntɔŋ se kɩyakɩŋ nɩɩyɩ kaɣ kɔm. Ɩ-taa lɛ, mahaɣ nɔɔ kɩfalaɣ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma nɛ Yuda ñɩma .

eng: This is confirmed: You are a priest forever, according to the order of Melchizedek. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pama ɛ-tɔm Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Ŋkɛɣ cɔjɔ tam ɛzɩ Mɛlkisedɛɛkɩ yɔ.».

eng: It will not be like the covenant that I made with their ancestors on the day I took them by the hand to lead them out of the land of Egypt, because they did not continue to keep my covenant, and I lost interest in them, says the Lord. .
local: Pɩɩwɛɣ ɛzɩ ŋgá maaha pɔ-cɔzɔnaa, kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ mɔnɖɔkɩ pe-nesi taa nɛ malɩzɩ-wɛ nɛ Ejiptɩ ɛjaɖɛ taa yɔ. Kɩpaɣlʋ tasɩ yɔɔdʋʋ se: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pa-maɣmaɣ pɔtɔɖɔ mɔ-nɔɔ haʋ ḿbʋ́ pʋ-yɔɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ mantamaɣzɩ pɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: On the one hand, an earlier command is set aside because it was weak and useless.
local: Ḿbʋ́ peyebi paɣtʋ kɩbɩndʋ se tɩfɛyɩ ɖoŋ, tɩɩwazɩɣ pʋyʋ.

eng: This is the covenant that I will make with the house of Israel after those days, says the Lord. I will place my laws in their minds, and write them on their hearts. I will be their God, and they will be my people. .
local: Kɩpaɣlʋ tasɩ yɔɔdʋʋ se: Ɩɩnaɣ nɔɔ haʋ mbʋ́ mɔnkɔŋ ɖʋʋ ma nɛ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma ɖɛ-hɛkʋ taa kɩyakɩŋ ɩnʋ ɩ-wayɩ yɔ. Manɖʋʋ man-paɣtʋ pa-lɩmaɣza taa. Mamaɣ-tʋ ɖɔɖɔ pa-laŋa taa. Mɛnkɛɣ pɛ-Ɛsɔ nɛ ḿbá kɛ ma-ñɩma.

eng: . On the other hand, a better hope is introduced, through which we draw near to God.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Mooyiizi paɣtʋ teɖezi nabʋyʋ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa. Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ lɛɣzɩ tu-lone taa liu taʋ mbʋ́ pɩkɩlɩ-tʋ ɖeu siŋŋ yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ haɣnɩ-ɖʋ waɖɛ se ɖɩñɔtɩnɩ-ɩ.

eng: And each person wont ever teach a neighbor or their brother or sister, saying, Know the Lord, because they will all know me, from the least important of them to the most important; .
local: Pʋtɔpɔzɩ se pa-taa nɔɔyʋ ɛtasɩ wɩlʋʋ weyi ɛwɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ yɔ yaa ɛ-taabalʋ. Pɩfɛyɩ se patasɩ-ɩ heyuu se: ‹Ña, tɩlɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ!› Toovenim lɛ, pasɩŋ-m patɩŋa payɩ, kpaɣ piya cikpesi nɛ puwolo pɩsɩɩnɩ sɔsaa.

eng: And this was not done without a solemn pledge! The others have become priests without a solemn pledge.
local: Yesu cɔjɔtʋ wɛ ndɩ nɛ lɛlaa ñɩndʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ ɖuwaa nɛ pʋcɔ ɛkɛ cɔjɔ. Piyele lɛlaa yɔ, etoɖuu.

eng: because I will be lenient toward their unjust actions, and I wont remember their sins anymore. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mɔnkɔŋ-wɛ kpeɣu pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm. Maatasɩɣ tɔzʋʋ pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔɔ kaʋ.».

eng: but this priest was affirmed with a solemn pledge by the one who said, The Lord has made a solemn pledge and will not change his mind: You are a priest forever. .
local: Yesu tɔm taa lɛ, ɛɛtɔm se: «Ma Kɩpaɣlʋ, monɖuwaa se: ‹ŋkɛɣ cɔjɔ tam.› Maalɛɣzɩɣ-pʋ kaʋ.».

eng: When it says new, it makes the first obsolete. And if something is old and outdated, its close to disappearing.
local: Ɛsɔ yɔɔdʋʋ nɔɔ haʋ kɩfam tɔm ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se kajalaɣ ñɩmbʋ pɩnaa. Ŋgʋ́, mbʋ́ pɩpɩnaa nɛ pɩkpadɩyɩ yɔ, pɩwɩzɩ mʋʋ́ʋ.

eng: As a result, Jesus has become the guarantee of a better covenant.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ Yesu pɩsɩ nɔɔ haʋ mbʋ́ pɩkɩlɩ ɖeu yɔ pʋ-yʋsaɣ.

eng: The others who became priests are numerous because death prevented them from continuing to serve.
local: Đɔɖɔ lɛ, cɔjɔnaa lɛlaa ñaaɖɔ sakɩyɛ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, sɩm tahaɣ-wɛ waɖɛ se pala pa-tʋmɩyɛ tam.

eng: In contrast, he holds the office of priest permanently because he continues to serve forever.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Yesu ñɛwɛ wezuu tam. Pɩɩpɔzʋʋ se pɛcɛlɩ nɔɔyʋ ɛ-cɔjɔtʋ tʋmɩyɛ.

eng: This is why he can completely save those who are approaching God through him, because he always lives to speak with God for them.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛya mbá patɩŋɩɣnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ pañɩnɩɣ Ɛsɔ yɔ pa-ñʋʋ kpem. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛwɛ wezuu tam nɛ etendiɣ Ɛsɔ pɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: Its appropriate for us to have this kind of high priest: holy, innocent, incorrupt, separate from sinners, and raised high above the heavens.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Yesu lɛ cɔjɔ sɔsɔ weyi pʋmʋnaa se ɖɩwɛna yɔ: ɛwɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ, paanaɣ ndʋ́ paawanɩ-ɩ yɔ, ɛtala kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ. Ɛ nɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖaa pɛfɛyɩ ɖoli kʋɖʋm, ɛwɛ ɖooo ɛsɔdaa.

eng: He doesnt need to offer sacrifices every day like the other high priests, first for their own sins and then for the sins of the people. He did this once for all when he offered himself.
local: Ɛfɛyɩ ɛzɩ cɔjɔnaa ñʋndɩnaa lɛlaa yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pʋpɔzʋʋ se palaɣ Ɛsɔ kɩyakɩŋ tɩŋa. Kajalaɣ lɛ, palaɣ pa-maɣmaɣ pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔɔ. Pʋwayɩ lɛ, palaa ɛyáa tɩŋa ñɩmbʋ yɔɔ. Piyele Yesu lɛ, tam kʋɖʋm koŋ ɛla alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛkpaɣ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛha ɛyáa kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: The Law appoints people who are prone to weakness as high priests, but the content of the solemn pledge, which came after the Law, appointed a Son who has been made perfect forever.
local: Mbá Mooyiizi paɣtʋ kapɩsɩ-wɛ cɔjɔnaa ñʋndɩnaa yɔ, paawɛnɩ ɛjandʋ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ ɛyáa lɛlaa yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɖuúu mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ñaaɖuúu paɣtʋ wayɩ yɔ, pɩpɩsɩ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ kʋtʋʋzʋ cɔjɔnaa ñʋʋdʋ tam.

eng: So then the first covenant had regulations for the priests service and the holy place on earth.
local: Kajalaɣ nɔɔ haʋ kɛwɛnɩ paɣtʋ ndɩ ndɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ poluŋuu Ɛsɔ tɛɛ ɛ-ɖɩɣa taa tataa cɩnɛ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: They pitched the first tent called the holy place. It contained the lampstand, the table, and the loaves of bread presented to God.
local: Paasiɣ ka-taa kɩɖanɖʋʋ nakʋyʋ nɛ patayɩ-kʋ hɔɔlɩŋ naalɛ: payaɣ kajalaɣ ñɩŋgʋ se lone kaɖɛ ñɩnɖɛ. Paasɩ peeɖe mbʋ́ pʋ-yɔɔ pasɩɣ kanɖʋnaa yɔ nɛ taabɩlɩ. Kʋ-yɔɔ wɛ tɔɔnaɣ ŋgá paha Ɛsɔ yɔ.

eng: There was a tent behind the second curtain called the holy of holies.
local: Lone kaɖɛ ñɩnɖɛ ńɖɩ́ ɖɩ-wayɩ lɛ, patasɩ pɩsaʋ ɖɩɣʋ. Kʋ-wayɩ lone nɖɩ́ payaɣ se lone nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɩlɩ kaɖɛ yɔ ɖɩwɛɛ.

eng: It had the gold altar for incense and the chest containing the covenant, which was covered with gold on all sides. In the chest there was a gold jar containing manna, Aarons rod that budded, and the stone tablets of the covenant.
local: Peeɖe tɩlaaɖɩnaa ɖɩhɔɖɛ nɖɩ́ palabɩnɩ ñɩɣlɩ́m yɔ ɖɩwɛɛ. Nɔɔ haʋ aɖakaɣ ŋgá pohuuzi katɩŋa payɩ ñɩɣlɩ́m yɔ, kɛwɛ peeɖe ɖɔɖɔ. Ka-taa wɛ ñɩɣlɩ́m pɛʋ ŋgʋ́ paɖʋ kɩ-taa tɔɔnaɣ ŋgá kalɩnɩ ɛsɔdaa nɛ payaɣ-kɛ se maanɩ yɔ. Aarɔɔnɩ ɖaʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩɩlɩzɩ hatʋ yɔ nɛ pɩtaahalanzɩ nzɩ́ paama sɩ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ paɣtʋ yɔ, pɛwɛ peeɖe ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Above the chest there were magnificent winged creatures casting their shadow over the seat of the chest, where sin is taken care of. Right now we cant talk about these things in detail.
local: Pasɩ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa lɛzɩŋ sɩʋ kpelisi naalɛ nasɩyɩ aɖakaɣ ŋ́gá kɔ-yɔɔ nɛ pɩwɩlɩɣ se Ɛsɔ wɛ peeɖe. Si-keŋ huuzi lone nɖɩ́ ɖɩ-taa pamɩzɩɣ calɩm Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa se ekpeɣ ɛyáa pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, ɖɩ-yɔɔ. Tɔm sakɩyɛ wɛɛ se mɔyɔɔdʋʋ pʋ-yɔɔ, ɛlɛ́, pɩtɛkɛ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ pʋwɛɛ se mantazɩ tɩtɩŋa tɩ-taa.

eng: When these things have been prepared in this way, priests enter the first tent all the time as they perform their service.
local: Paañɔɔzɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ḿbʋ́ nɛ pasɩɩ nɛ piyele cɔjɔnaa ñasʋʋ paa ɖooye kɩɖanɖʋʋ kajalaɣ hɔɔlʋʋ taa nɛ palakɩ pa-tʋmɩyɛ.

eng: But only the high priest enters the second tent once a year. He never does this without blood, which he offers for himself and for the sins the people committed in ignorance.
local: Ɛlɛ́, cɔjɔnaa ñʋʋdʋ ɖeke sʋwaɣnɩ kɩɖanɖʋʋ hɔɔlʋʋ naalɛ ñɩŋgʋ taa tam kʋɖʋm pɩnaɣ taa. Pʋwɛɛ se ewoni kpɩna wena ɛhaɣ Ɛsɔ yɔ a-calɩm ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-kɩwɛɛkɩm nɛ mbʋ́ lɛlaa laba nɛ patatɩlɩ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: With this, the Holy Spirit is showing that the way into the holy place hadnt been revealed yet while the first tent was standing.
local: Ḿbʋ́ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu wɩlaa se: alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ kɩɖanɖʋʋ kajalaɣ hɔɔlʋʋ wɛɣ yɔ, nɔɔyʋ ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛsʋʋ lone nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɩlɩ kaɖɛ yɔ ɖɩ-taa.

eng: This is a symbol for the present time. It shows that the gifts and sacrifices that are being offered cant perfect the conscience of the one who is serving.
local: Ḿbʋ́ wɩlɩɣnɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɖɩwɛ tɩ-taa lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ. Pʋ-tɔbʋʋ se haɖɛ nɛ kpɩna wena palaɣ Ɛsɔ yɔ, paapɩsɩɣ mbá palakɩ kʋjɔŋ ɩnʋ yɔ kʋtʋʋzaa Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa.

eng: These are superficial regulations that are only about food, drink, and various ritual ways to wash with water. They are regulations that have been imposed until the time of the new order.
local: Pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩkɛnɩ paɣtʋ yem. Tomnaɣ yɔɔ paɖʋ-tʋ: paɖʋ-tʋ tɔɔnasɩ nɛ sʋlʋm nɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ wɛtʋ sɔnzɩ ndɩ ndɩ pɔ-yɔɔ, nɛ tɩwɛnɩ ɖoŋ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ lɛɣzɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ yɔ.

eng: But Christ has appeared as the high priest of the good things that have happened. He passed through the greater and more perfect meeting tent, which isnt made by human hands .
local: Ɛlɛ́, Krɩstʋ ñɔkɔm se ɛkɛ ñɩm mbʋ́ pʋwɛ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ pʋ-cɔjɔnaa ñʋʋdʋ. Kɩɖanɖʋʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛlakɩ ɛ-tʋmɩyɛ kɩ-tɛɛ yɔ, ŋ́gʋ́ kɩlɩnɩ wazaɣ nɛ kʋmʋna kpem. Pɩtɛkɛ ɛyáa siɣni-kʋ. Pʋ-tɔbʋʋ se kɩtɛkɛ kedeŋa kanɛ kɔ-yɔɔ pʋyʋ.

eng: He entered the holy of holies once for all by his own blood, not by the blood of goats or calves, securing our deliverance for all time.
local: Krɩstʋ sʋ kpaagbaa sʋʋ lone nɖɩ́ ɖɩkɩlɩ kaɖɛ yɔ ɖɩ-taa. Ɛsʋwaɣ lɛ, ɛtɛkpɛndɩnɩ tuliŋ nɛ neɣna pa-calɩm. Ɛlɛ́, ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-calɩm ɛsʋnaa. Ḿbʋ́ ɛlaba nɛ ɖihiɣ ñʋʋ yabʋ maatɛŋ.

eng: If the blood of goats and bulls and the sprinkled ashes of cows made spiritually contaminated people holy and clean.
local: Sɔnzɩ taa lɛ, paɖʋwa se yee nɔɔyʋ ɛlabɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se pataa-ɩ tuluŋ nɛ naŋ abalaa pa-calɩm nɛ nɔ halɩñɩnʋ weyi paɖʋ-ɩ miŋ nɛ ɛñaɣ yɔ ɛ-tɔlɩma nɛ ɛpɩsɩ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ tʋ.

eng: how much more will the blood of Jesus wash our consciences clean from dead works in order to serve the living God? He offered himself to God through the eternal Spirit as a sacrifice without any flaw.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ lɛ, ɛzɩma Krɩstʋ calɩm mbʋ́ pɩkɩlɩ ɖoŋ yɔ, pɩɩpɩzɩɣ pɩñalɩ ɛyáa kɩwɛɛkɩm! Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ŋgʋ́ kɩwɛ tam yɔ, kɩ-yɔɔ pɩtɩŋnaa nɛ ɛha ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-tɩ Ɛsɔ se palaa-ɩ nɛ pɩkɛnɩ kɩlaʋ kɩbaŋgʋ siŋŋ. Kɩlaʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩñalɩɣnɩ lakasɩ nzɩ́ sɩɩwazɩɣ pʋyʋ yɔ ɖa-taa se ɖɩpɩzɩ ɖɩla Ɛsɔ wezuu tʋ tʋmɩyɛ.

eng: This is why hes the mediator of a new covenant : so that those who are called might receive the promise of the eternal inheritance on the basis of his death. His death occurred to set them free from the offenses committed under the first covenant.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ Krɩstʋ kɛ ceyiyu nɔɔ haʋ kɩfam mbʋ́ pʋwɛ Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛyáa pɛ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ pɩ-taa. Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se mbá Ɛsɔ ya-wɛ se pɛkɛ ɛ-ñɩma yɔ, papɩzɩ pehiɣ ñɩm maatɛŋ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa se ɛhaɣ-wɛ yɔ. Krɩstʋ ɛnʋ, ɛ-sɩm yɔɔ pɩtɩŋnaa nɛ pehiɣ-pʋ. Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ lɩzɩnɩ-wɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm mbʋ́ paalabɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ paawɛ kajalaɣ nɔɔ haʋ paɣtʋ tɛɛ yɔ pi-nesi taa.

eng: When there is a will, you need to confirm the death of the one who made the will.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛɖʋwa se ñakaɣnɩ kpaɣʋ ɛ-ñɩm ɛ-sɩm wayɩ yɔ, pʋmʋnaa se ŋna siŋŋ se ɛsɩba nɛ pʋcɔ.

eng: This is because a will takes effect only after a death, since its not in force while the one who made the will is alive.
local: Toovenim lɛ, mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ, pɩfɛyɩ wazaɣ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛwɛnɩ ɛ-ɛsɛ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛ-sɩm wayɩ pʋwɛɣ wazaɣ.

eng: So not even the first covenant was put into effect without blood.
local: Ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ pʋwɛɛ: pʋwɛɛ se palaa nɛ pɛkpɛdɩ calɩm nɛ pʋcɔ kajalaɣ nɔɔ haʋ maɣmaɣ wɛɛ wazaɣ.

eng: Moses took the blood of calves and goats, along with water, scarlet wool, and hyssop, and sprinkled both the Law scroll itself and all the people after he had proclaimed every command of the Law to all the people.
local: Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ lɛ, Mooyiizi calɩ kalʋʋ paɣtʋ tɩŋa payɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa ɛsɩndaa ɛzɩ paɖʋʋ tɩ-taa yɔ. Nabʋlɛ ɖeɖe lɛ, ɛkpaɣ neɣna nɛ tuluŋ pa-calɩm nɛ lɩm nɛ esidi. Ɛkpaɣ ɖɔɖɔ kpɛm kɩsɛmɩm nɛ ñɩyʋʋ ŋgʋ́ payaɣ se Iizoopu yɔ nɛ eliɣ nɛ ɛmɩzɩɣ paɣtʋ takayaɣ nɛ ɛyáa tɩŋa pɔ-yɔɔ.

eng: While he did it, he said, This is the blood of the covenant that God established for you. .
local: Ɛmɩzaa lɛ, ɛtɔ se: «Calɩm pʋnɛ pɩwɩlɩɣnɩ nɔɔ haʋ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋ mɩ nɛ ɩ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa se ɩɖɔ pʋ-yɔɔ yɔ.».

eng: And in the same way he sprinkled the meeting tent and also all the equipment that would be used in the priests service with blood.
