local: Pɔkɔŋ sɩŋʋʋ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa nɛ paa weyi eheyi-i mbʋ́ ɛlaba yɔ. Toovenim lɛ, ɛɖaŋ kpam se ɛhʋʋnɩ sɩɖaa nɛ ɛsɛ tɩnaa patɩŋa payɩ.

eng: Instead, you were liberated by the precious blood of Christ, like that of a flawless, spotless lamb.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Krɩstʋ weyi ɛwɛ ɛzɩ heɣa ŋgá kɔ-yɔɔ fɛyɩ azuluma yaa pɩtacam ko-ɖoli yɔ, ɛnʋ pala ɖɔ-yɔɔ. Kɩlaʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩkɩlɩnɩ wazaɣ.

eng: Once you werent a people, but now you are Gods people. Once you hadnt received mercy, but now you have received mercy.
local: Đooo mbá mɩ ɩtaakɛ liɖe kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ taa ñɩma yɔ, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, ɩpɩsɩ ɛ-ñɩma. Đooo mbá mɩ Ɛsɔ taana mɩ-pʋtɔdɩyɛ yɔ, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, ɛna mɩ-pʋtɔdɩyɛ.

eng: For those who want to love life and see good days should keep their tongue from evil speaking and their lips from speaking lies. .
local: Pʋwɛ ɛzɩ pamaʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa yɔ. Pamawa se: «Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛsɔɔlaa se ɛcaɣ wezuu camɩyɛ nɛ ɛwɛɛ laŋhʋlʋmɩyɛ taa yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se eyele ɛzaɣ́tʋ tɔm yɔɔdʋʋ lɛlaa yɔɔ nɛ eyele ɖɔɖɔ cɛtʋʋ.

eng: Indeed, this is the reason the good news was also preached to the dead. This happened so that, although they were judged as humans according to human standards, they could live by the Spirit according to divine standards.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ Krɩstʋ susi Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm sɩɖaa se paa pasɩba ɛzɩ pʋpɔzʋʋ ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ yɔ yɔ, pɩtɩŋnɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu yɔɔ nɛ pɛwɛɛ wezuu.

eng: Christ was chosen before the creation of the world, but was only revealed at the end of time. This was done for you.
local: Ɛsɔ kalɩzɩ-ɩ ɖooo lɔŋ nɛ pʋcɔ ɛla kedeŋa. Ɛlɩzɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛkɔɔ kɛtɛzaɣ alɩwaatʋ tʋnɛ tɩ-taa nɛ pʋwazɩ-mɩ.

eng: Dear friends, since you are immigrants and strangers in the world, I urge that you avoid worldly desires that wage war against your lives.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Ɩkɛ agɔmaa nɛ nʋmɔɖɔnaa kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩñaɣ pana nɛ ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ nɛ mɩ-maɣmaɣ mɩ-wɛtʋ ɛtaahɔm-mɩ nɛ ɩla mbʋ́ ɩtaasɔɔlɩ yɔ.

eng: They should shun evil and do good; seek peace and chase after it. .
local: Pʋwɛɛ se pʋdʋ ɛha ɛzaɣ́tʋ siɣ́ye nɛ ɛla mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ. Ɛwɛɛ ñɩnʋʋ yɔɔ se ɛyáa ɛwɛɛ laŋhɛzɩyɛ taa.

eng: The end of everything has come. Therefore, be self-controlled and clearheaded so you can pray.
local: Pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩwɩzɩ tɛm. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ nɛ ɩcaɣnɩ mɩ-ɛsɛ nɛ ɩpɩzɩ ɩsɛɛ Ɛsɔ.

eng: who through Christ are faithful to the God who raised him from the dead and gave him glory. So now, your faith and hope should rest in God.
local: Ɛ-yɔɔ pɩtɩŋnaa nɛ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ. Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ efezini-i nɛ ɛlɩɩnɩ sɩɖaa taa nɛ ɛha-ɩ koboyaɣ. Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ ɩtaa-ɩ liu.

eng: Live honorably among the unbelievers. Today, they defame you, as if you were doing evil. But in the day when God visits to judge they will glorify him, because they have observed your honorable deeds.
local: Ɩwɛnɩ wɛtʋ kɩbandʋ mbá paañaŋ Ɛsɔ yɔ pɔ-cɔlɔ. Yee ɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, paa pakʋyʋʋ mɩ-yɔɔ se ɩkɛ kɩdɛkɛdɩm laɖaa yɔ, pɩkɛɣnɩ-wɛ kɩcɛyʋʋ nɛ pɔyɔɔdɩnɩ pɔ-nɔɔ se ɩlabɩ camɩyɛ nɛ pasa Ɛsɔ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛkɔŋ yɔ.

eng: The Lords eyes are on the righteous and his ears are open to their prayers. But the Lord cannot tolerate those who do evil. .
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Kɩpaɣlʋ cɔŋnɩ mbá patʋʋzɩ ɛ-ɛsɩndaa yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ. Ɛnɩɣnɩ-wɛ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ petendiɣ-i yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛɛnaɣ ɛzaɣ́tʋ laɖaa nɛ ɛsɩyɛ.».

eng: Above all, show sincere love to each other, because love brings about the forgiveness of many sins.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ kpem se ɩla yɔ lɛ se ɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama siŋŋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, sɔɔlɩm hɛzɩɣ kɩwɛɛkɩm sakɩyɛ.

eng: As you set yourselves apart by your obedience to the truth so that you might have genuine affection for your fellow believers, love each other deeply and earnestly.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, ɩɖɔŋ toovenim tɔm yɔɔ nɛ ɩwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa se ɩpɩzɩ ɩsɔɔlɩ Krɩstʋ ñɩma lɛlaa nɛ toovenim. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩtɛzɩ ɖama sɔɔlʋʋ nɛ mɩ-laŋɩyɛ tɩŋa pilim.

eng: For the sake of the Lord submit to every human institution. Do this whether it means submitting to the emperor as supreme ruler.
local: Kɩpaɣlʋ yɔɔ lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se ɩña mbá patɩŋa payɩ pɔcɔŋnɩ mɩ-yɔɔ yɔ. Kajalaɣ lɛ, ɩña ɛjaɖɛ ñʋʋdʋ. Ɛnʋ cɔŋnɩnɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋ-yɔɔ.

eng: Who will harm you if you are zealous for good?.
local: Yee mɩ-ɛsɛ ɛsɛnɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ pɩ-labʋ lɛ, anazɩɣ-mɩ yɔ? Nɔɔyʋ fɛyɩ.

eng: Open your homes to each other without complaining.
local: Ɩmʋ ɛyáa mbá pɔkɔŋ mɩ-tɛ yɔ camɩyɛ. Ɩtaamʋ-wɛ nɛ miduu.

eng: Do this because you have been given new birth—not from the type of seed that decays but from seed that doesnt. This seed is Gods life-giving and enduring word.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔtɔm ndʋ́ tɩwɛ tam nɛ tɩlakɩ ɛyáa tʋmɩyɛ yɔ, tɩ-yɔɔ pɩtɩŋnaa nɛ ihiɣ wezuu kɩfalʋʋ. Ḿbʋ́ pɩtɩŋnɩ mbʋ́ pɩɩsɩkɩ kaʋ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ ihiɣ wezuu.

eng: or to governors as those sent by the emperor. They are sent to punish those doing evil and to praise those doing good.
local: Ɩña ɖɔɖɔ ageeta ñʋndɩnaa mbá ɛlɩzaa se pɔhɔ kɩdɛkɛdɩm laɖaa nɩŋgbaaŋ nɛ payɩɣyɩ mbá palakɩ camɩyɛ yɔ.

eng: But happy are you, even if you suffer because of righteousness! Dont be terrified or upset by them.
local: Paa nɔɔyʋ ɛtɩɩɖʋʋ-mɩ kʋñɔŋ se ɩlakɩ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ yɔ, ɩkɔŋ hiɣu mɩ-tɩ! Sɔɔndʋ ɛtaakpa-mɩ nɛ ɛyáa. Pɩtaaliɣti-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: And serve each other according to the gift each person has received, as good managers of Gods diverse gifts.
local: Ɛsɔ labɩ paa mɩ-taa weyi kʋjɔʋ nɛ kɩ-ndɩ se ɛla tʋma ndɩ ndɩ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se paa weyi ɛkpaɣ-kʋ nɛ ɛlabɩnɩ tʋmɩyɛ camɩyɛ nɛ ɛsɩnɩ lɛlaa.

eng: Thus, All human life on the earth is like grass, and all human glory is like a flower in a field. The grass dries up and its flower falls off, .
local: Pʋwɛ ɛzɩ pamaʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa yɔ. Pamawa se: «Paa weyi ɛkɔŋ sɩbʋ ɛzɩ ñɩtʋ wɩlʋʋ yɔ nɛ e-koboyaɣ tɩŋa tɛ ɛzɩ hɛtʋ tɔʋ yɔ.

eng: Submit to them because its Gods will that by doing good you will silence the ignorant talk of foolish people.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ se ɩwɛnɩ wɛtʋ kɩbandʋ. Peeɖe kɩmɛlɛmɩŋ, ñʋʋ taa fɛyɩ tɩnaa mbá pɔhɔŋnɩ-mɩ tɔm yɔ, panaɣ-tʋ nɛ posu pe-ɖeɖe ɖiɣ ɖiɣ.

eng: Instead, regard Christ the Lord as holy in your hearts. Whenever anyone asks you to speak of your hope, be ready to defend it.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɩɖʋ mɩ-taa se Krɩstʋ lɛ Kɩpaɣlʋ nɛ ɩɖʋ-ɩ hɩɖɛ. Ɩɖaŋ kpam nɛ yee nabɛyɛ ɩpɔzɩ-mɩ se pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma nɛ ɩtaɣ-ɩ liu lɛ.

eng: Whoever speaks should do so as those who speak Gods word. Whoever serves should do so from the strength that God furnishes. Do this so that in everything God may be honored through Jesus Christ. To him be honor and power forever and always. Amen.
local: Yee Ɛsɔ ɛha nɔɔyʋ se esusi ɛ-tɔm yɔ, ńdʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se esusi. Yee ɛha nɔɔyʋ se ɛsɩnɩ lɛlaa yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɛsɩnɩ-wɛ nɛ ɖoŋ weyi Ɛsɔ ha-ɩ yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ ɛyáa tɩŋnɩ Yesu Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ pasa Ɛsɔ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɩlakɩ yɔ pɩ-taa. Ɛnʋ tɩnɩ koboyaɣ nɛ ɖoŋ tam. Pɩla ḿbʋ́!.

eng: but the Lords word endures forever. This is the word that was proclaimed to you as good news.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Kɩpaɣlʋ tɔm ñɛwɛɣ tam.» Toovenim lɛ, Laŋhɛzɩyɛ Tɔm ndʋ́ posusi-mɩ yɔ, ńdʋ́ lɛ.

eng: Do this as Gods slaves, and yet also as free people, not using your freedom as a cover-up for evil.
local: Ɩwɛɛ ɛzɩ ɛyáa mbá pɛwɛ pa-tɩ yɔɔ yɔ. Ɩtaawanɩ mɩ-tɩ yɔɔ wɛʋ ḿbʋ́ nɛ ɩla ɛzaɣ́tʋ, ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se ɩwɛɛ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ yomaa yɔ.

eng: Yet do this with respectful humility, maintaining a good conscience. Act in this way so that those who malign your good lifestyle in Christ may be ashamed when they slander you.
local: icosi-wɛ nɛ nɔɔ kɩbaŋga nɛ ñamtʋ. Mɩ-taa ɛwɛɛ ɖeu nɛ fɛyɛ kpa mbá pakʋyʋʋ mɩ-yɔɔ nɛ pɛwɛɛkɩɣ mɩ-hɩla se mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ ɩkpɛndaa yɔ.

eng: Dear friends, dont be surprised about the fiery trials that have come among you to test you. These are not strange happenings.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Pɩtaaɖɩɣzɩ-mɩ nɛ kʋñɔmɩŋ sɔsɔŋ weyi pamaɣzɩɣnɩ-mɩ se pana yɔ. Ɩtaakɛnɩ-mɩ ɛgɔndʋ pʋyʋ.

eng: Honor everyone. Love the family of believers. Have respectful fear of God. Honor the emperor.
local: Ɩɖʋ ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ hɩɖɛ. Ɩsɔɔlɩ mɩ-taabalaa Krɩstʋ ñɩma. Ɩña Ɛsɔ. Ɩɖʋ ɛjaɖɛ ñʋʋdʋ hɩɖɛ.

eng: Therefore, I have a request for the elders among you. I urge the elders:.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ, mɔyɔɔdʋʋnɩ mɩ-taa mbá pɛkɛ Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa sɔsaa yɔ. Ma ɖɔɖɔ mɛnkɛ ɖɩ-taa sɔsɔ. Mananɩ mɛ-ɛsɛ kʋñɔŋ ŋgʋ́ Krɩstʋ tɔwaa yɔ. Ɛsɔ kɔŋ-m haʋ ɖɔɖɔ koboyaɣ ŋgá ɛkɔŋ lɩzʋʋ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ-ɖʋ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ meheyiɣ-mɩ se:.

eng: It is better to suffer for doing good than for doing evil.
local: Yee Ɛsɔ ɛsɔɔlɩna se ɩtɔɔ kʋñɔŋ mɩ-camɩyɛ lakasɩ yɔɔ yɔ, pɩkɩlɩ wee wee se ɩtɔɔ-kʋ sɩ-yɔɔ ɛzɩ ɩɩtɔɔ-kʋ mɩ-kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: Instead, rejoice as you share Christs suffering. You share his suffering now so that you may also have overwhelming joy when his glory is revealed.
local: Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se mɩ-laŋa ɛhʋlʋmɩ se mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ ɩtɔkɩnɩ kʋñɔŋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ḿbʋ́ yekina nɛ mɩ-laŋa tɛzɩ hʋlʋmʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ siŋŋ puwiye nɖɩ́ ɛlɩzɩɣ e-koboyaɣ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ ɛyáa yɔ.

eng: Household slaves, submit by accepting the authority of your masters with all respect. Do this not only to good and kind masters but also to those who are harsh.
local: Mɩ tʋmlaɖaa lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se iluzi mɩ-tɩ mɩ-caanaa tɛɛ nɛ ɩñam-wɛ siŋŋ. Ɩtaaña mbá pɛwɛ ɖeu nɛ pɔ-tɔm fɛyɩ kaɖɛ yɔ pe-ɖeke. Ɛlɛ́, ɩña ɖɔɖɔ mbá pɔ-tɔm wɛ kaɖɛ yɔ.

eng: Like shepherds, tend the flock of God among you. Watch over it. Dont shepherd because you must, but do it voluntarily for God. Dont shepherd greedily, but do it eagerly.
local: ɩcɔnɩ Krɩstʋ ñɩma mbá Ɛsɔ ɖʋzɩ mi-nesi taa yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ camɩyɛ ɛzɩ ninɖiɣyu cɔŋʋʋnɩ e-heŋ yɔɔ yɔ. Pɩtaakɛnɩ-mɩ kɩcɛyʋʋ. Ɛlɛ́, ɩcɔnɩ pɔ-yɔɔ camɩyɛ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ liu wɛʋ yɔ. Ɩtaala ḿbʋ́ kɩhɛyʋʋ yɔɔ, ɛlɛ́, ɩla ḿbʋ́ nɛ mɩ-laŋɩyɛ tɩŋa pilim.

eng: Christ himself suffered on account of sins, once for all, the righteous one on behalf of the unrighteous. He did this in order to bring you into the presence of God. Christ was put to death as a human, but made alive by the Spirit.
local: Toovenim lɛ, Krɩstʋ maɣmaɣ sɩbɩ ɛyáa kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔɔ kpaagbaa sɩbʋ. Ɛnʋ weyi ɛtʋʋzaa yɔ, ɛsɩbɩ mbá ɖa ɖɩtatʋʋzɩ yɔ ɖɔ-yɔɔ se ɛpɩzɩ ewoni-ɖʋ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ. Pakʋ-ɩ nɛ ɛsɩ ɛzɩ ɛyáa sɩkʋʋ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu fezi-i.

eng: If you are mocked because of Christs name, you are blessed, for the Spirit of glory—indeed, the Spirit of God—rests on you.
local: Yee patʋʋ-mɩ Krɩstʋ yɔɔ yɔ, ihiɣ mɩ-tɩ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu koboyaɣ ñɩŋgʋ wɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ.

eng: Now, it is commendable if, because of ones understanding of God, someone should endure pain through suffering unjustly.
local: Ɛsɔ ñam yɔɔ lɛ, pʋwɛ ɖeu se ɛyʋ etisi nɛ ɛtɔɔ kʋñɔŋ ɖulum.

eng: Dont shepherd by ruling over those entrusted to your care, but become examples to the flock.
local: Ɩtaanuuti mbá Ɛsɔ ɖʋzɩ mi-nesi taa yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɩwɩlɩ-wɛ nʋmɔʋ nɛ mɩ-lakasɩ kɩbanzɩ.

eng: And it was by the Spirit that he went to preach to the spirits in prison.
local: Halɩ Fezuu ŋ́gʋ́ kʋ-yɔɔ ɛtɩŋnaa nɛ ewolo esusi Ɛsɔtɔm ɖɔɖɔ kalɩzasɩ nzɩ́ sɩɩwɛ salaka taa yɔ.

eng: Now none of you should suffer as a murderer or thief or evildoer or rebel.
local: Mɩ-taa nɔɔyʋ ɛtaatɔɔ kʋñɔŋ se ɛkɛ ɛyáa kʋyʋ yaa mɩ́lʋ́ yaa kɩdɛkɛdɩm laɖʋ yaa weyi ɛɖʋʋ ɛ-nɔɔ lɛlaa tɔm taa yɔ.

eng: From Simon Peter, a slave and apostle of Jesus Christ. To those who received a faith equal to ours through the justice of our God and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Ma Siimɔɔ Pɩyɛ weyi ɛkɛ Yesu Krɩstʋ tʋmlaɖʋ nɛ e-tiyiyu yɔ, mamaɣnɩ takayaɣ kanɛ. Mamaɣ-kɛ mbá mɩ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ ɖa yɔ. Yesu Krɩstʋ weyi ɛkɛ ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ nɛ ɖɛ-Ɛsɔ yɔ, ɛtʋʋzaa yɔɔ eyebi se ɩwɛnɩ-kʋ. Lidaʋ ŋ́gʋ́, kɩkɛnɩ ɖatɩŋa payɩ pʋyʋ sɔsɔ.

eng: But what praise comes from enduring patiently when you have sinned and are beaten for it? But if you endure steadfastly when youve done good and suffer for it, this is commendable before God.
local: Yee ɩlabɩ kɩdɛkɛdɩm nɛ pamakɩ-mɩ lɛ, ɛbɛ pɩsɛɣ-mɩ? Ɛlɛ́, yee ɩlakɩ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ nɛ pamakɩ-mɩ ɖulum nɛ iikiziɣ yɔ, pɩkɛdɩɣnɩ-ɩ.

eng: And when the chief shepherd appears, you will receive an unfading crown of glory.
local: Yee ɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, Điyiyaa Ñʋʋdʋ lakɩ-mɩ koboyaɣ kʋjɔʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩwɛɣ tam yɔ, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛlɩzɩɣ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ-mɩ yɔ.

eng: In the past, these spirits were disobedient—when God patiently waited during the time of Noah. Noah built an ark in which a few lives were rescued through water.
local: Ńzɩ́ lɛ mbá pataaña Ɛsɔ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ tɩ-taa Nowee sakaɣ kpɩyʋʋ sɔsɔʋ yɔ pa-kalɩzasɩ. Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-taa Ɛsɔ kɔɖɔkɩ ɛ-hɔyɛ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛyáa pazɩ yem kasʋnɩ kɩ-taa nɛ pɛwɛɛ lɩm yɔɔ nɛ pɩya pa-ñʋʋ. Paakpɛndɩ ɛyáa lutozo.

eng: But dont be ashamed if you suffer as one who belongs to Christ. Rather, honor God as you bear Christs name. Give honor to God.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee nɔɔyʋ ɛtɔkɩ kʋñɔŋ se ɛkɛ Krɩstʋ tʋ yɔ, fɛyɛ ɛtaakpa-ɩ. Pʋwɛɛ se ɛsa Ɛsɔ se ɛkɛ ḿbʋ́.

eng: May you have more and more grace and peace through the knowledge of God and Jesus our Lord.
local: Mɛnsɛ-mɩ: Ɛsɔ ɛtɩŋnɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɩsɩm ɛ nɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛlabɩ-mɩ lootiye kpem nɛ ɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa siŋŋ.

eng: You were called to this kind of endurance, because Christ suffered on your behalf. He left you an example so that you might follow in his footsteps.
local: Ḿbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋwa se ɩla. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Krɩstʋ ñalabɩ kʋñɔŋ ɖɔɖɔ mɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛwɩlɩ-mɩ se ɩla ɛzɩ ɛnʋ yɔ nɛ ɩtɩŋ ɛ-nʋmɔʋ taa.

eng: In the same way, I urge you who are younger: accept the authority of the elders. And everyone, clothe yourselves with humility toward each other. God stands against the proud, but he gives favor to the humble.
local: Mɩ evebiya lɛ, ɩña Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa sɔsaa. Mɩtɩŋa payɩ itisi mɩ-tɩ ɖama tɛɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pama Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Ɛsɔ ɛɛnaɣ mbá pakpazɩɣ pa-tɩ yɔ nɛ ɛsɩyɛ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛlakɩ mbá paba ñetisiɣ pa-tɩ yɔ lootiye.».

eng: Baptism is like that. It saves you now—not because it removes dirt from your body but because it is the mark of a good conscience toward God. Your salvation comes through the resurrection of Jesus Christ.
local: Pʋnɛ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ ɛzɩ lɩm sɔʋ sɔnzɩ nzɩ́ palabɩ-mɩ nɛ sɩya mɩ-ñʋʋ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ. Patalabɩ-mɩ-sɩ se sɩñalɩ mɩ-yɔɔ azuluma. Ɛlɛ́, sɩ-yɔɔ ɩtɩŋɩɣna nɛ itendi Ɛsɔ se eyele nɛ mɩ-taa wɛɛ ɖeu. Yesu Krɩstʋ fem yɔɔ Ɛsɔ tɩŋɩɣna nɛ ɛya mɩ-ñʋʋ.

eng: because its time for judgment to begin with Gods own household. But if judgment starts with us, what will happen to those who refuse to believe Gods good news?.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, alɩwaatʋ talaa se Ɛsɔ ɛhʋʋnɩ ɛyáa tɔm. Ɛ-ñɩma ɛpazɩɣna. Yee ɖa ɛpazɩɣna lɛ, ɛbɛ pʋkɔŋ tɛmnaʋ mbá paaɖɔŋ ɛ-Laŋhɛzɩyɛ tɔm yɔɔ yɔ?.

eng: By his divine power the Lord has given us everything we need for life and godliness through the knowledge of the one who called us by his own honor and glory.
local: Yesu Krɩstʋ wɛnɩ Ɛsɔ ɖoŋ nɛ ɛha-ɖʋ pɩtɩŋa payɩ se ɖɩwɛɛ wezuu nɛ ɖɩla mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ. E-koboyaɣ nɛ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛkɩlɩ pɩtɩŋa yɔ, pɔ-yɔɔ eyebi se ɖɩtɩlɩ Ɛsɔ weyi ɛya-ɖʋ se ɖɩkɛ ɛ-ñɩma yɔ.

eng: He committed no sin, nor did he ever speak in ways meant to deceive.
local: Ɛtala kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ. Wiɖiyi patanɩɩ ɛ-nɔɔ taa cɛtɩm tɔm natʋyʋ.

eng: Therefore, humble yourselves under Gods power so that he may raise you up in the last day.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, itisi mɩ-tɩ Ɛsɔ ɖoŋ tɩŋa tʋ tɛɛ nɛ ɛkpazɩ-mɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ.

eng: who is at Gods right side. Now that he has gone into heaven, he rules over all angels, authorities, and powers.
local: Ɛnʋ kpanɩ ɛsɔdaa nɛ ɛcaɣ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ lone kɩbanɖɛ taa. E-nesi taa Ɛsɔ ɖʋzɩ e-tiyiyaa nɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛnɩ ɖoŋ ɛsɔdaa yɔ.

eng: If the righteous are barely rescued, what will happen to the godless and sinful?.
local: Pʋwɛ ɛzɩ pamaʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa se: «Yee ɛyʋ kʋtʋʋzʋ ɛwɩɣnɩ ñʋʋ yabʋ hiɣu lɛ, ɛbɛ pʋkɔŋ tɛmnaʋ kpem ɛzaɣ́ʋ nɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖʋ yɔ?».

eng: Through his honor and glory he has given us his precious and wonderful promises, that you may share the divine nature and escape from the worlds immorality that sinful craving produces.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yebina nɛ ɛlabɩ-ɖʋ kʋjɔŋ sɔsɔŋ weyi ɛɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ-ɖʋ yɔ. Kʋjɔŋ ɩnʋ ɩwɛ ɖeu pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ. Ɛlakɩ-ɖʋ-ɩ se pɩtɩŋnɩ ɩ-yɔɔ nɛ ɩlɩɩ mbʋ́ kedeŋa ñɩma sɔɔlɩ labʋ nɛ pɩwɛɛkɩɣ-wɛ yɔ pi-nesi taa nɛ ɩwɛnɩ wɛtʋ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ wɛna yɔ.

eng: When he was insulted, he did not reply with insults. When he suffered, he did not threaten revenge. Instead, he entrusted himself to the one who judges justly.
local: Patʋwaɣ-ɩ, ɛlɛ́, ɛtatʋʋ nɔɔyʋ. Panazaɣ-ɩ, ɛlɛ́, etoholini nɔɔyʋ. Ɛsɔ weyi ɛhʋʋ tɔm nɛ toovenim yɔ, e-nesi taa ɛɖʋzɩ ɛ-tɩ.

eng: Throw all your anxiety onto him, because he cares about you.
local: Ɩkpaɣ lɩmaɣza wena atɩŋa payɩ akʋʋ-mɩ yɔ nɛ ɩɖʋzɩ e-nesi taa, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛnʋ cɔŋnɩnɩ mɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: So then, those who suffer because they follow Gods will should commit their lives to a trustworthy creator by doing what is right.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, mbá pɔtɔkɩ kʋñɔŋ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ liu wɛʋ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se pakpaɣ pa-tɩ pilim nɛ paɖʋzɩ e-nesi taa nɛ pala camɩyɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛnʋ manɩ-wɛ, ɛlakɩ ɖɔɖɔ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ.

eng: Be clearheaded. Keep alert. Your accuser, the devil, is on the prowl like a roaring lion, seeking someone to devour.
local: Ɩcaɣnɩ mɩ-ɛsɛ! Ɩwɛɛ kpekpeka! Mi-koyindu Satanɩ wɛɛ ɛcɔʋ. Ɛñɩnɩɣ se ɛkpa nɔɔyʋ ɛzɩ ñɔɔsɩ wɩɣʋ tɔɔyʋʋ nɛ kɩmakɩ kubusi nɛ kɩñɩnɩɣ pʋyʋ se kʋtɔɔ yɔ.

eng: He carried in his own body on the cross the sins we committed. He did this so that we might live in righteousness, having nothing to do with sin. By his wounds you were healed.
local: Pakam-ɩ kaamaŋkaɣ yɔɔ lɛ, ɛmʋ ɖa-kɩwɛɛkɩm nɛ pʋwɛɛ ɛ-yɔɔ. Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɖɩsɩ ɖa-kɩwɛɛkɩm labʋ taa nɛ ɖɩwɛɛ wezuu nɛ ɖɩla mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ. Ɛ-kɩcɩkpɩŋ yɔɔ pɩtɩŋnaa nɛ mɩ-yɔɔ cɛ.

eng: This is why you must make every effort to add moral excellence to your faith; and to moral excellence, knowledge;.
local: Pɩ-maɣmaɣ pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩñaɣ pana pɩŋŋ nɛ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ nɛ ɩwɛɛ siɣsiɣ ɖɔɖɔ mi-wezuu caɣʋ taa. Ɩwɛɛ siɣsiɣ mi-wezuu caɣʋ taa nɛ ɩkpɛlɩkɩ ɖɔɖɔ mbʋ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ.

eng: Though you were like straying sheep, you have now returned to the shepherd and guardian of your lives.
local: Đooo lɛ, ɩɩwɛ ɛzɩ heŋ weyi ileba yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɩpɩsaa ɩkɔɔ Krɩstʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-cɔlɔ. Ɛnʋ lɛ ɖiyiyu weyi ɛcɔŋnɩ mɩ-yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: Resist him, standing firm in the faith. Do so in the knowledge that your fellow believers are enduring the same suffering throughout the world.
local: Ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ siŋŋ nɛ ɩkaɖɩnɩ-ɩ. Ɩnawa se paɖʋ mɩ-taabalaa mbá pɛwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ yɔ patɩŋa payɩ kʋñɔmɩŋ weyi paɖʋ-mɩ yɔ.

eng: and to knowledge, self-control; and to self-control, endurance; and to endurance, godliness;.
local: Ɩñaɣ pana ɖɔɖɔ nɛ ɩsɔzɩ lɛɣtʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-yɔɔ tɩ ɖɔkʋʋ, nɛ tɩ ɖɔkʋʋ yɔɔ ɛsɩyɛ sɛʋ nɛ ɛsɩyɛ sɛʋ yɔɔ Ɛsɔ ñam.

eng: But false prophets also arose among the people. In the same way, false teachers will come among you. They will introduce destructive opinions and deny the master who bought them, bringing quick destruction on themselves.
local: Ɛzɩma mbʋ́ mbá pɛcɛtaɣ se pɛkɛ mbá posusuu tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ yɔ paasʋ Ɛsɔ ñɩma taa yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ mbá pawɩlɩɣ ɛyáa cɛtɩm tɔm yɔ pɔkɔŋ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa sʋʋ mɛsaɣ tɛɛ. Pɔkɔŋ pawɩlɩ-mɩ tɔm ɛzaɣ́tʋ ndʋ́ tilesiɣ ɛyáa yɔ. Halɩ pɔkɔŋ kizuu ɖa-Wɩlɩyʋ sɔsɔ weyi ɛyabɩ pa-ñʋʋ yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ pɩtɩŋɩɣna nɛ asayʋʋ nakʋyʋ tudi-wɛ.

eng: After you have suffered for a little while, the God of all grace, the one who called you into his eternal glory in Christ Jesus, will himself restore, empower, strengthen, and establish you.
local: Paa pɩɩwɛɛ se ɩla kʋñɔŋ alɩwaatʋ pazɩ yɔ, Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛtɛzɩ-mɩ ñɔɔzʋʋ nɛ ɩpɩɩ ɛ-nʋmɔʋ taa nɛ ɩkpa ɖoŋ nɛ nabʋyʋ ɛtaaciɣdi-mɩ kaʋ. Ɛnʋ labɩnɩ-mɩ lootiye siŋŋ. Ɛnʋ ɖɔɖɔ yanɩ-mɩ se ɩsʋʋ e-koboyaɣ ŋgá kaatɛŋ wiɖiyi kaʋ yɔ ka-taa mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ taa.

eng: and to godliness, affection for others; and to affection for others, love.
local: Ɩsɔzɩ Ɛsɔ ñam yɔɔ Krɩstʋ ñɩma sɔɔlʋʋ nɛ Krɩstʋ ñɩma sɔɔlʋʋ yɔɔ ɛyáa kpeekpe sɔɔlʋʋ.

eng: Many will follow them in their unrestrained immorality, and because of these false teachers the way of truth will be slandered.
local: Ɛyáa sakɩyɛ kɔŋ-wɛ tɩɣzɩnaʋ nɛ pala yem yem. Pa-lakasɩ yɔɔ lɛ, ɛyáa yɔɔdʋʋ toovenim nʋmɔʋ yɔɔ ɛzaɣ́tʋ tɔm.

eng: To him be power forever and always. Amen.
local: Ɛtɩɣyɩ ɖoŋ tɩŋa payɩ tam! Pɩla ḿbʋ́!.

eng: If all these are yours and they are growing in you, theyll keep you from becoming inactive and unfruitful in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Toovenim lɛ, wɛtʋ ńdʋ́ʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se ɩwɛna nɛ iyele tɩɖɛɛnɩ ɛsɩndaa. Peeɖe mɩ-tʋmɩyɛ labʋ tɛzɩɣ ɖɛʋ nɛ ɛsɩndaa nɛ ɩtɛzɩ tɩlʋʋ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ camɩyɛ.

eng: In their greed they will take advantage of you with lies. The judgment pronounced against them long ago hasnt fallen idle, nor is their destruction sleeping.
local: Liidiye laɣzaɣ yɔɔ lɛ, pɔkɔŋ-mɩ cɛtʋʋ nɛ pɔ-nɔɔ leleŋ nɛ pɔhɔɔzɩ mi-nesi taa. Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ weyi ɛhʋʋnɩ ɛyáa yɔ, ɛpazɩ pɔ-tɔm kʋʋ ɖooo lɔŋ. Ɛtɔyɩtʋʋ-wɛ alɩwaatʋ pazɩ taa.

eng: I have written and sent these few lines to you by Silvanus. I consider him to be a faithful brother. In these lines I have urged and affirmed that this is the genuine grace of God. Stand firm in it.
local: Silaasɩ kɛ taabalʋ weyi ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa yɔ. Ɛnʋ sɩnɩnɩ-m nɛ mama-mɩ takayaɣ cikpelaɣ kanɛ se pɩlabɩ-mɩ hʋnʋm. Mama-mɩ-kɛ ɖɔɖɔ se mawɩlɩ-mɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ labɩ-mɩ lootiye yɔ. Ɩɖɔkɩ-ɖɩ nesi naalɛ kpam.

eng: Whoever lacks these things is shortsighted and blind, forgetting that they were cleansed from their past sins.
local: Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛfɛyɩnɩ-tʋ yɔ, ɛɛnaɣ poliŋ, ɛwɛ ɛzɩ yʋlʋm yɔ. Ɛsɔwa se pañalɩ ɛ-kɩwɛɛkɩm mbʋ́ ɛɛlaba yɔ.

eng: God didnt spare the angels when they sinned but cast them into the lowest level of the underworld and committed them to chains of darkness, keeping them there until the judgment.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ tohuuzi ɛ-maɣmaɣ e-tiyiyaa mbá paalabɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ pɔ-yɔɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛɖʋ-wɛ kʋñɔŋ maatɛŋ taa se pɛwɛɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa peeɖe nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ tɔm hʋʋ kɩyakʋ wiye.

eng: The fellow-elect church in Babylon greets you, and so does my son Mark.
local: Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma mbá Ɛsɔ lɩzɩ Babilooni ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ mɩ yɔ nɛ Maarkɩ weyi ɛkɛ man-pɩɣa yɔ, pɛsɛ-mɩ.

eng: Therefore, brothers and sisters, be eager to confirm your call and election. Do this and you will never ever be lost.
local: Taabalaa, pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, mɩ-tʋmɩyɛ labʋ taa lɛ, mɩ-pana ñaɣʋ ɛwɩlɩ-mɩ se Ɛsɔ ya-mɩ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, yee ɩlakɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɩɩtɔlʋʋ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa kaʋ.

eng: And he didnt spare the ancient world when he brought a flood on the world of ungodly people, even though he protected Noah, a preacher of righteousness, along with seven others.
local: Ɛsɔ tohuuzi caánaʋ́ taa ñɩma yɔɔ ɖɔɖɔ: eyeba nɛ tɛʋ nɩɩ nɛ lɩm su kedeŋa kpeekpe nɛ pʋkʋ mbá paañaŋ-ɩ yɔ. Ɛyáa lutozo ɖeke koŋ ñʋʋ ɛyaba. Pa-taa lɛlʋ lɛ Nowee weyi eesusi ɛyáa se pala mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ.

eng: Greet each other with the kiss of love. Peace to you all who are in Christ.
local: Ɩsɛɛ ɖama ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ yɔ nɛ pɩwɩlɩ se ɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama. Mbá mɩ mɩtɩŋa payɩ mɩ nɛ Krɩstʋ ɩkpɛndaa yɔ, ɩwɛɛ laŋhɛzɩyɛ taa.

eng: In this way you will receive a rich welcome into the everlasting kingdom of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ kɔŋ-mɩ haʋ waɖɛ se ɩsʋʋ e-Kewiyaɣ ŋgá kaatɛŋ yɔ ka-taa yem hɛɛɛ. Ŋ́gá lɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ weyi ɛkɛ ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ yɔ ɛ-ñɩŋga.

eng: God condemned the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah to total destruction, reducing them to ashes as a warning to ungodly people.
local: Pʋwayɩ lɛ, ɛhʋʋnɩ Sodom ñɩma nɛ Gomɔɔrɩ ñɩma nɛ ɛkʋ pɔ-tɔm nɛ ɛñaɣzɩ pa nɛ pɛ-tɛtʋ miŋ nɛ papɩsɩ tɔlɩma. Ḿbʋ́ ɛwɩlɩnɩ mbá paañaŋ-ɩ yɔ se ḿbʋ́ pʋkɔŋ-wɛ tɛmnaʋ.

eng: So Ill keep reminding you about these things, although you already know them and stand secure in the truth you have.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, paa ɩtɛm sɩm toovenim tɔm nɛ ɩkpa ɖoŋ tɩ-taa yɔ, mɛwɛɣ mɔntɔzʋʋ-mɩ-tʋ ḿbʋ́.

eng: And he rescued righteous Lot, who was made miserable by the unrestrained immorality of unruly people. .
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛyabɩ Looti weyi ɛkɛ ɛyʋ kʋtʋʋzʋ yɔ ɛ-ñʋʋ. Ɛyáa azaɣ́a mbá paawɛ ɛ-alɩwaatʋ taa yɔ, pe-yem yem lakasɩ cɛyaɣ Looti ɛnʋ siŋŋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, kʋtʋʋzʋ ɛnʋ, ɛɛwɛ pɛ-hɛkʋ taa nɛ pɩɖɛɛ-ɩ nɛ pɛ-ɛzaɣ́tʋ lakasɩ naʋ. Pɩɩɖɛ-ɩ ɖɔɖɔ nɛ tɔm ɛzaɣ́tʋ ndʋ́ pɔyɔɔdaɣ yɔ tɩ-nɩʋ.

eng: I think its right that I keep stirring up your memory, as long as Im alive.
local: Manawa se pʋmʋnaa se mɛwɛɛ mɔntɔzʋʋ-mɩ tɔm ńdʋ́ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mɛwɛnɩ mɛ-ɛsɛ yɔ. Malakɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɩtaaɖoo tɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: These things show that the Lord knows how to rescue the godly from their trials, and how to keep the unrighteous for punishment on the Judgment Day.
local: Ḿbʋ́ wɩlɩɣnɩ-ɖʋ se Kɩpaɣlʋ sɩm nʋmɔʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛtɩŋɩɣna nɛ ɛlɩzɩ mbá pañaŋ-ɩ yɔ takʋʋ taa yɔ. Pɩwɩlɩɣ-ɖʋ ɖɔɖɔ se ɛsɩm ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɛsɩɣ azaɣ́a nɛ ɛɖʋ-wɛ kʋñɔŋ tɔm hʋʋ kɩyakʋ wiye yɔ.

eng: After all, our Lord Jesus Christ has shown me that I am about to depart from this life.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, manawa se pɩkazɩ pazɩ yem mankʋyʋʋ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ ɛzɩ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ heyuu-m yɔ.

eng: This is especially true for those who follow after the corrupt cravings of the sinful nature and defy the Lords authority. These reckless, brash people arent afraid to insult the glorious ones.
local: Kɔzɩkɔzɩ mbá panɩɣnɩ kɩdɛkɛdɩm labʋ ɛzɩ pa-maɣmaɣ pe-liu wɛʋ yɔ nɛ patakpaɣ Ɛsɔ ɖoŋ payaa pʋyʋ yɔ. Cɛtɩm tɔm wɩlɩyaa mbá meheyi-mɩ pɔ-tɔm yɔ, paacazɩɣ nɔɔyʋ taʋ, pɛkɛ agaɣya tɩnaa. Paañaŋ ɖoŋ ndɩ ndɩ weyi ɩwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ kpem nɛ patʋʋ-ɩ.

eng: Im eager for you always to remember these things after my death.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ mañakɩ pana se mawɩlɩ-mɩ mbʋ́ ɩɩla nɛ ɩtɔzʋʋ tɔm ńdʋ́ tɩ-yɔɔ tam ma-wayɩ yɔ.

eng: yet angels, who are stronger and more powerful, dont use insults when pronouncing the Lords judgment on them.
local: Halɩ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa mbá paba wɛ ɖoŋ nɛ pɩkɩlɩ-wɛ yɔ, paatʋʋ ɖoŋ ɩnʋ Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛsɩndaa nɛ ɛzaɣ́tʋ tɔm natʋyʋ.

eng: We didnt repeat crafty myths when we told you about the powerful coming of our Lord Jesus Christ. Quite the contrary, we witnessed his majesty with our own eyes.
local: Toovenim lɛ, pɩtɛkɛ mʋya wena ɛyáa maɣzɩɣ nɛ pamʋyʋʋ yɔ a-yɔɔ ɖɩtɩŋnaa nɛ ɖɩkɛdɩ-mɩ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ kɔŋnɩ ɖoŋ yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖa-maɣmaɣ ɖɩna e-koboyaɣ nɛ ɖɛ-ɛsɛ.

eng: These false teachers are like irrational animals, mere creatures of instinct, born to be captured and destroyed. They slander what they dont understand and, like animals, they will be destroyed.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ḿbá lɛ, pɛwɛ ɛzɩ tɛtɛ kpɩna wena a-ñʋŋ taa fɛyɩ nɛ awɛɛ se pɔkɔŋ-yɛ kpaʋ nɛ pakʋ yɔ. Patʋʋ mbʋ́ paasɩŋ yɔ. Pa-maɣmaɣ pa-lakasɩ nzɩ́ sɩsʋzʋʋ ɛyáa asayʋʋ taa yɔ, ńzɩ́ kɔŋnɩ-wɛ ɖɔɖɔ sʋzʋʋ kɩ-taa.

eng: He received honor and glory from God the Father when a voice came to him from the magnificent glory, saying, This is my dearly loved Son, with whom I am well-pleased.
local: Đɩɩwɛ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Caa Ɛsɔ ɖʋ-ɩ hɩɖɛ nɛ ɛsam-ɩ yɔ. Ɛsɔ weyi e-koboyaɣ kɩlɩ pɩtɩŋa yɔ, ɛyɔɔdɩ alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ se: «Ɛnɛ lɛ man-Pɩyalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ, maahʋʋ ɛ-yɔɔ kaʋ.».

eng: In this way, they will receive payment for their wrongdoing. They even enjoy unruly parties in broad daylight. They are blots and blemishes, taking delight in their seductive pleasures while feasting with you.
local: Pɔkɔŋ-wɛ labʋ mbʋ́ pɩtatʋʋzɩ yɔ ɛzɩ pa-maɣmaɣ palabʋ lɛlaa yɔ. Pɔsɔɔlɩ kpem se pɔtɔɔ nɛ pɔñɔɔ nɛ pɩɖɛlɛsɩ niye nɛ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ wɩsɩ taa. Alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mɩ nɛ wɛ ɩkpɛndɩɣ ɩtɔkɩ kazandʋ yɔ, pa-lakasɩ kpaɣ-mɩ fɛyɛ. Pɛcɛtɩɣ-mɩ nɛ pɩkɛdɩɣnɩ-wɛ siŋŋ.

eng: We ourselves heard this voice from heaven while we were with him on the holy mountain.
local: Đa-maɣmaɣ ɖɩnɩ nɔɔ ŋ́gá nɛ ɛsɔdaa ḿbʋ́. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩɩwɛna pʋʋ ŋgʋ́ kʋ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ yɔɔdɩnɩ-ɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ.

eng: They are always looking for someone with whom to commit adultery. They are always on the lookout for opportunities to sin. They ensnare people whose faith is weak. They have hearts trained in greed. They are under Gods curse.
local: Halaa acɛyɛ tɩnaa yɔɔ ɖeke pa-lɩmaɣza wɛɛ. Paañɩɣzɩɣ kɩwɛɛkɩm labʋ kpem. Pepeɣziɣ mbá pɛfɛyɩ ɖoŋ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ nɛ pasʋzʋʋ-wɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm taa. Liidiye cazʋʋ lɩmaɣza suni pa-taa. Ɛsɔ wɩlɩ-wɛ kpalʋʋ.

eng: In addition, we have a most reliable prophetic word, and you would do well to pay attention to it, just as you would to a lamp shining in a dark place, until the day dawns and the morning star rises in your hearts.
local: Đɔɖɔ lɛ, tɔm ndʋ́ mbá posusuu tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ yɔ pɔyɔɔdaa nɛ tɩkɛ toovenim siŋŋ yɔ, tɩwɛ ɖɔ-cɔlɔ. Pʋwɛ ɖeu se ɩmaɣzɩ tɩ-yɔɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, tɩwɛ ɛzɩ kanɖʋ ŋgʋ́ kɩnaɣ cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩñandɩ yɔ. Alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ʋ́ Krɩstʋ weyi ɛwɛ ɛzɩ tɩmbalʋʋ yɔ, ɛñalɩɣ mɩ-laŋa taa.

eng: Leaving the straight path, they have gone off course, following the way of Balaam son of Bosor, who loved the payment of doing wrong.
local: Peyebi nʋmɔʋ kɩbaŋgʋ tɩŋʋʋ nɛ pele. Patɩŋ Bosɔɔrɩ pɩyalʋ Balaam weyi ɛɛsɔɔlɩ mbʋ́ pɩtatʋʋzɩ yɔ labʋ se ehiɣ liidiye yɔ ɛ-wayɩ.

eng: Most important, you must know that no prophecy of scripture represents the prophets own understanding of things.
local: Pʋwɛɛ se ɩtɩlɩ camɩyɛ se: nɔɔyʋ fɛyɩ se ɛɖɛzɩɣ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩlɩnɩ Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ nɛ pama-tʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa yɔ nɛ ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-lɔŋsɩnɖɛ.

eng: But Balaam was rebuked for his wrongdoing. A donkey, which has no voice, spoke with a human voice and put a stop to the prophets madness.
local: Peeɖe Ɛsɔ kalɩ-ɩ ɛ-kaañamtʋ yɔɔ. Kpaŋasɩ ɛɛyɔɔdʋʋ. Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ tɩŋnɩ halɩ ñɩŋga nakɛyɛ yɔɔ nɛ kɔyɔɔdɩ alɩwaatʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-taa ɛzɩ ɛyʋ yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ kasɩzɩnɩ náyʋ ɛnʋ ɛ-kɩmɛlɛndʋ lakasɩ.

eng: because no prophecy ever came by human will. Instead, men and women led by the Holy Spirit spoke from God.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩtɛkɛ mbá posusuu-tʋ yɔ pamaɣzɩna yem nɛ pɔyɔɔdɩ-tʋ. Ɛlɛ́, Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu sazɩnɩ-wɛ nɛ pɔyɔɔdɩ-tʋ.

eng: These false teachers are springs without water, mists driven by the wind. The underworld has been reserved for them.
local: Cɛtɩm tɔm wɩlɩyaa ḿbá, pɛwɛ ɛzɩ hila wena a-taa lɩm sɔwa yɔ. Pɛwɛ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ ɛsɔmɩndʋ ndʋ́ heɣlim sɔsɔm kpakɩɣ pɩɖɛɣna yɔ. Cɩkpɛndʋʋ sɔsɔʋ kpemm taa Ɛsɔ ñɔɔzʋʋ-wɛ ɖɩjaɣyɛ.

eng: With empty, self-important speech, they use sinful cravings and unrestrained immorality to ensnare people who have only just escaped life with those who have wandered from the truth.
local: Pɔyɔɔdʋʋ camɩyɛ, ɛlɛ́ pɩkɛ kɩmɛlɛndʋ tɔm. Piteleɖida yɔ, nabɛyɛ lɩʋ ɛyáa mbá pelebi nʋmɔʋ yɔ pa-taa yɔ. Ḿbá cɛtɩm tɔm wɩlɩyaa peɣziɣ. Palakɩ yem yem lakasɩ nzɩ́ pa-maɣmaɣ pe-liu wɛɛ yɔ nɛ peyilini-wɛ.

eng: These false teachers promise freedom, but they themselves are slaves of immorality; whatever overpowers you, enslaves you.
local: Peheyiɣ-wɛ se pɔkɔŋ pa-tɩ yɔɔ wɛʋ. Ŋgʋ́, pa-maɣmaɣ pɛkɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm mbʋ́ puwokini-wɛ sɩm taa yɔ pu-yomaa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛyʋ kɛ mbʋ́ pʋwɛnɩ ɖoŋ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ pu-yom.

eng: If people escape the moral filth of this world through the knowledge of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ, then get tangled up in it again and are overcome by it, they are worse off than they were before.
local: Đa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ lɛ ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ. Toovenim lɛ, yee ɛyáa ɩsɩm-ɩ nɛ peyele kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ ɛzaɣ́tʋ lakasɩ nɛ pɛtɛ paɖaɣnɩ pɩsʋʋ sɩ-taa nɛ sɩwabɩ-wɛ yɔ, pɛwɛɣ pʋtɔdɩyɛ kpem nɛ pɩkɩlɩ paawɛʋ kajalaɣ taa yɔ.

eng: It would be better for them never to have known the way of righteousness than, having come to know it, to turn back from the holy commandment entrusted to them.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɩɩkɩlɩ wee wee se pataatɩlɩ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ pʋ-nʋmɔʋ ɛzɩ paatɩlɩ-kʋ nɛ pʋwayɩ palɩɩ kɩ-taa nɛ paatasɩɣ ɖɔm paɣtʋ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɖʋwa nɛ pɛkɛdɩ-wɛ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: They demonstrate the truth of the proverb: A dog returns to its own vomit, and a washed sow wallows in the mud.
local: Mbʋ́ pɩlabɩ-wɛ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se eduuye nɖɩ́ potuwaa se: «Haɣ pɩsaa kɔtɔkɩ kɔ-tɔtʋ» nɛ lɛɛɖɛ nɖɩ́ potuwaa ɖɔɖɔ se: «Patɩtɛm afa lɩm sɔʋ lɛ, ɛɖaɣnɩ pɩsʋʋ ɛsʋzɩ ɛ-tɩ ahɔya taa» yɔ, akɛ toovenim.

eng: We announce to you what existed from the beginning, what we have heard, what we have seen with our eyes, what we have seen and our hands handled, about the word of life.
local: Nabʋyʋ kɛwɛɛ nɛ pʋcɔ Ɛsɔ la kedeŋa, ɖɩnɩ pʋ-tɔm nɛ ɖɩna-pʋ nɛ ɖɛ-ɛsɛ nɛ ɖɩcɔnɩ-pʋ kpem, ɖitukuni-pʋ nɛ ɖe-nesi. Ḿbʋ́ lɛ Tɔm ndʋ́ tɩhaɣ wezuu yɔ.

eng: The life was revealed, and we have seen, and we testify and announce to you the eternal life that was with the Father and was revealed to us.
local: Wezuu ŋ́gʋ́, pɩlɩzɩ-kʋ nɛ pɩwɩlɩ-ɖʋ nɛ ɖɩna-kʋ yɔɔ ɖɩlɩzɩɣ kɩ-aseɣɖe. Ŋ́gʋ́ lɛ wezuu maatɛŋ ŋgʋ́ kɩwɛ Caa Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ yɔ. Kʋ-tɔm ɖɩkɛdɩɣ-mɩ.

eng: What we have seen and heard, we also announce it to you so that you can have fellowship with us. Our fellowship is with the Father and with his Son, Jesus Christ.
local: Điheyiɣ-mɩ mbʋ́ ɖɩnanɩ ɖɛ-ɛsɛ nɛ ɖɩnɩɩnɩ ɖa-nɩŋgbaaŋ yɔ se ɩkpɛndɩ ɖɔ-yɔɔ ɖa nɛ Caa nɛ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ ɖɛ-kpɛndʋʋ taa.

eng: We are writing these things so that our joy can be complete.
local: Đɩmaɣ-mɩ tɔm tʋnɛ se ɖa nɛ mɩ ɖa-laŋa ɩtɛzɩ hʋlʋmʋʋ.

eng: This is the message that we have heard from him and announce to you: God is light and there is no darkness in him at all.
local: Yesu Krɩstʋ tɔm ndʋ́ ɖɩnɩwa nɛ ɖɩkɛdɩɣ-mɩ yɔ, ńdʋ́ lɛ se: Ɛsɔ lɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ, cɩkpɛndʋʋ nakʋyʋ fɛyɩ ɖenɖe ɛwɛɛ yɔ.

eng: If we claim, We have fellowship with him, and live in the darkness, we are lying and do not act truthfully.
local: Yee ɖɩtɔm se ɖa nɛ Ɛsɔ ɖɩlabɩ nɔɔ kʋɖʋmaɣ nɛ ɖɩwɛɛ ɖɩlakɩ cɩkpɛndʋʋ tɛɛ lakasɩ yɔ, ɖɩkɛ pɔpɔtɩnaa, ɖɩɩɖɔŋ toovenim nʋmɔʋ taa.

eng: But if we live in the light in the same way as he is in the light, we have fellowship with each other, and the blood of Jesus, his Son, cleanses us from every sin.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee ɖɩɖɔŋ ñalɩmɩyɛ taa ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ wɛʋ ɖɩ-taa yɔ yɔ, piyeki nɛ ɖa nɛ lɛlaa ɖɩla nɔɔ kʋɖʋmaɣ. Pʋbʋ, Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ Yesu calɩm ñalɩɣ ɖa-kɩwɛɛkɩm tɩŋa payɩ.

eng: If we claim, We dont have any sin, we deceive ourselves and the truth is not in us.
local: Yee ɖɩtɔm se ɖɩtala kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ yɔ, ɖɩcɛtɩɣ ɖa-tɩ, ɖɩtasɩ toovenim.

eng: But if we confess our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us our sins and cleanse us from everything weve done wrong.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee ɖiheyi ɖa-kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, Ɛsɔ kpeɣiɣ-ɖʋ-pʋ nɛ ɛñalɩ ɖa-kɩdɛkɛdɩm tɩŋa. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛtʋʋzaa nɛ ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ ɛɖʋwa se ɛlakɩ yɔ.

eng: My dear friends, this is now my second letter to you. I have written both letters to stir up your sincere understanding with a reminder.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa, ɩɩnaɣ takayaɣ naalɛ ñɩŋga ŋgá mamaɣ-mɩ yɔ. Ka nɛ kajalaɣ ñɩŋga sɩ-naalɛ sɩ-taa lɛ, mancaɣ se mɔntɔzɩ-mɩ mbʋ́ ɩtɛm sɩm yɔ nɛ menfezi mɩ-lɩmaɣza nɛ ɩmaɣzɩ camɩyɛ.

eng: If we claim, We have never sinned, we make him a liar and his word is not in us.
local: Yee ɖɩkpɛzaa se ɖɩtala kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ kaʋ yɔ, ɖɩyaɣ Ɛsɔ se cɛtɩyʋ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se ɖɩtasɩ ɛ-tɔm.

eng: I want you to recall what the holy prophets foretold as well as what the Lord and savior commanded through your apostles.
local: Me-liu wɛɛ se ɩtɔzɩ tɔm ndʋ́ náyaa kiɖeɖema yɔɔdɩ ɖooo lɔŋ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ. Ɩtɔzɩ ɖɔɖɔ paɣtʋ ndʋ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ weyi ɛkɛ ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ yɔ, ɛtɩŋnɩ e-tiyiyaa yɔɔ nɛ eheyi-mɩ se ɩla yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ.

eng: My little children, Im writing these things to you so that you dont sin. But if you do sin, we have an advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the righteous one.
local: Men-piya! Mamaɣ-mɩ takayaɣ kanɛ se ɩtaala kɩwɛɛkɩm. Ɛlɛ́, yee pɩlabɩ se nɔɔyʋ labɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, pʋdʋ ɛtɩlɩ se nɔɔyʋ wɛ Caa Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ nɛ etendiɣ-i se ekpeɣ-ɖʋ ɖa-kɩwɛɛkɩm. Ɛnʋ lɛ Yesu Krɩstʋ, ɛtʋʋzaa.

eng: Most important, know this: in the last days scoffers will come, jeering, living by their own cravings.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se ɩtɩlɩ kpem yɔ lɛ se kɛtɛzaɣ alɩwaatʋ taa lɛ, mbá powoŋuu-mɩ yɔ, pɔkɔŋ lɩʋ. Pɔkɔŋ labʋ ɛzaɣ́tʋ ndʋ́ pa-maɣmaɣ pe-liu wɛɛ yɔ.

eng: He is Gods way of dealing with our sins, not only ours but the sins of the whole world.
local: Ɛ-maɣmaɣ ɛ-calɩm kpɛdɩnɩ se Ɛsɔ ɛtɩŋnɩ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ ekpeɣ-ɖʋ ɖa-kɩwɛɛkɩm. Pɩtasɩɩnɩ ɖe-ɖeke, ɛlɛ́, ekpeɣ ɖɔɖɔ kedeŋa yɔɔ ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ pa-ñɩmbʋ.

eng: and saying, Where is the promise of his coming? After all, nothing has changed—not since the beginning of creation, nor even since the ancestors died.
local: nɛ pɔtɔ se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ tɔm se ɛkɔŋ lɛ, pɩla ɛzɩma? Le ɛwɛɛ yɔ? Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖooo ɖa-caanaa sɩbʋ nɛ halɩ nɛ sɔnɔ yɔ, pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ pi-ɖeɖe ɛzɩ ɖooo pɩɩwɛʋ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Ɛsɔ labɩ kedeŋa yɔ.».

eng: This is how we know that we know him: if we keep his commandments.
local: Yee ɖɩɖɔŋ Ɛsɔ paɣtʋ yɔɔ camɩyɛ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ toovenim se ɖɩsɩm-ɩ.

eng: But they fail to notice that, by Gods word, heaven and earth were formed long ago out of water and by means of water.
local: Ɛyáa mbá pɔpɔzʋʋ pa-tɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, paacaɣ petisi se: ɖooo lɔŋ Ɛsɔ kɔyɔɔdɩ kʋyɔɔdʋ se ɛsɔdaa nɛ tɛtʋ palɩɩ nɛ palɩɩ ɖɔɖɔ. Ɛkpaɣ lɩm nɛ ɛlabɩnɩ tɛtʋ nɛ ɛtɩŋnɩ pʋ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛɖɔkɩ-tʋ.

eng: The one who claims, I know him, while not keeping his commandments, is a liar, and the truth is not in this person.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛtɔm se ɛsɩm Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛɛɖɔŋ ɛ-paɣtʋ yɔɔ yɔ, pʋdʋ kɛ cɛtɩyʋ, ɛtasɩ toovenim.

eng: And it was through these that the world of that time was flooded and destroyed.
local: Lɩm ɖɔɖɔ Ɛsɔ keɖezini mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ yɔ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ eeyeba nɛ tɛʋ sɔsɔʋ nɩɩ nɛ lɩm su kɔ-yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: But the love of God is truly perfected in whoever keeps his word. This is how we know we are in him.
local: Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ ɖɔŋ Ɛsɔtɔm yɔɔ yɔ, ɛkɛ weyi ɛsɔɔlɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛ-laŋɩyɛ tɩŋa pilim yɔ. Mbʋ́ pɩwɩlɩɣ se ɖa nɛ Ɛsɔ ɖɩlabɩ nɔɔ kʋɖʋmaɣ yɔ lɛ se:.

eng: But by the same word, heaven and earth are now held in reserve for fire, kept for the Judgment Day and destruction of ungodly people.
local: Ɛsɔ kɔyɔɔdɩ kʋyɔɔdʋ ɖɔɖɔ se ɛsɔdaa nɛ tɛtʋ mbá ɖɩnaɣ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ yɔ, pɛwɛɛ ḿbʋ́ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ paɖʋʋ-wɛ miŋ nɛ pañaɣ lusa yɔ. Puwiye ńɖɩ́ Ɛsɔ kɔŋ kañadɩnaa tɔm hʋnaʋ nɛ eyele pɛtɛŋɛlɩ.

eng: The one who claims to remain in him ought to live in the same way as he lived.
local: weyi ɛkaɖɩɣ kpayɩ se ɛ nɛ Ɛsɔ pɛkpɛndaa yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se pʋdʋ ɛcaɣ wezuu ɛzɩ Yesu Krɩstʋ caɣʋ yɔ.

eng: Dont let it escape your notice, dear friends, that with the Lord a single day is like a thousand years and a thousand years are like a single day.
local: Ɛlɛ́, mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa, tɔm natʋyʋ wɛɛ, pɩfɛyɩ se ɩsɔɔ-tʋ kaʋ. Ńdʋ́ lɛ se: Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛsɩndaa lɛ, evemiye kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ wɛ ɛzɩ pɩnzɩ kutoku nɛ pɩnzɩ kutoku ñɛwɛɛ ɛzɩ evemiye kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ yɔ.

eng: Dear friends, Im not writing a new commandment to you, but an old commandment that you had from the beginning. The old commandment is the message you heard.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Pɩtɛkɛ paɣtʋ kɩfatʋ natʋyʋ tɔm mamaɣ se meheyi-mɩ. Ɛlɛ́, kɩbɩndʋ ndʋ́ peheyi-mɩ ɖooo kiɖe tɛɛ nɛ itisi yɔ, tɩ-tɔm mamaɣ-mɩ. Paɣtʋ kɩbɩndʋ ńdʋ́ lɛ tɔm ndʋ́ ɩnɩwa yɔ.

eng: The Lord isnt slow to keep his promise, as some think of slowness, but he is patient toward you, not wanting anyone to perish but all to change their hearts and lives.
local: Nabɛyɛ maɣzɩɣ se Kɩpaɣlʋ tala lɔŋ mbʋ́ eheyi ɛyáa se ɛlakɩ yɔ. Ŋgʋ́ pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́. Ɛlɛ́, mɩ-yɔɔ ɛ́ɖɔ́kɩ ɛ-hɔyɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛtɔsɔɔlɩ se nɔɔyʋ ɛtɛŋɛlɩ. Ɛlɛ́, ɛsɔɔlaa se ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ ɛlɛɣzɩ wɛtʋ.

eng: On the other hand, I am writing a new commandment to you, which is true in him and in you, because the darkness is passing away and the true light already shines.
local: Paa ḿbʋ́, tɔm ndʋ́ mamaɣ-mɩ yɔ, tɩkɛ paɣtʋ kɩfatʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, cɩkpɛndʋʋ ɖɔŋ ɖɛʋ nɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ ñapazɩ ñalʋʋ: ńɖɩ́ lɛ toovenim mbʋ́ pʋwɛ mɩ nɛ Yesu Krɩstʋ mɩ-taa yɔ.

eng: But the day of the Lord will come like a thief. On that day the heavens will pass away with a dreadful noise, the elements will be consumed by fire, and the earth and all the works done on it will be exposed.
local: Kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Kɩpaɣlʋ kɔŋ yɔ, pʋwɛɣ ɛzɩ mɩ́lʋ́ kɔŋʋʋ yɔ. Puwiye ńɖɩ́ lɛ, pɩyakɩ kɔkɔɖɛ sɔsɔɖɛ naɖɩyɛ siŋŋ nɛ ɛsɔdaa mʋʋ́ʋ. Miŋ ñakɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ. Tɛtʋ nɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋwɛ tɩ-yɔɔ yɔ, paatasɩɣ wɛʋ.

eng: The one who claims to be in the light while hating a brother or sister is in the darkness even now.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛtɔm se ɛwɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ taa nɛ ɛpaɖɩɣ ɛ-taabalaa yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se ɛwɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa tam.

eng: Since everything will be destroyed in this way, what sort of people ought you to be? You must live holy and godly lives.
local: Yee ḿbʋ́ pʋwɛɛ se pɩtɩŋa payɩ pʋkɔŋ ɖem yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɩɖɔ ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ yɔ. Ɩwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ mi-wezuu caɣʋ taa nɛ ɩla mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ.

eng: The person loving a brother and sister stays in the light, and there is nothing in the light that causes a person to stumble.
local: Ɛlɛ́, yee nɔɔyʋ ɛsɔɔlɩ ɛ-taabalaa yɔ, ɛwɛ ñalɩmɩyɛ taa, nabʋyʋ fɛyɩ se pɩpɩzɩɣ pucoɖi-i Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa.

eng: waiting for and hastening the coming day of God. Because of that day, the heavens will be destroyed by fire and the elements will melt away in the flames.
local: Ɩla ḿbʋ́ nɛ ɩɖaŋnɩ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ kɔŋ yɔ. Ɩñɔɔzɩ mɩ-tɩ nɛ kɩyakʋ ŋ́gʋ́ kɩtalɩ lɔŋ. Puwiye ńɖɩ́ ɛsɔdaa mʋ́ʋ miŋ nɛ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ peeɖe yɔ puyoli pɩtɩŋa. Pɩɩsɛkɩɣ pʋyʋ.

eng: But the person who hates a brother or sister is in the darkness and lives in the darkness, and doesnt know where to go because the darkness blinds the eyes.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛpaɖɩɣ ɛ-taabalaa yɔ, ɛwɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa. Ɛɖɔŋ ɖɔɖɔ cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa, ɛɛnaɣ ɖenɖe ewoki yɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, cɩkpɛndʋʋ yʋlɩsɩ ɛ-ɛsɛ.

eng: But according to his promise we are waiting for a new heaven and a new earth, where righteousness is at home.
local: Ɛlɛ́, Ɛsɔ heyi-ɖʋ se ɛlakɩ ɛsɔdaa kɩfalʋʋ nɛ tɛtʋ kɩfatʋ. Peeɖe mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ pʋkɔŋ wɛʋ. Ḿbʋ́ ɖɩɖaŋaa yɔ.

eng: Little children, Im writing to you because your sins have been forgiven through Jesus name.
local: Men-piya! Mamaɣ-mɩ takayaɣ kanɛ se meheyi-mɩ tɔm tʋnɛ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ tɛm tɩŋnaʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ ekpeɣ-mɩ mɩ-kɩwɛɛkɩm.

eng: Therefore, dear friends, while you are waiting for these things to happen, make every effort to be found by him in peace—pure and faultless.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa, pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩ-ɖaŋʋʋ taa lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se ɩñaɣ pana nɛ ɩwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa nɛ pataana kɩdɛkɛdɩm nabʋyʋ mɩ-yɔɔ. Ɩñaɣ pana ɖɔɖɔ nɛ ɩwɛɛ laŋhɛzɩyɛ taa ɛ-ɛsɩndaa.

eng: Parents, Im writing to you because you have known the one who has existed from the beginning. Young people, Im writing to you because you have conquered the evil one.
local: Man-caanaa! Mɩ lɛ, mamaɣ-mɩ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩsɩm weyi ɛɛwɛɛ nɛ pʋcɔ Ɛsɔ la kedeŋa yɔ. Evebiya! Mɩ lɛ, mamaɣ-mɩ-tʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩwabɩ Satanɩ.

eng: Consider the patience of our Lord to be salvation, just as our dear friend and brother Paul wrote to you according to the wisdom given to him.
local: Ɩtɩlɩ se ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ hɔyɛ ɖɔkʋʋ haɣnɩ-mɩ waɖɛ se pɩya mɩ-ñʋʋ. Ḿbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ha ɖa-taabalʋ kʋsɔɔlʋ Pɔɔlɩ lɔŋsɩnɖɛ nɛ ɛma nɛ eheyi-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Little children, I write to you because you know the Father. Parents, I write to you because you have known the one who has existed from the beginning. Young people, I write to you because you are strong, the word of God remains in you, and you have conquered the evil one.
local: Men-piya! Mama-mɩ-tʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩsɩm Caa Ɛsɔ. Man-caanaa! Mama-mɩ-tʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩsɩm weyi ɛɛwɛɛ nɛ pʋcɔ Ɛsɔ la kedeŋa yɔ. Evebiya! Mama-mɩ-tʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɩwɛ ɖoŋ. Ɩɖɔkɩ Ɛsɔtɔm mɩ-laŋa taa kpam nɛ ɩwa Satanɩ.

eng: speaking of these things in all his letters. Some of his remarks are hard to understand, and people who are ignorant and whose faith is weak twist them to their own destruction, just as they do the other scriptures.
local: Pʋ-tɔm ɛma ɛ-takayɩsɩ nzɩ́ sɩtɩŋa sɩ-taa ɛkɛdɩ Kɩpaɣlʋ kɔm tɔm yɔ. Pʋwɛ kaɖɛ se ɛyáa ɛnɩɩ tɩ-taa natʋyʋ tɔbʋʋ. Tɔm ńdʋ́ ɛyáa mbá paasɩŋ pʋyʋ nɛ patapɩɩ yɔ, pɛɖɛzɩɣ kiŋgila nɛ yaayala. Palakɩ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ palakʋʋ Ɛsɔtɔm Takayaɣ taa tɔm lɛɛtʋ yɔ. Ḿbʋ́ pelesiɣni pa-maɣmaɣ pa-tɩ.

eng: Dont love the world or the things in the world. If anyone loves the world, the love of the Father is not in them.
local: Ɩtaasɔɔlɩ kedeŋa kanɛ yaa mbʋ́ pʋwɛ kɔ-yɔɔ yɔ. Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛsɔɔlɩ-kɛ yɔ, ɛtɔsɔɔlɩ Caa Ɛsɔ.

eng: Therefore, dear friends, since you have been warned in advance, be on guard so that you arent led off course into the error of sinful people, and lose your own safe position.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa mɩ lɛ, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ pɛkɛdɩ-mɩ ɛyáa kɩdɛkɛdɩŋ ɩnʋ ɩ-tɔm. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩkpa mɩ-tɩ nɛ wɛ. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pɔkɔŋ pepeɣzi-mɩ nɛ ɩtɩŋ-wɛ. Peeɖe ɩɩtasɩɣ wɛʋ mi-ɖeɖe mi-lidaʋ wɛnaʋ taa.

eng: Everything that is in the world—the craving for whatever the body feels, the craving for whatever the eyes see and the arrogant pride in ones possessions—is not of the Father but is of the world.
local: Mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa pʋwɛ kɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, ḿbʋ́ yɔ: kɩdɛkɛdɩm mbʋ́ ɛyáa sɔɔlɩ labʋ yɔ, ɛsɛ naɣnaɣ nɛ ñɩm yɔɔ tɩ kpazʋʋ. Pɩtɩŋa payɩ pɩlɩnɩ kedeŋa yɔɔ, pɩtɛkɛ Caa Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ pɩlɩnaa.

eng: Instead, grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord and savior Jesus Christ. To him belongs glory now and forever. Amen.
local: Ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se ɩɖɛɛnɩ ɛsɩndaa lootiye nʋmɔʋ taa nɛ ɩtɛzɩ sɩm ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ weyi ɛkɛ ɖa-ñʋʋ yaɖʋ yɔ. Pasam-ɩ kpaɣ lɛɛlɛɛyɔ nɛ paa ɛzɩmtaa. Pɩla ḿbʋ́!.

eng: And the world and its cravings are passing away, but the person who does the will of God remains forever.
local: Ɩtɩlɩ camɩyɛ se kedeŋa ɖɔŋ tɛm nɛ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛyáa ɖʋʋ pʋ-yɔɔ ɛsɛ yɔ, pɩtɛŋ ɖɔɖɔ. Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ liu wɛɛ yɔ, ɛ́lɛ́ cakɩ wezuu tam.

eng: Little children, it is the last hour. Just as you have heard that the antichrist is coming, so now many antichrists have appeared. This is how we know it is the last hour.
local: Men-piya! Kedeŋa wɩzɩ tɛm! Ɩnɩwa se paa pɩɩla ɛzɩma, Krɩstʋ koyindu kaɣ kɔm. Ɖɔɖɔ lɛ, ɖɩnawa se alɩwaatʋ tʋnɛ tɩ-taa e-koyindinaa sakɩyɛ lɩwa. Ḿbʋ́ ɖɩnanaa se kedeŋa wɩzɩ tɛm.

eng: They went out from us, but they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But by going out from us, they showed they all are not part of us.
local: Pɩtɛ ɛyáa ḿbá, ɖɛ-hɛkʋ taa palɩnaa, ɛlɛ́, pataakɛ ɖa-ñɩma siŋŋ. Toovenim lɛ, yee paakɛ ɖa-ñɩma yɔ, paawɛ ɖɛ-hɛkʋ taa. Pɩlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɛyáa ɛna se patɩŋa pataakɛ ɖa-ñɩma siŋŋ.

eng: But you have an anointing from the holy one, and all of you know the truth.
local: Mɩ lɛ, Ɛsɔ Ñɩnʋ ha-mɩ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ɛzɩ papɩyʋʋ ɛyʋ ñʋʋ taa num yɔ nɛ mɩtɩŋa payɩ ɩnaɣ mbʋ́ pɩkɛ toovenim yɔ.

eng: I dont write to you because you dont know the truth but because you know it. You know that no lie comes from the truth.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pɩtɛkɛ se ɩtasɩ toovenim yɔɔ mamaɣ-mɩ. Ɛlɛ́, ɩsɩm-pʋ yɔɔ mamaɣ-mɩ. Ɩnawa ɖɔɖɔ se cɛtɩm nabʋyʋ ɛɛlɩɣnɩ toovenim taa.

eng: Who is the liar? Isnt it the person who denies that Jesus is the Christ? This person is the antichrist: the one who denies the Father and the Son.
local: Anɩ lɛ cɛtɩyʋ yɔ? Ɛnʋ lɛ weyi ɛkpɛzɩɣ se pɩtɛkɛ Yesu lɛ Weyi Ɛsɔ Lɩzaa yɔ. Pʋdʋ kɛ Krɩstʋ koyindu: ekizi Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ pa-naalɛ.

eng: Everyone who denies the Son does not have the Father, but the one who confesses the Son has the Father also.
local: Toovenim lɛ, weyi ekiziɣ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ yɔ, ɛtasɩ ɖɔɖɔ Caa Ɛsɔ. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ tisiɣ se ɛsɩm Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ yɔ, ɛsɩm ɖɔɖɔ Caa Ɛsɔ.

eng: As for you, what you heard from the beginning must remain in you. If what you heard from the beginning remains in you, you will also remain in relationship to the Son and in the Father.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, iyele nɛ tɔm ndʋ́ ɩnɩ ɖooo kiɖe tɛɛ yɔ, tɩcaɣ mɩ-taa. Yee tɔm ndʋ́ ɩnɩ ɖooo kiɖe tɛɛ yɔ, tɩwɛ mɩ-taa yɔ, pʋbʋ, mɩ nɛ Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ ɩkpɛndaa.

eng: This is the promise that he himself gave us: eternal life.
local: Mbʋ́ Yesu Krɩstʋ ɖʋwa se ɛhaɣ-ɖʋ yɔ lɛ: wezuu maatɛŋ.

eng: I write these things to you about those who are attempting to deceive you.
local: Ɛyáa mbá pacaɣ se pɛcɛtɩ-mɩ yɔ, pɔ-tɔm mamaɣ se meheyi-mɩ.

eng: As for you, the anointing that you received from him remains on you, and you dont need anyone to teach you the truth. But since his anointing teaches you about all things , remain in relationship to him just as he taught you.
local: Mɩ lɛ, Fezuu ŋgʋ́ Yesu Krɩstʋ ha-mɩ ɛzɩ papɩyʋʋ ɛyʋ ñʋʋ taa num yɔ, kɩwɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ. Yee ḿbʋ́ pɩtatasɩ pɔzʋʋ se nɔɔyʋ ɛkpɛlɩkɩ-mɩ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, kɩwɩlɩɣ-mɩ pɩtɩŋa payɩ nɛ toovenim, cɛtɩm fɛyɩ pɩ-taa. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, mɩ nɛ Yesu Krɩstʋ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ ɛwɛɛ ḿbʋ́ ɛzɩ Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ŋ́gʋ́ kɩwɩlʋʋ-mɩ yɔ.

eng: And now, little children, remain in relationship to Jesus, so that when he appears we can have confidence and not be ashamed in front of him when he comes.
local: Men-piya! Yee ḿbʋ́ mɩ nɛ Yesu Krɩstʋ mɩ-kpɛndʋʋ ɛwɛɛ ḿbʋ́ nɛ ɖɩpɩzɩ ɖɩñɔtɩnɩ-ɩ kaalɛyɩtʋ puwiye nɖɩ́ ɛpɩsɩɣ ɛkɔɔ nɛ pana-ɩ yɔ. Puwiye ńɖɩ́, fɛyɛ ɛɛkpaɣ-ɖʋ.

eng: If you know that he is righteous, you also know that every person who practices righteousness is born from him.
local: Ɩsɩm camɩyɛ se Krɩstʋ tʋʋzaa. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pʋwɛɛ ɖɔɖɔ se itisi se weyi ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ, ɛkɛ Ɛsɔ pɩɣa.

eng: Dear friends, dont believe every spirit. Test the spirits to see if they are from God because many false prophets have gone into the world.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Yee nɔɔyʋ eheyi-mɩ se Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ɖoŋ ɛyɔɔdʋʋna yɔ, ɩtaatisi kpaagbaa. Ɛlɛ́, ɩmaɣzɩ-ɩ nɛ ɩna se pɩkɛ toovenim na. Meheyiɣ-mɩ ḿbʋ́, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mbá pɛcɛtɩɣ se pɛkɛ náyaa yɔ palɩ kedeŋa yɔɔ sakɩyɛ.

eng: See what kind of love the Father has given to us in that we should be called Gods children, and that is what we are! Because the world didnt recognize him, it doesnt recognize us.
local: Ɩna ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Caa Ɛsɔ sɔɔlɩ-ɖʋ kpem yɔ: ɛyaɣ-ɖʋ se e-piya. Toovenim ɖɔɖɔ lɛ, ɖɩkɛ e-piya. Ɛlɛ́, kedeŋa ñɩma tasɩm-ɖʋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, patasɩm-ɩ.

eng: This is how you know if a spirit comes from God: every spirit that confesses that Jesus Christ has come as a human is from God.
local: Mbʋ́ ɩpɩzɩɣ ɩnana se toovenim Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu wɛ nɔɔyʋ cɔlɔ yɔ lɛ se: yee nɔɔyʋ ɛkaɖɩ kpayɩ se Yesu Krɩstʋ pɩsɩ ɛyʋ nɛ ɛkɔɔ kedeŋa yɔɔ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ŋ́gʋ́ kɩwɛ pʋdʋ cɔlɔ.

eng: Dear friends, now we are Gods children, and it hasnt yet appeared what we will be. We know that when he appears we will be like him because well see him as he is.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɖɩkɛ Ɛsɔ piya. Nɔɔyʋ tanadɩ mbʋ́ ɖɩkɔŋ kɛʋ yɔ. Ɛlɛ́, ɖɩsɩm se alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Yesu Krɩstʋ pɩsɩɣ ɛkɔɔ nɛ pana-ɩ yɔ, ɖɩwɛɣ ɛzɩ ɛwɛʋ yɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩnaɣ-ɩ ɛzɩ ɛwɛʋ yɔ.

eng: and every spirit that doesnt confess Jesus is not from God. This is the spirit of the antichrist, which you have heard is coming and is now already in the world.
local: Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ ɛɛkaɖɩɣ ɛyáa samaɣ taa kpayɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu fɛyɩ ɛ-cɔlɔ. Ɛlɛ́, Krɩstʋ koyindu kalɩzaɣ wɛnɩ ɛ-cɔlɔ. Ɩtɛm nɩʋ se paa pɩɩla ɛzɩma ɛkɔŋ, lɛɛlɛɛyɔ ɛtɛm kɔm kedeŋa yɔɔ.

eng: And all who have this hope in him purify themselves even as he is pure.
local: Weyi ɛtaɣ-ɩ liu ḿbʋ́ yɔ, ɛñɔɔzʋʋ ɛ-tɩ nɛ ɛwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ ɛzɩ Yesu Krɩstʋ ɛnʋ ɛwɛʋ yɔ.

eng: You are from God, little children, and you have defeated these people because the one who is in you is greater than the one who is in the world.
local: Men-piya! Mɩ lɛ, ɩkɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩma nɛ ɩwa mbá pɛcɛtɩɣ se pɛkɛ náyaa yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ŋgʋ́ kɩwɛ mɩ-cɔlɔ yɔ, kɩkɩlɩ ɖoŋ ŋgʋ́ kʋkʋ wɛ kedeŋa ñɩma cɔlɔ yɔ.

eng: Every person who practices sin commits an act of rebellion, and sin is rebellion.
local: Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ lakɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, ɛɛɖɔŋ Ɛsɔ paɣtʋ yɔɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, kɩwɛɛkɩm labʋ kɛ paɣtʋ yʋsɩnaʋ.

eng: They are from the world. So they speak from the worlds point of view and the world listens to them.
local: Cɛtɩyaa ḿbá, pɛkɛ kedeŋa ñɩma. Pʋ-yɔɔ pɔyɔɔdʋʋ ɛzɩ kedeŋa ñɩma yɔ nɛ paba ñewelesiɣni-wɛ.

eng: You know that he appeared to take away sins, and there is no sin in him.
local: Ŋgʋ́, ɩnawa se Yesu Krɩstʋ kɔm kedeŋa yɔɔ se ɛlɩzɩ ɛyáa pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm taa, ɛtala kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ.

eng: We are from God. The person who knows God listens to us. Whoever is not from God doesnt listen to us. This is how we recognize the Spirit of truth and the spirit of error.
local: Piyele ma nɛ mɩ lɛ, ɖɩkɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩma. Weyi ɛsɩm Ɛsɔ yɔ, ɛnɩɣnɩ-ɖʋ. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ tɛkɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩnʋ yɔ, ɛɛnɩɣnɩ-ɖʋ. Ḿbʋ́ ɖɩtɩlɩɣnɩ se toovenim Fezuu wɛnɩ nɔɔyʋ cɔlɔ yaa cɛtɩm ñɩŋgʋ wɛna.

eng: Every person who remains in relationship to him does not sin. Any person who sins has not seen him or known him.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, weyi ɛ nɛ Yesu Krɩstʋ pɛkpɛndaa yɔ, eyeki kɩwɛɛkɩm labʋ. Ɛlɛ́, yee nɔɔyʋ ɛwɛɛ nɛ ɛlakɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se pʋdʋ tana-ɩ, ɛtasɩm-ɩ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Dear friends, lets love each other, because love is from God, and everyone who loves is born from God and knows God.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ cɔlɔ sɔɔlɩm lɩɣna. Weyi ɛsɔɔlɩ lɛlaa yɔ, ɛkɛ Ɛsɔ pɩɣa, ɛsɩm-ɩ.

eng: Little children, make sure no one deceives you. The person who practices righteousness is righteous, in the same way that Jesus is righteous.
local: Men-piya! Itaayele nɛ nɔɔyʋ cɛtɩ-mɩ kaʋ! Weyi ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ pʋtʋʋzaa yɔ, ɛkɛ kʋtʋʋzʋ ɛzɩ Yesu Krɩstʋ yɔ.

eng: The person who doesnt love does not know God, because God is love.
local: Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ tɔsɔɔlɩ-wɛ yɔ, ɛtasɩ Ɛsɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ lɛ sɔɔlɩm tʋ.

eng: The person who practices sin belongs to the devil, because the devil has been sinning since the beginning. Gods Son appeared for this purpose: to destroy the works of the devil.
local: Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ ñɛwɛɛ nɛ ɛlakɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, ɛkɛ eleeu ñɩnʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛnʋ wɛna nɛ ɛlakɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm ɖooo ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ labʋ kedeŋa yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ kɔm kedeŋa yɔɔ se ɛwɛɛkɩ mbʋ́ eleeu ɛnʋ ɛlaba yɔ.

eng: This is how the love of God is revealed to us: God has sent his only Son into the world so that we can live through him.
local: Ɛsɔ tiyi ɛ-Pɩyalʋ ɛgbamɩyɛ kedeŋa yɔɔ se ɛkɔɔ ɛha-ɖʋ wezuu. Ḿbʋ́ ɛwɩlɩɣnɩ-ɖʋ se ɛsɔɔlɩ-ɖʋ.

eng: Those born from God dont practice sin because Gods DNA remains in them. They cant sin because they are born from God.
local: Weyi ɛkɛ Ɛsɔ pɩɣa yɔ, ɛɛtasɩɣ kɩwɛɛkɩm labʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ ɖoŋ wɛ ɛ-taa. Ɛɛpɩzɩɣ ɛtasɩ labʋ kɩwɛɛkɩm: ɛ-Caa lɛ Ɛsɔ.

eng: This is love: it is not that we loved God but that he loved us and sent his Son as the sacrifice that deals with our sins.
local: Mbʋ́ pɩwɩlɩɣ sɔɔlɩm ḿbʋ́ kpem yɔ lɛ se: ɛnʋ calɩnɩ-ɖʋ sɔɔlʋʋ nɛ etiyi ɛ-Pɩyalʋ se ɛkɔɔ ɛsɩ ɖɔ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛpɩzɩ ekpeɣ-ɖʋ ɖa-kɩwɛɛkɩm.

eng: This is how Gods children and the devils children are apparent: everyone who doesnt practice righteousness is not from God, including the person who doesnt love a brother or sister.
local: Ɩna mbʋ́ pɩwɩlɩɣ kaŋŋ se ɛyʋ kɛ Ɛsɔ pɩɣa yaa eleeu ñɩŋga yɔ: yee nɔɔyʋ ɛlabɩ mbʋ́ pɩtatʋʋzɩ yɔ yaa ɛtɔsɔɔlɩ lɛlaa yɔ, ɛtɛkɛ Ɛsɔ pɩɣa.

eng: Dear friends, if God loved us this way, we also ought to love each other.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Yee ḿbʋ́ Ɛsɔ ɛsɔɔlɩ-ɖʋ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɖa ɖɔɖɔ ɖɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama.

eng: This is the message that you heard from the beginning: love each other.
local: Tɔm ndʋ́ ɩnɩ ɖooo kajalaɣ taa yɔ, ńdʋ́ lɛ se: pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama.

eng: No one has ever seen God. If we love each other, God remains in us and his love is made perfect in us.
local: Nɔɔyʋ tana Ɛsɔ wiɖiyi kaʋ. Ɛlɛ́, yee ɖɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩkpɛndaa nɛ ɛ-sɔɔlɩm wɛɛ ɖa-taa siŋŋ.

eng: Dont behave like Cain, who belonged to the evil one and murdered his brother. And why did he kill him? He killed him because his own works were evil, but the works of his brother were righteous.
local: Pɩtamʋnɩ se ɖɩwɛɛ ɛzɩ Satanɩ ñɩnʋ Kayɛnɩ weyi ɛkʋ e-neu yɔ. Ɛkʋ-ɩ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, e-neu lakasɩ tʋʋzaa nɛ ɛnʋ ñɩnzɩ fɛyɩ ɖeu.

eng: This is how we know we remain in him and he remains in us, because he has given us a measure of his Spirit.
local: Ɛsɔ ha-ɖʋ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu. Ḿbʋ́ wɩlɩɣnɩ-ɖʋ se ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩwɛ ɖama taa.

eng: Dont be surprised, brothers and sisters, if the world hates you.
local: Man-taabalaa! Yee kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ ɛyáa ɛpaɖɩɣ-mɩ yɔ, pɩtaaɖɩɣzɩ-mɩ.

eng: We have seen and testify that the Father has sent the Son to be the savior of the world.
local: Đa lɛ, ɖɩnawa nɛ ɖɩlɩzɩɣ aseɣɖe se Caa Ɛsɔ tiyi ɛ-Pɩyalʋ kedeŋa yɔɔ se ɛya ɛyáa ñʋŋ.

eng: We know that we have transferred from death to life, because we love the brothers and sisters. The person who does not love remains in death.
local: Đa lɛ, ɖɩna ɖeu se ɖɩlɩ sɩm taa nɛ ɖihiɣ wezuu, mbʋ́ pɩwɩlɩɣ-pʋ yɔ lɛ se ɖɩsɔɔlɩ ɖa-taabalaa. Weyi ɛtɔsɔɔlɩ ɛ-taabalʋ yɔ, ɛkpɛndɩ ɛwɛ sɩm taa.

eng: If any of us confess that Jesus is Gods Son, God remains in us and we remain in God.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛkaɖɩ kpayɩ se Yesu lɛ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se ɛ nɛ Ɛsɔ pɛwɛ ɖama taa.

eng: Everyone who hates a brother or sister is a murderer, and you know that murderers dont have eternal life residing in them.
local: Weyi ɛpaɖɩɣ ɛ-taabalʋ yɔ, ɛkɛ ɛyáa kʋyʋ. Ɩtɛm naʋ se ɛyáa kʋyʋ fɛyɩnɩ wezuu maatɛŋ.

eng: We have known and have believed the love that God has for us. God is love, and those who remain in love remain in God and God remains in them.
local: Đa lɛ, ɖɩna ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ sɔɔlɩ-ɖʋ yɔ nɛ ɖitisi-pʋ. Ɛsɔ lɛ sɔɔlɩm tʋ, weyi ɛwɛɛ ɛsɔɔlʋʋ Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛyáa lɛlaa yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se ɛ nɛ Ɛsɔ pɛwɛ ɖama taa.

eng: This is how we know love: Jesus laid down his life for us, and we ought to lay down our lives for our brothers and sisters.
local: Mbʋ́ pɩwɩlɩɣ-ɖʋ sɔɔlɩm yɔ lɛ se: Yesu Krɩstʋ tisaa nɛ ɛsɩ ɖɔ-yɔɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se ɖa ɖɔɖɔ ɖɩsɩ ɖa-taabalaa yɔɔ.

eng: This is how love has been perfected in us, so that we can have confidence on the Judgment Day, because we are exactly the same as God is in this world.
local: Mbʋ́ pɩwɩlɩɣ se sɔɔlɩm tɛzɩ ɖa-taa wɛʋ yɔ lɛ se ɖɩsɩŋɩɣ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa kaalɛyɩtʋ kɩyakʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛkɔŋ ɛyáa tɔm hʋnaʋ yɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖe-wezuu caɣʋ kedeŋa yɔɔ cɩnɛ nɩɣzɩnɩ Yesu ñɩmbʋ.

eng: But if someone has material possessions and sees a brother or sister in need but refuses to help—how can the love of God dwell in a person like that?.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛwɛnɩ ñɩm nɛ ɛna se ɛ-taabalʋ fɛyɩnɩ pʋyʋ nɛ piteheyi-i natʋyʋ lɛ, ɛzɩma ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛtɔ se ɛsɔɔlɩ Ɛsɔ yɔ?.

eng: There is no fear in love, but perfect love drives out fear, because fear expects punishment. The person who is afraid has not been made perfect in love.
local: Weyi ɛwɛnɩ sɔɔlɩm yɔ, sɔɔndʋ ɛɛkpaɣ-ɩ, sɔɔlɩm siŋŋ ɖɔɔnʋʋ sɔɔndʋ. Yee ḿbʋ́, sɔɔndʋ ɛkpaɣ nɔɔyʋ yɔ, pʋdʋ fɛyɩnɩ sɔɔlɩm siŋŋ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, sɔɔndʋ wɛ ɛzɩ pɔhɔŋʋʋ ɛyʋ nɩŋgbaŋʋʋ yɔ.

eng: Little children, lets not love with words or speech but with action and truth.
local: Men-piya! Pɩfɛyɩ se ɖɩsɔɔlɩ ɖa-taabalaa nɛ nɔsɩ yem, ɛlɛ́, pʋwɛɛ se ɖɩsɔɔlɩ-wɛ nɛ ɖa-lakasɩ toovenim taa.

eng: We love because God first loved us.
local: Đa lɛ, ɖɩsɔɔlɩ Ɛsɔ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛnʋ calɩnɩ-ɖʋ sɔɔlʋʋ.

eng: This is how we will know that we belong to the truth and reassure our hearts in Gods presence.
local: Yee ɖɩlakɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ-ɖʋ se ɖɩkɛ toovenim tɩnaa. Ḿbʋ́ kɔŋnɩ yebu ɖɔɖɔ nɛ ɖa-laŋa hɛɛ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa.

eng: Those who say, I love God and hate their brothers or sisters are liars. After all, those who dont love their brothers or sisters whom they have seen can hardly love God whom they have not seen!.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛtɔm se ɛsɔɔlɩ Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛpaɖɩɣ lɛlaa yɔ, ɛkɛ pɔpɔtʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɛzɩma ɛpɩzɩɣ ɛsɔɔlɩ Ɛsɔ weyi ɛɛnaɣ ɛ́lɛ́ yɔ nɛ pɩkazɩ ɛpaɖɩ ɛ-taabalʋ weyi ɛ nɛ ɩ panaɣ ɖama yɔ?.

eng: Even if our hearts condemn us, God is greater than our hearts and knows all things.
local: Toovenim lɛ, paa ɖa-laŋa ɛkʋyʋʋ ɖɔ-yɔɔ se ɖɩlabɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm yɔ, ɖɩnawa se Ɛsɔ kɩlɩ ɖa-laŋa, ɛsɩm pɩtɩŋa payɩ.

eng: This commandment we have from him: Those who claim to love God ought to love their brother and sister also.
local: Paɣtʋ ndʋ́ Yesu Krɩstʋ ɖʋ-ɖʋ yɔ, ńdʋ́ lɛ se: yee nɔɔyʋ ɛsɔɔlɩ Ɛsɔ yɔ, pʋwɛɛ se ɛsɔɔlɩ ɖɔɖɔ lɛlaa.

eng: Dear friends, if our hearts dont condemn us, we have confidence in relationship to God.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Yee ɖa-laŋa ɛɛkʋyʋʋ ɖɔ-yɔɔ yɔ, pʋbʋ ɖɩpɩzɩɣ ɖɩsɩŋ ɛ-ɛsɩndaa kaalɛyɩtʋ.

eng: We receive whatever we ask from him because we keep his commandments and do what pleases him.
local: Ɛhaɣ-ɖʋ ɖɔɖɔ mbʋ́ ɖɩpɔzʋʋ-ɩ yɔ pɩtɩŋa payɩ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, ɖɩɖɔŋ ɛ-paɣtʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɖɩlakɩ mbʋ́ pɩkɛdɩnɩ-ɩ yɔ.

eng: This is his commandment, that we believe in the name of his Son, Jesus Christ, and love each other as he commanded us.
local: Ɛ-paɣtʋ ńdʋ́ lɛ se: ɖɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɖɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama ɛzɩ ɛ́lɛ́ ɖʋʋ-ɖʋ se ɖɩla yɔ.

eng: Those who keep his commandments dwell in God and God dwells in them. This is how we know that he dwells in us, because of the Spirit he has given us.
local: Weyi ɛɖɔŋ Ɛsɔ paɣtʋ yɔɔ yɔ, ɛ nɛ ɩ pɛwɛ ɖama taa. E-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ŋgʋ́ ɛha-ɖʋ yɔ, ŋ́gʋ́ wɩlɩɣnɩ-ɖʋ se ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩwɛ ɖama taa.

eng: From the elder. To the chosen gentlewoman and her children, whom I truly love .
local: Đo-ɖoo weyi ña Ɛsɔ lɩzɩ-ŋ yɔ, ma Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa sɔsɔ, mamaɣnɩ ña nɛ ñe-piya takayaɣ kanɛ. Mɔnsɔɔlɩ-mɩ toovenim taa. Ɛlɛ́, pɩtɛkɛ men-ɖeke mɔnsɔɔlɩnɩ-mɩ, mbá patɩŋa payɩ pasɩm toovenim tɔm yɔ, pɔsɔɔlɩ-mɩ ɖɔɖɔ.

eng: Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ has been born from God. Whoever loves someone who is a parent loves the child born to the parent.
local: Weyi etisiɣ se Yesu lɛ Weyi Ɛsɔ Lɩzaa Yɔ yɔ, ɛkɛ Ɛsɔ pɩɣa. Đɔɖɔ lɛ, weyi ɛsɔɔlʋʋ Caa Ɛsɔ weyi ɛha-ɩ wezuu yɔ, ɛsɔɔlʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ e-piya.

eng: because of the truth that remains with us and will be with us forever.
local: Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, tɩwɛ ɖa-taa, halɩ tɩwɛɣ ḿbʋ́ tam. Mɛnsɛ-mɩ:.

eng: This is how we know that we love the children of God: when we love God and keep Gods commandments.
local: Yee ɖɩsɔɔlɩ Ɛsɔ nɛ ɖɩɖɔŋ ɛ-paɣtʋ yɔɔ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se ɖɩsɔɔlɩ e-piya.

eng: Grace, mercy, and peace from God the Father and from Jesus Christ, the Son of the Father, will be ours who live in truth and love.
local: Caa Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ, pɔkɔŋ-ɖʋ labʋ lootiye nɛ pana ɖa-pʋtɔdɩyɛ nɛ pɛhɛzɩ ɖa-laŋa toovenim nɛ sɔɔlɩm pa-taa.

eng: This is the love of God: we keep Gods commandments. Gods commandments are not difficult.
local: Yee ɖɩɖɔŋ Ɛsɔ paɣtʋ yɔɔ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ toovenim se ɖɩsɔɔlɩ-ɩ. Ɛ-paɣtʋ takɩlɩ-ɖʋ kaɖɛ.

eng: I was overjoyed to find some of your children living in the truth, just as we had been commanded by the Father.
local: Đo-ɖoo! Man-taa hʋlʋmaa pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, manɩwa se ñe-piya nasɩyɩ ɖɔŋ toovenim nʋmɔʋ taa nɛ sɩlakɩ ɛzɩ Caa ɖʋʋ se ɖɩla yɔ.

eng: Now, dear friends, I am requesting that we love each other. Its not as though Im writing a new command to you, but its one we have had from the beginning.
local: Lɛɛlɛɛyɔ lɛ, mentendiɣ-ŋ se ɖɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama. Pɩtɛkɛ paɣtʋ kɩfatʋ natʋyʋ manɖʋʋ-ŋ ḿbʋ́, ɛlɛ́, ndʋ́ ɖɩɩnɩ ɖooo kiɖe tɛɛ yɔ manɖʋʋ-ŋ.

eng: because everyone who is born from God defeats the world. And this is the victory that has defeated the world: our faith.
local: mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, paa Ɛsɔ pɩɣa ŋgá kawakɩ kedeŋa yɔɔ ɖoŋ tɩŋa payɩ. Đe-lidaʋ ɖɩwakɩnɩ kedeŋa kpeekpe yɔɔ ɖoŋ ɩnʋ.

eng: This is love: that we live according to his commands. This is the command that you heard from the beginning: live in love.
local: Sɔɔlɩm lɛ se ɖɩɖɔ Caa paɣtʋ yɔɔ. Paɣtʋ ńdʋ́ tɩ-yɔɔ pʋwɛɛ se ɩɖɔ ɛzɩ ɩkpɛlɩkʋʋ ɖooo kiɖe tɛɛ yɔ.

eng: Who defeats the world? Isnt it the one who believes that Jesus is Gods Son?.
local: Weyi ɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ se Yesu lɛ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ yɔ, e-ɖeke koŋ ɛpɩzɩɣnɩ ɛwabɩ-ɩ.

eng: Many deceivers have gone into the world who do not confess that Jesus Christ came as a human being. This kind of person is the deceiver and the antichrist.
local: Meheyiɣ-mɩ ḿbʋ́, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, cɛtɩyaa sakɩyɛ lɩ kedeŋa yɔɔ nɛ paakaɖɩɣ kpayɩ se toovenim Yesu Krɩstʋ pɩsɩ ɛyʋ nɛ ɛkɔɔ kɔ-yɔɔ. Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛlakɩ ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pʋdʋ kɛ cɛtɩyʋ nɛ ɛtɛ ɛkɛ Krɩstʋ koyindu.

eng: This is the one who came by water and blood: Jesus Christ. Not by water only but by water and blood. And the Spirit is the one who testifies, because the Spirit is the truth.
local: Yesu Krɩstʋ maɣmaɣ kɔmnɩ kedeŋa yɔɔ nɛ palabɩ-ɩ lɩm sɔʋ sɔnzɩ nɛ pɛkpɛdɩ ɛ-calɩm . Pɩtɛkɛ lɩm sɔʋ sɔnzɩ ńzɩ́ si-ɖeke sɩwɩlɩɣnɩ weyi ɛkɛnaa yɔ, ɛlɛ́, sɩ nɛ calɩm kpɛdʋʋ pawɩlɩɣnɩ weyi ɛkɛnaa yɔ. Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu maɣmaɣ lɩzɩɣ aseɣɖe se pɩkɛ toovenim: ŋ́gʋ́ lɛ toovenim tʋ.

eng: Watch yourselves so that you dont lose what weve worked for but instead receive a full reward.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, ɩɖaŋ mɩ-tɩ yɔɔ nɛ ɩkɔɔ ɩmʋ mɩ-kɩhɛyʋ tɩŋa payɩ. Pɩtɛkɛ ḿbʋ́, ilesiɣ tʋmɩyɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩtɩŋa payɩ ɖɩlaba yɔ ɖɩ-kɛzɛɣa.

eng: The three are testifying—.
local: Aseɣɖe lɩzɩyaa naadozo wɛna:.

eng: Anyone who goes too far and does not continue in the teaching about Christ does not have God. Whoever continues in this teaching has both the Father and the Son.
local: Ɩtɩlɩ camɩyɛ se weyi ɛɖɛlɛsɩɣ niye nɛ ɛɛwɩlɩɣ Krɩstʋ tɔm tɩ-nasɩ taa yɔ, Ɛsɔ fɛyɩ ɛ-cɔlɔ. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ wɩlɩɣ-tʋ tɩ-nasɩ taa yɔ, Ɛsɔ nɛ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ pɛwɛ ɛ-cɔlɔ.

eng: the Spirit, the water, and the blood—and the three are united in agreement.
local: Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu nɛ lɩm sɔʋ sɔnzɩ nɛ calɩm kpɛdʋʋ. Pa-naadozo panɩnɩ ɖama nɛ palɩzɩɣ aseɣɖe kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ Yesu Krɩstʋ yɔɔ.

eng: Whoever comes to you who does not affirm this teaching should neither be received nor welcomed into your home.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, meheyiɣ-mɩ se yee nɔɔyʋ ɛkɔm mɩ-cɔlɔ nɛ ɛɛwɩlɩɣ-mɩ se Krɩstʋ pɩsɩ ɛyʋ nɛ ɛkɔɔ kedeŋa yɔɔ yɔ, ɩtaatisi nɛ ɛsʋʋ mɩ-tɛ, ɩtaacazɩ-ɩ sɛʋ.

eng: If we receive human testimony, Gods testimony is greater, because this is what God testified: he has testified about his Son.
local: Yee ɛyáa ɛlɩzɩɣ aseɣɖe nɛ ɖitisiɣ lɛ, pɩlabɩ ɛzɩma ɖiitisiɣ aseɣɖe nɖɩ́ Ɛsɔ ñalɩzɩ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ yɔɔ yɔ? Ŋgʋ́ ńɖɩ́ kɩlɩna kpem.

eng: because welcoming people like that is the same thing as sharing in their evil actions.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛsɛ-ɩ yɔ, pɩwɩlɩɣ se ɛ nɛ pʋdʋ palakɩnɩ ɛ-ɛzaɣ́tʋ tʋmɩyɛ.

eng: The one who believes in Gods Son has the testimony within; the one who doesnt believe God has made God a liar, because that one has not believed the testimony that God gave about his Son.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, weyi ɛwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ yɔɔ yɔ, ɛnaɣ ɛ-taa se aseɣɖe nɖɩ́ Ɛsɔ lɩzaa yɔ, ɖɩkɛ toovenim. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ ñɛfɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ yɔ, pʋdʋ kpakɩɣ-ɩ se ɛkɛ cɛtɩyʋ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pʋdʋ tetisi aseɣɖe nɖɩ́ ɛlɩzɩ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: I have a lot to tell you. I dont want to use paper and ink, but I hope to visit you and talk with you face-to-face, so that our joy can be complete.
local: Mɛwɛnɩ tɔm sakɩyɛ se meheyiɣ-mɩ, ɛlɛ́, maacaɣ se mama-tʋ takayaɣ taa. Mantaɣ liu se mɔnkɔŋ mɩ-cɔlɔ nɛ ma nɛ mɩ ɖɩyɔɔdɩ nɛ ɖa-laŋa tɛzɩ hʋlʋmʋʋ ɖeu.

eng: And this is the testimony: God gave eternal life to us, and this life is in his Son.
local: Aseɣɖe ńɖɩ́ lɛ se: ɛtɩŋnɩ ɛ-Pɩyalʋ yɔɔ nɛ ɛha-ɖʋ wezuu maatɛŋ.

eng: Your chosen sisters children greet you.
local: Ñɔ-kɔɔ weyi Ɛsɔ lɩzaa ɖɔɖɔ yɔ, e-piya sɛɣ-ŋ.

eng: The one who has the Son has life. The one who doesnt have Gods Son does not have life.
local: Weyi ɛsɩm Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ yɔ, ehiɣ wezuu ŋ́gʋ́. Ɛlɛ́, weyi ɛ́lɛ́ tasɩm-ɩ yɔ, etehiɣ-kʋ.

eng: I write these things to you who believe in the name of Gods Son so that you can know that you have eternal life.
local: Mbá mɩ ɩwɛnɩ lidaʋ Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ yɔɔ yɔ, mama-mɩ takayaɣ kanɛ se ɩtɩlɩ se ɩtɛm hiɣu wezuu maatɛŋ.

eng: This is the confidence that we have in our relationship with God: If we ask for anything in agreement with his will, he listens to us.
local: Yee ɖɩpɔzʋʋ Ɛsɔ mbʋ́ e-liu wɛɛ yɔ yɔ, ɛnɩɣnɩ-ɖʋ. Pʋ-yɔɔ ɖɩsɩŋɩɣ ɛ-ɛsɩndaa kaalɛyɩtʋ.

eng: If we know that he listens to whatever we ask, we know that we have received what we asked from him.
local: Yee ɖɩnawa se ɖɩpɔzɩ-ɩ paa ɛbɛ ɛnɩɣnɩ-ɖʋ yɔ, ɖɩnaɣ ɖɔɖɔ se ɛhaɣ-ɖʋ mbʋ́ ɖɩpɔzʋʋ-ɩ yɔ.

eng: If anyone sees a brother or sister committing a sin that does not result in death, they should pray, and God will give life to them—that is, to those who commit sins that dont result in death. There is a sin that results in death—Im not saying that you should pray about that.
local: Yee nɔɔyʋ ɛna ɛ-taabalʋ lakɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm mbʋ́ piiyeki se ɛ́lɛ́ ɛsɩ yɔ yɔ, pʋmʋnaa se ɛsɛɛ Ɛsɔ ɛ-yɔɔ nɛ ɛ́lɛ́ ha-ɩ wezuu. Mbá palakɩ kɩwɛɛkɩm mbʋ́ piiyeki se pasɩ yɔ, pe-ɖeke pɔ-yɔɔ mɔntɔŋ se pɛsɛɛ Ɛsɔ. Ɛlɛ́, kɩwɛɛkɩm nabʋyʋ wɛɛ, piyeki se ɛyáa ɛsɩ. Pɩtɛkɛ weyi ɛlakɩ-pʋ yɔ ɛ-yɔɔ mɔntɔŋ se ɩsɛɛ Ɛsɔ.

eng: From the elder. To my dear friend Gaius, whom I truly love.
local: Weyi ma mɛnkɛ Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa sɔsɔ yɔ, mamaɣnɩ mɛ-ɛgbaɣdʋ Gayuusi weyi ña mɔnsɔɔlɩ toovenim taa yɔ takayaɣ kanɛ, mɛnsɛ-ŋ.

eng: Every unrighteous action is sin, but there is a sin that does not result in death.
local: Mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɖɩlakɩ nɛ pɩfɛyɩ ɖeu yɔ, pɩkɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm. Paa ḿbʋ́ yɔ, pɩtɛkɛ kɩwɛɛkɩm tɩŋa yekini se ɛyáa ɛsɩ.

eng: Dear friend, Im praying that all is well with you and that you enjoy good health in the same way that you prosper spiritually.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdʋ! Mɛwɛɛ mentendiɣ Ɛsɔ ñɔ-yɔɔ se eyele nɛ ŋwɛɛ alaafɩya nɛ piɖeni-ŋ pɩtɩŋa pɩ-taa ɛzɩ piɖeuni-ŋ Ɛsɔ nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ.

eng: We know that everyone born from God does not sin, but the ones born from God guard themselves, and the evil one cannot touch them.
local: Đɩnawa se paa Ɛsɔ pɩɣa ŋgá, kaawɛɣ kɩwɛɛkɩm labʋ yɔɔ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ huuzuu kɔ-yɔɔ nɛ kaasʋʋ Satanɩ nesi taa.

eng: I was overjoyed when the brothers and sisters arrived and spoke highly of your faithfulness to the truth, shown by how you live according to the truth.
local: Man-taa hʋlʋmaa pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, taabalaa nabɛyɛ kɔm palɩzɩ ña-aseɣɖe se ŋɖɔŋ toovenim nʋmɔʋ taa siŋŋ ɛzɩ ŋtɩɩɖɔŋʋʋ yɔ.

eng: We know we are from God, and the whole world lies in the power of the evil one.
local: Đɩnawa se ɖɩkɛ Ɛsɔ ñɩma nɛ piyele kedeŋa ñɩma tɩŋa payɩ ñɛwɛɛ Satanɩ nesi taa.

eng: I have no greater joy than this: to hear that my children are living according to the truth.
local: Yee manɩwa se men-piya ɖɔŋ toovenim nʋmɔʋ taa yɔ, man-taa hʋlʋmʋʋ pɩtɩɩfɛyɩ. Nabʋyʋ fɛyɩ se pɩkɛdɩɣnɩ-m nɛ pɩkɩlɩ ḿbʋ́.

eng: We know that Gods Son has come and has given us understanding to know the one who is true. We are in the one who is true by being in his Son, Jesus Christ. This is the true God and eternal life.
local: Đɩnawa ɖɔɖɔ se Ɛsɔ Pɩyalʋ kɔm kedeŋa yɔɔ nɛ ɛha-ɖʋ lɛɣtʋ se ɖɩpɩzɩ ɖɩtɩlɩ Ɛsɔ. Ɛsɔ ɛnʋ lɛ Ɛsɔ maɣmaɣ kpem. Ɛ-Pɩyalʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ yɔɔ pɩtɩŋnaa nɛ ɖa nɛ ɩ ɖɩwɛɛ ɖama taa. Ɛnʋ lɛ Ɛsɔ maɣmaɣ kpem, ɛnʋ lɛ wezuu maatɛŋ.

eng: Dear friend, you act faithfully in whatever you do for our brothers and sisters, even though they are strangers.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdʋ! Ŋlakɩ taabalaa mbʋ́ ŋɖʋwa se ŋlakɩ-wɛ yɔ, halɩ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ agɔmaa.

eng: Little children, guard yourselves from idols!.
local: Men-piya! Ɩkpa mɩ-tɩ nɛ agɔlɩma!.

eng: They spoke highly of your love in front of the church. You all would do well to provide for their journey in a way that honors God.
local: Palɩzɩ aseɣɖe ɛzɩma mbʋ́ ŋsɔɔlɩ-wɛ yɔ pʋ-yɔɔ Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ taa ñɩma ɛsɩndaa. Yee ŋsɩnɩ-wɛ ɛzɩ pʋmʋnaʋ Ɛsɔ ɛsɩndaa yɔ nɛ papɩzɩ pɔɖɔ pa-nʋmɔʋ yɔ, pʋwɛɣ ɖeu.

eng: Jude, a slave of Jesus Christ and brother of James. To those who are called, loved by God the Father and kept safe by Jesus Christ.
local: Ma lɛ Yuudi weyi ɛkɛ Yesu Krɩstʋ tʋmlaɖʋ nɛ Yakubu neu yɔ. Mamaɣnɩ takayaɣ kanɛ mbá mɩ Caa Ɛsɔ ya-mɩ yɔ. Mɩ ɛsɔɔlaa nɛ ɛsɩɩ-mɩ nɛ hɔɔlʋʋ se ɩkɛ Yesu Krɩstʋ ñɩma.

eng: because they left on their journey for the sake of Jesus Christ without accepting any support from the Gentiles.
local: Pɔɖɔŋ nʋmɔʋ se pala Yesu Krɩstʋ tʋmɩyɛ. Pʋ-yɔɔ petetisi nɛ pamʋ mbá paañaŋ Ɛsɔ yɔ pe-nesi taa pʋyʋ.

eng: Therefore, we ought to help people like this so that we can be coworkers with the truth.
local: Pʋ-yɔɔ lɛ, pʋwɛɛ se ɖa Krɩstʋ ñɩma ɖɩsɩnɩ pɩtɛ ɛyáa ḿbá nɛ pɩla se ɖa nɛ wɛ ɖisusuuni toovenim tɔm.

eng: May you have more and more mercy, peace, and love.
local: Mɛnsɛ-mɩ: Ɛsɔ ɛna mɩ-pʋtɔdɩyɛ siŋŋ nɛ ɛhɛzɩ mɩ-laŋa niɣ niɣ nɛ ɛsɔɔlɩ-mɩ siŋŋ.

eng: I wrote something to the church, but Diotrephes, who likes to put himself first, doesnt welcome us.
local: Mama tɔm pee naayɛ Krɩstʋ ŋgbɛyɛ nɖɩ́ ɖɩ-taa ŋwɛɛ yɔ ɖɩ-taa ñɩma. Ɛlɛ́, Diyootrɛɛfʋ weyi e-liu wɛɛ se ɛkɛ pa-ñʋʋdʋ yɔ, ɛtakpaɣ-yɛ nɛ ɛ́yáa pʋyʋ.

eng: Dear friends, I wanted very much to write to you concerning the salvation we share. Instead, I must write to urge you to fight for the faith delivered once and for all to Gods holy people.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Me-liu kɛwɛɛ kpem se mama-mɩ takayaɣ ɛzɩma mbʋ́ Ɛsɔ yabɩ ɖatɩŋa payɩ ɖa-ñʋʋ yɔ pʋ-tɔm taa. Peeɖe manawa se pɩkɛnɩ-m kɩcɛyʋʋ se mama-mɩ kanɛ nɛ pɩlabɩ-mɩ hʋnʋm nɛ ɩlʋ lidaʋ yɔɔ. Lidaʋ ŋ́gʋ́, kʋ-tɔm pɛkɛdɩ Ɛsɔ ñɩma mɩ kpaagbaa kɛdʋʋ.

eng: Because of this, if I come, I will bring up what he has done—making unjustified and wicked accusations against us. And as if that were not enough, he not only refuses to welcome the brothers and sisters but stops those who want to do so and even throws them out of the church!.
local: Ḿbʋ́ yebina nɛ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ mɔnkɔŋ yɔ, meheyiɣ-mɩ mbʋ́ pɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛlakɩ nɛ pɩfɛyɩ ɖeu yɔ, nɛ tɔm ndʋ́ tɩtɩŋa payɩ ɛcɛtɩɣnɩ ɖa-taa yɔ. Pɩtɛkɛ pi-ɖeke ɛlaba. Ɛɛmʋʋ taabalaa, halɩ ɛɖaŋɩɣ lɛlaa mbá paba liu wɛɛ se pamʋ-wɛ yɔ. Mbá pamʋʋ-wɛ yɔ, ɛɖɔɔnʋʋ-wɛ ŋgbɛyɛ taa.

eng: Godless people have slipped in among you. They turn the grace of our God into unrestrained immorality and deny our only master and Lord, Jesus Christ. Judgment was passed against them a long time ago.
local: Mɔyɔɔdʋʋ ḿbʋ́, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, mbá paañaŋ Ɛsɔ yɔ pa-taa nabɛyɛ sʋ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa mɛsaɣ tɛɛ. Papɩsɩɣ ɖɛ-Ɛsɔ lootiye tɔm kiŋgila nɛ yaayala se peɖezini pa-acɛyɛ lakasɩ pe-wezuu caɣʋ taa. Pɔlɔʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ weyi e-ɖeke koŋ ɛkɛ ɖa-Wɩlɩyʋ nɛ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ nɛ ɛcɔŋnɩ pɩtɩŋa pʋ-yɔɔ yɔ. Đooo lɔŋ pama ɛzɩma mbʋ́ pakʋʋ pɔ-tɔm yɔ.

eng: Dear friend, dont imitate what is bad but what is good. Whoever practices what is good belongs to God. Whoever practices what is bad has not seen God.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdʋ! Taatɩŋ lɛlaa ɛzaɣ́tʋ nʋmɔʋ taa, ɛlɛ́, tɩŋ-wɛ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ pʋ-nʋmɔʋ taa. Weyi ɛlakɩ mbʋ́ pʋwɛ ɖeu yɔ, ɛkɛ Ɛsɔ pɩɣa. Weyi ɛ́lɛ́ ñalakɩ ɛzaɣ́tʋ yɔ, ɛtasɩ Ɛsɔ.

eng: I want to remind you of something you already know very well. The Lord, who once saved a people out of Egypt, later destroyed those who didnt maintain their faith.
local: Paa ɩtɛm sɩm tɔm ndʋ́ meheyiɣ-mɩ yɔ camɩyɛ yɔ, me-liu wɛɛ se mɔntɔzɩ-mɩ-tʋ. Ńdʋ́ lɛ se ɖooo lɔŋ Kɩpaɣlʋ yabɩ Izrɛɛlɩ ñɩma ñʋʋ Ejiptɩ ɛjaɖɛ taa. Ɛlɛ́, pʋwayɩ ɛkʋ pa-taa mbá pɛfɛyɩnɩ lidaʋ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ.

eng: Everyone speaks highly of Demetrius, even the truth itself. We also speak highly of him, and you know that what we say is true.
local: Piyele Demetriyuusi lɛ, ɛyáa tɩŋa lɩzɩɣ ɛ-yɔɔ aseɣɖe kɩbanɖɛ, halɩ toovenim tɔm maɣmaɣ lɩzɩɣ-ɖɩ ɖɔɖɔ. Đa ɖɔɖɔ, ɖɩlɩzɩɣ ɛ-aseɣɖe nɛ ŋna ɖɔɖɔ se ɖa-aseɣɖe ńɖɩ́, ɖɩkɛ toovenim.

eng: I remind you too of the angels who didnt keep their position of authority but deserted their own home. The Lord has kept them in eternal chains in the underworld until the judgment of the great day.
local: Ɩtɔzɩ ɖɔɖɔ se Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa mbá pa-taa fɛyɩ leleŋ nɛ lone nɖɩ́ ɖɩ-taa Ɛsɔ sɩ-wɛ yɔ, pɛlɛɣzɩ ɖɩjaɣyɛ pa-maɣmaɣ nɛ ɛkpa-wɛ ɛhɔkɩ-wɛ yoŋgbasɩ nɛ ɛɖʋ-wɛ ɖooo cɩkpɛndʋʋ taa. Ɛɖʋ-wɛ se pɛwɛɛ sɩ-taa peeɖe ḿbʋ́ nɛ pʋkɔɔ pɩsɩɩnɩ kɩyakʋ sɔsɔʋ ŋgʋ́ ɛkɔŋ ɛhʋʋnɩ-wɛ yɔ.

eng: I have a lot to say to you, but I dont want to use pen and ink.
local: Mɛwɛnɩ tɔm sakɩyɛ se meheyiɣ-ŋ, ɛlɛ́, maacaɣ se mama-tʋ takayaɣ taa.

eng: In the same way, Sodom and Gomorrah and neighboring towns practiced immoral sexual relations and pursued other sexual urges. By undergoing the punishment of eternal fire, they serve as a warning.
local: Ɩtɔzɩ ɖɔɖɔ se Sodom tɛtʋ nɛ Gomɔɔrɩ ñɩndʋ nɛ ndʋ́ ndʋ́ tɩñɔtɩnɩ-tʋ yɔ, tɩ-taa ñɩma kalaba ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ Ɛsɔ tiyiyaa ḿbá yɔ. Palakaɣ acɛyɛ, halɩ pañɩnɩɣ se pala mbʋ́ pɩfɛyɩ ɛyáa ñɩndʋ taa kpem yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ hɔm pa-nɩŋgbaaŋ nɛ ɛɖʋ-wɛ miŋ weyi eeɖeŋ kaʋ yɔ ɛ-taa. Ɛlabɩ ḿbʋ́ se ɛyáa tɩŋa ɛna nɛ pakpa pa-tɩ.

eng: I hope to see you soon, and we will speak face-to-face.
local: Mantaɣ liu se ɖɩkatɩɣ ɖama kɩyakɩŋ ɩnɛ ɩ-taa nɛ ɖɩyɔɔdɩ.

eng: Yet, even knowing this, these dreamers in the same way pollute themselves, reject authority, and slander the angels.
local: Ɛyáa mbá pɛwɛ mɩ-hɛkʋ taa yɔ, ḿbʋ́ ɖɔɖɔ palakɩ. Poɖozuu ɖozee wena ayeki se pala acɛyɛ nɛ apisiɣ-wɛ yɔ. Patakpaɣ Ɛsɔ ɖoŋ payaa pʋyʋ. Patʋʋ ɖoŋ ndɩ ndɩ weyi ɩwɛ ɛsɔdaa yɔ.

eng: Peace be with you. Your friends here greet you. Greet our friends there by name.
local: Wɛɛ laŋhɛzɩyɛ taa! Ñɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa se mɛnsɛ-ŋ. Sɛɛ ɖɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa, sɛɛ pa-taa paa anɩ se ɖɩsɛ-ɩ.

eng: The archangel Michael, when he argued with the devil about Moses body, did not dare charge him with slander. Instead, he said, The Lord rebuke you.
local: Ŋgʋ́, Ɛsɔ tiyiyu sɔsɔ Miicɛɛlɩ maɣmaɣ taatʋʋ Satanɩ alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ Mooyiizi sɩba nɛ ɛ nɛ ɩ poyou yɔ. Pɔhɔŋaɣnɩ ɖama tɔm se pana weyi ɛkpakɩɣ-ɩ yɔ. Pɩtatɩɩlabɩ-ɩ se ɛhʋʋnɩ-ɩ nɛ ɛtʋʋ-ɩ. Ɛlɛ́, eheyi-i yem se: «Kɩpaɣlʋ ɛɖʋ-ŋ kʋñɔŋ!».

eng: But these people slander whatever they dont understand. They are destroyed by what they know instinctively, as though they were irrational animals.
local: Ɛlɛ́, ɛyáa ḿbá, mbʋ́ paasɩŋ yɔ, ḿbʋ́ patʋʋ. Mbʋ́ tɛtɛ kpɩna sɩma yɔ, pi-ɖeke pasɩma. Ḿbʋ́ yekina se pala asɛyʋʋ.

eng: They are damned, for they follow in the footsteps of Cain. For profit they give themselves over to Balaams error. They are destroyed in the uprising of Korah.
local: Pɩya-wɛ! Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, patɩŋ nʋmɔʋ ŋgʋ́ Kayɛnɩ tɩŋaa yɔ. Liidiye yɔɔ lɛ, pakpaɣ pa-tɩ pasʋzɩ nʋmɔʋ kilebuu taa ɛzɩ Balaam yɔ. Pɛtɛŋɛlaa kpem, mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pakʋyɩ Ɛsɔ yɔɔ ɛzɩ Kooree kalabʋ yɔ.

eng: These people are like jagged rocks just below the surface of the water waiting to snag you when they join your love feasts. They feast with you without reverence. They care only for themselves. They are waterless clouds carried along by the winds; fruitless autumn trees, twice dead, uprooted;.
local: Ɛyáa ḿbá, alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ ikpeɣliɣ ɖama nɛ ɩkpɛndɩɣ ɩtɔkɩ tɔɔnaɣ se pɩwɩlɩ se ɩsɔɔlɩ ɖama yɔ, pa-lakasɩ kpaɣ-mɩ fɛyɛ. Mbʋ́ pʋyɔɔ yɔ, pɛɖɛlɛsɩɣ niye alɩwaatʋ ndʋ́ pɔtɔkɩ kazandʋ yɔ, fɛyɛ ɛɛkpaɣ-wɛ. Pamaɣzɩɣ pa-maɣmaɣ pa-tɩ yɔɔ ɖeke. Pɛwɛ ɛzɩ mɩndʋ ndʋ́ heɣlim kpakɩɣ nɛ tiiyeki se tɛʋ ɛnɩɩ yɔ. Pɛwɛ ɖɔɖɔ ɛzɩ tɩŋ weyi ɩɩlʋlʋʋ pee nɛ halɩ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ ɩ-lʋlʋʋ alɩwaatʋ yɔ. Pɛwɛ ɛzɩ tɩŋ weyi ɩwɩlaa nɛ pɛkpɛzɩ-ɩ yɔ.

eng: wild waves of the sea foaming up their own shame; wandering stars for whom the darkness of the underworld is reserved forever.
local: Panɩɣzɩnɩ teŋgu lɩm hola wena awɛ ɖoŋ yɔ nɛ pa-lakasɩ nzɩ́ sɩkpaɣ ɛyáa fɛyɛ yɔ sɩsɩ ñanɩɣzɩnɩ azuluma wena hola ana akɔŋna yɔ. Pɛwɛ ɛzɩ tɩɩnzɩ nzɩ́ sɩɩcakɩ lone kʋɖʋmɖɩyɛ taa yɔ. Pʋ-yɔɔ Ɛsɔ ñɔɔzɩ-wɛ ɖɩjaɣyɛ cɩkpɛndʋʋ sɔsɔʋ taa se pacaɣ peeɖe tam.

eng: Enoch, who lived seven generations after Adam, prophesied about these people when he said, See, the Lord comes with his countless holy ones.
local: Enɔɔkɩ weyi ɛkɛ lʋbɛ ñɩnʋ Aɖam liɖe taa yɔ, Ɛsɔ keheyi-i nɛ esusi pɔ-tɔm ɖooo lɔŋ se: «Iwelesi nɛ ɩnɩɩ, Kɩpaɣlʋ nɛ ɛ-ñɩma kutokiŋ ɛgbaŋ ɛgbaŋ pɔkɔŋ.

eng: to execute judgment on everyone and to convict everyone about every ungodly deed they have committed in their ungodliness as well as all the harsh things that sinful ungodly people have said against him.
local: se pahʋʋnɩ ɛyáa tɩŋa payɩ nɛ pakʋ mbá paañaŋ Ɛsɔ yɔ patɩŋa payɩ pɔ-tɔm. Pakʋʋ-tʋ ɛzaɣ́tʋ ndʋ́ tɩtɩŋa payɩ palabɩ Ɛsɔ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ. Pakʋʋ ɖɔɖɔ kɩwɛɛkɩm laɖaa ḿbá tɔm ɛzaɣ́tʋ ndʋ́ tɩtɩŋa payɩ pɔyɔɔdɩ-ɩ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ.».

eng: These are faultfinding grumblers, living according to their own desires. They speak arrogant words and they show partiality to people when they want a favor in return.
local: Ɛyáa ḿbá, pɔ-nɔsɩ taa ɛɛnɩɣ nɛ pɛwɛɛ patɩmɩɣ. Palakɩ kɩdɛkɛdɩm mbʋ́ pa-maɣmaɣ pe-liu wɛɛ yɔ. Pɔyɔɔdʋʋ tɔm camɩyɛ nɛ pepeɣziɣ ɛyáa nɛ pɔ-nɔɔ leleŋ se pehiɣ kɛzɛɣa.

eng: But you, dear friends, remember the words spoken beforehand by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Mɩ lɛ, ɩtɔzɩ tɔm ndʋ́ ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ tiyiyaa keheyi-mɩ se tɩkɔŋ labʋ yɔ tɩ-yɔɔ. Paaheyi-mɩ se: «Kɛtɛzaɣ alɩwaatʋ taa lɛ, nabɛyɛ wɛɣ nɛ powoŋuu-mɩ. Ḿbá ɛɛñaŋnɩ Ɛsɔ, palakɩ kɩdɛkɛdɩm mbʋ́ pa-maɣmaɣ pe-liu wɛɛ yɔ.».

eng: These people create divisions. Since they dont have the Spirit, they are worldly.
local: Ḿbá ɖɔɖɔ yekina nɛ ɛyáa tayɩɣ ɖama. Mbʋ́ pʋwɛ pa-maɣmaɣ pa-taa yɔ, pi-ɖeke palakɩ. Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu fɛyɩ pɔ-cɔlɔ.

eng: But you, dear friends: build each other up on the foundation of your most holy faith, pray in the Holy Spirit.
local: Mɛ-ɛgbaɣdɩnaa! Mɩ lɛ, ɩñaɣ pana nɛ ɩtɛzɩ pɩʋ lidaʋ kɩbaŋgʋ ŋgʋ́ Ɛsɔ yeba se ɩwɛnɩ ɛ-yɔɔ yɔ kɩ-taa. Ɩsɛɛ Ɛsɔ nɛ e-Fezuu Kiɖeɖeu ɖoŋ.

eng: keep each other in the love of God, wait for the mercy of our Lord Jesus Christ, who will give you eternal life.
local: Mɩ-ɛsɛ ɛsɛɛnɩ Ɛsɔ sɔɔlʋʋ nɛ ɩwɛɛ ɖaŋʋʋ yɔɔ se ɖa-Kɩpaɣlʋ Yesu Krɩstʋ naɣ mɩ-pʋtɔdɩyɛ nɛ ɛha-mɩ wezuu maatɛŋ.

eng: Have mercy on those who doubt.
local: Ɩna mbá papʋtʋʋ pa-taa yɔ pa-pʋtɔdɩyɛ:.

eng: Save some by snatching them from the fire. Fearing God, have mercy on some, hating even the clothing contaminated by their sinful urges.
local: ɩya pa-ñʋʋ nɛ ɩlɩzɩ-wɛ miŋ taa. Ɩna ɖɔɖɔ lɛlaa mbá pa-kɩwɛɛkɩm pisi-wɛ yɔ pa-pʋtɔdɩyɛ. Ɛlɛ́, ɩɖɔkɩ mɩ-tɩ nɛ wɛ. Ɩtaatukuni mbʋ́ pɛwɛna yɔ, halɩ pɩkpɛndɩnɩ po-tokonaa maɣmaɣ.

eng: To the one who is able to protect you from falling, and to present you blameless and rejoicing before his glorious presence.
local: Pasa weyi ɛpɩzɩɣ ehuuzi mɩ-yɔɔ se ɩtaatɔlɩ kaʋ yɔ. Ɛnʋ yekina se ɩwɛɛ cɩɖɩcɩɖɩ nɛ iwolo ɛ-cɔlɔ e-koboyaɣ taa nɛ mɩ-laŋa hʋlʋmɩ poyi poyi. Ɛnʋ lɛ Ɛsɔ kʋɖʋm koŋ weyi ɛwɛɛ yɔ.
